authors_text: Vishal Vinod,Tanmay Shah,Dmitry Lagun
title: TEGLO: High Fidelity Canonical Texture Mapping from Single-View Images
title_zh: TEGLO：来自单视图图像的高保真规范纹理映射
abstract: Recent work in Neural Fields (NFs) learn 3D representations from class-specific single view image collections. However, they are unable to reconstruct the input data preserving high-frequency details. Further, these methods do not disentangle appearance from geometry and hence are not suitable for tasks such as texture transfer and editing. In this work, we propose TEGLO (Textured EG3D-GLO) for learning 3D representations from single view in-the-wild image collections for a given class of objects. We accomplish this by training a conditional Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) without any explicit 3D supervision. We equip our method with editing capabilities by creating a dense correspondence mapping to a 2D canonical space. We demonstrate that such mapping enables texture transfer and texture editing without requiring meshes with shared topology. Our key insight is that by mapping the input image pixels onto the texture space we can achieve near perfect reconstruction (>= 74 dB PSNR at 1024^2 resolution). Our formulation allows for high quality 3D consistent novel view synthesis with high-frequency details at megapixel image resolution.
summary: Recent work in Neural Fields (NFs) learn 3D representations from class-specific single view image collections. However, they are unable to reconstruct the input data preserving high-frequency details. Further, these methods do not disentangle appearance from geometry and hence are not suitable for tasks such as texture transfer and editing. In this work, we propose TEGLO (Textured EG3D-GLO) for learning 3D representations from single view in-the-wild image collections for a given class of objects. We accomplish this by training a conditional Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) without any explicit 3D supervision. We equip our method with editing capabilities by creating a dense correspondence mapping to a 2D canonical space. We demonstrate that such mapping enables texture transfer and texture editing without requiring meshes with shared topology. Our key insight is that by mapping the input image pixels onto the texture space we can achieve near perfect reconstruction (>= 74 dB PSNR at 1024^2 resolution). Our formulation allows for high quality 3D consistent novel view synthesis with high-frequency details at megapixel image resolution.
abstract_zh: 神经场 (NF) 领域的最新工作从特定类别的单视图图像集合中学习 3D 表示。然而，他们无法重建保留高频细节的输入数据。此外，这些方法无法将外观与几何体分开，因此不适合纹理传输和编辑等任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了 TEGLO（纹理 EG3D-GLO），用于从给定类别对象的单视图野外图像集合中学习 3D 表示。我们通过在没有任何显式 3D 监督的情况下训练条件神经辐射场 (NeRF) 来实现这一目标。我们通过创建到 2D 规范空间的密集对应映射来为我们的方法配备编辑功能。我们证明这种映射可以实现纹理传输和纹理编辑，而不需要具有共享拓扑的网格。我们的主要见解是，通过将输入图像像素映射到纹理空间，我们可以实现近乎完美的重建（在 1024^2 分辨率下 >= 74 dB PSNR）。我们的配方可实现高质量 3D 一致的新颖视图合成，并具有百万像素图像分辨率的高频细节。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为TEGLO的方法，用于从单视角图像中学习高保真度的三维纹理映射表示。
AI.motivation: 现有神经场方法无法保留高频细节且无法分离外观与几何信息，导致无法进行纹理迁移和编辑。本文旨在解决这一问题，实现高保真纹理映射。
AI.method: 通过训练无显式三维监督的条件神经辐射场（NeRF），并构建输入图像像素到二维规范空间的密集对应映射，实现纹理迁移和编辑。
AI.result: 在1024²分辨率下达到≥74 dB PSNR的近完美重建效果，并支持高分辨率的高质量三维一致新视角合成。
AI.conclusion: TEGLO方法有效解决了纹理分离与编辑问题，无需共享拓扑网格即可实现高保真纹理迁移和高精度三维重建。

search_text: TEGLO: High Fidelity Canonical Texture Mapping from Single-View Images TEGLO：来自单视图图像的高保真规范纹理映射 Recent work in Neural Fields (NFs) learn 3D representations from class-specific single view image collections. However, they are unable to reconstruct the input data preserving high-frequency details. Further, these methods do not disentangle appearance from geometry and hence are not suitable for tasks such as texture transfer and editing. In this work, we propose TEGLO (Textured EG3D-GLO) for learning 3D representations from single view in-the-wild image collections for a given class of objects. We accomplish this by training a conditional Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) without any explicit 3D supervision. We equip our method with editing capabilities by creating a dense correspondence mapping to a 2D canonical space. We demonstrate that such mapping enables texture transfer and texture editing without requiring meshes with shared topology. Our key insight is that by mapping the input image pixels onto the texture space we can achieve near perfect reconstruction (>= 74 dB PSNR at 1024^2 resolution). Our formulation allows for high quality 3D consistent novel view synthesis with high-frequency details at megapixel image resolution. 神经场 (NF) 领域的最新工作从特定类别的单视图图像集合中学习 3D 表示。然而，他们无法重建保留高频细节的输入数据。此外，这些方法无法将外观与几何体分开，因此不适合纹理传输和编辑等任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了 TEGLO（纹理 EG3D-GLO），用于从给定类别对象的单视图野外图像集合中学习 3D 表示。我们通过在没有任何显式 3D 监督的情况下训练条件神经辐射场 (NeRF) 来实现这一目标。我们通过创建到 2D 规范空间的密集对应映射来为我们的方法配备编辑功能。我们证明这种映射可以实现纹理传输和纹理编辑，而不需要具有共享拓扑的网格。我们的主要见解是，通过将输入图像像素映射到纹理空间，我们可以实现近乎完美的重建（在 1024^2 分辨率下 >= 74 dB PSNR）。我们的配方可实现高质量 3D 一致的新颖视图合成，并具有百万像素图像分辨率的高频细节。 该论文提出了一种名为TEGLO的方法，用于从单视角图像中学习高保真度的三维纹理映射表示。 Vishal Vinod,Tanmay Shah,Dmitry Lagun cs.CV

authors_text: Yulin Luo,Rui Zhao,Xiaobao Wei,Jinwei Chen,Yijie Lu,Shenghao Xie,Tianyu Wang,Ruiqin Xiong,Ming Lu,Shanghang Zhang
title: WM-MoE: Weather-aware Multi-scale Mixture-of-Experts for Blind Adverse Weather Removal
title_zh: WM-MoE：天气感知多尺度专家组合，用于盲目消除恶劣天气
abstract: Adverse weather removal tasks like deraining, desnowing, and dehazing are usually treated as separate tasks. However, in practical autonomous driving scenarios, the type, intensity,and mixing degree of weather are unknown, so handling each task separately cannot deal with the complex practical scenarios. In this paper, we study the blind adverse weather removal problem. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) is a popular model that adopts a learnable gate to route the input to different expert networks. The principle of MoE involves using adaptive networks to process different types of unknown inputs. Therefore, MoE has great potential for blind adverse weather removal. However, the original MoE module is inadequate for coupled multiple weather types and fails to utilize multi-scale features for better performance. To this end, we propose a method called Weather-aware Multi-scale MoE (WM-MoE) based on Transformer for blind weather removal. WM-MoE includes two key designs: WEather-Aware Router (WEAR) and Multi-Scale Experts (MSE). WEAR assigns experts for each image token based on decoupled content and weather features, which enhances the model's capability to process multiple adverse weathers. To obtain discriminative weather features from images, we propose Weather Guidance Fine-grained Contrastive Learning (WGF-CL), which utilizes weather cluster information to guide the assignment of positive and negative samples for each image token. Since processing different weather types requires different receptive fields, MSE leverages multi-scale features to enhance the spatial relationship modeling capability, facilitating the high-quality restoration of diverse weather types and intensities. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in blind adverse weather removal on two public datasets and our dataset. We also demonstrate the advantage of our method on downstream segmentation tasks.
summary: Adverse weather removal tasks like deraining, desnowing, and dehazing are usually treated as separate tasks. However, in practical autonomous driving scenarios, the type, intensity,and mixing degree of weather are unknown, so handling each task separately cannot deal with the complex practical scenarios. In this paper, we study the blind adverse weather removal problem. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) is a popular model that adopts a learnable gate to route the input to different expert networks. The principle of MoE involves using adaptive networks to process different types of unknown inputs. Therefore, MoE has great potential for blind adverse weather removal. However, the original MoE module is inadequate for coupled multiple weather types and fails to utilize multi-scale features for better performance. To this end, we propose a method called Weather-aware Multi-scale MoE (WM-MoE) based on Transformer for blind weather removal. WM-MoE includes two key designs: WEather-Aware Router (WEAR) and Multi-Scale Experts (MSE). WEAR assigns experts for each image token based on decoupled content and weather features, which enhances the model's capability to process multiple adverse weathers. To obtain discriminative weather features from images, we propose Weather Guidance Fine-grained Contrastive Learning (WGF-CL), which utilizes weather cluster information to guide the assignment of positive and negative samples for each image token. Since processing different weather types requires different receptive fields, MSE leverages multi-scale features to enhance the spatial relationship modeling capability, facilitating the high-quality restoration of diverse weather types and intensities. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in blind adverse weather removal on two public datasets and our dataset. We also demonstrate the advantage of our method on downstream segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 除雨、除雪和除雾等恶劣天气清除任务通常被视为单独的任务。然而，在实际的自动驾驶场景中，天气的类型、强度和混合程度都是未知的，单独处理每个任务无法应对复杂的实际场景。本文研究了盲目的恶劣天气去除问题。专家混合（MoE）是一种流行的模型，它采用可学习的门将输入路由到不同的专家网络。 MoE 的原理涉及使用自适应网络来处理不同类型的未知输入。因此，MoE在盲目消除恶劣天气方面具有巨大潜力。然而，原始的 MoE 模块不足以耦合多种天气类型，并且无法利用多尺度特征来获得更好的性能。为此，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的天气感知多尺度 MoE（WM-MoE）方法，用于盲目天气去除。 WM-MoE 包括两个关键设计：WEather-Aware Router (WEAR) 和 Multi-Scale Experts (MSE)。 WEAR根据解耦的内容和天气特征为每个图像令牌分配专家，这增强了模型处理多种恶劣天气的能力。为了从图像中获得有区别的天气特征，我们提出了天气指导细粒度对比学习（WGF-CL），它利用天气聚类信息来指导每个图像标记的正样本和负样本的分配。由于处理不同的天气类型需要不同的感受野，MSE利用多尺度特征来增强空间关系建模能力，有利于多种天气类型和强度的高质量恢复。我们的方法在两个公共数据集和我们的数据集上实现了盲目恶劣天气去除的最先进性能。我们还展示了我们的方法在下游分割任务上的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的Weather-aware Multi-scale Mixture-of-Experts (WM-MoE)方法，用于解决未知类型和强度的复杂恶劣天气盲去除问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将去雨、去雪、去雾等任务分开处理，无法应对实际场景中多天气耦合和未知混合情况；传统MoE模块未能有效利用多尺度特征处理复杂天气。
AI.method: 设计了WEather-Aware Router (WEAR)和Multi-Scale Experts (MSE)模块，结合Weather Guidance Fine-grained Contrastive Learning (WGF-CL)学习天气特征，通过多尺度特征建模提升空间关系处理能力。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集和自建数据集上达到SOTA性能，并在下游分割任务中验证了方法优势。
AI.conclusion: WM-MoE通过天气感知路由和多尺度专家网络，有效解决了复杂天气盲去除问题，为自动驾驶等场景提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Yiran Li,Junpeng Wang,Xin Dai,Liang Wang,Chin-Chia Michael Yeh,Yan Zheng,Wei Zhang,Kwan-Liu Ma
title: How Does Attention Work in Vision Transformers? A Visual Analytics Attempt
title_zh: 注意力在视觉变形金刚中如何发挥作用？视觉分析尝试
comment: Accepted by PacificVis 2023 and selected to be published in TVCG
comments: Accepted by PacificVis 2023 and selected to be published in TVCG
abstract: Vision transformer (ViT) expands the success of transformer models from sequential data to images. The model decomposes an image into many smaller patches and arranges them into a sequence. Multi-head self-attentions are then applied to the sequence to learn the attention between patches. Despite many successful interpretations of transformers on sequential data, little effort has been devoted to the interpretation of ViTs, and many questions remain unanswered. For example, among the numerous attention heads, which one is more important? How strong are individual patches attending to their spatial neighbors in different heads? What attention patterns have individual heads learned? In this work, we answer these questions through a visual analytics approach. Specifically, we first identify what heads are more important in ViTs by introducing multiple pruning-based metrics. Then, we profile the spatial distribution of attention strengths between patches inside individual heads, as well as the trend of attention strengths across attention layers. Third, using an autoencoder-based learning solution, we summarize all possible attention patterns that individual heads could learn. Examining the attention strengths and patterns of the important heads, we answer why they are important. Through concrete case studies with experienced deep learning experts on multiple ViTs, we validate the effectiveness of our solution that deepens the understanding of ViTs from head importance, head attention strength, and head attention pattern.
summary: Vision transformer (ViT) expands the success of transformer models from sequential data to images. The model decomposes an image into many smaller patches and arranges them into a sequence. Multi-head self-attentions are then applied to the sequence to learn the attention between patches. For example, among the numerous attention heads, which one is more important? How strong are individual patches attending to their spatial neighbors in different heads? Specifically, we first identify what heads are more important in ViTs by introducing multiple pruning-based metrics. Then, we profile the spatial distribution of attention strengths between patches inside individual heads, as well as the trend of attention strengths across attention layers. Third, using an autoencoder-based learning solution, we summarize all possible attention patterns that individual heads could learn. Examining the attention strengths and patterns of the important heads, we answer why they are important. Through concrete case studies with experienced deep learning experts on multiple ViTs, we validate the effectiveness of our solution that deepens the understanding of ViTs from head importance, head attention strength, and head attention pattern.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformer (ViT) 将 Transformer 模型的成功从序列数据扩展到图像。该模型将图像分解为许多较小的块，并将它们排列成一个序列。然后将多头自注意力应用于序列以学习补丁之间的注意力。尽管对序列数据的 Transformer 进行了许多成功的解释，但对 ViT 的解释却投入很少的精力，并且许多问题仍未得到解答。比如，在众多的关注头中，哪一个更重要？各个斑块对不同头部的空间邻居的关注程度有多强？各个头脑学到了哪些注意力模式？在这项工作中，我们通过可视化分析方法回答这些问题。具体来说，我们首先通过引入多个基于剪枝的指标来确定 ViT 中哪些头更重要。然后，我们分析各个头部内斑块之间注意力强度的空间分布，以及跨注意力层的注意力强度趋势。第三，使用基于自动编码器的学习解决方案，我们总结了各个头可以学习的所有可能的注意力模式。通过检查重要负责人的注意力强度和模式，我们可以回答它们为何重要。通过与经验丰富的深度学习专家对多个 ViT 进行具体案例研究，我们验证了我们的解决方案的有效性，该解决方案从头部重要性、头部注意力强度和头部注意力模式加深了对 ViT 的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过可视化分析方法研究视觉Transformer（ViT）中注意力机制的工作原理，探讨不同注意力头的重要性、空间分布及学习模式。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在序列数据上已有许多解释，但针对ViT的注意力机制研究仍不足，存在注意力头重要性、空间邻域关注度及学习模式等未解问题。
AI.method: 引入基于剪枝的指标识别重要注意力头，分析单个头内注意力强度的空间分布及跨层趋势，并利用自编码器总结注意力模式。
AI.result: 通过专家案例验证，证明该方法能有效解析ViT的注意力头重要性、强度分布及模式，深化对ViT的理解。
AI.conclusion: 提出的解决方案从注意力头重要性、强度及模式三个维度系统性提升了对ViT工作机制的认知。

search_text: How Does Attention Work in Vision Transformers? A Visual Analytics Attempt 注意力在视觉变形金刚中如何发挥作用？视觉分析尝试 Vision transformer (ViT) expands the success of transformer models from sequential data to images. The model decomposes an image into many smaller patches and arranges them into a sequence. Multi-head self-attentions are then applied to the sequence to learn the attention between patches. Despite many successful interpretations of transformers on sequential data, little effort has been devoted to the interpretation of ViTs, and many questions remain unanswered. For example, among the numerous attention heads, which one is more important? How strong are individual patches attending to their spatial neighbors in different heads? What attention patterns have individual heads learned? In this work, we answer these questions through a visual analytics approach. Specifically, we first identify what heads are more important in ViTs by introducing multiple pruning-based metrics. Then, we profile the spatial distribution of attention strengths between patches inside individual heads, as well as the trend of attention strengths across attention layers. Third, using an autoencoder-based learning solution, we summarize all possible attention patterns that individual heads could learn. Examining the attention strengths and patterns of the important heads, we answer why they are important. Through concrete case studies with experienced deep learning experts on multiple ViTs, we validate the effectiveness of our solution that deepens the understanding of ViTs from head importance, head attention strength, and head attention pattern. Vision Transformer (ViT) 将 Transformer 模型的成功从序列数据扩展到图像。该模型将图像分解为许多较小的块，并将它们排列成一个序列。然后将多头自注意力应用于序列以学习补丁之间的注意力。尽管对序列数据的 Transformer 进行了许多成功的解释，但对 ViT 的解释却投入很少的精力，并且许多问题仍未得到解答。比如，在众多的关注头中，哪一个更重要？各个斑块对不同头部的空间邻居的关注程度有多强？各个头脑学到了哪些注意力模式？在这项工作中，我们通过可视化分析方法回答这些问题。具体来说，我们首先通过引入多个基于剪枝的指标来确定 ViT 中哪些头更重要。然后，我们分析各个头部内斑块之间注意力强度的空间分布，以及跨注意力层的注意力强度趋势。第三，使用基于自动编码器的学习解决方案，我们总结了各个头可以学习的所有可能的注意力模式。通过检查重要负责人的注意力强度和模式，我们可以回答它们为何重要。通过与经验丰富的深度学习专家对多个 ViT 进行具体案例研究，我们验证了我们的解决方案的有效性，该解决方案从头部重要性、头部注意力强度和头部注意力模式加深了对 ViT 的理解。 本文通过可视化分析方法研究视觉Transformer（ViT）中注意力机制的工作原理，探讨不同注意力头的重要性、空间分布及学习模式。 Yiran Li,Junpeng Wang,Xin Dai,Liang Wang,Chin-Chia Michael Yeh,Yan Zheng,Wei Zhang,Kwan-Liu Ma cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Jaehyun Shim,Carlos Mastalli,Thomas Corbères,Steve Tonneau,Vladimir Ivan,Sethu Vijayakumar
title: Topology-Based MPC for Automatic Footstep Placement and Contact Surface Selection
title_zh: 基于拓扑的 MPC，用于自动足迹放置和接触面选择
abstract: State-of-the-art approaches to footstep planning assume reduced-order dynamics when solving the combinatorial problem of selecting contact surfaces in real time. However, in exchange for computational efficiency, these approaches ignore joint torque limits and limb dynamics. In this work, we address these limitations by presenting a topology-based approach that enables model predictive control (MPC) to simultaneously plan full-body motions, torque commands, footstep placements, and contact surfaces in real time. To determine if a robot's foot is inside a contact surface, we borrow the winding number concept from topology. We then use this winding number and potential field to create a contact-surface penalty function. By using this penalty function, MPC can select a contact surface from all candidate surfaces in the vicinity and determine footstep placements within it. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach by showing the impact of considering full-body dynamics, which includes joint torque limits and limb dynamics, on the selection of footstep placements and contact surfaces. Furthermore, we validate the feasibility of deploying our topology-based approach in an MPC scheme and explore its potential capabilities through a series of experimental and simulation trials.
summary: State-of-the-art approaches to footstep planning assume reduced-order dynamics when solving the combinatorial problem of selecting contact surfaces in real time. However, in exchange for computational efficiency, these approaches ignore joint torque limits and limb dynamics. In this work, we address these limitations by presenting a topology-based approach that enables model predictive control (MPC) to simultaneously plan full-body motions, torque commands, footstep placements, and contact surfaces in real time. To determine if a robot's foot is inside a contact surface, we borrow the winding number concept from topology. We then use this winding number and potential field to create a contact-surface penalty function. By using this penalty function, MPC can select a contact surface from all candidate surfaces in the vicinity and determine footstep placements within it. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach by showing the impact of considering full-body dynamics, which includes joint torque limits and limb dynamics, on the selection of footstep placements and contact surfaces. Furthermore, we validate the feasibility of deploying our topology-based approach in an MPC scheme and explore its potential capabilities through a series of experimental and simulation trials.
abstract_zh: 在解决实时选择接触面的组合问题时，最先进的足迹规划方法假设降阶动力学。然而，为了换取计算效率，这些方法忽略了关节扭矩限制和肢体动力学。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种基于拓扑的方法来解决这些限制，该方法使模型预测控制（MPC）能够实时同时规划全身运动、扭矩命令、脚步放置和接触表面。为了确定机器人的脚是否在接触面内，我们借用了拓扑中的绕数概念。然后，我们使用该绕数和势场来创建接触表面罚函数。通过使用此惩罚函数，MPC 可以从附近的所有候选表面中选择一个接触表面，并确定其中的足迹位置。我们通过展示考虑全身动力学（包括关节扭矩限制和肢体动力学）对脚步放置和接触表面选择的影响来展示我们方法的好处。此外，我们验证了在 MPC 方案中部署基于拓扑的方法的可行性，并通过一系列实验和模拟试验探索其潜在功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于拓扑的模型预测控制（MPC）方法，用于实时规划机器人全身运动、力矩指令、步态位置及接触面选择。
AI.motivation: 现有步态规划方法因简化动力学模型而忽略关节力矩限制和肢体动力学，导致规划安全性与准确性不足。
AI.method: 引入拓扑学中的环绕数概念与势场，构建接触面惩罚函数，集成至MPC框架中实现多目标实时优化。
AI.result: 实验验证了考虑全身动力学对步态规划与接触面选择的显著影响，证明方法在复杂场景下的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该拓扑MPC方法有效融合全身动力学约束，为机器人自主运动规划提供了更安全、精确的解决方案。

authors_text: Weide Liu,Zhonghua Wu,Yang Zhao,Yuming Fang,Chuan-Sheng Foo,Jun Cheng,Guosheng Lin
title: Harmonizing Base and Novel Classes: A Class-Contrastive Approach for Generalized Few-Shot Segmentation
title_zh: 协调基础类和新类：广义少样本分割的类对比方法
abstract: Current methods for few-shot segmentation (FSSeg) have mainly focused on improving the performance of novel classes while neglecting the performance of base classes. To overcome this limitation, the task of generalized few-shot semantic segmentation (GFSSeg) has been introduced, aiming to predict segmentation masks for both base and novel classes. However, the current prototype-based methods do not explicitly consider the relationship between base and novel classes when updating prototypes, leading to a limited performance in identifying true categories. To address this challenge, we propose a class contrastive loss and a class relationship loss to regulate prototype updates and encourage a large distance between prototypes from different classes, thus distinguishing the classes from each other while maintaining the performance of the base classes. Our proposed approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance for the generalized few-shot segmentation task on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets.
summary: Current methods for few-shot segmentation (FSSeg) have mainly focused on improving the performance of novel classes while neglecting the performance of base classes. To overcome this limitation, the task of generalized few-shot semantic segmentation (GFSSeg) has been introduced, aiming to predict segmentation masks for both base and novel classes. However, the current prototype-based methods do not explicitly consider the relationship between base and novel classes when updating prototypes, leading to a limited performance in identifying true categories. To address this challenge, we propose a class contrastive loss and a class relationship loss to regulate prototype updates and encourage a large distance between prototypes from different classes, thus distinguishing the classes from each other while maintaining the performance of the base classes. Our proposed approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance for the generalized few-shot segmentation task on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets.
abstract_zh: 当前的少样本分割（FSSeg）方法主要集中于提高新类的性能，而忽略了基类的性能。为了克服这一限制，引入了广义少样本语义分割（GFSSeg）的任务，旨在预测基础类和新类的分割掩模。然而，当前基于原型的方法在更新原型时没有明确考虑基类和新类之间的关系，导致识别真实类别的性能有限。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了类对比损失和类关系损失来调节原型更新，并鼓励不同类的原型之间保持较大距离，从而在保持基类性能的同时区分类。我们提出的方法在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 数据集上的广义少镜头分割任务中实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种类对比方法，用于解决广义少样本分割任务中基础类和新类性能不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分割方法过度关注新类性能，忽视基础类表现，导致原型更新时未明确考虑两类关系，影响整体分割效果。
AI.method: 设计类对比损失和类关系损失，通过调节原型更新过程，增大不同类别原型间的距离，同时保持基础类性能。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上达到广义少样本分割任务的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式建模类间关系，在保持基础类性能的同时提升新类分割效果，为广义少样本分割提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种类对比方法，用于解决广义少样本分割任务中基础类和新类性能不平衡的问题。
motivation: 现有少样本分割方法过度关注新类性能，忽视基础类表现，导致原型更新时未明确考虑两类关系，影响整体分割效果。
method: 设计类对比损失和类关系损失，通过调节原型更新过程，增大不同类别原型间的距离，同时保持基础类性能。
result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上达到广义少样本分割任务的最先进水平。
conclusion: 该方法通过显式建模类间关系，在保持基础类性能的同时提升新类分割效果，为广义少样本分割提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: Harmonizing Base and Novel Classes: A Class-Contrastive Approach for Generalized Few-Shot Segmentation 协调基础类和新类：广义少样本分割的类对比方法 Current methods for few-shot segmentation (FSSeg) have mainly focused on improving the performance of novel classes while neglecting the performance of base classes. To overcome this limitation, the task of generalized few-shot semantic segmentation (GFSSeg) has been introduced, aiming to predict segmentation masks for both base and novel classes. However, the current prototype-based methods do not explicitly consider the relationship between base and novel classes when updating prototypes, leading to a limited performance in identifying true categories. To address this challenge, we propose a class contrastive loss and a class relationship loss to regulate prototype updates and encourage a large distance between prototypes from different classes, thus distinguishing the classes from each other while maintaining the performance of the base classes. Our proposed approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance for the generalized few-shot segmentation task on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets. 当前的少样本分割（FSSeg）方法主要集中于提高新类的性能，而忽略了基类的性能。为了克服这一限制，引入了广义少样本语义分割（GFSSeg）的任务，旨在预测基础类和新类的分割掩模。然而，当前基于原型的方法在更新原型时没有明确考虑基类和新类之间的关系，导致识别真实类别的性能有限。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了类对比损失和类关系损失来调节原型更新，并鼓励不同类的原型之间保持较大距离，从而在保持基类性能的同时区分类。我们提出的方法在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 数据集上的广义少镜头分割任务中实现了新的最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种类对比方法，用于解决广义少样本分割任务中基础类和新类性能不平衡的问题。 Weide Liu,Zhonghua Wu,Yang Zhao,Yuming Fang,Chuan-Sheng Foo,Jun Cheng,Guosheng Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Troy Luhman,Eric Luhman
title: High Fidelity Image Synthesis With Deep VAEs In Latent Space
title_zh: 潜在空间中深度 VAE 的高保真图像合成
abstract: We present fast, realistic image generation on high-resolution, multimodal datasets using hierarchical variational autoencoders (VAEs) trained on a deterministic autoencoder's latent space. In this two-stage setup, the autoencoder compresses the image into its semantic features, which are then modeled with a deep VAE. With this method, the VAE avoids modeling the fine-grained details that constitute the majority of the image's code length, allowing it to focus on learning its structural components. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our two-stage approach, achieving a FID of 9.34 on the ImageNet-256 dataset which is comparable to BigGAN. We make our implementation available online.
summary: We present fast, realistic image generation on high-resolution, multimodal datasets using hierarchical variational autoencoders (VAEs) trained on a deterministic autoencoder's latent space. In this two-stage setup, the autoencoder compresses the image into its semantic features, which are then modeled with a deep VAE. With this method, the VAE avoids modeling the fine-grained details that constitute the majority of the image's code length, allowing it to focus on learning its structural components. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our two-stage approach, achieving a FID of 9.34 on the ImageNet-256 dataset which is comparable to BigGAN. We make our implementation available online.
abstract_zh: 我们使用在确定性自动编码器的潜在空间上训练的分层变分自动编码器（VAE）在高分辨率、多模态数据集上实现快速、真实的图像生成。在这个两阶段设置中，自动编码器将图像压缩为其语义特征，然后使用深度 VAE 对其进行建模。通过这种方法，VAE 避免了对构成图像代码长度大部分的细粒度细节进行建模，从而使其能够专注于学习其结构组件。我们展示了两阶段方法的有效性，在 ImageNet-256 数据集上实现了 9.34 的 FID，与 BigGAN 相当。我们在线提供实施方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层变分自编码器（VAE）的高保真图像生成方法，通过两阶段策略在潜在空间中实现高质量图像合成。
AI.motivation: 传统VAE在生成高分辨率图像时面临细节建模困难与计算复杂度高的问题，需探索更高效的结构化特征建模方式。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：首先用确定性自编码器提取图像语义特征，再通过深度VAE对潜在空间进行建模，避免直接处理细粒度像素信息。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-256数据集上达到9.34的FID分数，性能与BigGAN相当，并开源了实现代码。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段建模策略有效提升了图像生成质量，证明了潜在空间结构化特征学习在高保真合成中的可行性。

authors_text: Huajie Chen,Tianqing Zhu,Yuan Zhao,Bo Liu,Xin Yu,Wanlei Zhou
title: Low-frequency Image Deep Steganography: Manipulate the Frequency Distribution to Hide Secrets with Tenacious Robustness
title_zh: 低频图像深度隐写术：操纵频率分布以顽强的鲁棒性隐藏秘密
abstract: Image deep steganography (IDS) is a technique that utilizes deep learning to embed a secret image invisibly into a cover image to generate a container image. However, the container images generated by convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are vulnerable to attacks that distort their high-frequency components. To address this problem, we propose a novel method called Low-frequency Image Deep Steganography (LIDS) that allows frequency distribution manipulation in the embedding process. LIDS extracts a feature map from the secret image and adds it to the cover image to yield the container image. The container image is not directly output by the CNNs, and thus, it does not contain high-frequency artifacts. The extracted feature map is regulated by a frequency loss to ensure that its frequency distribution mainly concentrates on the low-frequency domain. To further enhance robustness, an attack layer is inserted to damage the container image. The retrieval network then retrieves a recovered secret image from a damaged container image. Our experiments demonstrate that LIDS outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of robustness, while maintaining high fidelity and specificity. By avoiding high-frequency artifacts and manipulating the frequency distribution of the embedded feature map, LIDS achieves improved robustness against attacks that distort the high-frequency components of container images.
summary: Image deep steganography (IDS) is a technique that utilizes deep learning to embed a secret image invisibly into a cover image to generate a container image. However, the container images generated by convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are vulnerable to attacks that distort their high-frequency components. To address this problem, we propose a novel method called Low-frequency Image Deep Steganography (LIDS) that allows frequency distribution manipulation in the embedding process. LIDS extracts a feature map from the secret image and adds it to the cover image to yield the container image. The container image is not directly output by the CNNs, and thus, it does not contain high-frequency artifacts. The extracted feature map is regulated by a frequency loss to ensure that its frequency distribution mainly concentrates on the low-frequency domain. To further enhance robustness, an attack layer is inserted to damage the container image. The retrieval network then retrieves a recovered secret image from a damaged container image. Our experiments demonstrate that LIDS outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of robustness, while maintaining high fidelity and specificity. By avoiding high-frequency artifacts and manipulating the frequency distribution of the embedded feature map, LIDS achieves improved robustness against attacks that distort the high-frequency components of container images.
abstract_zh: 图像深度隐写术（IDS）是一种利用深度学习将秘密图像无形地嵌入到封面图像中以生成容器图像的技术。然而，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 生成的容器图像很容易受到导致其高频分量失真的攻击。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为低频图像深度隐写术（LIDS）的新方法，它允许在嵌入过程中操纵频率​​分布。 LIDS 从秘密图像中提取特征图并将其添加到封面图像中以生成容器图像。容器图像不是由 CNN 直接输出，因此它不包含高频伪影。提取的特征图通过频率损失进行调节，以确保其频率分布主要集中在低频域。为了进一步增强鲁棒性，插入攻击层来破坏容器镜像。然后，检索网络从损坏的容器映像中检索恢复的秘密映像。我们的实验表明，LIDS 在鲁棒性方面优于最先进的方法，同时保持高保真度和特异性。通过避免高频伪影并操纵嵌入特征图的频率分布，LIDS 提高了针对扭曲容器图像高频成分的攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LIDS的低频图像深度隐写方法，通过调整频率分布以增强隐写图像的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的图像隐写方法生成的容器图像容易受到高频频段攻击，导致秘密信息泄露。
AI.method: LIDS通过提取秘密图像特征图并将其添加至载体图像生成容器图像，利用频率损失约束特征图的低频分布，并引入攻击层提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明LIDS在抗攻击鲁棒性、图像保真度和秘密信息特异性方面优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过避免高频伪影和频率分布调控，LIDS有效提升了容器图像对高频攻击的抵抗能力。

authors_text: Ruqing Xu,Sarah Dean
title: Decision-aid or Controller? Steering Human Decision Makers with Algorithms
title_zh: 决策辅助者还是控制者？用算法指导人类决策者
abstract: Algorithms are used to aid human decision makers by making predictions and recommending decisions. Currently, these algorithms are trained to optimize prediction accuracy. What if they were optimized to control final decisions? In this paper, we study a decision-aid algorithm that learns about the human decision maker and provides ''personalized recommendations'' to influence final decisions. We first consider fixed human decision functions which map observable features and the algorithm's recommendations to final decisions. We characterize the conditions under which perfect control over final decisions is attainable. Under fairly general assumptions, the parameters of the human decision function can be identified from past interactions between the algorithm and the human decision maker, even when the algorithm was constrained to make truthful recommendations. We then consider a decision maker who is aware of the algorithm's manipulation and responds strategically. By posing the setting as a variation of the cheap talk game [Crawford and Sobel, 1982], we show that all equilibria are partition equilibria where only coarse information is shared: the algorithm recommends an interval containing the ideal decision. We discuss the potential applications of such algorithms and their social implications.
summary: Algorithms are used to aid human decision makers by making predictions and recommending decisions. Currently, these algorithms are trained to optimize prediction accuracy. What if they were optimized to control final decisions? In this paper, we study a decision-aid algorithm that learns about the human decision maker and provides ''personalized recommendations'' to influence final decisions. We first consider fixed human decision functions which map observable features and the algorithm's recommendations to final decisions. We characterize the conditions under which perfect control over final decisions is attainable. Under fairly general assumptions, the parameters of the human decision function can be identified from past interactions between the algorithm and the human decision maker, even when the algorithm was constrained to make truthful recommendations. We then consider a decision maker who is aware of the algorithm's manipulation and responds strategically. By posing the setting as a variation of the cheap talk game [Crawford and Sobel, 1982], we show that all equilibria are partition equilibria where only coarse information is shared: the algorithm recommends an interval containing the ideal decision. We discuss the potential applications of such algorithms and their social implications.
abstract_zh: 算法用于通过做出预测和建议决策来帮助人类决策者。目前，这些算法经过训练以优化预测准确性。如果对它们进行优化以控制最终决策会怎样？在本文中，我们研究了一种决策辅助算法，该算法可以了解人类决策者并提供“个性化建议”来影响最终决策。我们首先考虑固定的人类决策函数，它将可观察的特征和算法的建议映射到最终决策。我们描述了可以实现对最终决策的完美控制的条件。在相当普遍的假设下，人类决策函数的参数可以从算法和人类决策者之间过去的交互中识别出来，即使算法被限制为做出真实的推荐。然后，我们考虑一个了解算法操纵并做出战略性响应的决策者。通过将设置视为廉价谈话游戏的变体 [Crawford 和 Sobel，1982]，我们表明所有均衡都是分区均衡，其中仅共享粗略信息：算法推荐包含理想决策的区间。我们讨论此类算法的潜在应用及其社会影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了算法如何通过个性化推荐影响人类决策者，而非仅作为辅助工具。
AI.motivation: 当前算法主要优化预测准确性，但若算法目标转向控制最终决策，可能带来不同效果。
AI.method: 分析固定决策函数下的控制条件，结合博弈论中的廉价言论模型研究人类策略性响应。
AI.result: 证明在一般假设下可识别人类决策参数，并发现均衡状态下算法仅传递粗略信息区间。
AI.conclusion: 此类算法可能应用于决策引导领域，但需关注其对社会决策机制的潜在影响。

search_text: Decision-aid or Controller? Steering Human Decision Makers with Algorithms 决策辅助者还是控制者？用算法指导人类决策者 Algorithms are used to aid human decision makers by making predictions and recommending decisions. Currently, these algorithms are trained to optimize prediction accuracy. What if they were optimized to control final decisions? In this paper, we study a decision-aid algorithm that learns about the human decision maker and provides ''personalized recommendations'' to influence final decisions. We first consider fixed human decision functions which map observable features and the algorithm's recommendations to final decisions. We characterize the conditions under which perfect control over final decisions is attainable. Under fairly general assumptions, the parameters of the human decision function can be identified from past interactions between the algorithm and the human decision maker, even when the algorithm was constrained to make truthful recommendations. We then consider a decision maker who is aware of the algorithm's manipulation and responds strategically. By posing the setting as a variation of the cheap talk game [Crawford and Sobel, 1982], we show that all equilibria are partition equilibria where only coarse information is shared: the algorithm recommends an interval containing the ideal decision. We discuss the potential applications of such algorithms and their social implications. 算法用于通过做出预测和建议决策来帮助人类决策者。目前，这些算法经过训练以优化预测准确性。如果对它们进行优化以控制最终决策会怎样？在本文中，我们研究了一种决策辅助算法，该算法可以了解人类决策者并提供“个性化建议”来影响最终决策。我们首先考虑固定的人类决策函数，它将可观察的特征和算法的建议映射到最终决策。我们描述了可以实现对最终决策的完美控制的条件。在相当普遍的假设下，人类决策函数的参数可以从算法和人类决策者之间过去的交互中识别出来，即使算法被限制为做出真实的推荐。然后，我们考虑一个了解算法操纵并做出战略性响应的决策者。通过将设置视为廉价谈话游戏的变体 [Crawford 和 Sobel，1982]，我们表明所有均衡都是分区均衡，其中仅共享粗略信息：算法推荐包含理想决策的区间。我们讨论此类算法的潜在应用及其社会影响。 本文研究了算法如何通过个性化推荐影响人类决策者，而非仅作为辅助工具。 Ruqing Xu,Sarah Dean cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Bram Wallace,Akash Gokul,Stefano Ermon,Nikhil Naik
title: End-to-End Diffusion Latent Optimization Improves Classifier Guidance
title_zh: 端到端扩散潜在优化改进了分类器指导
abstract: Classifier guidance -- using the gradients of an image classifier to steer the generations of a diffusion model -- has the potential to dramatically expand the creative control over image generation and editing. However, currently classifier guidance requires either training new noise-aware models to obtain accurate gradients or using a one-step denoising approximation of the final generation, which leads to misaligned gradients and sub-optimal control. We highlight this approximation's shortcomings and propose a novel guidance method: Direct Optimization of Diffusion Latents (DOODL), which enables plug-and-play guidance by optimizing diffusion latents w.r.t. the gradients of a pre-trained classifier on the true generated pixels, using an invertible diffusion process to achieve memory-efficient backpropagation. Showcasing the potential of more precise guidance, DOODL outperforms one-step classifier guidance on computational and human evaluation metrics across different forms of guidance: using CLIP guidance to improve generations of complex prompts from DrawBench, using fine-grained visual classifiers to expand the vocabulary of Stable Diffusion, enabling image-conditioned generation with a CLIP visual encoder, and improving image aesthetics using an aesthetic scoring network. Code at https://github.com/salesforce/DOODL.
summary: Classifier guidance -- using the gradients of an image classifier to steer the generations of a diffusion model -- has the potential to dramatically expand the creative control over image generation and editing. However, currently classifier guidance requires either training new noise-aware models to obtain accurate gradients or using a one-step denoising approximation of the final generation, which leads to misaligned gradients and sub-optimal control. We highlight this approximation's shortcomings and propose a novel guidance method: Direct Optimization of Diffusion Latents (DOODL), which enables plug-and-play guidance by optimizing diffusion latents w.r.t. the gradients of a pre-trained classifier on the true generated pixels, using an invertible diffusion process to achieve memory-efficient backpropagation. Showcasing the potential of more precise guidance, DOODL outperforms one-step classifier guidance on computational and human evaluation metrics across different forms of guidance: using CLIP guidance to improve generations of complex prompts from DrawBench, using fine-grained visual classifiers to expand the vocabulary of Stable Diffusion, enabling image-conditioned generation with a CLIP visual encoder, and improving image aesthetics using an aesthetic scoring network. Code at https://github.com/salesforce/DOODL.
abstract_zh: 分类器引导——使用图像分类器的梯度来引导扩散模型的生成——有可能显着扩展对图像生成和编辑的创意控制。然而，目前的分类器指导需要训练新的噪声感知模型以获得准确的梯度，或者使用最终一代的一步去噪近似，这会导致梯度错位和次优控制。我们强调了这种近似的缺点，并提出了一种新颖的指导方法：扩散潜伏直接优化（DOODL），它通过优化扩散潜伏来实现即插即用指导。预训练分类器在真实生成像素上的梯度，使用可逆扩散过程来实现内存高效的反向传播。 DOODL 展示了更精确指导的潜力，在不同指导形式的计算和人类评估指标上优于一步分类器指导：使用 CLIP 指导来改进 DrawBench 中复杂提示的生成，使用细粒度视觉分类器来扩展稳定扩散的词汇量，使用 CLIP 视觉编码器实现图像条件生成，并使用美学评分网络来提高图像美感。代码位于 https://github.com/salesforce/DOODL。

AI.tldr: 提出直接优化扩散潜变量（DOODL）方法，以提升分类器引导在图像生成中的精度与控制能力。
AI.motivation: 现有分类器引导方法需重新训练噪声感知模型或依赖一步去噪近似，导致梯度不匹配与控制效果欠佳。
AI.method: 通过可逆扩散过程实现潜变量优化，基于预训练分类器梯度进行端到端优化，提升反向传播效率。
AI.result: 在CLIP引导、Stable Diffusion词汇扩展、图像条件生成及美学优化等任务中，优于传统一步引导方法。
AI.conclusion: DOODL方法有效解决了分类器引导的梯度对齐问题，为精确控制图像生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Haoze Wu,Min Wu,Dorsa Sadigh,Clark Barrett
title: Soy: An Efficient MILP Solver for Piecewise-Affine Systems
title_zh: Soy：用于分段仿射系统的高效 MILP 求解器
abstract: Piecewise-affine (PWA) systems are widely used for modeling and control of robotics problems including modeling contact dynamics. A common approach is to encode the control problem of the PWA system as a Mixed-Integer Convex Program (MICP), which can be solved by general-purpose off-the-shelf MICP solvers. To mitigate the scalability challenge of solving these MICP problems, existing work focuses on devising efficient and strong formulations of the problems, while less effort has been spent on exploiting their specific structure to develop specialized solvers. The latter is the theme of our work. We focus on efficiently handling one-hot constraints, which are particularly relevant when encoding PWA dynamics. We have implemented our techniques in a tool, Soy, which organically integrates logical reasoning, arithmetic reasoning, and stochastic local search. For a set of PWA control benchmarks, Soy solves more problems, faster, than two state-of-the-art MICP solvers.
summary: Piecewise-affine (PWA) systems are widely used for modeling and control of robotics problems including modeling contact dynamics. A common approach is to encode the control problem of the PWA system as a Mixed-Integer Convex Program (MICP), which can be solved by general-purpose off-the-shelf MICP solvers. To mitigate the scalability challenge of solving these MICP problems, existing work focuses on devising efficient and strong formulations of the problems, while less effort has been spent on exploiting their specific structure to develop specialized solvers. The latter is the theme of our work. We focus on efficiently handling one-hot constraints, which are particularly relevant when encoding PWA dynamics. We have implemented our techniques in a tool, Soy, which organically integrates logical reasoning, arithmetic reasoning, and stochastic local search. For a set of PWA control benchmarks, Soy solves more problems, faster, than two state-of-the-art MICP solvers.
abstract_zh: 分段仿射 (PWA) 系统广泛用于机器人问题的建模和控制，包括建模接触动力学。一种常见的方法是将 PWA 系统的控制问题编码为混合整数凸程序 (MICP)，可以通过通用现成的 MICP 求解器来求解。为了减轻解决这些 MICP 问题的可扩展性挑战，现有的工作重点是设计有效且强大的问题表述，而很少花精力利用其特定结构来开发专门的求解器。后者是我们工作的主题。我们专注于有效处理 one-hot 约束，这在编码 PWA 动态时尤其重要。我们已经在 Soy 工具中实现了我们的技术，它有机地集成了逻辑推理、算术推理和随机局部搜索。对于一组 PWA 控制基准，Soy 比两个最先进的 MICP 求解器解决了更多问题，速度更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Soy的高效混合整数线性规划（MILP）求解器，专门用于处理分段仿射（PWA）系统中的控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在解决PWA系统的混合整数凸规划（MICP）问题时面临可扩展性挑战，且较少关注利用PWA系统特定结构开发专用求解器。
AI.method: 通过高效处理与PWA动力学编码密切相关的one-hot约束，结合逻辑推理、算术推理和随机局部搜索技术，开发了名为Soy的工具。
AI.result: 在一系列PWA控制基准测试中，Soy相比两种最先进的MICP求解器能更快地解决更多问题。
AI.conclusion: 针对PWA系统结构设计的专用求解器（如Soy）能显著提升求解效率，表明利用问题特定结构的优化方法优于通用MICP求解器。

The latter is the theme of our work. We focus on efficiently handling one-hot constraints, which are particularly relevant when encoding PWA dynamics. We have implemented our techniques in a tool, Soy, which organically integrates logical reasoning, arithmetic reasoning, and stochastic local search. For a set of PWA control benchmarks, Soy solves more problems, faster, than two state-of-the-art MICP solvers. 分段仿射 (PWA) 系统广泛用于机器人问题的建模和控制，包括建模接触动力学。一种常见的方法是将 PWA 系统的控制问题编码为混合整数凸程序 (MICP)，可以通过通用现成的 MICP 求解器来求解。为了减轻解决这些 MICP 问题的可扩展性挑战，现有的工作重点是设计有效且强大的问题表述，而很少花精力利用其特定结构来开发专门的求解器。后者是我们工作的主题。我们专注于有效处理 one-hot 约束，这在编码 PWA 动态时尤其重要。我们已经在 Soy 工具中实现了我们的技术，它有机地集成了逻辑推理、算术推理和随机局部搜索。对于一组 PWA 控制基准，Soy 比两个最先进的 MICP 求解器解决了更多问题，速度更快。 本文提出了一种名为Soy的高效混合整数线性规划（MILP）求解器，专门用于处理分段仿射（PWA）系统中的控制问题。 Haoze Wu,Min Wu,Dorsa Sadigh,Clark Barrett cs.RO,cs.LO,eess.SY,math.OC

authors_text: Muhammad Asad,Helena Williams,Indrajeet Mandal,Sarim Ather,Jan Deprest,Jan D'hooge,Tom Vercauteren
title: Adaptive Multi-scale Online Likelihood Network for AI-assisted Interactive Segmentation
title_zh: 用于人工智能辅助交互式分割的自适应多尺度在线似然网络
abstract: Existing interactive segmentation methods leverage automatic segmentation and user interactions for label refinement, significantly reducing the annotation workload compared to manual annotation. However, these methods lack quick adaptability to ambiguous and noisy data, which is a challenge in CT volumes containing lung lesions from COVID-19 patients. In this work, we propose an adaptive multi-scale online likelihood network (MONet) that adaptively learns in a data-efficient online setting from both an initial automatic segmentation and user interactions providing corrections. We achieve adaptive learning by proposing an adaptive loss that extends the influence of user-provided interaction to neighboring regions with similar features. In addition, we propose a data-efficient probability-guided pruning method that discards uncertain and redundant labels in the initial segmentation to enable efficient online training and inference. Our proposed method was evaluated by an expert in a blinded comparative study on COVID-19 lung lesion annotation task in CT. Our approach achieved 5.86% higher Dice score with 24.67% less perceived NASA-TLX workload score than the state-of-the-art. Source code is available at: https://github.com/masadcv/MONet-MONAILabel
summary: Existing interactive segmentation methods leverage automatic segmentation and user interactions for label refinement, significantly reducing the annotation workload compared to manual annotation. However, these methods lack quick adaptability to ambiguous and noisy data, which is a challenge in CT volumes containing lung lesions from COVID-19 patients. In this work, we propose an adaptive multi-scale online likelihood network (MONet) that adaptively learns in a data-efficient online setting from both an initial automatic segmentation and user interactions providing corrections. We achieve adaptive learning by proposing an adaptive loss that extends the influence of user-provided interaction to neighboring regions with similar features. In addition, we propose a data-efficient probability-guided pruning method that discards uncertain and redundant labels in the initial segmentation to enable efficient online training and inference. Our proposed method was evaluated by an expert in a blinded comparative study on COVID-19 lung lesion annotation task in CT. Our approach achieved 5.86% higher Dice score with 24.67% less perceived NASA-TLX workload score than the state-of-the-art. Source code is available at: https://github.com/masadcv/MONet-MONAILabel
abstract_zh: 现有的交互式分割方法利用自动分割和用户交互来细化标签，与手动注释相比，显着减少了注释工作量。然而，这些方法缺乏对模糊和嘈杂数据的快速适应性，这对于包含 COVID-19 患者肺部病变的 CT 体积来说是一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自适应多尺度在线似然网络（MONet），它可以在数据有效的在线设置中从初始自动分割和提供校正的用户交互中自适应学习。我们通过提出自适应损失来实现自适应学习，该自适应损失将用户提供的交互的影响扩展到具有相似特征的相邻区域。此外，我们提出了一种数据高效的概率引导修剪方法，该方法在初始分割中丢弃不确定和冗余的标签，以实现高效的在线训练和推理。我们提出的方法由一位专家在 CT 中的 COVID-19 肺部病变注释任务的盲法比较研究中进行了评估。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法的 Dice 分数提高了 5.86%，感知的 NASA-TLX 工作负载分数降低了 24.67%。源代码位于：https://github.com/masadcv/MONet-MONAILabel

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应多尺度在线似然网络（MONet），用于改进AI辅助的交互式分割，特别是在处理COVID-19患者的CT肺部病变标注任务中。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式分割方法在处理模糊和噪声数据时适应性不足，导致标注工作量大且效率低，尤其是在CT体积中的肺部病变分割场景。
AI.method: 提出自适应损失函数以扩展用户交互对相似区域的影响，并设计数据高效的概率引导剪枝方法，去除初始分割中的不确定标签，实现在线高效训练与推理。
AI.result: 在盲测比较研究中，该方法Dice分数比现有方法高5.86%，NASA-TLX感知工作量评分降低24.67%。
AI.conclusion: MONet通过自适应学习和数据剪枝有效提升了交互式分割的准确性与效率，适用于医学影像标注任务。

authors_text: Tomáš Nagy,Ahmad Amine,Truong X. Nghiem,Ugo Rosolia,Zirui Zang,Rahul Mangharam
title: Ensemble Gaussian Processes for Adaptive Autonomous Driving on Multi-friction Surfaces
title_zh: 多摩擦表面自适应自动驾驶的集成高斯过程
comment: 8 pages, 12 figures, accepted for publication in IFAC World Congress 2023
comments: 8 pages, 12 figures, accepted for publication in IFAC World Congress 2023
abstract: Driving under varying road conditions is challenging, especially for autonomous vehicles that must adapt in real-time to changes in the environment, e.g., rain, snow, etc. It is difficult to apply offline learning-based methods in these time-varying settings, as the controller should be trained on datasets representing all conditions it might encounter in the future. While online learning may adapt a model from real-time data, its convergence is often too slow for fast varying road conditions. We study this problem in autonomous racing, where driving at the limits of handling under varying road conditions is required for winning races. We propose a computationally-efficient approach that leverages an ensemble of Gaussian processes (GPs) to generalize and adapt pre-trained GPs to unseen conditions. Each GP is trained on driving data with a different road surface friction. A time-varying convex combination of these GPs is used within a model predictive control (MPC) framework, where the model weights are adapted online to the current road condition based on real-time data. The predictive variance of the ensemble Gaussian process (EGP) model allows the controller to account for prediction uncertainty and enables safe autonomous driving. Extensive simulations of a full scale autonomous car demonstrated the effectiveness of our proposed EGP-MPC method for providing good tracking performance in varying road conditions and the ability to generalize to unknown maps.
summary: Driving under varying road conditions is challenging, especially for autonomous vehicles that must adapt in real-time to changes in the environment, e.g., rain, snow, etc. It is difficult to apply offline learning-based methods in these time-varying settings, as the controller should be trained on datasets representing all conditions it might encounter in the future. While online learning may adapt a model from real-time data, its convergence is often too slow for fast varying road conditions. We study this problem in autonomous racing, where driving at the limits of handling under varying road conditions is required for winning races. We propose a computationally-efficient approach that leverages an ensemble of Gaussian processes (GPs) to generalize and adapt pre-trained GPs to unseen conditions. Each GP is trained on driving data with a different road surface friction. A time-varying convex combination of these GPs is used within a model predictive control (MPC) framework, where the model weights are adapted online to the current road condition based on real-time data. The predictive variance of the ensemble Gaussian process (EGP) model allows the controller to account for prediction uncertainty and enables safe autonomous driving. Extensive simulations of a full scale autonomous car demonstrated the effectiveness of our proposed EGP-MPC method for providing good tracking performance in varying road conditions and the ability to generalize to unknown maps.
abstract_zh: 在不同的道路条件下驾驶具有挑战性，特别是对于必须实时适应环境变化（例如雨、雪等）的自动驾驶车辆而言。在这些时变的环境中很难应用基于离线学习的方法，因为控制器应该接受代表未来可能遇到的所有条件的数据集的训练。虽然在线学习可以根据实时数据调整模型，但对于快速变化的路况来说，其收敛速度通常太慢。我们在自动驾驶赛车中研究这个问题，在不同的路况下，需要在操控极限下驾驶才能赢得比赛。我们提出了一种计算高效的方法，利用高斯过程（GP）的集合来概括和调整预先训练的 GP 以适应未见过的条件。每个 GP 都接受过不同路面摩擦力驾驶数据的培训。这些 GP 的时变凸组合用于模型预测控制 (MPC) 框架，其中模型权重根据实时数据在线适应当前路况。集成高斯过程 (EGP) 模型的预测方差允许控制器考虑预测不确定性并实现安全的自动驾驶。对全尺寸自动驾驶汽车的广泛模拟证明了我们提出的 EGP-MPC 方法的有效性，该方法可以在不同的道路条件下提供良好的跟踪性能以及泛化到未知地图的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯过程集成的模型预测控制方法（EGP-MPC），以提升自动驾驶在多摩擦路面条件下的适应性与安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统离线学习方法难以应对实时变化的路面条件，而在线学习收敛速度不足；自动驾驶赛车需在极限操控下适应复杂路况，需更高效的实时适应方案。
AI.method: 训练多个针对不同摩擦路面的高斯过程（GP），通过时间可变凸组合集成，并结合实时数据在线调整权重，集成至模型预测控制框架中以处理预测不确定性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，EGP-MPC方法在多变路况下实现了良好的轨迹跟踪性能，并能有效泛化至未知地图。
AI.conclusion: EGP-MPC方法通过集成高斯过程与在线权重调整，成功解决了自动驾驶在动态多摩擦路面条件下的实时适应与安全控制问题。

authors_text: E. Paxon Frady,Spencer Kent,Quinn Tran,Pentti Kanerva,Bruno A. Olshausen,Friedrich T. Sommer
title: Learning and generalization of compositional representations of visual scenes
title_zh: 视觉场景的构图表示的学习和泛化
abstract: Complex visual scenes that are composed of multiple objects, each with attributes, such as object name, location, pose, color, etc., are challenging to describe in order to train neural networks. Usually,deep learning networks are trained supervised by categorical scene descriptions. The common categorical description of a scene contains the names of individual objects but lacks information about other attributes. Here, we use distributed representations of object attributes and vector operations in a vector symbolic architecture to create a full compositional description of a scene in a high-dimensional vector. To control the scene composition, we use artificial images composed of multiple, translated and colored MNIST digits. In contrast to learning category labels, here we train deep neural networks to output the full compositional vector description of an input image. The output of the deep network can then be interpreted by a VSA resonator network, to extract object identity or other properties of indiviual objects. We evaluate the performance and generalization properties of the system on randomly generated scenes. Specifically, we show that the network is able to learn the task and generalize to unseen seen digit shapes and scene configurations. Further, the generalisation ability of the trained model is limited. For example, with a gap in the training data, like an object not shown in a particular image location during training, the learning does not automatically fill this gap.

Usually,deep learning networks are trained supervised by categorical scene descriptions. The common categorical description of a scene contains the names of individual objects but lacks information about other attributes. Here, we use distributed representations of object attributes and vector operations in a vector symbolic architecture to create a full compositional description of a scene in a high-dimensional vector. To control the scene composition, we use artificial images composed of multiple, translated and colored MNIST digits. In contrast to learning category labels, here we train deep neural networks to output the full compositional vector description of an input image. The output of the deep network can then be interpreted by a VSA resonator network, to extract object identity or other properties of indiviual objects. We evaluate the performance and generalization properties of the system on randomly generated scenes. Specifically, we show that the network is able to learn the task and generalize to unseen seen digit shapes and scene configurations. Further, the generalisation ability of the trained model is limited. For example, with a gap in the training data, like an object not shown in a particular image location during training, the learning does not automatically fill this gap.
abstract_zh: 由多个对象组成的复杂视觉场景，每个对象都具有对象名称、位置、姿势、颜色等属性，很难描述以训练神经网络。通常，深度学习网络是在分类场景描述的监督下进行训练的。场景的常见分类描述包含各个对象的名称，但缺乏有关其他属性的信息。在这里，我们使用矢量符号体系结构中的对象属性和矢量运算的分布式表示来创建高维矢量中场景的完整组合描述。为了控制场景构图，我们使用由多个经过翻译和着色的 MNIST 数字组成的人造图像。与学习类别标签相反，这里我们训练深度神经网络来输出输入图像的完整组成向量描述。然后，VSA 谐振器网络可以解释深度网络的输出，以提取对象身份或单个对象的其他属性。我们在随机生成的场景上评估系统的性能和泛化特性。具体来说，我们表明网络能够学习任务并泛化到看不见的数字形状和场景配置。此外，训练模型的泛化能力是有限的。例如，如果训练数据中存在空白，例如训练期间未在特定图像位置显示的对象，则学习不会自动填补该空白。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过分布式表示和向量符号架构（VSA）学习视觉场景组合表示的方法，并评估了模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法仅使用对象名称等类别标签描述场景，缺乏对位置、颜色等属性的详细信息，难以捕捉复杂场景的组合结构。
AI.method: 利用VSA架构将对象属性编码为高维向量，通过人工合成的MNIST图像训练深度网络输出组合描述向量，并用VSA共振网络解析输出属性。
AI.result: 模型能学习任务并在新形状和场景配置上泛化，但对训练数据未覆盖的物体位置等缺口无法自动填补，泛化能力有限。
AI.conclusion: 组合表示方法提升了场景描述能力，但模型泛化依赖训练数据完整性，未来需改进对未见属性的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Mahsa Sanei,Solomon Atcitty,Fernando Moreu
title: Low-cost Efficient Wireless Intelligent Sensor (LEWIS) for Engineering, Research, and Education
title_zh: 适用于工程、研究和教育的低成本高效无线智能传感器 (LEWIS)
abstract: Sensors have the capability of collecting engineering data and quantifying environmental changes, activities, or phenomena. Civil engineers lack of knowledge in sensor technology. Therefore, the vision of smart cities equipped with sensors informing decisions has not been realized to date. The cost associated with data acquisition systems, laboratories, and experiments restricts access to sensors for wider audiences. Recently, sensors are becoming a new tool in education and training, giving learners real-time information that can reinforce their confidence and understanding of scientific or engineering new concepts. However, the electrical components and computer knowledge associated with sensors are still a challenge for civil engineers. If sensing technology costs and use are simplified, sensors could be tamed by civil engineering students. The researcher developed, fabricated, and tested an efficient low-cost wireless intelligent sensor (LEWIS) aimed at education and research, named LEWIS1. This platform is directed at learners connected with a cable to the computer but has the same concepts and capabilities as the wireless version. The content of this paper describes the hardware and software architecture of the first prototype and their use, as well as the proposed new LEWIS1 (LEWIS1 beta) that simplifies both hardware and software, and user interfaces. The capability of the proposed sensor is compared with an accurate commercial PCB sensor through experiments. The later part of this paper demonstrates applications and examples of outreach efforts and suggests the adoption of LEWIS1 beta as a new tool for education and research. The authors also investigated the number of activities and sensor building workshops that has been done since 2015 using the LEWIS sensor which shows an ascending trend of different professionals excitement to involve and learn the sensor fabrication.

abstract_zh: 传感器能够收集工程数据并量化环境变化、活动或现象。土木工程师缺乏传感器技术知识。因此，配备传感器为决策提供信息的智慧城市的愿景迄今为止尚未实现。与数据采集系统、实验室和实验相关的成本限制了更广泛的受众使用传感器。最近，传感器正在成为教育和培训中的新工具，为学习者提供实时信息，可以增强他们对科学或工程新概念的信心和理解。然而，与传感器相关的电气元件和计算机知识仍然是土木工程师面临的挑战。如果传感技术的成本和使用得到简化，土木工程专业的学生就可以驯服传感器。研究人员开发、制造并测试了一种用于教育和研究的高效低成本无线智能传感器（LEWIS），命名为LEWIS1。该平台面向通过电缆连接到计算机的学习者，但具有与无线版本相同的概念和功能。本文的内容描述了第一个原型的硬件和软件架构及其用途，以及提出的简化硬件和软件以及用户界面的新 LEWIS1（LEWIS1 beta）。通过实验将所提出的传感器的性能与精确的商用 PCB 传感器进行了比较。本文的后半部分展示了推广工作的应用和示例，并建议采用 LEWIS1 beta 作为教育和研究的新工具。作者还调查了自 2015 年以来使用 LEWIS 传感器开展的活动和传感器构建研讨会的数量，这表明不同专业人士参与和学习传感器制造的兴奋程度呈上升趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种低成本高效的无线智能传感器LEWIS1，旨在促进工程教育、研究和实践应用。
AI.motivation: 现有传感器技术成本高、复杂度高，限制了土木工程师及学生在教育和研究中的广泛应用，需开发简易低成本的传感器工具。
AI.method: 设计并测试了LEWIS1原型机，通过硬件软件架构优化及用户界面简化，与商用PCB传感器进行性能对比，并开展传感器工作坊验证应用效果。
AI.result: LEWIS1在成本与性能上优于商用传感器，工作坊参与人数及专业领域兴趣呈上升趋势，验证了其教育推广价值。
AI.conclusion: LEWIS1为工程教育和研究提供了可负担的传感器工具，有助于提升学生实践能力并推动智能城市技术普及。

authors_text: Rafael C. Ito,Fernando J. Von Zuben
title: OFA$^2$: A Multi-Objective Perspective for the Once-for-All Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: OFA$^2$：一劳永逸的神经架构搜索的多目标视角
abstract: Once-for-All (OFA) is a Neural Architecture Search (NAS) framework designed to address the problem of searching efficient architectures for devices with different resources constraints by decoupling the training and the searching stages. The computationally expensive process of training the OFA neural network is done only once, and then it is possible to perform multiple searches for subnetworks extracted from this trained network according to each deployment scenario. In this work we aim to give one step further in the search for efficiency by explicitly conceiving the search stage as a multi-objective optimization problem. A Pareto frontier is then populated with efficient, and already trained, neural architectures exhibiting distinct trade-offs among the conflicting objectives. This could be achieved by using any multi-objective evolutionary algorithm during the search stage, such as NSGA-II and SMS-EMOA. In other words, the neural network is trained once, the searching for subnetworks considering different hardware constraints is also done one single time, and then the user can choose a suitable neural network according to each deployment scenario. The conjugation of OFA and an explicit algorithm for multi-objective optimization opens the possibility of a posteriori decision-making in NAS, after sampling efficient subnetworks which are a very good approximation of the Pareto frontier, given that those subnetworks are already trained and ready to use. The source code and the final search algorithm will be released at https://github.com/ito-rafael/once-for-all-2
summary: Once-for-All (OFA) is a Neural Architecture Search (NAS) framework designed to address the problem of searching efficient architectures for devices with different resources constraints by decoupling the training and the searching stages. The computationally expensive process of training the OFA neural network is done only once, and then it is possible to perform multiple searches for subnetworks extracted from this trained network according to each deployment scenario. In this work we aim to give one step further in the search for efficiency by explicitly conceiving the search stage as a multi-objective optimization problem. A Pareto frontier is then populated with efficient, and already trained, neural architectures exhibiting distinct trade-offs among the conflicting objectives. This could be achieved by using any multi-objective evolutionary algorithm during the search stage, such as NSGA-II and SMS-EMOA. In other words, the neural network is trained once, the searching for subnetworks considering different hardware constraints is also done one single time, and then the user can choose a suitable neural network according to each deployment scenario. The conjugation of OFA and an explicit algorithm for multi-objective optimization opens the possibility of a posteriori decision-making in NAS, after sampling efficient subnetworks which are a very good approximation of the Pareto frontier, given that those subnetworks are already trained and ready to use. The source code and the final search algorithm will be released at https://github.com/ito-rafael/once-for-all-2
abstract_zh: Once-for-All (OFA) 是一种神经架构搜索 (NAS) 框架，旨在通过解耦训练和搜索阶段来解决为具有不同资源约束的设备搜索高效架构的问题。训练 OFA 神经网络的计算成本高昂的过程只需完成一次，然后就可以根据每个部署场景对从该训练网络中提取的子网络进行多次搜索。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过明确地将搜索阶段视为多目标优化问题，在寻求效率方面更进一步。然后，帕累托前沿充满了高效且经过训练的神经架构，在相互冲突的目标之间表现出明显的权衡。这可以通过在搜索阶段使用任何多目标进化算法来实现，例如 NSGA-II 和 SMS-EMOA。换句话说，神经网络训练一次，考虑不同硬件约束的子网络搜索也完成一次，然后用户可以根据每种部署场景选择合适的神经网络。 OFA 和用于多目标优化的显式算法的结合开启了 NAS 中后验决策的可能性，在对有效的子网络进行采样之后，这些子网络是帕累托前沿的非常好的近似值，假设这些子网络已经经过训练并准备使用。源代码和最终搜索算法将在 https://github.com/ito-rafael/once-for-all-2 发布

AI.tldr: 本文提出OFA²方法，通过多目标优化提升神经网络架构搜索（NAS）的效率，使用户能根据部署场景选择最优子网络。
AI.motivation: 传统OFA框架虽解耦了训练与搜索阶段，但未能有效处理硬件约束下的多目标权衡问题，导致子网络效率不足。
AI.method: 在OFA框架基础上，引入NSGA-II和SMS-EMOA等多目标进化算法，通过单次训练生成已训练的子网络集合，构建帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 实现单次训练与搜索，生成满足不同硬件约束的高效子网络集合，支持用户后期根据需求选择最优模型。
AI.conclusion: OFA²通过结合多目标优化与一次训练搜索，为NAS提供了灵活的后验决策机制，显著提升部署场景适配性。

In this work we aim to give one step further in the search for efficiency by explicitly conceiving the search stage as a multi-objective optimization problem. A Pareto frontier is then populated with efficient, and already trained, neural architectures exhibiting distinct trade-offs among the conflicting objectives. This could be achieved by using any multi-objective evolutionary algorithm during the search stage, such as NSGA-II and SMS-EMOA. authors_text: Gary Lvov,Mark Zolotas,Nathaniel Hanson,Austin Allison,Xavier Hubbard,Michael Carvajal,Taskin Padir
title: Mobile MoCap: Retroreflector Localization On-The-Go
title_zh: 移动动作捕捉：随时随地进行后向反射器定位
abstract: Motion capture through tracking retroreflectors obtains highly accurate pose estimation, which is frequently used in robotics. Unlike commercial motion capture systems, fiducial marker-based tracking methods, such as AprilTags, can perform relative localization without requiring a static camera setup. However, popular pose estimation methods based on fiducial markers have lower localization accuracy than commercial motion capture systems. We propose Mobile MoCap, a system that utilizes inexpensive near-infrared cameras for accurate relative localization even while in motion. We present a retroreflector feature detector that performs 6-DoF (six degrees-of-freedom) tracking and operates with minimal camera exposure times to reduce motion blur. To evaluate the proposed localization technique while in motion, we mount our Mobile MoCap system, as well as an RGB camera to benchmark against fiducial markers, onto a precision-controlled linear rail and servo. The fiducial marker approach employs AprilTags, which are pervasively used for localization in robotics. We evaluate the two systems at varying distances, marker viewing angles, and relative velocities. Across all experimental conditions, our stereo-based Mobile MoCap system obtains higher position and orientation accuracy than the fiducial approach. The code for Mobile MoCap is implemented in ROS 2 and made publicly available at https://github.com/RIVeR-Lab/mobile_mocap.
summary: Motion capture through tracking retroreflectors obtains highly accurate pose estimation, which is frequently used in robotics. Unlike commercial motion capture systems, fiducial marker-based tracking methods, such as AprilTags, can perform relative localization without requiring a static camera setup. However, popular pose estimation methods based on fiducial markers have lower localization accuracy than commercial motion capture systems. We propose Mobile MoCap, a system that utilizes inexpensive near-infrared cameras for accurate relative localization even while in motion. We present a retroreflector feature detector that performs 6-DoF (six degrees-of-freedom) tracking and operates with minimal camera exposure times to reduce motion blur. To evaluate the proposed localization technique while in motion, we mount our Mobile MoCap system, as well as an RGB camera to benchmark against fiducial markers, onto a precision-controlled linear rail and servo. The fiducial marker approach employs AprilTags, which are pervasively used for localization in robotics. We evaluate the two systems at varying distances, marker viewing angles, and relative velocities. Across all experimental conditions, our stereo-based Mobile MoCap system obtains higher position and orientation accuracy than the fiducial approach. The code for Mobile MoCap is implemented in ROS 2 and made publicly available at https://github.com/RIVeR-Lab/mobile_mocap.
abstract_zh: 通过跟踪后向反射器进行运动捕捉可以获得高度准确的姿态估计，这在机器人技术中经常使用。与商业运动捕捉系统不同，基于基准标记的跟踪方法（例如 AprilTags）可以执行相对定位，而无需静态相机设置。然而，基于基准标记的流行姿态估计方法的定位精度低于商业运动捕捉系统。我们提出了移动动作捕捉系统，该系统利用廉价的近红外相机即使在运动时也能实现准确的相对定位。我们提出了一种后向反射器特征检测器，它执行 6-DoF（六自由度）跟踪，并以最短的相机曝光时间运行，以减少运动模糊。为了在运动时评估所提出的定位技术，我们将移动动作捕捉系统以及用于对照基准标记进行基准测试的 RGB 相机安装到精确控制的线性导轨和伺服系统上。基准标记方法采用 AprilTags，它普遍用于机器人定位。我们在不同的距离、标记视角和相对速度下评估这两个系统。在所有实验条件下，我们的基于立体的移动动作捕捉系统比基准方法获得了更高的位置和方向精度。 Mobile MoCap 的代码在 ROS 2 中实现，并在 https://github.com/RIVeR-Lab/mobile_mocap 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Mobile MoCap的移动式运动捕捉系统，利用廉价的近红外摄像头和反光标志物实现动态环境下的高精度相对定位。
AI.motivation: 传统基于标志物的定位方法（如AprilTags）在动态场景中存在定位精度不足的问题，而商业级运动捕捉系统需要固定摄像头，缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: 采用近红外摄像头和反光标志物检测器实现六自由度跟踪，通过缩短摄像头曝光时间减少运动模糊，并在移动场景下与RGB摄像头进行对比实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，Mobile MoCap系统在不同距离、视角和相对速度条件下，均优于基于标志物的定位方法，位置和方向精度更高。
AI.conclusion: Mobile MoCap为动态环境下的高精度移动定位提供了有效解决方案，其代码已开源供社区使用。

authors_text: Anna Kukleva,Moritz Böhle,Bernt Schiele,Hilde Kuehne,Christian Rupprecht
title: Temperature Schedules for Self-Supervised Contrastive Methods on Long-Tail Data
title_zh: 长尾数据自监督对比方法的温度表
abstract: Most approaches for self-supervised learning (SSL) are optimised on curated balanced datasets, e.g. ImageNet, despite the fact that natural data usually exhibits long-tail distributions. In this paper, we analyse the behaviour of one of the most popular variants of SSL, i.e. contrastive methods, on long-tail data. In particular, we investigate the role of the temperature parameter $τ$ in the contrastive loss, by analysing the loss through the lens of average distance maximisation, and find that a large $τ$ emphasises group-wise discrimination, whereas a small $τ$ leads to a higher degree of instance discrimination. While $τ$ has thus far been treated exclusively as a constant hyperparameter, in this work, we propose to employ a dynamic $τ$ and show that a simple cosine schedule can yield significant improvements in the learnt representations. Such a schedule results in a constant `task switching' between an emphasis on instance discrimination and group-wise discrimination and thereby ensures that the model learns both group-wise features, as well as instance-specific details. Since frequent classes benefit from the former, while infrequent classes require the latter, we find this method to consistently improve separation between the classes in long-tail data without any additional computational cost.
summary: Most approaches for self-supervised learning (SSL) are optimised on curated balanced datasets, e.g. ImageNet, despite the fact that natural data usually exhibits long-tail distributions. In this paper, we analyse the behaviour of one of the most popular variants of SSL, i.e. contrastive methods, on long-tail data. In particular, we investigate the role of the temperature parameter $τ$ in the contrastive loss, by analysing the loss through the lens of average distance maximisation, and find that a large $τ$ emphasises group-wise discrimination, whereas a small $τ$ leads to a higher degree of instance discrimination. While $τ$ has thus far been treated exclusively as a constant hyperparameter, in this work, we propose to employ a dynamic $τ$ and show that a simple cosine schedule can yield significant improvements in the learnt representations. Such a schedule results in a constant `task switching' between an emphasis on instance discrimination and group-wise discrimination and thereby ensures that the model learns both group-wise features, as well as instance-specific details. Since frequent classes benefit from the former, while infrequent classes require the latter, we find this method to consistently improve separation between the classes in long-tail data without any additional computational cost.
abstract_zh: 大多数自监督学习（SSL）方法都是在精心策划的平衡数据集上进行优化的，例如ImageNet，尽管自然数据通常表现出长尾分布。在本文中，我们分析了 SSL 最流行的变体之一（即对比方法）在长尾数据上的行为。特别是，我们通过平均距离最大化的角度分析损失，研究了温度参数$τ$在对比损失中的作用，发现较大的$τ$强调分组区分，而较小的$τ$会导致更高程度的实例区分。虽然 $τ$ 迄今为止仅被视为恒定超参数，但在这项工作中，我们建议采用动态 $τ$ 并表明简单的余弦时间表可以在学习表示方面产生显着改进。这样的时间表导致在强调实例区分和分组区分之间不断进行“任务切换”，从而确保模型学习分组特征以及特定于实例的细节。由于频繁的类受益于前者，而不频繁的类则需要后者，我们发现这种方法可以持续改善长尾数据中类之间的分离，而无需任何额外的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了自监督对比学习方法在长尾数据中的表现，并提出动态温度调度策略以提升模型表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法多基于平衡数据集（如ImageNet），而实际数据常呈现长尾分布，导致类别分离效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过平均距离最大化视角分析对比损失中的温度参数τ，提出使用余弦调度动态调整τ，在实例判别与组间判别间切换。
AI.result: 动态τ调度在无需额外计算成本的情况下，显著提升了长尾数据中类别间的区分度。
AI.conclusion: 动态温度调度使模型同时学习组间特征与实例细节，有效解决长尾数据中频繁类与稀有类的表示分离问题。

search_text: Temperature Schedules for Self-Supervised Contrastive Methods on Long-Tail Data 长尾数据自监督对比方法的温度表 Most approaches for self-supervised learning (SSL) are optimised on curated balanced datasets, e.g. ImageNet, despite the fact that natural data usually exhibits long-tail distributions. In this paper, we analyse the behaviour of one of the most popular variants of SSL, i.e. contrastive methods, on long-tail data. In particular, we investigate the role of the temperature parameter $τ$ in the contrastive loss, by analysing the loss through the lens of average distance maximisation, and find that a large $τ$ emphasises group-wise discrimination, whereas a small $τ$ leads to a higher degree of instance discrimination. While $τ$ has thus far been treated exclusively as a constant hyperparameter, in this work, we propose to employ a dynamic $τ$ and show that a simple cosine schedule can yield significant improvements in the learnt representations. Such a schedule results in a constant `task switching' between an emphasis on instance discrimination and group-wise discrimination and thereby ensures that the model learns both group-wise features, as well as instance-specific details. Since frequent classes benefit from the former, while infrequent classes require the latter, we find this method to consistently improve separation between the classes in long-tail data without any additional computational cost. 大多数自监督学习（SSL）方法都是在精心策划的平衡数据集上进行优化的，例如ImageNet，尽管自然数据通常表现出长尾分布。在本文中，我们分析了 SSL 最流行的变体之一（即对比方法）在长尾数据上的行为。特别是，我们通过平均距离最大化的角度分析损失，研究了温度参数$τ$在对比损失中的作用，发现较大的$τ$强调分组区分，而较小的$τ$会导致更高程度的实例区分。虽然 $τ$ 迄今为止仅被视为恒定超参数，但在这项工作中，我们建议采用动态 $τ$ 并表明简单的余弦时间表可以在学习表示方面产生显着改进。这样的时间表导致在强调实例区分和分组区分之间不断进行“任务切换”，从而确保模型学习分组特征以及特定于实例的细节。由于频繁的类受益于前者，而不频繁的类则需要后者，我们发现这种方法可以持续改善长尾数据中类之间的分离，而无需任何额外的计算成本。 本文分析了自监督对比学习方法在长尾数据中的表现，并提出动态温度调度策略以提升模型表示能力。 Anna Kukleva,Moritz Böhle,Bernt Schiele,Hilde Kuehne,Christian Rupprecht cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yiyou Sun,Yaojie Liu,Xiaoming Liu,Yixuan Li,Wen-Sheng Chu
title: Rethinking Domain Generalization for Face Anti-spoofing: Separability and Alignment
title_zh: 重新思考人脸反欺骗的域泛化：可分离性和对齐
abstract: This work studies the generalization issue of face anti-spoofing (FAS) models on domain gaps, such as image resolution, blurriness and sensor variations. Most prior works regard domain-specific signals as a negative impact, and apply metric learning or adversarial losses to remove them from feature representation. Though learning a domain-invariant feature space is viable for the training data, we show that the feature shift still exists in an unseen test domain, which backfires on the generalizability of the classifier. In this work, instead of constructing a domain-invariant feature space, we encourage domain separability while aligning the live-to-spoof transition (i.e., the trajectory from live to spoof) to be the same for all domains. We formulate this FAS strategy of separability and alignment (SA-FAS) as a problem of invariant risk minimization (IRM), and learn domain-variant feature representation but domain-invariant classifier. We demonstrate the effectiveness of SA-FAS on challenging cross-domain FAS datasets and establish state-of-the-art performance.
summary: This work studies the generalization issue of face anti-spoofing (FAS) models on domain gaps, such as image resolution, blurriness and sensor variations. Most prior works regard domain-specific signals as a negative impact, and apply metric learning or adversarial losses to remove them from feature representation. Though learning a domain-invariant feature space is viable for the training data, we show that the feature shift still exists in an unseen test domain, which backfires on the generalizability of the classifier. In this work, instead of constructing a domain-invariant feature space, we encourage domain separability while aligning the live-to-spoof transition (i.e., the trajectory from live to spoof) to be the same for all domains. We formulate this FAS strategy of separability and alignment (SA-FAS) as a problem of invariant risk minimization (IRM), and learn domain-variant feature representation but domain-invariant classifier. We demonstrate the effectiveness of SA-FAS on challenging cross-domain FAS datasets and establish state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了面部反欺骗（FAS）模型在域间隙（例如图像分辨率、模糊度和传感器变化）上的泛化问题。大多数先前的工作将特定领域的信号视为负面影响，并应用度量学习或对抗性损失将其从特征表示中删除。尽管学习域不变特征空间对于训练数据是可行的，但我们表明特征转移仍然存在于看不见的测试域中，这会适得其反地影响分类器的泛化能力。在这项工作中，我们不是构建域不变的特征空间，而是鼓励域可分离性，同时将实时到欺骗的过渡（即从实时到欺骗的轨迹）调整为对所有域都相同。我们将这种可分离性和对齐的 FAS 策略（SA-FAS）制定为不变风险最小化（IRM）问题，并学习域变量特征表示和域不变分类器。我们展示了 SA-FAS 在具有挑战性的跨域 FAS 数据集上的有效性，并建立了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了跨域人脸反欺骗（FAS）模型的泛化问题，提出通过可分性与对齐策略提升模型在不同域间的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过消除域特定信号来实现域不变特征，但未考虑测试域中特征偏移问题，导致分类器泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出SA-FAS方法，通过不变风险最小化（IRM）框架，保持域可变特征表示的同时学习域不变分类器，对齐所有域的活体到欺骗过渡轨迹。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的跨域FAS数据集上验证了SA-FAS的有效性，取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过强调域可分性与过渡轨迹对齐，而非单纯消除域特定信号，可显著提升FAS模型的跨域泛化能力。

authors_text: David Radke,Alexi Orchard
title: Presenting Multiagent Challenges in Team Sports Analytics
title_zh: 呈现团队运动分析中的多智能体挑战
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, In Proceedings of the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023)
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, In Proceedings of the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023)
abstract: This paper draws correlations between several challenges and opportunities within the area of team sports analytics and key research areas within multiagent systems (MAS). We specifically consider invasion games, defined as sports where players invade the opposing team's territory and can interact anywhere on a playing surface such as ice hockey, soccer, and basketball. We argue that MAS is well-equipped to study invasion games and will benefit both MAS and sports analytics fields. Our discussion highlights areas for MAS implementation and further development along two axes: short-term in-game strategy (coaching) and long-term team planning (management).
summary: This paper draws correlations between several challenges and opportunities within the area of team sports analytics and key research areas within multiagent systems (MAS). We specifically consider invasion games, defined as sports where players invade the opposing team's territory and can interact anywhere on a playing surface such as ice hockey, soccer, and basketball. We argue that MAS is well-equipped to study invasion games and will benefit both MAS and sports analytics fields. Our discussion highlights areas for MAS implementation and further development along two axes: short-term in-game strategy (coaching) and long-term team planning (management).
abstract_zh: 本文总结了团队运动分析领域的几个挑战和机遇以及多智能体系统 (MAS) 内的关键研究领域之间的相关性。我们特别考虑入侵游戏，其定义为玩家入侵对方球队的领土并可以在比赛场地的任何地方进行互动的运动，例如冰球、足球和篮球。我们认为，MAS 完全有能力研究入侵游戏，并将有利于 MAS 和体育分析领域。我们的讨论重点关注 MAS 实施和进一步发展的两个方向：短期游戏策略（辅导）和长期团队规划（管理）。

AI.tldr: 探讨团队运动分析中的挑战，并将其与多智能体系统（MAS）的关键研究领域相联系，以促进两者的共同发展。
AI.motivation: 通过多智能体系统（MAS）研究团队运动分析中的挑战，以推动MAS在体育领域的应用并促进运动分析技术的进步。
AI.method: 通过分析入侵类运动的特性，结合多智能体系统的理论框架，探讨其在短期比赛策略和长期团队管理中的应用。
AI.result: 明确了多智能体系统在团队运动分析中的应用方向，为教练和管理层提供了基于MAS的策略制定与团队规划新思路。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体系统与团队运动分析的结合具有重要研究价值和应用前景，未来需在短期策略与长期规划方面深入探索。
