conclusion: 多智能体系统与团队运动分析的结合具有重要研究价值和应用前景，未来需在短期策略与长期规划方面深入探索。
search_text: Presenting Multiagent Challenges in Team Sports Analytics 呈现团队运动分析中的多智能体挑战 This paper draws correlations between several challenges and opportunities within the area of team sports analytics and key research areas within multiagent systems (MAS). We specifically consider invasion games, defined as sports where players invade the opposing team's territory and can interact anywhere on a playing surface such as ice hockey, soccer, and basketball. We argue that MAS is well-equipped to study invasion games and will benefit both MAS and sports analytics fields. Our discussion highlights areas for MAS implementation and further development along two axes: short-term in-game strategy (coaching) and long-term team planning (management). 本文总结了团队运动分析领域的几个挑战和机遇以及多智能体系统 (MAS) 内的关键研究领域之间的相关性。我们特别考虑入侵游戏，其定义为玩家入侵对方球队的领土并可以在比赛场地的任何地方进行互动的运动，例如冰球、足球和篮球。我们认为，MAS 完全有能力研究入侵游戏，并将有利于 MAS 和体育分析领域。我们的讨论重点关注 MAS 实施和进一步发展的两个方向：短期游戏策略（辅导）和长期团队规划（管理）。 探讨团队运动分析中的挑战，并将其与多智能体系统（MAS）的关键研究领域相联系，以促进两者的共同发展。 David Radke,Alexi Orchard cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Zeyu Zhu,Xiangyong Cao,Man Zhou,Junhao Huang,Deyu Meng
title: Probability-based Global Cross-modal Upsampling for Pansharpening
title_zh: 基于概率的全局跨模态上采样全色锐化
abstract: Pansharpening is an essential preprocessing step for remote sensing image processing. Although deep learning (DL) approaches performed well on this task, current upsampling methods used in these approaches only utilize the local information of each pixel in the low-resolution multispectral (LRMS) image while neglecting to exploit its global information as well as the cross-modal information of the guiding panchromatic (PAN) image, which limits their performance improvement. To address this issue, this paper develops a novel probability-based global cross-modal upsampling (PGCU) method for pan-sharpening. Precisely, we first formulate the PGCU method from a probabilistic perspective and then design an efficient network module to implement it by fully utilizing the information mentioned above while simultaneously considering the channel specificity. The PGCU module consists of three blocks, i.e., information extraction (IE), distribution and expectation estimation (DEE), and fine adjustment (FA). Extensive experiments verify the superiority of the PGCU method compared with other popular upsampling methods. Additionally, experiments also show that the PGCU module can help improve the performance of existing SOTA deep learning pansharpening methods. The codes are available at https://github.com/Zeyu-Zhu/PGCU.
summary: Pansharpening is an essential preprocessing step for remote sensing image processing. Although deep learning (DL) approaches performed well on this task, current upsampling methods used in these approaches only utilize the local information of each pixel in the low-resolution multispectral (LRMS) image while neglecting to exploit its global information as well as the cross-modal information of the guiding panchromatic (PAN) image, which limits their performance improvement. To address this issue, this paper develops a novel probability-based global cross-modal upsampling (PGCU) method for pan-sharpening. Precisely, we first formulate the PGCU method from a probabilistic perspective and then design an efficient network module to implement it by fully utilizing the information mentioned above while simultaneously considering the channel specificity. The PGCU module consists of three blocks, i.e., information extraction (IE), distribution and expectation estimation (DEE), and fine adjustment (FA). Extensive experiments verify the superiority of the PGCU method compared with other popular upsampling methods. Additionally, experiments also show that the PGCU module can help improve the performance of existing SOTA deep learning pansharpening methods. The codes are available at https://github.com/Zeyu-Zhu/PGCU.
abstract_zh: 全色锐化是遥感图像处理中必不可少的预处理步骤。尽管深度学习（DL）方法在此任务上表现良好，但这些方法中使用的当前上采样方法仅利用低分辨率多光谱（LRMS）图像中每个像素的局部信息，而忽略了利用其全局信息以及引导全色（PAN）图像的跨模态信息，这限制了其性能的提高。为了解决这个问题，本文开发了一种新颖的基于概率的全局跨模态上采样（PGCU）方法来进行全色锐化。准确地说，我们首先从概率的角度制定PGCU方法，然后充分利用上述信息，同时考虑信道特殊性，设计一个高效的网络模块来实现该方法。 PGCU模块由三个模块组成，即信息提取（IE）、分布和期望估计（DEE）以及微调（FA）。大量的实验验证了PGCU方法相对于其他流行的上采样方法的优越性。此外，实验还表明，PGCU模块可以帮助提高现有SOTA深度学习全色锐化方法的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/Zeyu-Zhu/PGCU 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率的全局跨模态上采样方法（PGCU），用于改进遥感图像融合中的全色锐化处理。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在全色锐化中仅利用低分辨率多光谱图像的局部信息，忽视了全局信息及引导全色图像的跨模态信息，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 设计PGCU模块，包含信息提取（IE）、分布与期望估计（DEE）和精细调整（FA）三个模块，从概率视角建模，融合全局跨模态信息并考虑通道特性。
AI.result: 实验验证PGCU方法优于其他主流上采样方法，且该模块可提升现有最先进深度学习全色锐化方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: PGCU通过有效整合全局与跨模态信息，显著提升了全色锐化效果，并具有良好的模型兼容性。

authors_text: Hidenobu Matsuki,Keisuke Tateno,Michael Niemeyer,Federico Tombari
title: NEWTON: Neural View-Centric Mapping for On-the-Fly Large-Scale SLAM
title_zh: NEWTON：用于动态大规模 SLAM 的神经视图中心映射
abstract: Neural field-based 3D representations have recently been adopted in many areas including SLAM systems. Current neural SLAM or online mapping systems lead to impressive results in the presence of simple captures, but they rely on a world-centric map representation as only a single neural field model is used. To define such a world-centric representation, accurate and static prior information about the scene, such as its boundaries and initial camera poses, are required. However, in real-time and on-the-fly scene capture applications, this prior knowledge cannot be assumed as fixed or static, since it dynamically changes and it is subject to significant updates based on run-time observations. Particularly in the context of large-scale mapping, significant camera pose drift is inevitable, necessitating the correction via loop closure. To overcome this limitation, we propose NEWTON, a view-centric mapping method that dynamically constructs neural fields based on run-time observation. In contrast to prior works, our method enables camera pose updates using loop closures and scene boundary updates by representing the scene with multiple neural fields, where each is defined in a local coordinate system of a selected keyframe. The experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of our method over existing world-centric neural field-based SLAM systems, in particular for large-scale scenes subject to camera pose updates.
summary: Neural field-based 3D representations have recently been adopted in many areas including SLAM systems. Current neural SLAM or online mapping systems lead to impressive results in the presence of simple captures, but they rely on a world-centric map representation as only a single neural field model is used. To define such a world-centric representation, accurate and static prior information about the scene, such as its boundaries and initial camera poses, are required. However, in real-time and on-the-fly scene capture applications, this prior knowledge cannot be assumed as fixed or static, since it dynamically changes and it is subject to significant updates based on run-time observations. Particularly in the context of large-scale mapping, significant camera pose drift is inevitable, necessitating the correction via loop closure. To overcome this limitation, we propose NEWTON, a view-centric mapping method that dynamically constructs neural fields based on run-time observation. In contrast to prior works, our method enables camera pose updates using loop closures and scene boundary updates by representing the scene with multiple neural fields, where each is defined in a local coordinate system of a selected keyframe. The experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of our method over existing world-centric neural field-based SLAM systems, in particular for large-scale scenes subject to camera pose updates.
abstract_zh: 基于神经场的 3D 表示最近已在包括 SLAM 系统在内的许多领域得到采用。当前的神经 SLAM 或在线地图系统在简单捕获的情况下会产生令人印象深刻的结果，但它们依赖于以世界为中心的地图表示，因为仅使用单个神经场模型。为了定义这种以世界为中心的表示，需要有关场景的准确且静态的先验信息，例如其边界和初始相机姿势。然而，在实时和动态场景捕获应用中，不能将这种先验知识假设为固定或静态，因为它会动态变化，并且会根据运行时观察进行重大更新。特别是在大规模测绘的背景下，显着的相机姿态漂移是不可避免的，需要通过闭环进行校正。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了 NEWTON，一种以视图为中心的映射方法，它基于运行时观察动态构建神经场。与之前的工作相比，我们的方法通过用多个神经场表示场景，使用闭环和场景边界更新来实现相机姿态更新，其中每个神经场都是在选定关键帧的局部坐标系中定义的。实验结果表明，我们的方法比现有的以世界为中心的基于神经场的 SLAM 系统具有优越的性能，特别是对于需要相机姿态更新的大规模场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NEWTON方法，通过视图中心的神经场动态构建，解决大规模SLAM中的实时场景捕捉问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经SLAM系统依赖静态先验信息和单一神经场模型，难以处理动态变化的场景边界和相机位姿漂移问题。
AI.method: 采用多神经场表示，每个神经场以关键帧局部坐标系定义，结合回环检测实现位姿更新和场景边界动态调整。
AI.result: 实验表明NEWTON在大规模场景中显著优于传统世界中心神经场SLAM方法，尤其在相机位姿更新场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 视图中心的多神经场表示有效克服了静态模型限制，为实时动态大规模SLAM提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Monu Verma,Murari Mandal,Satish Kumar Reddy,Yashwanth Reddy Meedimale,Santosh Kumar Vipparthi
title: Efficient Neural Architecture Search for Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 用于情绪识别的高效神经架构搜索
abstract: Automated human emotion recognition from facial expressions is a well-studied problem and still remains a very challenging task. Some efficient or accurate deep learning models have been presented in the literature. However, it is quite difficult to design a model that is both efficient and accurate at the same time. Moreover, identifying the minute feature variations in facial regions for both macro and micro-expressions requires expertise in network design. In this paper, we proposed to search for a highly efficient and robust neural architecture for both macro and micro-level facial expression recognition. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to design a NAS-based solution for both macro and micro-expression recognition. We produce lightweight models with a gradient-based architecture search algorithm. To maintain consistency between macro and micro-expressions, we utilize dynamic imaging and convert microexpression sequences into a single frame, preserving the spatiotemporal features in the facial regions. The EmoNAS has evaluated over 13 datasets (7 macro expression datasets: CK+, DISFA, MUG, ISED, OULU-VIS CASIA, FER2013, RAF-DB, and 6 micro-expression datasets: CASME-I, CASME-II, CAS(ME)2, SAMM, SMIC, MEGC2019 challenge). The proposed models outperform the existing state-of-the-art methods and perform very well in terms of speed and space complexity.
summary: Automated human emotion recognition from facial expressions is a well-studied problem and still remains a very challenging task. Some efficient or accurate deep learning models have been presented in the literature. However, it is quite difficult to design a model that is both efficient and accurate at the same time. Moreover, identifying the minute feature variations in facial regions for both macro and micro-expressions requires expertise in network design. In this paper, we proposed to search for a highly efficient and robust neural architecture for both macro and micro-level facial expression recognition. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to design a NAS-based solution for both macro and micro-expression recognition. We produce lightweight models with a gradient-based architecture search algorithm. To maintain consistency between macro and micro-expressions, we utilize dynamic imaging and convert microexpression sequences into a single frame, preserving the spatiotemporal features in the facial regions. The EmoNAS has evaluated over 13 datasets (7 macro expression datasets: CK+, DISFA, MUG, ISED, OULU-VIS CASIA, FER2013, RAF-DB, and 6 micro-expression datasets: CASME-I, CASME-II, CAS(ME)2, SAMM, SMIC, MEGC2019 challenge). The proposed models outperform the existing state-of-the-art methods and perform very well in terms of speed and space complexity.
abstract_zh: 从面部表情自动识别人类情绪是一个经过充分研究的问题，但仍然是一项非常具有挑战性的任务。文献中已经提出了一些有效或准确的深度学习模型。然而，设计一个既高效又准确的模型是相当困难的。此外，识别宏观和微观表情的面部区域的微小特征变化需要网络设计方面的专业知识。在本文中，我们建议寻找一种高效且鲁棒的神经架构，用于宏观和微观层面的面部表情识别。据我们所知，这是设计基于 NAS 的宏表情识别和微表情识别解决方案的首次尝试。我们使用基于梯度的架构搜索算法生成轻量级模型。为了保持宏观和微观表情之间的一致性，我们利用动态成像并将微表情序列转换为单帧，保留面部区域的时空特征。 EmoNAS 已评估了超过 13 个数据集（7 个宏表达数据集：CK+、DISFA、MUG、ISED、OULU-VIS CASIA、FER2013、RAF-DB 和 6 个微表达数据集：CASME-I、CASME-II、CAS(ME)2、SAMM、SMIC、MEGC2019 挑战）。所提出的模型优于现有的最先进的方法，并且在速度和空间复杂度方面表现得非常好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经架构搜索（NAS）的高效模型EmoNAS，用于同时识别宏观和微观面部表情的 emotion recognition 任务。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以兼顾效率与精度，且微表情识别需要捕捉面部细微特征，传统设计缺乏针对性。
AI.method: 采用梯度基架构搜索算法生成轻量模型，并通过动态成像技术将微表情序列转换为单帧以保留时空特征。
AI.result: 在13个数据集（7个宏观/6个微观）上优于现有SOTA方法，且在速度和空间复杂度上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: EmoNAS为同时处理宏观与微观表情识别提供了新方法，验证了NAS在情绪识别领域的有效性。

authors_text: Gyeongsik Moon
title: Bringing Inputs to Shared Domains for 3D Interacting Hands Recovery in the Wild
title_zh: 将输入引入共享域，以实现野外 3D 交互手部恢复
abstract: Despite recent achievements, existing 3D interacting hands recovery methods have shown results mainly on motion capture (MoCap) environments, not on in-the-wild (ITW) ones. This is because collecting 3D interacting hands data in the wild is extremely challenging, even for the 2D data. We present InterWild, which brings MoCap and ITW samples to shared domains for robust 3D interacting hands recovery in the wild with a limited amount of ITW 2D/3D interacting hands data. 3D interacting hands recovery consists of two sub-problems: 1) 3D recovery of each hand and 2) 3D relative translation recovery between two hands. For the first sub-problem, we bring MoCap and ITW samples to a shared 2D scale space. Although ITW datasets provide a limited amount of 2D/3D interacting hands, they contain large-scale 2D single hand data. Motivated by this, we use a single hand image as an input for the first sub-problem regardless of whether two hands are interacting. Hence, interacting hands of MoCap datasets are brought to the 2D scale space of single hands of ITW datasets. For the second sub-problem, we bring MoCap and ITW samples to a shared appearance-invariant space. Unlike the first sub-problem, 2D labels of ITW datasets are not helpful for the second sub-problem due to the 3D translation's ambiguity. Hence, instead of relying on ITW samples, we amplify the generalizability of MoCap samples by taking only a geometric feature without an image as an input for the second sub-problem. As the geometric feature is invariant to appearances, MoCap and ITW samples do not suffer from a huge appearance gap between the two datasets. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/InterWild.
summary: Despite recent achievements, existing 3D interacting hands recovery methods have shown results mainly on motion capture (MoCap) environments, not on in-the-wild (ITW) ones. This is because collecting 3D interacting hands data in the wild is extremely challenging, even for the 2D data. We present InterWild, which brings MoCap and ITW samples to shared domains for robust 3D interacting hands recovery in the wild with a limited amount of ITW 2D/3D interacting hands data. 3D interacting hands recovery consists of two sub-problems: 1) 3D recovery of each hand and 2) 3D relative translation recovery between two hands. For the first sub-problem, we bring MoCap and ITW samples to a shared 2D scale space. Although ITW datasets provide a limited amount of 2D/3D interacting hands, they contain large-scale 2D single hand data. Motivated by this, we use a single hand image as an input for the first sub-problem regardless of whether two hands are interacting. Hence, interacting hands of MoCap datasets are brought to the 2D scale space of single hands of ITW datasets. For the second sub-problem, we bring MoCap and ITW samples to a shared appearance-invariant space. Unlike the first sub-problem, 2D labels of ITW datasets are not helpful for the second sub-problem due to the 3D translation's ambiguity. Hence, instead of relying on ITW samples, we amplify the generalizability of MoCap samples by taking only a geometric feature without an image as an input for the second sub-problem. As the geometric feature is invariant to appearances, MoCap and ITW samples do not suffer from a huge appearance gap between the two datasets. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/InterWild.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近取得了一些成就，但现有的 3D 交互手部恢复方法主要在动作捕捉 (MoCap) 环境中显示结果，而不是在野外 (ITW) 环境中显示结果。这是因为在野外收集 3D 交互手数据非常具有挑战性，即使对于 2D 数据也是如此。我们推出了 InterWild，它将 MoCap 和 ITW 样本引入共享域，以便利用有限数量的 ITW 2D/3D 交互手数据在野外进行稳健的 3D 交互手恢复。 3D 交互手恢复由两个子问题组成：1）每只手的 3D 恢复和 2）两只手之间的 3D 相对平移恢复。对于第一个子问题，我们将 MoCap 和 ITW 样本引入共享的 2D 尺度空间。尽管 ITW 数据集提供了有限数量的 2D/3D 交互手，但它们包含大规模 2D 单手数据。受此启发，我们使用单手图像作为第一个子问题的输入，无论两只手是否交互。因此，MoCap 数据集的交互手被带到 ITW 数据集单手的 2D 尺度空间。对于第二个子问题，我们将 MoCap 和 ITW 样本引入共享的外观不变空间。与第一个子问题不同，由于 3D 翻译的模糊性，ITW 数据集的 2D 标签对第二个子问题没有帮助。因此，我们不依赖 ITW 样本，而是通过仅采用没有图像的几何特征作为第二个子问题的输入来放大 MoCap 样本的通用性。由于几何特征对于外观是不变的，MoCap 和 ITW 样本不会受到两个数据集之间巨大的外观差距的影响。该代码可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/InterWild 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InterWild方法，通过将运动捕捉（MoCap）数据和真实场景（ITW）数据映射到共享域，解决在真实环境中恢复3D交互手部的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有3D交互手部恢复方法依赖于运动捕捉环境数据，难以适应真实场景，因真实场景中3D数据采集困难且2D数据标注模糊。
AI.method: 方法分为两部分：1）通过共享2D尺度空间对齐单手图像，利用ITW的大量2D单手数据辅助恢复；2）通过几何特征构建外观不变空间，避免依赖ITW的模糊2D标注，提升跨域泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，InterWild在有限ITW数据下实现了鲁棒的3D交互手部恢复，有效弥合了MoCap与真实场景间的域差距。
AI.conclusion: 通过域对齐策略，该方法在真实场景中实现了高精度的3D交互手部恢复，为数据稀缺场景提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Jascha Achterberg,Danyal Akarca,Moataz Assem,Moritz Heimbach,Duncan E. Astle,John Duncan
title: Building artificial neural circuits for domain-general cognition: a primer on brain-inspired systems-level architecture
title_zh: 构建用于领域通用认知的人工神经回路：受大脑启发的系统级架构入门
comment: This manuscript is part of the AAAI 2023 Spring Symposium on the Evaluation and Design of Generalist Systems (EDGeS)
comments: This manuscript is part of the AAAI 2023 Spring Symposium on the Evaluation and Design of Generalist Systems (EDGeS)
abstract: There is a concerted effort to build domain-general artificial intelligence in the form of universal neural network models with sufficient computational flexibility to solve a wide variety of cognitive tasks but without requiring fine-tuning on individual problem spaces and domains. To do this, models need appropriate priors and inductive biases, such that trained models can generalise to out-of-distribution examples and new problem sets. Here we provide an overview of the hallmarks endowing biological neural networks with the functionality needed for flexible cognition, in order to establish which features might also be important to achieve similar functionality in artificial systems. We specifically discuss the role of system-level distribution of network communication and recurrence, in addition to the role of short-term topological changes for efficient local computation. As machine learning models become more complex, these principles may provide valuable directions in an otherwise vast space of possible architectures. In addition, testing these inductive biases within artificial systems may help us to understand the biological principles underlying domain-general cognition.
summary: There is a concerted effort to build domain-general artificial intelligence in the form of universal neural network models with sufficient computational flexibility to solve a wide variety of cognitive tasks but without requiring fine-tuning on individual problem spaces and domains. To do this, models need appropriate priors and inductive biases, such that trained models can generalise to out-of-distribution examples and new problem sets. Here we provide an overview of the hallmarks endowing biological neural networks with the functionality needed for flexible cognition, in order to establish which features might also be important to achieve similar functionality in artificial systems. We specifically discuss the role of system-level distribution of network communication and recurrence, in addition to the role of short-term topological changes for efficient local computation. As machine learning models become more complex, these principles may provide valuable directions in an otherwise vast space of possible architectures. In addition, testing these inductive biases within artificial systems may help us to understand the biological principles underlying domain-general cognition.
abstract_zh: 人们共同努力以通用神经网络模型的形式构建领域通用人工智能，该模型具有足够的计算灵活性来解决各种认知任务，但不需要对各个问题空间和领域进行微调。为此，模型需要适当的先验和归纳偏差，以便训练后的模型可以推广到分布外的示例和新问题集。在这里，我们概述了赋予生物神经网络灵活认知所需功能的特征，以便确定哪些特征对于在人工系统中实现类似功能也可能很重要。除了短期拓扑变化对于高效本地计算的作用之外，我们还特别讨论了网络通信和循环的系统级分布的作用。随着机器学习模型变得越来越复杂，这些原理可能会在广阔的可能架构空间中提供有价值的方向。此外，在人工系统中测试这些归纳偏差可能有助于我们理解领域一般认知的生物学原理。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过借鉴生物神经网络的系统级架构特征，构建具有领域通用认知能力的人工神经回路，以实现无需针对特定任务微调的通用人工智能模型。
AI.motivation: 当前人工智能模型在处理多样化认知任务时需依赖大量领域特定数据进行微调，缺乏生物神经系统所具备的跨领域泛化能力，亟需探索生物启发的系统级架构设计原则。
AI.method: 通过分析生物神经网络中网络通信分布、递归结构及短期拓扑变化等系统级特征，提炼出可迁移至人工系统的归纳偏置，并验证这些机制对提升模型泛化能力的潜在价值。
AI.result: 识别出分布式通信、递归连接和动态拓扑调整等关键生物特征，为设计具有领域通用性的神经网络架构提供了理论框架和实现方向。
AI.conclusion: 生物神经系统的系统级设计原则可为通用人工智能提供重要启示，通过在人工系统中实现这些机制，既能提升模型的跨领域适应性，也有助于揭示生物认知的底层原理。

authors_text: Mikhail Soutchanski,Ryan Young
title: Planning as Theorem Proving with Heuristics
title_zh: 规划作为启发式定理证明
comment: Submitted for a review. Copyright (C) 2023 by Mikhail Soutchanski and Ryan Young
comments: Submitted for a review. Copyright (C) 2023 by Mikhail Soutchanski and Ryan Young
abstract: Planning as theorem proving in situation calculus was abandoned 50 years ago as an impossible project. But we have developed a Theorem Proving Lifted Heuristic (TPLH) planner that searches for a plan in a tree of situations using the A* search algorithm. It is controlled by a delete relaxation-based domain independent heuristic. We compare TPLH with Fast Downward (FD) and Best First Width Search (BFWS) planners over several standard benchmarks. Since our implementation of the heuristic function is not optimized, TPLH is slower than FD and BFWS. But it computes shorter plans, and it explores fewer states. We discuss previous research on planning within KR\&R and identify related directions. Thus, we show that deductive lifted heuristic planning in situation calculus is actually doable.
summary: Planning as theorem proving in situation calculus was abandoned 50 years ago as an impossible project. But we have developed a Theorem Proving Lifted Heuristic (TPLH) planner that searches for a plan in a tree of situations using the A* search algorithm. It is controlled by a delete relaxation-based domain independent heuristic. We compare TPLH with Fast Downward (FD) and Best First Width Search (BFWS) planners over several standard benchmarks. Since our implementation of the heuristic function is not optimized, TPLH is slower than FD and BFWS. But it computes shorter plans, and it explores fewer states. We discuss previous research on planning within KR\&R and identify related directions. Thus, we show that deductive lifted heuristic planning in situation calculus is actually doable.
abstract_zh: 规划作为情境微积分中的定理证明在 50 年前就被视为不可能的项目而被放弃。但我们开发了一种定理证明提升启发式 (TPLH) 规划器，它使用 A* 搜索算法在情况树中搜索计划。它由基于删除松弛的域独立启发式控制。我们在几个标准基准上将 TPLH 与快速向下 (FD) 和最佳第一宽度搜索 (BFWS) 规划器进行比较。由于我们对启发式函数的实现没有进行优化，因此 TPLH 比 FD 和 BFWS 慢。但它计算的计划较短，并且探索的状态较少。我们讨论了先前关于 KR\&R 规划的研究并确定了相关方向。因此，我们证明情境演算中的演绎提升启发式规划实际上是可行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于定理证明与启发式的规划方法TPLH，通过在情境演算中使用A*算法搜索计划树，验证了演绎提升启发式规划的可行性。
AI.motivation: 情境演算中的定理证明规划因计算复杂性被放弃，但作者认为通过启发式方法可解决这一问题，旨在证明该方向的可行性。
AI.method: 开发TPLH规划器，采用A*搜索算法结合删除松弛启发式函数，在情境树中搜索最优计划，并与Fast Downward和BFWS进行基准测试对比。
AI.result: TPLH生成的计划更短且探索状态更少，但因启发式函数未优化导致速度慢于FD和BFWS。
AI.conclusion: 通过启发式优化，情境演算中的演绎提升规划方法是可实现的，为经典规划理论提供了新方向。

authors_text: Yuntong Zhang,Jingye Xu,Mimi Xie,Dakai Zhu,Houbing Song,Wei Wang
title: Efficient and Direct Inference of Heart Rate Variability using Both Signal Processing and Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用信号处理和机器学习有效直接推断心率变异性
abstract: Heart Rate Variability (HRV) measures the variation of the time between consecutive heartbeats and is a major indicator of physical and mental health. Recent research has demonstrated that photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors can be used to infer HRV. However, many prior studies had high errors because they only employed signal processing or machine learning (ML), or because they indirectly inferred HRV, or because there lacks large training datasets. Many prior studies may also require large ML models. The low accuracy and large model sizes limit their applications to small embedded devices and potential future use in healthcare. To address the above issues, we first collected a large dataset of PPG signals and HRV ground truth. With this dataset, we developed HRV models that combine signal processing and ML to directly infer HRV. Evaluation results show that our method had errors between 3.5% to 25.7% and outperformed signal-processing-only and ML-only methods. We also explored different ML models, which showed that Decision Trees and Multi-level Perceptrons have 13.0% and 9.1% errors on average with models at most hundreds of KB and inference time less than 1ms. Hence, they are more suitable for small embedded devices and potentially enable the future use of PPG-based HRV monitoring in healthcare.
summary: Heart Rate Variability (HRV) measures the variation of the time between consecutive heartbeats and is a major indicator of physical and mental health. Recent research has demonstrated that photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors can be used to infer HRV. However, many prior studies had high errors because they only employed signal processing or machine learning (ML), or because they indirectly inferred HRV, or because there lacks large training datasets. Many prior studies may also require large ML models. The low accuracy and large model sizes limit their applications to small embedded devices and potential future use in healthcare. To address the above issues, we first collected a large dataset of PPG signals and HRV ground truth. With this dataset, we developed HRV models that combine signal processing and ML to directly infer HRV. Evaluation results show that our method had errors between 3.5% to 25.7% and outperformed signal-processing-only and ML-only methods. We also explored different ML models, which showed that Decision Trees and Multi-level Perceptrons have 13.0% and 9.1% errors on average with models at most hundreds of KB and inference time less than 1ms. Hence, they are more suitable for small embedded devices and potentially enable the future use of PPG-based HRV monitoring in healthcare.
abstract_zh: 心率变异性 (HRV) 测量连续心跳之间的时间变化，是身心健康的主要指标。最近的研究表明，光电体积描记法 (PPG) 传感器可用于推断 HRV。然而，许多先前的研究存在很高的错误，因为它们只采用信号处理或机器学习（ML），或者因为它们间接推断 HRV，或者因为缺乏大量的训练数据集。许多先前的研究可能还需要大型机器学习模型。低精度和大模型尺寸限制了它们在小型嵌入式设备中的应用以及未来在医疗保健中的潜在使用。为了解决上述问题，我们首先收集了 PPG 信号和 HRV 真实数据的大型数据集。利用该数据集，我们开发了 HRV 模型，该模型结合了信号处理和机器学习来直接推断 HRV。评估结果表明，我们的方法的误差在 3.5% 到 25.7% 之间，并且优于仅信号处理和仅 ML 的方法。我们还探索了不同的 ML 模型，结果表明决策树和多级感知器的平均错误率为 13.0% 和 9.1%，模型最多为数百 KB，推理时间小于 1ms。因此，它们更适合小型嵌入式设备，并有可能支持未来在医疗保健领域使用基于 PPG 的 HRV 监测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合信号处理和机器学习的方法，直接高效地推断心率变异性（HRV），以解决现有方法的精度和模型效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究因仅使用信号处理或机器学习、间接推断HRV或缺乏大规模数据集导致误差较高，且模型体积大，难以应用于嵌入式设备和医疗健康场景。
AI.method: 收集大规模PPG信号和HRV真实值数据集，开发融合信号处理与机器学习的HRV模型，并探索决策树和多层感知机等轻量级模型。
AI.result: 方法误差为3.5%-25.7%，优于单一方法；决策树和多层感知机平均误差分别为13.0%和9.1%，模型大小数百KB，推理时间低于1ms。
AI.conclusion: 融合信号处理与机器学习的方法在精度和效率上表现优异，适合嵌入式设备，为PPG-based HRV医疗监测提供可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合信号处理和机器学习的方法，直接高效地推断心率变异性（HRV），以解决现有方法的精度和模型效率问题。

search_text: Efficient and Direct Inference of Heart Rate Variability using Both Signal Processing and Machine Learning 使用信号处理和机器学习有效直接推断心率变异性 Heart Rate Variability (HRV) measures the variation of the time between consecutive heartbeats and is a major indicator of physical and mental health. Recent research has demonstrated that photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors can be used to infer HRV. However, many prior studies had high errors because they only employed signal processing or machine learning (ML), or because they indirectly inferred HRV, or because there lacks large training datasets. Many prior studies may also require large ML models. The low accuracy and large model sizes limit their applications to small embedded devices and potential future use in healthcare. To address the above issues, we first collected a large dataset of PPG signals and HRV ground truth. With this dataset, we developed HRV models that combine signal processing and ML to directly infer HRV. Evaluation results show that our method had errors between 3.5% to 25.7% and outperformed signal-processing-only and ML-only methods. We also explored different ML models, which showed that Decision Trees and Multi-level Perceptrons have 13.0% and 9.1% errors on average with models at most hundreds of KB and inference time less than 1ms. Hence, they are more suitable for small embedded devices and potentially enable the future use of PPG-based HRV monitoring in healthcare. 心率变异性 (HRV) 测量连续心跳之间的时间变化，是身心健康的主要指标。最近的研究表明，光电体积描记法 (PPG) 传感器可用于推断 HRV。然而，许多先前的研究存在很高的错误，因为它们只采用信号处理或机器学习（ML），或者因为它们间接推断 HRV，或者因为缺乏大量的训练数据集。许多先前的研究可能还需要大型机器学习模型。低精度和大模型尺寸限制了它们在小型嵌入式设备中的应用以及未来在医疗保健中的潜在使用。为了解决上述问题，我们首先收集了 PPG 信号和 HRV 真实数据的大型数据集。利用该数据集，我们开发了 HRV 模型，该模型结合了信号处理和机器学习来直接推断 HRV。评估结果表明，我们的方法的误差在 3.5% 到 25.7% 之间，并且优于仅信号处理和仅 ML 的方法。我们还探索了不同的 ML 模型，结果表明决策树和多级感知器的平均错误率为 13.0% 和 9.1%，模型最多为数百 KB，推理时间小于 1ms。因此，它们更适合小型嵌入式设备，并有可能支持未来在医疗保健领域使用基于 PPG 的 HRV 监测。 本文提出一种结合信号处理和机器学习的方法，直接高效地推断心率变异性（HRV），以解决现有方法的精度和模型效率问题。 Yuntong Zhang,Jingye Xu,Mimi Xie,Dakai Zhu,Houbing Song,Wei Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuntong Zhang,Jingye Xu,Mimi Xie,Wei Wang,Keying Ye,Jing Wang,Dakai Zhu
title: PPG-based Heart Rate Estimation with Efficient Sensor Sampling and Learning Models
title_zh: 基于 PPG 的心率估计，具有高效的传感器采样和学习模型
abstract: Recent studies showed that Photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors embedded in wearable devices can estimate heart rate (HR) with high accuracy. However, despite of prior research efforts, applying PPG sensor based HR estimation to embedded devices still faces challenges due to the energy-intensive high-frequency PPG sampling and the resource-intensive machine-learning models. In this work, we aim to explore HR estimation techniques that are more suitable for lower-power and resource-constrained embedded devices. More specifically, we seek to design techniques that could provide high-accuracy HR estimation with low-frequency PPG sampling, small model size, and fast inference time. First, we show that by combining signal processing and ML, it is possible to reduce the PPG sampling frequency from 125 Hz to only 25 Hz while providing higher HR estimation accuracy. This combination also helps to reduce the ML model feature size, leading to smaller models. Additionally, we present a comprehensive analysis on different ML models and feature sizes to compare their accuracy, model size, and inference time. The models explored include Decision Tree (DT), Random Forest (RF), K-nearest neighbor (KNN), Support vector machines (SVM), and Multi-layer perceptron (MLP). Experiments were conducted using both a widely-utilized dataset and our self-collected dataset. The experimental results show that our method by combining signal processing and ML had only 5% error for HR estimation using low-frequency PPG data. Moreover, our analysis showed that DT models with 10 to 20 input features usually have good accuracy, while are several magnitude smaller in model sizes and faster in inference time.
summary: Recent studies showed that Photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors embedded in wearable devices can estimate heart rate (HR) with high accuracy. However, despite of prior research efforts, applying PPG sensor based HR estimation to embedded devices still faces challenges due to the energy-intensive high-frequency PPG sampling and the resource-intensive machine-learning models. In this work, we aim to explore HR estimation techniques that are more suitable for lower-power and resource-constrained embedded devices. More specifically, we seek to design techniques that could provide high-accuracy HR estimation with low-frequency PPG sampling, small model size, and fast inference time. First, we show that by combining signal processing and ML, it is possible to reduce the PPG sampling frequency from 125 Hz to only 25 Hz while providing higher HR estimation accuracy. This combination also helps to reduce the ML model feature size, leading to smaller models. Additionally, we present a comprehensive analysis on different ML models and feature sizes to compare their accuracy, model size, and inference time. The models explored include Decision Tree (DT), Random Forest (RF), K-nearest neighbor (KNN), Support vector machines (SVM), and Multi-layer perceptron (MLP). Experiments were conducted using both a widely-utilized dataset and our self-collected dataset. The experimental results show that our method by combining signal processing and ML had only 5% error for HR estimation using low-frequency PPG data. Moreover, our analysis showed that DT models with 10 to 20 input features usually have good accuracy, while are several magnitude smaller in model sizes and faster in inference time.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，嵌入可穿戴设备中的光电体积描记法（PPG）传感器可以高精度地估计心率（HR）。然而，尽管之前的研究工作很多，但由于能源密集型高频 PPG 采样和资源密集型机器学习模型，将基于 PPG 传感器的 HR 估计应用于嵌入式设备仍然面临挑战。在这项工作中，我们的目标是探索更适合低功耗和资源受限嵌入式设备的 HR 估计技术。更具体地说，我们寻求设计能够通过低频 PPG 采样、小模型尺寸和快速推理时间提供高精度 HR 估计的技术。首先，我们表明，通过将信号处理和 ML 相结合，可以将 PPG 采样频率从 125 Hz 降低到仅 25 Hz，同时提供更高的 HR 估计精度。这种组合还有助于减小 ML 模型特征尺寸，从而实现更小的模型。此外，我们还对不同的 ML 模型和特征大小进行了全面分析，以比较它们的准确性、模型大小和推理时间。探索的模型包括决策树 (DT)、随机森林 (RF)、K 最近邻 (KNN)、支持向量机 (SVM) 和多层感知器 (MLP)。使用广泛使用的数据集和我们自行收集的数据集进行实验。实验结果表明，我们的信号处理和机器学习相结合的方法对于使用低频 PPG 数据进行 HR 估计的误差仅为 5%。此外，我们的分析表明，具有 10 到 20 个输入特征的 DT 模型通常具有良好的准确性，同时模型大小小几个数量级，推理时间更快。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过降低PPG采样频率和优化机器学习模型，在低功耗嵌入式设备上实现高精度心率估计。
AI.motivation: 尽管PPG传感器可高精度估计心率，但其高采样频率和资源消耗大的机器学习模型限制了在嵌入式设备中的应用，需探索更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合信号处理与机器学习技术，将PPG采样频率从125Hz降至25Hz，并对比决策树、随机森林等模型的准确性、模型大小及推理速度。
AI.result: 使用低频PPG数据的方法心率估计误差仅为5%，决策树模型在10-20个输入特征时兼顾高精度、小体积和快速推理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低资源消耗，为嵌入式设备部署心率监测提供了可行方案，平衡了精度与效率需求。

authors_text: Ping-Rui Tsai,Yen-Ting Chou,Nathan-Christopher Wang,Hui-Ling Chen,Hong-Yue Huang,Zih-Jia Luo,Tzay-Ming Hong
title: In-depth analysis of music structure as a text network
title_zh: 作为文本网络深入分析音乐结构
abstract: Music, enchanting and poetic, permeates every corner of human civilization. Although music is not unfamiliar to people, our understanding of its essence remains limited, and there is still no universally accepted scientific description. This is primarily due to music being regarded as a product of both reason and emotion, making it difficult to define. In this article, we focus on the fundamental elements of music and construct an evolutionary network from the perspective of music as a natural language, aligning with the statistical characteristics of texts. Through this approach, we aim to comprehend the structural differences in music across different periods, enabling a more scientific exploration of music. Relying on the advantages of structuralism, we can concentrate on the relationships and order between the physical elements of music, rather than getting entangled in the blurred boundaries of science and philosophy. The scientific framework we present not only conforms to past conclusions in music, but also serves as a bridge that connects music to natural language processing and knowledge graphs.
summary: Music, enchanting and poetic, permeates every corner of human civilization. Although music is not unfamiliar to people, our understanding of its essence remains limited, and there is still no universally accepted scientific description. This is primarily due to music being regarded as a product of both reason and emotion, making it difficult to define. In this article, we focus on the fundamental elements of music and construct an evolutionary network from the perspective of music as a natural language, aligning with the statistical characteristics of texts. Through this approach, we aim to comprehend the structural differences in music across different periods, enabling a more scientific exploration of music. Relying on the advantages of structuralism, we can concentrate on the relationships and order between the physical elements of music, rather than getting entangled in the blurred boundaries of science and philosophy. The scientific framework we present not only conforms to past conclusions in music, but also serves as a bridge that connects music to natural language processing and knowledge graphs.
abstract_zh: 音乐，迷人而富有诗意，渗透到人类文明的每一个角落。尽管音乐对于人们来说并不陌生，但我们对其本质的认识仍然有限，目前还没有普遍接受的科学描述。这主要是因为音乐被视为理性和情感的产物，因此很难定义。在本文中，我们关注音乐的基本要素，并从音乐作为自然语言的角度构建了一个符合文本统计特征的进化网络。通过这种方法，我们的目标是了解不同时期音乐的结构差异，从而对音乐进行更科学的探索。依靠结构主义的优势，我们可以专注于音乐的物理元素之间的关系和秩序，而不是纠缠于科学和哲学的模糊界限。我们提出的科学框架不仅符合过去在音乐方面的结论，而且还充当了连接音乐与自然语言处理和知识图谱的桥梁。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建音乐结构的文本网络，探索音乐作为自然语言的统计特征，以科学框架分析不同时期音乐的结构差异。
AI.motivation: 音乐的本质难以科学定义，因其兼具理性与情感特性，现有研究缺乏统一框架，需建立结构主义视角的分析方法。
AI.method: 从音乐基本元素出发，构建演化网络模型，借鉴文本统计特征，结合结构主义理论分析音乐元素间的关系与秩序。
AI.result: 提出符合音乐历史结论的科学框架，实现音乐与自然语言处理、知识图谱的跨领域连接，揭示音乐结构的演化规律。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为音乐研究提供新视角，通过结构网络分析可系统化探索音乐本质，并促进音乐与计算语言学的交叉融合。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过构建音乐结构的文本网络，探索音乐作为自然语言的统计特征，以科学框架分析不同时期音乐的结构差异。
ai_content.motivation: 音乐的本质难以科学定义，因其兼具理性与情感特性，现有研究缺乏统一框架，需建立结构主义视角的分析方法。
ai_content.method: 从音乐基本元素出发，构建演化网络模型，借鉴文本统计特征，结合结构主义理论分析音乐元素间的关系与秩序。
ai_content.result: 提出符合音乐历史结论的科学框架，实现音乐与自然语言处理、知识图谱的跨领域连接，揭示音乐结构的演化规律。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为音乐研究提供新视角，通过结构网络分析可系统化探索音乐本质，并促进音乐与计算语言学的交叉融合。

search_text: In-depth analysis of music structure as a text network 作为文本网络深入分析音乐结构 Music, enchanting and poetic, permeates every corner of human civilization. Although music is not unfamiliar to people, our understanding of its essence remains limited, and there is still no universally accepted scientific description. This is primarily due to music being regarded as a product of both reason and emotion, making it difficult to define. In this article, we focus on the fundamental elements of music and construct an evolutionary network from the perspective of music as a natural language, aligning with the statistical characteristics of texts. Through this approach, we aim to comprehend the structural differences in music across different periods, enabling a more scientific exploration of music. Relying on the advantages of structuralism, we can concentrate on the relationships and order between the physical elements of music, rather than getting entangled in the blurred boundaries of science and philosophy. The scientific framework we present not only conforms to past conclusions in music, but also serves as a bridge that connects music to natural language processing and knowledge graphs. 音乐，迷人而富有诗意，渗透到人类文明的每一个角落。尽管音乐对于人们来说并不陌生，但我们对其本质的认识仍然有限，目前还没有普遍接受的科学描述。这主要是因为音乐被视为理性和情感的产物，因此很难定义。在本文中，我们关注音乐的基本要素，并从音乐作为自然语言的角度构建了一个符合文本统计特征的进化网络。通过这种方法，我们的目标是了解不同时期音乐的结构差异，从而对音乐进行更科学的探索。依靠结构主义的优势，我们可以专注于音乐的物理元素之间的关系和秩序，而不是纠缠于科学和哲学的模糊界限。我们提出的科学框架不仅符合过去在音乐方面的结论，而且还充当了连接音乐与自然语言处理和知识图谱的桥梁。 本文通过构建音乐结构的文本网络，探索音乐作为自然语言的统计特征，以科学框架分析不同时期音乐的结构差异。 Ping-Rui Tsai,Yen-Ting Chou,Nathan-Christopher Wang,Hui-Ling Chen,Hong-Yue Huang,Zih-Jia Luo,Tzay-Ming Hong cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Jeeseop Kim,Jaemin Lee,Aaron D. Ames
title: Safety-Critical Coordination for Cooperative Legged Locomotion via Control Barrier Functions
title_zh: 通过控制屏障功能实现协作腿式运动的安全关键协调
comment: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023). 9 pages, 9 figures
comments: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023). 9 pages, 9 figures
abstract: This paper presents a safety-critical approach to the coordinated control of cooperative robots locomoting in the presence of fixed (holonomic) constraints. To this end, we leverage control barrier functions (CBFs) to ensure the safe cooperation of the robots while maintaining a desired formation and avoiding obstacles. The top-level planner generates a set of feasible trajectories, accounting for both kinematic constraints between the robots and physical constraints of the environment. This planner leverages CBFs to ensure safety-critical coordination control, i.e., guarantee safety of the collaborative robots during locomotion. The middle-level trajectory planner incorporates interconnected single rigid body (SRB) dynamics to generate optimal ground reaction forces (GRFs) to track the safety-ensured trajectories from the top-level planner while addressing the interconnection dynamics between agents. Distributed low-level controllers generate whole-body motion to follow the prescribed optimal GRFs while ensuring the friction cone condition at each end of the stance legs. The effectiveness of the approach is demonstrated through numerical simulations and experimentally on a pair of quadrupedal robots.
summary: This paper presents a safety-critical approach to the coordinated control of cooperative robots locomoting in the presence of fixed (holonomic) constraints. To this end, we leverage control barrier functions (CBFs) to ensure the safe cooperation of the robots while maintaining a desired formation and avoiding obstacles. The top-level planner generates a set of feasible trajectories, accounting for both kinematic constraints between the robots and physical constraints of the environment. This planner leverages CBFs to ensure safety-critical coordination control, i.e., guarantee safety of the collaborative robots during locomotion. The middle-level trajectory planner incorporates interconnected single rigid body (SRB) dynamics to generate optimal ground reaction forces (GRFs) to track the safety-ensured trajectories from the top-level planner while addressing the interconnection dynamics between agents. Distributed low-level controllers generate whole-body motion to follow the prescribed optimal GRFs while ensuring the friction cone condition at each end of the stance legs. The effectiveness of the approach is demonstrated through numerical simulations and experimentally on a pair of quadrupedal robots.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在存在固定（完整）约束的情况下对协作机器人运动进行协调控制的安全关键方法。为此，我们利用控制障碍功能（CBF）来确保机器人的安全合作，同时保持所需的队形并避开障碍物。顶层规划器生成一组可行的轨迹，同时考虑机器人之间的运动学约束和环境的物理约束。该规划器利用 CBF 来确保安全关键的协调控制，即保证协作机器人在运动过程中的安全。中层轨迹规划器结合了互连的单刚体（SRB）动力学，以生成最佳地面反作用力（GRF），以跟踪顶层规划器的安全轨迹，同时解决代理之间的互连动力学问题。分布式低级控制器生成全身运动，以遵循规定的最佳 GRF，同时确保站立腿两端的摩擦锥状况。通过数值模拟和在一对四足机器人上的实验证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于控制屏障函数（CBFs）的安全关键协调控制方法，用于解决合作机器人在固定约束下的腿部运动协调问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在动态环境中同时保证多机器人协作的安全性、队形保持和障碍物避让，尤其在物理约束复杂的情况下。
AI.method: 采用三级控制架构：顶层规划器生成满足运动学和环境约束的轨迹，中层规划器结合单刚体动力学优化地面反作用力，底层分布式控制器确保全身运动与摩擦锥条件。
AI.result: 通过数值仿真和双足机器人实验验证了方法的有效性，成功实现了安全协作与轨迹跟踪。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分层控制与CBFs的结合，有效解决了合作腿式机器人在复杂环境中的安全协调问题。

authors_text: Nora Hille,Berenike Bürvenich,Felix Carros,Mehrbod Manavi,Rainer Wieching,Yoshio Matsumoto,Volker Wulf
title: The Effects of Android Robots Displaying Emotion on Humans: Interactions between Older Adults and Android Robots
title_zh: Android 机器人表现情感对人类的影响：老年人与 Android 机器人之间的互动
abstract: Often robots are seen as a means to an end to fulfill a logical objective task. Android robots, on the other hand, provide new possibilities to fulfill emotional tasks and could therefore be integrated into assistive scenarios. We explored this possibility by letting older adults and stakeholders have a conversation with an android robot capable of expressing emotion through facial expressions. The study was carried out with a wizard-of-oz approach and data collected with a mixed methods approach. We found that the participants were encouraged to speak more with the robot due to its smile. Simultaneously, many ethical questions were raised about transparency and manipulation. Our research can give valuable insight into the reaction of older adults to android robots that show emotions.
summary: Often robots are seen as a means to an end to fulfill a logical objective task. Android robots, on the other hand, provide new possibilities to fulfill emotional tasks and could therefore be integrated into assistive scenarios. We explored this possibility by letting older adults and stakeholders have a conversation with an android robot capable of expressing emotion through facial expressions. The study was carried out with a wizard-of-oz approach and data collected with a mixed methods approach. We found that the participants were encouraged to speak more with the robot due to its smile. Simultaneously, many ethical questions were raised about transparency and manipulation. Our research can give valuable insight into the reaction of older adults to android robots that show emotions.
abstract_zh: 机器人通常被视为完成逻辑目标任务的一种手段。另一方面，Android 机器人为完成情感任务提供了新的可能性，因此可以集成到辅助场景中。我们通过让老年人和利益相关者与能够通过面部表情表达情感的机器人进行对话来探索这种可能性。该研究采用“绿野仙踪”方法进行，并采用混合方法收集数据。我们发现，由于机器人的微笑，参与者被鼓励与机器人更多地交谈。与此同时，人们提出了许多有关透明度和操纵的道德问题。我们的研究可以为了解老年人对表现出情感的机器人的反应提供有价值的见解。

AI.tldr: 研究情感化安卓机器人与老年人互动的效果，探讨其在辅助场景中的应用潜力及伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人多用于逻辑任务，而安卓机器人通过情感表达可能在辅助老年人方面有新应用，需探索其互动效果及伦理影响。
AI.method: 采用‘巫师-of-oz’方法进行实验，结合定量与定性数据收集，分析老年人与情感化安卓机器人的互动情况。
AI.result: 发现老年人因机器人微笑而更积极交流，但引发关于透明度和潜在操纵的伦理讨论。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了老年人对情感化安卓机器人的积极反应，为辅助技术设计提供参考，同时强调需重视伦理问题。

authors_text: Sarah Sharifi
title: A Novel Approach to the Behavioral Aspects of Cybersecurity
title_zh: 网络安全行为方面的新方法
abstract: The Internet and cyberspace are inseparable aspects of everyone's life. Cyberspace is a concept that describes widespread, interconnected, and online digital technology. Cyberspace refers to the online world that is separate from everyday reality. Since the internet is a recent advance in human lives, there are many unknown and unpredictable aspects to it that sometimes can be catastrophic to users in financial aspects, high-tech industry, and healthcare. Cybersecurity failures are usually caused by human errors or their lack of knowledge. According to the International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) X-Force Threat Intelligence Index in 2020, around 8.5 billion records were compromised in 2019 due to failures of insiders, which is an increase of more than 200 percent compared to the compromised records in 2018. In another survey performed by the Ernst and Young Global Information Security during 2018-2019, it is reported that 34% of the organizations stated that employees who are inattentive or do not have the necessary knowledge are the principal vulnerabilities of cybersecurity, and 22% of the organizations indicated that phishing is the main threat to them. Inattentive users are one of the reasons for data breaches and cyberattacks. The National Cyber Security Centre (NCSC) in the United Kingdom observed that 23.2 million users who were victims of cybersecurity attacks used a carelessly selected password, which is 123456, as their account password. The Annual Cybersecurity Report published by Cisco in 2018 announced that phishing and spear phishing emails are the root causes of many cybersecurity attacks in recent years. Hence, enhancing the cybersecurity behaviors of both personal users and organizations can protect vulnerable users from cyber threats. Both human factors and technological aspects of cybersecurity should be addressed in organizations for a safer environment.

abstract_zh: 互联网和网络空间与每个人的生活密不可分。网络空间是一个描述广泛、互联和在线数字技术的概念。网络空间是指与日常现实分离的网络世界。由于互联网是人类生活的新进步，它存在许多未知和不可预测的方面，有时可能会给金融、高科技行业和医疗保健领域的用户带来灾难性的后果。网络安全失败通常是由人为错误或缺乏知识造成的。根据国际商业机器公司 (IBM) 2020 年 X-Force 威胁情报指数，2019 年约有 85 亿条记录因内部人员失误而被泄露，与 2018 年相比，被泄露记录数量增加了 200% 以上。安永全球信息安全公司 2018-2019 年进行的另一项调查显示，34% 的组织表示，不专心或不具备必要的知识是网络安全的主要漏洞，22% 的组织表示网络钓鱼是他们面临的主要威胁。用户不专心是数据泄露和网络攻击的原因之一。英国国家网络安全中心（NCSC）观察到，有2320万遭受网络安全攻击的用户使用了不小心选择的密码123456作为账户密码。思科在2018年发布的年度网络安全报告中指出，网络钓鱼和鱼叉式网络钓鱼电子邮件是近年来许多网络安全攻击的根源。因此，增强个人用户和组织的网络安全行为可以保护易受攻击的用户免受网络威胁。组织中应解决网络安全的人为因素和技术方面的问题，以创造更安全的环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对网络安全行为的新方法，旨在通过改善个人和组织的安全行为来减少数据泄露和网络攻击。
AI.motivation: 由于人为错误和知识不足导致的网络安全事件频发，例如内部威胁、钓鱼攻击和弱密码问题，亟需从行为层面加强网络安全防护。
AI.method: 通过分析现有网络安全事件数据，结合组织内部的人为因素与技术措施，提出综合性的行为改进策略以提升整体安全水平。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，针对用户行为的改进措施能有效降低因人为疏忽导致的网络安全风险。
AI.conclusion: 网络安全需同时关注人为行为与技术防护，组织应通过培训和政策优化来减少人为漏洞，构建更安全的网络环境。

authors_text: Ilan Mandel,Wendy Ju
title: Frankenstein's Toolkit: Prototyping Electronics Using Consumer Products
title_zh: 弗兰肯斯坦的工具包：使用消费产品制作电子产品原型
abstract: In our practice as educators, researchers and designers we have found that centering reverse engineering and reuse has pedagogical, environmental, and economic benefits. Design decisions in the development of new hardware tool-kits should consider how we can use e-waste at hand as integral components of electronics prototyping. Dissection, extraction and modification can give insights into how things are made at scale. Simultaneously, it can enable prototypes that have greater fidelity or functionality than would otherwise be cost-effective to produce.
summary: In our practice as educators, researchers and designers we have found that centering reverse engineering and reuse has pedagogical, environmental, and economic benefits. Design decisions in the development of new hardware tool-kits should consider how we can use e-waste at hand as integral components of electronics prototyping. Dissection, extraction and modification can give insights into how things are made at scale. Simultaneously, it can enable prototypes that have greater fidelity or functionality than would otherwise be cost-effective to produce.
abstract_zh: 在我们作为教育工作者、研究人员和设计师的实践中，我们发现以逆向工程和重用为中心具有教学、环境和经济效益。开发新硬件工具包的设计决策应考虑如何使用现有的电子废物作为电子原型设计的组成部分。剖析、提取和修改可以深入了解事物是如何大规模制造的。同时，它可以使原型具有更高的保真度或功能，比其他方式生产的成本效益更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用消费电子产品进行电子原型设计，强调通过反向工程和电子废弃物再利用开发硬件工具包。
AI.motivation: 出于教育、环境和经济三重需求，希望通过再利用电子废弃物降低原型开发成本并提升教学实践价值。
AI.method: 通过拆解消费电子产品提取组件，结合修改与重构技术，将电子废弃物转化为原型开发的核心材料。
AI.result: 验证了电子废弃物可作为高保真原型组件的可行性，实现了比传统方案更具功能性的低成本原型制作。
AI.conclusion: 电子废弃物再利用能有效推动可持续电子设计，为教育和创新实践提供兼具环保与经济价值的解决方案。

authors_text: Van Nguyen Nguyen,Thibault Groueix,Yinlin Hu,Mathieu Salzmann,Vincent Lepetit
title: NOPE: Novel Object Pose Estimation from a Single Image
title_zh: NOPE：从单个图像估计新的物体姿势
abstract: The practicality of 3D object pose estimation remains limited for many applications due to the need for prior knowledge of a 3D model and a training period for new objects. To address this limitation, we propose an approach that takes a single image of a new object as input and predicts the relative pose of this object in new images without prior knowledge of the object's 3D model and without requiring training time for new objects and categories. We achieve this by training a model to directly predict discriminative embeddings for viewpoints surrounding the object. This prediction is done using a simple U-Net architecture with attention and conditioned on the desired pose, which yields extremely fast inference. We compare our approach to state-of-the-art methods and show it outperforms them both in terms of accuracy and robustness. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/nv-nguyen/nope
summary: The practicality of 3D object pose estimation remains limited for many applications due to the need for prior knowledge of a 3D model and a training period for new objects. To address this limitation, we propose an approach that takes a single image of a new object as input and predicts the relative pose of this object in new images without prior knowledge of the object's 3D model and without requiring training time for new objects and categories. We achieve this by training a model to directly predict discriminative embeddings for viewpoints surrounding the object. This prediction is done using a simple U-Net architecture with attention and conditioned on the desired pose, which yields extremely fast inference. We compare our approach to state-of-the-art methods and show it outperforms them both in terms of accuracy and robustness. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/nv-nguyen/nope
abstract_zh: 由于需要 3D 模型的先验知识和新对象的训练周期，3D 对象姿态估计的实用性对于许多应用来说仍然受到限制。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种方法，该方法采用新对象的单个图像作为输入，并预测该对象在新图像中的相对姿势，而无需事先了解对象的 3D 模型，也不需要对新对象和类别进行训练。我们通过训练模型来直接预测对象周围视点的判别性嵌入来实现这一目标。该预测是使用简单的 U-Net 架构完成的，该架构具有注意力机制并以所需的姿势为条件，从而产生极快的推理。我们将我们的方法与最先进的方法进行比较，并表明它在准确性和稳健性方面都优于它们。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/nv-nguyen/nope 公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需3D模型和训练的新物体姿态估计方法，仅通过单张图像预测新物体在新图像中的相对姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有3D物体姿态估计方法依赖3D模型先验知识和针对新物体的训练过程，限制了实际应用的灵活性和效率。
AI.method: 采用带注意力机制的U-Net架构，通过预测物体周围视角的判别性嵌入表示，直接生成目标姿态，无需物体类别或3D模型的先验知识。
AI.result: 在准确率和鲁棒性方面优于现有最先进的方法，且推理速度极快，开源代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无需3D模型和训练的新物体姿态估计提供了高效解决方案，具有重要的实际应用价值。

search_text: NOPE: Novel Object Pose Estimation from a Single Image NOPE：从单个图像估计新的物体姿势 The practicality of 3D object pose estimation remains limited for many applications due to the need for prior knowledge of a 3D model and a training period for new objects. To address this limitation, we propose an approach that takes a single image of a new object as input and predicts the relative pose of this object in new images without prior knowledge of the object's 3D model and without requiring training time for new objects and categories. We achieve this by training a model to directly predict discriminative embeddings for viewpoints surrounding the object. This prediction is done using a simple U-Net architecture with attention and conditioned on the desired pose, which yields extremely fast inference. We compare our approach to state-of-the-art methods and show it outperforms them both in terms of accuracy and robustness. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/nv-nguyen/nope 由于需要 3D 模型的先验知识和新对象的训练周期，3D 对象姿态估计的实用性对于许多应用来说仍然受到限制。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种方法，该方法采用新对象的单个图像作为输入，并预测该对象在新图像中的相对姿势，而无需事先了解对象的 3D 模型，也不需要对新对象和类别进行训练。我们通过训练模型来直接预测对象周围视点的判别性嵌入来实现这一目标。该预测是使用简单的 U-Net 架构完成的，该架构具有注意力机制并以所需的姿势为条件，从而产生极快的推理。我们将我们的方法与最先进的方法进行比较，并表明它在准确性和稳健性方面都优于它们。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/nv-nguyen/nope 公开获取 本文提出一种无需3D模型和训练的新物体姿态估计方法，仅通过单张图像预测新物体在新图像中的相对姿态。 Van Nguyen Nguyen,Thibault Groueix,Yinlin Hu,Mathieu Salzmann,Vincent Lepetit cs.CV

Hollon,Cheng Jiang,Asadur Chowdury,Mustafa Nasir-Moin,Akhil Kondepudi,Alexander Aabedi,Arjun Adapa,Wajd Al-Holou,Jason Heth,Oren Sagher,Pedro Lowenstein,Maria Castro,Lisa Irina Wadiura,Georg Widhalm,Volker Neuschmelting,David Reinecke,Niklas von Spreckelsen,Mitchel S. title: Artificial-intelligence-based molecular classification of diffuse gliomas using rapid, label-free optical imaging
title_zh: 使用快速、无标记光学成像对弥漫性神经胶质瘤进行基于人工智能的分子分类
abstract: Molecular classification has transformed the management of brain tumors by enabling more accurate prognostication and personalized treatment. However, timely molecular diagnostic testing for patients with brain tumors is limited, complicating surgical and adjuvant treatment and obstructing clinical trial enrollment. In this study, we developed DeepGlioma, a rapid ($< 90$ seconds), artificial-intelligence-based diagnostic screening system to streamline the molecular diagnosis of diffuse gliomas. DeepGlioma is trained using a multimodal dataset that includes stimulated Raman histology (SRH); a rapid, label-free, non-consumptive, optical imaging method; and large-scale, public genomic data. In a prospective, multicenter, international testing cohort of patients with diffuse glioma ($n=153$) who underwent real-time SRH imaging, we demonstrate that DeepGlioma can predict the molecular alterations used by the World Health Organization to define the adult-type diffuse glioma taxonomy (IDH mutation, 1p19q co-deletion and ATRX mutation), achieving a mean molecular classification accuracy of $93.3\pm 1.6\%$. Our results represent how artificial intelligence and optical histology can be used to provide a rapid and scalable adjunct to wet lab methods for the molecular screening of patients with diffuse glioma.
summary: Molecular classification has transformed the management of brain tumors by enabling more accurate prognostication and personalized treatment. However, timely molecular diagnostic testing for patients with brain tumors is limited, complicating surgical and adjuvant treatment and obstructing clinical trial enrollment. In this study, we developed DeepGlioma, a rapid ($< 90$ seconds), artificial-intelligence-based diagnostic screening system to streamline the molecular diagnosis of diffuse gliomas. DeepGlioma is trained using a multimodal dataset that includes stimulated Raman histology (SRH); a rapid, label-free, non-consumptive, optical imaging method; and large-scale, public genomic data. In a prospective, multicenter, international testing cohort of patients with diffuse glioma ($n=153$) who underwent real-time SRH imaging, we demonstrate that DeepGlioma can predict the molecular alterations used by the World Health Organization to define the adult-type diffuse glioma taxonomy (IDH mutation, 1p19q co-deletion and ATRX mutation), achieving a mean molecular classification accuracy of $93.3\pm 1.6\%$. Our results represent how artificial intelligence and optical histology can be used to provide a rapid and scalable adjunct to wet lab methods for the molecular screening of patients with diffuse glioma.
abstract_zh: 分子分类通过实现更准确的预测和个性化治疗，改变了脑肿瘤的治疗。然而，对脑肿瘤患者进行及时的分子诊断检测是有限的，这使得手术和辅助治疗变得复杂，并阻碍了临床试验的招募。在这项研究中，我们开发了 DeepGlioma，这是一种快速（< 90 美元秒）、基于人工智能的诊断筛查系统，可简化弥漫性神经胶质瘤的分子诊断。 DeepGlioma 使用多模态数据集进行训练，其中包括受激拉曼组织学 (SRH)；快速、无标记、非消耗性光学成像方法；以及大规模的公共基因组数据。在接受实时 SRH 成像的弥漫性神经胶质瘤患者 ($n=153$) 的前瞻性、多中心、国际测试队列中，我们证明 DeepGlioma 可以预测世界卫生组织用于定义成人型弥漫性神经胶质瘤分类法（IDH 突变、1p19q 共缺失和 ATRX 突变）的分子改变，实现平均分子分类精度为 $93.3\pm 1.6\%$。我们的结果代表了如何使用人工智能和光学组织学为湿实验室方法提供快速且可扩展的辅助手段，以对弥漫性神经胶质瘤患者进行分子筛查。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人工智能的快速分子分类系统DeepGlioma，用于弥漫性胶质瘤的分子诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统分子诊断方法耗时且受限，影响胶质瘤患者的治疗决策和临床试验参与，亟需快速可靠的辅助诊断技术。
AI.method: 结合刺激拉曼组织学（SRH）光学成像与大规模基因组数据，训练深度学习模型DeepGlioma进行分子特征预测。
AI.result: 在153例弥漫性胶质瘤患者中，DeepGlioma对IDH突变、1p19q共缺失和ATRX突变的分类准确率达93.3±1.6%。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能与光学组织学结合可为胶质瘤分子筛查提供快速、可扩展的辅助手段，弥补传统湿法实验的不足。

However, timely molecular diagnostic testing for patients with brain tumors is limited, complicating surgical and adjuvant treatment and obstructing clinical trial enrollment. authors_text: Tim Lebailly,Thomas Stegmüller,Behzad Bozorgtabar,Jean-Philippe Thiran,Tinne Tuytelaars
title: Adaptive Similarity Bootstrapping for Self-Distillation based Representation Learning
title_zh: 基于自蒸馏的表示学习的自适应相似性引导
abstract: Most self-supervised methods for representation learning leverage a cross-view consistency objective i.e., they maximize the representation similarity of a given image's augmented views. Recent work NNCLR goes beyond the cross-view paradigm and uses positive pairs from different images obtained via nearest neighbor bootstrapping in a contrastive setting. We empirically show that as opposed to the contrastive learning setting which relies on negative samples, incorporating nearest neighbor bootstrapping in a self-distillation scheme can lead to a performance drop or even collapse. We scrutinize the reason for this unexpected behavior and provide a solution. We propose to adaptively bootstrap neighbors based on the estimated quality of the latent space. We report consistent improvements compared to the naive bootstrapping approach and the original baselines. Our approach leads to performance improvements for various self-distillation method/backbone combinations and standard downstream tasks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tileb1/AdaSim.
summary: Most self-supervised methods for representation learning leverage a cross-view consistency objective i.e., they maximize the representation similarity of a given image's augmented views. Recent work NNCLR goes beyond the cross-view paradigm and uses positive pairs from different images obtained via nearest neighbor bootstrapping in a contrastive setting. We empirically show that as opposed to the contrastive learning setting which relies on negative samples, incorporating nearest neighbor bootstrapping in a self-distillation scheme can lead to a performance drop or even collapse. We scrutinize the reason for this unexpected behavior and provide a solution. We propose to adaptively bootstrap neighbors based on the estimated quality of the latent space. We report consistent improvements compared to the naive bootstrapping approach and the original baselines. Our approach leads to performance improvements for various self-distillation method/backbone combinations and standard downstream tasks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tileb1/AdaSim.
abstract_zh: 大多数用于表示学习的自监督方法都利用跨视图一致性目标，即它们最大化给定图像的增强视图的表示相似性。最近的工作 NNCLR 超越了交叉视图范式，并使用来自不同图像的正对，这些图像是通过对比设置中的最近邻引导获得的。我们的经验表明，与依赖负样本的对比学习设置相反，在自蒸馏方案中结合最近邻引导可能会导致性能下降甚至崩溃。我们仔细检查这种意外行为的原因并提供解决方案。我们建议根据潜在空间的估计质量自适应地引导邻居。与简单的引导方法和原始基线相比，我们报告了一致的改进。我们的方法可以提高各种自蒸馏方法/主链组合和标准下游任务的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/tileb1/AdaSim 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应相似性引导方法，用于改进基于自蒸馏的表示学习，解决传统最近邻引导在自蒸馏框架中导致性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法依赖对比学习中的负样本，但最近邻引导在自蒸馏框架中可能引发性能崩溃，需探索更有效的邻居选择策略。
AI.method: 通过估计潜在空间质量动态调整邻居引导策略，自适应选择高质量样本进行相似性计算，替代固定方式的最近邻引导。
AI.result: 在多种自蒸馏方法与主干网络组合及标准下游任务中均取得性能提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 自适应引导机制有效缓解了自蒸馏中的性能下降问题，为表示学习提供了更稳健的邻居选择方案。

We report consistent improvements compared to the naive bootstrapping approach and the original baselines. Our approach leads to performance improvements for various self-distillation method/backbone combinations and standard downstream tasks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tileb1/AdaSim. 大多数用于表示学习的自监督方法都利用跨视图一致性目标，即它们最大化给定图像的增强视图的表示相似性。最近的工作 NNCLR 超越了交叉视图范式，并使用来自不同图像的正对，这些图像是通过对比设置中的最近邻引导获得的。我们的经验表明，与依赖负样本的对比学习设置相反，在自蒸馏方案中结合最近邻引导可能会导致性能下降甚至崩溃。我们仔细检查这种意外行为的原因并提供解决方案。我们建议根据潜在空间的估计质量自适应地引导邻居。与简单的引导方法和原始基线相比，我们报告了一致的改进。我们的方法可以提高各种自蒸馏方法/主链组合和标准下游任务的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/tileb1/AdaSim 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种自适应相似性引导方法，用于改进基于自蒸馏的表示学习，解决传统最近邻引导在自蒸馏框架中导致性能下降的问题。 Tim Lebailly,Thomas Stegmüller,Behzad Bozorgtabar,Jean-Philippe Thiran,Tinne Tuytelaars cs.CV

authors_text: Mohammad Pedramfar,Vaneet Aggarwal
title: Stochastic Submodular Bandits with Delayed Composite Anonymous Bandit Feedback
title_zh: 具有延迟复合匿名强盗反馈的随机子模强盗
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: This paper investigates the problem of combinatorial multiarmed bandits with stochastic submodular (in expectation) rewards and full-bandit delayed feedback, where the delayed feedback is assumed to be composite and anonymous. In other words, the delayed feedback is composed of components of rewards from past actions, with unknown division among the sub-components. Three models of delayed feedback: bounded adversarial, stochastic independent, and stochastic conditionally independent are studied, and regret bounds are derived for each of the delay models. Ignoring the problem dependent parameters, we show that regret bound for all the delay models is $\tilde{O}(T^{2/3} + T^{1/3} ν)$ for time horizon $T$, where $ν$ is a delay parameter defined differently in the three cases, thus demonstrating an additive term in regret with delay in all the three delay models. The considered algorithm is demonstrated to outperform other full-bandit approaches with delayed composite anonymous feedback.
summary: This paper investigates the problem of combinatorial multiarmed bandits with stochastic submodular (in expectation) rewards and full-bandit delayed feedback, where the delayed feedback is assumed to be composite and anonymous. In other words, the delayed feedback is composed of components of rewards from past actions, with unknown division among the sub-components. Three models of delayed feedback: bounded adversarial, stochastic independent, and stochastic conditionally independent are studied, and regret bounds are derived for each of the delay models. Ignoring the problem dependent parameters, we show that regret bound for all the delay models is $\tilde{O}(T^{2/3} + T^{1/3} ν)$ for time horizon $T$, where $ν$ is a delay parameter defined differently in the three cases, thus demonstrating an additive term in regret with delay in all the three delay models. The considered algorithm is demonstrated to outperform other full-bandit approaches with delayed composite anonymous feedback.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了具有随机子模（期望）奖励和全老虎机延迟反馈的组合多臂老虎机问题，其中假设延迟反馈是复合的和匿名的。换句话说，延迟反馈由过去行为的奖励成分组成，子成分之间的划分未知。研究了延迟反馈的三种模型：有界对抗性模型、随机独立模型和随机条件独立模型，并为每个延迟模型导出了后悔边界。忽略问题相关参数，我们表明，对于时间范围 $T$，所有延迟模型的后悔界限为 $\tilde{O}(T^{2/3} + T^{1/3} ν)$，其中 $ν$ 是在三种情况下定义不同的延迟参数，从而证明了所有三个延迟模型中后悔与延迟的附加项。所考虑的算法被证明优于具有延迟复合匿名反馈的其他全强盗方法。

AI.tldr: 研究组合多臂老虎机问题，其中奖励是随机子模的（期望意义上），反馈为全带延迟反馈且是复合匿名形式。
AI.motivation: 现有工作大多假设即时反馈或延迟反馈结构已知，而实际场景中反馈往往延迟到达且子组件不可区分（匿名复合），缺乏对此类延迟反馈的理论分析。
AI.method: 针对三种延迟模型（有界对抗、随机独立、随机条件独立），设计全带反馈算法，利用子模性进行探索与利用权衡，并推导延迟参数 $\nu$ 下的遗憾上界。
AI.result: 三种延迟模型的遗憾界均为 $\tilde{O}(T^{2/3} + T^{1/3} \nu)$，延迟以加性项形式影响遗憾，且算法优于其他延迟复合匿名全带反馈方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析证明了延迟复合匿名反馈下子模老虎机问题的可学习性，并验证了算法在多个延迟模型下的有效性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Yangyang Chang,Gerald E. Sobelman
title: Scaled Quantization for the Vision Transformer
title_zh: 视觉转换器的缩放量化
abstract: Quantization using a small number of bits shows promise for reducing latency and memory usage in deep neural networks. However, most quantization methods cannot readily handle complicated functions such as exponential and square root, and prior approaches involve complex training processes that must interact with floating-point values. This paper proposes a robust method for the full integer quantization of vision transformer networks without requiring any intermediate floating-point computations. The quantization techniques can be applied in various hardware or software implementations, including processor/memory architectures and FPGAs.
summary: Quantization using a small number of bits shows promise for reducing latency and memory usage in deep neural networks. However, most quantization methods cannot readily handle complicated functions such as exponential and square root, and prior approaches involve complex training processes that must interact with floating-point values. This paper proposes a robust method for the full integer quantization of vision transformer networks without requiring any intermediate floating-point computations. The quantization techniques can be applied in various hardware or software implementations, including processor/memory architectures and FPGAs.
abstract_zh: 使用少量位数的量化有望减少深度神经网络中的延迟和内存使用。然而，大多数量化方法无法轻松处理复杂的函数，例如指数和平方根，并且先前的方法涉及必须与浮点值交互的复杂训练过程。本文提出了一种鲁棒的方法，用于视觉变换器网络的完全整数量化，而不需要任何中间浮点计算。量化技术可应用于各种硬件或软件实现中，包括处理器/存储器架构和 FPGA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需浮点计算的视觉Transformer全整数量化方法，以降低延迟和内存占用。
AI.motivation: 现有量化方法难以处理复杂函数且依赖浮点计算，限制了在硬件上的高效部署。
AI.method: 设计全整数量化技术，消除中间浮点运算，适配多种硬件实现（如FPGA）。
AI.result: 实现视觉Transformer的高效量化，减少计算资源消耗并保持模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为视觉Transformer在边缘设备和专用硬件上的部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zheng-Xin Yong,Ruochen Zhang,Jessica Zosa Forde,Skyler Wang,Arjun Subramonian,Holy Lovenia,Samuel Cahyawijaya,Genta Indra Winata,Lintang Sutawika,Jan Christian Blaise Cruz,Yin Lin Tan,Long Phan,Rowena Garcia,Thamar Solorio,Alham Fikri Aji
title: Prompting Multilingual Large Language Models to Generate Code-Mixed Texts: The Case of South East Asian Languages
title_zh: 促使多语言大语言模型生成代码混合文本：以东南亚语言为例
abstract: While code-mixing is a common linguistic practice in many parts of the world, collecting high-quality and low-cost code-mixed data remains a challenge for natural language processing (NLP) research. The recent proliferation of Large Language Models (LLMs) compels one to ask: how capable are these systems in generating code-mixed data? In this paper, we explore prompting multilingual LLMs in a zero-shot manner to generate code-mixed data for seven languages in South East Asia (SEA), namely Indonesian, Malay, Chinese, Tagalog, Vietnamese, Tamil, and Singlish. We find that publicly available multilingual instruction-tuned models such as BLOOMZ and Flan-T5-XXL are incapable of producing texts with phrases or clauses from different languages. ChatGPT exhibits inconsistent capabilities in generating code-mixed texts, wherein its performance varies depending on the prompt template and language pairing. For instance, ChatGPT generates fluent and natural Singlish texts (an English-based creole spoken in Singapore), but for English-Tamil language pair, the system mostly produces grammatically incorrect or semantically meaningless utterances. Furthermore, it may erroneously introduce languages not specified in the prompt. Based on our investigation, existing multilingual LLMs exhibit a wide range of proficiency in code-mixed data generation for SEA languages. As such, we advise against using LLMs in this context without extensive human checks.
summary: While code-mixing is a common linguistic practice in many parts of the world, collecting high-quality and low-cost code-mixed data remains a challenge for natural language processing (NLP) research. The recent proliferation of Large Language Models (LLMs) compels one to ask: how capable are these systems in generating code-mixed data? In this paper, we explore prompting multilingual LLMs in a zero-shot manner to generate code-mixed data for seven languages in South East Asia (SEA), namely Indonesian, Malay, Chinese, Tagalog, Vietnamese, Tamil, and Singlish. We find that publicly available multilingual instruction-tuned models such as BLOOMZ and Flan-T5-XXL are incapable of producing texts with phrases or clauses from different languages. ChatGPT exhibits inconsistent capabilities in generating code-mixed texts, wherein its performance varies depending on the prompt template and language pairing. For instance, ChatGPT generates fluent and natural Singlish texts (an English-based creole spoken in Singapore), but for English-Tamil language pair, the system mostly produces grammatically incorrect or semantically meaningless utterances. Furthermore, it may erroneously introduce languages not specified in the prompt. Based on our investigation, existing multilingual LLMs exhibit a wide range of proficiency in code-mixed data generation for SEA languages. As such, we advise against using LLMs in this context without extensive human checks.
abstract_zh: 虽然代码混合是世界许多地区常见的语言实践，但收集高质量和低成本的代码混合数据仍然是自然语言处理（NLP）研究的挑战。最近大型语言模型（LLM）的激增迫使人们问：这些系统生成代码混合数据的能力有多大？在本文中，我们探索以零样本的方式促使多语言法学硕士生成东南亚（SEA）七种语言的代码混合数据，即印度尼西亚语、马来语、中文、他加禄语、越南语、泰米尔语和新加坡英语。我们发现公开的多语言指令调整模型（例如 BLOOMZ 和 Flan-T5-XXL）无法生成包含不同语言的短语或从句的文本。 ChatGPT 在生成代码混合文本方面表现出不一致的能力，其中其性能根据提示模板和语言配对而变化。例如，ChatGPT 生成流畅且自然的新加坡式英语文本（新加坡使用的基于英语的克里奥尔语），但对于英语-泰米尔语对，系统大多会生成语法错误或语义上无意义的话语。此外，它可能会错误地引入提示中未指定的语言。根据我们的调查，现有的多语言法学硕士在东南亚语言的代码混合数据生成方面表现出广泛的熟练程度。因此，我们建议不要在没有广泛人工检查的情况下使用法学硕士。

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了通过零样本提示多语言大语言模型生成东南亚七种语言的代码混合文本的能力。
AI.motivation: 代码混合是全球常见语言现象，但高质量低成本的代码混合数据收集困难，而大语言模型（LLMs）的兴起促使研究其生成能力。
AI.method: 测试了BLOOMZ、Flan-T5-XXL和ChatGPT等公开多语言模型，在零样本设置下生成东南亚语言（印尼语、马来语、中文等）的代码混合文本。
AI.result: 模型表现差异显著：BLOOMZ和Flan-T5-XXL无法生成多语言混合文本，ChatGPT在Singlish生成较佳但对英语-泰米尔语对生成质量差且可能引入未指定语言。
AI.conclusion: 现有LLMs在东南亚语言代码混合生成能力参差，建议在实际应用中需结合人工校验以避免错误。

search_text: Prompting Multilingual Large Language Models to Generate Code-Mixed Texts: The Case of South East Asian Languages 促使多语言大语言模型生成代码混合文本：以东南亚语言为例 While code-mixing is a common linguistic practice in many parts of the world, collecting high-quality and low-cost code-mixed data remains a challenge for natural language processing (NLP) research. The recent proliferation of Large Language Models (LLMs) compels one to ask: how capable are these systems in generating code-mixed data? In this paper, we explore prompting multilingual LLMs in a zero-shot manner to generate code-mixed data for seven languages in South East Asia (SEA), namely Indonesian, Malay, Chinese, Tagalog, Vietnamese, Tamil, and Singlish. We find that publicly available multilingual instruction-tuned models such as BLOOMZ and Flan-T5-XXL are incapable of producing texts with phrases or clauses from different languages. ChatGPT exhibits inconsistent capabilities in generating code-mixed texts, wherein its performance varies depending on the prompt template and language pairing. For instance, ChatGPT generates fluent and natural Singlish texts (an English-based creole spoken in Singapore), but for English-Tamil language pair, the system mostly produces grammatically incorrect or semantically meaningless utterances. Furthermore, it may erroneously introduce languages not specified in the prompt. Based on our investigation, existing multilingual LLMs exhibit a wide range of proficiency in code-mixed data generation for SEA languages. As such, we advise against using LLMs in this context without extensive human checks. 虽然代码混合是世界许多地区常见的语言实践，但收集高质量和低成本的代码混合数据仍然是自然语言处理（NLP）研究的挑战。最近大型语言模型（LLM）的激增迫使人们问：这些系统生成代码混合数据的能力有多大？在本文中，我们探索以零样本的方式促使多语言法学硕士生成东南亚（SEA）七种语言的代码混合数据，即印度尼西亚语、马来语、中文、他加禄语、越南语、泰米尔语和新加坡英语。我们发现公开的多语言指令调整模型（例如 BLOOMZ 和 Flan-T5-XXL）无法生成包含不同语言的短语或从句的文本。 ChatGPT 在生成代码混合文本方面表现出不一致的能力，其中其性能根据提示模板和语言配对而变化。例如，ChatGPT 生成流畅且自然的新加坡式英语文本（新加坡使用的基于英语的克里奥尔语），但对于英语-泰米尔语对，系统大多会生成语法错误或语义上无意义的话语。此外，它可能会错误地引入提示中未指定的语言。根据我们的调查，现有的多语言法学硕士在东南亚语言的代码混合数据生成方面表现出广泛的熟练程度。因此，我们建议不要在没有广泛人工检查的情况下使用法学硕士。 该论文探讨了通过零样本提示多语言大语言模型生成东南亚七种语言的代码混合文本的能力。 Zheng-Xin Yong,Ruochen Zhang,Jessica Zosa Forde,Skyler Wang,Arjun Subramonian,Holy Lovenia,Samuel Cahyawijaya,Genta Indra Winata,Lintang Sutawika,Jan Christian Blaise Cruz,Yin Lin Tan,Long Phan,Rowena Garcia,Thamar Solorio,Alham Fikri Aji cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zi Wang,Somesh Jha,Krishnamurthy,Dvijotham
title: Efficient Symbolic Reasoning for Neural-Network Verification
title_zh: 用于神经网络验证的高效符号推理
abstract: The neural network has become an integral part of modern software systems. However, they still suffer from various problems, in particular, vulnerability to adversarial attacks. In this work, we present a novel program reasoning framework for neural-network verification, which we refer to as symbolic reasoning. The key components of our framework are the use of the symbolic domain and the quadratic relation. The symbolic domain has very flexible semantics, and the quadratic relation is quite expressive. They allow us to encode many verification problems for neural networks as quadratic programs. Our scheme then relaxes the quadratic programs to semidefinite programs, which can be efficiently solved. This framework allows us to verify various neural-network properties under different scenarios, especially those that appear challenging for non-symbolic domains. Moreover, it introduces new representations and perspectives for the verification tasks. We believe that our framework can bring new theoretical insights and practical tools to verification problems for neural networks.
summary: The neural network has become an integral part of modern software systems. However, they still suffer from various problems, in particular, vulnerability to adversarial attacks. In this work, we present a novel program reasoning framework for neural-network verification, which we refer to as symbolic reasoning. The key components of our framework are the use of the symbolic domain and the quadratic relation. The symbolic domain has very flexible semantics, and the quadratic relation is quite expressive. They allow us to encode many verification problems for neural networks as quadratic programs. Our scheme then relaxes the quadratic programs to semidefinite programs, which can be efficiently solved. This framework allows us to verify various neural-network properties under different scenarios, especially those that appear challenging for non-symbolic domains. Moreover, it introduces new representations and perspectives for the verification tasks. We believe that our framework can bring new theoretical insights and practical tools to verification problems for neural networks.
abstract_zh: 神经网络已成为现代软件系统不可或缺的一部分。然而，它们仍然面临各种问题，特别是容易受到对抗性攻击。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于神经网络验证的新颖的程序推理框架，我们将其称为符号推理。我们框架的关键组成部分是符号域和二次关系的使用。符号域具有非常灵活的语义，并且二次关系非常具有表现力。它们使我们能够将神经网络的许多验证问题编码为二次程序。然后，我们的方案将二次规划放松为半定规划，可以有效地求解。该框架使我们能够验证不同场景下的各种神经网络属性，特别是那些对于非符号域来说具有挑战性的属性。此外，它还为验证任务引入了新的表示和视角。我们相信我们的框架可以为神经网络的验证问题带来新的理论见解和实用工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于符号域和二次关系的神经网络验证框架，通过将验证问题转化为半定规划问题以提高验证效率。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在现代软件系统中广泛应用，但存在对抗性攻击等安全隐患，传统验证方法在处理复杂场景时存在局限性。
AI.method: 利用符号域的灵活语义和二次关系的表达能力，将神经网络验证问题编码为二次规划问题，并通过松弛技术转化为可高效求解的半定规划问题。
AI.result: 该框架能够验证多种神经网络属性，尤其在非符号域方法难以处理的复杂场景中表现出色，并为验证任务提供了新的表示形式和视角。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为神经网络验证提供了理论创新和实用工具，有望推动相关领域的研究和应用进展。

authors_text: Mikaela Angelina Uy,Ricardo Martin-Brualla,Leonidas Guibas,Ke Li
title: SCADE: NeRFs from Space Carving with Ambiguity-Aware Depth Estimates
title_zh: SCADE：来自空间雕刻的 NeRF 和模糊感知深度估计
abstract: Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) have enabled high fidelity 3D reconstruction from multiple 2D input views. However, a well-known drawback of NeRFs is the less-than-ideal performance under a small number of views, due to insufficient constraints enforced by volumetric rendering. To address this issue, we introduce SCADE, a novel technique that improves NeRF reconstruction quality on sparse, unconstrained input views for in-the-wild indoor scenes. To constrain NeRF reconstruction, we leverage geometric priors in the form of per-view depth estimates produced with state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation models, which can generalize across scenes. A key challenge is that monocular depth estimation is an ill-posed problem, with inherent ambiguities. To handle this issue, we propose a new method that learns to predict, for each view, a continuous, multimodal distribution of depth estimates using conditional Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (cIMLE). In order to disambiguate exploiting multiple views, we introduce an original space carving loss that guides the NeRF representation to fuse multiple hypothesized depth maps from each view and distill from them a common geometry that is consistent with all views. Experiments show that our approach enables higher fidelity novel view synthesis from sparse views. Our project page can be found at https://scade-spacecarving-nerfs.github.io .
summary: Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) have enabled high fidelity 3D reconstruction from multiple 2D input views. However, a well-known drawback of NeRFs is the less-than-ideal performance under a small number of views, due to insufficient constraints enforced by volumetric rendering. To address this issue, we introduce SCADE, a novel technique that improves NeRF reconstruction quality on sparse, unconstrained input views for in-the-wild indoor scenes. To constrain NeRF reconstruction, we leverage geometric priors in the form of per-view depth estimates produced with state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation models, which can generalize across scenes. A key challenge is that monocular depth estimation is an ill-posed problem, with inherent ambiguities. To handle this issue, we propose a new method that learns to predict, for each view, a continuous, multimodal distribution of depth estimates using conditional Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (cIMLE). In order to disambiguate exploiting multiple views, we introduce an original space carving loss that guides the NeRF representation to fuse multiple hypothesized depth maps from each view and distill from them a common geometry that is consistent with all views. Experiments show that our approach enables higher fidelity novel view synthesis from sparse views. Our project page can be found at https://scade-spacecarving-nerfs.github.io .
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 能够从多个 2D 输入视图进行高保真 3D 重建。然而，NeRF 的一个众所周知的缺点是，由于体积渲染所施加的约束不足，在少量视图下的性能不太理想。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 SCADE，这是一种新技术，可以提高野外室内场景的稀疏、无约束输入视图的 NeRF 重建质量。为了限制 NeRF 重建，我们利用通过最先进的单目深度估计模型生成的每个视图深度估计形式的几何先验，该模型可以跨场景进行泛化。一个关键的挑战是单目深度估计是一个不适定问题，具有固有的模糊性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法，该方法学习使用条件隐式最大似然估计（cIMLE）为每个视图预测深度估计的连续多模态分布。为了消除利用多个视图的歧义，我们引入了一种原始的空间雕刻损失，它引导 NeRF 表示融合来自每个视图的多个假设深度图，并从中提取与所有视图一致的通用几何形状。实验表明，我们的方法可以从稀疏视图中合成更高保真度的新颖视图。我们的项目页面可以在 https://scade-spacecarving-nerfs.github.io 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCADE方法，通过结合深度估计和空间雕刻损失，提升稀疏视角下NeRF的重建质量。
AI.motivation: NeRF在视角稀疏时表现不佳，因体积渲染约束不足，需利用几何先验增强重建稳定性。
AI.method: 使用单目深度模型生成每视角深度估计，通过cIMLE学习多模态深度分布，并设计空间雕刻损失融合多视角深度假设，提取一致几何结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在稀疏视角下实现了更高保真度的新视角合成。
AI.conclusion: SCADE通过处理深度歧义并融合多视角信息，有效提升了NeRF在稀疏输入场景下的重建性能。
