In order to disambiguate exploiting multiple views, we introduce an original space carving loss that guides the NeRF representation to fuse multiple hypothesized depth maps from each view and distill from them a common geometry that is consistent with all views. Experiments show that our approach enables higher fidelity novel view synthesis from sparse views. Our project page can be found at https://scade-spacecarving-nerfs.github.io . 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 能够从多个 2D 输入视图进行高保真 3D 重建。然而，NeRF 的一个众所周知的缺点是，由于体积渲染所施加的约束不足，在少量视图下的性能不太理想。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 SCADE，这是一种新技术，可以提高野外室内场景的稀疏、无约束输入视图的 NeRF 重建质量。为了限制 NeRF 重建，我们利用通过最先进的单目深度估计模型生成的每个视图深度估计形式的几何先验，该模型可以跨场景进行泛化。一个关键的挑战是单目深度估计是一个不适定问题，具有固有的模糊性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法，该方法学习使用条件隐式最大似然估计（cIMLE）为每个视图预测深度估计的连续多模态分布。为了消除利用多个视图的歧义，我们引入了一种原始的空间雕刻损失，它引导 NeRF 表示融合来自每个视图的多个假设深度图，并从中提取与所有视图一致的通用几何形状。实验表明，我们的方法可以从稀疏视图中合成更高保真度的新颖视图。我们的项目页面可以在 https://scade-spacecarving-nerfs.github.io 找到。 本文提出SCADE方法，通过结合深度估计和空间雕刻损失，提升稀疏视角下NeRF的重建质量。 Mikaela Angelina Uy,Ricardo Martin-Brualla,Leonidas Guibas,Ke Li cs.CV

authors_text: Haijin Zeng,Kai Feng,Jiezhang Cao,Shaoguang Huang,Yongqiang Zhao,Hiep Luong,Jan Aelterman,Wilfried Philips
title: Inheriting Bayer's Legacy-Joint Remosaicing and Denoising for Quad Bayer Image Sensor
title_zh: 继承拜耳传统的四路拜耳图像传感器联合再马赛克和去噪技术
abstract: Pixel binning based Quad sensors have emerged as a promising solution to overcome the hardware limitations of compact cameras in low-light imaging. However, binning results in lower spatial resolution and non-Bayer CFA artifacts. To address these challenges, we propose a dual-head joint remosaicing and denoising network (DJRD), which enables the conversion of noisy Quad Bayer and standard noise-free Bayer pattern without any resolution loss. DJRD includes a newly designed Quad Bayer remosaicing (QB-Re) block, integrated denoising modules based on Swin-transformer and multi-scale wavelet transform. The QB-Re block constructs the convolution kernel based on the CFA pattern to achieve a periodic color distribution in the perceptual field, which is used to extract exact spectral information and reduce color misalignment. The integrated Swin-Transformer and multi-scale wavelet transform capture non-local dependencies, frequency and location information to effectively reduce practical noise. By identifying challenging patches utilizing Moire and zipper detection metrics, we enable our model to concentrate on difficult patches during the post-training phase, which enhances the model's performance in hard cases. Our proposed model outperforms competing models by approximately 3dB, without additional complexity in hardware or software.
summary: Pixel binning based Quad sensors have emerged as a promising solution to overcome the hardware limitations of compact cameras in low-light imaging. However, binning results in lower spatial resolution and non-Bayer CFA artifacts. To address these challenges, we propose a dual-head joint remosaicing and denoising network (DJRD), which enables the conversion of noisy Quad Bayer and standard noise-free Bayer pattern without any resolution loss. DJRD includes a newly designed Quad Bayer remosaicing (QB-Re) block, integrated denoising modules based on Swin-transformer and multi-scale wavelet transform. The QB-Re block constructs the convolution kernel based on the CFA pattern to achieve a periodic color distribution in the perceptual field, which is used to extract exact spectral information and reduce color misalignment. The integrated Swin-Transformer and multi-scale wavelet transform capture non-local dependencies, frequency and location information to effectively reduce practical noise. By identifying challenging patches utilizing Moire and zipper detection metrics, we enable our model to concentrate on difficult patches during the post-training phase, which enhances the model's performance in hard cases. Our proposed model outperforms competing models by approximately 3dB, without additional complexity in hardware or software.
abstract_zh: 基于像素合并的四传感器已成为克服紧凑型相机在低光成像中的硬件限制的有前途的解决方案。然而，分箱会导致较低的空间分辨率和非拜耳 CFA 伪影。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种双头联合再马赛克和去噪网络（DJRD），它能够在没有任何分辨率损失的情况下转换有噪声的四拜耳和标准无噪声拜耳模式。 DJRD 包括新设计的四拜耳再马赛克 (QB-Re) 块、基于 Swin 变换器和多尺度小波变换的集成去噪模块。 QB-Re模块基于CFA模式构造卷积核，以实现感知场中的周期性颜色分布，用于提取精确的光谱信息并减少颜色失准。集成的 Swin-Transformer 和多尺度小波变换捕获非局部依赖性、频率和位置信息，有效降低实际噪声。通过利用莫尔条纹和拉链检测指标来识别具有挑战性的补丁，我们使我们的模型能够在训练后阶段专注于困难的补丁，从而提高了模型在困难情况下的性能。我们提出的模型比竞争模型高出约 3dB，且没有增加硬件或软件的复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合去马赛克和去噪网络（DJRD），用于处理四色拜耳（Quad Bayer）图像传感器的低光成像问题，以在不损失分辨率的情况下提高图像质量。
AI.motivation: 四色拜耳传感器虽能提升低光性能，但存在空间分辨率下降和非拜耳CFA伪影的问题，现有方法难以同时解决分辨率损失与噪声抑制的矛盾。
AI.method: 设计双头网络DJRD，包含基于CFA模式的QB-Re块（通过周期性色彩分布提取光谱信息）及融合Swin-Transformer与多尺度小波变换的去噪模块，并利用莫尔纹和拉链效应检测指标聚焦困难区域进行后训练优化。
AI.result: 在无额外软硬件复杂度的前提下，模型性能较竞品提升约3dB，有效抑制噪声并减少色彩错位伪影。
AI.conclusion: DJRD通过联合优化去马赛克与去噪流程，成功解决了Quad Bayer传感器的分辨率与噪声双重挑战，为紧凑型相机低光成像提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Rakhee Kallimani,Krishna Pai,Prasoon Raghuwanshi,Sridhar Iyer,Onel L. A. López
title: TinyML: Tools, Applications, Challenges, and Future Research Directions
title_zh: TinyML：工具、应用、挑战和未来研究方向
abstract: In recent years, Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine learning (ML) have gained significant interest from both, industry and academia. Notably, conventional ML techniques require enormous amounts of power to meet the desired accuracy, which has limited their use mainly to high-capability devices such as network nodes. However, with many advancements in technologies such as the Internet of Things (IoT) and edge computing, it is desirable to incorporate ML techniques into resource-constrained embedded devices for distributed and ubiquitous intelligence. This has motivated the emergence of the TinyML paradigm which is an embedded ML technique that enables ML applications on multiple cheap, resource- and power-constrained devices. However, during this transition towards appropriate implementation of the TinyML technology, multiple challenges such as processing capacity optimization, improved reliability, and maintenance of learning models' accuracy require timely solutions. In this article, various avenues available for TinyML implementation are reviewed. Firstly, a background of TinyML is provided, followed by detailed discussions on various tools supporting TinyML. Then, state-of-art applications of TinyML using advanced technologies are detailed. Lastly, various research challenges and future directions are identified.
summary: In recent years, Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine learning (ML) have gained significant interest from both, industry and academia. Notably, conventional ML techniques require enormous amounts of power to meet the desired accuracy, which has limited their use mainly to high-capability devices such as network nodes. However, with many advancements in technologies such as the Internet of Things (IoT) and edge computing, it is desirable to incorporate ML techniques into resource-constrained embedded devices for distributed and ubiquitous intelligence. This has motivated the emergence of the TinyML paradigm which is an embedded ML technique that enables ML applications on multiple cheap, resource- and power-constrained devices. However, during this transition towards appropriate implementation of the TinyML technology, multiple challenges such as processing capacity optimization, improved reliability, and maintenance of learning models' accuracy require timely solutions. In this article, various avenues available for TinyML implementation are reviewed. Firstly, a background of TinyML is provided, followed by detailed discussions on various tools supporting TinyML. Then, state-of-art applications of TinyML using advanced technologies are detailed. Lastly, various research challenges and future directions are identified.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能（AI）和机器学习（ML）引起了工业界和学术界的极大兴趣。值得注意的是，传统的机器学习技术需要大量的功率来满足所需的精度，这限制了它们主要用于网络节点等高性能设备。然而，随着物联网 (IoT) 和边缘计算等技术的进步，人们希望将机器学习技术融入到资源受限的嵌入式设备中，以实现分布式和无处不在的智能。这促使 TinyML 范式的出现，这是一种嵌入式 ML 技术，可以在多个廉价、资源和功耗受限的设备上实现 ML 应用程序。然而，在TinyML技术适当实施的过渡过程中，处理能力优化、可靠性提高和学习模型准确性维护等多重挑战需要及时解决。本文回顾了 TinyML 实施的各种可用途径。首先介绍了TinyML的背景，然后详细讨论了支持TinyML的各种工具。然后，详细介绍了使用先进技术的 TinyML 的最新应用。最后，确定了各种研究挑战和未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了TinyML的技术工具、应用场景、面临挑战及未来研究方向，旨在推动机器学习在资源受限设备上的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习技术因高功耗限制难以应用于物联网等边缘设备，而TinyML通过优化技术可实现分布式智能，需系统梳理其发展现状与挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分析TinyML的技术背景、支持工具、前沿应用案例，并总结当前技术瓶颈与研究空白。
AI.result: 明确了TinyML在工具链、应用场景及技术优化方面的进展，指出模型精度保持、计算能力优化和系统可靠性等核心挑战。
AI.conclusion: TinyML是实现边缘智能的关键方向，未来需在算法轻量化、跨平台部署及动态学习能力等方面持续突破。

Lastly, various research challenges and future directions are identified. 近年来，人工智能（AI）和机器学习（ML）引起了工业界和学术界的极大兴趣。值得注意的是，传统的机器学习技术需要大量的功率来满足所需的精度，这限制了它们主要用于网络节点等高性能设备。然而，随着物联网 (IoT) 和边缘计算等技术的进步，人们希望将机器学习技术融入到资源受限的嵌入式设备中，以实现分布式和无处不在的智能。这促使 TinyML 范式的出现，这是一种嵌入式 ML 技术，可以在多个廉价、资源和功耗受限的设备上实现 ML 应用程序。然而，在TinyML技术适当实施的过渡过程中，处理能力优化、可靠性提高和学习模型准确性维护等多重挑战需要及时解决。本文回顾了 TinyML 实施的各种可用途径。首先介绍了TinyML的背景，然后详细讨论了支持TinyML的各种工具。然后，详细介绍了使用先进技术的 TinyML 的最新应用。最后，确定了各种研究挑战和未来方向。 本文综述了TinyML的技术工具、应用场景、面临挑战及未来研究方向，旨在推动机器学习在资源受限设备上的应用。 Rakhee Kallimani,Krishna Pai,Prasoon Raghuwanshi,Sridhar Iyer,Onel L. A. López cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NI

authors_text: Atsushi Takizawa
title: Extracting real estate values of rental apartment floor plans using graph convolutional networks
title_zh: 使用图卷积网络提取出租公寓平面图的房地产价值
abstract: Access graphs that indicate adjacency relationships from the perspective of flow lines of rooms are extracted automatically from a large number of floor plan images of a family-oriented rental apartment complex in Osaka Prefecture, Japan, based on a recently proposed access graph extraction method with slight modifications. We define and implement a graph convolutional network (GCN) for access graphs and propose a model to estimate the real estate value of access graphs as the floor plan value. The model, which includes the floor plan value and hedonic method using other general explanatory variables, is used to estimate rents and their estimation accuracies are compared. In addition, the features of the floor plan that explain the rent are analyzed from the learned convolution network. Therefore, a new model for comprehensively estimating the value of real estate floor plans is proposed and validated. The results show that the proposed method significantly improves the accuracy of rent estimation compared to that of conventional models, and it is possible to understand the specific spatial configuration rules that influence the value of a floor plan by analyzing the learned GCN.
summary: Access graphs that indicate adjacency relationships from the perspective of flow lines of rooms are extracted automatically from a large number of floor plan images of a family-oriented rental apartment complex in Osaka Prefecture, Japan, based on a recently proposed access graph extraction method with slight modifications. We define and implement a graph convolutional network (GCN) for access graphs and propose a model to estimate the real estate value of access graphs as the floor plan value. The model, which includes the floor plan value and hedonic method using other general explanatory variables, is used to estimate rents and their estimation accuracies are compared. In addition, the features of the floor plan that explain the rent are analyzed from the learned convolution network. Therefore, a new model for comprehensively estimating the value of real estate floor plans is proposed and validated. The results show that the proposed method significantly improves the accuracy of rent estimation compared to that of conventional models, and it is possible to understand the specific spatial configuration rules that influence the value of a floor plan by analyzing the learned GCN.
abstract_zh: 基于最近提出的访问图提取方法并稍加修改，从日本大阪府面向家庭的出租公寓大楼的大量平面图图像中自动提取从房间流线角度指示邻接关系的访问图。我们定义并实现了用于访问图的图卷积网络（GCN），并提出了一个模型来估计访问图的房地产价值作为平面图价值。该模型包括平面图值和使用其他一般解释变量的特征法，用于估计租金并比较它们的估计精度。此外，还从学习的卷积网络中分析了解释租金的平面图特征。因此，提出并验证了一种综合估算房地产平面图价值的新模型。结果表明，与传统模型相比，该方法显着提高了租金估算的准确性，并且可以通过分析学习的 GCN 来了解影响平面图价值的具体空间配置规则。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的模型，通过分析家庭租赁公寓平面图的可达性图，综合估算房地产价值。
AI.motivation: 传统房地产估值方法难以捕捉平面图空间配置对租金的影响，需开发能结合空间结构特征的新型估值模型。
AI.method: 从大阪地区租赁公寓平面图中自动提取可达性图，改进现有提取方法后构建GCN模型，并结合享乐法与其他变量进行租金估算对比。
AI.result: 新模型显著提升租金预测精度，且通过分析训练后的GCN可明确空间配置影响价值的具体规则。
AI.conclusion: GCN模型有效整合了平面图空间特征与房地产估值，为租金预测提供了更精确且可解释的解决方案。

authors_text: Edward H. Lee,Brendan Kelly,Emre Altinmakas,Hakan Dogan,Maryam Mohammadzadeh,Errol Colak,Steve Fu,Olivia Choudhury,Ujjwal Ratan,Felipe Kitamura,Hernan Chaves,Jimmy Zheng,Mourad Said,Eduardo Reis,Jaekwang Lim,Patricia Yokoo,Courtney Mitchell,Golnaz Houshmand,Marzyeh Ghassemi,Ronan Killeen,Wendy Qiu,Joel Hayden,Farnaz Rafiee,Chad Klochko,Nicholas Bevins, et al. title: AI Models Close to your Chest: Robust Federated Learning Strategies for Multi-site CT
title_zh: 触手可及的 AI 模型：针对多站点 CT 的鲁棒联合学习策略
abstract: While it is well known that population differences from genetics, sex, race, and environmental factors contribute to disease, AI studies in medicine have largely focused on locoregional patient cohorts with less diverse data sources. Such limitation stems from barriers to large-scale data share and ethical concerns over data privacy. Federated learning (FL) is one potential pathway for AI development that enables learning across hospitals without data share. In this study, we show the results of various FL strategies on one of the largest and most diverse COVID-19 chest CT datasets: 21 participating hospitals across five continents that comprise >10,000 patients with >1 million images. We also propose an FL strategy that leverages synthetically generated data to overcome class and size imbalances. We also describe the sources of data heterogeneity in the context of FL, and show how even among the correctly labeled populations, disparities can arise due to these biases.
summary: While it is well known that population differences from genetics, sex, race, and environmental factors contribute to disease, AI studies in medicine have largely focused on locoregional patient cohorts with less diverse data sources. Such limitation stems from barriers to large-scale data share and ethical concerns over data privacy. Federated learning (FL) is one potential pathway for AI development that enables learning across hospitals without data share. In this study, we show the results of various FL strategies on one of the largest and most diverse COVID-19 chest CT datasets: 21 participating hospitals across five continents that comprise >10,000 patients with >1 million images. We also propose an FL strategy that leverages synthetically generated data to overcome class and size imbalances. We also describe the sources of data heterogeneity in the context of FL, and show how even among the correctly labeled populations, disparities can arise due to these biases.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，遗传、性别、种族和环境因素造成的人群差异会导致疾病，但医学领域的人工智能研究主要集中在数据来源较少的局部患者群体上。这种限制源于大规模数据共享的障碍和对数据隐私的道德担忧。联邦学习（FL）是人工智能开发的一种潜在途径，可以在不共享数据的情况下实现跨医院学习。在这项研究中，我们在最大、最多样化的 COVID-19 胸部 CT 数据集之一上展示了各种 FL 策略的结果：五大洲的 21 家参与医院，包括超过 10,000 名患者和超过 100 万张图像。我们还提出了一种 FL 策略，利用综合生成的数据来克服类别和规模不平衡。我们还描述了 FL 背景下数据异质性的来源，并展示了即使在正确标记的群体中，这些偏差也可能导致差异。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发鲁棒的联邦学习策略，以解决多站点胸部CT数据在疾病诊断中的数据异质性和类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 医学AI研究因数据共享障碍和隐私问题局限于局部患者群体，导致模型泛化能力不足。联邦学习（FL）可在不共享数据的前提下跨机构训练模型，但需应对数据异质性和类别不平衡等挑战。
AI.method: 基于来自五大洲21家医院的超过10,000名患者、100万张图像的COVID-19胸部CT数据集，对比多种FL策略，并提出利用合成数据增强的策略以缓解类别和样本量不平衡问题。
AI.result: 提出的合成数据增强策略有效提升了模型性能，揭示了数据异质性（如设备差异、标注偏差）即使在正确标注的群体中也会导致模型偏差。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习可兼顾数据多样性与隐私保护，但需针对性设计策略应对异质性与不平衡问题，合成数据是可行解决方案之一。

authors_text: Michelangelo Diligenti,Francesco Giannini,Stefano Fioravanti,Caterina Graziani,Moreno Falaschi,Giuseppe Marra
title: Enhancing Embedding Representations of Biomedical Data using Logic Knowledge
title_zh: 使用逻辑知识增强生物医学数据的嵌入表示
abstract: Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE) have become a quite popular class of models specifically devised to deal with ontologies and graph structure data, as they can implicitly encode statistical dependencies between entities and relations in a latent space. KGE techniques are particularly effective for the biomedical domain, where it is quite common to deal with large knowledge graphs underlying complex interactions between biological and chemical objects. Recently in the literature, the PharmKG dataset has been proposed as one of the most challenging knowledge graph biomedical benchmark, with hundreds of thousands of relational facts between genes, diseases and chemicals. Despite KGEs can scale to very large relational domains, they generally fail at representing more complex relational dependencies between facts, like logic rules, which may be fundamental in complex experimental settings. In this paper, we exploit logic rules to enhance the embedding representations of KGEs on the PharmKG dataset. To this end, we adopt Relational Reasoning Network (R2N), a recently proposed neural-symbolic approach showing promising results on knowledge graph completion tasks. An R2N uses the available logic rules to build a neural architecture that reasons over KGE latent representations. In the experiments, we show that our approach is able to significantly improve the current state-of-the-art on the PharmKG dataset. Finally, we provide an ablation study to experimentally compare the effect of alternative sets of rules according to different selection criteria and varying the number of considered rules.
summary: Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE) have become a quite popular class of models specifically devised to deal with ontologies and graph structure data, as they can implicitly encode statistical dependencies between entities and relations in a latent space. KGE techniques are particularly effective for the biomedical domain, where it is quite common to deal with large knowledge graphs underlying complex interactions between biological and chemical objects. Recently in the literature, the PharmKG dataset has been proposed as one of the most challenging knowledge graph biomedical benchmark, with hundreds of thousands of relational facts between genes, diseases and chemicals. Despite KGEs can scale to very large relational domains, they generally fail at representing more complex relational dependencies between facts, like logic rules, which may be fundamental in complex experimental settings. In this paper, we exploit logic rules to enhance the embedding representations of KGEs on the PharmKG dataset. To this end, we adopt Relational Reasoning Network (R2N), a recently proposed neural-symbolic approach showing promising results on knowledge graph completion tasks. An R2N uses the available logic rules to build a neural architecture that reasons over KGE latent representations. In the experiments, we show that our approach is able to significantly improve the current state-of-the-art on the PharmKG dataset. Finally, we provide an ablation study to experimentally compare the effect of alternative sets of rules according to different selection criteria and varying the number of considered rules.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入（KGE）已经成为一类非常流行的模型，专门设计用于处理本体和图结构数据，因为它们可以隐式编码潜在空间中实体和关系之间的统计依赖关系。 KGE 技术对于生物医学领域特别有效，在该领域，处理生物和化学对象之间复杂相互作用的大型知识图是很常见的。最近的文献中，PharmKG 数据集被认为是最具挑战性的知识图生物医学基准之一，其中包含基因、疾病和化学物质之间的数十万个相关事实。尽管 KGE 可以扩展到非常大的关系域，但它们通常无法表示事实之间更复杂的关系依赖关系，例如逻辑规则，这在复杂的实验设置中可能是基础。在本文中，我们利用逻辑规则来增强 PharmKG 数据集上 KGE 的嵌入表示。为此，我们采用关系推理网络（R2N），这是一种最近提出的神经符号方法，在知识图完成任务上显示出有希望的结果。 R2N 使用可用的逻辑规则构建神经架构，对 KGE 潜在表示进行推理。在实验中，我们表明我们的方法能够显着提高 PharmKG 数据集的当前最新水平。最后，我们提供了一项消融研究，根据不同的选择标准和不同的考虑规则数量，通过实验比较替代规则集的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用逻辑规则增强知识图谱嵌入（KGE）在生物医学数据中的表示，特别是在PharmKG数据集上的应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管KGE在生物医学领域表现良好，但难以捕捉复杂的逻辑关系依赖，而PharmKG等数据集的复杂性需要更精确的表示方法。
AI.method: 采用神经符号方法Relational Reasoning Network（R2N），结合逻辑规则构建神经网络架构，对KGE的潜在表示进行推理。
AI.result: 在PharmKG数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，并通过消融实验验证了不同规则集效果的差异。
AI.conclusion: 结合逻辑规则的R2N方法能有效提升KGE性能，规则选择策略对结果有显著影响。

search_text: Enhancing Embedding Representations of Biomedical Data using Logic Knowledge 使用逻辑知识增强生物医学数据的嵌入表示 Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE) have become a quite popular class of models specifically devised to deal with ontologies and graph structure data, as they can implicitly encode statistical dependencies between entities and relations in a latent space. KGE techniques are particularly effective for the biomedical domain, where it is quite common to deal with large knowledge graphs underlying complex interactions between biological and chemical objects. Recently in the literature, the PharmKG dataset has been proposed as one of the most challenging knowledge graph biomedical benchmark, with hundreds of thousands of relational facts between genes, diseases and chemicals. Despite KGEs can scale to very large relational domains, they generally fail at representing more complex relational dependencies between facts, like logic rules, which may be fundamental in complex experimental settings. In this paper, we exploit logic rules to enhance the embedding representations of KGEs on the PharmKG dataset. To this end, we adopt Relational Reasoning Network (R2N), a recently proposed neural-symbolic approach showing promising results on knowledge graph completion tasks. An R2N uses the available logic rules to build a neural architecture that reasons over KGE latent representations. In the experiments, we show that our approach is able to significantly improve the current state-of-the-art on the PharmKG dataset. Finally, we provide an ablation study to experimentally compare the effect of alternative sets of rules according to different selection criteria and varying the number of considered rules. 知识图嵌入（KGE）已经成为一类非常流行的模型，专门设计用于处理本体和图结构数据，因为它们可以隐式编码潜在空间中实体和关系之间的统计依赖关系。 KGE 技术对于生物医学领域特别有效，在该领域，处理生物和化学对象之间复杂相互作用的大型知识图是很常见的。最近的文献中，PharmKG 数据集被认为是最具挑战性的知识图生物医学基准之一，其中包含基因、疾病和化学物质之间的数十万个相关事实。尽管 KGE 可以扩展到非常大的关系域，但它们通常无法表示事实之间更复杂的关系依赖关系，例如逻辑规则，这在复杂的实验设置中可能是基础。在本文中，我们利用逻辑规则来增强 PharmKG 数据集上 KGE 的嵌入表示。为此，我们采用关系推理网络（R2N），这是一种最近提出的神经符号方法，在知识图完成任务上显示出有希望的结果。 R2N 使用可用的逻辑规则构建神经架构，对 KGE 潜在表示进行推理。在实验中，我们表明我们的方法能够显着提高 PharmKG 数据集的当前最新水平。最后，我们提供了一项消融研究，根据不同的选择标准和不同的考虑规则数量，通过实验比较替代规则集的效果。 本文提出利用逻辑规则增强知识图谱嵌入（KGE）在生物医学数据中的表示，特别是在PharmKG数据集上的应用。 Michelangelo Diligenti,Francesco Giannini,Stefano Fioravanti,Caterina Graziani,Moreno Falaschi,Giuseppe Marra cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Hadjer Benmeziane,Amine Ziad Ounnoughene,Imane Hamzaoui,Younes Bouhadjar
title: Skip Connections in Spiking Neural Networks: An Analysis of Their Effect on Network Training
title_zh: 尖峰神经网络中的跳跃连接：分析其对网络训练的影响
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have gained attention as a promising alternative to traditional artificial neural networks (ANNs) due to their potential for energy efficiency and their ability to model spiking behavior in biological systems. However, the training of SNNs is still a challenging problem, and new techniques are needed to improve their performance. In this paper, we study the impact of skip connections on SNNs and propose a hyperparameter optimization technique that adapts models from ANN to SNN. We demonstrate that optimizing the position, type, and number of skip connections can significantly improve the accuracy and efficiency of SNNs by enabling faster convergence and increasing information flow through the network. Our results show an average +8% accuracy increase on CIFAR-10-DVS and DVS128 Gesture datasets adaptation of multiple state-of-the-art models.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have gained attention as a promising alternative to traditional artificial neural networks (ANNs) due to their potential for energy efficiency and their ability to model spiking behavior in biological systems. However, the training of SNNs is still a challenging problem, and new techniques are needed to improve their performance. In this paper, we study the impact of skip connections on SNNs and propose a hyperparameter optimization technique that adapts models from ANN to SNN. We demonstrate that optimizing the position, type, and number of skip connections can significantly improve the accuracy and efficiency of SNNs by enabling faster convergence and increasing information flow through the network. Our results show an average +8% accuracy increase on CIFAR-10-DVS and DVS128 Gesture datasets adaptation of multiple state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 作为传统人工神经网络 (ANN) 的有前途的替代品而受到关注，因为它们具有能源效率的潜力以及对生物系统中尖峰行为进行建模的能力。然而，SNN 的训练仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，需要新的技术来提高其性能。在本文中，我们研究了跳跃连接对 SNN 的影响，并提出了一种将模型从 ANN 调整到 SNN 的超参数优化技术。我们证明，优化跳跃连接的位置、类型和数量可以通过实现更快的收敛和增加网络中的信息流来显着提高 SNN 的准确性和效率。我们的结果显示，采用多种最先进模型的 CIFAR-10-DVS 和 DVS128 手势数据集的准确率平均提高了 8%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究跳连在脉冲神经网络(SNN)中的影响，并提出一种超参数优化技术以提升SNN的训练效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管SNN在能效和生物特性建模方面具有潜力，但其训练仍面临挑战，需探索提升性能的新方法。
AI.method: 通过分析跳连的位置、类型和数量，提出超参数优化方法，将ANN模型适配至SNN并提升信息流效率。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10-DVS和DVS128 Gesture数据集上，多种先进模型的准确率平均提升8%。
AI.conclusion: 优化跳连参数可显著提升SNN的收敛速度与准确率，为SNN训练提供有效改进方向。

authors_text: Yunsong Zhou,Quan Liu,Hongzi Zhu,Yunzhe Li,Shan Chang,Minyi Guo
title: MoGDE: Boosting Mobile Monocular 3D Object Detection with Ground Depth Estimation
title_zh: MoGDE：通过地面深度估计增强移动单目 3D 物体检测
comment: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2303.13018
comments: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2303.13018
abstract: Monocular 3D object detection (Mono3D) in mobile settings (e.g., on a vehicle, a drone, or a robot) is an important yet challenging task. Due to the near-far disparity phenomenon of monocular vision and the ever-changing camera pose, it is hard to acquire high detection accuracy, especially for far objects. Inspired by the insight that the depth of an object can be well determined according to the depth of the ground where it stands, in this paper, we propose a novel Mono3D framework, called MoGDE, which constantly estimates the corresponding ground depth of an image and then utilizes the estimated ground depth information to guide Mono3D. To this end, we utilize a pose detection network to estimate the pose of the camera and then construct a feature map portraying pixel-level ground depth according to the 3D-to-2D perspective geometry. Moreover, to improve Mono3D with the estimated ground depth, we design an RGB-D feature fusion network based on the transformer structure, where the long-range self-attention mechanism is utilized to effectively identify ground-contacting points and pin the corresponding ground depth to the image feature map. We conduct extensive experiments on the real-world KITTI dataset. The results demonstrate that MoGDE can effectively improve the Mono3D accuracy and robustness for both near and far objects. MoGDE yields the best performance compared with the state-of-the-art methods by a large margin and is ranked number one on the KITTI 3D benchmark.
summary: Monocular 3D object detection (Mono3D) in mobile settings (e.g., on a vehicle, a drone, or a robot) is an important yet challenging task. Due to the near-far disparity phenomenon of monocular vision and the ever-changing camera pose, it is hard to acquire high detection accuracy, especially for far objects. Inspired by the insight that the depth of an object can be well determined according to the depth of the ground where it stands, in this paper, we propose a novel Mono3D framework, called MoGDE, which constantly estimates the corresponding ground depth of an image and then utilizes the estimated ground depth information to guide Mono3D. To this end, we utilize a pose detection network to estimate the pose of the camera and then construct a feature map portraying pixel-level ground depth according to the 3D-to-2D perspective geometry. Moreover, to improve Mono3D with the estimated ground depth, we design an RGB-D feature fusion network based on the transformer structure, where the long-range self-attention mechanism is utilized to effectively identify ground-contacting points and pin the corresponding ground depth to the image feature map. We conduct extensive experiments on the real-world KITTI dataset. The results demonstrate that MoGDE can effectively improve the Mono3D accuracy and robustness for both near and far objects. MoGDE yields the best performance compared with the state-of-the-art methods by a large margin and is ranked number one on the KITTI 3D benchmark.
abstract_zh: 移动环境（例如车辆、无人机或机器人）中的单目 3D 物体检测 (Mono3D) 是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。由于单目视觉的远近视差现象和不断变化的相机姿态，很难获得较高的检测精度，尤其是对于远处的物体。受到物体深度可以根据其所处地面深度来确定的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 Mono3D 框架，称为 MoGDE，它不断估计图像相应的地面深度，然后利用估计的地面深度信息来指导 Mono3D。为此，我们利用姿态检测网络来估计相机的姿态，然后根据 3D 到 2D 透视几何构造描绘像素级地面深度的特征图。此外，为了改进 Mono3D 估计的地面深度，我们设计了一个基于 Transformer 结构的 RGB-D 特征融合网络，其中利用远程自注意力机制来有效识别地面接触点，并将相应的地面深度固定到图像特征图上。我们对现实世界的 KITTI 数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，MoGDE 可以有效提高近处和远处物体的 Mono3D 精度和鲁棒性。与最先进的方法相比，MoGDE 的性能大幅提升，并且在 KITTI 3D 基准测试中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MoGDE的新框架，用于增强移动单目3D目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于单目视觉的远近差异现象和不断变化的相机姿态，移动环境下的单目3D目标检测难以实现高精度，尤其是对远距离目标。
AI.method: 本文利用相机姿态检测网络估计相机姿态，并根据3D到2D的透视几何构建像素级地面深度特征图。此外，设计了一种基于Transformer结构的RGB-D特征融合网络，利用长距离自注意力机制有效识别接触地面的点，并将对应的地面深度映射到图像特征图中。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上的实验结果表明，MoGDE显著提升了近远距离目标的单目3D检测精度和鲁棒性，性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MoGDE通过估计地面深度信息有效增强了单目3D目标检测性能，是目前KITTI 3D基准测试中表现最佳的方法。

method: 本文利用相机姿态检测网络估计相机姿态，并根据3D到2D的透视几何构建像素级地面深度特征图。此外，设计了一种基于Transformer结构的RGB-D特征融合网络，利用长距离自注意力机制有效识别接触地面的点，并将对应的地面深度映射到图像特征图中。

search_text: MoGDE: Boosting Mobile Monocular 3D Object Detection with Ground Depth Estimation MoGDE：通过地面深度估计增强移动单目 3D 物体检测 Monocular 3D object detection (Mono3D) in mobile settings (e.g., on a vehicle, a drone, or a robot) is an important yet challenging task. Due to the near-far disparity phenomenon of monocular vision and the ever-changing camera pose, it is hard to acquire high detection accuracy, especially for far objects. Inspired by the insight that the depth of an object can be well determined according to the depth of the ground where it stands, in this paper, we propose a novel Mono3D framework, called MoGDE, which constantly estimates the corresponding ground depth of an image and then utilizes the estimated ground depth information to guide Mono3D. To this end, we utilize a pose detection network to estimate the pose of the camera and then construct a feature map portraying pixel-level ground depth according to the 3D-to-2D perspective geometry. Moreover, to improve Mono3D with the estimated ground depth, we design an RGB-D feature fusion network based on the transformer structure, where the long-range self-attention mechanism is utilized to effectively identify ground-contacting points and pin the corresponding ground depth to the image feature map. We conduct extensive experiments on the real-world KITTI dataset. The results demonstrate that MoGDE can effectively improve the Mono3D accuracy and robustness for both near and far objects. MoGDE yields the best performance compared with the state-of-the-art methods by a large margin and is ranked number one on the KITTI 3D benchmark. 移动环境（例如车辆、无人机或机器人）中的单目 3D 物体检测 (Mono3D) 是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。由于单目视觉的远近视差现象和不断变化的相机姿态，很难获得较高的检测精度，尤其是对于远处的物体。受到物体深度可以根据其所处地面深度来确定的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 Mono3D 框架，称为 MoGDE，它不断估计图像相应的地面深度，然后利用估计的地面深度信息来指导 Mono3D。为此，我们利用姿态检测网络来估计相机的姿态，然后根据 3D 到 2D 透视几何构造描绘像素级地面深度的特征图。此外，为了改进 Mono3D 估计的地面深度，我们设计了一个基于 Transformer 结构的 RGB-D 特征融合网络，其中利用远程自注意力机制来有效识别地面接触点，并将相应的地面深度固定到图像特征图上。我们对现实世界的 KITTI 数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，MoGDE 可以有效提高近处和远处物体的 Mono3D 精度和鲁棒性。与最先进的方法相比，MoGDE 的性能大幅提升，并且在 KITTI 3D 基准测试中排名第一。 本文提出了一种名为MoGDE的新框架，用于增强移动单目3D目标检测的性能。 Yunsong Zhou,Quan Liu,Hongzi Zhu,Yunzhe Li,Shan Chang,Minyi Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Yue Hu,Yifan Lu,Runsheng Xu,Weidi Xie,Siheng Chen,Yanfeng Wang
title: Collaboration Helps Camera Overtake LiDAR in 3D Detection
title_zh: 协作帮助相机在 3D 检测领域超越 LiDAR
abstract: Camera-only 3D detection provides an economical solution with a simple configuration for localizing objects in 3D space compared to LiDAR-based detection systems. However, a major challenge lies in precise depth estimation due to the lack of direct 3D measurements in the input. Many previous methods attempt to improve depth estimation through network designs, e.g., deformable layers and larger receptive fields. This work proposes an orthogonal direction, improving the camera-only 3D detection by introducing multi-agent collaborations. Our proposed collaborative camera-only 3D detection (CoCa3D) enables agents to share complementary information with each other through communication. Meanwhile, we optimize communication efficiency by selecting the most informative cues. The shared messages from multiple viewpoints disambiguate the single-agent estimated depth and complement the occluded and long-range regions in the single-agent view. We evaluate CoCa3D in one real-world dataset and two new simulation datasets. Results show that CoCa3D improves previous SOTA performances by 44.21% on DAIR-V2X, 30.60% on OPV2V+, 12.59% on CoPerception-UAVs+ for AP@70. Our preliminary results show a potential that with sufficient collaboration, the camera might overtake LiDAR in some practical scenarios. We released the dataset and code at https://siheng-chen.github.io/dataset/CoPerception+ and https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/CoCa3D.
summary: Camera-only 3D detection provides an economical solution with a simple configuration for localizing objects in 3D space compared to LiDAR-based detection systems. However, a major challenge lies in precise depth estimation due to the lack of direct 3D measurements in the input. Many previous methods attempt to improve depth estimation through network designs, e.g., deformable layers and larger receptive fields. This work proposes an orthogonal direction, improving the camera-only 3D detection by introducing multi-agent collaborations. Our proposed collaborative camera-only 3D detection (CoCa3D) enables agents to share complementary information with each other through communication. Meanwhile, we optimize communication efficiency by selecting the most informative cues. The shared messages from multiple viewpoints disambiguate the single-agent estimated depth and complement the occluded and long-range regions in the single-agent view. We evaluate CoCa3D in one real-world dataset and two new simulation datasets. Results show that CoCa3D improves previous SOTA performances by 44.21% on DAIR-V2X, 30.60% on OPV2V+, 12.59% on CoPerception-UAVs+ for AP@70. Our preliminary results show a potential that with sufficient collaboration, the camera might overtake LiDAR in some practical scenarios. We released the dataset and code at https://siheng-chen.github.io/dataset/CoPerception+ and https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/CoCa3D.
abstract_zh: 与基于 LiDAR 的检测系统相比，仅使用摄像头的 3D 检测提供了一种经济的解决方案，其配置简单，可在 3D 空间中定位物体。然而，由于输入中缺乏直接 3D 测量，主要挑战在于精确的深度估计。许多先前的方法试图通过网络设计来改进深度估计，例如可变形层和更大的感受野。这项工作提出了一个正交方向，通过引入多智能体协作来改进仅相机的 3D 检测。我们提出的仅协作相机 3D 检测 (CoCa3D) 使代理能够通过通信彼此共享补充信息。同时，我们通过选择信息最丰富的线索来优化沟通效率。来自多个视角的共享消息消除了单智能体估计深度的歧义，并补充了单智能体视图中的遮挡区域和远程区域。我们在一个真实数据集和两个新的模拟数据集中评估 CoCa3D。结果表明，对于 AP@70，CoCa3D 在 DAIR-V2X 上将之前的 SOTA 性能提高了 44.21%，在 OPV2V+ 上提高了 30.60%，在 CoPerception-UAVs+ 上提高了 12.59%。我们的初步结果表明，通过充分的合作，该相机有可能在某些实际场景中超越激光雷达。我们在 https://siheng-chen.github.io/dataset/CoPerception+ 和 https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/CoCa3D 发布了数据集和代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体协作的纯相机3D检测方法CoCa3D，通过多视角信息共享提升深度估计精度。
AI.motivation: 纯相机3D检测虽成本低但存在深度估计困难，传统方法依赖网络设计改进效果有限，需探索新方向突破性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计多智能体协作框架，通过选择性通信机制共享互补信息，利用多视角消息消除单视角深度歧义并补全遮挡区域。
AI.result: 在DAIR-V2X等数据集上，CoCa3D相较SOTA方法AP@70指标提升12.59%-44.21%，验证了协作有效性。
AI.conclusion: 充分协作的纯相机系统在特定场景下可能超越LiDAR，为低成本高精度3D检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Xianchao Wu
title: Enhancing Unsupervised Speech Recognition with Diffusion GANs
title_zh: 使用扩散 GAN 增强无监督语音识别
abstract: We enhance the vanilla adversarial training method for unsupervised Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) by a diffusion-GAN. Our model (1) injects instance noises of various intensities to the generator's output and unlabeled reference text which are sampled from pretrained phoneme language models with a length constraint, (2) asks diffusion timestep-dependent discriminators to separate them, and (3) back-propagates the gradients to update the generator. Word/phoneme error rate comparisons with wav2vec-U under Librispeech (3.1% for test-clean and 5.6% for test-other), TIMIT and MLS datasets, show that our enhancement strategies work effectively.
summary: We enhance the vanilla adversarial training method for unsupervised Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) by a diffusion-GAN. Our model (1) injects instance noises of various intensities to the generator's output and unlabeled reference text which are sampled from pretrained phoneme language models with a length constraint, (2) asks diffusion timestep-dependent discriminators to separate them, and (3) back-propagates the gradients to update the generator. Word/phoneme error rate comparisons with wav2vec-U under Librispeech (3.1% for test-clean and 5.6% for test-other), TIMIT and MLS datasets, show that our enhancement strategies work effectively.
abstract_zh: 我们通过扩散 GAN 增强了无监督自动语音识别 (ASR) 的普通对抗训练方法。我们的模型 (1) 将各种强度的实例噪声注入到生成器的输出和未标记的参考文本中，这些参考文本是从具有长度约束的预训练音素语言模型中采样的，(2) 要求依赖于扩散时间步长的判别器将它们分开，(3) 反向传播梯度以更新生成器。在 Librispeech（test-clean 为 3.1%，test-other）、TIMIT 和 MLS 数据集下与 wav2vec-U 的单词/音素错误率比较，表明我们的增强策略有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用扩散生成对抗网络（Diffusion GANs）增强无监督语音识别（ASR）方法。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督ASR方法在对抗训练中存在局限性，难以有效处理噪声和未标注数据，需通过扩散模型提升生成质量与判别能力。
AI.method: 通过向生成器输出及预训练音素语言模型生成的参考文本注入不同强度的噪声，结合扩散时间步长依赖的判别器进行分离，并反向传播梯度优化生成器。
AI.result: 在Librispeech、TIMIT和MLS数据集上，词/音素错误率分别达到3.1%（test-clean）和5.6%（test-other），优于wav2vec-U基线。
AI.conclusion: 扩散GAN策略有效提升了无监督ASR性能，验证了其在噪声注入与对抗训练中的优势。

search_text: Enhancing Unsupervised Speech Recognition with Diffusion GANs 使用扩散 GAN 增强无监督语音识别 We enhance the vanilla adversarial training method for unsupervised Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) by a diffusion-GAN. Our model (1) injects instance noises of various intensities to the generator's output and unlabeled reference text which are sampled from pretrained phoneme language models with a length constraint, (2) asks diffusion timestep-dependent discriminators to separate them, and (3) back-propagates the gradients to update the generator. Word/phoneme error rate comparisons with wav2vec-U under Librispeech (3.1% for test-clean and 5.6% for test-other), TIMIT and MLS datasets, show that our enhancement strategies work effectively. 我们通过扩散 GAN 增强了无监督自动语音识别 (ASR) 的普通对抗训练方法。我们的模型 (1) 将各种强度的实例噪声注入到生成器的输出和未标记的参考文本中，这些参考文本是从具有长度约束的预训练音素语言模型中采样的，(2) 要求依赖于扩散时间步长的判别器将它们分开，(3) 反向传播梯度以更新生成器。在 Librispeech（test-clean 为 3.1%，test-other）、TIMIT 和 MLS 数据集下与 wav2vec-U 的单词/音素错误率比较，表明我们的增强策略有效。 本文提出利用扩散生成对抗网络（Diffusion GANs）增强无监督语音识别（ASR）方法。 Xianchao Wu cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yu Dong,Jie Liang,Longbing Cao,Daniel Catchpoole
title: ClinicLens: Visual Analytics for Exploring and Optimizing the Testing Capacity of Clinics given Uncertainty
title_zh: ClinicLens：在不确定情况下探索和优化诊所测试能力的可视化分析
abstract: Clinic testing plays a critical role in containing infectious diseases such as COVID-19. However, one of the key research questions in fighting such pandemics is how to optimize testing capacities across clinics. In particular, domain experts expect to know exactly how to adjust the features that may affect testing capacities, given that dynamics and uncertainty make this a highly challenging problem. Hence, as a tool to support both policymakers and clinicians, we collaborated with domain experts to build ClinicLens, an interactive visual analytics system for exploring and optimizing the testing capacities of clinics. ClinicLens houses a range of features based on an aggregated set of COVID-19 data. It comprises Back-end Engine and Front-end Visualization that take users through an iterative exploration chain of extracting, training, and predicting testing-sensitive features and visual representations. It also combines AI4VIS and visual analytics to demonstrate how a clinic might optimize its testing capacity given the impacts of a range of features. Three qualitative case studies along with feedback from subject-matter experts validate that ClinicLens is both a useful and effective tool for exploring the trends in COVID-19 and optimizing clinic testing capacities across regions. The entire approach has been open-sourced online: https://github.com/YuDong5018/clinic-lens.
summary: Clinic testing plays a critical role in containing infectious diseases such as COVID-19. However, one of the key research questions in fighting such pandemics is how to optimize testing capacities across clinics. In particular, domain experts expect to know exactly how to adjust the features that may affect testing capacities, given that dynamics and uncertainty make this a highly challenging problem. Hence, as a tool to support both policymakers and clinicians, we collaborated with domain experts to build ClinicLens, an interactive visual analytics system for exploring and optimizing the testing capacities of clinics. ClinicLens houses a range of features based on an aggregated set of COVID-19 data. It comprises Back-end Engine and Front-end Visualization that take users through an iterative exploration chain of extracting, training, and predicting testing-sensitive features and visual representations. It also combines AI4VIS and visual analytics to demonstrate how a clinic might optimize its testing capacity given the impacts of a range of features. Three qualitative case studies along with feedback from subject-matter experts validate that ClinicLens is both a useful and effective tool for exploring the trends in COVID-19 and optimizing clinic testing capacities across regions. The entire approach has been open-sourced online: https://github.com/YuDong5018/clinic-lens.
abstract_zh: 临床检测在遏制 COVID-19 等传染病方面发挥着关键作用。然而，抗击此类流行病的关键研究问题之一是如何优化诊所的检测能力。特别是，鉴于动态性和不确定性使得这是一个极具挑战性的问题，领域专家希望确切地知道如何调整可能影响测试能力的功能。因此，作为支持政策制定者和临床医生的工具，我们与领域专家合作构建了 ClinicLens，这是一个交互式可视化分析系统，用于探索和优化诊所的检测能力。 ClinicLens 拥有一系列基于 COVID-19 数据汇总的功能。它由后端引擎和前端可视化组成，引导用户完成提取、训练和预测测试敏感特征和视觉表示的迭代探索链。它还结合了 AI4VIS 和视觉分析，以展示诊所如何在考虑到一系列功能的影响的情况下优化其测试能力。三个定性案例研究以及主题专家的反馈证实，ClinicLens 是探索 COVID-19 趋势和优化跨地区临床检测能力的有用且有效的工具。整个方法已经在线开源：https://github.com/YuDong5018/clinic-lens。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClinicLens系统，通过可视化分析帮助优化诊所检测能力，应对疫情中的不确定性。
AI.motivation: 疫情中优化诊所检测能力面临动态变化和不确定性挑战，需工具辅助决策者和临床医生调整影响检测能力的因素。
AI.method: 开发ClinicLens系统，整合后端引擎与前端可视化，结合AI4VIS和数据分析技术，支持迭代探索检测敏感特征并预测优化方案。
AI.result: 通过三个案例研究及专家反馈验证，ClinicLens有效支持疫情趋势分析和区域检测能力优化，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ClinicLens为疫情应对提供了实用工具，证明了可视化分析与AI结合在医疗资源优化中的价值。

authors_text: Islam Nassar,Munawar Hayat,Ehsan Abbasnejad,Hamid Rezatofighi,Gholamreza Haffari
title: ProtoCon: Pseudo-label Refinement via Online Clustering and Prototypical Consistency for Efficient Semi-supervised Learning
title_zh: ProtoCon：通过在线聚类和原型一致性进行伪标签细化，实现高效的半监督学习
abstract: Confidence-based pseudo-labeling is among the dominant approaches in semi-supervised learning (SSL). It relies on including high-confidence predictions made on unlabeled data as additional targets to train the model. We propose ProtoCon, a novel SSL method aimed at the less-explored label-scarce SSL where such methods usually underperform. ProtoCon refines the pseudo-labels by leveraging their nearest neighbours' information. The neighbours are identified as the training proceeds using an online clustering approach operating in an embedding space trained via a prototypical loss to encourage well-formed clusters. The online nature of ProtoCon allows it to utilise the label history of the entire dataset in one training cycle to refine labels in the following cycle without the need to store image embeddings. Hence, it can seamlessly scale to larger datasets at a low cost. Finally, ProtoCon addresses the poor training signal in the initial phase of training (due to fewer confident predictions) by introducing an auxiliary self-supervised loss. It delivers significant gains and faster convergence over state-of-the-art across 5 datasets, including CIFARs, ImageNet and DomainNet.
summary: Confidence-based pseudo-labeling is among the dominant approaches in semi-supervised learning (SSL). It relies on including high-confidence predictions made on unlabeled data as additional targets to train the model. We propose ProtoCon, a novel SSL method aimed at the less-explored label-scarce SSL where such methods usually underperform. ProtoCon refines the pseudo-labels by leveraging their nearest neighbours' information. The neighbours are identified as the training proceeds using an online clustering approach operating in an embedding space trained via a prototypical loss to encourage well-formed clusters. The online nature of ProtoCon allows it to utilise the label history of the entire dataset in one training cycle to refine labels in the following cycle without the need to store image embeddings. Hence, it can seamlessly scale to larger datasets at a low cost. Finally, ProtoCon addresses the poor training signal in the initial phase of training (due to fewer confident predictions) by introducing an auxiliary self-supervised loss. It delivers significant gains and faster convergence over state-of-the-art across 5 datasets, including CIFARs, ImageNet and DomainNet.
abstract_zh: 基于置信度的伪标签是半监督学习（SSL）的主要方法之一。它依赖于将对未标记数据进行的高置信度预测作为训练模型的附加目标。我们提出了 ProtoCon，这是一种新颖的 SSL 方法，针对较少探索的标签稀缺 SSL，而此类方法通常表现不佳。 ProtoCon 通过利用最近邻居的信息来完善伪标签。随着训练的进行，使用在线聚类方法来识别邻居，该方法在嵌入空间中运行，通过原型损失进行训练，以鼓励形成良好的聚类。 ProtoCon 的在线性质使其能够在一个训练周期中利用整个数据集的标签历史记录来在下一周期中细化标签，而无需存储图像嵌入。因此，它可以以低成本无缝扩展到更大的数据集。最后，ProtoCon 通过引入辅助自监督损失来解决训练初始阶段的不良训练信号（由于置信度预测较少）。它在 5 个数据集（包括 CIFAR、ImageNet 和 DomainNet）上比最先进的数据集提供了显着的收益和更快的收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProtoCon方法，通过在线聚类和原型一致性优化伪标签，提升标签稀缺场景下的半监督学习效率。
AI.motivation: 传统基于置信度的伪标签方法在标签稀缺时表现不佳，需探索更有效的伪标签优化策略。
AI.method: 利用嵌入空间中的在线聚类识别近邻样本，结合原型损失形成聚类，通过历史标签信息迭代优化伪标签，并引入辅助自监督损失缓解训练初期信号不足问题。
AI.result: 在CIFAR、ImageNet等5个数据集上显著优于现有方法，收敛速度更快且可扩展至大规模数据集。
AI.conclusion: ProtoCon通过动态聚类与原型一致性机制有效提升半监督学习性能，为标签稀缺场景提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: H. Lu,C. Li,Y. Yang,C. Li,A. Islam
title: CH-Go: Online Go System Based on Chunk Data Storage
title_zh: CH-Go：基于块数据存储的在线围棋系统
comment: The 8th International Conference on Data Science and Systems
comments: The 8th International Conference on Data Science and Systems
abstract: The training and running of an online Go system require the support of effective data management systems to deal with vast data, such as the initial Go game records, the feature data set obtained by representation learning, the experience data set of self-play, the randomly sampled Monte Carlo tree, and so on. Previous work has rarely mentioned this problem, but the ability and efficiency of data management systems determine the accuracy and speed of the Go system. To tackle this issue, we propose an online Go game system based on the chunk data storage method (CH-Go), which processes the format of 160k Go game data released by Kiseido Go Server (KGS) and designs a Go encoder with 11 planes, a parallel processor and generator for better memory performance. Specifically, we store the data in chunks, take the chunk size of 1024 as a batch, and save the features and labels of each chunk as binary files. Then a small set of data is randomly sampled each time for the neural network training, which is accessed by batch through yield method. The training part of the prototype includes three modules: supervised learning module, reinforcement learning module, and an online module. Firstly, we apply Zobrist-guided hash coding to speed up the Go board construction. Then we train a supervised learning policy network to initialize the self-play for generation of experience data with 160k Go game data released by KGS. Finally, we conduct reinforcement learning based on REINFORCE algorithm. Experiments show that the training accuracy of CH- Go in the sampled 150 games is 99.14%, and the accuracy in the test set is as high as 98.82%. Under the condition of limited local computing power and time, we have achieved a better level of intelligence. Given the current situation that classical systems such as GOLAXY are not free and open, CH-Go has realized and maintained complete Internet openness.

To tackle this issue, we propose an online Go game system based on the chunk data storage method (CH-Go), which processes the format of 160k Go game data released by Kiseido Go Server (KGS) and designs a Go encoder with 11 planes, a parallel processor and generator for better memory performance. Specifically, we store the data in chunks, take the chunk size of 1024 as a batch, and save the features and labels of each chunk as binary files. Then a small set of data is randomly sampled each time for the neural network training, which is accessed by batch through yield method. The training part of the prototype includes three modules: supervised learning module, reinforcement learning module, and an online module. Firstly, we apply Zobrist-guided hash coding to speed up the Go board construction. Then we train a supervised learning policy network to initialize the self-play for generation of experience data with 160k Go game data released by KGS. Finally, we conduct reinforcement learning based on REINFORCE algorithm. Experiments show that the training accuracy of CH- Go in the sampled 150 games is 99.14%, and the accuracy in the test set is as high as 98.82%. Under the condition of limited local computing power and time, we have achieved a better level of intelligence. Given the current situation that classical systems such as GOLAXY are not free and open, CH-Go has realized and maintained complete Internet openness.
abstract_zh: 在线围棋系统的训练和运行需要有效的数据管理系统的支持来处理海量数据，例如初始围棋比赛记录、表示学习得到的特征数据集、自对弈的经验数据集、随机采样的蒙特卡罗树等。之前的工作很少提到这个问题，但是数据管理系统的能力和效率决定了Go系统的准确性和速度。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于块数据存储方法（CH-Go）的在线围棋游戏系统，该系统处理 Kiseido Go Server（KGS）发布的 160k 围棋游戏数据的格式，并设计一个具有 11 个平面的围棋编码器、一个并行处理器和生成器以实现更好的内存性能。具体来说，我们将数据分块存储，以1024的块大小作为一个批次，并将每个块的特征和标签保存为二进制文件。然后每次随机采样一小组数据进行神经网络训练，通过yield方法批量访问。原型的训练部分包括三个模块：监督学习模块、强化学习模块和在线模块。首先，我们应用 Zobrist 引导的哈希编码来加速围棋棋盘的构建。然后，我们使用 KGS 发布的 160k 围棋游戏数据训练一个监督学习策略网络来初始化自对弈以生成经验数据。最后，我们基于REINFORCE算法进行强化学习。实验表明，CH-Go在采样的150场比赛中的训练准确率为99.14%，在测试集中的准确率高达98.82%。在本地计算能力和时间有限的情况下，我们实现了更好的智能化水平。在GOLAXY等经典系统不自由开放的现状下，CH-Go实现并保持了完全的互联网开放。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于分块数据存储的在线围棋系统CH-Go，旨在解决围棋系统训练与运行中的大规模数据管理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分关注围棋系统所需的数据管理问题，而高效的数据管理直接影响系统精度与速度，亟需优化存储与训练方法。
AI.method: 采用分块存储（chunk size=1024）保存二进制特征与标签，结合监督学习、强化学习（REINFORCE算法）及在线模块，利用Zobrist哈希加速棋盘构建，并通过批量采样训练神经网络。
AI.result: 在150局采样训练中准确率达99.14%，测试集准确率98.82%，在有限计算资源下实现较高智能水平，且系统保持互联网开源开放。
AI.conclusion: CH-Go通过分块存储与模块化训练有效提升数据处理效率，验证了方法在围棋AI领域的可行性，为开源围棋系统提供新方案。

search_text: CH-Go: Online Go System Based on Chunk Data Storage CH-Go：基于块数据存储的在线围棋系统 The training and running of an online Go system require the support of effective data management systems to deal with vast data, such as the initial Go game records, the feature data set obtained by representation learning, the experience data set of self-play, the randomly sampled Monte Carlo tree, and so on. Previous work has rarely mentioned this problem, but the ability and efficiency of data management systems determine the accuracy and speed of the Go system. To tackle this issue, we propose an online Go game system based on the chunk data storage method (CH-Go), which processes the format of 160k Go game data released by Kiseido Go Server (KGS) and designs a Go encoder with 11 planes, a parallel processor and generator for better memory performance. Specifically, we store the data in chunks, take the chunk size of 1024 as a batch, and save the features and labels of each chunk as binary files. Then a small set of data is randomly sampled each time for the neural network training, which is accessed by batch through yield method. The training part of the prototype includes three modules: supervised learning module, reinforcement learning module, and an online module. Firstly, we apply Zobrist-guided hash coding to speed up the Go board construction. Then we train a supervised learning policy network to initialize the self-play for generation of experience data with 160k Go game data released by KGS. Finally, we conduct reinforcement learning based on REINFORCE algorithm. Experiments show that the training accuracy of CH- Go in the sampled 150 games is 99.14%, and the accuracy in the test set is as high as 98.82%. Under the condition of limited local computing power and time, we have achieved a better level of intelligence. Given the current situation that classical systems such as GOLAXY are not free and open, CH-Go has realized and maintained complete Internet openness. 在线围棋系统的训练和运行需要有效的数据管理系统的支持来处理海量数据，例如初始围棋比赛记录、表示学习得到的特征数据集、自对弈的经验数据集、随机采样的蒙特卡罗树等。之前的工作很少提到这个问题，但是数据管理系统的能力和效率决定了Go系统的准确性和速度。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于块数据存储方法（CH-Go）的在线围棋游戏系统，该系统处理 Kiseido Go Server（KGS）发布的 160k 围棋游戏数据的格式，并设计一个具有 11 个平面的围棋编码器、一个并行处理器和生成器以实现更好的内存性能。具体来说，我们将数据分块存储，以1024的块大小作为一个批次，并将每个块的特征和标签保存为二进制文件。然后每次随机采样一小组数据进行神经网络训练，通过yield方法批量访问。原型的训练部分包括三个模块：监督学习模块、强化学习模块和在线模块。首先，我们应用 Zobrist 引导的哈希编码来加速围棋棋盘的构建。然后，我们使用 KGS 发布的 160k 围棋游戏数据训练一个监督学习策略网络来初始化自对弈以生成经验数据。最后，我们基于REINFORCE算法进行强化学习。实验表明，CH-Go在采样的150场比赛中的训练准确率为99.14%，在测试集中的准确率高达98.82%。在本地计算能力和时间有限的情况下，我们实现了更好的智能化水平。在GOLAXY等经典系统不自由开放的现状下，CH-Go实现并保持了完全的互联网开放。 本文提出基于分块数据存储的在线围棋系统CH-Go，旨在解决围棋系统训练与运行中的大规模数据管理问题。 H. authors_text: Minal Suresh Patil,Kary Främling
title: Context, Utility and Influence of an Explanation
title_zh: 解释的背景、效用和影响
abstract: Contextual utility theory integrates context-sensitive factors into utility-based decision-making models. It stresses the importance of understanding individual decision-makers' preferences, values, and beliefs and the situational factors that affect them. Contextual utility theory benefits explainable AI. First, it can improve transparency and understanding of how AI systems affect decision-making. It can reveal AI model biases and limitations by considering personal preferences and context. Second, contextual utility theory can make AI systems more personalized and adaptable to users and stakeholders. AI systems can better meet user needs and values by incorporating demographic and cultural data. Finally, contextual utility theory promotes ethical AI development and social responsibility. AI developers can create ethical systems that benefit society by considering contextual factors like societal norms and values. This work, demonstrates how contextual utility theory can improve AI system transparency, personalization, and ethics, benefiting both users and developers.
summary: Contextual utility theory integrates context-sensitive factors into utility-based decision-making models. It stresses the importance of understanding individual decision-makers' preferences, values, and beliefs and the situational factors that affect them. Contextual utility theory benefits explainable AI. First, it can improve transparency and understanding of how AI systems affect decision-making. It can reveal AI model biases and limitations by considering personal preferences and context. Second, contextual utility theory can make AI systems more personalized and adaptable to users and stakeholders. AI systems can better meet user needs and values by incorporating demographic and cultural data. Finally, contextual utility theory promotes ethical AI development and social responsibility. AI developers can create ethical systems that benefit society by considering contextual factors like societal norms and values. This work, demonstrates how contextual utility theory can improve AI system transparency, personalization, and ethics, benefiting both users and developers.
abstract_zh: 情境效用理论将情境敏感因素整合到基于效用的决策模型中。它强调了解个人决策者的偏好、价值观和信仰以及影响它们的情境因素的重要性。情境效用理论有利于可解释的人工智能。首先，它可以提高人工智能系统如何影响决策的透明度和理解。它可以通过考虑个人偏好和背景来揭示人工智能模型的偏差和局限性。其次，情境效用理论可以使人工智能系统更加个性化并适应用户和利益相关者。人工智能系统可以通过整合人口和文化数据来更好地满足用户的需求和价值观。最后，情境效用理论促进了人工智能的道德发展和社会责任。人工智能开发人员可以通过考虑社会规范和价值观等背景因素来创建造福社会的道德体系。这项工作展示了情境效用理论如何提高人工智能系统的透明度、个性化和道德，使用户和开发者都受益。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了情境效用理论在可解释AI中的应用，旨在提升AI系统的透明度、个性化和伦理性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统缺乏对用户个人偏好、文化背景及社会规范的充分考虑，导致决策透明度不足与伦理风险。
AI.method: 通过整合情境敏感因素（如个人价值观、文化数据和社会规范）到效用决策模型，构建更符合人类认知的AI解释框架。
AI.result: 提升了AI决策透明度，揭示模型偏见，增强了系统个性化能力，并促进了符合社会伦理的AI开发实践。
AI.conclusion: 情境效用理论为可解释AI提供了理论支持，有助于实现更公平、透明且符合人类价值观的人工智能系统。

authors_text: Rob Eagle
title: Augmented reality as a Thirdspace: Simultaneous experience of the physical and virtual
title_zh: 增强现实作为第三空间：物理和虚拟的同时体验
comment: Preprint of chapter published in Proceedings of the 3rd International and Interdisciplinary Conference on Images and Imagination, edited by D. Villa and F. Zuccoli, 2023, Springer Nature, reproduced with permission of Springer Nature
comments: Preprint of chapter published in Proceedings of the 3rd International and Interdisciplinary Conference on Images and Imagination, edited by D. Villa and F. Zuccoli, 2023, Springer Nature, reproduced with permission of Springer Nature
abstract: With the proliferation of devices that display augmented reality (AR), now is the time for scholars and practitioners to evaluate and engage critically with emerging applications of the medium. AR mediates the way users see their bodies, hear their environment and engage with places. Applied in various forms, including social media, e-commerce, gaming, enterprise and art, the medium facilitates a hybrid experience of physical and digital spaces. This article employs a model of real-and-imagined space from geographer Edward Soja to examine how the user of an AR app navigates the two intertwined spaces of physical and digital, experiencing what Soja calls a 'Third-space'. The article illustrates the potential for headset-based AR to engender such a Thirdspace through the author's practice-led research project, the installation Through the Wardrobe. This installation demonstrates how AR has the potential to shift the way that users view and interact with their world with artistic applications providing an opportunity to question assumptions of social norms, identity and uses of physical space.
summary: With the proliferation of devices that display augmented reality (AR), now is the time for scholars and practitioners to evaluate and engage critically with emerging applications of the medium. AR mediates the way users see their bodies, hear their environment and engage with places. Applied in various forms, including social media, e-commerce, gaming, enterprise and art, the medium facilitates a hybrid experience of physical and digital spaces. This article employs a model of real-and-imagined space from geographer Edward Soja to examine how the user of an AR app navigates the two intertwined spaces of physical and digital, experiencing what Soja calls a 'Third-space'. The article illustrates the potential for headset-based AR to engender such a Thirdspace through the author's practice-led research project, the installation Through the Wardrobe. This installation demonstrates how AR has the potential to shift the way that users view and interact with their world with artistic applications providing an opportunity to question assumptions of social norms, identity and uses of physical space.
abstract_zh: 随着显示增强现实 (AR) 的设备的激增，现在是学者和从业者批判性地评估和参与新兴媒体应用的时候了。 AR 调节用户观察自己身体、聆听环境以及与场所互动的方式。该媒体以多种形式应用，包括社交媒体、电子商务、游戏、企业和艺术，促进了物理和数字空间的混合体验。本文采用地理学家 Edward Soja 的真实和想象空间模型来研究 AR 应用程序的用户如何导航物理和数字两个相互交织的空间，体验 Soja 所说的“第三空间”。这篇文章通过作者以实践为主导的研究项目《穿过衣柜》阐述了基于耳机的 AR 产生第三空间的潜力。该装置展示了 AR 如何有潜力改变用户看待世界和与世界互动的方式，艺术应用程序提供了质疑社会规范、身份和物理空间使用的假设的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析增强现实（AR）技术如何融合物理与虚拟空间，探讨其作为‘第三空间’的潜力。
AI.motivation: 随着AR设备的普及，学者和实践者需批判性评估其应用，理解AR如何改变用户对身体、环境及空间的感知与互动方式。
AI.method: 采用地理学家爱德华·索亚的‘真实与想象空间’理论模型，结合作者主导的实践研究项目《Through the Wardrobe》进行分析。
AI.result: 通过AR头显设备和艺术装置，验证了AR能够创造索亚提出的‘第三空间’，使用户重新审视社会规范、身份认同及物理空间的使用方式。
AI.conclusion: AR技术通过艺术应用可挑战传统社会规范与空间认知，为物理与数字空间的融合提供创新体验路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过分析增强现实（AR）技术如何融合物理与虚拟空间，探讨其作为‘第三空间’的潜力。

search_text: Augmented reality as a Thirdspace: Simultaneous experience of the physical and virtual 增强现实作为第三空间：物理和虚拟的同时体验 With the proliferation of devices that display augmented reality (AR), now is the time for scholars and practitioners to evaluate and engage critically with emerging applications of the medium. AR mediates the way users see their bodies, hear their environment and engage with places. Applied in various forms, including social media, e-commerce, gaming, enterprise and art, the medium facilitates a hybrid experience of physical and digital spaces. This article employs a model of real-and-imagined space from geographer Edward Soja to examine how the user of an AR app navigates the two intertwined spaces of physical and digital, experiencing what Soja calls a 'Third-space'. The article illustrates the potential for headset-based AR to engender such a Thirdspace through the author's practice-led research project, the installation Through the Wardrobe. This installation demonstrates how AR has the potential to shift the way that users view and interact with their world with artistic applications providing an opportunity to question assumptions of social norms, identity and uses of physical space. 随着显示增强现实 (AR) 的设备的激增，现在是学者和从业者批判性地评估和参与新兴媒体应用的时候了。 AR 调节用户观察自己身体、聆听环境以及与场所互动的方式。该媒体以多种形式应用，包括社交媒体、电子商务、游戏、企业和艺术，促进了物理和数字空间的混合体验。本文采用地理学家 Edward Soja 的真实和想象空间模型来研究 AR 应用程序的用户如何导航物理和数字两个相互交织的空间，体验 Soja 所说的“第三空间”。这篇文章通过作者以实践为主导的研究项目《穿过衣柜》阐述了基于耳机的 AR 产生第三空间的潜力。该装置展示了 AR 如何有潜力改变用户看待世界和与世界互动的方式，艺术应用程序提供了质疑社会规范、身份和物理空间使用的假设的机会。 本文通过分析增强现实（AR）技术如何融合物理与虚拟空间，探讨其作为‘第三空间’的潜力。 Rob Eagle cs.HC,cs.MM

authors_text: Levi Corallo,Aparna S. Varde
title: Optical Character Recognition and Transcription of Berber Signs from Images in a Low-Resource Language Amazigh
title_zh: 低资源语言 Amazigh 图像中柏柏尔符号的光学字符识别和转录
abstract: The Berber, or Amazigh language family is a low-resource North African vernacular language spoken by the indigenous Berber ethnic group. It has its own unique alphabet called Tifinagh used across Berber communities in Morocco, Algeria, and others. The Afroasiatic language Berber is spoken by 14 million people, yet lacks adequate representation in education, research, web applications etc. For instance, there is no option of translation to or from Amazigh / Berber on Google Translate, which hosts over 100 languages today. Consequently, we do not find specialized educational apps, L2 (2nd language learner) acquisition, automated language translation, and remote-access facilities enabled in Berber. Motivated by this background, we propose a supervised approach called DaToBS for Detection and Transcription of Berber Signs. The DaToBS approach entails the automatic recognition and transcription of Tifinagh characters from signs in photographs of natural environments. This is achieved by self-creating a corpus of 1862 pre-processed character images; curating the corpus with human-guided annotation; and feeding it into an OCR model via the deployment of CNN for deep learning based on computer vision models. We deploy computer vision modeling (rather than language models) because there are pictorial symbols in this alphabet, this deployment being a novel aspect of our work. The DaToBS experimentation and analyses yield over 92 percent accuracy in our research. To the best of our knowledge, ours is among the first few works in the automated transcription of Berber signs from roadside images with deep learning, yielding high accuracy. This can pave the way for developing pedagogical applications in the Berber language, thereby addressing an important goal of outreach to underrepresented communities via AI in education.

abstract_zh: 柏柏尔语系或阿马齐格语系是一种资源匮乏的北非方言，由土著柏柏尔族群使用。它有自己独特的字母表，称为蒂菲纳 (Tifinagh)，在摩洛哥、阿尔及利亚和其他国家的柏柏尔社区中使用。亚非语系柏柏尔语有 1400 万人使用，但在教育、研究、网络应用等方面缺乏足够的代表性。例如，目前支持 100 多种语言的谷歌翻译上没有阿马齐格语/柏柏尔语之间的翻译选项。因此，我们没有找到柏柏尔语中启用的专门教育应用程序、L2（第二语言学习者）习得、自动语言翻译和远程访问设施。受此背景的启发，我们提出了一种名为 DaToBS 的监督方法，用于柏柏尔标志的检测和转录。 DaToBS 方法需要从自然环境照片中的标志中自动识别和转录 Tifinagh 字符。这是通过自创建一个包含 1862 个预处理字符图像的语料库来实现的；通过人工指导注释来管理语料库；并通过部署 CNN 将其输入 OCR 模型，以进行基于计算机视觉模型的深度学习。我们部署计算机视觉建模（而不是语言模型），因为这个字母表中有图形符号，这种部署是我们工作的一个新颖方面。在我们的研究中，DaToBS 实验和分析的准确度超过 92%。据我们所知，我们的工作是通过深度学习从路边图像自动转录柏柏尔标志的首批几项工作之一，具有很高的准确性。这可以为开发柏柏尔语言的教学应用铺平道路，从而实现通过教育领域的人工智能向代表性不足的社区进行推广的重要目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的监督方法DaToBS，用于从自然环境图像中自动识别和转录柏柏尔语（Amazigh）的提非纳格（Tifinagh）字符。
AI.motivation: 柏柏尔语作为低资源语言，在教育、科技应用中缺乏支持，例如谷歌翻译未包含该语言，导致相关学习工具和翻译技术缺失。
AI.method: 通过构建包含1862个预处理字符图像的语料库，结合人工标注，并采用卷积神经网络（CNN）的计算机视觉模型进行OCR训练。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在柏柏尔字符识别任务中达到92%以上的准确率，是首个利用深度学习从路标图像中自动转录柏柏尔符号的研究之一。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为开发柏柏尔语教育应用提供了基础，有助于通过人工智能技术提升对低资源语言群体的教育支持。

authors_text: Vishesh Kalvakurthi,Aparna S. Varde,John Jenq
title: Hey Dona! Can you help me with student course registration?
title_zh: 嘿，多娜！你能帮我办理学生课程注册吗？
abstract: In this paper, we present a demo of an intelligent personal agent called Hey Dona (or just Dona) with virtual voice assistance in student course registration. It is a deployed project in the theme of AI for education. In this digital age with a myriad of smart devices, users often delegate tasks to agents. While pointing and clicking supersedes the erstwhile command-typing, modern devices allow users to speak commands for agents to execute tasks, enhancing speed and convenience. In line with this progress, Dona is an intelligent agent catering to student needs by automated, voice-operated course registration, spanning a multitude of accents, entailing task planning optimization, with some language translation as needed. Dona accepts voice input by microphone (Bluetooth, wired microphone), converts human voice to computer understandable language, performs query processing as per user commands, connects with the Web to search for answers, models task dependencies, imbibes quality control, and conveys output by speaking to users as well as displaying text, thus enabling human-AI interaction by speech cum text. It is meant to work seamlessly on desktops, smartphones etc. and in indoor as well as outdoor settings. To the best of our knowledge, Dona is among the first of its kind as an intelligent personal agent for voice assistance in student course registration. Due to its ubiquitous access for educational needs, Dona directly impacts AI for education. It makes a broader impact on smart city characteristics of smart living and smart people due to its contributions to providing benefits for new ways of living and assisting 21st century education, respectively.

abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们展示了一个名为 Hey Dona（或只是 Dona）的智能个人代理的演示，在学生课程注册中提供虚拟语音帮助。这是一个以人工智能教育为主题的部署项目。在这个拥有无数智能设备的数字时代，用户经常将任务委托给代理。虽然指向和点击取代了以前的命令输入，但现代设备允许用户说出命令，让代理执行任务，从而提高速度和便利性。根据这一进展，Dona 是一个智能代理，通过自动化、语音操作的课程注册来满足学生的需求，涵盖多种口音，需要优化任务规划，并根据需要进行一些语言翻译。 Dona 通过麦克风（蓝牙、有线麦克风）接受语音输入，将人声转换为计算机可理解的语言，根据用户命令执行查询处理，连接网络搜索答案，建模任务依赖关系，吸收质量控制，并通过与用户交谈和显示文本来传达输出，从而实现语音和文本的人机交互。它可以在台式机、智能手机等以及室内和室外环境中无缝工作。据我们所知，Dona 是同类中首批为学生课程注册提供语音帮助的智能个人代理之一。由于教育需求无处不在，Dona 直接影响人工智能在教育领域的应用。它对智能生活和智能人的智慧城市特征产生了更广泛的影响，因为它分别为新的生活方式和协助 21 世纪教育做出了贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Dona的智能个人代理，通过语音助手实现学生课程注册的自动化。
AI.motivation: 随着智能设备普及，用户希望通过语音指令提升任务执行效率，传统点击操作已无法满足便捷性需求，需开发智能语音代理辅助教育场景。
AI.method: 通过麦克风采集语音输入，结合语音识别与自然语言处理技术，实现任务规划、网络查询、多语言支持及跨设备交互，整合文本与语音输出。
AI.result: Dona成为首个支持多场景、多设备的智能课程注册代理，推动教育AI应用，并对智慧城市中的智能生活与教育模式产生影响。
AI.conclusion: Dona验证了语音驱动智能代理在教育领域的可行性，为AI教育和智慧城市发展提供了创新解决方案。

search_text: Hey Dona! Can you help me with student course registration? 嘿，多娜！你能帮我办理学生课程注册吗？ In this paper, we present a demo of an intelligent personal agent called Hey Dona (or just Dona) with virtual voice assistance in student course registration. It is a deployed project in the theme of AI for education. In this digital age with a myriad of smart devices, users often delegate tasks to agents. While pointing and clicking supersedes the erstwhile command-typing, modern devices allow users to speak commands for agents to execute tasks, enhancing speed and convenience. In line with this progress, Dona is an intelligent agent catering to student needs by automated, voice-operated course registration, spanning a multitude of accents, entailing task planning optimization, with some language translation as needed. Dona accepts voice input by microphone (Bluetooth, wired microphone), converts human voice to computer understandable language, performs query processing as per user commands, connects with the Web to search for answers, models task dependencies, imbibes quality control, and conveys output by speaking to users as well as displaying text, thus enabling human-AI interaction by speech cum text. It is meant to work seamlessly on desktops, smartphones etc. and in indoor as well as outdoor settings. To the best of our knowledge, Dona is among the first of its kind as an intelligent personal agent for voice assistance in student course registration. Due to its ubiquitous access for educational needs, Dona directly impacts AI for education. It makes a broader impact on smart city characteristics of smart living and smart people due to its contributions to providing benefits for new ways of living and assisting 21st century education, respectively. 在本文中，我们展示了一个名为 Hey Dona（或只是 Dona）的智能个人代理的演示，在学生课程注册中提供虚拟语音帮助。这是一个以人工智能教育为主题的部署项目。在这个拥有无数智能设备的数字时代，用户经常将任务委托给代理。虽然指向和点击取代了以前的命令输入，但现代设备允许用户说出命令，让代理执行任务，从而提高速度和便利性。根据这一进展，Dona 是一个智能代理，通过自动化、语音操作的课程注册来满足学生的需求，涵盖多种口音，需要优化任务规划，并根据需要进行一些语言翻译。 Dona 通过麦克风（蓝牙、有线麦克风）接受语音输入，将人声转换为计算机可理解的语言，根据用户命令执行查询处理，连接网络搜索答案，建模任务依赖关系，吸收质量控制，并通过与用户交谈和显示文本来传达输出，从而实现语音和文本的人机交互。它可以在台式机、智能手机等以及室内和室外环境中无缝工作。据我们所知，Dona 是同类中首批为学生课程注册提供语音帮助的智能个人代理之一。由于教育需求无处不在，Dona 直接影响人工智能在教育领域的应用。它对智能生活和智能人的智慧城市特征产生了更广泛的影响，因为它分别为新的生活方式和协助 21 世纪教育做出了贡献。 本文介绍了一个名为Dona的智能个人代理，通过语音助手实现学生课程注册的自动化。 Vishesh Kalvakurthi,Aparna S. Varde,John Jenq cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Aiwei Liu,Xuming Hu,Lijie Wen,Philip S. Yu
title: A comprehensive evaluation of ChatGPT's zero-shot Text-to-SQL capability
title_zh: ChatGPT 零样本 Text-to-SQL 能力综合评估
abstract: This paper presents the first comprehensive analysis of ChatGPT's Text-to-SQL ability. Given the recent emergence of large-scale conversational language model ChatGPT and its impressive capabilities in both conversational abilities and code generation, we sought to evaluate its Text-to-SQL performance. We conducted experiments on 12 benchmark datasets with different languages, settings, or scenarios, and the results demonstrate that ChatGPT has strong text-to-SQL abilities. Although there is still a gap from the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) model performance, considering that the experiment was conducted in a zero-shot scenario, ChatGPT's performance is still impressive. Notably, in the ADVETA (RPL) scenario, the zero-shot ChatGPT even outperforms the SOTA model that requires fine-tuning on the Spider dataset by 4.1\%, demonstrating its potential for use in practical applications. To support further research in related fields, we have made the data generated by ChatGPT publicly available at https://github.com/THU-BPM/chatgpt-sql.
summary: This paper presents the first comprehensive analysis of ChatGPT's Text-to-SQL ability. Given the recent emergence of large-scale conversational language model ChatGPT and its impressive capabilities in both conversational abilities and code generation, we sought to evaluate its Text-to-SQL performance. We conducted experiments on 12 benchmark datasets with different languages, settings, or scenarios, and the results demonstrate that ChatGPT has strong text-to-SQL abilities. Although there is still a gap from the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) model performance, considering that the experiment was conducted in a zero-shot scenario, ChatGPT's performance is still impressive. Notably, in the ADVETA (RPL) scenario, the zero-shot ChatGPT even outperforms the SOTA model that requires fine-tuning on the Spider dataset by 4.1\%, demonstrating its potential for use in practical applications. To support further research in related fields, we have made the data generated by ChatGPT publicly available at https://github.com/THU-BPM/chatgpt-sql.
abstract_zh: 本文首次对 ChatGPT 的 Text-to-SQL 能力进行全面分析。鉴于最近出现的大规模会话语言模型 ChatGPT 及其在会话能力和代码生成方面令人印象深刻的能力，我们试图评估其文本到 SQL 的性能。我们在不同语言、设置或场景的 12 个基准数据集上进行了实验，结果表明 ChatGPT 具有强大的文本转 SQL 能力。尽管与当前最先进（SOTA）模型性能仍有差距，但考虑到实验是在零样本场景下进行的，ChatGPT 的性能仍然令人印象深刻。值得注意的是，在 ADVETA (RPL) 场景中，零样本 ChatGPT 的性能甚至比需要在 Spider 数据集上进行微调的 SOTA 模型高出 4.1%，展示了其在实际应用中的潜力。为了支持相关领域的进一步研究，我们在 https://github.com/THU-BPM/chatgpt-sql 上公开了 ChatGPT 生成的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文全面评估了ChatGPT在零样本场景下的文本到SQL转换能力。
AI.motivation: 鉴于ChatGPT在对话和代码生成方面的突出表现，研究旨在填补其Text-to-SQL能力评估的空白，并探索其实际应用潜力。
AI.method: 在12个不同语言、设置或场景的基准数据集上进行零样本实验，对比分析ChatGPT与现有模型的性能差异。
AI.result: ChatGPT在零样本条件下表现优异，尤其在ADVETA（RPL）场景下超越需微调的SOTA模型4.1%。
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT的零样本Text-to-SQL能力具有实际应用价值，公开数据可促进相关领域研究。

authors_text: Kimi Wenzel,Geoff Kaufman
title: Challenges in Designing Racially Inclusive Language Technologies
title_zh: 设计种族包容性语言技术的挑战
comment: CUI@CHI: Inclusive Design of CUIs Across Modalities and Mobilities Workshop. In the Extended Abstracts of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: CUI@CHI: Inclusive Design of CUIs Across Modalities and Mobilities Workshop. In the Extended Abstracts of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: We take a critical lens toward the pursuit of racially inclusive language technologies and identify several areas necessitating future work. We discuss the potential harms of conversational technologies, outline three challenges that arise in inclusive design, and lastly, argue that conversational user interface designers and researchers should go beyond racially inclusive design toward anti-racist and race positive designs.
summary: We take a critical lens toward the pursuit of racially inclusive language technologies and identify several areas necessitating future work. We discuss the potential harms of conversational technologies, outline three challenges that arise in inclusive design, and lastly, argue that conversational user interface designers and researchers should go beyond racially inclusive design toward anti-racist and race positive designs.
abstract_zh: 我们以批判性的视角来追求种族包容性语言技术，并确定了未来需要开展工作的几个领域。我们讨论了对话技术的潜在危害，概述了包容性设计中出现的三个挑战，最后，认为对话用户界面设计师和研究人员应该超越种族包容性设计，转向反种族主义和种族积极设计。

AI.tldr: 本文批判性分析当前种族包容语言技术的不足，提出未来研究方向及设计改进方向。
AI.motivation: 现有语言技术可能存在种族偏见，需推动更公平的设计以减少对少数族裔的伤害。
AI.method: 通过文献批判分析与案例讨论，识别技术设计中的种族包容性问题及潜在危害。
AI.result: 提出包容性设计的三个核心挑战，并主张转向反种族主义与积极种族导向的设计框架。
AI.conclusion: 技术设计需超越表面包容，通过系统性反种族主义实践实现真正的公平性改进。

search_text: Challenges in Designing Racially Inclusive Language Technologies 设计种族包容性语言技术的挑战 We take a critical lens toward the pursuit of racially inclusive language technologies and identify several areas necessitating future work. We discuss the potential harms of conversational technologies, outline three challenges that arise in inclusive design, and lastly, argue that conversational user interface designers and researchers should go beyond racially inclusive design toward anti-racist and race positive designs. 我们以批判性的视角来追求种族包容性语言技术，并确定了未来需要开展工作的几个领域。我们讨论了对话技术的潜在危害，概述了包容性设计中出现的三个挑战，最后，认为对话用户界面设计师和研究人员应该超越种族包容性设计，转向反种族主义和种族积极设计。 本文批判性分析当前种族包容语言技术的不足，提出未来研究方向及设计改进方向。 Kimi Wenzel,Geoff Kaufman cs.HC

authors_text: Manas Mehta,Nugzar Chkhaidze,Yizhen Wang
title: Developing IncidentUI -- A Ride Comfort and Disengagement Evaluation Application for Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 开发 IncidentUI——自动驾驶汽车的乘坐舒适性和脱离评估应用程序
comment: Previously embargoed by Nvidia. Nvidia owns the rights
comments: Previously embargoed by Nvidia. Nvidia owns the rights
abstract: This report details the design, development, and implementation of IncidentUI, an Android tablet application designed to measure user-experienced ride comfort and record disengagement data for autonomous vehicles (AV) during test drives. The goal of our project was to develop an Android application to run on a peripheral tablet and communicate with the Drive Pegasus AGX, the AI Computing Platform for Nvidia's AV Level 2 Autonomy Solution Architecture [1], to detect AV disengagements and report ride comfort. We designed and developed an Android XML-based intuitive user interface for IncidentUI. The development of IncidentUI required a redesign of the system architecture by redeveloping the system communications protocol in Java and implementing the Protocol Buffers (Protobufs) in Java using the existing system Protobuf definitions. The final iteration of IncidentUI yielded the desired functionality while testing on an AV test drive. We also received positive feedback from Nvidia's AV Platform Team during our final IncidentUI demonstration.
summary: This report details the design, development, and implementation of IncidentUI, an Android tablet application designed to measure user-experienced ride comfort and record disengagement data for autonomous vehicles (AV) during test drives. The goal of our project was to develop an Android application to run on a peripheral tablet and communicate with the Drive Pegasus AGX, the AI Computing Platform for Nvidia's AV Level 2 Autonomy Solution Architecture [1], to detect AV disengagements and report ride comfort. We designed and developed an Android XML-based intuitive user interface for IncidentUI. The development of IncidentUI required a redesign of the system architecture by redeveloping the system communications protocol in Java and implementing the Protocol Buffers (Protobufs) in Java using the existing system Protobuf definitions. The final iteration of IncidentUI yielded the desired functionality while testing on an AV test drive. We also received positive feedback from Nvidia's AV Platform Team during our final IncidentUI demonstration.
abstract_zh: 本报告详细介绍了 IncidentUI 的设计、开发和实施，这是一款 Android 平板电脑应用程序，旨在测量用户体验的乘坐舒适度并记录自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 在试驾期间的脱离数据。我们项目的目标是开发一个 Android 应用程序，在外围平板电脑上运行，并与 Drive Pegasus AGX（Nvidia AV 2 级自主解决方案架构的 AI 计算平台）进行通信，以检测 AV 脱离并报告乘坐舒适度。我们为 IncidentUI 设计并开发了一个基于 Android XML 的直观用户界面。 IncidentUI 的开发需要重新设计系统架构，用 Java 重新开发系统通信协议，并使用现有系统 Protobuf 定义在 Java 中实现协议缓冲区 (Protobuf)。 IncidentUI 的最终迭代在 AV 试驾测试中产生了所需的功能。在最终的 IncidentUI 演示中，我们还收到了 Nvidia AV 平台团队的积极反馈。

AI.tldr: 开发用于评估自动驾驶车辆乘坐舒适度和脱离情况的Android应用IncidentUI。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶测试缺乏直观的用户舒适度评估工具和脱离数据记录系统，需开发专用应用以提升测试效率与数据准确性。
AI.method: 基于Android XML设计交互界面，重构Java通信协议并集成Protocol Buffers，与Nvidia Drive Pegasus AGX平台实现数据交互。
AI.result: 成功实现应用核心功能，通过测试驾驶验证有效性，获得Nvidia平台团队正面反馈。
AI.conclusion: IncidentUI验证了通过用户反馈与系统数据结合评估自动驾驶性能的可行性，为后续优化提供数据支持。
