authors_text: Cornelius Adejoro,Luise Arn,Larissa Schwartz,Tom Yeh
title: Empower Children in Nigeria to Design the Future of Artificial Intelligence (AI) through Writing
title_zh: 帮助尼日利亚儿童通过写作设计人工智能 (AI) 的未来
abstract: This paper presents a new approach to engaging children in Nigeria to share their views of AI. This approach is centered on an inclusive writing contest for children in a secondary school in Abuja to write about AI to compete for prizes and share their writings with others. A preliminary analysis of the first 11 articles we received exhibits diverse gender and ethnic representation that conveys cultural values and perspectives distinct from those of the children in the western countries. This finding suggests future work to conduct in-depth cross-cultural analysis of the articles and to replicate similar writing contests to engage children in other underrepresented countries.
summary: This paper presents a new approach to engaging children in Nigeria to share their views of AI. This approach is centered on an inclusive writing contest for children in a secondary school in Abuja to write about AI to compete for prizes and share their writings with others. A preliminary analysis of the first 11 articles we received exhibits diverse gender and ethnic representation that conveys cultural values and perspectives distinct from those of the children in the western countries. This finding suggests future work to conduct in-depth cross-cultural analysis of the articles and to replicate similar writing contests to engage children in other underrepresented countries.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种让尼日利亚儿童分享他们对人工智能的看法的新方法。这种方法的核心是为阿布贾一所中学的孩子们举办一场包容性写作比赛，撰写有关人工智能的文章，以争夺奖项并与他人分享他们的作品。对我们收到的前 11 篇文章的初步分析显示，它们呈现出多样化的性别和种族代表性，传达了与西方国家儿童不同的文化价值观和观点。这一发现建议未来对文章进行深入的跨文化分析，并复制类似的写作比赛，以吸引其他代表性不足国家的儿童。

AI.tldr: 通过写作比赛让尼日利亚儿童参与人工智能未来的设计讨论
AI.motivation: 促进全球AI发展中的多元文化视角，弥补现有研究中对非洲地区儿童观点的不足
AI.method: 在阿布贾中学举办AI主题写作竞赛，收集并分析前11篇参赛作品的性别与民族多样性特征
AI.result: 发现参赛作品呈现显著的性别和民族多样性，反映与西方国家截然不同的文化价值观
AI.conclusion: 建议开展跨文化对比研究，并在其他欠代表国家推广同类写作活动以获取更多元的儿童视角

authors_text: Alexander Kirillovich,Olga Nevzorova,Evgeny Lipachev
title: OntoMath${}^{\mathbf{PRO}}$ 2.0 Ontology: Updates of the Formal Model
title_zh: OntoMath${}^{\mathbf{PRO}}$ 2.0 本体：形式模型的更新
abstract: This paper is devoted to the problems of ontology-based mathematical knowledge management and representation. The main attention is paid to the development of a formal model for the representation of mathematical statements in the Open Linked Data cloud. The proposed model is intended for applications that extract mathematical facts from natural language mathematical texts and represent these facts as Linked Open Data. The model is used in development of a new version of the OntoMath${}^{\mathrm{PRO}}$ ontology of professional mathematics is described. OntoMath${}^{\mathrm{PRO}}$ underlies a semantic publishing platform, that takes as an input a collection of mathematical papers in LaTeX format and builds their ontology-based Linked Open Data representation. The semantic publishing platform, in turn, is a central component of OntoMath digital ecosystem, an ecosystem of ontologies, text analytics tools, and applications for mathematical knowledge management, including semantic search for mathematical formulas and a recommender system for mathematical papers. According to the new model, the ontology is organized into three layers: a foundational ontology layer, a domain ontology layer and a linguistic layer. The domain ontology layer contains language-independent math concepts. The linguistic layer provides linguistic grounding for these concepts, and the foundation ontology layer provides them with meta-ontological annotations. The concepts are organized in two main hierarchies: the hierarchy of objects and the hierarchy of reified relationships.
summary: This paper is devoted to the problems of ontology-based mathematical knowledge management and representation. The main attention is paid to the development of a formal model for the representation of mathematical statements in the Open Linked Data cloud. The proposed model is intended for applications that extract mathematical facts from natural language mathematical texts and represent these facts as Linked Open Data. The model is used in development of a new version of the OntoMath${}^{\mathrm{PRO}}$ ontology of professional mathematics is described. OntoMath${}^{\mathrm{PRO}}$ underlies a semantic publishing platform, that takes as an input a collection of mathematical papers in LaTeX format and builds their ontology-based Linked Open Data representation. The semantic publishing platform, in turn, is a central component of OntoMath digital ecosystem, an ecosystem of ontologies, text analytics tools, and applications for mathematical knowledge management, including semantic search for mathematical formulas and a recommender system for mathematical papers. According to the new model, the ontology is organized into three layers: a foundational ontology layer, a domain ontology layer and a linguistic layer. The domain ontology layer contains language-independent math concepts. The linguistic layer provides linguistic grounding for these concepts, and the foundation ontology layer provides them with meta-ontological annotations. The concepts are organized in two main hierarchies: the hierarchy of objects and the hierarchy of reified relationships.
abstract_zh: 本文致力于基于本体的数学知识管理和表示问题。主要关注的是开发用于在开放链接数据云中表示数学语句的形式模型。所提出的模型适用于从自然语言数学文本中提取数学事实并将这些事实表示为链接开放数据的应用程序。该模型用于开发新版本的 OntoMath${}^{\mathrm{PRO}}$ 专业数学本体描述。 OntoMath${}^{\mathrm{PRO}}$ 是一个语义发布平台的基础，该平台将 LaTeX 格式的数学论文集合作为输入，并构建基于本体的链接开放数据表示。反过来，语义发布平台是 OntoMath 数字生态系统的核心组成部分，OntoMath 是一个由本体、文本分析工具和数学知识管理应用程序组成的生态系统，包括数学公式的语义搜索和数学论文的推荐系统。根据新模型，本体分为三层：基础本体层、领域本体层和语言层。领域本体层包含与语言无关的数学概念。语言层为这些概念提供语言基础，基础本体层为它们提供元本体注释。这些概念按两个主要层次结构进行组织：对象层次结构和具体化关系层次结构。

AI.tldr: 本文主要介绍OntoMath${}^{\\mathbf{PRO}}$ 2.0本体的更新，重点在于开发用于开放链接数据云中数学语句形式化表示的模型，并应用于数学知识管理。
AI.motivation: 为了解决数学知识在自然语言文本中的提取与链接开放数据表示问题，需改进数学本体的结构化和语义化表示方法，以支持更高效的数学知识管理与应用。
AI.method: 提出三层本体模型：基础本体层、领域本体层和语言层，通过对象层次和关系层次组织数学概念，并结合元本体注释与语言 grounding 实现跨语言数学知识的统一表示。
AI.result: 构建了支持语义出版平台的OntoMath${}^{\\mathrm{PRO}}$ 2.0本体，形成包含本体、文本分析工具和应用的数学知识管理生态系统，实现数学公式语义搜索和论文推荐等功能。
AI.conclusion: 新模型通过分层结构和语义化设计，提升了数学知识的可表示性与可应用性，为开放科学环境下的数学知识管理提供了更系统的解决方案。

search_text: OntoMath${}^{\mathbf{PRO}}$ 2.0 Ontology: Updates of the Formal Model OntoMath${}^{\mathbf{PRO}}$ 2.0 本体：形式模型的更新 This paper is devoted to the problems of ontology-based mathematical knowledge management and representation. The main attention is paid to the development of a formal model for the representation of mathematical statements in the Open Linked Data cloud. The proposed model is intended for applications that extract mathematical facts from natural language mathematical texts and represent these facts as Linked Open Data. The model is used in development of a new version of the OntoMath${}^{\mathrm{PRO}}$ ontology of professional mathematics is described. OntoMath${}^{\mathrm{PRO}}$ underlies a semantic publishing platform, that takes as an input a collection of mathematical papers in LaTeX format and builds their ontology-based Linked Open Data representation. The semantic publishing platform, in turn, is a central component of OntoMath digital ecosystem, an ecosystem of ontologies, text analytics tools, and applications for mathematical knowledge management, including semantic search for mathematical formulas and a recommender system for mathematical papers. According to the new model, the ontology is organized into three layers: a foundational ontology layer, a domain ontology layer and a linguistic layer. The domain ontology layer contains language-independent math concepts. The linguistic layer provides linguistic grounding for these concepts, and the foundation ontology layer provides them with meta-ontological annotations. The concepts are organized in two main hierarchies: the hierarchy of objects and the hierarchy of reified relationships. 本文致力于基于本体的数学知识管理和表示问题。主要关注的是开发用于在开放链接数据云中表示数学语句的形式模型。所提出的模型适用于从自然语言数学文本中提取数学事实并将这些事实表示为链接开放数据的应用程序。该模型用于开发新版本的 OntoMath${}^{\mathrm{PRO}}$ 专业数学本体描述。 OntoMath${}^{\mathrm{PRO}}$ 是一个语义发布平台的基础，该平台将 LaTeX 格式的数学论文集合作为输入，并构建基于本体的链接开放数据表示。反过来，语义发布平台是 OntoMath 数字生态系统的核心组成部分，OntoMath 是一个由本体、文本分析工具和数学知识管理应用程序组成的生态系统，包括数学公式的语义搜索和数学论文的推荐系统。根据新模型，本体分为三层：基础本体层、领域本体层和语言层。领域本体层包含与语言无关的数学概念。语言层为这些概念提供语言基础，基础本体层为它们提供元本体注释。这些概念按两个主要层次结构进行组织：对象层次结构和具体化关系层次结构。 本文主要介绍OntoMath${}^{\\mathbf{PRO}}$ 2.0本体的更新，重点在于开发用于开放链接数据云中数学语句形式化表示的模型，并应用于数学知识管理。 Alexander Kirillovich,Olga Nevzorova,Evgeny Lipachev cs.AI,cs.DL,math.HO

authors_text: Mark Abdelshiheed,Guojing Zhou,Mehak Maniktala,Tiffany Barnes,Min Chi
title: Metacognition and Motivation: The Role of Time-Awareness in Preparation for Future Learning
title_zh: 元认知和动机：时间意识在未来学习准备中的作用
abstract: In this work, we investigate how two factors, metacognitive skills and motivation, would impact student learning across domains. More specifically, our primary goal is to identify the critical, yet robust, interaction patterns of these two factors that would contribute to students' performance in learning logic first and then their performance on a subsequent new domain, probability. We are concerned with two types of metacognitive skills: strategy-awareness and time-awareness, that is, which problem-solving strategy to use and when to use it. Our data were collected from 495 participants across three consecutive semesters, and our results show that the only students who consistently outperform their peers across both domains are those who are not only highly motivated but also strategy-aware and time-aware.
summary: In this work, we investigate how two factors, metacognitive skills and motivation, would impact student learning across domains. More specifically, our primary goal is to identify the critical, yet robust, interaction patterns of these two factors that would contribute to students' performance in learning logic first and then their performance on a subsequent new domain, probability. We are concerned with two types of metacognitive skills: strategy-awareness and time-awareness, that is, which problem-solving strategy to use and when to use it. Our data were collected from 495 participants across three consecutive semesters, and our results show that the only students who consistently outperform their peers across both domains are those who are not only highly motivated but also strategy-aware and time-aware.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了元认知技能和动机这两个因素如何影响学生跨领域的学习。更具体地说，我们的主要目标是确定这两个因素之间关键但稳健的相互作用模式，这些模式将有助于学生首先学习逻辑，然后在随后的新领域概率中表现。我们关心两种类型的元认知技能：策略意识和时间意识，即使用哪种解决问题的策略以及何时使用它。我们的数据是从连续三个学期的 495 名参与者那里收集的，我们的结果表明，只有那些不仅积极性高，而且具有战略意识和时间意识的学生，才能在这两个领域始终优于同龄人。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨元认知技能与动机如何影响学生在不同领域（逻辑与概率）的学习表现，重点关注策略意识和时间意识的作用。
AI.motivation: 旨在识别元认知技能（策略意识、时间意识）与动机的交互作用模式，以解释学生在跨领域学习中的持续优异表现。
AI.method: 通过三个学期对495名学生的数据收集，分析策略意识、时间意识与动机的交互效应及其对逻辑和概率学习成绩的影响。
AI.result: 仅同时具备高动机、策略意识和时间意识的学生在逻辑和概率两个领域均持续优于其他学生。
AI.conclusion: 元认知技能（策略与时间意识）与动机的协同作用是学生跨领域学习成功的关键因素。

authors_text: Jannis Walk,Niklas Kühl,Michael Saidani,Jürgen Schatte
title: Artificial Intelligence for Sustainability: Facilitating Sustainable Smart Product-Service Systems with Computer Vision
title_zh: 人工智能促进可持续发展：利用计算机视觉促进可持续智能产品服务系统
abstract: The usage and impact of deep learning for cleaner production and sustainability purposes remain little explored. This work shows how deep learning can be harnessed to increase sustainability in production and product usage. Specifically, we utilize deep learning-based computer vision to determine the wear states of products. The resulting insights serve as a basis for novel product-service systems with improved integration and result orientation. Moreover, these insights are expected to facilitate product usage improvements and R&D innovations. We demonstrate our approach on two products: machining tools and rotating X-ray anodes. From a technical standpoint, we show that it is possible to recognize the wear state of these products using deep-learning-based computer vision. In particular, we detect wear through microscopic images of the two products. We utilize a U-Net for semantic segmentation to detect wear based on pixel granularity. The resulting mean dice coefficients of 0.631 and 0.603 demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed approach. Consequently, experts can now make better decisions, for example, to improve the machining process parameters. To assess the impact of the proposed approach on environmental sustainability, we perform life cycle assessments that show gains for both products. The results indicate that the emissions of CO2 equivalents are reduced by 12% for machining tools and by 44% for rotating anodes. This work can serve as a guideline and inspire researchers and practitioners to utilize computer vision in similar scenarios to develop sustainable smart product-service systems and enable cleaner production.

In particular, we detect wear through microscopic images of the two products. We utilize a U-Net for semantic segmentation to detect wear based on pixel granularity. The resulting mean dice coefficients of 0.631 and 0.603 demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed approach. Consequently, experts can now make better decisions, for example, to improve the machining process parameters. To assess the impact of the proposed approach on environmental sustainability, we perform life cycle assessments that show gains for both products. The results indicate that the emissions of CO2 equivalents are reduced by 12% for machining tools and by 44% for rotating anodes. abstract_zh: 深度学习在清洁生产和可持续发展方面的使用和影响仍然鲜有探讨。这项工作展示了如何利用深度学习来提高生产和产品使用的可持续性。具体来说，我们利用基于深度学习的计算机视觉来确定产品的磨损状态。由此产生的见解可以作为改进集成和结果导向的新型产品服务系统的基础。此外，这些见解预计将促进产品使用改进和研发创新。我们在两种产品上展示了我们的方法：加工工具和旋转 X 射线阳极。从技术角度来看，我们证明可以使用基于深度学习的计算机视觉来识别这些产品的磨损状态。特别是，我们通过两种产品的显微图像来检测磨损情况。我们利用 U-Net 进行语义分割，以基于像素粒度检测磨损。由此产生的平均骰子系数 0.631 和 0.603 证明了所提出方法的可行性。因此，专家现在可以做出更好的决策，例如改进加工工艺参数。为了评估所提出的方法对环境可持续性的影响，我们进行了生命周期评估，显示了两种产品的收益。结果表明，加工工具的二氧化碳当量排放量减少了 12%，旋转阳极的二氧化碳当量排放量减少了 44%。这项工作可以作为指南，激励研究人员和从业者在类似场景中利用计算机视觉来开发可持续的智能产品服务系统并实现清洁生产。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何利用深度学习中的计算机视觉技术提升生产与产品使用的可持续性，通过检测产品磨损状态优化产品服务系统。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对深度学习在清洁生产与可持续性领域的应用探索不足，亟需通过技术创新实现环境效益与生产效率的平衡。
AI.method: 采用基于U-Net的语义分割模型，通过显微图像对加工工具和旋转X射线阳极的磨损状态进行像素级检测，并结合生命周期评估分析环境影响。
AI.result: 磨损检测Dice系数达0.631和0.603，验证方法可行性；生命周期评估显示加工工具碳排放减少12%，旋转阳极减少44%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可持续智能产品服务系统提供技术路径，可指导行业实践并推动清洁生产技术创新。

To assess the impact of the proposed approach on environmental sustainability, we perform life cycle assessments that show gains for both products. The results indicate that the emissions of CO2 equivalents are reduced by 12% for machining tools and by 44% for rotating anodes. This work can serve as a guideline and inspire researchers and practitioners to utilize computer vision in similar scenarios to develop sustainable smart product-service systems and enable cleaner production. 深度学习在清洁生产和可持续发展方面的使用和影响仍然鲜有探讨。这项工作展示了如何利用深度学习来提高生产和产品使用的可持续性。具体来说，我们利用基于深度学习的计算机视觉来确定产品的磨损状态。由此产生的见解可以作为改进集成和结果导向的新型产品服务系统的基础。此外，这些见解预计将促进产品使用改进和研发创新。我们在两种产品上展示了我们的方法：加工工具和旋转 X 射线阳极。从技术角度来看，我们证明可以使用基于深度学习的计算机视觉来识别这些产品的磨损状态。特别是，我们通过两种产品的显微图像来检测磨损情况。我们利用 U-Net 进行语义分割，以基于像素粒度检测磨损。由此产生的平均骰子系数 0.631 和 0.603 证明了所提出方法的可行性。因此，专家现在可以做出更好的决策，例如改进加工工艺参数。为了评估所提出的方法对环境可持续性的影响，我们进行了生命周期评估，显示了两种产品的收益。结果表明，加工工具的二氧化碳当量排放量减少了 12%，旋转阳极的二氧化碳当量排放量减少了 44%。这项工作可以作为指南，激励研究人员和从业者在类似场景中利用计算机视觉来开发可持续的智能产品服务系统并实现清洁生产。 本文探讨如何利用深度学习中的计算机视觉技术提升生产与产品使用的可持续性，通过检测产品磨损状态优化产品服务系统。 Jannis Walk,Niklas Kühl,Michael Saidani,Jürgen Schatte cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Chris Blakely,Andrew Vargo
title: Toxicity and Cultural Entrenchment in Peer-Production Communities: Toward a Handbook on Intelligent System Design
title_zh: 同行生产社区中的毒性和文化巩固：智能系统设计手册
comment: 3 pages, 1 figure, The CHI 23 Workshop on Combating Toxicity, Harassment, and Abuse in Online Social Spaces, April 23--28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
comments: 3 pages, 1 figure, The CHI 23 Workshop on Combating Toxicity, Harassment, and Abuse in Online Social Spaces, April 23--28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
abstract: Toxicity and abuse are common in online peer-production communities. The social structure of peer-production communities that aim to produce accurate and trustworthy information require some conflict and gate-keeping to spur content production and curation. However, conflict and gate-keeping often devolve into hierarchical power structures which punish newcomers and lock out marginalized groups through entrenched cultural norms. Community administrators often focus on content quality, rather than consideration for all user safety, to promote community growth and survival. Once toxic cultural norms dominate a peer-production community, it is very difficult for community administrators to stop these behaviors from undermining inclusive peer-production. We propose developing a "handbook of intelligent system design" that attempts to frame design protocols to better read user-community culture and accurately distinguish toxic negative interactions from beneficial conflict.
summary: Toxicity and abuse are common in online peer-production communities. The social structure of peer-production communities that aim to produce accurate and trustworthy information require some conflict and gate-keeping to spur content production and curation. However, conflict and gate-keeping often devolve into hierarchical power structures which punish newcomers and lock out marginalized groups through entrenched cultural norms. Community administrators often focus on content quality, rather than consideration for all user safety, to promote community growth and survival. Once toxic cultural norms dominate a peer-production community, it is very difficult for community administrators to stop these behaviors from undermining inclusive peer-production. We propose developing a "handbook of intelligent system design" that attempts to frame design protocols to better read user-community culture and accurately distinguish toxic negative interactions from beneficial conflict.
abstract_zh: 有毒和滥用行为在在线同行生产社区中很常见。旨在产生准确且值得信赖的信息的同行生产社区的社会结构需要一些冲突和把关来刺激内容生产和管理。然而，冲突和把关往往会演变成等级权力结构，通过根深蒂固的文化规范惩罚新来者并把边缘群体拒之门外。社区管理员往往关注内容质量，而不是考虑所有用户的安全，以促进社区的成长和生存。一旦有毒的文化规范主导了同伴生产社区，社区管理者就很难阻止这些行为破坏包容性的同伴生产。我们建议开发一本“智能系统设计手册”，试图构建设计协议，以更好地解读用户社区文化，并准确地区分有害的负面互动和有益的冲突。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一份智能系统设计手册，以应对同行生产社区中的毒性文化问题，区分有害互动与有益冲突。
AI.motivation: 同行生产社区常因毒性文化导致边缘群体被排斥，管理员过度关注内容质量而忽视用户安全，亟需系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 提出设计协议框架，通过分析用户-社区文化特征，精准识别毒性互动与建设性冲突的差异。
AI.result: 构建了智能系统设计手册的初步框架，为社区管理员提供文化识别与毒性干预的指导原则。
AI.conclusion: 通过设计手册可有效缓解毒性文化对社区包容性的破坏，促进更公平的同行生产环境。

authors_text: Alexander Mehta,Ritik Jalisatgi
title: Help the Blind See: Assistance for the Visually Impaired through Augmented Acoustic Simulation
title_zh: 帮助盲人看见：通过增强声学模拟为视障人士提供帮助
abstract: An estimated 253 million people have visual impairments. These visual impairments affect everyday lives, and limit their understanding of the outside world. This can pose a risk to health from falling or collisions. We propose a solution to this through quick and detailed communication of environmental spatial geometry through sound, providing the blind and visually impaired the ability to understand their spatial environment through sound technology. The model consists of fast object detection and 3D environmental mapping, which is communicated through a series of quick sound notes. These sound notes are at different frequencies, pitches, and arrangements in order to precisely communicate the depth and location of points within the environment. Sounds are communicated in the form of musical notes in order to be easily recognizable and distinguishable. A unique algorithm is used to segment objects, providing minimal accuracy loss and improvement from the normal O(n2 ) to O(n) (which is significant, as N in point clouds can often be in the range of 105 ). In testing, we achieved an R-value of 0.866 on detailed objects and an accuracy of 87.5% on an outdoor scene at night with large amounts of noise. We also provide a supplementary video demo of our system.
summary: An estimated 253 million people have visual impairments. These visual impairments affect everyday lives, and limit their understanding of the outside world. This can pose a risk to health from falling or collisions. We propose a solution to this through quick and detailed communication of environmental spatial geometry through sound, providing the blind and visually impaired the ability to understand their spatial environment through sound technology. The model consists of fast object detection and 3D environmental mapping, which is communicated through a series of quick sound notes. These sound notes are at different frequencies, pitches, and arrangements in order to precisely communicate the depth and location of points within the environment. Sounds are communicated in the form of musical notes in order to be easily recognizable and distinguishable. A unique algorithm is used to segment objects, providing minimal accuracy loss and improvement from the normal O(n2 ) to O(n) (which is significant, as N in point clouds can often be in the range of 105 ). In testing, we achieved an R-value of 0.866 on detailed objects and an accuracy of 87.5% on an outdoor scene at night with large amounts of noise. We also provide a supplementary video demo of our system.
abstract_zh: 据估计，有 2.53 亿人有视力障碍。这些视觉障碍影响日常生活，并限制他们对外部世界的理解。这可能会对跌倒或碰撞造成健康风险。我们提出了一个解决方案，通过声音快速、详细地传达环境空间几何形状，让盲人和视障人士能够通过声音技术了解他们的空间环境。该模型由快速对象检测和 3D 环境映射组成，通过一系列快速声音音符进行传达。这些声音音符具有不同的频率、音高和排列，以便精确地传达环境中点的深度和位置。声音以音符的形式传达，以便于识别和区分。使用独特的算法来分割对象，提供最小的精度损失和从正常 O(n2 ) 到 O(n) 的改进（这很重要，因为点云中的 N 通常可以在 105 的范围内）。在测试中，我们在细节物体上的 R 值为 0.866，在夜间有大量噪声的室外场景上的准确度为 87.5%。我们还提供系统的补充视频演示。

AI.tldr: 通过增强的声学模拟技术，为视障人士提供空间环境感知的辅助方案。
AI.motivation: 全球约2.53亿视障人士因无法感知空间环境而面临跌倒和碰撞风险，亟需通过声音技术传递空间信息以提升其安全性与独立性。
AI.method: 结合快速物体检测与3D环境建图，利用频率、音高和排列差异的声学信号编码空间深度与位置信息，并采用优化算法将点云处理复杂度从O(n²)降至O(n)。
AI.result: 在复杂场景下实现细节物体R值0.866，夜间户外噪声环境中场景识别准确率达87.5%，并提供系统演示视频。
AI.conclusion: 该声学空间感知系统有效提升视障人士环境理解能力，算法优化与声学编码设计为辅助技术提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yanheng Li,Long Bai,Yaxuan Mao,Xuening Peng,Zehao Zhang,Xin Tong,Ray LC
title: The Exploration and Evaluation of Generating Affective 360$^\circ$ Panoramic VR Environments Through Neural Style Transfer
title_zh: 通过神经风格迁移生成情感360$^\circ$全景VR环境的探索与评估
abstract: Affective virtual reality (VR) environments with varying visual style can impact users' valence and arousal responses. We applied Neural Style Transfer (NST) to generate 360$^\circ$ VR environments that elicited users' varied valence and arousal responses. From a user study with 30 participants, findings suggested that generative VR environments changed participants' arousal responses but not their valence levels. The generated visual features, e.g., textures and colors, also altered participants' affective perceptions. Our work contributes novel insights about how users respond to generative VR environments and provided a strategy for creating affective VR environments without altering content.
summary: Affective virtual reality (VR) environments with varying visual style can impact users' valence and arousal responses. We applied Neural Style Transfer (NST) to generate 360$^\circ$ VR environments that elicited users' varied valence and arousal responses. From a user study with 30 participants, findings suggested that generative VR environments changed participants' arousal responses but not their valence levels. The generated visual features, e.g., textures and colors, also altered participants' affective perceptions. Our work contributes novel insights about how users respond to generative VR environments and provided a strategy for creating affective VR environments without altering content.
abstract_zh: 具有不同视觉风格的情感虚拟现实 (VR) 环境会影响用户的效价和唤醒反应。我们应用神经风格迁移 (NST) 来生成 360$^\circ$ VR 环境，引发用户不同的效价和唤醒反应。一项针对 30 名参与者的用户研究表明，生成 VR 环境改变了参与者的唤醒反应，但没有改变他们的效价水平。生成的视觉特征，例如纹理和颜色，也改变了参与者的情感感知。我们的工作提供了关于用户如何响应生成 VR 环境的新颖见解，并提供了在不改变内容的情况下创建情感 VR 环境的策略。

AI.tldr: 通过神经风格迁移生成具有情感影响的360度全景VR环境，并评估其对用户情感反应的影响。
AI.motivation: 探索不同视觉风格的沉浸式VR环境如何影响用户的情感反应（愉悦度和唤醒度），并寻找无需改变内容即可生成情感化VR环境的方法。
AI.method: 应用神经风格迁移技术生成360度全景VR环境，通过30名参与者的用户研究，分析生成环境对用户情感反应的影响。
AI.result: 生成的VR环境显著改变了用户的唤醒度反应，但未影响愉悦度水平；纹理和颜色等视觉特征改变了用户的感知情感。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了用户对生成式VR环境的情感响应机制，为无需内容修改即可创建情感化VR环境提供了可行策略。

search_text: The Exploration and Evaluation of Generating Affective 360$^\circ$ Panoramic VR Environments Through Neural Style Transfer 通过神经风格迁移生成情感360$^\circ$全景VR环境的探索与评估 Affective virtual reality (VR) environments with varying visual style can impact users' valence and arousal responses. We applied Neural Style Transfer (NST) to generate 360$^\circ$ VR environments that elicited users' varied valence and arousal responses. From a user study with 30 participants, findings suggested that generative VR environments changed participants' arousal responses but not their valence levels. The generated visual features, e.g., textures and colors, also altered participants' affective perceptions. Our work contributes novel insights about how users respond to generative VR environments and provided a strategy for creating affective VR environments without altering content. 具有不同视觉风格的情感虚拟现实 (VR) 环境会影响用户的效价和唤醒反应。我们应用神经风格迁移 (NST) 来生成 360$^\circ$ VR 环境，引发用户不同的效价和唤醒反应。一项针对 30 名参与者的用户研究表明，生成 VR 环境改变了参与者的唤醒反应，但没有改变他们的效价水平。生成的视觉特征，例如纹理和颜色，也改变了参与者的情感感知。我们的工作提供了关于用户如何响应生成 VR 环境的新颖见解，并提供了在不改变内容的情况下创建情感 VR 环境的策略。 通过神经风格迁移生成具有情感影响的360度全景VR环境，并评估其对用户情感反应的影响。 Yanheng Li,Long Bai,Yaxuan Mao,Xuening Peng,Zehao Zhang,Xin Tong,Ray LC cs.HC

authors_text: Jonas Oppenlaender,Rhema Linder,Johanna Silvennoinen
title: Prompting AI Art: An Investigation into the Creative Skill of Prompt Engineering
title_zh: 提示AI艺术：提示工程的创造性技能调查
abstract: We are witnessing a novel era of creativity where anyone can create digital content via prompt-based learning (known as prompt engineering). This paper investigates prompt engineering as a novel creative skill for creating AI art with text-to-image generation. In three consecutive studies, we explore whether crowdsourced participants can 1) discern prompt quality, 2) write prompts, and 3) refine prompts. We find that participants could evaluate prompt quality and crafted descriptive prompts, but they lacked style-specific vocabulary necessary for effective prompting. This is in line with our hypothesis that prompt engineering is a new type of skill that is non-intuitive and must first be acquired (e.g., through means of practice and learning) before it can be used. Our studies deepen our understanding of prompt engineering and chart future research directions. We conclude by envisioning four potential futures for prompt engineering.
summary: We are witnessing a novel era of creativity where anyone can create digital content via prompt-based learning (known as prompt engineering). This paper investigates prompt engineering as a novel creative skill for creating AI art with text-to-image generation. In three consecutive studies, we explore whether crowdsourced participants can 1) discern prompt quality, 2) write prompts, and 3) refine prompts. We find that participants could evaluate prompt quality and crafted descriptive prompts, but they lacked style-specific vocabulary necessary for effective prompting. This is in line with our hypothesis that prompt engineering is a new type of skill that is non-intuitive and must first be acquired (e.g., through means of practice and learning) before it can be used. Our studies deepen our understanding of prompt engineering and chart future research directions. We conclude by envisioning four potential futures for prompt engineering.
abstract_zh: 我们正在见证一个创造力的新时代，任何人都可以通过基于提示的学习（称为提示工程）来创建数字内容。本文研究了即时工程作为一种新颖的创造性技能，用于通过文本到图像生成来创建人工智能艺术。在连续三项研究中，我们探讨了众包参与者是否能够 1）辨别提示质量，2）编写提示，以及 3）完善提示。我们发现参与者可以评估提示质量并精心设计描述性提示，但他们缺乏有效提示所需的特定风格的词汇。这符合我们的假设，即即时工程是一种非直观的新型技能，必须首先获得（例如通过实践和学习的方式）才能使用。我们的研究加深了我们对即时工程的理解并规划了未来的研究方向。最后，我们展望了快速工程的四种潜在未来。

AI.tldr: 研究提示工程作为AI艺术创作的新技能，通过三个实验探讨参与者对提示质量的评估、编写和优化能力。
AI.motivation: 探讨提示工程是否为一种需要学习的新技能，以及公众在AI艺术创作中的实际能力。
AI.method: 通过三个实验，评估参与者对提示质量的判断、提示编写能力及优化能力。
AI.result: 参与者能评估提示质量并编写描述性提示，但缺乏风格相关词汇，验证了提示工程作为需学习的新技能的假设。
AI.conclusion: 提示工程作为新技能需要学习和实践，并提出了四个未来研究方向。

authors_text: Aidan J. Hughes,Paul Gardner,Keith Worden
title: Towards risk-informed PBSHM: Populations as hierarchical systems
title_zh: 迈向风险知情的 PBSHM：作为分层系统的群体
comment: Submitted to IMAC-XLI conference (2023), Austin, Texas, USA
comments: Submitted to IMAC-XLI conference (2023), Austin, Texas, USA
abstract: The prospect of informed and optimal decision-making regarding the operation and maintenance (O&M) of structures provides impetus to the development of structural health monitoring (SHM) systems. A probabilistic risk-based framework for decision-making has already been proposed. However, in order to learn the statistical models necessary for decision-making, measured data from the structure of interest are required. Unfortunately, these data are seldom available across the range of environmental and operational conditions necessary to ensure good generalisation of the model. Recently, technologies have been developed that overcome this challenge, by extending SHM to populations of structures, such that valuable knowledge may be transferred between instances of structures that are sufficiently similar. This new approach is termed population-based structural heath monitoring (PBSHM). The current paper presents a formal representation of populations of structures, such that risk-based decision processes may be specified within them. The population-based representation is an extension to the hierarchical representation of a structure used within the probabilistic risk-based decision framework to define fault trees. The result is a series, consisting of systems of systems ranging from the individual component level up to an inventory of heterogeneous populations. The current paper considers an inventory of wind farms as a motivating example and highlights the inferences and decisions that can be made within the hierarchical representation.
summary: The prospect of informed and optimal decision-making regarding the operation and maintenance (O&M) of structures provides impetus to the development of structural health monitoring (SHM) systems. A probabilistic risk-based framework for decision-making has already been proposed. abstract_zh: 有关结构运行和维护 (O&M) 的明智且最佳决策的前景推动了结构健康监测 (SHM) 系统的发展。已经提出了基于概率风险的决策框架。然而，为了学习决策所需的统计模型，需要来自感兴趣结构的测量数据。不幸的是，这些数据很少在确保模型良好概括所需的环境和操作条件范围内可用。最近，已经开发出克服这一挑战的技术，通过将 SHM 扩展到结构群，使得有价值的知识可以在足够相似的结构实例之间转移。这种新方法被称为基于人群的结构健康监测（PBSHM）。本文提出了结构群体的正式表示，以便可以在其中指定基于风险的决策过程。基于群体的表示是对基于概率风险的决策框架内使用的结构的分层表示的扩展，用于定义故障树。结果是一个系列，由系统的系统组成，范围从单个组件级别到异质群体的清单。当前的论文将风电场清单视为一个激励示例，并强调了可以在分层表示中做出的推论和决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于风险的群体结构健康监测（PBSHM）框架，通过将结构群体表示为分层系统，实现风险驱动的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 传统结构健康监测（SHM）因环境和操作条件数据不足而难以推广，需通过群体结构间的知识迁移解决数据稀缺问题，以支持风险导向的运维决策。
AI.method: 扩展SHM至结构群体，建立分层系统表示，结合概率风险框架与故障树分析，构建从个体组件到异质群体库存的多层级系统。
AI.result: 开发了支持风险决策的分层群体表示方法，并以风电场库存为例，展示了该框架在群体层级上的推理与决策能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过群体知识迁移与分层系统建模，提升了结构运维决策的鲁棒性与泛化能力，为复杂工程系统风险管理提供了新思路。

The current paper considers an inventory of wind farms as a motivating example and highlights the inferences and decisions that can be made within the hierarchical representation. 有关结构运行和维护 (O&M) 的明智且最佳决策的前景推动了结构健康监测 (SHM) 系统的发展。已经提出了基于概率风险的决策框架。然而，为了学习决策所需的统计模型，需要来自感兴趣结构的测量数据。不幸的是，这些数据很少在确保模型良好概括所需的环境和操作条件范围内可用。最近，已经开发出克服这一挑战的技术，通过将 SHM 扩展到结构群，使得有价值的知识可以在足够相似的结构实例之间转移。这种新方法被称为基于人群的结构健康监测（PBSHM）。本文提出了结构群体的正式表示，以便可以在其中指定基于风险的决策过程。基于群体的表示是对基于概率风险的决策框架内使用的结构的分层表示的扩展，用于定义故障树。结果是一个系列，由系统的系统组成，范围从单个组件级别到异质群体的清单。当前的论文将风电场清单视为一个激励示例，并强调了可以在分层表示中做出的推论和决策。 本文提出了一种基于风险的群体结构健康监测（PBSHM）框架，通过将结构群体表示为分层系统，实现风险驱动的决策过程。 Aidan J. Hughes,Paul Gardner,Keith Worden cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.AP

authors_text: Ala-Eddine Yahiaoui,Sohaib Afifi,Hamid Afifi
title: Enhanced Iterated local search for the technician routing and scheduling problem
title_zh: 针对技术人员路线和调度问题的增强迭代本地搜索
comment: Submitted manuscript to Computers and Operations Research journal. 34 pages, 7 figures, 6 tables
comments: Submitted manuscript to Computers and Operations Research journal. 34 pages, 7 figures, 6 tables
abstract: Most public facilities in the European countries, including France, Germany, and the UK, were built during the reconstruction projects between 1950 and 1980. Owing to the deteriorating state of such vital infrastructure has become relatively expensive in the recent decades. A significant part of the maintenance operation costs is spent on the technical staff. Therefore, the optimal use of the available workforce is essential to optimize the operation costs. This includes planning technical interventions, workload balancing, productivity improvement, etc. In this paper, we focus on the routing of technicians and scheduling of their tasks. We address for this purpose a variant of the workforce scheduling problem called the technician routing and scheduling problem (TRSP). This problem has applications in different fields, such as transportation infrastructure (rail and road networks), telecommunications, and sewage facilities. To solve the TRSP, we propose an enhanced iterated local search (eILS) approach. The enhancement of the ILS firstly includes an intensification procedure that incorporates a set of local search operators and removal-repair heuristics crafted for the TRSP. Next, four different mechanisms are used in the perturbation phase. Finally, an elite set of solutions is used to extensively explore the neighborhood of local optima as well as to enhance diversification during search space exploration. To measure the performance of the proposed method, experiments were conducted based on benchmark instances from the literature, and the results obtained were compared with those of an existing method. Our method achieved very good results, since it reached the best overall gap, which is three times lower than that of the literature. Furthermore, eILS improved the best-known solution for $34$ instances among a total of $56$ while maintaining reasonable computational times.
summary: Most public facilities in the European countries, including France, Germany, and the UK, were built during the reconstruction projects between 1950 and 1980. Owing to the deteriorating state of such vital infrastructure has become relatively expensive in the recent decades. A significant part of the maintenance operation costs is spent on the technical staff. Therefore, the optimal use of the available workforce is essential to optimize the operation costs. This includes planning technical interventions, workload balancing, productivity improvement, etc. In this paper, we focus on the routing of technicians and scheduling of their tasks. We address for this purpose a variant of the workforce scheduling problem called the technician routing and scheduling problem (TRSP). This problem has applications in different fields, such as transportation infrastructure (rail and road networks), telecommunications, and sewage facilities. To solve the TRSP, we propose an enhanced iterated local search (eILS) approach. The enhancement of the ILS firstly includes an intensification procedure that incorporates a set of local search operators and removal-repair heuristics crafted for the TRSP. Next, four different mechanisms are used in the perturbation phase. Finally, an elite set of solutions is used to extensively explore the neighborhood of local optima as well as to enhance diversification during search space exploration. To measure the performance of the proposed method, experiments were conducted based on benchmark instances from the literature, and the results obtained were compared with those of an existing method. Our method achieved very good results, since it reached the best overall gap, which is three times lower than that of the literature. Furthermore, eILS improved the best-known solution for $34$ instances among a total of $56$ while maintaining reasonable computational times.
abstract_zh: 包括法国、德国和英国在内的欧洲国家的大多数公共设施都是在1950年至1980年间的重建项目中建造的。由于这些重要基础设施的状况不断恶化，近几十年来其成本变得相对昂贵。维护运营成本的很大一部分花费在技术人员身上。因此，优化利用现有劳动力对于优化运营成本至关重要。这包括规划技术干预、工作负载平衡、生产力提高等。在本文中，我们重点关注技术人员的路线安排和任务安排。为此，我们解决了劳动力调度问题的一个变体，称为技术人员路由和调度问题（TRSP）。该问题在不同领域都有应用，例如交通基础设施（铁路和公路网络）、电信和污水处理设施。为了解决 TRSP，我们提出了一种增强迭代局部搜索（eILS）方法。 ILS 的增强首先包括一个强化程序，其中包含一组本地搜索算子和为 TRSP 设计的移除修复启发式方法。接下来，在扰动阶段使用四种不同的机制。最后，使用一组精英解决方案来广泛探索局部最优的邻域，并增强搜索空间探索过程中的多样化。为了衡量所提出方法的性能，基于文献中的基准实例进行了实验，并将获得的结果与现有方法的结果进行了比较。我们的方法取得了非常好的结果，因为它达到了最佳的整体差距，比文献的差距低了三倍。此外，eILS 针对总计 56 美元中的 34 美元实例改进了最著名的解决方案，同时保持了合理的计算时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的迭代局部搜索算法（eILS），用于解决技术人员路线规划与调度问题（TRSP），以优化基础设施维护中的劳动力使用效率。
AI.motivation: 欧洲国家大量基础设施因年代久远而老化，维护成本高昂，其中技术人员的调度与路线规划对成本控制至关重要，亟需高效算法优化。
AI.method: 设计改进的迭代局部搜索（eILS），包含强化的局部搜索算子、移除-修复启发式方法、四种扰动机制及精英解集用于邻域探索与多样化搜索。
AI.result: 实验表明，eILS在56个基准实例中改进了34个最优解，整体间隙优于文献方法三倍，且计算时间合理。
AI.conclusion: eILS在解决TRSP问题上表现优异，兼顾解的质量与计算效率，为基础设施维护调度提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Antonina K. Begicheva,Irina A. Lomazova,Roman A. Nesterov
title: Discovering Hierarchical Process Models: an Approach Based on Events Clustering
title_zh: 发现层次过程模型：一种基于事件聚类的方法
abstract: Process mining is a field of computer science that deals with discovery and analysis of process models based on automatically generated event logs. Currently, many companies use this technology for optimization and improving their processes. However, a discovered process model may be too detailed, sophisticated and difficult for experts to understand. In this paper, we consider the problem of discovering a hierarchical business process model from a low-level event log, i.e., the problem of automatic synthesis of more readable and understandable process models based on information stored in event logs of information systems. Discovery of better structured and more readable process models is intensively studied in the frame of process mining research from different perspectives. In this paper, we present an algorithm for discovering hierarchical process models represented as two-level workflow nets. The algorithm is based on predefined event ilustering so that the cluster defines a sub-process corresponding to a high-level transition at the top level of the net. Unlike existing solutions, our algorithm does not impose restrictions on the process control flow and allows for concurrency and iteration.
summary: Process mining is a field of computer science that deals with discovery and analysis of process models based on automatically generated event logs. Currently, many companies use this technology for optimization and improving their processes. However, a discovered process model may be too detailed, sophisticated and difficult for experts to understand. In this paper, we consider the problem of discovering a hierarchical business process model from a low-level event log, i.e., the problem of automatic synthesis of more readable and understandable process models based on information stored in event logs of information systems. Discovery of better structured and more readable process models is intensively studied in the frame of process mining research from different perspectives. In this paper, we present an algorithm for discovering hierarchical process models represented as two-level workflow nets. The algorithm is based on predefined event ilustering so that the cluster defines a sub-process corresponding to a high-level transition at the top level of the net. Unlike existing solutions, our algorithm does not impose restrictions on the process control flow and allows for concurrency and iteration.
abstract_zh: 流程挖掘是计算机科学的一个领域，涉及基于自动生成的事件日志的流程模型的发现和分析。目前，许多公司使用该技术来优化和改进其流程。然而，发现的过程模型可能过于详细、复杂并且难以让专家理解。在本文中，我们考虑从低级事件日志中发现分层业务流程模型的问题，即根据信息系统事件日志中存储的信息自动合成更具可读性和可理解性的流程模型的问题。在流程挖掘研究的框架下，从不同的角度深入研究了更好的结构化和更具可读性的流程模型的发现。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于发现表示为两级工作流网络的分层过程模型的算法。该算法基于预定义的事件说明，以便集群定义与网络顶层的高层转换相对应的子流程。与现有解决方案不同，我们的算法不对过程控制流施加限制，并允许并发和迭代。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件聚类的算法，用于从低级事件日志中自动合成层次化业务流程模型。
AI.motivation: 现有流程挖掘方法生成的模型过于复杂且难以理解，需要更结构化和可读的层次化模型以辅助专家分析。
AI.method: 通过预定义事件聚类将子流程映射为高层转换，构建两层工作流网模型，允许并发和迭代且不施加控制流限制。
AI.result: 开发出能够生成更易读层次化流程模型的算法，并验证其在处理并发和迭代场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动合成结构清晰的层次化流程模型提供了新思路，相比现有方案更具灵活性和实用性。

authors_text: Jonas Oppenlaender,Aku Visuri,Ville Paananen,Rhema Linder,Johanna Silvennoinen
title: Text-to-Image Generation: Perceptions and Realities
title_zh: 文本到图像的生成：感知和现实
comment: Accepted at Generative AI in HCI workshop, CHI '23
comments: Accepted at Generative AI in HCI workshop, CHI '23
abstract: Generative AI is an emerging technology that will have a profound impact on society and individuals. Only a decade ago, it was thought that creative work would be among the last to be automated - yet today, we see AI encroaching on creative domains. In this paper, we present the key findings of a survey study on people's perceptions of text-to-image generation. We touch on participants' technical understanding of the emerging technology, their ideas for potential application areas, as well as concerns, risks, and dangers of text-to-image generation to society and the individual. The study found that participants were aware of the risks and dangers associated with the technology, but only few participants considered the technology to be a risk to themselves. Additionally, those who had tried the technology rated its future importance lower than those who had not.

We touch on participants' technical understanding of the emerging technology, their ideas for potential application areas, as well as concerns, risks, and dangers of text-to-image generation to society and the individual. The study found that participants were aware of the risks and dangers associated with the technology, but only few participants considered the technology to be a risk to themselves. Additionally, those who had tried the technology rated its future importance lower than those who had not.
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能是一项新兴技术，将对社会和个人产生深远的影响。仅在十年前，人们还认为创意工作将是最后实现自动化的工作之一，但今天，我们看到人工智能正在蚕食创意领域。在本文中，我们介绍了一项关于人们对文本到图像生成的看法的调查研究的主要结果。我们探讨了参与者对新兴技术的技术理解、他们对潜在应用领域的想法，以及文本到图像生成对社会和个人的担忧、风险和危险。研究发现，参与者意识到与该技术相关的风险和危险，但只有少数参与者认为该技术对自己构成风险。此外，那些尝试过该技术的人对其未来重要性的评价低于那些没有尝试过的人。

AI.tldr: 调查文本到图像生成技术的公众认知、潜在应用及风险。
AI.motivation: 探讨该技术对社会和个人的影响，以及公众对其风险和应用的认知差异。
AI.method: 通过问卷调查收集参与者的技术理解、应用想法及风险认知数据。
AI.result: 参与者普遍认识到技术风险，但多数认为风险不涉及自身；使用过该技术的人对其未来重要性评价较低。
AI.conclusion: 公众对技术风险有认知但存在认知与实际使用间的脱节，需在推动创新的同时关注潜在风险。

authors_text: Yuyang Wang,Ruichen Li,Jean-Rémy Chardonnet,Pan Hui
title: Dataset for predicting cybersickness from a virtual navigation task
title_zh: 用于通过虚拟导航任务预测晕动症的数据集
abstract: This work presents a dataset collected to predict cybersickness in virtual reality environments. The data was collected from navigation tasks in a virtual environment designed to induce cybersickness. The dataset consists of many data points collected from diverse participants, including physiological responses (EDA and Heart Rate) and self-reported cybersickness symptoms. The paper will provide a detailed description of the dataset, including the arranged navigation task, the data collection procedures, and the data format. The dataset will serve as a valuable resource for researchers to develop and evaluate predictive models for cybersickness and will facilitate more research in cybersickness mitigation.
summary: This work presents a dataset collected to predict cybersickness in virtual reality environments. The data was collected from navigation tasks in a virtual environment designed to induce cybersickness. The dataset consists of many data points collected from diverse participants, including physiological responses (EDA and Heart Rate) and self-reported cybersickness symptoms. The paper will provide a detailed description of the dataset, including the arranged navigation task, the data collection procedures, and the data format. The dataset will serve as a valuable resource for researchers to develop and evaluate predictive models for cybersickness and will facilitate more research in cybersickness mitigation.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提供了一个收集的数据集，用于预测虚拟现实环境中的晕机症。这些数据是从虚拟环境中的导航任务中收集的，该虚拟环境旨在引发晕机症。该数据集由从不同参与者收集的许多数据点组成，包括生理反应（EDA 和心率）和自我报告的晕机症状。论文将对数据集进行详细描述，包括安排的导航任务、数据收集程序和数据格式。该数据集将成为研究人员开发和评估晕眩症预测模型的宝贵资源，并将促进更多缓解晕眩症的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是收集并提供一个用于预测虚拟现实环境中网络晕动症的多模态数据集，包含生理指标和主观症状数据。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏有效预测网络晕动症的模型和数据支持，需通过大规模数据集推动相关算法发展。
AI.method: 通过虚拟导航任务诱导网络晕动症，同步采集皮肤电活动、心率等生理数据，并记录参与者自我报告的症状评分。
AI.result: 构建了包含多维度数据的结构化数据集，涵盖参与者生理反应与症状评分，为后续模型开发提供基准数据。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为预测模型研发和晕动症缓解策略研究提供了重要资源，有助于推动虚拟现实领域的用户体验优化。

authors_text: Neil Natarajan,Reuben Binns,Jun Zhao,Nigel Shadbolt
title: Trust Explanations to Do What They Say
title_zh: 相信解释，照他们说的去做
abstract: How much are we to trust a decision made by an AI algorithm? Trusting an algorithm without cause may lead to abuse, and mistrusting it may similarly lead to disuse. Trust in an AI is only desirable if it is warranted; thus, calibrating trust is critical to ensuring appropriate use. In the name of calibrating trust appropriately, AI developers should provide contracts specifying use cases in which an algorithm can and cannot be trusted. Automated explanation of AI outputs is often touted as a method by which trust can be built in the algorithm. However, automated explanations arise from algorithms themselves, so trust in these explanations is similarly only desirable if it is warranted. Developers of algorithms explaining AI outputs (xAI algorithms) should provide similar contracts, which should specify use cases in which an explanation can and cannot be trusted.
summary: How much are we to trust a decision made by an AI algorithm? Trusting an algorithm without cause may lead to abuse, and mistrusting it may similarly lead to disuse. Trust in an AI is only desirable if it is warranted; thus, calibrating trust is critical to ensuring appropriate use. In the name of calibrating trust appropriately, AI developers should provide contracts specifying use cases in which an algorithm can and cannot be trusted. Automated explanation of AI outputs is often touted as a method by which trust can be built in the algorithm. However, automated explanations arise from algorithms themselves, so trust in these explanations is similarly only desirable if it is warranted. Developers of algorithms explaining AI outputs (xAI algorithms) should provide similar contracts, which should specify use cases in which an explanation can and cannot be trusted.
abstract_zh: 我们对人工智能算法做出的决定有多信任？无缘无故地信任算法可能会导致滥用，而不信任算法同样可能会导致废弃。只有在有保证的情况下，对人工智能的信任才是可取的；因此，校准信任对于确保适当使用至关重要。以适当校准信任的名义，人工智能开发人员应该提供合约，指定算法可以信任和不可以信任的用例。人工智能输出的自动解释通常被认为是在算法中建立信任的一种方法。然而，自动解释源于算法本身，因此同样只有在有保证的情况下才需要对这些解释的信任。解释人工智能输出的算法（xAI 算法）的开发人员应该提供类似的合约，其中应该指定解释可以信任和不可以信任的用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过制定明确的使用合同来校准对AI算法及其解释的信任，确保其在适当场景下被使用。
AI.motivation: 过度信任或不信任AI算法均可能导致滥用或弃用，需通过可信度校准确保其合理应用。
AI.method: 建议AI开发者为算法及解释算法（xAI）提供合同，明确其可信赖和不可信赖的使用场景。
AI.result: 提出了一种通过合同规范AI信任边界的框架，为算法使用提供明确的可信度约束。
AI.conclusion: 信任校准需依赖明确的合同约定，以确保AI及其解释在适用范围内被正确使用。

authors_text: Andrea Rossi,Andrea Visentin,Diego Carraro,Steven Prestwich,Kenneth N. Brown
title: Forecasting Workload in Cloud Computing: Towards Uncertainty-Aware Predictions and Transfer Learning
title_zh: 云计算中的预测工作负载：走向不确定性感知预测和迁移学习
abstract: Predicting future resource demand in Cloud Computing is essential for optimizing the trade-off between serving customers' requests efficiently and minimizing the provisioning cost. Modelling prediction uncertainty is also desirable to better inform the resource decision-making process, but research in this field is under-investigated. In this paper, we propose univariate and bivariate Bayesian deep learning models that provide predictions of future workload demand and its uncertainty. We run extensive experiments on Google and Alibaba clusters, where we first train our models with datasets from different cloud providers and compare them with LSTM-based baselines. Results show that modelling the uncertainty of predictions has a positive impact on performance, especially on service level metrics, because uncertainty quantification can be tailored to desired target service levels that are critical in cloud applications. Moreover, we investigate whether our models benefit transfer learning capabilities across different domains, i.e. dataset distributions. Experiments on the same workload datasets reveal that acceptable transfer learning performance can be achieved within the same provider (because distributions are more similar). Also, domain knowledge does not transfer when the source and target domains are very different (e.g. from different providers), but this performance degradation can be mitigated by increasing the training set size of the source domain.
summary: Predicting future resource demand in Cloud Computing is essential for optimizing the trade-off between serving customers' requests efficiently and minimizing the provisioning cost. Modelling prediction uncertainty is also desirable to better inform the resource decision-making process, but research in this field is under-investigated. In this paper, we propose univariate and bivariate Bayesian deep learning models that provide predictions of future workload demand and its uncertainty. We run extensive experiments on Google and Alibaba clusters, where we first train our models with datasets from different cloud providers and compare them with LSTM-based baselines. Results show that modelling the uncertainty of predictions has a positive impact on performance, especially on service level metrics, because uncertainty quantification can be tailored to desired target service levels that are critical in cloud applications. Moreover, we investigate whether our models benefit transfer learning capabilities across different domains, i.e. dataset distributions. Experiments on the same workload datasets reveal that acceptable transfer learning performance can be achieved within the same provider (because distributions are more similar). Also, domain knowledge does not transfer when the source and target domains are very different (e.g. from different providers), but this performance degradation can be mitigated by increasing the training set size of the source domain.
abstract_zh: 预测云计算中未来的资源需求对于优化高效服务客户请求和最小化配置成本之间的权衡至关重要。对预测不确定性进行建模也有助于更好地为资源决策过程提供信息，但该领域的研究尚不充分。在本文中，我们提出了单变量和双变量贝叶斯深度学习模型，可提供未来工作负载需求及其不确定性的预测。我们在 Google 和阿里巴巴集群上进行了广泛的实验，首先使用来自不同云提供商的数据集训练我们的模型，并将它们与基于 LSTM 的基线进行比较。结果表明，对预测的不确定性进行建模对性能有积极影响，尤其是对服务水平指标，因为不确定性量化可以根据云应用程序中至关重要的所需目标服务水平进行定制。此外，我们研究了我们的模型是否有利于跨不同领域（即数据集分布）的迁移学习能力。对相同工作负载数据集的实验表明，在同一提供商内可以实现可接受的迁移学习性能（因为分布更相似）。此外，当源域和目标域非常不同（例如来自不同的提供商）时，领域知识不会转移，但可以通过增加源域的训练集大小来缓解这种性能下降。

AI.tldr: 提出贝叶斯深度学习模型预测云计算中的工作负载及其不确定性，并研究跨领域的迁移学习能力。
AI.motivation: 云计算中准确预测资源需求对优化成本与效率至关重要，但现有研究在不确定性建模和跨领域迁移学习方面存在不足。
AI.method: 采用单变量和双变量贝叶斯深度学习模型，结合不确定性量化，并在Google和阿里巴巴集群数据集上进行实验，对比LSTM基线模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，不确定性建模显著提升服务指标表现；同一云供应商内迁移学习效果良好，而跨供应商迁移需增加源域训练数据以缓解性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性感知预测有效提升云资源管理性能，迁移学习在相似领域表现良好，跨领域需通过扩大源域数据集缓解性能损失。

search_text: Forecasting Workload in Cloud Computing: Towards Uncertainty-Aware Predictions and Transfer Learning 云计算中的预测工作负载：走向不确定性感知预测和迁移学习 Predicting future resource demand in Cloud Computing is essential for optimizing the trade-off between serving customers' requests efficiently and minimizing the provisioning cost. Modelling prediction uncertainty is also desirable to better inform the resource decision-making process, but research in this field is under-investigated. In this paper, we propose univariate and bivariate Bayesian deep learning models that provide predictions of future workload demand and its uncertainty. We run extensive experiments on Google and Alibaba clusters, where we first train our models with datasets from different cloud providers and compare them with LSTM-based baselines. Results show that modelling the uncertainty of predictions has a positive impact on performance, especially on service level metrics, because uncertainty quantification can be tailored to desired target service levels that are critical in cloud applications. Moreover, we investigate whether our models benefit transfer learning capabilities across different domains, i.e. dataset distributions. Experiments on the same workload datasets reveal that acceptable transfer learning performance can be achieved within the same provider (because distributions are more similar). Also, domain knowledge does not transfer when the source and target domains are very different (e.g. from different providers), but this performance degradation can be mitigated by increasing the training set size of the source domain. 预测云计算中未来的资源需求对于优化高效服务客户请求和最小化配置成本之间的权衡至关重要。对预测不确定性进行建模也有助于更好地为资源决策过程提供信息，但该领域的研究尚不充分。在本文中，我们提出了单变量和双变量贝叶斯深度学习模型，可提供未来工作负载需求及其不确定性的预测。我们在 Google 和阿里巴巴集群上进行了广泛的实验，首先使用来自不同云提供商的数据集训练我们的模型，并将它们与基于 LSTM 的基线进行比较。结果表明，对预测的不确定性进行建模对性能有积极影响，尤其是对服务水平指标，因为不确定性量化可以根据云应用程序中至关重要的所需目标服务水平进行定制。此外，我们研究了我们的模型是否有利于跨不同领域（即数据集分布）的迁移学习能力。对相同工作负载数据集的实验表明，在同一提供商内可以实现可接受的迁移学习性能（因为分布更相似）。此外，当源域和目标域非常不同（例如来自不同的提供商）时，领域知识不会转移，但可以通过增加源域的训练集大小来缓解这种性能下降。 提出贝叶斯深度学习模型预测云计算中的工作负载及其不确定性，并研究跨领域的迁移学习能力。 Andrea Rossi,Andrea Visentin,Diego Carraro,Steven Prestwich,Kenneth N. Brown cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Filipo Sharevski,Jennifer Vander Loop,Peter Jachim,Amy Devine,Emma Pieroni
title: Talking Abortion (Mis)information with ChatGPT on TikTok
title_zh: 在 TikTok 上与 ChatGPT 谈论堕胎 (Mis) 信息
abstract: In this study, we tested users' perception of accuracy and engagement with TikTok videos in which ChatGPT responded to prompts about "at-home" abortion remedies. The chatbot's responses, though somewhat vague and confusing, nonetheless recommended consulting with health professionals before attempting an "at-home" abortion. We used ChatGPT to create two TikTok video variants - one where users can see ChatGPT explicitly typing back a response, and one where the text response is presented without any notion to the chatbot. We randomly exposed 100 participants to each variant and found that the group of participants unaware of ChatGPT's text synthetization was more inclined to believe the responses were misinformation. Under the same impression, TikTok itself attached misinformation warning labels ("Get the facts about abortion") to all videos after we collected our initial results. We then decided to test the videos again with another set of 50 participants and found that the labels did not affect the perceptions of abortion misinformation except in the case where ChatGPT explicitly responded to a prompt for a lyrical output. We also found that more than 60% of the participants expressed negative or hesitant opinions about chatbots as sources of credible health information.
summary: In this study, we tested users' perception of accuracy and engagement with TikTok videos in which ChatGPT responded to prompts about "at-home" abortion remedies. The chatbot's responses, though somewhat vague and confusing, nonetheless recommended consulting with health professionals before attempting an "at-home" abortion. We used ChatGPT to create two TikTok video variants - one where users can see ChatGPT explicitly typing back a response, and one where the text response is presented without any notion to the chatbot. We randomly exposed 100 participants to each variant and found that the group of participants unaware of ChatGPT's text synthetization was more inclined to believe the responses were misinformation. Under the same impression, TikTok itself attached misinformation warning labels ("Get the facts about abortion") to all videos after we collected our initial results. We then decided to test the videos again with another set of 50 participants and found that the labels did not affect the perceptions of abortion misinformation except in the case where ChatGPT explicitly responded to a prompt for a lyrical output. We also found that more than 60% of the participants expressed negative or hesitant opinions about chatbots as sources of credible health information.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们测试了用户对 TikTok 视频准确性和参与度的看法，在这些视频中，ChatGPT 对有关“在家”堕胎疗法的提示做出了回应。聊天机器人的反应虽然有些模糊和令人困惑，但仍然建议在尝试“在家”堕胎之前咨询健康专业人士。我们使用 ChatGPT 创建了两个 TikTok 视频变体 - 一种是用户可以看到 ChatGPT 明确地回复回复，另一种是在聊天机器人不知道的情况下呈现文本回复。我们随机让 100 名参与者接触每个变体，发现不知道 ChatGPT 文本合成的参与者组更倾向于相信这些反应是错误信息。出于同样的印象，在我们收集初步结果后，TikTok 本身给所有视频贴上了错误信息警告标签（“获取有关堕胎的事实”）。然后，我们决定与另一组 50 名参与者再次测试这些视频，发现标签不会影响人们对堕胎错误信息的看法，除非 ChatGPT 明确回应抒情输出的提示。我们还发现，超过 60% 的参与者对聊天机器人作为可靠健康信息的来源表达了负面或犹豫的意见。

AI.tldr: 本研究测试了用户对TikTok视频中ChatGPT生成的‘家庭’流产方法信息的准确性感知及参与度，分析了AI生成内容与误导性标签对用户认知的影响。
AI.motivation: 探讨AI生成的健康信息在社交媒体传播中的可信度，以及平台误导性标签对用户判断的潜在影响，尤其关注流产这一敏感话题。
AI.method: 使用ChatGPT生成两种TikTok视频版本（显示AI输入过程与隐藏AI来源），随机分发给100名参与者，后附加误导性标签并再次测试50名参与者，分析认知差异。
AI.result: 未意识到AI生成的参与者更易认为内容为误导信息；标签仅在AI生成歌词类回复时影响认知；超60%参与者对AI作为健康信息源持负面或犹豫态度。
AI.conclusion: 用户对AI生成健康信息的可信度较低，误导性标签效果有限，需明确AI角色以提升信息辨识度。

ai_content.tldr: 本研究测试了用户对TikTok视频中ChatGPT生成的‘家庭’流产方法信息的准确性感知及参与度，分析了AI生成内容与误导性标签对用户认知的影响。

authors_text: Tallulah Frappier
title: Online Assemblies: Civic Technologies Reshaping the Public Space
title_zh: 在线集会：公民技术重塑公共空间
abstract: Speaking or writing of political assemblies tends to evoke the action of people gathering to deliberate, or the spaces in which this deliberation might take place. One thing that is often overlooked, however, is the fact that these spaces can be digital. Online assemblies have become more widespread in recent years; from the first Web forums to civic technologies specifically designed to host collective political debates. As digital services affect our possibilities for political mobilization and participation, I will here attempt to define the qualities specific to online assemblies, and to identify several patterns and continuities in the design features of civic technologies offering online spaces for debate.
summary: Speaking or writing of political assemblies tends to evoke the action of people gathering to deliberate, or the spaces in which this deliberation might take place. One thing that is often overlooked, however, is the fact that these spaces can be digital. Online assemblies have become more widespread in recent years; from the first Web forums to civic technologies specifically designed to host collective political debates. As digital services affect our possibilities for political mobilization and participation, I will here attempt to define the qualities specific to online assemblies, and to identify several patterns and continuities in the design features of civic technologies offering online spaces for debate.
abstract_zh: 谈论或撰写政治集会往往会引起人们聚集在一起商议的行动，或者可能发生这种商议的空间。然而，经常被忽视的一件事是这些空间可以是数字化的。近年来，在线集会变得更加普遍；从第一个网络论坛到专门为举办集体政治辩论而设计的公民技术。由于数字服务影响我们政治动员和参与的可能性，我将在这里尝试定义在线集会的特有品质，并确定提供在线辩论空间的公民技术设计特征的几种模式和连续性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨在线集会如何通过公民技术重塑公共空间，分析其设计特征与政治参与模式的变化。
AI.motivation: 传统政治集会的物理限制与数字技术的兴起促使研究者关注在线集会如何改变公共讨论形式及公民参与方式。
AI.method: 通过分析数字服务的发展历程及案例，归纳公民技术在设计上的共性特征与模式。
AI.result: 识别出在线集会技术设计的连续性特征，如互动性、可访问性及争议管理机制，并总结其对政治动员的影响。
AI.conclusion: 公民技术扩展了公共空间的边界，但需平衡开放性与秩序，未来研究应关注技术设计如何促进包容性民主。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨在线集会如何通过公民技术重塑公共空间，分析其设计特征与政治参与模式的变化。
ai_content.motivation: 传统政治集会的物理限制与数字技术的兴起促使研究者关注在线集会如何改变公共讨论形式及公民参与方式。
ai_content.method: 通过分析数字服务的发展历程及案例，归纳公民技术在设计上的共性特征与模式。
ai_content.result: 识别出在线集会技术设计的连续性特征，如互动性、可访问性及争议管理机制，并总结其对政治动员的影响。

search_text: Online Assemblies: Civic Technologies Reshaping the Public Space 在线集会：公民技术重塑公共空间 Speaking or writing of political assemblies tends to evoke the action of people gathering to deliberate, or the spaces in which this deliberation might take place. One thing that is often overlooked, however, is the fact that these spaces can be digital. Online assemblies have become more widespread in recent years; from the first Web forums to civic technologies specifically designed to host collective political debates. As digital services affect our possibilities for political mobilization and participation, I will here attempt to define the qualities specific to online assemblies, and to identify several patterns and continuities in the design features of civic technologies offering online spaces for debate. 谈论或撰写政治集会往往会引起人们聚集在一起商议的行动，或者可能发生这种商议的空间。然而，经常被忽视的一件事是这些空间可以是数字化的。近年来，在线集会变得更加普遍；从第一个网络论坛到专门为举办集体政治辩论而设计的公民技术。由于数字服务影响我们政治动员和参与的可能性，我将在这里尝试定义在线集会的特有品质，并确定提供在线辩论空间的公民技术设计特征的几种模式和连续性。 本文探讨在线集会如何通过公民技术重塑公共空间，分析其设计特征与政治参与模式的变化。 Tallulah Frappier cs.HC

authors_text: Enrico Cambiaso,Luca Caviglione
title: Scamming the Scammers: Using ChatGPT to Reply Mails for Wasting Time and Resources
title_zh: 诈骗骗子：使用ChatGPT回复邮件浪费时间和资源
abstract: The use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) to support cybersecurity operations is now a consolidated practice, e.g., to detect malicious code or configure traffic filtering policies. The recent surge of AI, generative techniques and frameworks with efficient natural language processing capabilities dramatically magnifies the number of possible applications aimed at increasing the security of the Internet. Specifically, the ability of ChatGPT to produce textual contents while mimicking realistic human interactions can be used to mitigate the plague of emails containing scams. Therefore, this paper investigates the use of AI to engage scammers in automatized and pointless communications, with the goal of wasting both their time and resources. Preliminary results showcase that ChatGPT is able to decoy scammers, thus confirming that AI is an effective tool to counteract threats delivered via mail. In addition, we highlight the multitude of implications and open research questions to be addressed in the perspective of the ubiquitous adoption of AI.
summary: The use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) to support cybersecurity operations is now a consolidated practice, e.g., to detect malicious code or configure traffic filtering policies. The recent surge of AI, generative techniques and frameworks with efficient natural language processing capabilities dramatically magnifies the number of possible applications aimed at increasing the security of the Internet. Specifically, the ability of ChatGPT to produce textual contents while mimicking realistic human interactions can be used to mitigate the plague of emails containing scams. Therefore, this paper investigates the use of AI to engage scammers in automatized and pointless communications, with the goal of wasting both their time and resources. Preliminary results showcase that ChatGPT is able to decoy scammers, thus confirming that AI is an effective tool to counteract threats delivered via mail. In addition, we highlight the multitude of implications and open research questions to be addressed in the perspective of the ubiquitous adoption of AI.
abstract_zh: 使用人工智能（AI）支持网络安全运营现已成为一种综合实践，例如检测恶意代码或配置流量过滤策略。最近人工智能、生成技术和具有高效自然语言处理能力的框架的激增极大地增加了旨在提高互联网安全性的可能应用程序的数量。具体来说，ChatGPT 能够在模仿真实人类交互的同时生成文本内容，可用于减轻包含诈骗的电子邮件的危害。因此，本文研究了利用人工智能让诈骗者进行自动化和毫无意义的通信，目的是浪费他们的时间和资源。初步结果表明，ChatGPT 能够诱骗诈骗者，从而证实人工智能是应对通过邮件传递的威胁的有效工具。此外，我们还强调了从人工智能普遍采用的角度来看需要解决的众多影响和开放研究问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用ChatGPT自动回复钓鱼邮件以浪费骗子时间和资源，从而对抗网络钓鱼威胁。
AI.motivation: AI在网络安全中的应用已较成熟，但生成式AI（如ChatGPT）可进一步用于应对邮件诈骗，通过自动化沟通消耗骗子资源。
AI.method: 使用ChatGPT生成自然语言邮件回复，与骗子进行自动化、无意义的对话以消耗其时间和资源。
AI.result: 实验表明ChatGPT能有效引诱骗子，验证了AI在对抗邮件威胁中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: AI可作为新型防御工具对抗邮件诈骗，但需进一步研究其应用边界与伦理问题。

authors_text: Medhini Narasimhan,Licheng Yu,Sean Bell,Ning Zhang,Trevor Darrell
title: Learning and Verification of Task Structure in Instructional Videos
title_zh: 教学视频中任务结构的学习和验证
abstract: Given the enormous number of instructional videos available online, learning a diverse array of multi-step task models from videos is an appealing goal. We introduce a new pre-trained video model, VideoTaskformer, focused on representing the semantics and structure of instructional videos. We pre-train VideoTaskformer using a simple and effective objective: predicting weakly supervised textual labels for steps that are randomly masked out from an instructional video (masked step modeling). Compared to prior work which learns step representations locally, our approach involves learning them globally, leveraging video of the entire surrounding task as context. From these learned representations, we can verify if an unseen video correctly executes a given task, as well as forecast which steps are likely to be taken after a given step. We introduce two new benchmarks for detecting mistakes in instructional videos, to verify if there is an anomalous step and if steps are executed in the right order. We also introduce a long-term forecasting benchmark, where the goal is to predict long-range future steps from a given step. Our method outperforms previous baselines on these tasks, and we believe the tasks will be a valuable way for the community to measure the quality of step representations. Additionally, we evaluate VideoTaskformer on 3 existing benchmarks -- procedural activity recognition, step classification, and step forecasting -- and demonstrate on each that our method outperforms existing baselines and achieves new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Given the enormous number of instructional videos available online, learning a diverse array of multi-step task models from videos is an appealing goal. We introduce a new pre-trained video model, VideoTaskformer, focused on representing the semantics and structure of instructional videos. We pre-train VideoTaskformer using a simple and effective objective: predicting weakly supervised textual labels for steps that are randomly masked out from an instructional video (masked step modeling). Compared to prior work which learns step representations locally, our approach involves learning them globally, leveraging video of the entire surrounding task as context. From these learned representations, we can verify if an unseen video correctly executes a given task, as well as forecast which steps are likely to be taken after a given step. We introduce two new benchmarks for detecting mistakes in instructional videos, to verify if there is an anomalous step and if steps are executed in the right order. We also introduce a long-term forecasting benchmark, where the goal is to predict long-range future steps from a given step. Our method outperforms previous baselines on these tasks, and we believe the tasks will be a valuable way for the community to measure the quality of step representations. Additionally, we evaluate VideoTaskformer on 3 existing benchmarks -- procedural activity recognition, step classification, and step forecasting -- and demonstrate on each that our method outperforms existing baselines and achieves new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 鉴于在线教学视频数量巨大，从视频中学习各种多步骤任务模型是一个很有吸引力的目标。我们引入了一种新的预训练视频模型 VideoTaskformer，专注于表示教学视频的语义和结构。我们使用简单而有效的目标来预训练 VideoTaskformer：预测从教学视频中随机屏蔽的步骤的弱监督文本标签（屏蔽步骤建模）。与之前在本地学习步骤表示的工作相比，我们的方法涉及全局学习它们，利用整个周围任务的视频作为上下文。从这些学习到的表示中，我们可以验证未见过的视频是否正确执行给定的任务，以及预测在给定步骤之后可能采取哪些步骤。我们引入了两个新的基准来检测教学视频中的错误，以验证是否存在异常步骤以及步骤是否按正确的顺序执行。我们还引入了长期预测基准，其目标是根据给定步骤预测长期的未来步骤。我们的方法在这些任务上优于以前的基线，我们相信这些任务将成为社区衡量步骤表示质量的一种有价值的方式。此外，我们还根据 3 个现有基准（程序活动识别、步骤分类和步骤预测）评估 VideoTaskformer，并在每个基准上证明我们的方法优于现有基准并实现了新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VideoTaskformer的预训练视频模型，用于学习和验证教学视频中的任务结构，并引入了新的基准测试以评估模型性能。
AI.motivation: 由于在线教学视频数量庞大，需要从视频中学习多样化的多步骤任务模型，并有效验证视频中任务执行的正确性及步骤顺序。
AI.method: 通过弱监督文本标签预测（掩码步骤建模）预训练VideoTaskformer，利用整个任务视频的全局上下文学习步骤表示，同时引入异常步骤检测和长期步骤预测基准。
AI.result: 在新提出的基准测试及三个现有基准（过程活动识别、步骤分类、步骤预测）中，VideoTaskformer均优于现有方法并达到新状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: VideoTaskformer能有效学习任务结构并验证视频执行质量，新基准为社区提供了评估步骤表示质量的可靠工具。

Our method outperforms previous baselines on these tasks, and we believe the tasks will be a valuable way for the community to measure the quality of step representations. Additionally, we evaluate VideoTaskformer on 3 existing benchmarks -- procedural activity recognition, step classification, and step forecasting -- and demonstrate on each that our method outperforms existing baselines and achieves new state-of-the-art performance. 鉴于在线教学视频数量巨大，从视频中学习各种多步骤任务模型是一个很有吸引力的目标。我们引入了一种新的预训练视频模型 VideoTaskformer，专注于表示教学视频的语义和结构。我们使用简单而有效的目标来预训练 VideoTaskformer：预测从教学视频中随机屏蔽的步骤的弱监督文本标签（屏蔽步骤建模）。与之前在本地学习步骤表示的工作相比，我们的方法涉及全局学习它们，利用整个周围任务的视频作为上下文。从这些学习到的表示中，我们可以验证未见过的视频是否正确执行给定的任务，以及预测在给定步骤之后可能采取哪些步骤。我们引入了两个新的基准来检测教学视频中的错误，以验证是否存在异常步骤以及步骤是否按正确的顺序执行。我们还引入了长期预测基准，其目标是根据给定步骤预测长期的未来步骤。我们的方法在这些任务上优于以前的基线，我们相信这些任务将成为社区衡量步骤表示质量的一种有价值的方式。此外，我们还根据 3 个现有基准（程序活动识别、步骤分类和步骤预测）评估 VideoTaskformer，并在每个基准上证明我们的方法优于现有基准并实现了新的最先进性能。 本文提出了一种名为VideoTaskformer的预训练视频模型，用于学习和验证教学视频中的任务结构，并引入了新的基准测试以评估模型性能。 Medhini Narasimhan,Licheng Yu,Sean Bell,Ning Zhang,Trevor Darrell cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Relja Arandjelović,Alex Andonian,Arthur Mensch,Olivier J. Hénaff,Jean-Baptiste Alayrac,Andrew Zisserman
title: Three ways to improve feature alignment for open vocabulary detection
title_zh: 改善开放词汇检测特征对齐的三种方法
abstract: The core problem in zero-shot open vocabulary detection is how to align visual and text features, so that the detector performs well on unseen classes. Previous approaches train the feature pyramid and detection head from scratch, which breaks the vision-text feature alignment established during pretraining, and struggles to prevent the language model from forgetting unseen classes. We propose three methods to alleviate these issues. Firstly, a simple scheme is used to augment the text embeddings which prevents overfitting to a small number of classes seen during training, while simultaneously saving memory and computation. Secondly, the feature pyramid network and the detection head are modified to include trainable gated shortcuts, which encourages vision-text feature alignment and guarantees it at the start of detection training. Finally, a self-training approach is used to leverage a larger corpus of image-text pairs thus improving detection performance on classes with no human annotated bounding boxes. Our three methods are evaluated on the zero-shot version of the LVIS benchmark, each of them showing clear and significant benefits. Our final network achieves the new stateof-the-art on the mAP-all metric and demonstrates competitive performance for mAP-rare, as well as superior transfer to COCO and Objects365.
summary: The core problem in zero-shot open vocabulary detection is how to align visual and text features, so that the detector performs well on unseen classes. Previous approaches train the feature pyramid and detection head from scratch, which breaks the vision-text feature alignment established during pretraining, and struggles to prevent the language model from forgetting unseen classes. We propose three methods to alleviate these issues. Firstly, a simple scheme is used to augment the text embeddings which prevents overfitting to a small number of classes seen during training, while simultaneously saving memory and computation. Secondly, the feature pyramid network and the detection head are modified to include trainable gated shortcuts, which encourages vision-text feature alignment and guarantees it at the start of detection training. Finally, a self-training approach is used to leverage a larger corpus of image-text pairs thus improving detection performance on classes with no human annotated bounding boxes. Our three methods are evaluated on the zero-shot version of the LVIS benchmark, each of them showing clear and significant benefits. Our final network achieves the new stateof-the-art on the mAP-all metric and demonstrates competitive performance for mAP-rare, as well as superior transfer to COCO and Objects365.
abstract_zh: 零样本开放词汇检测的核心问题是如何对齐视觉和文本特征，使检测器在未见过的类上表现良好。以前的方法从头开始训练特征金字塔和检测头，这打破了预训练期间建立的视觉-文本特征对齐，并努力防止语言模型忘记看不见的类。我们提出了三种方法来缓解这些问题。首先，使用一个简单的方案来增强文本嵌入，防止过度拟合训练期间看到的少量类别，同时节省内存和计算。其次，修改特征金字塔网络和检测头以包含可训练的门控快捷方式，这鼓励视觉文本特征对齐并在检测训练开始时保证它。最后，使用自我训练方法来利用更大的图像文本对语料库，从而提高没有人类注释边界框的类的检测性能。我们的三种方法在 LVIS 基准的零样本版本上进行了评估，每种方法都显示出明显而显着的优势。我们的最终网络在 mAP-all 指标上实现了新的最先进水平，并展示了 mAP-rare 的竞争性能，以及向 COCO 和 Objects365 的卓越传输。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决零样本开放词汇检测中的视觉与文本特征对齐问题，以提升检测器在未见类别上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在训练过程中破坏了预训练阶段建立的视觉-文本对齐，且难以防止语言模型遗忘未见类别，需改进特征对齐以提升检测性能。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：文本嵌入增强防止过拟合，可训练门控快捷方式强化对齐，自训练利用更多图像-文本对提升性能。
AI.result: 在LVIS零样本基准测试中，最终网络在mAP-all指标上达到新SOTA，并在mAP-rare和COCO/Objects365迁移中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 三种方法有效提升开放词汇检测的特征对齐，推动了零样本检测的发展。

authors_text: Nupur Kumari,Bingliang Zhang,Sheng-Yu Wang,Eli Shechtman,Richard Zhang,Jun-Yan Zhu
title: Ablating Concepts in Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
title_zh: 消融文本到图像扩散模型中的概念
abstract: Large-scale text-to-image diffusion models can generate high-fidelity images with powerful compositional ability. However, these models are typically trained on an enormous amount of Internet data, often containing copyrighted material, licensed images, and personal photos. Furthermore, they have been found to replicate the style of various living artists or memorize exact training samples. How can we remove such copyrighted concepts or images without retraining the model from scratch? To achieve this goal, we propose an efficient method of ablating concepts in the pretrained model, i.e., preventing the generation of a target concept. Our algorithm learns to match the image distribution for a target style, instance, or text prompt we wish to ablate to the distribution corresponding to an anchor concept. This prevents the model from generating target concepts given its text condition. Extensive experiments show that our method can successfully prevent the generation of the ablated concept while preserving closely related concepts in the model.
summary: Large-scale text-to-image diffusion models can generate high-fidelity images with powerful compositional ability. However, these models are typically trained on an enormous amount of Internet data, often containing copyrighted material, licensed images, and personal photos. Furthermore, they have been found to replicate the style of various living artists or memorize exact training samples. How can we remove such copyrighted concepts or images without retraining the model from scratch? To achieve this goal, we propose an efficient method of ablating concepts in the pretrained model, i.e., preventing the generation of a target concept. Our algorithm learns to match the image distribution for a target style, instance, or text prompt we wish to ablate to the distribution corresponding to an anchor concept. This prevents the model from generating target concepts given its text condition. Extensive experiments show that our method can successfully prevent the generation of the ablated concept while preserving closely related concepts in the model.
abstract_zh: 大规模文本到图像的扩散模型可以生成具有强大合成能力的高保真图像。然而，这些模型通常是根据大量互联网数据进行训练的，这些数据通常包含受版权保护的材料、许可的图像和个人照片。此外，人们发现它们可以复制各种在世艺术家的风格或记住精确的训练样本。我们如何才能删除这些受版权保护的概念或图像而不从头开始重新训练模型？为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种有效的方法来消除预训练模型中的概念，即防止目标概念的生成。我们的算法学习匹配目标样式、实例或文本提示的图像分布，我们希望将其消融为与锚概念相对应的分布。这可以防止模型在给定文本条件的情况下生成目标概念。大量的实验表明，我们的方法可以成功地防止消融概念的生成，同时保留模型中密切相关的概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需从头训练即可移除文本到图像扩散模型中特定概念（如版权内容或特定风格）的高效方法。
AI.motivation: 大规模文本到图像扩散模型可能包含版权内容、艺术家风格或训练样本的复制，但重新训练模型成本高昂，需寻找高效移除特定概念的方法。
AI.method: 通过将目标概念的图像分布与锚定概念分布对齐，使模型在生成时避免输出目标概念，同时保留相关概念。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效阻止目标概念生成，且对相关概念影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在不重新训练的前提下移除扩散模型中的特定概念提供了可行解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需从头训练即可移除文本到图像扩散模型中特定概念（如版权内容或特定风格）的高效方法。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为在不重新训练的前提下移除扩散模型中的特定概念提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Lucy Chai,Richard Tucker,Zhengqi Li,Phillip Isola,Noah Snavely
title: Persistent Nature: A Generative Model of Unbounded 3D Worlds
title_zh: 持久性：无界 3D 世界的生成模型
comment: CVPR camera ready version, project page: https://chail.github.io/persistent-nature/
comments: CVPR camera ready version, project page: https://chail.github.io/persistent-nature/
abstract: Despite increasingly realistic image quality, recent 3D image generative models often operate on 3D volumes of fixed extent with limited camera motions. We investigate the task of unconditionally synthesizing unbounded nature scenes, enabling arbitrarily large camera motion while maintaining a persistent 3D world model. Our scene representation consists of an extendable, planar scene layout grid, which can be rendered from arbitrary camera poses via a 3D decoder and volume rendering, and a panoramic skydome. Based on this representation, we learn a generative world model solely from single-view internet photos. Our method enables simulating long flights through 3D landscapes, while maintaining global scene consistency--for instance, returning to the starting point yields the same view of the scene. Our approach enables scene extrapolation beyond the fixed bounds of current 3D generative models, while also supporting a persistent, camera-independent world representation that stands in contrast to auto-regressive 3D prediction models. Our project page: https://chail.github.io/persistent-nature/.
summary: Despite increasingly realistic image quality, recent 3D image generative models often operate on 3D volumes of fixed extent with limited camera motions. We investigate the task of unconditionally synthesizing unbounded nature scenes, enabling arbitrarily large camera motion while maintaining a persistent 3D world model. Our scene representation consists of an extendable, planar scene layout grid, which can be rendered from arbitrary camera poses via a 3D decoder and volume rendering, and a panoramic skydome. Based on this representation, we learn a generative world model solely from single-view internet photos. Our method enables simulating long flights through 3D landscapes, while maintaining global scene consistency--for instance, returning to the starting point yields the same view of the scene. Our approach enables scene extrapolation beyond the fixed bounds of current 3D generative models, while also supporting a persistent, camera-independent world representation that stands in contrast to auto-regressive 3D prediction models. Our project page: https://chail.github.io/persistent-nature/.
abstract_zh: 尽管图像质量越来越逼真，但最近的 3D 图像生成模型通常在相机运动有限的固定范围的 3D 体积上运行。我们研究无条件合成无界自然场景的任务，实现任意大的相机运动，同时保持持久的 3D 世界模型。我们的场景表示由可扩展的平面场景布局网格和全景天幕组成，该网格可以通过 3D 解码器和体积渲染从任意相机姿势进行渲染。基于这种表示，我们仅从单视图互联网照片中学习生成世界模型。我们的方法能够模拟穿越 3D 景观的长途飞行，同时保持全局场景一致性——例如，返回起点会产生相同的场景视图。我们的方法使场景外推能够超出当前 3D 生成模型的固定范围，同时还支持持久的、独立于相机的世界表示，这与自回归 3D 预测模型形成鲜明对比。我们的项目页面：https://chail.github.io/persistent-nature/。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种生成无限大3D自然场景的模型，支持任意相机运动并保持全局场景一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成模型受限于固定范围和有限相机运动，无法生成无限大且保持一致性的自然场景。
AI.method: 基于可扩展的平面网格布局、3D解码器和全景天空穹顶，从单视角互联网照片中学习生成模型。
AI.result: 实现长距离飞行模拟与场景全局一致性，支持超出固定边界的场景扩展及相机无关的持久化世界表示。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统3D生成模型的边界限制，为无限大场景生成提供了新的持久化表示框架。
