search_text: Persistent Nature: A Generative Model of Unbounded 3D Worlds 持久性：无界 3D 世界的生成模型 Despite increasingly realistic image quality, recent 3D image generative models often operate on 3D volumes of fixed extent with limited camera motions. We investigate the task of unconditionally synthesizing unbounded nature scenes, enabling arbitrarily large camera motion while maintaining a persistent 3D world model. Our scene representation consists of an extendable, planar scene layout grid, which can be rendered from arbitrary camera poses via a 3D decoder and volume rendering, and a panoramic skydome. Based on this representation, we learn a generative world model solely from single-view internet photos. Our method enables simulating long flights through 3D landscapes, while maintaining global scene consistency--for instance, returning to the starting point yields the same view of the scene. Our approach enables scene extrapolation beyond the fixed bounds of current 3D generative models, while also supporting a persistent, camera-independent world representation that stands in contrast to auto-regressive 3D prediction models. Our project page: https://chail.github.io/persistent-nature/. 尽管图像质量越来越逼真，但最近的 3D 图像生成模型通常在相机运动有限的固定范围的 3D 体积上运行。我们研究无条件合成无界自然场景的任务，实现任意大的相机运动，同时保持持久的 3D 世界模型。我们的场景表示由可扩展的平面场景布局网格和全景天幕组成，该网格可以通过 3D 解码器和体积渲染从任意相机姿势进行渲染。基于这种表示，我们仅从单视图互联网照片中学习生成世界模型。我们的方法能够模拟穿越 3D 景观的长途飞行，同时保持全局场景一致性——例如，返回起点会产生相同的场景视图。我们的方法使场景外推能够超出当前 3D 生成模型的固定范围，同时还支持持久的、独立于相机的世界表示，这与自回归 3D 预测模型形成鲜明对比。我们的项目页面：https://chail.github.io/persistent-nature/。 该论文提出了一种生成无限大3D自然场景的模型，支持任意相机运动并保持全局场景一致性。 Lucy Chai,Richard Tucker,Zhengqi Li,Phillip Isola,Noah Snavely cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mehmet Aygün,Oisin Mac Aodha
title: SAOR: Single-View Articulated Object Reconstruction
title_zh: SAOR：单视图铰接对象重建
abstract: We introduce SAOR, a novel approach for estimating the 3D shape, texture, and viewpoint of an articulated object from a single image captured in the wild. Unlike prior approaches that rely on pre-defined category-specific 3D templates or tailored 3D skeletons, SAOR learns to articulate shapes from single-view image collections with a skeleton-free part-based model without requiring any 3D object shape priors. To prevent ill-posed solutions, we propose a cross-instance consistency loss that exploits disentangled object shape deformation and articulation. This is helped by a new silhouette-based sampling mechanism to enhance viewpoint diversity during training. Our method only requires estimated object silhouettes and relative depth maps from off-the-shelf pre-trained networks during training. At inference time, given a single-view image, it efficiently outputs an explicit mesh representation. We obtain improved qualitative and quantitative results on challenging quadruped animals compared to relevant existing work.
summary: We introduce SAOR, a novel approach for estimating the 3D shape, texture, and viewpoint of an articulated object from a single image captured in the wild. Unlike prior approaches that rely on pre-defined category-specific 3D templates or tailored 3D skeletons, SAOR learns to articulate shapes from single-view image collections with a skeleton-free part-based model without requiring any 3D object shape priors. To prevent ill-posed solutions, we propose a cross-instance consistency loss that exploits disentangled object shape deformation and articulation. This is helped by a new silhouette-based sampling mechanism to enhance viewpoint diversity during training. Our method only requires estimated object silhouettes and relative depth maps from off-the-shelf pre-trained networks during training. At inference time, given a single-view image, it efficiently outputs an explicit mesh representation. We obtain improved qualitative and quantitative results on challenging quadruped animals compared to relevant existing work.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 SAOR，这是一种根据在野外捕获的单个图像来估计铰接对象的 3D 形状、纹理和视点的新颖方法。与依赖于预定义的特定类别 3D 模板或定制 3D 骨架的先前方法不同，SAOR 学习使用无骨架的基于零件的模型从单视图图像集合中阐明形状，而不需要任何 3D 对象形状先验。为了防止不适定的解决方案，我们提出了一种跨实例一致性损失，它利用解开的对象形状变形和关节。新的基于轮廓的采样机制有助于增强训练过程中的观点多样性。我们的方法只需要在训练期间从现成的预训练网络估计对象轮廓和相对深度图。在推理时，给定单视图图像，它可以有效地输出显式网格表示。与现有的相关工作相比，我们在具有挑战性的四足动物方面获得了改进的定性和定量结果。

AI.tldr: 提出SAOR方法，从单张图像中重建可变形物体的3D形状、纹理及视角，无需预定义模板或骨骼结构。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖预定义模板或骨骼结构，限制了灵活性和泛化能力，需提出无需先验知识的单视图重建方法。
AI.method: 采用无骨骼的基于部分模型，结合跨实例一致性损失与轮廓采样机制，仅需预训练网络提供的轮廓和深度图进行训练，推理时生成显式网格。
AI.result: 在四足动物数据集上，相较现有方法取得更优的定性和定量重建效果。
AI.conclusion: 无需3D形状先验，适用于复杂真实场景，为单视图物体重建提供新思路。

authors_text: Stephanie Milani,Anssi Kanervisto,Karolis Ramanauskas,Sander Schulhoff,Brandon Houghton,Sharada Mohanty,Byron Galbraith,Ke Chen,Yan Song,Tianze Zhou,Bingquan Yu,He Liu,Kai Guan,Yujing Hu,Tangjie Lv,Federico Malato,Florian Leopold,Amogh Raut,Ville Hautamäki,Andrew Melnik,Shu Ishida,João F. Henriques,Robert Klassert,Walter Laurito,Ellen Novoseller, et al. (5 additional authors not shown)
title: Towards Solving Fuzzy Tasks with Human Feedback: A Retrospective of the MineRL BASALT 2022 Competition
title_zh: 利用人类反馈解决模糊任务：MineRL BASALT 2022 竞赛回顾
abstract: To facilitate research in the direction of fine-tuning foundation models from human feedback, we held the MineRL BASALT Competition on Fine-Tuning from Human Feedback at NeurIPS 2022. The BASALT challenge asks teams to compete to develop algorithms to solve tasks with hard-to-specify reward functions in Minecraft. Through this competition, we aimed to promote the development of algorithms that use human feedback as channels to learn the desired behavior. We describe the competition and provide an overview of the top solutions. We conclude by discussing the impact of the competition and future directions for improvement.
summary: To facilitate research in the direction of fine-tuning foundation models from human feedback, we held the MineRL BASALT Competition on Fine-Tuning from Human Feedback at NeurIPS 2022. The BASALT challenge asks teams to compete to develop algorithms to solve tasks with hard-to-specify reward functions in Minecraft. Through this competition, we aimed to promote the development of algorithms that use human feedback as channels to learn the desired behavior. We describe the competition and provide an overview of the top solutions. We conclude by discussing the impact of the competition and future directions for improvement.
abstract_zh: 为了促进根据人类反馈微调基础模型方向的研究，我们在 NeurIPS 2022 上举办了关于根据人类反馈微调基础模型的 MineRL BASALT 竞赛。BASALT 挑战要求团队竞争开发算法来解决 Minecraft 中难以指定奖励函数的任务。通过这次比赛，我们旨在促进使用人类反馈作为学习所需行为的渠道的算法的开发。我们描述了竞争并提供了顶级解决方案的概述。最后，我们讨论了竞争的影响和未来的改进方向。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在NeurIPS 2022上举办的MineRL BASALT竞赛，旨在通过人类反馈微调基础模型以解决Minecraft中难以定义奖励函数的模糊任务。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理奖励函数不明确的复杂任务时表现不足，需探索利用人类反馈优化模型的方法。
AI.method: 举办竞赛要求参赛团队开发算法，在Minecraft环境中通过人类反馈微调模型以完成模糊任务，并总结各队解决方案。
AI.result: 竞赛推动了人类反馈驱动的算法发展，验证了该方法在模糊任务中的有效性，并概述了各团队的创新方案。
AI.conclusion: 竞赛促进了相关研究进展，但未来仍需改进人类反馈的效率与算法泛化能力，以应对更复杂场景。

Henriques,Robert Klassert,Walter Laurito,Ellen Novoseller, et al. (5 additional authors not shown) cs.AI

authors_text: Zhanghan Ke,Yuhao Liu,Lei Zhu,Nanxuan Zhao,Rynson W. H. Lau
title: Neural Preset for Color Style Transfer
title_zh: 用于颜色风格迁移的神经预设
comment: Project page with demos: https://zhkkke.github.io/NeuralPreset . Artifact-free real-time 4K color style transfer via AI-generated presets. CVPR 2023
comments: Project page with demos: https://zhkkke.github.io/NeuralPreset . Artifact-free real-time 4K color style transfer via AI-generated presets. CVPR 2023
abstract: In this paper, we present a Neural Preset technique to address the limitations of existing color style transfer methods, including visual artifacts, vast memory requirement, and slow style switching speed. Our method is based on two core designs. First, we propose Deterministic Neural Color Mapping (DNCM) to consistently operate on each pixel via an image-adaptive color mapping matrix, avoiding artifacts and supporting high-resolution inputs with a small memory footprint. Second, we develop a two-stage pipeline by dividing the task into color normalization and stylization, which allows efficient style switching by extracting color styles as presets and reusing them on normalized input images. Due to the unavailability of pairwise datasets, we describe how to train Neural Preset via a self-supervised strategy. Various advantages of Neural Preset over existing methods are demonstrated through comprehensive evaluations. Notably, Neural Preset enables stable 4K color style transfer in real-time without artifacts. Besides, we show that our trained model can naturally support multiple applications without fine-tuning, including low-light image enhancement, underwater image correction, image dehazing, and image harmonization. Project page with demos: https://zhkkke.github.io/NeuralPreset .
summary: In this paper, we present a Neural Preset technique to address the limitations of existing color style transfer methods, including visual artifacts, vast memory requirement, and slow style switching speed. Our method is based on two core designs. First, we propose Deterministic Neural Color Mapping (DNCM) to consistently operate on each pixel via an image-adaptive color mapping matrix, avoiding artifacts and supporting high-resolution inputs with a small memory footprint. Second, we develop a two-stage pipeline by dividing the task into color normalization and stylization, which allows efficient style switching by extracting color styles as presets and reusing them on normalized input images. Due to the unavailability of pairwise datasets, we describe how to train Neural Preset via a self-supervised strategy. Various advantages of Neural Preset over existing methods are demonstrated through comprehensive evaluations. Notably, Neural Preset enables stable 4K color style transfer in real-time without artifacts. Besides, we show that our trained model can naturally support multiple applications without fine-tuning, including low-light image enhancement, underwater image correction, image dehazing, and image harmonization. Project page with demos: https://zhkkke.github.io/NeuralPreset .
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种神经预设技术来解决现有颜色风格转移方法的局限性，包括视觉伪影、大量内存需求和缓慢的风格切换速度。我们的方法基于两个核心设计。首先，我们提出确定性神经颜色映射（DNCM），通过图像自适应颜色映射矩阵对每个像素进行一致的操作，避免伪影并以较小的内存占用支持高分辨率输入。其次，我们通过将任务分为颜色归一化和风格化来开发两阶段管道，通过提取颜色样式作为预设并在归一化输入图像上重用它们，可以实现高效的风格切换。由于成对数据集的不可用，我们描述了如何通过自监督策略训练神经预设。通过综合评估，证明了 Neural Preset 相对于现有方法的各种优势。值得注意的是，神经预设可实现稳定的实时 4K 色彩风格转换，而不会出现伪影。此外，我们表明，我们训练的模型可以自然地支持多种应用，无需微调，包括低光图像增强、水下图像校正、图像去雾和图像协调。带有演示的项目页面：https://zhkkke.github.io/NeuralPreset 。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经预设技术，解决颜色风格迁移中的视觉伪影、内存需求大和风格切换速度慢的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有颜色风格迁移方法存在视觉伪影、高内存消耗及风格切换效率低的局限性，需改进以实现高效稳定的效果。
AI.method: 提出确定性神经颜色映射（DNCM）和两阶段流程，分别通过图像自适应颜色映射矩阵与分步处理（归一化+风格化）优化效果与效率，并采用自监督策略训练模型。
AI.result: 实现无伪影的实时4K风格迁移，支持低光增强、水下校正等多场景应用，无需微调即可扩展使用。
AI.conclusion: Neural Preset通过创新设计显著提升了颜色风格迁移的效率与稳定性，验证了其在多种视觉任务中的通用性与实用性。

authors_text: Runsen Xu,Tai Wang,Wenwei Zhang,Runjian Chen,Jinkun Cao,Jiangmiao Pang,Dahua Lin
title: MV-JAR: Masked Voxel Jigsaw and Reconstruction for LiDAR-Based Self-Supervised Pre-Training
title_zh: MV-JAR：基于 LiDAR 的自监督预训练的蒙版体素拼图和重建
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023 with a carefully designed benchmark on Waymo. Codes and the benchmark will be available at https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/MV-JAR
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023 with a carefully designed benchmark on Waymo. Codes and the benchmark will be available at https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/MV-JAR
abstract: This paper introduces the Masked Voxel Jigsaw and Reconstruction (MV-JAR) method for LiDAR-based self-supervised pre-training and a carefully designed data-efficient 3D object detection benchmark on the Waymo dataset. Inspired by the scene-voxel-point hierarchy in downstream 3D object detectors, we design masking and reconstruction strategies accounting for voxel distributions in the scene and local point distributions within the voxel. We employ a Reversed-Furthest-Voxel-Sampling strategy to address the uneven distribution of LiDAR points and propose MV-JAR, which combines two techniques for modeling the aforementioned distributions, resulting in superior performance. Our experiments reveal limitations in previous data-efficient experiments, which uniformly sample fine-tuning splits with varying data proportions from each LiDAR sequence, leading to similar data diversity across splits. To address this, we propose a new benchmark that samples scene sequences for diverse fine-tuning splits, ensuring adequate model convergence and providing a more accurate evaluation of pre-training methods. Experiments on our Waymo benchmark and the KITTI dataset demonstrate that MV-JAR consistently and significantly improves 3D detection performance across various data scales, achieving up to a 6.3% increase in mAPH compared to training from scratch. Codes and the benchmark will be available at https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/MV-JAR .
summary: This paper introduces the Masked Voxel Jigsaw and Reconstruction (MV-JAR) method for LiDAR-based self-supervised pre-training and a carefully designed data-efficient 3D object detection benchmark on the Waymo dataset. Inspired by the scene-voxel-point hierarchy in downstream 3D object detectors, we design masking and reconstruction strategies accounting for voxel distributions in the scene and local point distributions within the voxel. We employ a Reversed-Furthest-Voxel-Sampling strategy to address the uneven distribution of LiDAR points and propose MV-JAR, which combines two techniques for modeling the aforementioned distributions, resulting in superior performance. Our experiments reveal limitations in previous data-efficient experiments, which uniformly sample fine-tuning splits with varying data proportions from each LiDAR sequence, leading to similar data diversity across splits. To address this, we propose a new benchmark that samples scene sequences for diverse fine-tuning splits, ensuring adequate model convergence and providing a more accurate evaluation of pre-training methods. Experiments on our Waymo benchmark and the KITTI dataset demonstrate that MV-JAR consistently and significantly improves 3D detection performance across various data scales, achieving up to a 6.3% increase in mAPH compared to training from scratch. Codes and the benchmark will be available at https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/MV-JAR .
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了基于 LiDAR 的自监督预训练的 Masked Voxel Jigsaw and Reconstruction (MV-JAR) 方法，以及在 Waymo 数据集上精心设计的数据高效的 3D 物体检测基准。受下游 3D 对象检测器中的场景-体素-点层次结构的启发，我们设计了掩蔽和重建策略，考虑场景中的体素分布和体素内的局部点分布。我们采用反向最远体素采样策略来解决 LiDAR 点的不均匀分布，并提出 MV-JAR，它结合了两种对上述分布进行建模的技术，从而获得了卓越的性能。我们的实验揭示了先前数据高效实验的局限性，这些实验使用来自每个 LiDAR 序列的不同数据比例对微调分割进行统一采样，从而导致各个分割之间的数据多样性相似。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个新的基准，对场景序列进行采样以进行不同的微调分割，确保模型充分收敛并为预训练方法提供更准确的评估。我们的 Waymo 基准测试和 KITTI 数据集上的实验表明，MV-JAR 在各种数据规模上一致且显着地提高了 3D 检测性能，与从头开始训练相比，mAPH 提高了 6.3%。代码和基准可在 https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/MV-JAR 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LiDAR的自监督预训练方法MV-JAR以及一个高效的数据集基准，用于提升3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据高效实验存在数据分布单一的问题，导致模型收敛不足且预训练方法评估不准确，需设计更合理的数据采样策略和预训练框架。
AI.method: 通过设计掩码和重建策略，结合场景体素分布与局部点云分布建模，采用反向最远体素采样策略解决LiDAR点云分布不均问题，并构建多样化细调数据集基准。
AI.result: 在Waymo和KITTI数据集上，MV-JAR在不同数据规模下均显著提升3D检测性能，mAPH指标最高提升6.3%，且新基准有效验证了预训练方法效果。
AI.conclusion: MV-JAR通过联合建模体素与点云分布，结合多样化基准，显著提升了LiDAR自监督预训练效果，为3D目标检测提供了更优解决方案。

To address this, we propose a new benchmark that samples scene sequences for diverse fine-tuning splits, ensuring adequate model convergence and providing a more accurate evaluation of pre-training methods. Experiments on our Waymo benchmark and the KITTI dataset demonstrate that MV-JAR consistently and significantly improves 3D detection performance across various data scales, achieving up to a 6.3% increase in mAPH compared to training from scratch. Codes and the benchmark will be available at https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/MV-JAR . 本文介绍了基于 LiDAR 的自监督预训练的 Masked Voxel Jigsaw and Reconstruction (MV-JAR) 方法，以及在 Waymo 数据集上精心设计的数据高效的 3D 物体检测基准。受下游 3D 对象检测器中的场景-体素-点层次结构的启发，我们设计了掩蔽和重建策略，考虑场景中的体素分布和体素内的局部点分布。我们采用反向最远体素采样策略来解决 LiDAR 点的不均匀分布，并提出 MV-JAR，它结合了两种对上述分布进行建模的技术，从而获得了卓越的性能。我们的实验揭示了先前数据高效实验的局限性，这些实验使用来自每个 LiDAR 序列的不同数据比例对微调分割进行统一采样，从而导致各个分割之间的数据多样性相似。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个新的基准，对场景序列进行采样以进行不同的微调分割，确保模型充分收敛并为预训练方法提供更准确的评估。我们的 Waymo 基准测试和 KITTI 数据集上的实验表明，MV-JAR 在各种数据规模上一致且显着地提高了 3D 检测性能，与从头开始训练相比，mAPH 提高了 6.3%。代码和基准可在 https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/MV-JAR 上获取。 本文提出了一种基于LiDAR的自监督预训练方法MV-JAR以及一个高效的数据集基准，用于提升3D目标检测性能。 Runsen Xu,Tai Wang,Wenwei Zhang,Runjian Chen,Jinkun Cao,Jiangmiao Pang,Dahua Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Zeqi Xiao,Wenwei Zhang,Tai Wang,Chen Change Loy,Dahua Lin,Jiangmiao Pang
title: Position-Guided Point Cloud Panoptic Segmentation Transformer
title_zh: 位置引导点云全景分割变压器
abstract: DEtection TRansformer (DETR) started a trend that uses a group of learnable queries for unified visual perception. This work begins by applying this appealing paradigm to LiDAR-based point cloud segmentation and obtains a simple yet effective baseline. Although the naive adaptation obtains fair results, the instance segmentation performance is noticeably inferior to previous works. By diving into the details, we observe that instances in the sparse point clouds are relatively small to the whole scene and often have similar geometry but lack distinctive appearance for segmentation, which are rare in the image domain. Considering instances in 3D are more featured by their positional information, we emphasize their roles during the modeling and design a robust Mixed-parameterized Positional Embedding (MPE) to guide the segmentation process. It is embedded into backbone features and later guides the mask prediction and query update processes iteratively, leading to Position-Aware Segmentation (PA-Seg) and Masked Focal Attention (MFA). All these designs impel the queries to attend to specific regions and identify various instances. The method, named Position-guided Point cloud Panoptic segmentation transFormer (P3Former), outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by 3.4% and 1.2% PQ on SemanticKITTI and nuScenes benchmark, respectively. The source code and models are available at https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/P3Former .
summary: DEtection TRansformer (DETR) started a trend that uses a group of learnable queries for unified visual perception. This work begins by applying this appealing paradigm to LiDAR-based point cloud segmentation and obtains a simple yet effective baseline. Although the naive adaptation obtains fair results, the instance segmentation performance is noticeably inferior to previous works. By diving into the details, we observe that instances in the sparse point clouds are relatively small to the whole scene and often have similar geometry but lack distinctive appearance for segmentation, which are rare in the image domain. Considering instances in 3D are more featured by their positional information, we emphasize their roles during the modeling and design a robust Mixed-parameterized Positional Embedding (MPE) to guide the segmentation process. It is embedded into backbone features and later guides the mask prediction and query update processes iteratively, leading to Position-Aware Segmentation (PA-Seg) and Masked Focal Attention (MFA). All these designs impel the queries to attend to specific regions and identify various instances. The method, named Position-guided Point cloud Panoptic segmentation transFormer (P3Former), outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by 3.4% and 1.2% PQ on SemanticKITTI and nuScenes benchmark, respectively. The source code and models are available at https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/P3Former .
abstract_zh: DEtection TRansformer (DETR) 开创了一种使用一组可学习查询来实现统一视觉感知的趋势。这项工作首先将这种吸引人的范例应用于基于激光雷达的点云分割，并获得简单而有效的基线。尽管朴素的适应获得了不错的结果，但实例分割性能明显不如以前的作品。通过深入细节，我们观察到稀疏点云中的实例相对于整个场景来说相对较小，并且通常具有相似的几何形状，但缺乏用于分割的独特外观，这在图像领域中是罕见的。考虑到 3D 中的实例更多地以其位置信息为特征，我们强调它们在建模过程中的作用，并设计了一个强大的混合参数化位置嵌入 (MPE) 来指导分割过程。它被嵌入到骨干特征中，然后迭代地指导掩模预测和查询更新过程，从而产生位置感知分割（PA-Seg）和掩模焦点注意（MFA）。所有这些设计都促使查询关注特定区域并识别不同的实例。该方法名为位置引导点云全景分割 TransFormer (P3Former)，在 SemanticKITTI 和 nuScenes 基准测试中，PQ 分别比之前最先进的方法高出 3.4% 和 1.2%。源代码和模型可在 https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/P3Former 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于位置引导的Transformer方法（P3Former），用于点云全景分割任务，通过增强位置信息提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在点云实例分割中表现不佳，因点云实例规模小、几何相似且缺乏显著外观特征，需更强调位置信息建模。
AI.method: 设计混合参数位置嵌入（MPE）嵌入主干特征，结合位置感知分割（PA-Seg）与掩码焦点注意力（MFA）模块，迭代引导查询关注特定区域。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes基准上分别提升3.4%和1.2% PQ指标，代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模位置信息，P3Former有效解决了点云分割中实例区分困难的问题，为3D场景理解提供新思路。

search_text: Position-Guided Point Cloud Panoptic Segmentation Transformer 位置引导点云全景分割变压器 DEtection TRansformer (DETR) started a trend that uses a group of learnable queries for unified visual perception. This work begins by applying this appealing paradigm to LiDAR-based point cloud segmentation and obtains a simple yet effective baseline. Although the naive adaptation obtains fair results, the instance segmentation performance is noticeably inferior to previous works. By diving into the details, we observe that instances in the sparse point clouds are relatively small to the whole scene and often have similar geometry but lack distinctive appearance for segmentation, which are rare in the image domain. Considering instances in 3D are more featured by their positional information, we emphasize their roles during the modeling and design a robust Mixed-parameterized Positional Embedding (MPE) to guide the segmentation process. It is embedded into backbone features and later guides the mask prediction and query update processes iteratively, leading to Position-Aware Segmentation (PA-Seg) and Masked Focal Attention (MFA). All these designs impel the queries to attend to specific regions and identify various instances. The method, named Position-guided Point cloud Panoptic segmentation transFormer (P3Former), outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by 3.4% and 1.2% PQ on SemanticKITTI and nuScenes benchmark, respectively. The source code and models are available at https://github.com/SmartBot-PJLab/P3Former . authors_text: Amit Raj,Srinivas Kaza,Ben Poole,Michael Niemeyer,Nataniel Ruiz,Ben Mildenhall,Shiran Zada,Kfir Aberman,Michael Rubinstein,Jonathan Barron,Yuanzhen Li,Varun Jampani
title: DreamBooth3D: Subject-Driven Text-to-3D Generation
title_zh: DreamBooth3D：主题驱动的文本到 3D 生成
comment: Project page at https://dreambooth3d.github.io/ Video Summary at https://youtu.be/kKVDrbfvOoA
comments: Project page at https://dreambooth3d.github.io/ Video Summary at https://youtu.be/kKVDrbfvOoA
abstract: We present DreamBooth3D, an approach to personalize text-to-3D generative models from as few as 3-6 casually captured images of a subject. Our approach combines recent advances in personalizing text-to-image models (DreamBooth) with text-to-3D generation (DreamFusion). We find that naively combining these methods fails to yield satisfactory subject-specific 3D assets due to personalized text-to-image models overfitting to the input viewpoints of the subject. We overcome this through a 3-stage optimization strategy where we jointly leverage the 3D consistency of neural radiance fields together with the personalization capability of text-to-image models. Our method can produce high-quality, subject-specific 3D assets with text-driven modifications such as novel poses, colors and attributes that are not seen in any of the input images of the subject.
summary: We present DreamBooth3D, an approach to personalize text-to-3D generative models from as few as 3-6 casually captured images of a subject. Our approach combines recent advances in personalizing text-to-image models (DreamBooth) with text-to-3D generation (DreamFusion). We find that naively combining these methods fails to yield satisfactory subject-specific 3D assets due to personalized text-to-image models overfitting to the input viewpoints of the subject. We overcome this through a 3-stage optimization strategy where we jointly leverage the 3D consistency of neural radiance fields together with the personalization capability of text-to-image models. Our method can produce high-quality, subject-specific 3D assets with text-driven modifications such as novel poses, colors and attributes that are not seen in any of the input images of the subject.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 DreamBooth3D，这是一种从 3-6 个随意拍摄的主题图像中个性化文本到 3D 生成模型的方法。我们的方法将个性化文本到图像模型 (DreamBooth) 的最新进展与文本到 3D 生成 (DreamFusion) 相结合。我们发现，由于个性化文本到图像模型过度拟合主题的输入视点，单纯地组合这些方法无法产生令人满意的特定于主题的 3D 资产。我们通过三阶段优化策略克服了这个问题，其中我们联合利用神经辐射场的 3D 一致性以及文本到图像模型的个性化功能。我们的方法可以通过文本驱动的修改生成高质量、特定于主题的 3D 资产，例如在主题的任何输入图像中都看不到的新颖姿势、颜色和属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DreamBooth3D方法，通过少量图像实现文本驱动的个性化3D生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法结合文本到图像与文本到3D模型时，易因视角过拟合导致生成质量下降。
AI.method: 采用三阶段优化策略，联合神经辐射场的3D一致性与文本到图像模型的个性化能力。
AI.result: 生成高质量个性化3D模型，支持文本驱动的姿势、颜色等新属性生成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决视角过拟合问题，实现文本可控的高质量个性化3D生成。

authors_text: Andong Deng,Taojiannan Yang,Chen Chen
title: A Large-scale Study of Spatiotemporal Representation Learning with a New Benchmark on Action Recognition
title_zh: 以动作识别新基准进行时空表示学习的大规模研究
abstract: The goal of building a benchmark (suite of datasets) is to provide a unified protocol for fair evaluation and thus facilitate the evolution of a specific area. Nonetheless, we point out that existing protocols of action recognition could yield partial evaluations due to several limitations. To comprehensively probe the effectiveness of spatiotemporal representation learning, we introduce BEAR, a new BEnchmark on video Action Recognition. BEAR is a collection of 18 video datasets grouped into 5 categories (anomaly, gesture, daily, sports, and instructional), which covers a diverse set of real-world applications. With BEAR, we thoroughly evaluate 6 common spatiotemporal models pre-trained by both supervised and self-supervised learning. We also report transfer performance via standard finetuning, few-shot finetuning, and unsupervised domain adaptation. Our observation suggests that current state-of-the-art cannot solidly guarantee high performance on datasets close to real-world applications, and we hope BEAR can serve as a fair and challenging evaluation benchmark to gain insights on building next-generation spatiotemporal learners. Our dataset, code, and models are released at: https://github.com/AndongDeng/BEAR
summary: The goal of building a benchmark (suite of datasets) is to provide a unified protocol for fair evaluation and thus facilitate the evolution of a specific area. Nonetheless, we point out that existing protocols of action recognition could yield partial evaluations due to several limitations. To comprehensively probe the effectiveness of spatiotemporal representation learning, we introduce BEAR, a new BEnchmark on video Action Recognition. BEAR is a collection of 18 video datasets grouped into 5 categories (anomaly, gesture, daily, sports, and instructional), which covers a diverse set of real-world applications. With BEAR, we thoroughly evaluate 6 common spatiotemporal models pre-trained by both supervised and self-supervised learning. We also report transfer performance via standard finetuning, few-shot finetuning, and unsupervised domain adaptation. Our observation suggests that current state-of-the-art cannot solidly guarantee high performance on datasets close to real-world applications, and we hope BEAR can serve as a fair and challenging evaluation benchmark to gain insights on building next-generation spatiotemporal learners. Our dataset, code, and models are released at: https://github.com/AndongDeng/BEAR
abstract_zh: 建立基准（数据集）的目标是为公平评估提供统一的协议，从而促进特定领域的发展。尽管如此，我们指出，由于存在一些局限性，现有的行为识别协议可能会产生部分评估。为了全面探讨时空表示学习的有效性，我们引入了 BEAR，这是视频动作识别的新基准。 BEAR 是 18 个视频数据集的集合，分为 5 个类别（异常、手势、日常、运动和教学），涵盖了各种现实世界的应用程序。通过 BEAR，我们全面评估了通过监督学习和自监督学习预训练的 6 种常见时空模型。我们还通过标准微调、小样本微调和无监督域适应来报告传输性能。我们的观察表明，当前最先进的技术无法可靠地保证接近实际应用的数据集的高性能，我们希望 BEAR 能够作为一个公平且具有挑战性的评估基准，以获得构建下一代时空学习器的见解。我们的数据集、代码和模型发布于：https://github.com/AndongDeng/BEAR

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEAR基准测试集，包含18个视频数据集，用于全面评估时空表示学习在动作识别中的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有动作识别评估协议存在局限性，无法全面反映模型在真实场景中的表现，需构建更全面的基准测试集。
AI.method: 构建涵盖异常、手势、日常、运动和教学场景的5类18个数据集，并评估6种监督与自监督预训练模型在微调、少样本微调和无监督域适应下的性能。
AI.result: 当前最先进的模型在接近真实应用的数据集上表现不稳定，BEAR基准测试集可有效揭示模型性能差距。
AI.conclusion: BEAR为下一代时空学习模型提供了公平且具有挑战性的评估基准，推动该领域研究发展。

search_text: A Large-scale Study of Spatiotemporal Representation Learning with a New Benchmark on Action Recognition 以动作识别新基准进行时空表示学习的大规模研究 The goal of building a benchmark (suite of datasets) is to provide a unified protocol for fair evaluation and thus facilitate the evolution of a specific area. Nonetheless, we point out that existing protocols of action recognition could yield partial evaluations due to several limitations. To comprehensively probe the effectiveness of spatiotemporal representation learning, we introduce BEAR, a new BEnchmark on video Action Recognition. BEAR is a collection of 18 video datasets grouped into 5 categories (anomaly, gesture, daily, sports, and instructional), which covers a diverse set of real-world applications. With BEAR, we thoroughly evaluate 6 common spatiotemporal models pre-trained by both supervised and self-supervised learning. We also report transfer performance via standard finetuning, few-shot finetuning, and unsupervised domain adaptation. Our observation suggests that current state-of-the-art cannot solidly guarantee high performance on datasets close to real-world applications, and we hope BEAR can serve as a fair and challenging evaluation benchmark to gain insights on building next-generation spatiotemporal learners. Our dataset, code, and models are released at: https://github.com/AndongDeng/BEAR 建立基准（数据集）的目标是为公平评估提供统一的协议，从而促进特定领域的发展。尽管如此，我们指出，由于存在一些局限性，现有的行为识别协议可能会产生部分评估。为了全面探讨时空表示学习的有效性，我们引入了 BEAR，这是视频动作识别的新基准。 BEAR 是 18 个视频数据集的集合，分为 5 个类别（异常、手势、日常、运动和教学），涵盖了各种现实世界的应用程序。通过 BEAR，我们全面评估了通过监督学习和自监督学习预训练的 6 种常见时空模型。我们还通过标准微调、小样本微调和无监督域适应来报告传输性能。我们的观察表明，当前最先进的技术无法可靠地保证接近实际应用的数据集的高性能，我们希望 BEAR 能够作为一个公平且具有挑战性的评估基准，以获得构建下一代时空学习器的见解。我们的数据集、代码和模型发布于：https://github.com/AndongDeng/BEAR 本文提出BEAR基准测试集，包含18个视频数据集，用于全面评估时空表示学习在动作识别中的效果。 Andong Deng,Taojiannan Yang,Chen Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Jeya Maria Jose Valanarasu,Rahul Garg,Andeep Toor,Xin Tong,Weijuan Xi,Andreas Lugmayr,Vishal M. Patel,Anne Menini
title: ReBotNet: Fast Real-time Video Enhancement
title_zh: ReBotNet：快速实时视频增强
abstract: Most video restoration networks are slow, have high computational load, and can't be used for real-time video enhancement. In this work, we design an efficient and fast framework to perform real-time video enhancement for practical use-cases like live video calls and video streams. Our proposed method, called Recurrent Bottleneck Mixer Network (ReBotNet), employs a dual-branch framework. The first branch learns spatio-temporal features by tokenizing the input frames along the spatial and temporal dimensions using a ConvNext-based encoder and processing these abstract tokens using a bottleneck mixer. To further improve temporal consistency, the second branch employs a mixer directly on tokens extracted from individual frames. A common decoder then merges the features form the two branches to predict the enhanced frame. In addition, we propose a recurrent training approach where the last frame's prediction is leveraged to efficiently enhance the current frame while improving temporal consistency. To evaluate our method, we curate two new datasets that emulate real-world video call and streaming scenarios, and show extensive results on multiple datasets where ReBotNet outperforms existing approaches with lower computations, reduced memory requirements, and faster inference time.
summary: Most video restoration networks are slow, have high computational load, and can't be used for real-time video enhancement. In this work, we design an efficient and fast framework to perform real-time video enhancement for practical use-cases like live video calls and video streams. Our proposed method, called Recurrent Bottleneck Mixer Network (ReBotNet), employs a dual-branch framework. The first branch learns spatio-temporal features by tokenizing the input frames along the spatial and temporal dimensions using a ConvNext-based encoder and processing these abstract tokens using a bottleneck mixer. To further improve temporal consistency, the second branch employs a mixer directly on tokens extracted from individual frames. A common decoder then merges the features form the two branches to predict the enhanced frame. In addition, we propose a recurrent training approach where the last frame's prediction is leveraged to efficiently enhance the current frame while improving temporal consistency. To evaluate our method, we curate two new datasets that emulate real-world video call and streaming scenarios, and show extensive results on multiple datasets where ReBotNet outperforms existing approaches with lower computations, reduced memory requirements, and faster inference time.
abstract_zh: 大多数视频恢复网络速度慢、计算负载高，并且不能用于实时视频增强。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个高效、快速的框架来为实时视频通话和视频流等实际用例执行实时视频增强。我们提出的方法称为循环瓶颈混合器网络（ReBotNet），采用双分支框架。第一个分支通过使用基于 ConvNext 的编码器沿空间和时间维度标记输入帧并使用瓶颈混合器处理这些抽象标记来学习时空特征。为了进一步提高时间一致性，第二个分支直接对从各个帧提取的令牌使用混合器。然后，公共解码器合并两个分支的特征以预测增强帧。此外，我们提出了一种循环训练方法，其中利用最后一帧的预测来有效增强当前帧，同时提高时间一致性。为了评估我们的方法，我们策划了两个模拟真实视频通话和流媒体场景的新数据集，并在多个数据集上显示了广泛的结果，其中 ReBotNet 凭借更低的计算量、更少的内存需求和更快的推理时间优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReBotNet框架，解决现有视频增强方法计算量大、无法实时处理的问题，实现高效实时视频增强。
AI.motivation: 现有视频修复网络存在计算负载高、速度慢的缺陷，难以满足视频通话等实时应用场景需求。
AI.method: 设计双分支架构：1) 基于ConvNext编码器的时空特征提取分支，采用瓶颈混合器处理抽象token；2) 单帧token直接处理分支。结合递归训练策略，利用前帧预测结果提升当前帧增强效果。
AI.result: 构建两个真实场景数据集，在多个基准数据集上验证ReBotNet在保持性能的同时，计算量降低、内存占用减少且推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: ReBotNet通过创新双分支架构和递归训练策略，在保证视频增强质量的前提下显著提升了处理效率，适用于实时视频应用场景。

authors_text: Nathan Mankovich,Tolga Birdal
title: Chordal Averaging on Flag Manifolds and Its Applications
title_zh: 标志流形的弦平均及其应用
abstract: This paper presents a new, provably-convergent algorithm for computing the flag-mean and flag-median of a set of points on a flag manifold under the chordal metric. The flag manifold is a mathematical space consisting of flags, which are sequences of nested subspaces of a vector space that increase in dimension. The flag manifold is a superset of a wide range of known matrix spaces, including Stiefel and Grassmanians, making it a general object that is useful in a wide variety computer vision problems. To tackle the challenge of computing first order flag statistics, we first transform the problem into one that involves auxiliary variables constrained to the Stiefel manifold. The Stiefel manifold is a space of orthogonal frames, and leveraging the numerical stability and efficiency of Stiefel-manifold optimization enables us to compute the flag-mean effectively. Through a series of experiments, we show the competence of our method in Grassmann and rotation averaging, as well as principal component analysis. We release our source code under https://github.com/nmank/FlagAveraging.
summary: This paper presents a new, provably-convergent algorithm for computing the flag-mean and flag-median of a set of points on a flag manifold under the chordal metric. The flag manifold is a mathematical space consisting of flags, which are sequences of nested subspaces of a vector space that increase in dimension. The flag manifold is a superset of a wide range of known matrix spaces, including Stiefel and Grassmanians, making it a general object that is useful in a wide variety computer vision problems. To tackle the challenge of computing first order flag statistics, we first transform the problem into one that involves auxiliary variables constrained to the Stiefel manifold. The Stiefel manifold is a space of orthogonal frames, and leveraging the numerical stability and efficiency of Stiefel-manifold optimization enables us to compute the flag-mean effectively. Through a series of experiments, we show the competence of our method in Grassmann and rotation averaging, as well as principal component analysis. We release our source code under https://github.com/nmank/FlagAveraging.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的可证明收敛的算法，用于计算弦度量下标志流形上一组点的标志均值和标志中位数。标志流形是由标志组成的数学空间，标志是维度增加的向量空间的嵌套子空间的序列。标志流形是各种已知矩阵空间（包括 Stiefel 和 Grassmanians）的超集，使其成为可用于各种计算机视觉问题的通用对象。为了解决计算一阶标志统计量的挑战，我们首先将问题转化为涉及约束到 Stiefel 流形的辅助变量的问题。 Stiefel 流形是一个正交框架空间，利用 Stiefel 流形优化的数值稳定性和效率使我们能够有效地计算标志均值。通过一系列的实验，我们展示了我们的方法在格拉斯曼和旋转平均以及主成分分析中的能力。我们在 https://github.com/nmank/FlagAveraging 下发布了源代码。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的算法，用于在标志流形上计算标志均值和中位数，并应用于计算机视觉问题。
AI.motivation: 标志流形作为多种矩阵空间的超集，在计算机视觉中有广泛应用，但计算其一阶统计量（如均值、中位数）存在挑战，需要一种有效且稳定的算法。
AI.method: 通过将问题转化为辅助变量受限于Stiefel流形的优化问题，利用Stiefel流形优化的数值稳定性和效率来有效计算标志均值。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在Grassmann和旋转平均以及主成分分析中表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种新的、可证明收敛的算法，有效解决了标志流形上统计计算的挑战，并在多个应用中验证了其有效性。

conclusion: 提出了一种新的、可证明收敛的算法，有效解决了标志流形上统计计算的挑战，并在多个应用中验证了其有效性。
search_text: Chordal Averaging on Flag Manifolds and Its Applications 标志流形的弦平均及其应用 This paper presents a new, provably-convergent algorithm for computing the flag-mean and flag-median of a set of points on a flag manifold under the chordal metric. The flag manifold is a mathematical space consisting of flags, which are sequences of nested subspaces of a vector space that increase in dimension. The flag manifold is a superset of a wide range of known matrix spaces, including Stiefel and Grassmanians, making it a general object that is useful in a wide variety computer vision problems. To tackle the challenge of computing first order flag statistics, we first transform the problem into one that involves auxiliary variables constrained to the Stiefel manifold. The Stiefel manifold is a space of orthogonal frames, and leveraging the numerical stability and efficiency of Stiefel-manifold optimization enables us to compute the flag-mean effectively. Through a series of experiments, we show the competence of our method in Grassmann and rotation averaging, as well as principal component analysis. We release our source code under https://github.com/nmank/FlagAveraging. 本文提出了一种新的可证明收敛的算法，用于计算弦度量下标志流形上一组点的标志均值和标志中位数。标志流形是由标志组成的数学空间，标志是维度增加的向量空间的嵌套子空间的序列。标志流形是各种已知矩阵空间（包括 Stiefel 和 Grassmanians）的超集，使其成为可用于各种计算机视觉问题的通用对象。为了解决计算一阶标志统计量的挑战，我们首先将问题转化为涉及约束到 Stiefel 流形的辅助变量的问题。 Stiefel 流形是一个正交框架空间，利用 Stiefel 流形优化的数值稳定性和效率使我们能够有效地计算标志均值。通过一系列的实验，我们展示了我们的方法在格拉斯曼和旋转平均以及主成分分析中的能力。我们在 https://github.com/nmank/FlagAveraging 下发布了源代码。 提出一种新的算法，用于在标志流形上计算标志均值和中位数，并应用于计算机视觉问题。 Nathan Mankovich,Tolga Birdal cs.CV,cs.LG,math.DG,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Ananta R. Bhattarai,Matthias Nießner,Artem Sevastopolsky
title: TriPlaneNet: An Encoder for EG3D Inversion
title_zh: TriPlaneNet：EG3D 反演的编码器
abstract: Recent progress in NeRF-based GANs has introduced a number of approaches for high-resolution and high-fidelity generative modeling of human heads with a possibility for novel view rendering. At the same time, one must solve an inverse problem to be able to re-render or modify an existing image or video. Despite the success of universal optimization-based methods for 2D GAN inversion, those applied to 3D GANs may fail to extrapolate the result onto the novel view, whereas optimization-based 3D GAN inversion methods are time-consuming and can require at least several minutes per image. Fast encoder-based techniques, such as those developed for StyleGAN, may also be less appealing due to the lack of identity preservation. Our work introduces a fast technique that bridges the gap between the two approaches by directly utilizing the tri-plane representation presented for the EG3D generative model. In particular, we build upon a feed-forward convolutional encoder for the latent code and extend it with a fully-convolutional predictor of tri-plane numerical offsets. The renderings are similar in quality to the ones produced by optimization-based techniques and outperform the ones by encoder-based methods. As we empirically prove, this is a consequence of directly operating in the tri-plane space, not in the GAN parameter space, while making use of an encoder-based trainable approach. Finally, we demonstrate significantly more correct embedding of a face image in 3D than for all the baselines, further strengthened by a probably symmetric prior enabled during training.
summary: Recent progress in NeRF-based GANs has introduced a number of approaches for high-resolution and high-fidelity generative modeling of human heads with a possibility for novel view rendering. At the same time, one must solve an inverse problem to be able to re-render or modify an existing image or video. Despite the success of universal optimization-based methods for 2D GAN inversion, those applied to 3D GANs may fail to extrapolate the result onto the novel view, whereas optimization-based 3D GAN inversion methods are time-consuming and can require at least several minutes per image. Fast encoder-based techniques, such as those developed for StyleGAN, may also be less appealing due to the lack of identity preservation. Our work introduces a fast technique that bridges the gap between the two approaches by directly utilizing the tri-plane representation presented for the EG3D generative model. In particular, we build upon a feed-forward convolutional encoder for the latent code and extend it with a fully-convolutional predictor of tri-plane numerical offsets. The renderings are similar in quality to the ones produced by optimization-based techniques and outperform the ones by encoder-based methods. As we empirically prove, this is a consequence of directly operating in the tri-plane space, not in the GAN parameter space, while making use of an encoder-based trainable approach. Finally, we demonstrate significantly more correct embedding of a face image in 3D than for all the baselines, further strengthened by a probably symmetric prior enabled during training.
abstract_zh: 基于 NeRF 的 GAN 的最新进展引入了多种高分辨率和高保真度的人体头部生成建模方法，并有可能实现新颖的视图渲染。同时，必须解决逆问题才能重新渲染或修改现有图像或视频。尽管基于优化的通用方法在 2D GAN 反演方面取得了成功，但应用于 3D GAN 的方法可能无法将结果外推到新颖的视图上，而基于优化的 3D GAN 反演方法非常耗时，每个图像可能至少需要几分钟。基于快速编码器的技术，例如为 StyleGAN 开发的技术，由于缺乏身份保存，也可能不太有吸引力。我们的工作引入了一种快速技术，通过直接利用为 EG3D 生成模型提供的三平面表示来弥合两种方法之间的差距。特别是，我们构建了潜在代码的前馈卷积编码器，并用三平面数值偏移的全卷积预测器对其进行了扩展。渲染的质量与基于优化的技术产生的渲染相似，并且优于基于编码器的方法产生的渲染。正如我们凭经验证明的，这是直接在三平面空间而不是 GAN 参数空间中操作，同时使用基于编码器的可训练方法的结果。最后，我们证明了 3D 中人脸图像的嵌入比所有基线都更加正确，并通过训练期间启用的可能对称先验进一步加强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TriPlaneNet，一种用于EG3D生成对抗网络（GAN）的快速编码器，解决3D人脸图像的逆向生成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于优化的3D GAN逆向方法计算耗时且无法泛化到新视角，而基于编码器的方法在身份保持上表现不足，需寻找更高效且保真的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用EG3D的三平面表示，构建前馈卷积编码器预测潜在码，并扩展全卷积网络预测三平面数值偏移，直接操作三平面空间而非GAN参数空间。
AI.result: 生成质量优于编码器基线，与优化方法相当；在人脸3D嵌入任务中显著优于所有对比方法，且训练时引入对称先验增强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TriPlaneNet通过直接操作三平面空间，在速度与重建保真度间取得平衡，为高效3D GAN逆向提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mannat Singh,Quentin Duval,Kalyan Vasudev Alwala,Haoqi Fan,Vaibhav Aggarwal,Aaron Adcock,Armand Joulin,Piotr Dollár,Christoph Feichtenhofer,Ross Girshick,Rohit Girdhar,Ishan Misra
title: The effectiveness of MAE pre-pretraining for billion-scale pretraining
title_zh: MAE预训练对于亿级预训练的有效性
abstract: This paper revisits the standard pretrain-then-finetune paradigm used in computer vision for visual recognition tasks. Typically, state-of-the-art foundation models are pretrained using large scale (weakly) supervised datasets with billions of images. We introduce an additional pre-pretraining stage that is simple and uses the self-supervised MAE technique to initialize the model. While MAE has only been shown to scale with the size of models, we find that it scales with the size of the training dataset as well. Thus, our MAE-based pre-pretraining scales with both model and data size making it applicable for training foundation models. Pre-pretraining consistently improves both the model convergence and the downstream transfer performance across a range of model scales (millions to billions of parameters), and dataset sizes (millions to billions of images). We measure the effectiveness of pre-pretraining on 10 different visual recognition tasks spanning image classification, video recognition, object detection, low-shot classification and zero-shot recognition. Our largest model achieves new state-of-the-art results on iNaturalist-18 (91.7%), ImageNet-ReaL (91.1%), 1-shot ImageNet-1k (63.6%), and zero-shot transfer on Food-101 (96.2%). Our study reveals that model initialization plays a significant role, even for web-scale pretraining with billions of images, and our models are available publicly.
summary: This paper revisits the standard pretrain-then-finetune paradigm used in computer vision for visual recognition tasks. Typically, state-of-the-art foundation models are pretrained using large scale (weakly) supervised datasets with billions of images. We introduce an additional pre-pretraining stage that is simple and uses the self-supervised MAE technique to initialize the model. While MAE has only been shown to scale with the size of models, we find that it scales with the size of the training dataset as well. Thus, our MAE-based pre-pretraining scales with both model and data size making it applicable for training foundation models. Pre-pretraining consistently improves both the model convergence and the downstream transfer performance across a range of model scales (millions to billions of parameters), and dataset sizes (millions to billions of images). We measure the effectiveness of pre-pretraining on 10 different visual recognition tasks spanning image classification, video recognition, object detection, low-shot classification and zero-shot recognition. Our largest model achieves new state-of-the-art results on iNaturalist-18 (91.7%), ImageNet-ReaL (91.1%), 1-shot ImageNet-1k (63.6%), and zero-shot transfer on Food-101 (96.2%). Our study reveals that model initialization plays a significant role, even for web-scale pretraining with billions of images, and our models are available publicly.
abstract_zh: 本文重新审视了计算机视觉中用于视觉识别任务的标准预训练然​​后微调范例。通常，最先进的基础模型是使用包含数十亿图像的大规模（弱）监督数据集进行预训练的。我们引入了一个额外的预训练阶段，该阶段很简单，并使用自监督 MAE 技术来初始化模型。虽然 MAE 仅随着模型的大小而扩展，但我们发现它也随着训练数据集的大小而扩展。因此，我们基于 MAE 的预训练可扩展模型和数据大小，使其适用于训练基础模型。预训练持续改善了一系列模型规模（数百万到数十亿参数）和数据集大小（数百万到数十亿图像）的模型收敛和下游传输性能。我们测量了 10 种不同视觉识别任务上预训练的有效性，涵盖图像分类、视频识别、目标检测、低样本分类和零样本识别。我们最大的模型在 iNaturalist-18 (91.7%)、ImageNet-ReaL (91.1%)、1-shot ImageNet-1k (63.6%) 上实现了新的最先进结果，在 Food-101 (96.2%) 上实现了零样本传输。我们的研究表明，模型初始化发挥着重要作用，即使对于数十亿图像的网络规模预训练也是如此，而且我们的模型是公开可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在大规模视觉基础模型预训练前增加基于MAE的预预训练阶段，以提升模型收敛性和下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 传统预训练-微调范式依赖大规模监督数据，而MAE等自监督方法在模型规模扩展时效果显著，但其数据规模影响未被充分研究。
AI.method: 在标准预训练前加入MAE自监督预预训练阶段，通过同时扩展模型和数据规模进行联合优化，并在多种视觉任务上验证效果。
AI.result: 在10种视觉任务中取得新SOTA，如iNaturalist-18达91.7%，零样本Food-101达96.2%，且模型收敛速度和迁移性能全面提升。
AI.conclusion: 模型初始化对大规模预训练至关重要，MAE预预训练能有效提升基础模型性能，且适用于不同规模的模型和数据集。

We measure the effectiveness of pre-pretraining on 10 different visual recognition tasks spanning image classification, video recognition, object detection, low-shot classification and zero-shot recognition. Our largest model achieves new state-of-the-art results on iNaturalist-18 (91.7%), ImageNet-ReaL (91.1%), 1-shot ImageNet-1k (63.6%), and zero-shot transfer on Food-101 (96.2%). Our study reveals that model initialization plays a significant role, even for web-scale pretraining with billions of images, and our models are available publicly. 本文重新审视了计算机视觉中用于视觉识别任务的标准预训练然​​后微调范例。通常，最先进的基础模型是使用包含数十亿图像的大规模（弱）监督数据集进行预训练的。我们引入了一个额外的预训练阶段，该阶段很简单，并使用自监督 MAE 技术来初始化模型。虽然 MAE 仅随着模型的大小而扩展，但我们发现它也随着训练数据集的大小而扩展。因此，我们基于 MAE 的预训练可扩展模型和数据大小，使其适用于训练基础模型。预训练持续改善了一系列模型规模（数百万到数十亿参数）和数据集大小（数百万到数十亿图像）的模型收敛和下游传输性能。我们测量了 10 种不同视觉识别任务上预训练的有效性，涵盖图像分类、视频识别、目标检测、低样本分类和零样本识别。我们最大的模型在 iNaturalist-18 (91.7%)、ImageNet-ReaL (91.1%)、1-shot ImageNet-1k (63.6%) 上实现了新的最先进结果，在 Food-101 (96.2%) 上实现了零样本传输。我们的研究表明，模型初始化发挥着重要作用，即使对于数十亿图像的网络规模预训练也是如此，而且我们的模型是公开可用的。 本文提出在大规模视觉基础模型预训练前增加基于MAE的预预训练阶段，以提升模型收敛性和下游任务表现。 Mannat Singh,Quentin Duval,Kalyan Vasudev Alwala,Haoqi Fan,Vaibhav Aggarwal,Aaron Adcock,Armand Joulin,Piotr Dollár,Christoph Feichtenhofer,Ross Girshick,Rohit Girdhar,Ishan Misra cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ziqi Huang,Tianxing Wu,Yuming Jiang,Kelvin C. K. Chan,Ziwei Liu
title: ReVersion: Diffusion-Based Relation Inversion from Images
title_zh: ReVersion：基于扩散的图像关系反演
comment: SIGGRAPH Asia (Conference Track) 2024, Project page: https://ziqihuangg.github.io/projects/reversion.html Code: https://github.com/ziqihuangg/ReVersion
comments: SIGGRAPH Asia (Conference Track) 2024, Project page: https://ziqihuangg.github.io/projects/reversion.html Code: https://github.com/ziqihuangg/ReVersion
abstract: Diffusion models gain increasing popularity for their generative capabilities. Recently, there have been surging needs to generate customized images by inverting diffusion models from exemplar images, and existing inversion methods mainly focus on capturing object appearances (i.e., the "look"). However, how to invert object relations, another important pillar in the visual world, remains unexplored. In this work, we propose the Relation Inversion task, which aims to learn a specific relation (represented as "relation prompt") from exemplar images. Specifically, we learn a relation prompt with a frozen pre-trained text-to-image diffusion model. The learned relation prompt can then be applied to generate relation-specific images with new objects, backgrounds, and styles. To tackle the Relation Inversion task, we propose the ReVersion Framework. Specifically, we propose a novel "relation-steering contrastive learning" scheme to steer the relation prompt towards relation-dense regions, and disentangle it away from object appearances. We further devise "relation-focal importance sampling" to emphasize high-level interactions over low-level appearances (e.g., texture, color). To comprehensively evaluate this new task, we contribute the ReVersion Benchmark, which provides various exemplar images with diverse relations. Extensive experiments validate the superiority of our approach over existing methods across a wide range of visual relations. Our proposed task and method could be good inspirations for future research in various domains like generative inversion, few-shot learning, and visual relation detection.
summary: Diffusion models gain increasing popularity for their generative capabilities. Recently, there have been surging needs to generate customized images by inverting diffusion models from exemplar images, and existing inversion methods mainly focus on capturing object appearances (i.e., the "look"). However, how to invert object relations, another important pillar in the visual world, remains unexplored. In this work, we propose the Relation Inversion task, which aims to learn a specific relation (represented as "relation prompt") from exemplar images. Specifically, we learn a relation prompt with a frozen pre-trained text-to-image diffusion model. The learned relation prompt can then be applied to generate relation-specific images with new objects, backgrounds, and styles. To tackle the Relation Inversion task, we propose the ReVersion Framework. Specifically, we propose a novel "relation-steering contrastive learning" scheme to steer the relation prompt towards relation-dense regions, and disentangle it away from object appearances. We further devise "relation-focal importance sampling" to emphasize high-level interactions over low-level appearances (e.g., texture, color). To comprehensively evaluate this new task, we contribute the ReVersion Benchmark, which provides various exemplar images with diverse relations. Extensive experiments validate the superiority of our approach over existing methods across a wide range of visual relations. Our proposed task and method could be good inspirations for future research in various domains like generative inversion, few-shot learning, and visual relation detection.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型因其生成能力而越来越受欢迎。最近，通过从示例图像反演扩散模型来生成定制图像的需求不断增加，而现有的反演方法主要集中在捕捉对象外观（即“外观”）。然而，如何反转视觉世界的另一个重要支柱——物体关系，仍有待探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了关系反转任务，其目的是从示例图像中学习特定的关系（表示为“关系提示”）。具体来说，我们使用冻结的预训练文本到图像扩散模型来学习关系提示。然后可以应用学习到的关系提示来生成具有新对象、背景和样式的特定于关系的图像。为了解决关系反转任务，我们提出了反转框架。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的“关系引导对比学习”方案，将关系提示引导到关系密集区域，并将其与对象外观分开。我们进一步设计了“关系焦点重要性采样”来强调高级交互而不是低级外观（例如纹理、颜色）。为了全面评估这项新任务，我们贡献了 ReVersion Benchmark，它提供了具有不同关系的各种示例图像。大量的实验验证了我们的方法在广泛的视觉关系上相对于现有方法的优越性。我们提出的任务和方法可以为生成反演、小样本学习和视觉关系检测等各个领域的未来研究提供很好的启发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReVersion框架，通过扩散模型从图像中学习关系提示（relation prompt），以生成具有特定对象关系的新图像。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型逆向方法仅关注物体外观，而忽视了视觉世界中物体关系这一关键要素，需探索如何从图像中学习并生成特定关系的图像。
AI.method: 提出关系引导对比学习方案，引导关系提示聚焦于关系密集区域并分离物体外观；设计关系焦点重要性采样，强调高层交互而非低级特征。构建ReVersion基准测试集验证方法。
AI.result: 在多种视觉关系任务中优于现有方法，基准测试验证了方法的有效性，关系提示可应用于新对象、背景和风格的图像生成。
AI.conclusion: 该任务和方法为生成逆向、少样本学习和视觉关系检测等领域的未来研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Gaia Belardinelli,Thomas Bolander
title: Attention! Dynamic Epistemic Logic Models of (In)attentive Agents
title_zh: 注意力！ （不）注意主体的动态认知逻辑模型
abstract: Attention is the crucial cognitive ability that limits and selects what information we observe. Previous work by Bolander et al. (2016) proposes a model of attention based on dynamic epistemic logic (DEL) where agents are either fully attentive or not attentive at all. While introducing the realistic feature that inattentive agents believe nothing happens, the model does not represent the most essential aspect of attention: its selectivity. Here, we propose a generalization that allows for paying attention to subsets of atomic formulas. We introduce the corresponding logic for propositional attention, and show its axiomatization to be sound and complete. We then extend the framework to account for inattentive agents that, instead of assuming nothing happens, may default to a specific truth-value of what they failed to attend to (a sort of prior concerning the unattended atoms). This feature allows for a more cognitively plausible representation of the inattentional blindness phenomenon, where agents end up with false beliefs due to their failure to attend to conspicuous but unexpected events. Both versions of the model define attention-based learning through appropriate DEL event models based on a few and clear edge principles. While the size of such event models grow exponentially both with the number of agents and the number of atoms, we introduce a new logical language for describing event models syntactically and show that using this language our event models can be represented linearly in the number of agents and atoms. Furthermore, representing our event models using this language is achieved by a straightforward formalisation of the aforementioned edge principles.
summary: Attention is the crucial cognitive ability that limits and selects what information we observe. Previous work by Bolander et al. (2016) proposes a model of attention based on dynamic epistemic logic (DEL) where agents are either fully attentive or not attentive at all. While introducing the realistic feature that inattentive agents believe nothing happens, the model does not represent the most essential aspect of attention: its selectivity. Here, we propose a generalization that allows for paying attention to subsets of atomic formulas. We introduce the corresponding logic for propositional attention, and show its axiomatization to be sound and complete. We then extend the framework to account for inattentive agents that, instead of assuming nothing happens, may default to a specific truth-value of what they failed to attend to (a sort of prior concerning the unattended atoms). This feature allows for a more cognitively plausible representation of the inattentional blindness phenomenon, where agents end up with false beliefs due to their failure to attend to conspicuous but unexpected events. Both versions of the model define attention-based learning through appropriate DEL event models based on a few and clear edge principles. While the size of such event models grow exponentially both with the number of agents and the number of atoms, we introduce a new logical language for describing event models syntactically and show that using this language our event models can be represented linearly in the number of agents and atoms. Furthermore, representing our event models using this language is achieved by a straightforward formalisation of the aforementioned edge principles.
abstract_zh: 注意力是一种至关重要的认知能力，它限制和选择我们观察到的信息。 Bolander 等人之前的工作。 （2016）提出了一种基于动态认知逻辑（DEL）的注意力模型，其中主体要么完全注意，要么根本不注意。虽然引入了不专心的代理人认为什么也没有发生的现实特征，但该模型并没有代表注意力最本质的方面：它的选择性。在这里，我们提出了一种概括，可以关注原子公式的子集。我们引入了命题注意力的相应逻辑，并证明其公理化是合理和完整的。然后，我们扩展框架以考虑不专心的代理，这些代理不是假设什么也没有发生，而是可能默认为他们未能关注的特定真值（一种关于无人看管原子的先验）。这一功能可以在认知上更合理地描述无意识失明现象，在这种现象中，代理人由于未能关注引人注目但意想不到的事件而最终产生错误的信念。该模型的两个版本都通过基于一些明确的边缘原则的适当 DEL 事件模型定义了基于注意力的学习。虽然此类事件模型的大小随着主体数量和原子数量呈指数增长，但我们引入了一种新的逻辑语言来从语法上描述事件模型，并表明使用这种语言我们的事件模型可以用主体和原子数量线性表示。此外，使用这种语言表示我们的事件模型是通过上述边缘原则的简单形式化来实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态认识逻辑（DEL）的注意力模型，改进了原有模型对注意力选择性及非注意盲视现象的描述，并引入新的逻辑语言以高效表示事件模型。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力模型无法准确刻画注意力的选择性特征，且未能解释非注意盲视现象中因忽略显著事件导致错误信念的问题。
AI.method: 扩展动态认识逻辑框架，允许代理关注原子公式的子集；引入命题注意力逻辑并证明其完备性；设计默认真值机制模拟非注意盲视；提出新的语法语言实现事件模型的线性表示。
AI.result: 构建了支持选择性注意力的逻辑系统，实现了对非注意盲视现象的认知可解释建模，并通过新语言将事件模型规模从指数级降至线性级。
AI.conclusion: 新模型在认知合理性与计算效率上均优于传统方法，为注意力机制的逻辑建模提供了更精确的理论工具与表达框架。

This feature allows for a more cognitively plausible representation of the inattentional blindness phenomenon, where agents end up with false beliefs due to their failure to attend to conspicuous but unexpected events. Both versions of the model define attention-based learning through appropriate DEL event models based on a few and clear edge principles. While the size of such event models grow exponentially both with the number of agents and the number of atoms, we introduce a new logical language for describing event models syntactically and show that using this language our event models can be represented linearly in the number of agents and atoms. Furthermore, representing our event models using this language is achieved by a straightforward formalisation of the aforementioned edge principles. 注意力是一种至关重要的认知能力，它限制和选择我们观察到的信息。 Bolander 等人之前的工作。 （2016）提出了一种基于动态认知逻辑（DEL）的注意力模型，其中主体要么完全注意，要么根本不注意。虽然引入了不专心的代理人认为什么也没有发生的现实特征，但该模型并没有代表注意力最本质的方面：它的选择性。在这里，我们提出了一种概括，可以关注原子公式的子集。我们引入了命题注意力的相应逻辑，并证明其公理化是合理和完整的。然后，我们扩展框架以考虑不专心的代理，这些代理不是假设什么也没有发生，而是可能默认为他们未能关注的特定真值（一种关于无人看管原子的先验）。这一功能可以在认知上更合理地描述无意识失明现象，在这种现象中，代理人由于未能关注引人注目但意想不到的事件而最终产生错误的信念。该模型的两个版本都通过基于一些明确的边缘原则的适当 DEL 事件模型定义了基于注意力的学习。虽然此类事件模型的大小随着主体数量和原子数量呈指数增长，但我们引入了一种新的逻辑语言来从语法上描述事件模型，并表明使用这种语言我们的事件模型可以用主体和原子数量线性表示。此外，使用这种语言表示我们的事件模型是通过上述边缘原则的简单形式化来实现的。 本文提出了一种基于动态认识逻辑（DEL）的注意力模型，改进了原有模型对注意力选择性及非注意盲视现象的描述，并引入新的逻辑语言以高效表示事件模型。 Gaia Belardinelli,Thomas Bolander cs.AI

authors_text: Jiehui Zhou,Xumeng Wang,Jie Wang,Hui Ye,Huanliang Wang,Zihan Zhou,Dongming Han,Haochao Ying,Jian Wu,Wei Chen
title: FraudAuditor: A Visual Analytics Approach for Collusive Fraud in Health Insurance
title_zh: FraudAuditor：健康保险中串通欺诈的可视化分析方法
abstract: Collusive fraud, in which multiple fraudsters collude to defraud health insurance funds, threatens the operation of the healthcare system. However, existing statistical and machine learning-based methods have limited ability to detect fraud in the scenario of health insurance due to the high similarity of fraudulent behaviors to normal medical visits and the lack of labeled data. To ensure the accuracy of the detection results, expert knowledge needs to be integrated with the fraud detection process. By working closely with health insurance audit experts, we propose FraudAuditor, a three-stage visual analytics approach to collusive fraud detection in health insurance. Specifically, we first allow users to interactively construct a co-visit network to holistically model the visit relationships of different patients. Second, an improved community detection algorithm that considers the strength of fraud likelihood is designed to detect suspicious fraudulent groups. Finally, through our visual interface, users can compare, investigate, and verify suspicious patient behavior with tailored visualizations that support different time scales. We conducted case studies in a real-world healthcare scenario, i.e., to help locate the actual fraud group and exclude the false positive group. The results and expert feedback proved the effectiveness and usability of the approach.
summary: Collusive fraud, in which multiple fraudsters collude to defraud health insurance funds, threatens the operation of the healthcare system. However, existing statistical and machine learning-based methods have limited ability to detect fraud in the scenario of health insurance due to the high similarity of fraudulent behaviors to normal medical visits and the lack of labeled data. To ensure the accuracy of the detection results, expert knowledge needs to be integrated with the fraud detection process. By working closely with health insurance audit experts, we propose FraudAuditor, a three-stage visual analytics approach to collusive fraud detection in health insurance. Specifically, we first allow users to interactively construct a co-visit network to holistically model the visit relationships of different patients. Second, an improved community detection algorithm that considers the strength of fraud likelihood is designed to detect suspicious fraudulent groups. Finally, through our visual interface, users can compare, investigate, and verify suspicious patient behavior with tailored visualizations that support different time scales. We conducted case studies in a real-world healthcare scenario, i.e., to help locate the actual fraud group and exclude the false positive group. The results and expert feedback proved the effectiveness and usability of the approach.
abstract_zh: 串通诈骗是指多个诈骗者串通诈骗医保资金，威胁医疗保健系统的运行。然而，由于欺诈行为与正常医疗就诊高度相似且缺乏标记数据，现有基于统计和机器学习的方法在健康保险场景中检测欺诈的能力有限。为了确保检测结果的准确性，需要将专家知识与欺诈检测过程相结合。通过与健康保险审计专家密切合作，我们提出了 FraudAuditor，这是一种三阶段可视化分析方法，用于检测健康保险中的共谋欺诈。具体来说，我们首先允许用户交互式地构建一个共同就诊网络，以整体模拟不同患者的就诊关系。其次，设计了一种考虑欺诈可能性强度的改进社区检测算法，以检测可疑的欺诈群体。最后，通过我们的可视化界面，用户可以通过支持不同时间尺度的定制可视化来比较、调查和验证可疑的患者行为。我们在现实世界的医疗保健场景中进行了案例研究，即帮助定位实际的欺诈群体并排除误报群体。结果和专家反馈证明了该方法的有效性和可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FraudAuditor，一种用于健康保险中合谋欺诈检测的三阶段可视化分析方法。
AI.motivation: 现有统计和机器学习方法因欺诈行为与正常医疗行为高度相似且缺乏标记数据，难以准确检测健康保险欺诈，需结合专家知识提升检测效果。
AI.method: 通过构建患者共访网络、设计考虑欺诈可能性强度的改进社区检测算法，并结合可视化界面支持多时间尺度行为分析与验证。
AI.result: 在真实医疗场景案例研究中成功定位实际欺诈群体并排除误报，结果与专家反馈验证了方法的有效性和可用性。
AI.conclusion: FraudAuditor通过整合专家知识与可视化分析，有效解决了健康保险合谋欺诈检测中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Tongzhou Mu,Hao Su
title: Boosting Reinforcement Learning and Planning with Demonstrations: A Survey
title_zh: 通过演示促进强化学习和规划：一项调查
abstract: Although reinforcement learning has seen tremendous success recently, this kind of trial-and-error learning can be impractical or inefficient in complex environments. The use of demonstrations, on the other hand, enables agents to benefit from expert knowledge rather than having to discover the best action to take through exploration. In this survey, we discuss the advantages of using demonstrations in sequential decision making, various ways to apply demonstrations in learning-based decision making paradigms (for example, reinforcement learning and planning in the learned models), and how to collect the demonstrations in various scenarios. Additionally, we exemplify a practical pipeline for generating and utilizing demonstrations in the recently proposed ManiSkill robot learning benchmark.
summary: Although reinforcement learning has seen tremendous success recently, this kind of trial-and-error learning can be impractical or inefficient in complex environments. The use of demonstrations, on the other hand, enables agents to benefit from expert knowledge rather than having to discover the best action to take through exploration. In this survey, we discuss the advantages of using demonstrations in sequential decision making, various ways to apply demonstrations in learning-based decision making paradigms (for example, reinforcement learning and planning in the learned models), and how to collect the demonstrations in various scenarios. Additionally, we exemplify a practical pipeline for generating and utilizing demonstrations in the recently proposed ManiSkill robot learning benchmark.
abstract_zh: 尽管强化学习最近取得了巨大成功，但这种试错学习在复杂环境中可能不切实际或效率低下。另一方面，使用演示使代理能够从专业知识中受益，而不必通过探索来发现最佳行动。在本次调查中，我们讨论了在顺序决策中使用演示的优点、在基于学习的决策范式中应用演示的各种方法（例如，学习模型中的强化学习和规划）以及如何收集各种场景中的演示。此外，我们还在最近提出的 ManiSkill 机器人学习基准中举例说明了用于生成和利用演示的实用管道。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了如何通过引入专家演示来增强强化学习和规划方法，以提高复杂环境下的决策效率。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖试错机制在复杂环境中效率低下，而专家演示可提供先验知识加速学习过程。
AI.method: 系统梳理了演示在强化学习与模型规划中的应用方式，涵盖数据收集策略及ManiSkill基准的实践流程。
AI.result: 总结了不同场景下演示应用的优劣，验证了结合演示可显著提升学习效率与决策质量。
AI.conclusion: 专家演示是复杂决策问题的关键辅助手段，未来需进一步探索自适应演示生成与多模态数据融合技术。

authors_text: Sandeep Avula,Bogeum Choi,Jaime Arguello
title: Why and When: Understanding System Initiative during Conversational Collaborative Search
title_zh: 原因和时间：了解对话式协作搜索期间的系统主动性
abstract: In the last decade, conversational search has attracted considerable attention. However, most research has focused on systems that can support a \emph{single} searcher. In this paper, we explore how systems can support \emph{multiple} searchers collaborating over an instant messaging platform (i.e., Slack). We present a ``Wizard of Oz'' study in which 27 participant pairs collaborated on three information-seeking tasks over Slack. Participants were unable to search on their own and had to gather information by interacting with a \emph{searchbot} directly from the Slack channel. The role of the searchbot was played by a reference librarian. Conversational search systems must be capable of engaging in \emph{mixed-initiative} interaction by taking and relinquishing control of the conversation to fulfill different objectives. Discourse analysis research suggests that conversational agents can take \emph{two} levels of initiative: dialog- and task-level initiative. Agents take dialog-level initiative to establish mutual belief between agents and task-level initiative to influence the goals of the other agents. During the study, participants were exposed to three experimental conditions in which the searchbot could take different levels of initiative: (1) no initiative, (2) only dialog-level initiative, and (3) both dialog- and task-level initiative. In this paper, we focus on understanding the Wizard's actions. Specifically, we focus on understanding the Wizard's motivations for taking initiative and their rationale for the timing of each intervention. To gain insights about the Wizard's actions, we conducted a stimulated recall interview with the Wizard. We present findings from a qualitative analysis of this interview data and discuss implications for designing conversational search systems to support collaborative search.
summary: In the last decade, conversational search has attracted considerable attention. However, most research has focused on systems that can support a \emph{single} searcher. In this paper, we explore how systems can support \emph{multiple} searchers collaborating over an instant messaging platform (i.e., Slack). We present a ``Wizard of Oz'' study in which 27 participant pairs collaborated on three information-seeking tasks over Slack. Participants were unable to search on their own and had to gather information by interacting with a \emph{searchbot} directly from the Slack channel. The role of the searchbot was played by a reference librarian. Conversational search systems must be capable of engaging in \emph{mixed-initiative} interaction by taking and relinquishing control of the conversation to fulfill different objectives. Discourse analysis research suggests that conversational agents can take \emph{two} levels of initiative: dialog- and task-level initiative. Agents take dialog-level initiative to establish mutual belief between agents and task-level initiative to influence the goals of the other agents. During the study, participants were exposed to three experimental conditions in which the searchbot could take different levels of initiative: (1) no initiative, (2) only dialog-level initiative, and (3) both dialog- and task-level initiative. In this paper, we focus on understanding the Wizard's actions. Specifically, we focus on understanding the Wizard's motivations for taking initiative and their rationale for the timing of each intervention. To gain insights about the Wizard's actions, we conducted a stimulated recall interview with the Wizard. We present findings from a qualitative analysis of this interview data and discuss implications for designing conversational search systems to support collaborative search.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，对话式搜索引起了相当大的关注。然而，大多数研究都集中在可以支持 \emph{single} 搜索器的系统上。在本文中，我们探讨系统如何支持多个搜索者通过即时消息平台（即 Slack）进行协作。我们提出了一项“绿野仙踪”研究，其中 27 名参与者通过 Slack 合作完成三项信息查找任务。参与者无法自行搜索，必须通过直接从 Slack 频道与 \emph{searchbot} 交互来收集信息。搜索机器人的角色由参考图书馆员扮演。对话式搜索系统必须能够通过获取和放弃对对话的控制来实现不同的目标，从而参与\emph{混合主动}交互。话语分析研究表明，会话代理可以采取\emph{两个}级别的主动性：对话级别和任务级别的主动性。智能体采取对话级主动性来建立智能体之间的相互信任，并采取任务级主动性来影响其他智能体的目标。在研究过程中，参与者面临三种实验条件，其中搜索机器人可以采取不同级别的主动性：（1）无主动性，（2）仅对话级主动性，以及（3）对话级和任务级主动性。在本文中，我们重点了解向导的操作。具体来说，我们专注于了解巫师采取主动的动机以及他们每次干预时机的理由。为了深入了解巫师的行为，我们对巫师进行了刺激回忆访谈。我们提出了对采访数据的定性分析的结果，并讨论了设计会话搜索系统以支持协作搜索的含义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对话式协作搜索中系统主动性的动机与时机，通过实验和访谈分析搜索代理的行为模式。
AI.motivation: 现有对话式搜索系统多针对单用户，缺乏对多用户协作场景的支持，需探索系统如何通过不同层级的主动性促进协作。
AI.method: 采用‘巫师的奥兹’实验，27对参与者在Slack上协作完成任务，搜索机器人由图书管理员扮演，设置三种主动性条件并进行刺激回忆访谈。
AI.result: 发现搜索代理在任务层和对话层主动性使用中的动机差异，以及干预时机对协作效率的影响，为系统设计提供定性依据。
AI.conclusion: 系统需动态调整对话层与任务层主动性，根据协作目标和对话状态选择干预时机，以提升多用户搜索体验。

search_text: Why and When: Understanding System Initiative during Conversational Collaborative Search 原因和时间：了解对话式协作搜索期间的系统主动性 In the last decade, conversational search has attracted considerable attention. However, most research has focused on systems that can support a \emph{single} searcher. In this paper, we explore how systems can support \emph{multiple} searchers collaborating over an instant messaging platform (i.e., Slack). We present a ``Wizard of Oz'' study in which 27 participant pairs collaborated on three information-seeking tasks over Slack. Participants were unable to search on their own and had to gather information by interacting with a \emph{searchbot} directly from the Slack channel. The role of the searchbot was played by a reference librarian. Conversational search systems must be capable of engaging in \emph{mixed-initiative} interaction by taking and relinquishing control of the conversation to fulfill different objectives. Discourse analysis research suggests that conversational agents can take \emph{two} levels of initiative: dialog- and task-level initiative. Agents take dialog-level initiative to establish mutual belief between agents and task-level initiative to influence the goals of the other agents. During the study, participants were exposed to three experimental conditions in which the searchbot could take different levels of initiative: (1) no initiative, (2) only dialog-level initiative, and (3) both dialog- and task-level initiative. In this paper, we focus on understanding the Wizard's actions. Specifically, we focus on understanding the Wizard's motivations for taking initiative and their rationale for the timing of each intervention. To gain insights about the Wizard's actions, we conducted a stimulated recall interview with the Wizard. We present findings from a qualitative analysis of this interview data and discuss implications for designing conversational search systems to support collaborative search. 在过去的十年中，对话式搜索引起了相当大的关注。然而，大多数研究都集中在可以支持 \emph{single} 搜索器的系统上。在本文中，我们探讨系统如何支持多个搜索者通过即时消息平台（即 Slack）进行协作。我们提出了一项“绿野仙踪”研究，其中 27 名参与者通过 Slack 合作完成三项信息查找任务。参与者无法自行搜索，必须通过直接从 Slack 频道与 \emph{searchbot} 交互来收集信息。搜索机器人的角色由参考图书馆员扮演。对话式搜索系统必须能够通过获取和放弃对对话的控制来实现不同的目标，从而参与\emph{混合主动}交互。话语分析研究表明，会话代理可以采取\emph{两个}级别的主动性：对话级别和任务级别的主动性。智能体采取对话级主动性来建立智能体之间的相互信任，并采取任务级主动性来影响其他智能体的目标。在研究过程中，参与者面临三种实验条件，其中搜索机器人可以采取不同级别的主动性：（1）无主动性，（2）仅对话级主动性，以及（3）对话级和任务级主动性。在本文中，我们重点了解向导的操作。具体来说，我们专注于了解巫师采取主动的动机以及他们每次干预时机的理由。为了深入了解巫师的行为，我们对巫师进行了刺激回忆访谈。我们提出了对采访数据的定性分析的结果，并讨论了设计会话搜索系统以支持协作搜索的含义。 本文研究对话式协作搜索中系统主动性的动机与时机，通过实验和访谈分析搜索代理的行为模式。 Sandeep Avula,Bogeum Choi,Jaime Arguello cs.HC,cs.IR

authors_text: Joy Hsu,Jiayuan Mao,Jiajun Wu
title: NS3D: Neuro-Symbolic Grounding of 3D Objects and Relations
title_zh: NS3D：3D 对象和关系的神经符号基础
abstract: Grounding object properties and relations in 3D scenes is a prerequisite for a wide range of artificial intelligence tasks, such as visually grounded dialogues and embodied manipulation. However, the variability of the 3D domain induces two fundamental challenges: 1) the expense of labeling and 2) the complexity of 3D grounded language. Hence, essential desiderata for models are to be data-efficient, generalize to different data distributions and tasks with unseen semantic forms, as well as ground complex language semantics (e.g., view-point anchoring and multi-object reference). To address these challenges, we propose NS3D, a neuro-symbolic framework for 3D grounding. NS3D translates language into programs with hierarchical structures by leveraging large language-to-code models. Different functional modules in the programs are implemented as neural networks. Notably, NS3D extends prior neuro-symbolic visual reasoning methods by introducing functional modules that effectively reason about high-arity relations (i.e., relations among more than two objects), key in disambiguating objects in complex 3D scenes. Modular and compositional architecture enables NS3D to achieve state-of-the-art results on the ReferIt3D view-dependence task, a 3D referring expression comprehension benchmark. Importantly, NS3D shows significantly improved performance on settings of data-efficiency and generalization, and demonstrate zero-shot transfer to an unseen 3D question-answering task.
summary: Grounding object properties and relations in 3D scenes is a prerequisite for a wide range of artificial intelligence tasks, such as visually grounded dialogues and embodied manipulation. However, the variability of the 3D domain induces two fundamental challenges: 1) the expense of labeling and 2) the complexity of 3D grounded language. Hence, essential desiderata for models are to be data-efficient, generalize to different data distributions and tasks with unseen semantic forms, as well as ground complex language semantics (e.g., view-point anchoring and multi-object reference). To address these challenges, we propose NS3D, a neuro-symbolic framework for 3D grounding. NS3D translates language into programs with hierarchical structures by leveraging large language-to-code models. Different functional modules in the programs are implemented as neural networks. Notably, NS3D extends prior neuro-symbolic visual reasoning methods by introducing functional modules that effectively reason about high-arity relations (i.e., relations among more than two objects), key in disambiguating objects in complex 3D scenes. Modular and compositional architecture enables NS3D to achieve state-of-the-art results on the ReferIt3D view-dependence task, a 3D referring expression comprehension benchmark. Importantly, NS3D shows significantly improved performance on settings of data-efficiency and generalization, and demonstrate zero-shot transfer to an unseen 3D question-answering task.
abstract_zh: 3D 场景中的对象属性和关系的基础是各种人工智能任务的先决条件，例如基于视觉的对话和具体操作。然而，3D 域的可变性引发了两个基本挑战：1）标记的费用和 2）3D 基础语言的复杂性。因此，模型的基本需求是数据高效，泛化到具有看不见的语义形式的不同数据分布和任务，以及基础复杂的语言语义（例如，视点锚定和多对象引用）。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 NS3D，一种用于 3D 基础的神经符号框架。 NS3D 利用大型语言到代码模型将语言转换为具有分层结构的程序。程序中的不同功能模块被实现为神经网络。值得注意的是，NS3D 通过引入有效推理高数量关系（即两个以上对象之间的关系）的功能模块，扩展了先前的神经符号视觉推理方法，这对于消除复杂 3D 场景中的对象歧义至关重要。模块化和组合架构使 NS3D 能够在 ReferIt3D 视图依赖任务（3D 引用表达理解基准）上取得最先进的结果。重要的是，NS3D 在数据效率和泛化设置方面表现出显着提高的性能，并演示了对看不见的 3D 问答任务的零样本迁移。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NS3D框架，通过神经符号方法解决3D场景中物体属性与关系的接地问题，提升数据效率与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 3D场景的物体属性与关系接地面临标注成本高、语言复杂性大的挑战，现有模型难以高效处理多物体关系与未知任务。
AI.method: NS3D利用大语言模型将语言转化为分层程序结构，通过神经网络模块实现功能，并引入高阶关系推理模块以处理复杂3D场景。
AI.result: 在ReferIt3D任务中取得SOTA结果，显著提升数据效率与泛化能力，并实现对未见3D问答任务的零样本迁移。
AI.conclusion: NS3D通过神经符号框架有效解决3D接地挑战，验证了模块化设计在复杂场景理解与跨任务适应中的优势。

authors_text: Sameer Pai,Tao Chen,Megha Tippur,Edward Adelson,Abhishek Gupta,Pulkit Agrawal
title: TactoFind: A Tactile Only System for Object Retrieval
title_zh: TactoFind：用于物体检索的纯触觉系统
abstract: We study the problem of object retrieval in scenarios where visual sensing is absent, object shapes are unknown beforehand and objects can move freely, like grabbing objects out of a drawer. Successful solutions require localizing free objects, identifying specific object instances, and then grasping the identified objects, only using touch feedback. Unlike vision, where cameras can observe the entire scene, touch sensors are local and only observe parts of the scene that are in contact with the manipulator. Moreover, information gathering via touch sensors necessitates applying forces on the touched surface which may disturb the scene itself. Reasoning with touch, therefore, requires careful exploration and integration of information over time -- a challenge we tackle. We present a system capable of using sparse tactile feedback from fingertip touch sensors on a dexterous hand to localize, identify and grasp novel objects without any visual feedback. Videos are available at https://taochenshh.github.io/projects/tactofind.
summary: We study the problem of object retrieval in scenarios where visual sensing is absent, object shapes are unknown beforehand and objects can move freely, like grabbing objects out of a drawer. Successful solutions require localizing free objects, identifying specific object instances, and then grasping the identified objects, only using touch feedback. Unlike vision, where cameras can observe the entire scene, touch sensors are local and only observe parts of the scene that are in contact with the manipulator. Moreover, information gathering via touch sensors necessitates applying forces on the touched surface which may disturb the scene itself. Reasoning with touch, therefore, requires careful exploration and integration of information over time -- a challenge we tackle. We present a system capable of using sparse tactile feedback from fingertip touch sensors on a dexterous hand to localize, identify and grasp novel objects without any visual feedback. Videos are available at https://taochenshh.github.io/projects/tactofind.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在缺乏视觉感知、事先未知物体形状并且物体可以自由移动（例如从抽屉中抓取物体）的情况下的物体检索问题。成功的解决方案需要定位自由对象，识别特定的对象实例，然后仅使用触摸反馈来抓住识别的对象。与相机可以观察整个场景的视觉不同，触摸传感器是本地的，只能观察与操纵器接触的场景部分。此外，通过触摸传感器收集信息需要在触摸表面上施加力，这可能会干扰场景本身。因此，通过触摸进行推理需要随着时间的推移仔细探索和整合信息——这是我们应对的挑战。我们提出了一种系统，能够使用灵巧的手上的指尖触摸传感器的稀疏触觉反馈来定位、识别和抓取新物体，而无需任何视觉反馈。视频可在 https://taochenshh.github.io/projects/tactofind 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅依赖触觉反馈的系统TactoFind，用于在无视觉感知的情况下定位、识别并抓取未知物体。
AI.motivation: 在视觉感知受限的场景（如黑暗环境或机械臂操作）中，传统视觉方法无法适用，而触觉传感器的局部感知和操作干扰问题使物体检索极具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过灵巧手的指尖触觉传感器获取稀疏触觉数据，结合探索策略与时间信息整合，实现物体定位、实例识别及抓取控制，无需预先物体形状信息或视觉输入。
AI.result: 系统成功在无视觉反馈条件下完成多种未知物体的检索任务，实验视频验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: TactoFind证明了仅依赖触觉反馈实现复杂物体检索的可行性，为触觉驱动的机器人操作提供了新方法。
