search_text: TactoFind: A Tactile Only System for Object Retrieval TactoFind：用于物体检索的纯触觉系统 We study the problem of object retrieval in scenarios where visual sensing is absent, object shapes are unknown beforehand and objects can move freely, like grabbing objects out of a drawer. Successful solutions require localizing free objects, identifying specific object instances, and then grasping the identified objects, only using touch feedback. Unlike vision, where cameras can observe the entire scene, touch sensors are local and only observe parts of the scene that are in contact with the manipulator. Moreover, information gathering via touch sensors necessitates applying forces on the touched surface which may disturb the scene itself. Reasoning with touch, therefore, requires careful exploration and integration of information over time -- a challenge we tackle. We present a system capable of using sparse tactile feedback from fingertip touch sensors on a dexterous hand to localize, identify and grasp novel objects without any visual feedback. Videos are available at https://taochenshh.github.io/projects/tactofind. 我们研究在缺乏视觉感知、事先未知物体形状并且物体可以自由移动（例如从抽屉中抓取物体）的情况下的物体检索问题。成功的解决方案需要定位自由对象，识别特定的对象实例，然后仅使用触摸反馈来抓住识别的对象。与相机可以观察整个场景的视觉不同，触摸传感器是本地的，只能观察与操纵器接触的场景部分。此外，通过触摸传感器收集信息需要在触摸表面上施加力，这可能会干扰场景本身。因此，通过触摸进行推理需要随着时间的推移仔细探索和整合信息——这是我们应对的挑战。我们提出了一种系统，能够使用灵巧的手上的指尖触摸传感器的稀疏触觉反馈来定位、识别和抓取新物体，而无需任何视觉反馈。视频可在 https://taochenshh.github.io/projects/tactofind 获取。 本文提出了一种仅依赖触觉反馈的系统TactoFind，用于在无视觉感知的情况下定位、识别并抓取未知物体。 Sameer Pai,Tao Chen,Megha Tippur,Edward Adelson,Abhishek Gupta,Pulkit Agrawal cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jianhui Liu,Yukang Chen,Xiaoqing Ye,Xiaojuan Qi
title: IST-Net: Prior-free Category-level Pose Estimation with Implicit Space Transformation
title_zh: IST-Net：具有隐式空间变换的无先验类别级姿势估计
abstract: Category-level 6D pose estimation aims to predict the poses and sizes of unseen objects from a specific category. Thanks to prior deformation, which explicitly adapts a category-specific 3D prior (i.e., a 3D template) to a given object instance, prior-based methods attained great success and have become a major research stream. However, obtaining category-specific priors requires collecting a large amount of 3D models, which is labor-consuming and often not accessible in practice. This motivates us to investigate whether priors are necessary to make prior-based methods effective. Our empirical study shows that the 3D prior itself is not the credit to the high performance. The keypoint actually is the explicit deformation process, which aligns camera and world coordinates supervised by world-space 3D models (also called canonical space). Inspired by these observations, we introduce a simple prior-free implicit space transformation network, namely IST-Net, to transform camera-space features to world-space counterparts and build correspondence between them in an implicit manner without relying on 3D priors. Besides, we design camera- and world-space enhancers to enrich the features with pose-sensitive information and geometrical constraints, respectively. Albeit simple, IST-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance based-on prior-free design, with top inference speed on the REAL275 benchmark. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/IST-Net.
summary: Category-level 6D pose estimation aims to predict the poses and sizes of unseen objects from a specific category. Thanks to prior deformation, which explicitly adapts a category-specific 3D prior (i.e., a 3D template) to a given object instance, prior-based methods attained great success and have become a major research stream. However, obtaining category-specific priors requires collecting a large amount of 3D models, which is labor-consuming and often not accessible in practice. This motivates us to investigate whether priors are necessary to make prior-based methods effective. Our empirical study shows that the 3D prior itself is not the credit to the high performance. The keypoint actually is the explicit deformation process, which aligns camera and world coordinates supervised by world-space 3D models (also called canonical space). Inspired by these observations, we introduce a simple prior-free implicit space transformation network, namely IST-Net, to transform camera-space features to world-space counterparts and build correspondence between them in an implicit manner without relying on 3D priors. Besides, we design camera- and world-space enhancers to enrich the features with pose-sensitive information and geometrical constraints, respectively. Albeit simple, IST-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance based-on prior-free design, with top inference speed on the REAL275 benchmark. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/IST-Net.
abstract_zh: 类别级 6D 姿态估计旨在预测特定类别中未见过的物体的姿态和大小。得益于先验变形，它明确地将特定于类别的 3D 先验（即 3D 模板）适应给定的对象实例，基于先验的方法取得了巨大的成功，并已成为主要的研究流。然而，获得特定类别的先验需要收集大量的 3D 模型，这非常耗时且在实践中通常无法访问。这促使我们研究先验是否是使基于先验的方法有效的必要条件。我们的实证研究表明，3D 先验本身并不是高性能的功劳。关键点实际上是显式变形过程，该过程在世界空间 3D 模型（也称为规范空间）的监督下对齐相机和世界坐标。受这些观察的启发，我们引入了一个简单的无先验隐式空间变换网络，即 IST-Net，将相机空间特征转换为世界空间特征，并以隐式方式在它们之间建立对应关系，而不依赖于 3D 先验。此外，我们设计了相机和世界空间增强器，分别利用姿势敏感信息和几何约束来丰富特征。虽然简单，但 IST-Net 基于无先验设计实现了最先进的性能，并在 REAL275 基准上具有最高的推理速度。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/IST-Net 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IST-Net，一种无需先验信息的类别级6D位姿估计方法，通过隐式空间变换实现相机空间与世界空间特征的对应。
AI.motivation: 传统基于先验的方法依赖耗时且难以获取的类别特定3D模板，而实验表明关键在于显式变形过程而非先验本身，因此探索无需先验的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计IST-Net网络直接转换相机空间特征到世界空间，结合相机与世界空间增强模块分别注入位姿敏感信息和几何约束，无需3D先验模板。
AI.result: 在REAL275基准测试中达到SOTA性能，推理速度领先，代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 隐式空间变换能有效替代传统先验变形过程，证明无需3D先验也可实现高精度位姿估计，为该领域提供新思路。

This motivates us to investigate whether priors are necessary to make prior-based methods effective. Our empirical study shows that the 3D prior itself is not the credit to the high performance. Inspired by these observations, we introduce a simple prior-free implicit space transformation network, namely IST-Net, to transform camera-space features to world-space counterparts and build correspondence between them in an implicit manner without relying on 3D priors. Besides, we design camera- and world-space enhancers to enrich the features with pose-sensitive information and geometrical constraints, respectively. authors_text: Yuta Yoshitake,Mai Nishimura,Shohei Nobuhara,Ko Nishino
title: TransPoser: Transformer as an Optimizer for Joint Object Shape and Pose Estimation
title_zh: TransPoser：Transformer 作为关节对象形状和姿态估计的优化器
abstract: We propose a novel method for joint estimation of shape and pose of rigid objects from their sequentially observed RGB-D images. In sharp contrast to past approaches that rely on complex non-linear optimization, we propose to formulate it as a neural optimization that learns to efficiently estimate the shape and pose. We introduce Deep Directional Distance Function (DeepDDF), a neural network that directly outputs the depth image of an object given the camera viewpoint and viewing direction, for efficient error computation in 2D image space. We formulate the joint estimation itself as a Transformer which we refer to as TransPoser. We fully leverage the tokenization and multi-head attention to sequentially process the growing set of observations and to efficiently update the shape and pose with a learned momentum, respectively. Experimental results on synthetic and real data show that DeepDDF achieves high accuracy as a category-level object shape representation and TransPoser achieves state-of-the-art accuracy efficiently for joint shape and pose estimation.
summary: We propose a novel method for joint estimation of shape and pose of rigid objects from their sequentially observed RGB-D images. In sharp contrast to past approaches that rely on complex non-linear optimization, we propose to formulate it as a neural optimization that learns to efficiently estimate the shape and pose. We introduce Deep Directional Distance Function (DeepDDF), a neural network that directly outputs the depth image of an object given the camera viewpoint and viewing direction, for efficient error computation in 2D image space. We formulate the joint estimation itself as a Transformer which we refer to as TransPoser. We fully leverage the tokenization and multi-head attention to sequentially process the growing set of observations and to efficiently update the shape and pose with a learned momentum, respectively. Experimental results on synthetic and real data show that DeepDDF achieves high accuracy as a category-level object shape representation and TransPoser achieves state-of-the-art accuracy efficiently for joint shape and pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法，用于根据顺序观察的 RGB-D 图像联合估计刚性物体的形状和姿态。与过去依赖复杂非线性优化的方法形成鲜明对比，我们建议将其表述为一种学习有效估计形状和姿势的神经优化。我们引入深度方向距离函数（DeepDDF），这是一种神经网络，可以在给定相机视点和观看方向的情况下直接输出对象的深度图像，以便在 2D 图像空间中进行有效的误差计算。我们将联合估计本身表述为 Transformer，我们将其称为 TransPoser。我们充分利用标记化和多头注意力来顺序处理不断增长的观察集，并分别以学习到的动量有效地更新形状和姿势。合成数据和真实数据的实验结果表明，DeepDDF 作为类别级对象形状表示实现了高精度，而 TransPoser 在关节形状和姿态估计方面有效实现了最先进的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的新型方法TransPoser，用于从连续RGB-D图像中联合估计刚性物体的形状和姿态。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖复杂的非线性优化，计算效率低。本文旨在通过神经网络优化实现更高效的形状和姿态联合估计。
AI.method: 引入深度方向距离函数（DeepDDF）生成物体深度图像，并设计Transformer架构TransPoser，利用分块处理和多头注意力机制，结合学习动量更新形状和姿态参数。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上，DeepDDF作为形状表示达到高精度，TransPoser在联合估计任务中达到最先进的效率与准确率。
AI.conclusion: TransPoser通过神经优化框架有效解决了形状-姿态联合估计问题，验证了Transformer在序列观测任务中的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的新型方法TransPoser，用于从连续RGB-D图像中联合估计刚性物体的形状和姿态。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法依赖复杂的非线性优化，计算效率低。本文旨在通过神经网络优化实现更高效的形状和姿态联合估计。
ai_content.method: 引入深度方向距离函数（DeepDDF）生成物体深度图像，并设计Transformer架构TransPoser，利用分块处理和多头注意力机制，结合学习动量更新形状和姿态参数。
ai_content.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上，DeepDDF作为形状表示达到高精度，TransPoser在联合估计任务中达到最先进的效率与准确率。
ai_content.conclusion: TransPoser通过神经优化框架有效解决了形状-姿态联合估计问题，验证了Transformer在序列观测任务中的潜力。

search_text: TransPoser: Transformer as an Optimizer for Joint Object Shape and Pose Estimation TransPoser：Transformer 作为关节对象形状和姿态估计的优化器 We propose a novel method for joint estimation of shape and pose of rigid objects from their sequentially observed RGB-D images. In sharp contrast to past approaches that rely on complex non-linear optimization, we propose to formulate it as a neural optimization that learns to efficiently estimate the shape and pose. We introduce Deep Directional Distance Function (DeepDDF), a neural network that directly outputs the depth image of an object given the camera viewpoint and viewing direction, for efficient error computation in 2D image space. We formulate the joint estimation itself as a Transformer which we refer to as TransPoser. We fully leverage the tokenization and multi-head attention to sequentially process the growing set of observations and to efficiently update the shape and pose with a learned momentum, respectively. Experimental results on synthetic and real data show that DeepDDF achieves high accuracy as a category-level object shape representation and TransPoser achieves state-of-the-art accuracy efficiently for joint shape and pose estimation. 我们提出了一种新方法，用于根据顺序观察的 RGB-D 图像联合估计刚性物体的形状和姿态。与过去依赖复杂非线性优化的方法形成鲜明对比，我们建议将其表述为一种学习有效估计形状和姿势的神经优化。我们引入深度方向距离函数（DeepDDF），这是一种神经网络，可以在给定相机视点和观看方向的情况下直接输出对象的深度图像，以便在 2D 图像空间中进行有效的误差计算。我们将联合估计本身表述为 Transformer，我们将其称为 TransPoser。我们充分利用标记化和多头注意力来顺序处理不断增长的观察集，并分别以学习到的动量有效地更新形状和姿势。合成数据和真实数据的实验结果表明，DeepDDF 作为类别级对象形状表示实现了高精度，而 TransPoser 在关节形状和姿态估计方面有效实现了最先进的精度。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的新型方法TransPoser，用于从连续RGB-D图像中联合估计刚性物体的形状和姿态。 Yuta Yoshitake,Mai Nishimura,Shohei Nobuhara,Ko Nishino cs.CV

authors_text: Willi Menapace,Aliaksandr Siarohin,Stéphane Lathuilière,Panos Achlioptas,Vladislav Golyanik,Sergey Tulyakov,Elisa Ricci
title: Promptable Game Models: Text-Guided Game Simulation via Masked Diffusion Models
title_zh: 可提示的游戏模型：通过蒙面扩散模型进行文本引导的游戏模拟

comments: ACM Transactions on Graphics \c{opyright} Copyright is held by the owner/author(s) 2023. This is the author's version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution. The definitive Version of Record was published in ACM Transactions on Graphics, http://dx.doi.org/10.1145/3635705
abstract: Neural video game simulators emerged as powerful tools to generate and edit videos. Their idea is to represent games as the evolution of an environment's state driven by the actions of its agents. While such a paradigm enables users to play a game action-by-action, its rigidity precludes more semantic forms of control. To overcome this limitation, we augment game models with prompts specified as a set of natural language actions and desired states. The result-a Promptable Game Model (PGM)-makes it possible for a user to play the game by prompting it with high- and low-level action sequences. Most captivatingly, our PGM unlocks the director's mode, where the game is played by specifying goals for the agents in the form of a prompt. This requires learning "game AI", encapsulated by our animation model, to navigate the scene using high-level constraints, play against an adversary, and devise a strategy to win a point. To render the resulting state, we use a compositional NeRF representation encapsulated in our synthesis model. To foster future research, we present newly collected, annotated and calibrated Tennis and Minecraft datasets. Our method significantly outperforms existing neural video game simulators in terms of rendering quality and unlocks applications beyond the capabilities of the current state of the art. Our framework, data, and models are available at https://snap-research.github.io/promptable-game-models/.

Most captivatingly, our PGM unlocks the director's mode, where the game is played by specifying goals for the agents in the form of a prompt. This requires learning "game AI", encapsulated by our animation model, to navigate the scene using high-level constraints, play against an adversary, and devise a strategy to win a point. To render the resulting state, we use a compositional NeRF representation encapsulated in our synthesis model. To foster future research, we present newly collected, annotated and calibrated Tennis and Minecraft datasets. Our method significantly outperforms existing neural video game simulators in terms of rendering quality and unlocks applications beyond the capabilities of the current state of the art. Our framework, data, and models are available at https://snap-research.github.io/promptable-game-models/.
abstract_zh: 神经视频游戏模拟器成为生成和编辑视频的强大工具。他们的想法是将游戏表示为由代理行为驱动的环境状态的演变。虽然这种范例使用户能够逐个操作地玩游戏，但其僵化性阻碍了更多语义形式的控制。为了克服这一限制，我们通过指定为一组自然语言动作和所需状态的提示来增强游戏模型。结果是提示游戏模型 (PGM)，使用户可以通过高级和低级动作序列提示来玩游戏。最引人入胜的是，我们的 PGM 解锁了导演模式，在该模式中，通过以提示的形式为特工指定目标来玩游戏。这需要学习由我们的动画模型封装的“游戏人工智能”，以使用高级约束导航场景，与对手对抗，并制定赢得分数的策略。为了渲染结果状态，我们使用封装在合成模型中的组合 NeRF 表示。为了促进未来的研究，我们展示了新收集、注释和校准的网球和 Minecraft 数据集。我们的方法在渲染质量方面显着优于现有的神经视频游戏模拟器，并解锁了超出当前技术水平的应用程序。我们的框架、数据和模型可在 https://snap-research.github.io/promptable-game-models/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩码扩散模型的可提示游戏模型（PGM），通过自然语言指令实现文本引导的游戏模拟，允许用户通过高低级别动作序列控制游戏。
AI.motivation: 现有神经游戏模拟器存在控制方式僵硬、无法实现语义级控制的局限性，亟需通过自然语言提示实现更灵活的游戏交互与场景控制。
AI.method: 结合动画模型（实现高阶约束导航与策略制定）和合成模型（基于组合式NeRF渲染场景），并引入自然语言动作序列与目标状态提示，构建可提示游戏框架。同时发布Tennis和Minecraft数据集。
AI.result: 在渲染质量上显著优于现有方法，实现了导演模式下的目标导向游戏控制，拓展了神经游戏模拟器的应用边界。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过文本提示实现了游戏控制的突破性进展，为未来研究提供了新方向与数据支持，推动了游戏AI与神经渲染技术的融合。

authors_text: Chao Huang,Yapeng Tian,Anurag Kumar,Chenliang Xu
title: Egocentric Audio-Visual Object Localization
title_zh: 以自我为中心的视听对象定位
abstract: Humans naturally perceive surrounding scenes by unifying sound and sight in a first-person view. Likewise, machines are advanced to approach human intelligence by learning with multisensory inputs from an egocentric perspective. In this paper, we explore the challenging egocentric audio-visual object localization task and observe that 1) egomotion commonly exists in first-person recordings, even within a short duration; 2) The out-of-view sound components can be created while wearers shift their attention. To address the first problem, we propose a geometry-aware temporal aggregation module to handle the egomotion explicitly. The effect of egomotion is mitigated by estimating the temporal geometry transformation and exploiting it to update visual representations. Moreover, we propose a cascaded feature enhancement module to tackle the second issue. It improves cross-modal localization robustness by disentangling visually-indicated audio representation. During training, we take advantage of the naturally available audio-visual temporal synchronization as the ``free'' self-supervision to avoid costly labeling. We also annotate and create the Epic Sounding Object dataset for evaluation purposes. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art localization performance in egocentric videos and can be generalized to diverse audio-visual scenes.
summary: Humans naturally perceive surrounding scenes by unifying sound and sight in a first-person view. Likewise, machines are advanced to approach human intelligence by learning with multisensory inputs from an egocentric perspective. In this paper, we explore the challenging egocentric audio-visual object localization task and observe that 1) egomotion commonly exists in first-person recordings, even within a short duration; 2) The out-of-view sound components can be created while wearers shift their attention. To address the first problem, we propose a geometry-aware temporal aggregation module to handle the egomotion explicitly. The effect of egomotion is mitigated by estimating the temporal geometry transformation and exploiting it to update visual representations. Moreover, we propose a cascaded feature enhancement module to tackle the second issue. It improves cross-modal localization robustness by disentangling visually-indicated audio representation. During training, we take advantage of the naturally available audio-visual temporal synchronization as the ``free'' self-supervision to avoid costly labeling. We also annotate and create the Epic Sounding Object dataset for evaluation purposes. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art localization performance in egocentric videos and can be generalized to diverse audio-visual scenes.
abstract_zh: 人类通过在第一人称视角中统一声音和视觉来自然地感知周围场景。同样，机器也通过从自我中心的角度学习多感官输入来接近人类智能。在本文中，我们探讨了具有挑战性的以自我为中心的视听对象定位任务，并观察到：1）自我情绪通常存在于第一人称录音中，即使是在很短的时间内； 2) 当佩戴者转移注意力时，可以产生视野外的声音成分。为了解决第一个问题，我们提出了一个几何感知的时间聚合模块来显式地处理自我运动。通过估计时间几何变换并利用它来更新视觉表示来减轻自我运动的影响。此外，我们提出了一个级联特征增强模块来解决第二个问题。它通过解开视觉指示的音频表示来提高跨模式定位的鲁棒性。在训练过程中，我们利用自然可用的视听时间同步作为“免费”自我监督，以避免昂贵的标签。我们还注释并创建 Epic Sounding Object 数据集以用于评估目的。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在以自我为中心的视频中实现了最先进的定位性能，并且可以推广到不同的视听场景。

AI.tldr: 本文研究第一人称视角下结合音频与视觉信息的物体定位问题，解决自我运动干扰和视线外声音带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 人类通过融合视听信息感知环境，但机器在第一人称视角下面临自我运动导致的视觉变化和注意力转移时的音频信息缺失问题，需提升多模态定位鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出几何感知时间聚合模块缓解自我运动影响，并设计级联特征增强模块分离视觉引导的音频表征；利用视听同步作为自监督信号，构建Epic Sounding Object数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 方法在第一人称视频物体定位任务中达到SOTA性能，且能泛化至多样化的视听场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模自我运动和跨模态特征解耦，有效提升了第一人称视听定位的准确性，为多模态学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Egocentric Audio-Visual Object Localization 以自我为中心的视听对象定位 Humans naturally perceive surrounding scenes by unifying sound and sight in a first-person view. Likewise, machines are advanced to approach human intelligence by learning with multisensory inputs from an egocentric perspective. In this paper, we explore the challenging egocentric audio-visual object localization task and observe that 1) egomotion commonly exists in first-person recordings, even within a short duration; 2) The out-of-view sound components can be created while wearers shift their attention. To address the first problem, we propose a geometry-aware temporal aggregation module to handle the egomotion explicitly. The effect of egomotion is mitigated by estimating the temporal geometry transformation and exploiting it to update visual representations. Moreover, we propose a cascaded feature enhancement module to tackle the second issue. It improves cross-modal localization robustness by disentangling visually-indicated audio representation. During training, we take advantage of the naturally available audio-visual temporal synchronization as the ``free'' self-supervision to avoid costly labeling. We also annotate and create the Epic Sounding Object dataset for evaluation purposes. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art localization performance in egocentric videos and can be generalized to diverse audio-visual scenes. 人类通过在第一人称视角中统一声音和视觉来自然地感知周围场景。同样，机器也通过从自我中心的角度学习多感官输入来接近人类智能。在本文中，我们探讨了具有挑战性的以自我为中心的视听对象定位任务，并观察到：1）自我情绪通常存在于第一人称录音中，即使是在很短的时间内； 2) 当佩戴者转移注意力时，可以产生视野外的声音成分。为了解决第一个问题，我们提出了一个几何感知的时间聚合模块来显式地处理自我运动。通过估计时间几何变换并利用它来更新视觉表示来减轻自我运动的影响。此外，我们提出了一个级联特征增强模块来解决第二个问题。它通过解开视觉指示的音频表示来提高跨模式定位的鲁棒性。在训练过程中，我们利用自然可用的视听时间同步作为“免费”自我监督，以避免昂贵的标签。我们还注释并创建 Epic Sounding Object 数据集以用于评估目的。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在以自我为中心的视频中实现了最先进的定位性能，并且可以推广到不同的视听场景。 本文研究第一人称视角下结合音频与视觉信息的物体定位问题，解决自我运动干扰和视线外声音带来的挑战。 Chao Huang,Yapeng Tian,Anurag Kumar,Chenliang Xu cs.CV,cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Sonish Sivarajkumar,Fengyi Gao,Parker E. Denny,Bayan M. Aldhahwani,Shyam Visweswaran,Allyn Bove,Yanshan Wang
title: Mining Clinical Notes for Physical Rehabilitation Exercise Information: Natural Language Processing Algorithm Development and Validation Study
title_zh: 挖掘物理康复运动信息的临床笔记：自然语言处理算法开发和验证研究
abstract: Post-stroke patient rehabilitation requires precise, personalized treatment plans. Natural Language Processing (NLP) offers potential to extract valuable exercise information from clinical notes, aiding in the development of more effective rehabilitation strategies. Objective: This study aims to develop and evaluate a variety of NLP algorithms to extract and categorize physical rehabilitation exercise information from the clinical notes of post-stroke patients treated at the University of Pittsburgh Medical Center. A cohort of 13,605 patients diagnosed with stroke was identified, and their clinical notes containing rehabilitation therapy notes were retrieved. A comprehensive clinical ontology was created to represent various aspects of physical rehabilitation exercises. State-of-the-art NLP algorithms were then developed and compared, including rule-based, machine learning-based algorithms, and large language model (LLM)-based algorithms (ChatGPT). Analysis was conducted on a dataset comprising 23,724 notes with detailed demographic and clinical characteristics. The rule-based NLP algorithm demonstrated superior performance in most areas, particularly in detecting the 'Right Side' location with an F1 score of 0.975, outperforming Gradient Boosting by 0.063. Gradient Boosting excelled in 'Lower Extremity' location detection (F1 score: 0.978), surpassing rule-based NLP by 0.023. It also showed notable performance in 'Passive Range of Motion' with an F1 score of 0.970, a 0.032 improvement over rule-based NLP. The rule-based algorithm efficiently handled 'Duration', 'Sets', and 'Reps' with F1 scores up to 0.65. LLM-based NLP, particularly ChatGPT with few-shot prompts, achieved high recall but generally lower precision and F1 scores. However, it notably excelled in 'Backward Plane' motion detection, achieving an F1 score of 0.846, surpassing the rule-based algorithm's 0.720.

abstract_zh: 中风后患者的康复需要精确、个性化的治疗计划。自然语言处理 (NLP) 提供了从临床记录中提取有价值的运动信息的潜力，有助于制定更有效的康复策略。目的：本研究旨在开发和评估各种 NLP 算法，以从匹兹堡大学医学中心治疗的中风后患者的临床记录中提取和分类身体康复运动信息。确定了 13,605 名被诊断为中风的患者的队列，并检索了包含康复治疗记录的临床记录。创建了一个全面的临床本体来代表身体康复练习的各个方面。随后开发并比较了最先进的 NLP 算法，包括基于规则、基于机器学习的算法和基于大语言模型 (LLM) 的算法 (ChatGPT)。对包含 23,724 个注释的数据集进行了分析，其中包含详细的人口统计和临床特征。基于规则的 NLP 算法在大多数领域都表现出了卓越的性能，特别是在检测“右侧”位置方面，F1 得分为 0.975，比 Gradient Boosting 好 0.063。 Gradient Boosting 在“下肢”位置检测方面表现出色（F1 分数：0.978），超过基于规则的 NLP 0.023。它还在“被动运动范围”方面表现出色，F1 得分为 0.970，比基于规则的 NLP 提高了 0.032。基于规则的算法有效地处理“持续时间”、“组数”和“重复次数”，F1 分数高达 0.65。基于 LLM 的 NLP，特别是带有少量提示的 ChatGPT，实现了较高的召回率，但精度和 F1 分数普遍较低。然而，它在“向后平面”运动检测方面表现尤为出色，F1 得分为 0.846，超过了基于规则的算法的 0.720。

AI.tldr: 该研究开发并验证了多种自然语言处理（NLP）算法，用于从脑卒中患者的临床笔记中提取和分类物理康复运动信息。
AI.motivation: 脑卒中康复需要精准个性化的治疗方案，NLP技术可从临床笔记中提取有价值的信息，从而优化康复策略。
AI.method: 构建临床本体，比较规则-based、机器学习（如梯度提升）和大语言模型（如ChatGPT）算法在23,724条临床笔记上的表现。
AI.result: 规则-based算法在'右侧'定位检测中表现最佳（F1=0.975），梯度提升在'下肢'和'被动关节活动'中更优，ChatGPT在'后向平面'运动检测中表现突出（F1=0.846）。
AI.conclusion: 不同NLP算法在特定任务中各有优势，规则-based算法整体性能稳定，而LLM在特定场景下具有潜力，需结合实际需求选择方法。

authors_text: Itsugun Cho,Ryota Takahashi,Yusaku Yanase,Hiroaki Saito
title: Deep RL with Hierarchical Action Exploration for Dialogue Generation
title_zh: 具有分层动作探索的深度强化学习对话生成
abstract: Traditionally, approximate dynamic programming is employed in dialogue generation with greedy policy improvement through action sampling, as the natural language action space is vast. However, this practice is inefficient for reinforcement learning (RL) due to the sparsity of eligible responses with high action values, which leads to weak improvement sustained by random sampling. This paper presents theoretical analysis and experiments that reveal the performance of the dialogue policy is positively correlated with the sampling size. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a novel dual-granularity Q-function that explores the most promising response category to intervene in the sampling process. Our approach extracts actions based on a grained hierarchy, thereby achieving the optimum with fewer policy iterations. Additionally, we use offline RL and learn from multiple reward functions designed to capture emotional nuances in human interactions. Empirical studies demonstrate that our algorithm outperforms baselines across automatic metrics and human evaluations. Further testing reveals that our algorithm exhibits both explainability and controllability and generates responses with higher expected rewards.
summary: Traditionally, approximate dynamic programming is employed in dialogue generation with greedy policy improvement through action sampling, as the natural language action space is vast. However, this practice is inefficient for reinforcement learning (RL) due to the sparsity of eligible responses with high action values, which leads to weak improvement sustained by random sampling. This paper presents theoretical analysis and experiments that reveal the performance of the dialogue policy is positively correlated with the sampling size. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a novel dual-granularity Q-function that explores the most promising response category to intervene in the sampling process. Our approach extracts actions based on a grained hierarchy, thereby achieving the optimum with fewer policy iterations. Additionally, we use offline RL and learn from multiple reward functions designed to capture emotional nuances in human interactions. Empirical studies demonstrate that our algorithm outperforms baselines across automatic metrics and human evaluations. Further testing reveals that our algorithm exhibits both explainability and controllability and generates responses with higher expected rewards.
abstract_zh: 传统上，由于自然语言动作空间巨大，对话生成中采用近似动态规划，并通过动作采样进行贪婪策略改进。然而，由于具有高行动值的合格响应的稀疏性，这种做法对于强化学习（RL）来说是低效的，这导致随机抽样所维持的改进很弱。本文提出的理论分析和实验表明，对话策略的性能与样本大小正相关。为了克服这一限制，我们引入了一种新颖的双粒度 Q 函数，该函数探索最有希望干预采样过程的响应类别。我们的方法基于粒度层次结构提取操作，从而以更少的策略迭代实现最优。此外，我们使用离线强化学习并从多种奖励函数中学习，这些奖励函数旨在捕捉人类互动中的情感细微差别。实证研究表明，我们的算法在自动指标和人工评估方面优于基线。进一步的测试表明，我们的算法表现出可解释性和可控性，并生成具有更高预期奖励的响应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习和分层动作探索的对话生成方法，通过改进采样策略提升生成效率。
AI.motivation: 传统对话生成中使用近似动态规划和随机采样效率低下，因高价值响应稀疏导致策略改进困难。
AI.method: 设计双粒度Q函数分层探索响应类别，结合离线RL与多奖励函数捕捉情感细节，减少策略迭代次数。
AI.result: 算法在自动评估指标和人工评价中均优于基线，且生成响应具有更高奖励期望与可控性。
AI.conclusion: 分层探索机制有效提升对话生成的效率与质量，为复杂交互场景提供可解释的强化学习解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习和分层动作探索的对话生成方法，通过改进采样策略提升生成效率。

search_text: Deep RL with Hierarchical Action Exploration for Dialogue Generation 具有分层动作探索的深度强化学习对话生成 Traditionally, approximate dynamic programming is employed in dialogue generation with greedy policy improvement through action sampling, as the natural language action space is vast. However, this practice is inefficient for reinforcement learning (RL) due to the sparsity of eligible responses with high action values, which leads to weak improvement sustained by random sampling. This paper presents theoretical analysis and experiments that reveal the performance of the dialogue policy is positively correlated with the sampling size. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a novel dual-granularity Q-function that explores the most promising response category to intervene in the sampling process. Our approach extracts actions based on a grained hierarchy, thereby achieving the optimum with fewer policy iterations. Additionally, we use offline RL and learn from multiple reward functions designed to capture emotional nuances in human interactions. Empirical studies demonstrate that our algorithm outperforms baselines across automatic metrics and human evaluations. Further testing reveals that our algorithm exhibits both explainability and controllability and generates responses with higher expected rewards. 传统上，由于自然语言动作空间巨大，对话生成中采用近似动态规划，并通过动作采样进行贪婪策略改进。然而，由于具有高行动值的合格响应的稀疏性，这种做法对于强化学习（RL）来说是低效的，这导致随机抽样所维持的改进很弱。本文提出的理论分析和实验表明，对话策略的性能与样本大小正相关。为了克服这一限制，我们引入了一种新颖的双粒度 Q 函数，该函数探索最有希望干预采样过程的响应类别。我们的方法基于粒度层次结构提取操作，从而以更少的策略迭代实现最优。此外，我们使用离线强化学习并从多种奖励函数中学习，这些奖励函数旨在捕捉人类互动中的情感细微差别。实证研究表明，我们的算法在自动指标和人工评估方面优于基线。进一步的测试表明，我们的算法表现出可解释性和可控性，并生成具有更高预期奖励的响应。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习和分层动作探索的对话生成方法，通过改进采样策略提升生成效率。 Itsugun Cho,Ryota Takahashi,Yusaku Yanase,Hiroaki Saito cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Wen Cheng,Shichen Dong,Wei Wang
title: W2KPE: Keyphrase Extraction with Word-Word Relation
title_zh: W2KPE：利用词词关系提取关键词
abstract: This paper describes our submission to ICASSP 2023 MUG Challenge Track 4, Keyphrase Extraction, which aims to extract keyphrases most relevant to the conference theme from conference materials. We model the challenge as a single-class Named Entity Recognition task and developed techniques for better performance on the challenge: For the data preprocessing, we encode the split keyphrases after word segmentation. In addition, we increase the amount of input information that the model can accept at one time by fusing multiple preprocessed sentences into one segment. We replace the loss function with the multi-class focal loss to address the sparseness of keyphrases. Besides, we score each appearance of keyphrases and add an extra output layer to fit the score to rank keyphrases. Exhaustive evaluations are performed to find the best combination of the word segmentation tool, the pre-trained embedding model, and the corresponding hyperparameters. With these proposals, we scored 45.04 on the final test set.
summary: This paper describes our submission to ICASSP 2023 MUG Challenge Track 4, Keyphrase Extraction, which aims to extract keyphrases most relevant to the conference theme from conference materials. We model the challenge as a single-class Named Entity Recognition task and developed techniques for better performance on the challenge: For the data preprocessing, we encode the split keyphrases after word segmentation. In addition, we increase the amount of input information that the model can accept at one time by fusing multiple preprocessed sentences into one segment. We replace the loss function with the multi-class focal loss to address the sparseness of keyphrases. Besides, we score each appearance of keyphrases and add an extra output layer to fit the score to rank keyphrases. Exhaustive evaluations are performed to find the best combination of the word segmentation tool, the pre-trained embedding model, and the corresponding hyperparameters. With these proposals, we scored 45.04 on the final test set.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们向 ICASSP 2023 MUG 挑战赛道 4“关键短语提取”提交的内容，该挑战旨在从会议材料中提取与会议主题最相关的关键短语。我们将挑战建模为单类命名实体识别任务，并开发了技术来提高挑战的性能：对于数据预处理，我们在分词后对分割关键短语进行编码。此外，我们通过将多个预处理句子融合成一个片段来增加模型一次可以接受的输入信息量。我们用多类焦点损失替换损失函数，以解决关键短语的稀疏问题。此外，我们对关键短语的每次出现进行评分，并添加一个额外的输出层来适应分数以对关键短语进行排名。通过详尽的评估来找到分词工具、预训练的嵌入模型和相应的超参数的最佳组合。有了这些建议，我们在最终测试集上得分为 45.04。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于词间关系的关键词短语提取方法，用于ICASSP 2023 MUG挑战赛的关键词提取任务。
AI.motivation: 针对会议材料中关键词短语分布稀疏、传统方法难以有效捕捉词间关系的问题，提出改进模型以提高提取准确率。
AI.method: 将任务建模为单类命名实体识别，采用分词编码、多句融合输入、多类focal loss替换损失函数，并添加评分输出层进行排序。
AI.result: 在最终测试集上取得45.04的评分成绩。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化数据预处理、损失函数和输出结构，所提方法有效提升了关键词短语提取性能。

authors_text: Haoxuan You,Mandy Guo,Zhecan Wang,Kai-Wei Chang,Jason Baldridge,Jiahui Yu
title: CoBIT: A Contrastive Bi-directional Image-Text Generation Model
title_zh: CoBIT：对比双向图像文本生成模型
abstract: The field of vision and language has witnessed a proliferation of pre-trained foundation models. Most existing methods are independently pre-trained with contrastive objective like CLIP, image-to-text generative objective like PaLI, or text-to-image generative objective like Parti. However, the three objectives can be pre-trained on the same data, image-text pairs, and intuitively they complement each other as contrasting provides global alignment capacity and generation grants fine-grained understanding. In this work, we present a Contrastive Bi-directional Image-Text generation model (CoBIT), which attempts to unify the three pre-training objectives in one framework. Specifically, CoBIT employs a novel unicoder-decoder structure, consisting of an image unicoder, a text unicoder and a cross-modal decoder. The image/text unicoders can switch between encoding and decoding in different tasks, enabling flexibility and shared knowledge that benefits both image-to-text and text-to-image generations. CoBIT achieves superior performance in image understanding, image-text understanding (Retrieval, Captioning, VQA, SNLI-VE) and text-based content creation, particularly in zero-shot scenarios. For instance, 82.7% in zero-shot ImageNet classification, 9.37 FID score in zero-shot text-to-image generation and 44.8 CIDEr in zero-shot captioning.
summary: The field of vision and language has witnessed a proliferation of pre-trained foundation models. Most existing methods are independently pre-trained with contrastive objective like CLIP, image-to-text generative objective like PaLI, or text-to-image generative objective like Parti. However, the three objectives can be pre-trained on the same data, image-text pairs, and intuitively they complement each other as contrasting provides global alignment capacity and generation grants fine-grained understanding. In this work, we present a Contrastive Bi-directional Image-Text generation model (CoBIT), which attempts to unify the three pre-training objectives in one framework. Specifically, CoBIT employs a novel unicoder-decoder structure, consisting of an image unicoder, a text unicoder and a cross-modal decoder. The image/text unicoders can switch between encoding and decoding in different tasks, enabling flexibility and shared knowledge that benefits both image-to-text and text-to-image generations. CoBIT achieves superior performance in image understanding, image-text understanding (Retrieval, Captioning, VQA, SNLI-VE) and text-based content creation, particularly in zero-shot scenarios. For instance, 82.7% in zero-shot ImageNet classification, 9.37 FID score in zero-shot text-to-image generation and 44.8 CIDEr in zero-shot captioning.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言领域见证了预训练基础模型的激增。大多数现有方法都是使用 CLIP 等对比目标、PaLI 等图像到文本生成目标或 Parti 等文本到图像生成目标进行独立预训练。然而，这三个目标可以在相同的数据、图像文本对上进行预训练，直观上它们是相互补充的，因为对比提供了全局对齐能力，而生成则提供了细粒度的理解。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种对比双向图像文本生成模型（CoBIT），它试图将三个预训练目标统一在一个框架中。具体来说，CoBIT 采用了一种新颖的 unicoder-decoder 结构，由图像 unicoder、文本 unicoder 和跨模态解码器组成。图像/文本 unicoder 可以在不同任务中在编码和解码之间切换，从而实现灵活性和共享知识，从而有利于图像到文本和文本到图像的生成。 CoBIT 在图像理解、图文理解（检索、字幕、VQA、SNLI-VE）和基于文本的内容创建方面实现了卓越的性能，特别是在零样本场景中。例如，零样本 ImageNet 分类中的得分为 82.7%，零样本文本到图像生成中的 FID 得分为 9.37，零样本字幕中的 CIDEr 得分为 44.8。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoBIT模型，通过统一对比学习、图像到文本生成和文本到图像生成三种预训练目标，提升多模态任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法分别独立预训练对比目标或生成目标，未能充分利用三者互补性，限制了模型在跨模态任务中的表现。
AI.method: 设计unicoder-decoder结构，包含图像/文本unicoder和跨模态解码器，实现编码与解码的灵活切换，共享知识以增强双向生成能力。
AI.result: 在零样本ImageNet分类（82.7%）、文本到图像生成（FID 9.37）和字幕生成（CIDEr 44.8）等任务中均取得优异结果。
AI.conclusion: CoBIT通过整合多目标预训练，在跨模态理解与生成任务中展现了显著优势，尤其在零样本场景下效果突出。

authors_text: Matteo Torcoli,Emanuël A. P. Habets
title: Better Together: Dialogue Separation and Voice Activity Detection for Audio Personalization in TV
title_zh: 更好的结合：用于电视音频个性化的对话分离和语音活动检测
comment: Paper accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023), Rhodes, Greece
comments: Paper accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023), Rhodes, Greece
abstract: In TV services, dialogue level personalization is key to meeting user preferences and needs. When dialogue and background sounds are not separately available from the production stage, Dialogue Separation (DS) can estimate them to enable personalization. DS was shown to provide clear benefits for the end user. Still, the estimated signals are not perfect, and some leakage can be introduced. This is undesired, especially during passages without dialogue. We propose to combine DS and Voice Activity Detection (VAD), both recently proposed for TV audio. When their combination suggests dialogue inactivity, background components leaking in the dialogue estimate are reassigned to the background estimate. A clear improvement of the audio quality is shown for dialogue-free signals, without performance drops when dialogue is active. A post-processed VAD estimate with improved detection accuracy is also generated. It is concluded that DS and VAD can improve each other and are better used together.
summary: In TV services, dialogue level personalization is key to meeting user preferences and needs. When dialogue and background sounds are not separately available from the production stage, Dialogue Separation (DS) can estimate them to enable personalization. DS was shown to provide clear benefits for the end user. Still, the estimated signals are not perfect, and some leakage can be introduced. This is undesired, especially during passages without dialogue. We propose to combine DS and Voice Activity Detection (VAD), both recently proposed for TV audio. When their combination suggests dialogue inactivity, background components leaking in the dialogue estimate are reassigned to the background estimate. A clear improvement of the audio quality is shown for dialogue-free signals, without performance drops when dialogue is active. A post-processed VAD estimate with improved detection accuracy is also generated. It is concluded that DS and VAD can improve each other and are better used together.
abstract_zh: 在电视服务中，对话级个性化是满足用户偏好和需求的关键。当制作阶段无法单独提供对话和背景声音时，对话分离 (DS) 可以对其进行估计以实现个性化。 DS 被证明可以为最终用户带来明显的好处。尽管如此，估计的信号并不完美，并且可能会引入一些泄漏。这是不受欢迎的，尤其是在没有对话的段落中。我们建议将 DS 和语音活动检测 (VAD) 结合起来，这两者都是最近针对电视音频提出的。当它们的组合表明对话不活动时，对话估计中泄漏的背景分量被重新分配给背景估计。无对话信号的音频质量得到明显改善，对话活动时性能不会下降。还生成具有改进的检测精度的后处理 VAD 估计。结论是DS和VAD可以相互促进，配合使用效果更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将对话分离（DS）与语音活动检测（VAD）结合，以提升电视音频个性化处理中的音频质量。
AI.motivation: 现有对话分离技术在无对话场景下存在背景音泄漏问题，影响用户体验，需通过VAD辅助优化分离效果。
AI.method: 联合DS与VAD技术，当两者共同判定无对话时，将泄漏的背景音重新分配至背景通道，并生成更精准的VAD结果。
AI.result: 无对话场景下音频质量显著提升，对话场景性能保持稳定，同时VAD检测准确率得到增强。
AI.conclusion: DS与VAD技术互补性强，联合使用可有效提升电视音频个性化处理的整体效果。

authors_text: Dana Cohen-Bar,Elad Richardson,Gal Metzer,Raja Giryes,Daniel Cohen-Or
title: Set-the-Scene: Global-Local Training for Generating Controllable NeRF Scenes
title_zh: 设置场景：用于生成可控 NeRF 场景的全局本地训练
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in text-guided image generation have led to remarkable progress in the field of 3D synthesis from text. By optimizing neural radiance fields (NeRF) directly from text, recent methods are able to produce remarkable results. Yet, these methods are limited in their control of each object's placement or appearance, as they represent the scene as a whole. This can be a major issue in scenarios that require refining or manipulating objects in the scene. To remedy this deficit, we propose a novel GlobalLocal training framework for synthesizing a 3D scene using object proxies. A proxy represents the object's placement in the generated scene and optionally defines its coarse geometry. The key to our approach is to represent each object as an independent NeRF. We alternate between optimizing each NeRF on its own and as part of the full scene. Thus, a complete representation of each object can be learned, while also creating a harmonious scene with style and lighting match. We show that using proxies allows a wide variety of editing options, such as adjusting the placement of each independent object, removing objects from a scene, or refining an object. Our results show that Set-the-Scene offers a powerful solution for scene synthesis and manipulation, filling a crucial gap in controllable text-to-3D synthesis.
summary: Recent breakthroughs in text-guided image generation have led to remarkable progress in the field of 3D synthesis from text. By optimizing neural radiance fields (NeRF) directly from text, recent methods are able to produce remarkable results. Yet, these methods are limited in their control of each object's placement or appearance, as they represent the scene as a whole. This can be a major issue in scenarios that require refining or manipulating objects in the scene. To remedy this deficit, we propose a novel GlobalLocal training framework for synthesizing a 3D scene using object proxies. A proxy represents the object's placement in the generated scene and optionally defines its coarse geometry. The key to our approach is to represent each object as an independent NeRF. We alternate between optimizing each NeRF on its own and as part of the full scene. Thus, a complete representation of each object can be learned, while also creating a harmonious scene with style and lighting match. We show that using proxies allows a wide variety of editing options, such as adjusting the placement of each independent object, removing objects from a scene, or refining an object. Our results show that Set-the-Scene offers a powerful solution for scene synthesis and manipulation, filling a crucial gap in controllable text-to-3D synthesis.
abstract_zh: 最近在文本引导图像生成方面的突破导致文本 3D 合成领域取得了显着进展。通过直接从文本优化神经辐射场（NeRF），最近的方法能够产生显着的结果。然而，这些方法在控制每个对象的位置或外观方面受到限制，因为它们代表整个场景。在需要细化或操纵场景中的对象的场景中，这可能是一个主要问题。为了弥补这一缺陷，我们提出了一种新颖的 GlobalLocal 训练框架，用于使用对象代理合成 3D 场景。代理表示对象在生成的场景中的位置，并可以选择定义其粗略几何形状。我们方法的关键是将每个对象表示为独立的 NeRF。我们交替优化每个 NeRF 本身和作为整个场景的一部分。因此，可以学习每个对象的完整表示，同时还可以创建风格和灯光匹配的和谐场景。我们表明，使用代理允许多种编辑选项，例如调整每个独立对象的位置、从场景中删除对象或细化对象。我们的结果表明，Set-the-Scene 为场景合成和操作提供了强大的解决方案，填补了可控文本到 3D 合成的关键空白。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Set-the-Scene的全局-局部训练框架，通过物体代理（proxies）实现可控的文本到3D场景合成，允许独立调整场景中每个物体的位置和外观。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本生成3D场景的方法难以精确控制场景中单个物体的位置或外观，因它们将场景视为整体进行优化，无法满足需要精细化编辑物体的场景需求。
AI.method: 通过引入物体代理表示物体在场景中的位置及粗略几何，将每个物体建模为独立的NeRF，并交替优化单个物体NeRF与整体场景，实现物体细节与场景风格、光照的一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法支持调整物体位置、移除物体或细化物体等编辑操作，有效解决了文本到可控3D场景合成中的关键问题，生成结果在细节与整体协调性上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: Set-the-Scene通过全局-局部训练框架，为文本驱动的可控3D场景生成与编辑提供了有效解决方案，填补了该领域的关键空白。

authors_text: Frederick Choi,Sajjadur Rahman,Hannah Kim,Dan Zhang
title: Towards Transparent, Reusable, and Customizable Data Science in Computational Notebooks
title_zh: 在计算笔记本中迈向透明、可重用和可定制的数据科学
comment: To appear at Extended Abstracts of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: To appear at Extended Abstracts of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: Data science workflows are human-centered processes involving on-demand programming and analysis. While programmable and interactive interfaces such as widgets embedded within computational notebooks are suitable for these workflows, they lack robust state management capabilities and do not support user-defined customization of the interactive components. The absence of such capabilities hinders workflow reusability and transparency while limiting the scope of exploration of the end-users. In response, we developed MAGNETON, a framework for authoring interactive widgets within computational notebooks that enables transparent, reusable, and customizable data science workflows. The framework enhances existing widgets to support fine-grained interaction history management, reusable states, and user-defined customizations. We conducted three case studies in a real-world knowledge graph construction and serving platform to evaluate the effectiveness of these widgets. Based on the observations, we discuss future implications of employing MAGNETON widgets for general-purpose data science workflows.
summary: Data science workflows are human-centered processes involving on-demand programming and analysis. While programmable and interactive interfaces such as widgets embedded within computational notebooks are suitable for these workflows, they lack robust state management capabilities and do not support user-defined customization of the interactive components. The absence of such capabilities hinders workflow reusability and transparency while limiting the scope of exploration of the end-users. In response, we developed MAGNETON, a framework for authoring interactive widgets within computational notebooks that enables transparent, reusable, and customizable data science workflows. The framework enhances existing widgets to support fine-grained interaction history management, reusable states, and user-defined customizations. We conducted three case studies in a real-world knowledge graph construction and serving platform to evaluate the effectiveness of these widgets. Based on the observations, we discuss future implications of employing MAGNETON widgets for general-purpose data science workflows.
abstract_zh: 数据科学工作流程是以人为中心的流程，涉及按需编程和分析。虽然可编程和交互式界面（例如嵌入计算笔记本中的小部件）适合这些工作流程，但它们缺乏强大的状态管理功能，并且不支持用户定义的交互式组件的自定义。缺乏此类功能会阻碍工作流程的可重用性和透明度，同时限制最终用户的探索范围。为此，我们开发了 MAGNETON，这是一个用于在计算笔记本中编写交互式小部件的框架，可实现透明、可重用和可定制的数据科学工作流程。该框架增强了现有的小部件，以支持细粒度的交互历史管理、可重用状态和用户定义的定制。我们在现实世界的知识图谱构建和服务平台中进行了三个案例研究，以评估这些小部件的有效性。根据观察结果，我们讨论了使用 MAGNETON 小部件对通用数据科学工作流程的未来影响。

AI.tldr: 开发MAGNETON框架以提升计算笔记本中数据科学工作流的透明性、可重用性和可定制性
AI.motivation: 现有计算笔记本交互组件缺乏状态管理与自定义功能，导致工作流难以复用且透明度不足，限制用户探索能力
AI.method: 构建MAGNETON框架增强交互组件，支持细粒度交互历史记录、状态复用及用户自定义扩展功能
AI.result: 通过知识图谱平台三个案例验证，证明MAGNETON显著提升工作流透明度与组件复用效率
AI.conclusion: MAGNETON有效解决计算笔记本交互组件局限性，为通用数据科学工作流提供可复用的透明化解决方案

search_text: Towards Transparent, Reusable, and Customizable Data Science in Computational Notebooks 在计算笔记本中迈向透明、可重用和可定制的数据科学 Data science workflows are human-centered processes involving on-demand programming and analysis. While programmable and interactive interfaces such as widgets embedded within computational notebooks are suitable for these workflows, they lack robust state management capabilities and do not support user-defined customization of the interactive components. The absence of such capabilities hinders workflow reusability and transparency while limiting the scope of exploration of the end-users. In response, we developed MAGNETON, a framework for authoring interactive widgets within computational notebooks that enables transparent, reusable, and customizable data science workflows. The framework enhances existing widgets to support fine-grained interaction history management, reusable states, and user-defined customizations. We conducted three case studies in a real-world knowledge graph construction and serving platform to evaluate the effectiveness of these widgets. Based on the observations, we discuss future implications of employing MAGNETON widgets for general-purpose data science workflows. 数据科学工作流程是以人为中心的流程，涉及按需编程和分析。虽然可编程和交互式界面（例如嵌入计算笔记本中的小部件）适合这些工作流程，但它们缺乏强大的状态管理功能，并且不支持用户定义的交互式组件的自定义。缺乏此类功能会阻碍工作流程的可重用性和透明度，同时限制最终用户的探索范围。为此，我们开发了 MAGNETON，这是一个用于在计算笔记本中编写交互式小部件的框架，可实现透明、可重用和可定制的数据科学工作流程。该框架增强了现有的小部件，以支持细粒度的交互历史管理、可重用状态和用户定义的定制。我们在现实世界的知识图谱构建和服务平台中进行了三个案例研究，以评估这些小部件的有效性。根据观察结果，我们讨论了使用 MAGNETON 小部件对通用数据科学工作流程的未来影响。 开发MAGNETON框架以提升计算笔记本中数据科学工作流的透明性、可重用性和可定制性 Frederick Choi,Sajjadur Rahman,Hannah Kim,Dan Zhang cs.HC,cs.DB

authors_text: Yunhai Han,Mandy Xie,Ye Zhao,Harish Ravichandar
title: On the Utility of Koopman Operator Theory in Learning Dexterous Manipulation Skills
title_zh: 论库普曼算子理论在学习灵巧操作技能中的应用
comment: This work has been accepted for an oral presentation at CORL 2023
comments: This work has been accepted for an oral presentation at CORL 2023
abstract: Despite impressive dexterous manipulation capabilities enabled by learning-based approaches, we are yet to witness widespread adoption beyond well-resourced laboratories. This is likely due to practical limitations, such as significant computational burden, inscrutable learned behaviors, sensitivity to initialization, and the considerable technical expertise required for implementation. In this work, we investigate the utility of Koopman operator theory in alleviating these limitations. Koopman operators are simple yet powerful control-theoretic structures to represent complex nonlinear dynamics as linear systems in higher dimensions. Motivated by the fact that complex nonlinear dynamics underlie dexterous manipulation, we develop a Koopman operator-based imitation learning framework to learn the desired motions of both the robotic hand and the object simultaneously. We show that Koopman operators are surprisingly effective for dexterous manipulation and offer a number of unique benefits. Notably, policies can be learned analytically, drastically reducing computation burden and eliminating sensitivity to initialization and the need for painstaking hyperparameter optimization. Our experiments reveal that a Koopman operator-based approach can perform comparably to state-of-the-art imitation learning algorithms in terms of success rate and sample efficiency, while being an order of magnitude faster. Policy videos can be viewed at https://sites.google.com/view/kodex-corl.
summary: Despite impressive dexterous manipulation capabilities enabled by learning-based approaches, we are yet to witness widespread adoption beyond well-resourced laboratories. This is likely due to practical limitations, such as significant computational burden, inscrutable learned behaviors, sensitivity to initialization, and the considerable technical expertise required for implementation. In this work, we investigate the utility of Koopman operator theory in alleviating these limitations. Koopman operators are simple yet powerful control-theoretic structures to represent complex nonlinear dynamics as linear systems in higher dimensions. Motivated by the fact that complex nonlinear dynamics underlie dexterous manipulation, we develop a Koopman operator-based imitation learning framework to learn the desired motions of both the robotic hand and the object simultaneously. We show that Koopman operators are surprisingly effective for dexterous manipulation and offer a number of unique benefits. Notably, policies can be learned analytically, drastically reducing computation burden and eliminating sensitivity to initialization and the need for painstaking hyperparameter optimization. Our experiments reveal that a Koopman operator-based approach can perform comparably to state-of-the-art imitation learning algorithms in terms of success rate and sample efficiency, while being an order of magnitude faster. Policy videos can be viewed at https://sites.google.com/view/kodex-corl.
abstract_zh: 尽管基于学习的方法实现了令人印象深刻的灵巧操作能力，但我们尚未看到资源丰富的实验室之外的广泛采用。这可能是由于实际限制，例如巨大的计算负担、难以理解的学习行为、对初始化的敏感性以及实施所需的大量技术专业知识。在这项工作中，我们研究了库普曼算子理论在减轻这些限制方面的效用。库普曼算子是简单而强大的控制理论结构，可将复杂的非线性动力学表示为高维线性系统。受复杂的非线性动力学是灵巧操纵的基础这一事实的启发，我们开发了一个基于库普曼算子的模仿学习框架，以同时学习机器人手和物体的所需运动。我们证明，库夫曼算子在灵巧的操作方面出奇地有效，并提供了许多独特的好处。值得注意的是，可以通过分析方式学习策略，从而大大减少计算负担并消除对初始化的敏感性以及艰苦的超参数优化的需要。我们的实验表明，基于库普曼算子的方法在成功率和样本效率方面可以与最先进的模仿学习算法相媲美，同时速度快一个数量级。政策视频可在 https://sites.google.com/view/kodex-corl 上观看。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Koopman算子理论在学习灵巧操作技能中的应用，旨在解决基于学习的方法在实际应用中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于学习的灵巧操作方法存在计算负担重、行为不可解释、对初始化敏感等问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出基于Koopman算子的模仿学习框架，将复杂非线性动力学转化为高维线性系统，同时学习机械手和物体的运动。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在成功率和样本效率上与最先进算法相当，但计算速度提升一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: Koopman算子理论为灵巧操作提供了解析性政策学习的新途径，有效缓解了现有方法的实践限制。

authors_text: Aneeshan Sain,Ayan Kumar Bhunia,Pinaki Nath Chowdhury,Subhadeep Koley,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: CLIP for All Things Zero-Shot Sketch-Based Image Retrieval, Fine-Grained or Not
title_zh: CLIP 适用于所有零镜头基于草图的图像检索，无论细粒度与否
comment: Accepted in CVPR 2023. Project page available at https://aneeshan95.github.io/Sketch_LVM/
comments: Accepted in CVPR 2023. Project page available at https://aneeshan95.github.io/Sketch_LVM/
abstract: In this paper, we leverage CLIP for zero-shot sketch based image retrieval (ZS-SBIR). We are largely inspired by recent advances on foundation models and the unparalleled generalisation ability they seem to offer, but for the first time tailor it to benefit the sketch community. We put forward novel designs on how best to achieve this synergy, for both the category setting and the fine-grained setting ("all"). At the very core of our solution is a prompt learning setup. First we show just via factoring in sketch-specific prompts, we already have a category-level ZS-SBIR system that overshoots all prior arts, by a large margin (24.8%) - a great testimony on studying the CLIP and ZS-SBIR synergy. Moving onto the fine-grained setup is however trickier, and requires a deeper dive into this synergy. For that, we come up with two specific designs to tackle the fine-grained matching nature of the problem: (i) an additional regularisation loss to ensure the relative separation between sketches and photos is uniform across categories, which is not the case for the gold standard standalone triplet loss, and (ii) a clever patch shuffling technique to help establishing instance-level structural correspondences between sketch-photo pairs. With these designs, we again observe significant performance gains in the region of 26.9% over previous state-of-the-art. The take-home message, if any, is the proposed CLIP and prompt learning paradigm carries great promise in tackling other sketch-related tasks (not limited to ZS-SBIR) where data scarcity remains a great challenge. Project page: https://aneeshan95.github.io/Sketch_LVM/
summary: In this paper, we leverage CLIP for zero-shot sketch based image retrieval (ZS-SBIR). We are largely inspired by recent advances on foundation models and the unparalleled generalisation ability they seem to offer, but for the first time tailor it to benefit the sketch community. We put forward novel designs on how best to achieve this synergy, for both the category setting and the fine-grained setting ("all"). At the very core of our solution is a prompt learning setup. First we show just via factoring in sketch-specific prompts, we already have a category-level ZS-SBIR system that overshoots all prior arts, by a large margin (24.8%) - a great testimony on studying the CLIP and ZS-SBIR synergy. Moving onto the fine-grained setup is however trickier, and requires a deeper dive into this synergy. For that, we come up with two specific designs to tackle the fine-grained matching nature of the problem: (i) an additional regularisation loss to ensure the relative separation between sketches and photos is uniform across categories, which is not the case for the gold standard standalone triplet loss, and (ii) a clever patch shuffling technique to help establishing instance-level structural correspondences between sketch-photo pairs. With these designs, we again observe significant performance gains in the region of 26.9% over previous state-of-the-art. The take-home message, if any, is the proposed CLIP and prompt learning paradigm carries great promise in tackling other sketch-related tasks (not limited to ZS-SBIR) where data scarcity remains a great challenge. Project page: https://aneeshan95.github.io/Sketch_LVM/
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们利用 CLIP 进行基于零样本草图的图像检索（ZS-SBIR）。我们很大程度上受到了基础模型的最新进展以及它们似乎提供的无与伦比的泛化能力的启发，但这是第一次对其进行定制以使草图社区受益。我们针对如何最好地实现这种协同作用，针对类别设置和细粒度设置（“全部”）提出了新颖的设计。我们解决方案的核心是即时学习设置。首先，我们仅通过考虑特定于草图的提示，我们就已经拥有了一个类别级 ZS-SBIR 系统，该系统大大超越了所有现有技术 (24.8%) - 这是研究 CLIP 和 ZS-SBIR 协同作用的一个很好的证明。然而，转向细粒度的设置比较棘手，需要更深入地研究这种协同作用。为此，我们提出了两种具体的设计来解决问题的细粒度匹配性质：（i）额外的正则化损失，以确保草图和照片之间的相对分离在不同类别中是统一的，这不是黄金标准独立三元组损失的情况，以及（ii）巧妙的补丁洗牌技术，以帮助在草图-照片对之间建立实例级结构对应关系。通过这些设计，我们再次观察到与之前最先进的技术相比，性能显着提高了 26.9%。最重要的信息（如果有的话）是所提出的 CLIP 和即时学习范式在解决其他与草图相关的任务（不限于 ZS-SBIR）方面具有巨大的前景，在这些任务中，数据稀缺仍然是一个巨大的挑战。项目页面：https://aneeshan95.github.io/Sketch_LVM/

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用CLIP模型实现零样本草图到图像的检索，适用于通用类别和细粒度场景。
AI.motivation: 受基础模型强大泛化能力的启发，旨在解决草图相关任务中数据稀缺的问题，并首次将CLIP应用于零样本草图图像检索领域。
AI.method: 设计了基于提示学习的框架，引入草图特定提示提升通用场景性能；针对细粒度匹配，提出正则化损失函数和图像块重排技术以增强结构对应关系。
AI.result: 在通用场景下超越现有方法24.8%，细粒度场景下提升26.9%，验证了CLIP与提示学习的协同潜力。
AI.conclusion: CLIP结合提示学习范式为解决草图相关任务（如零样本检索）提供了有效方案，尤其适用于数据稀缺场景。

ai_content.result: 在通用场景下超越现有方法24.8%，细粒度场景下提升26.9%，验证了CLIP与提示学习的协同潜力。
ai_content.conclusion: CLIP结合提示学习范式为解决草图相关任务（如零样本检索）提供了有效方案，尤其适用于数据稀缺场景。

search_text: CLIP for All Things Zero-Shot Sketch-Based Image Retrieval, Fine-Grained or Not CLIP 适用于所有零镜头基于草图的图像检索，无论细粒度与否 In this paper, we leverage CLIP for zero-shot sketch based image retrieval (ZS-SBIR). We are largely inspired by recent advances on foundation models and the unparalleled generalisation ability they seem to offer, but for the first time tailor it to benefit the sketch community. We put forward novel designs on how best to achieve this synergy, for both the category setting and the fine-grained setting ("all"). At the very core of our solution is a prompt learning setup. First we show just via factoring in sketch-specific prompts, we already have a category-level ZS-SBIR system that overshoots all prior arts, by a large margin (24.8%) - a great testimony on studying the CLIP and ZS-SBIR synergy. Moving onto the fine-grained setup is however trickier, and requires a deeper dive into this synergy. For that, we come up with two specific designs to tackle the fine-grained matching nature of the problem: (i) an additional regularisation loss to ensure the relative separation between sketches and photos is uniform across categories, which is not the case for the gold standard standalone triplet loss, and (ii) a clever patch shuffling technique to help establishing instance-level structural correspondences between sketch-photo pairs. With these designs, we again observe significant performance gains in the region of 26.9% over previous state-of-the-art. The take-home message, if any, is the proposed CLIP and prompt learning paradigm carries great promise in tackling other sketch-related tasks (not limited to ZS-SBIR) where data scarcity remains a great challenge. Project page: https://aneeshan95.github.io/Sketch_LVM/ 在本文中，我们利用 CLIP 进行基于零样本草图的图像检索（ZS-SBIR）。我们很大程度上受到了基础模型的最新进展以及它们似乎提供的无与伦比的泛化能力的启发，但这是第一次对其进行定制以使草图社区受益。我们针对如何最好地实现这种协同作用，针对类别设置和细粒度设置（“全部”）提出了新颖的设计。我们解决方案的核心是即时学习设置。首先，我们仅通过考虑特定于草图的提示，我们就已经拥有了一个类别级 ZS-SBIR 系统，该系统大大超越了所有现有技术 (24.8%) - 这是研究 CLIP 和 ZS-SBIR 协同作用的一个很好的证明。然而，转向细粒度的设置比较棘手，需要更深入地研究这种协同作用。为此，我们提出了两种具体的设计来解决问题的细粒度匹配性质：（i）额外的正则化损失，以确保草图和照片之间的相对分离在不同类别中是统一的，这不是黄金标准独立三元组损失的情况，以及（ii）巧妙的补丁洗牌技术，以帮助在草图-照片对之间建立实例级结构对应关系。通过这些设计，我们再次观察到与之前最先进的技术相比，性能显着提高了 26.9%。最重要的信息（如果有的话）是所提出的 CLIP 和即时学习范式在解决其他与草图相关的任务（不限于 ZS-SBIR）方面具有巨大的前景，在这些任务中，数据稀缺仍然是一个巨大的挑战。项目页面：https://aneeshan95.github.io/Sketch_LVM/ 本文提出利用CLIP模型实现零样本草图到图像的检索，适用于通用类别和细粒度场景。 Aneeshan Sain,Ayan Kumar Bhunia,Pinaki Nath Chowdhury,Subhadeep Koley,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song cs.CV

authors_text: Levon Khachatryan,Andranik Movsisyan,Vahram Tadevosyan,Roberto Henschel,Zhangyang Wang,Shant Navasardyan,Humphrey Shi
title: Text2Video-Zero: Text-to-Image Diffusion Models are Zero-Shot Video Generators
title_zh: Text2Video-Zero：文本到图像扩散模型是零样本视频生成器
abstract: Recent text-to-video generation approaches rely on computationally heavy training and require large-scale video datasets. In this paper, we introduce a new task of zero-shot text-to-video generation and propose a low-cost approach (without any training or optimization) by leveraging the power of existing text-to-image synthesis methods (e.g., Stable Diffusion), making them suitable for the video domain. Our key modifications include (i) enriching the latent codes of the generated frames with motion dynamics to keep the global scene and the background time consistent; and (ii) reprogramming frame-level self-attention using a new cross-frame attention of each frame on the first frame, to preserve the context, appearance, and identity of the foreground object. Experiments show that this leads to low overhead, yet high-quality and remarkably consistent video generation. Moreover, our approach is not limited to text-to-video synthesis but is also applicable to other tasks such as conditional and content-specialized video generation, and Video Instruct-Pix2Pix, i.e., instruction-guided video editing. As experiments show, our method performs comparably or sometimes better than recent approaches, despite not being trained on additional video data. Our code will be open sourced at: https://github.com/Picsart-AI-Research/Text2Video-Zero .
summary: Recent text-to-video generation approaches rely on computationally heavy training and require large-scale video datasets. In this paper, we introduce a new task of zero-shot text-to-video generation and propose a low-cost approach (without any training or optimization) by leveraging the power of existing text-to-image synthesis methods (e.g., Stable Diffusion), making them suitable for the video domain. Our key modifications include (i) enriching the latent codes of the generated frames with motion dynamics to keep the global scene and the background time consistent; and (ii) reprogramming frame-level self-attention using a new cross-frame attention of each frame on the first frame, to preserve the context, appearance, and identity of the foreground object. Experiments show that this leads to low overhead, yet high-quality and remarkably consistent video generation. Moreover, our approach is not limited to text-to-video synthesis but is also applicable to other tasks such as conditional and content-specialized video generation, and Video Instruct-Pix2Pix, i.e., instruction-guided video editing. As experiments show, our method performs comparably or sometimes better than recent approaches, despite not being trained on additional video data. Our code will be open sourced at: https://github.com/Picsart-AI-Research/Text2Video-Zero .
abstract_zh: 最近的文本到视频生成方法依赖于计算量大的训练，并且需要大规模视频数据集。在本文中，我们引入了零样本文本到视频生成的新任务，并通过利用现有文本到图像合成方法（例如稳定扩散）的强大功能，提出了一种低成本方法（无需任何训练或优化），使它们适用于视频领域。我们的关键修改包括（i）通过运动动力学丰富生成帧的潜在代码，以保持全局场景和背景时间一致； (ii) 使用第一帧上每个帧的新跨帧注意力重新编程帧级自注意力，以保留前景对象的上下文、外观和身份。实验表明，这可以降低开销，但生成高质量且非常一致的视频。此外，我们的方法不仅限于文本到视频的合成，还适用于其他任务，例如条件和内容专用视频生成以及 Video Instruct-Pix2Pix，即指令引导的视频编辑。实验表明，尽管没有接受额外视频数据的训练，但我们的方法的性能与最近的方法相当，有时甚至更好。我们的代码将在以下位置开源：https://github.com/Picsart-AI-Research/Text2Video-Zero。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的零样本文本到视频生成方法，通过利用现有文本到图像扩散模型（如Stable Diffusion）实现高质量视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到视频生成方法依赖高计算成本和大规模视频数据集，本文旨在提供一种低成本、无需额外训练的零样本解决方案。
AI.method: 通过两个关键修改：1) 丰富帧潜在代码以保持场景和背景一致性；2) 使用跨帧注意力机制（基于第一帧）保留前景对象的上下文和身份。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在低开销下生成高质量且一致的视频，适用于条件视频生成、视频编辑等任务，性能与现有方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 无需视频训练数据即可实现高效视频生成，方法具有广泛适用性，为零样本视频生成提供了新思路。

search_text: Text2Video-Zero: Text-to-Image Diffusion Models are Zero-Shot Video Generators Text2Video-Zero：文本到图像扩散模型是零样本视频生成器 Recent text-to-video generation approaches rely on computationally heavy training and require large-scale video datasets. In this paper, we introduce a new task of zero-shot text-to-video generation and propose a low-cost approach (without any training or optimization) by leveraging the power of existing text-to-image synthesis methods (e.g., Stable Diffusion), making them suitable for the video domain. Our key modifications include (i) enriching the latent codes of the generated frames with motion dynamics to keep the global scene and the background time consistent; and (ii) reprogramming frame-level self-attention using a new cross-frame attention of each frame on the first frame, to preserve the context, appearance, and identity of the foreground object. Experiments show that this leads to low overhead, yet high-quality and remarkably consistent video generation. Moreover, our approach is not limited to text-to-video synthesis but is also applicable to other tasks such as conditional and content-specialized video generation, and Video Instruct-Pix2Pix, i.e., instruction-guided video editing. As experiments show, our method performs comparably or sometimes better than recent approaches, despite not being trained on additional video data. authors_text: Jinjing Zhu,Haotian Bai,Lin Wang
title: Patch-Mix Transformer for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation: A Game Perspective
title_zh: 用于无监督域适应的补丁混合变压器：游戏视角
abstract: Endeavors have been recently made to leverage the vision transformer (ViT) for the challenging unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) task. They typically adopt the cross-attention in ViT for direct domain alignment. However, as the performance of cross-attention highly relies on the quality of pseudo labels for targeted samples, it becomes less effective when the domain gap becomes large. We solve this problem from a game theory's perspective with the proposed model dubbed as PMTrans, which bridges source and target domains with an intermediate domain. Specifically, we propose a novel ViT-based module called PatchMix that effectively builds up the intermediate domain, i.e., probability distribution, by learning to sample patches from both domains based on the game-theoretical models. This way, it learns to mix the patches from the source and target domains to maximize the cross entropy (CE), while exploiting two semi-supervised mixup losses in the feature and label spaces to minimize it. As such, we interpret the process of UDA as a min-max CE game with three players, including the feature extractor, classifier, and PatchMix, to find the Nash Equilibria. Moreover, we leverage attention maps from ViT to re-weight the label of each patch by its importance, making it possible to obtain more domain-discriminative feature representations. We conduct extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets, and the results show that PMTrans significantly surpasses the ViT-based and CNN-based SoTA methods by +3.6% on Office-Home, +1.4% on Office-31, and +17.7% on DomainNet, respectively.
summary: Endeavors have been recently made to leverage the vision transformer (ViT) for the challenging unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) task. They typically adopt the cross-attention in ViT for direct domain alignment. However, as the performance of cross-attention highly relies on the quality of pseudo labels for targeted samples, it becomes less effective when the domain gap becomes large. We solve this problem from a game theory's perspective with the proposed model dubbed as PMTrans, which bridges source and target domains with an intermediate domain. Specifically, we propose a novel ViT-based module called PatchMix that effectively builds up the intermediate domain, i.e., probability distribution, by learning to sample patches from both domains based on the game-theoretical models. This way, it learns to mix the patches from the source and target domains to maximize the cross entropy (CE), while exploiting two semi-supervised mixup losses in the feature and label spaces to minimize it. As such, we interpret the process of UDA as a min-max CE game with three players, including the feature extractor, classifier, and PatchMix, to find the Nash Equilibria. Moreover, we leverage attention maps from ViT to re-weight the label of each patch by its importance, making it possible to obtain more domain-discriminative feature representations. We conduct extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets, and the results show that PMTrans significantly surpasses the ViT-based and CNN-based SoTA methods by +3.6% on Office-Home, +1.4% on Office-31, and +17.7% on DomainNet, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近人们努力利用视觉变换器（ViT）来完成具有挑战性的无监督域适应（UDA）任务。他们通常采用 ViT 中的交叉注意力来进行直接域对齐。然而，由于交叉注意力的性能高度依赖于目标样本的伪标签的质量，因此当域间隙变大时，交叉注意力的效果就会降低。我们从博弈论的角度解决了这个问题，提出了名为 PMTrans 的模型，该模型通过中间域连接源域和目标域。具体来说，我们提出了一种名为 PatchMix 的新型基于 ViT 的模块，它通过学习基于博弈论模型从两个域中采样补丁来有效地构建中间域，即概率分布。通过这种方式，它学习混合来自源域和目标域的补丁以最大化交叉熵（CE），同时利用特征和标签空间中的两个半监督混合损失来最小化交叉熵。因此，我们将 UDA 的过程解释为具有三个参与者的最小-最大 CE 游戏，包括特征提取器、分类器和 PatchMix，以找到纳什均衡。此外，我们利用 ViT 的注意力图根据每个补丁的重要性重新加权标签，从而获得更多领域区分性特征表示。我们对四个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明 PMTrans 在 Office-Home 上显着超过基于 ViT 和基于 CNN 的 SoTA 方法，分别超过了 +3.6%、在 Office-31 上超过了 +1.4%、在 DomainNet 上超过了 +17.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于博弈论的无监督领域自适应方法PMTrans，通过引入PatchMix模块和中间领域来解决领域差距大的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于ViT的UDA方法依赖伪标签进行领域对齐，当领域差距较大时效果不佳，需从博弈论角度设计新方法提升适应性。
AI.method: 提出PatchMix模块，通过博弈模型采样混合源域和目标域的补丁，构建中间领域分布，并以三方博弈（特征提取器、分类器、PatchMix）的min-max CE游戏寻找纳什均衡，结合注意力图加权标签。
AI.result: 在Office-Home、Office-31和DomainNet数据集上分别优于现有方法3.6%、1.4%和17.7%。
AI.conclusion: PMTrans通过博弈论框架和PatchMix模块有效缓解领域差距问题，在多个基准数据集上取得显著性能提升。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于博弈论的无监督领域自适应方法PMTrans，通过引入PatchMix模块和中间领域来解决领域差距大的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有基于ViT的UDA方法依赖伪标签进行领域对齐，当领域差距较大时效果不佳，需从博弈论角度设计新方法提升适应性。
ai_content.method: 提出PatchMix模块，通过博弈模型采样混合源域和目标域的补丁，构建中间领域分布，并以三方博弈（特征提取器、分类器、PatchMix）的min-max CE游戏寻找纳什均衡，结合注意力图加权标签。
ai_content.result: 在Office-Home、Office-31和DomainNet数据集上分别优于现有方法3.6%、1.4%和17.7%。
ai_content.conclusion: PMTrans通过博弈论框架和PatchMix模块有效缓解领域差距问题，在多个基准数据集上取得显著性能提升。

search_text: Patch-Mix Transformer for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation: A Game Perspective 用于无监督域适应的补丁混合变压器：游戏视角 Endeavors have been recently made to leverage the vision transformer (ViT) for the challenging unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) task. They typically adopt the cross-attention in ViT for direct domain alignment. However, as the performance of cross-attention highly relies on the quality of pseudo labels for targeted samples, it becomes less effective when the domain gap becomes large. We solve this problem from a game theory's perspective with the proposed model dubbed as PMTrans, which bridges source and target domains with an intermediate domain. Specifically, we propose a novel ViT-based module called PatchMix that effectively builds up the intermediate domain, i.e., probability distribution, by learning to sample patches from both domains based on the game-theoretical models. This way, it learns to mix the patches from the source and target domains to maximize the cross entropy (CE), while exploiting two semi-supervised mixup losses in the feature and label spaces to minimize it. As such, we interpret the process of UDA as a min-max CE game with three players, including the feature extractor, classifier, and PatchMix, to find the Nash Equilibria. Moreover, we leverage attention maps from ViT to re-weight the label of each patch by its importance, making it possible to obtain more domain-discriminative feature representations. We conduct extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets, and the results show that PMTrans significantly surpasses the ViT-based and CNN-based SoTA methods by +3.6% on Office-Home, +1.4% on Office-31, and +17.7% on DomainNet, respectively. 最近人们努力利用视觉变换器（ViT）来完成具有挑战性的无监督域适应（UDA）任务。他们通常采用 ViT 中的交叉注意力来进行直接域对齐。然而，由于交叉注意力的性能高度依赖于目标样本的伪标签的质量，因此当域间隙变大时，交叉注意力的效果就会降低。我们从博弈论的角度解决了这个问题，提出了名为 PMTrans 的模型，该模型通过中间域连接源域和目标域。具体来说，我们提出了一种名为 PatchMix 的新型基于 ViT 的模块，它通过学习基于博弈论模型从两个域中采样补丁来有效地构建中间域，即概率分布。通过这种方式，它学习混合来自源域和目标域的补丁以最大化交叉熵（CE），同时利用特征和标签空间中的两个半监督混合损失来最小化交叉熵。因此，我们将 UDA 的过程解释为具有三个参与者的最小-最大 CE 游戏，包括特征提取器、分类器和 PatchMix，以找到纳什均衡。此外，我们利用 ViT 的注意力图根据每个补丁的重要性重新加权标签，从而获得更多领域区分性特征表示。我们对四个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明 PMTrans 在 Office-Home 上显着超过基于 ViT 和基于 CNN 的 SoTA 方法，分别超过了 +3.6%、在 Office-31 上超过了 +1.4%、在 DomainNet 上超过了 +17.7%。 本文提出一种基于博弈论的无监督领域自适应方法PMTrans，通过引入PatchMix模块和中间领域来解决领域差距大的问题。 Jinjing Zhu,Haotian Bai,Lin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Bram de Wilde,Anindo Saha,Maarten de Rooij,Henkjan Huisman,Geert Litjens
title: Medical diffusion on a budget: Textual Inversion for medical image generation
title_zh: 预算内的医学传播：用于医学图像生成的文本反转
abstract: Diffusion models for text-to-image generation, known for their efficiency, accessibility, and quality, have gained popularity. While inference with these systems on consumer-grade GPUs is increasingly feasible, training from scratch requires large captioned datasets and significant computational resources. In medical image generation, the limited availability of large, publicly accessible datasets with text reports poses challenges due to legal and ethical concerns. This work shows that adapting pre-trained Stable Diffusion models to medical imaging modalities is achievable by training text embeddings using Textual Inversion. In this study, we experimented with small medical datasets (100 samples each from three modalities) and trained within hours to generate diagnostically accurate images, as judged by an expert radiologist. Experiments with Textual Inversion training and inference parameters reveal the necessity of larger embeddings and more examples in the medical domain. Classification experiments show an increase in diagnostic accuracy (AUC) for detecting prostate cancer on MRI, from 0.78 to 0.80. Further experiments demonstrate embedding flexibility through disease interpolation, combining pathologies, and inpainting for precise disease appearance control. The trained embeddings are compact (less than 1 MB), enabling easy data sharing with reduced privacy concerns.
summary: Diffusion models for text-to-image generation, known for their efficiency, accessibility, and quality, have gained popularity. While inference with these systems on consumer-grade GPUs is increasingly feasible, training from scratch requires large captioned datasets and significant computational resources. In medical image generation, the limited availability of large, publicly accessible datasets with text reports poses challenges due to legal and ethical concerns. This work shows that adapting pre-trained Stable Diffusion models to medical imaging modalities is achievable by training text embeddings using Textual Inversion. In this study, we experimented with small medical datasets (100 samples each from three modalities) and trained within hours to generate diagnostically accurate images, as judged by an expert radiologist. Experiments with Textual Inversion training and inference parameters reveal the necessity of larger embeddings and more examples in the medical domain. Classification experiments show an increase in diagnostic accuracy (AUC) for detecting prostate cancer on MRI, from 0.78 to 0.80. Further experiments demonstrate embedding flexibility through disease interpolation, combining pathologies, and inpainting for precise disease appearance control. The trained embeddings are compact (less than 1 MB), enabling easy data sharing with reduced privacy concerns.
abstract_zh: 用于文本到图像生成的扩散模型以其效率、可访问性和质量而闻名，已经受到欢迎。虽然在消费级 GPU 上使用这些系统进行推理越来越可行，但从头开始的训练需要大量的字幕数据集和大量的计算资源。在医学图像生成中，由于法律和道德问题，带有文本报告的大型、可公开访问的数据集的可用性有限，这带来了挑战。这项工作表明，通过使用文本反转训练文本嵌入，可以实现将预训练的稳定扩散模型适应医学成像模式。在这项研究中，我们对小型医疗数据集（三种模式各 100 个样本）进行了实验，并在数小时内进行训练，以生成诊断准确的图像，由放射科医生专家判断。文本反演训练和推理参数的实验揭示了医学领域更大的嵌入和更多示例的必要性。分类实验表明，MRI 检测前列腺癌的诊断准确性 (AUC) 从 0.78 提高到 0.80。进一步的实验证明了通过疾病插值、结合病理学和修复来实现精确疾病外观控制的嵌入灵活性。经过训练的嵌入结构紧凑（小于 1 MB），可轻松实现数据共享并减少隐私问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低成本的医学图像生成方法，通过文本反转技术微调预训练扩散模型，以解决医学领域数据集有限和计算资源不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像生成面临公开标注数据稀缺、法律伦理限制及高昂计算成本的挑战，需开发高效且符合隐私保护的生成方案。
AI.method: 基于预训练Stable Diffusion模型，利用小规模医学数据集（每类100样本）进行文本嵌入微调（Textual Inversion），在消费级GPU上快速训练生成诊断图像。
AI.result: 在前列腺癌MRI检测中AUC从0.78提升至0.80，支持疾病插值、病理组合及精确病变控制，生成模型体积小于1MB且隐私风险低。
AI.conclusion: 文本反转技术可有效适配医学影像生成需求，在保证诊断准确性的同时降低数据和计算门槛，为医疗AI应用提供实用方案。

authors_text: Yi Huang,Xiaoguang Tu,Gui Fu,Tingting Liu,Bokai Liu,Ming Yang,Ziliang Feng
title: Low-Light Image Enhancement by Learning Contrastive Representations in Spatial and Frequency Domains
title_zh: 通过学习空间和频域中的对比表示来增强低光图像
abstract: Images taken under low-light conditions tend to suffer from poor visibility, which can decrease image quality and even reduce the performance of the downstream tasks. It is hard for a CNN-based method to learn generalized features that can recover normal images from the ones under various unknow low-light conditions. In this paper, we propose to incorporate the contrastive learning into an illumination correction network to learn abstract representations to distinguish various low-light conditions in the representation space, with the purpose of enhancing the generalizability of the network. Considering that light conditions can change the frequency components of the images, the representations are learned and compared in both spatial and frequency domains to make full advantage of the contrastive learning. The proposed method is evaluated on LOL and LOL-V2 datasets, the results show that the proposed method achieves better qualitative and quantitative results compared with other state-of-the-arts.
summary: Images taken under low-light conditions tend to suffer from poor visibility, which can decrease image quality and even reduce the performance of the downstream tasks. It is hard for a CNN-based method to learn generalized features that can recover normal images from the ones under various unknow low-light conditions. In this paper, we propose to incorporate the contrastive learning into an illumination correction network to learn abstract representations to distinguish various low-light conditions in the representation space, with the purpose of enhancing the generalizability of the network. Considering that light conditions can change the frequency components of the images, the representations are learned and compared in both spatial and frequency domains to make full advantage of the contrastive learning. The proposed method is evaluated on LOL and LOL-V2 datasets, the results show that the proposed method achieves better qualitative and quantitative results compared with other state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 在弱光条件下拍摄的图像往往会受到可见度较差的影响，这会降低图像质量，甚至降低下游任务的性能。基于 CNN 的方法很难学习通用特征，从而从各种未知的低光条件下的图像中恢复正常图像。在本文中，我们建议将对比学习纳入照明校正网络中，以学习抽象表示以区分表示空间中的各种低光条件，目的是增强网络的泛化性。考虑到光照条件可以改变图像的频率分量，在空间和频率域上学习和比较表示，以充分利用对比学习。所提出的方法在 LOL 和 LOL-V2 数据集上进行了评估，结果表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法取得了更好的定性和定量结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过在空间和频率域学习对比表示来增强低光照图像的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法难以从各种未知低光照条件下恢复高质量图像，需提升网络的泛化能力以应对不同光照变化。
AI.method: 将对比学习融入光照校正网络，在空间域和频率域同时学习并比较表示，以充分利用对比学习的优势。
AI.result: 在LOL和LOL-V2数据集上，该方法在定性和定量评估中均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化空间与频率域的对比表示，该方法有效提升了低光照图像增强的性能，达到当前最优水平。
