This study also revealed that Deep Learning (DL) technique are not widely used, instead classical ML techniques are predominant in the surveyed studies. More importantly, we identified the difficulty of comparing the performance of different approaches due to the lack of standard benchmark cases for RF. 软件开发方法的改进吸引了开发人员在需求工程（RE）领域进行自动需求形式化（RF）。不同的研究报告了应用自然语言处理 (NLP) 和机器学习 (ML) 在减少自然语言编写的需求的歧义性和不完整性方面的潜在优势。本文的目标是对 RF 的 NLP 和 ML 的现有工作进行调查和分类，识别该领域的挑战并提供有前途的未来研究方向。为了实现这一目标，我们从常用库中选择了 257 篇论文，进行了系统的文献综述，概述了当前 RF 领域 NLP 和 ML 技术的最新技术。通过定义纳入和排除标准对搜索结果进行过滤，并选择 2012 年至 2022 年之间的 47 项相关研究。我们发现启发式 NLP 方法是用于自动 RF 的最常见 NLP 技术，主要对结构化和半结构化数据进行操作。这项研究还表明，深度学习 (DL) 技术并未得到广泛使用，相反，经典的 ML 技术在调查研究中占主导地位。更重要的是，我们发现由于缺乏 RF 标准基准案例，比较不同方法的性能很困难。 本文旨在通过系统综述分类现有自然语言处理和机器学习在需求形式化中的应用，识别领域挑战并提出未来研究方向。 Shekoufeh Kolahdouz-Rahimi,Kevin Lano,Chenghua Lin cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.SE

authors_text: Ce Zheng,Xianpeng Liu,Guo-Jun Qi,Chen Chen
title: POTTER: Pooling Attention Transformer for Efficient Human Mesh Recovery
title_zh: POTTER：集中注意力变压器以实现高效的人体网格恢复
abstract: Transformer architectures have achieved SOTA performance on the human mesh recovery (HMR) from monocular images. However, the performance gain has come at the cost of substantial memory and computational overhead. A lightweight and efficient model to reconstruct accurate human mesh is needed for real-world applications. In this paper, we propose a pure transformer architecture named POoling aTtention TransformER (POTTER) for the HMR task from single images. Observing that the conventional attention module is memory and computationally expensive, we propose an efficient pooling attention module, which significantly reduces the memory and computational cost without sacrificing performance. Furthermore, we design a new transformer architecture by integrating a High-Resolution (HR) stream for the HMR task. The high-resolution local and global features from the HR stream can be utilized for recovering more accurate human mesh. Our POTTER outperforms the SOTA method METRO by only requiring 7% of total parameters and 14% of the Multiply-Accumulate Operations on the Human3.6M (PA-MPJPE metric) and 3DPW (all three metrics) datasets. The project webpage is https://zczcwh.github.io/potter_page.
summary: Transformer architectures have achieved SOTA performance on the human mesh recovery (HMR) from monocular images. However, the performance gain has come at the cost of substantial memory and computational overhead. A lightweight and efficient model to reconstruct accurate human mesh is needed for real-world applications. In this paper, we propose a pure transformer architecture named POoling aTtention TransformER (POTTER) for the HMR task from single images. Observing that the conventional attention module is memory and computationally expensive, we propose an efficient pooling attention module, which significantly reduces the memory and computational cost without sacrificing performance. Furthermore, we design a new transformer architecture by integrating a High-Resolution (HR) stream for the HMR task. The high-resolution local and global features from the HR stream can be utilized for recovering more accurate human mesh. Our POTTER outperforms the SOTA method METRO by only requiring 7% of total parameters and 14% of the Multiply-Accumulate Operations on the Human3.6M (PA-MPJPE metric) and 3DPW (all three metrics) datasets. The project webpage is https://zczcwh.github.io/potter_page.
abstract_zh: Transformer 架构在单目图像的人体网格恢复 (HMR) 上实现了 SOTA 性能。然而，性能的提升是以大量内存和计算开销为代价的。现实世界的应用需要一个轻量级且高效的模型来重建准确的人体网格。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 POooling aAttention TransformER (POTTER) 的纯 Transformer 架构，用于单图像的 HMR 任务。观察到传统的注意力模块内存和计算成本昂贵，我们提出了一种有效的池化注意力模块，它在不牺牲性能的情况下显着减少了内存和计算成本。此外，我们通过集成 HMR 任务的高分辨率 (HR) 流来设计新的 Transformer 架构。 HR 流中的高分辨率局部和全局特征可用于恢复更准确的人体网格。我们的 POTTER 优于 SOTA 方法 METRO，在 Human3.6M（PA-MPJPE 指标）和 3DPW（所有三个指标）数据集上仅需要 7% 的总参数和 14% 的乘法累加运算。项目网页为https://zczcwh.github.io/potter_page。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为POTTER的纯Transformer架构，用于从单目图像中高效恢复人体网格。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在人体网格恢复任务中表现优异，但其高昂的内存和计算成本限制了实际应用，亟需轻量化高效模型。
AI.method: 设计了高效池化注意力模块以降低计算成本，并引入高分辨率流（HR stream）捕捉局部与全局特征，构建轻量级Transformer架构。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和3DPW数据集上，POTTER参数量仅为METRO的7%，计算量为14%，且在所有指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: POTTER在保持性能的同时显著降低了计算开销，为实际应用提供了高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Son Quoc Tran,Phong Nguyen-Thuan Do,Kiet Van Nguyen,Ngan Luu-Thuy Nguyen
title: Revealing Weaknesses of Vietnamese Language Models Through Unanswerable Questions in Machine Reading Comprehension
title_zh: 通过机器阅读理解中无法回答的问题揭示越南语语言模型的弱点
comment: Accepted at The 2023 EACL Student Research Workshop
comments: Accepted at The 2023 EACL Student Research Workshop
abstract: Although the curse of multilinguality significantly restricts the language abilities of multilingual models in monolingual settings, researchers now still have to rely on multilingual models to develop state-of-the-art systems in Vietnamese Machine Reading Comprehension. This difficulty in researching is because of the limited number of high-quality works in developing Vietnamese language models. In order to encourage more work in this research field, we present a comprehensive analysis of language weaknesses and strengths of current Vietnamese monolingual models using the downstream task of Machine Reading Comprehension. From the analysis results, we suggest new directions for developing Vietnamese language models. Besides this main contribution, we also successfully reveal the existence of artifacts in Vietnamese Machine Reading Comprehension benchmarks and suggest an urgent need for new high-quality benchmarks to track the progress of Vietnamese Machine Reading Comprehension. Moreover, we also introduced a minor but valuable modification to the process of annotating unanswerable questions for Machine Reading Comprehension from previous work. Our proposed modification helps improve the quality of unanswerable questions to a higher level of difficulty for Machine Reading Comprehension systems to solve.
summary: Although the curse of multilinguality significantly restricts the language abilities of multilingual models in monolingual settings, researchers now still have to rely on multilingual models to develop state-of-the-art systems in Vietnamese Machine Reading Comprehension. This difficulty in researching is because of the limited number of high-quality works in developing Vietnamese language models. In order to encourage more work in this research field, we present a comprehensive analysis of language weaknesses and strengths of current Vietnamese monolingual models using the downstream task of Machine Reading Comprehension. From the analysis results, we suggest new directions for developing Vietnamese language models. Besides this main contribution, we also successfully reveal the existence of artifacts in Vietnamese Machine Reading Comprehension benchmarks and suggest an urgent need for new high-quality benchmarks to track the progress of Vietnamese Machine Reading Comprehension. Moreover, we also introduced a minor but valuable modification to the process of annotating unanswerable questions for Machine Reading Comprehension from previous work. Our proposed modification helps improve the quality of unanswerable questions to a higher level of difficulty for Machine Reading Comprehension systems to solve.
abstract_zh: 尽管多语言的诅咒极大地限制了单语环境中多语言模型的语言能力，但研究人员现在仍然必须依靠多语言模型来开发最先进的越南语机器阅读理解系统。研究的困难是因为开发越南语言模型的高质量作品数量有限。为了鼓励该研究领域的更多工作，我们使用机器阅读理解的下游任务对当前越南单语模型的语言弱点和优势进行了全面分析。根据分析结果，我们提出了开发越南语言模型的新方向。除了这一主要贡献之外，我们还成功揭示了越南机器阅读理解基准中存在的工件，并提出迫切需要新的高质量基准来跟踪越南机器阅读理解的进展。此外，我们还对之前工作中机器阅读理解无法回答的问题进行注释的过程进行了微小但有价值的修改。我们提出的修改有助于将无法回答的问题的质量提高到机器阅读理解系统需要解决的更高难度。

AI.tldr: 通过分析越南语机器阅读理解中的无答案问题，揭示当前越南语语言模型的弱点并提出改进方向。
AI.motivation: 多语言模型在单语任务中表现受限，而越南语高质量模型研究不足，需通过深入分析推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 利用机器阅读理解任务评估模型表现，分析其弱点与优势，并改进无答案问题的标注流程。
AI.result: 发现模型弱点、基准中的伪影问题，提出新基准需求及更高质量的无答案问题标注方法。
AI.conclusion: 需构建高质量基准并优化标注方法，以促进越南语语言模型的研究与进步。

authors_text: Apoorv Singh
title: Trajectory-Prediction with Vision: A Survey
title_zh: 视觉轨迹预测：一项调查
abstract: To plan a safe and efficient route, an autonomous vehicle should anticipate future trajectories of other agents around it. Trajectory prediction is an extremely challenging task which recently gained a lot of attention in the autonomous vehicle research community. Trajectory-prediction forecasts future state of all the dynamic agents in the scene given their current and past states. A good prediction model can prevent collisions on the road, and hence the ultimate goal for autonomous vehicles: Collision rate: collisions per Million miles. The objective of this paper is to provide an overview of the field trajectory-prediction. We categorize the relevant algorithms into different classes so that researchers can follow through the trends in the trajectory-prediction research field. Moreover we also touch upon the background knowledge required to formulate a trajectory-prediction problem.
summary: To plan a safe and efficient route, an autonomous vehicle should anticipate future trajectories of other agents around it. Trajectory prediction is an extremely challenging task which recently gained a lot of attention in the autonomous vehicle research community. Trajectory-prediction forecasts future state of all the dynamic agents in the scene given their current and past states. A good prediction model can prevent collisions on the road, and hence the ultimate goal for autonomous vehicles: Collision rate: collisions per Million miles. The objective of this paper is to provide an overview of the field trajectory-prediction. We categorize the relevant algorithms into different classes so that researchers can follow through the trends in the trajectory-prediction research field. Moreover we also touch upon the background knowledge required to formulate a trajectory-prediction problem.
abstract_zh: 为了规划安全有效的路线，自动驾驶车辆应该预测周围其他智能体的未来轨迹。轨迹预测是一项极具挑战性的任务，最近在自动驾驶汽车研究界引起了广泛关注。轨迹预测根据场景中所有动态代理当前和过去的状态来预测其未来状态。一个好的预测模型可以防止道路上的碰撞，因此自动驾驶汽车的最终目标是：碰撞率：每百万英里的碰撞次数。本文的目的是提供场轨迹预测的概述。我们将相关算法分为不同的类别，以便研究人员能够跟踪轨迹预测研究领域的趋势。此外，我们还涉及制定轨迹预测问题所需的背景知识。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了轨迹预测领域的研究进展，对相关算法进行分类并总结背景知识。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需预测周围动态物体的轨迹以规划安全路径，轨迹预测是降低碰撞率的关键技术。
AI.method: 通过分类现有算法并梳理轨迹预测问题的建模方法与技术背景。
AI.result: 系统性总结了轨迹预测的算法分类、技术挑战及研究趋势。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹预测是自动驾驶的核心问题，未来研究需结合多模态感知与长期预测能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文综述了轨迹预测领域的研究进展，对相关算法进行分类并总结背景知识。
ai_content.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需预测周围动态物体的轨迹以规划安全路径，轨迹预测是降低碰撞率的关键技术。

search_text: Trajectory-Prediction with Vision: A Survey 视觉轨迹预测：一项调查 To plan a safe and efficient route, an autonomous vehicle should anticipate future trajectories of other agents around it. Trajectory prediction is an extremely challenging task which recently gained a lot of attention in the autonomous vehicle research community. Trajectory-prediction forecasts future state of all the dynamic agents in the scene given their current and past states. A good prediction model can prevent collisions on the road, and hence the ultimate goal for autonomous vehicles: Collision rate: collisions per Million miles. The objective of this paper is to provide an overview of the field trajectory-prediction. We categorize the relevant algorithms into different classes so that researchers can follow through the trends in the trajectory-prediction research field. Moreover we also touch upon the background knowledge required to formulate a trajectory-prediction problem. 为了规划安全有效的路线，自动驾驶车辆应该预测周围其他智能体的未来轨迹。轨迹预测是一项极具挑战性的任务，最近在自动驾驶汽车研究界引起了广泛关注。轨迹预测根据场景中所有动态代理当前和过去的状态来预测其未来状态。一个好的预测模型可以防止道路上的碰撞，因此自动驾驶汽车的最终目标是：碰撞率：每百万英里的碰撞次数。本文的目的是提供场轨迹预测的概述。我们将相关算法分为不同的类别，以便研究人员能够跟踪轨迹预测研究领域的趋势。此外，我们还涉及制定轨迹预测问题所需的背景知识。 本文综述了轨迹预测领域的研究进展，对相关算法进行分类并总结背景知识。 Apoorv Singh cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Dhruv Mauria Saxena,Maxim Likhachev
title: Planning for Complex Non-prehensile Manipulation Among Movable Objects by Interleaving Multi-Agent Pathfinding and Physics-Based Simulation
title_zh: 通过交叉多智能体寻路和基于物理的模拟来规划可移动物体之间的复杂非综合操纵
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
comments: Accepted for publication at the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
abstract: Real-world manipulation problems in heavy clutter require robots to reason about potential contacts with objects in the environment. We focus on pick-and-place style tasks to retrieve a target object from a shelf where some `movable' objects must be rearranged in order to solve the task. In particular, our motivation is to allow the robot to reason over and consider non-prehensile rearrangement actions that lead to complex robot-object and object-object interactions where multiple objects might be moved by the robot simultaneously, and objects might tilt, lean on each other, or topple. To support this, we query a physics-based simulator to forward simulate these interaction dynamics which makes action evaluation during planning computationally very expensive. To make the planner tractable, we establish a connection between the domain of Manipulation Among Movable Objects and Multi-Agent Pathfinding that lets us decompose the problem into two phases our M4M algorithm iterates over. First we solve a multi-agent planning problem that reasons about the configurations of movable objects but does not forward simulate a physics model. Next, an arm motion planning problem is solved that uses a physics-based simulator but does not search over possible configurations of movable objects. We run simulated and real-world experiments with the PR2 robot and compare against relevant baseline algorithms. Our results highlight that M4M generates complex 3D interactions, and solves at least twice as many problems as the baselines with competitive performance.

In particular, our motivation is to allow the robot to reason over and consider non-prehensile rearrangement actions that lead to complex robot-object and object-object interactions where multiple objects might be moved by the robot simultaneously, and objects might tilt, lean on each other, or topple. To support this, we query a physics-based simulator to forward simulate these interaction dynamics which makes action evaluation during planning computationally very expensive. To make the planner tractable, we establish a connection between the domain of Manipulation Among Movable Objects and Multi-Agent Pathfinding that lets us decompose the problem into two phases our M4M algorithm iterates over. First we solve a multi-agent planning problem that reasons about the configurations of movable objects but does not forward simulate a physics model. Next, an arm motion planning problem is solved that uses a physics-based simulator but does not search over possible configurations of movable objects. We run simulated and real-world experiments with the PR2 robot and compare against relevant baseline algorithms. Our results highlight that M4M generates complex 3D interactions, and solves at least twice as many problems as the baselines with competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中杂乱的操作问题需要机器人推理与环境中物体的潜在接触。我们专注于拾取和放置式任务，从架子上检索目标对象，其中必须重新排列一些“可移动”对象才能解决任务。特别是，我们的动机是让机器人能够推理并考虑非可抓取的重新排列动作，这些动作会导致复杂的机器人-物体和物体-物体交互，其中多个物体可能会被机器人同时移动，并且物体可能会倾斜、相互倾斜或翻倒。为了支持这一点，我们查询基于物理的模拟器来前向模拟这些交互动态，这使得规划过程中的动作评估计算成本非常昂贵。为了使规划器易于处理，我们在可移动对象之间的操作和多代理寻路领域之间建立了联系，使我们能够将问题分解为 M4M 算法迭代的两个阶段。首先，我们解决一个多智能体规划问题，该问题对可移动物体的配置进行推理，但不向前模拟物理模型。接下来，使用基于物理的模拟器解决手臂运动规划问题，但不搜索可移动物体的可能配置。我们使用 PR2 机器人进行模拟和真实实验，并与相关基线算法进行比较。我们的结果强调，M4M 可以生成复杂的 3D 交互，并且解决的问题数量至少是具有竞争性能的基线的两倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多智能体路径规划与物理模拟的算法，用于解决复杂非抓取操作中可移动物体的规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现实环境中机器人需处理密集物体间的复杂交互，传统方法难以高效模拟非抓取操作引发的物体倾倒、碰撞等动态过程。
AI.method: 提出M4M算法，分两阶段交替求解：第一阶段基于多智能体路径规划确定物体配置，第二阶段通过物理模拟优化机械臂运动轨迹。
AI.result: 在PR2机器人实验中，M4M算法解决的问题数量是基准算法的2倍以上，且能生成复杂的三维物体交互方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦配置规划与物理模拟，M4M有效平衡了计算效率与动态交互真实性，为复杂环境操作提供新思路。

authors_text: Idan Glassberg,Tom Hope
title: Increasing Textual Context Size Boosts Medical Image-Text Matching
title_zh: 增加文本上下文大小可促进医学图像文本匹配
abstract: This short technical report demonstrates a simple technique that yields state of the art results in medical image-text matching tasks. We analyze the use of OpenAI's CLIP, a general image-text matching model, and observe that CLIP's limited textual input size has negative impact on downstream performance in the medical domain where encoding longer textual contexts is often required. We thus train and release ClipMD, which is trained with a simple sliding window technique to encode textual captions. ClipMD was tested on two medical image-text datasets and compared with other image-text matching models. The results show that ClipMD outperforms other models on both datasets by a large margin. We make our code and pretrained model publicly available.
summary: This short technical report demonstrates a simple technique that yields state of the art results in medical image-text matching tasks. We analyze the use of OpenAI's CLIP, a general image-text matching model, and observe that CLIP's limited textual input size has negative impact on downstream performance in the medical domain where encoding longer textual contexts is often required. We thus train and release ClipMD, which is trained with a simple sliding window technique to encode textual captions. ClipMD was tested on two medical image-text datasets and compared with other image-text matching models. The results show that ClipMD outperforms other models on both datasets by a large margin. We make our code and pretrained model publicly available.
abstract_zh: 这份简短的技术报告演示了一种简单的技术，可以在医学图像文本匹配任务中产生最先进的结果。我们分析了 OpenAI 的 CLIP（一种通用图像文本匹配模型）的使用，并观察到 ​​CLIP 有限的文本输入大小对通常需要编码较长文本上下文的医疗领域的下游性能产生负面影响。因此，我们训练并发布了 ClipMD，它使用简单的滑动窗口技术进行训练来编码文本字幕。 ClipMD 在两个医学图像文本数据集上进行了测试，并与其他图像文本匹配模型进行了比较。结果表明，ClipMD 在两个数据集上都大幅优于其他模型。我们公开我们的代码和预训练模型。

AI.tldr: 通过增加文本上下文大小提升医学图像-文本匹配性能
AI.motivation: CLIP等通用模型的文本输入长度限制导致医学领域长文本描述场景下匹配性能下降
AI.method: 采用滑动窗口技术训练ClipMD模型以处理更长文本描述
AI.result: 在两个医学数据集上显著优于其他图像-文本匹配模型
AI.conclusion: 扩展文本上下文尺寸可有效提升医学图像-文本匹配效果

authors_text: Chenshuang Zhang,Chaoning Zhang,Sheng Zheng,Mengchun Zhang,Maryam Qamar,Sung-Ho Bae,In So Kweon
title: A Survey on Audio Diffusion Models: Text To Speech Synthesis and Enhancement in Generative AI
title_zh: 音频扩散模型综述：生成人工智能中的文本到语音合成和增强
abstract: Generative AI has demonstrated impressive performance in various fields, among which speech synthesis is an interesting direction. With the diffusion model as the most popular generative model, numerous works have attempted two active tasks: text to speech and speech enhancement. This work conducts a survey on audio diffusion model, which is complementary to existing surveys that either lack the recent progress of diffusion-based speech synthesis or highlight an overall picture of applying diffusion model in multiple fields. Specifically, this work first briefly introduces the background of audio and diffusion model. As for the text-to-speech task, we divide the methods into three categories based on the stage where diffusion model is adopted: acoustic model, vocoder and end-to-end framework. Moreover, we categorize various speech enhancement tasks by either certain signals are removed or added into the input speech. Comparisons of experimental results and discussions are also covered in this survey.
summary: Generative AI has demonstrated impressive performance in various fields, among which speech synthesis is an interesting direction. With the diffusion model as the most popular generative model, numerous works have attempted two active tasks: text to speech and speech enhancement. This work conducts a survey on audio diffusion model, which is complementary to existing surveys that either lack the recent progress of diffusion-based speech synthesis or highlight an overall picture of applying diffusion model in multiple fields. Specifically, this work first briefly introduces the background of audio and diffusion model. As for the text-to-speech task, we divide the methods into three categories based on the stage where diffusion model is adopted: acoustic model, vocoder and end-to-end framework. Moreover, we categorize various speech enhancement tasks by either certain signals are removed or added into the input speech. Comparisons of experimental results and discussions are also covered in this survey.
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能在各个领域都表现出了令人印象深刻的表现，其中语音合成是一个有趣的方向。随着扩散模型作为最流行的生成模型，许多工作尝试了两个主动任务：文本到语音和语音增强。这项工作对音频扩散模型进行了调查，这是对现有调查的补充，这些调查要么缺乏基于扩散的语音合成的最新进展，要么突出了在多个领域应用扩散模型的整体情况。具体来说，本工作首先简要介绍了音频和扩散模型的背景。对于文本转语音任务，我们根据采用扩散模型的阶段将方法分为三类：声学模型、声码器和端到端框架。此外，我们通过删除或添加某些信号到输入语音中来对各种语音增强任务进行分类。本次调查还涵盖了实验结果的比较和讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了音频扩散模型在文本到语音合成与语音增强领域的研究进展。
AI.motivation: 现有综述或缺乏扩散模型语音合成最新进展，或未全面覆盖多领域应用，需补充系统性总结。
AI.method: 通过分类整理扩散模型在文本到语音（声学模型/声码器/端到端）及语音增强（信号增删）中的方法，对比实验结果并分析讨论。
AI.result: 系统梳理了音频扩散模型的技术路线，比较了不同方法的性能差异，总结了当前挑战与未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 音频扩散模型在语音生成与增强中展现潜力，但需解决计算效率与可控性问题，未来研究应关注跨模态融合与实时应用。

search_text: A Survey on Audio Diffusion Models: Text To Speech Synthesis and Enhancement in Generative AI 音频扩散模型综述：生成人工智能中的文本到语音合成和增强 Generative AI has demonstrated impressive performance in various fields, among which speech synthesis is an interesting direction. With the diffusion model as the most popular generative model, numerous works have attempted two active tasks: text to speech and speech enhancement. This work conducts a survey on audio diffusion model, which is complementary to existing surveys that either lack the recent progress of diffusion-based speech synthesis or highlight an overall picture of applying diffusion model in multiple fields. Specifically, this work first briefly introduces the background of audio and diffusion model. As for the text-to-speech task, we divide the methods into three categories based on the stage where diffusion model is adopted: acoustic model, vocoder and end-to-end framework. Moreover, we categorize various speech enhancement tasks by either certain signals are removed or added into the input speech. Comparisons of experimental results and discussions are also covered in this survey. 生成式人工智能在各个领域都表现出了令人印象深刻的表现，其中语音合成是一个有趣的方向。随着扩散模型作为最流行的生成模型，许多工作尝试了两个主动任务：文本到语音和语音增强。这项工作对音频扩散模型进行了调查，这是对现有调查的补充，这些调查要么缺乏基于扩散的语音合成的最新进展，要么突出了在多个领域应用扩散模型的整体情况。具体来说，本工作首先简要介绍了音频和扩散模型的背景。对于文本转语音任务，我们根据采用扩散模型的阶段将方法分为三类：声学模型、声码器和端到端框架。此外，我们通过删除或添加某些信号到输入语音中来对各种语音增强任务进行分类。本次调查还涵盖了实验结果的比较和讨论。 本文综述了音频扩散模型在文本到语音合成与语音增强领域的研究进展。 Chenshuang Zhang,Chaoning Zhang,Sheng Zheng,Mengchun Zhang,Maryam Qamar,Sung-Ho Bae,In So Kweon cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Mohammad Sadegh Nasr,Amir Hajighasemi,Paul Koomey,Parisa Boodaghi Malidarreh,Michael Robben,Jillur Rahman Saurav,Helen H. Shang,Manfred Huber,Jacob M. Luber
title: Clinically Relevant Latent Space Embedding of Cancer Histopathology Slides through Variational Autoencoder Based Image Compression
title_zh: 通过基于变分自动编码器的图像压缩进行癌症组织病理学幻灯片的临床相关潜在空间嵌入
comment: ef:2023 IEEE ISBI, Cartagena, Colombia, 2023, pp. 1-5
comments: ef:2023 IEEE ISBI, Cartagena, Colombia, 2023, pp. 1-5
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) based training approach that can compress and decompress cancer pathology slides at a compression ratio of 1:512, which is better than the previously reported state of the art (SOTA) in the literature, while still maintaining accuracy in clinical validation tasks. The compression approach was tested on more common computer vision datasets such as CIFAR10, and we explore which image characteristics enable this compression ratio on cancer imaging data but not generic images. We generate and visualize embeddings from the compressed latent space and demonstrate how they are useful for clinical interpretation of data, and how in the future such latent embeddings can be used to accelerate search of clinical imaging data.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) based training approach that can compress and decompress cancer pathology slides at a compression ratio of 1:512, which is better than the previously reported state of the art (SOTA) in the literature, while still maintaining accuracy in clinical validation tasks. The compression approach was tested on more common computer vision datasets such as CIFAR10, and we explore which image characteristics enable this compression ratio on cancer imaging data but not generic images. We generate and visualize embeddings from the compressed latent space and demonstrate how they are useful for clinical interpretation of data, and how in the future such latent embeddings can be used to accelerate search of clinical imaging data.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于变分自动编码器（VAE）的训练方法，可以以1:512的压缩比压缩和解压癌症病理切片，这比文献中先前报道的最先进技术（SOTA）更好，同时仍然保持临床验证任务的准确性。该压缩方法在更常见的计算机视觉数据集（例如 CIFAR10）上进行了测试，我们探索了哪些图像特征可以在癌症成像数据（而非通用图像）上实现这种压缩比。我们从压缩的潜在空间生成并可视化嵌入，并演示它们如何用于数据的临床解释，以及将来如何使用此类潜在嵌入来加速临床成像数据的搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于变分自编码器（VAE）的图像压缩方法，实现癌症病理切片1:512的高压缩比，同时保持临床任务准确性，并探索潜在空间嵌入的临床应用价值。
AI.motivation: 现有图像压缩方法在癌症病理切片的高压缩比与临床准确性之间难以平衡，且缺乏针对病理数据特性的潜在空间分析方法，限制了临床数据的高效利用。
AI.method: 采用变分自编码器框架对癌症病理图像进行端到端压缩与解压，通过对比CIFAR10等通用数据集，分析病理图像独特特征，生成并可视化潜在空间嵌入以辅助临床解释。
AI.result: 实现1:512压缩比（优于SOTA），在临床验证任务中保持高精度；潜在空间嵌入可有效表征病理特征，为未来临床数据检索与分析提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持病理图像诊断精度的前提下显著提升压缩效率，潜在空间嵌入为临床数据的智能分析与快速检索提供了可行方案，具有重要应用前景。

authors_text: Ying Cao,Elsa Rizk,Stefan Vlaski,Ali H. Sayed
title: Decentralized Adversarial Training over Graphs
title_zh: 图上的去中心化对抗训练
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2303.01936
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2303.01936
abstract: The vulnerability of machine learning models to adversarial attacks has been attracting considerable attention in recent years. Most existing studies focus on the behavior of stand-alone single-agent learners. In comparison, this work studies adversarial training over graphs, where individual agents are subjected to perturbations of varied strength levels across space. It is expected that interactions by linked agents, and the heterogeneity of the attack models that are possible over the graph, can help enhance robustness in view of the coordination power of the group. Using a min-max formulation of distributed learning, we develop a decentralized adversarial training framework for multi-agent systems. Specifically, we devise two decentralized adversarial training algorithms by relying on two popular decentralized learning strategies--diffusion and consensus. We analyze the convergence properties of the proposed framework for strongly-convex, convex, and non-convex environments, and illustrate the enhanced robustness to adversarial attacks.
summary: The vulnerability of machine learning models to adversarial attacks has been attracting considerable attention in recent years. Most existing studies focus on the behavior of stand-alone single-agent learners. In comparison, this work studies adversarial training over graphs, where individual agents are subjected to perturbations of varied strength levels across space. It is expected that interactions by linked agents, and the heterogeneity of the attack models that are possible over the graph, can help enhance robustness in view of the coordination power of the group. Using a min-max formulation of distributed learning, we develop a decentralized adversarial training framework for multi-agent systems. Specifically, we devise two decentralized adversarial training algorithms by relying on two popular decentralized learning strategies--diffusion and consensus. We analyze the convergence properties of the proposed framework for strongly-convex, convex, and non-convex environments, and illustrate the enhanced robustness to adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器学习模型易受对抗性攻击的脆弱性引起了人们的广泛关注。大多数现有研究都集中在独立单智能体学习者的行为上。相比之下，这项工作研究了图上的对抗性训练，其中个体代理在空间上受到不同强度水平的扰动。鉴于组的协调能力，预计链接代理之间的交互以及图表上可能存在的攻击模型的异质性可以帮助增强鲁棒性。使用分布式学习的最小-最大公式，我们为多智能体系统开发了一个分散的对抗训练框架。具体来说，我们依靠两种流行的去中心化学习策略——扩散和共识，设计了两种去中心化对抗训练算法。我们分析了所提出的框架在强凸、凸和非凸环境下的收敛特性，并说明了对对抗性攻击的增强的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对图结构多智能体系统的去中心化对抗训练框架，通过代理间协作提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练研究多聚焦单智能体，而实际场景中图结构下不同节点可能面临异质性攻击，需利用群体协作增强防御能力。
AI.method: 基于分布式学习的min-max优化框架，设计两种算法：采用扩散策略和共识策略的去中心化对抗训练方法。
AI.result: 理论分析了强凸、凸及非凸环境下算法收敛性，并验证了所提方法在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过图结构协作机制有效增强了多智能体系统对对抗攻击的鲁棒性，适用于多种优化场景。

motivation: 现有对抗训练研究多聚焦单智能体，而实际场景中图结构下不同节点可能面临异质性攻击，需利用群体协作增强防御能力。
method: 基于分布式学习的min-max优化框架，设计两种算法：采用扩散策略和共识策略的去中心化对抗训练方法。
result: 理论分析了强凸、凸及非凸环境下算法收敛性，并验证了所提方法在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性提升效果。
conclusion: 该框架通过图结构协作机制有效增强了多智能体系统对对抗攻击的鲁棒性，适用于多种优化场景。
search_text: Decentralized Adversarial Training over Graphs 图上的去中心化对抗训练 The vulnerability of machine learning models to adversarial attacks has been attracting considerable attention in recent years. Most existing studies focus on the behavior of stand-alone single-agent learners. In comparison, this work studies adversarial training over graphs, where individual agents are subjected to perturbations of varied strength levels across space. It is expected that interactions by linked agents, and the heterogeneity of the attack models that are possible over the graph, can help enhance robustness in view of the coordination power of the group. Using a min-max formulation of distributed learning, we develop a decentralized adversarial training framework for multi-agent systems. Specifically, we devise two decentralized adversarial training algorithms by relying on two popular decentralized learning strategies--diffusion and consensus. We analyze the convergence properties of the proposed framework for strongly-convex, convex, and non-convex environments, and illustrate the enhanced robustness to adversarial attacks. 近年来，机器学习模型易受对抗性攻击的脆弱性引起了人们的广泛关注。大多数现有研究都集中在独立单智能体学习者的行为上。相比之下，这项工作研究了图上的对抗性训练，其中个体代理在空间上受到不同强度水平的扰动。鉴于组的协调能力，预计链接代理之间的交互以及图表上可能存在的攻击模型的异质性可以帮助增强鲁棒性。使用分布式学习的最小-最大公式，我们为多智能体系统开发了一个分散的对抗训练框架。具体来说，我们依靠两种流行的去中心化学习策略——扩散和共识，设计了两种去中心化对抗训练算法。我们分析了所提出的框架在强凸、凸和非凸环境下的收敛特性，并说明了对对抗性攻击的增强的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种针对图结构多智能体系统的去中心化对抗训练框架，通过代理间协作提升模型鲁棒性。 Ying Cao,Elsa Rizk,Stefan Vlaski,Ali H. Sayed cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ismail Nejjar,Qin Wang,Olga Fink
title: DARE-GRAM : Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Regression by Aligning Inverse Gram Matrices
title_zh: DARE-GRAM：通过对齐逆 Gram 矩阵进行无监督域适应回归
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Regression (DAR) aims to bridge the domain gap between a labeled source dataset and an unlabelled target dataset for regression problems. Recent works mostly focus on learning a deep feature encoder by minimizing the discrepancy between source and target features. In this work, we present a different perspective for the DAR problem by analyzing the closed-form ordinary least square~(OLS) solution to the linear regressor in the deep domain adaptation context. Rather than aligning the original feature embedding space, we propose to align the inverse Gram matrix of the features, which is motivated by its presence in the OLS solution and the Gram matrix's ability to capture the feature correlations. Specifically, we propose a simple yet effective DAR method which leverages the pseudo-inverse low-rank property to align the scale and angle in a selected subspace generated by the pseudo-inverse Gram matrix of the two domains. We evaluate our method on three domain adaptation regression benchmarks. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/ismailnejjar/DARE-GRAM.
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Regression (DAR) aims to bridge the domain gap between a labeled source dataset and an unlabelled target dataset for regression problems. Recent works mostly focus on learning a deep feature encoder by minimizing the discrepancy between source and target features. In this work, we present a different perspective for the DAR problem by analyzing the closed-form ordinary least square~(OLS) solution to the linear regressor in the deep domain adaptation context. Rather than aligning the original feature embedding space, we propose to align the inverse Gram matrix of the features, which is motivated by its presence in the OLS solution and the Gram matrix's ability to capture the feature correlations. Specifically, we propose a simple yet effective DAR method which leverages the pseudo-inverse low-rank property to align the scale and angle in a selected subspace generated by the pseudo-inverse Gram matrix of the two domains. We evaluate our method on three domain adaptation regression benchmarks. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/ismailnejjar/DARE-GRAM.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应回归 (DAR) 旨在弥合回归问题的标记源数据集和未标记目标数据集之间的域差距。最近的工作主要集中在通过最小化源特征和目标特征之间的差异来学习深度特征编码器。在这项工作中，我们通过分析深度域适应环境中线性回归量的封闭式普通最小二乘（OLS）解决方案，提出了 DAR 问题的不同视角。我们建议对齐特征的逆 Gram 矩阵，而不是对齐原始特征嵌入空间，这是由于它在 OLS 解决方案中的存在以及 Gram 矩阵捕获特征相关性的能力。具体来说，我们提出了一种简单而有效的 DAR 方法，该方法利用伪逆低秩属性来对齐由两个域的伪逆 Gram 矩阵生成的选定子空间中的比例和角度。我们在三个领域适应回归基准上评估我们的方法。实验结果表明我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ismailnejjar/DARE-GRAM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DARE-GRAM方法，通过对齐逆Gram矩阵解决无监督域适应回归问题，以弥合带标签源数据集与无标签目标数据集之间的域差距。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要通过最小化源域和目标域特征差异来学习深度特征编码器，但未充分考虑Gram矩阵在普通最小二乘解中的作用及其对特征相关性的捕捉能力。
AI.method: 利用伪逆低秩特性，在由两个域伪逆Gram矩阵生成的子空间中对齐尺度和角度，通过闭式普通最小二乘解分析线性回归器的线性域适应问题。
AI.result: 在三个域适应回归基准测试中取得最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 对齐逆Gram矩阵能有效提升域适应回归性能，验证了特征相关性对齐的重要性，未来可探索Gram矩阵的其他属性。

authors_text: David Blanco-Mulero,Gokhan Alcan,Fares J. Abu-Dakka,Ville Kyrki
title: QDP: Learning to Sequentially Optimise Quasi-Static and Dynamic Manipulation Primitives for Robotic Cloth Manipulation
title_zh: QDP：学习顺序优化机器人布料操纵的准静态和动态操纵基元
comment: Accepted to IEEE/RSJ IROS 2023. 8 pages, 7 figures. Supplementary material available at https://sites.google.com/view/qdp-srl
comments: Accepted to IEEE/RSJ IROS 2023. 8 pages, 7 figures. Supplementary material available at https://sites.google.com/view/qdp-srl
abstract: Pre-defined manipulation primitives are widely used for cloth manipulation. However, cloth properties such as its stiffness or density can highly impact the performance of these primitives. Although existing solutions have tackled the parameterisation of pick and place locations, the effect of factors such as the velocity or trajectory of quasi-static and dynamic manipulation primitives has been neglected. Choosing appropriate values for these parameters is crucial to cope with the range of materials present in house-hold cloth objects. To address this challenge, we introduce the Quasi-Dynamic Parameterisable (QDP) method, which optimises parameters such as the motion velocity in addition to the pick and place positions of quasi-static and dynamic manipulation primitives. In this work, we leverage the framework of Sequential Reinforcement Learning to decouple sequentially the parameters that compose the primitives. To evaluate the effectiveness of the method we focus on the task of cloth unfolding with a robotic arm in simulation and real-world experiments. Our results in simulation show that by deciding the optimal parameters for the primitives the performance can improve by 20% compared to sub-optimal ones. Real-world results demonstrate the advantage of modifying the velocity and height of manipulation primitives for cloths with different mass, stiffness, shape and size. Supplementary material, videos, and code, can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/qdp-srl.
summary: Pre-defined manipulation primitives are widely used for cloth manipulation. However, cloth properties such as its stiffness or density can highly impact the performance of these primitives. Although existing solutions have tackled the parameterisation of pick and place locations, the effect of factors such as the velocity or trajectory of quasi-static and dynamic manipulation primitives has been neglected. Choosing appropriate values for these parameters is crucial to cope with the range of materials present in house-hold cloth objects. To address this challenge, we introduce the Quasi-Dynamic Parameterisable (QDP) method, which optimises parameters such as the motion velocity in addition to the pick and place positions of quasi-static and dynamic manipulation primitives. In this work, we leverage the framework of Sequential Reinforcement Learning to decouple sequentially the parameters that compose the primitives. To evaluate the effectiveness of the method we focus on the task of cloth unfolding with a robotic arm in simulation and real-world experiments. Our results in simulation show that by deciding the optimal parameters for the primitives the performance can improve by 20% compared to sub-optimal ones. Real-world results demonstrate the advantage of modifying the velocity and height of manipulation primitives for cloths with different mass, stiffness, shape and size. Supplementary material, videos, and code, can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/qdp-srl.
abstract_zh: 预定义的操纵基元广泛用于布料操纵。然而，布料属性（例如刚度或密度）会极大地影响这些基元的性能。尽管现有的解决方案已经解决了拾取和放置位置的参数化问题，但忽略了准静态和动态操纵基元的速度或轨迹等因素的影响。为这些参数选择适当的值对于应对家用布制品中存在的材料范围至关重要。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了准动态参数化（QDP）方法，该方法除了准静态和动态操作基元的拾取和放置位置之外，还优化了运动速度等参数。在这项工作中，我们利用顺序强化学习的框架来顺序解耦构成基元的参数。为了评估该方法的有效性，我们重点关注在模拟和现实实验中使用机械臂展开布料的任务。我们的仿真结果表明，通过确定基元的最佳参数，与次优参数相比，性能可以提高 20%。现实世界的结果证明了针对不同质量、刚度、形状和尺寸的布料修改操纵基元的速度和高度的优势。补充材料、视频和代码可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/qdp-srl 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QDP方法，通过优化准静态和动态操作原语的参数（如速度和轨迹），提升机械臂在不同布料特性下的抓取与展开性能。
AI.motivation: 传统预定义操作原语在处理不同刚度、密度的布料时表现不佳，现有方法未充分考虑速度和轨迹等参数对操作效果的影响。
AI.method: 基于顺序强化学习框架，将准静态和动态操作原语的参数（包括运动速度、抓取/放置位置）解耦并依次优化，适应不同布料属性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明优化后性能提升20%，实际实验验证了调整速度和高度对不同质量、刚度、形状布料的有效性。
AI.conclusion: QDP方法通过参数优化显著提升了机械臂在复杂布料操作任务中的适应性与成功率。

Our results in simulation show that by deciding the optimal parameters for the primitives the performance can improve by 20% compared to sub-optimal ones. Real-world results demonstrate the advantage of modifying the velocity and height of manipulation primitives for cloths with different mass, stiffness, shape and size. Supplementary material, videos, and code, can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/qdp-srl. 预定义的操纵基元广泛用于布料操纵。然而，布料属性（例如刚度或密度）会极大地影响这些基元的性能。尽管现有的解决方案已经解决了拾取和放置位置的参数化问题，但忽略了准静态和动态操纵基元的速度或轨迹等因素的影响。为这些参数选择适当的值对于应对家用布制品中存在的材料范围至关重要。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了准动态参数化（QDP）方法，该方法除了准静态和动态操作基元的拾取和放置位置之外，还优化了运动速度等参数。在这项工作中，我们利用顺序强化学习的框架来顺序解耦构成基元的参数。为了评估该方法的有效性，我们重点关注在模拟和现实实验中使用机械臂展开布料的任务。我们的仿真结果表明，通过确定基元的最佳参数，与次优参数相比，性能可以提高 20%。现实世界的结果证明了针对不同质量、刚度、形状和尺寸的布料修改操纵基元的速度和高度的优势。补充材料、视频和代码可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/qdp-srl 上找到。 本文提出QDP方法，通过优化准静态和动态操作原语的参数（如速度和轨迹），提升机械臂在不同布料特性下的抓取与展开性能。 David Blanco-Mulero,Gokhan Alcan,Fares J. Abu-Dakka,Ville Kyrki cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Ran Long,Christian Rauch,Vladimir Ivan,Tin Lun Lam,Sethu Vijayakumar
title: RGB-D-Inertial SLAM in Indoor Dynamic Environments with Long-term Large Occlusion
title_zh: 长期大遮挡的室内动态环境中的RGB-D-惯性SLAM
abstract: This work presents a novel RGB-D-inertial dynamic SLAM method that can enable accurate localisation when the majority of the camera view is occluded by multiple dynamic objects over a long period of time. Most dynamic SLAM approaches either remove dynamic objects as outliers when they account for a minor proportion of the visual input, or detect dynamic objects using semantic segmentation before camera tracking. Therefore, dynamic objects that cause large occlusions are difficult to detect without prior information. The remaining visual information from the static background is also not enough to support localisation when large occlusion lasts for a long period. To overcome these problems, our framework presents a robust visual-inertial bundle adjustment that simultaneously tracks camera, estimates cluster-wise dense segmentation of dynamic objects and maintains a static sparse map by combining dense and sparse features. The experiment results demonstrate that our method achieves promising localisation and object segmentation performance compared to other state-of-the-art methods in the scenario of long-term large occlusion.
summary: This work presents a novel RGB-D-inertial dynamic SLAM method that can enable accurate localisation when the majority of the camera view is occluded by multiple dynamic objects over a long period of time. Most dynamic SLAM approaches either remove dynamic objects as outliers when they account for a minor proportion of the visual input, or detect dynamic objects using semantic segmentation before camera tracking. Therefore, dynamic objects that cause large occlusions are difficult to detect without prior information. The remaining visual information from the static background is also not enough to support localisation when large occlusion lasts for a long period. To overcome these problems, our framework presents a robust visual-inertial bundle adjustment that simultaneously tracks camera, estimates cluster-wise dense segmentation of dynamic objects and maintains a static sparse map by combining dense and sparse features. The experiment results demonstrate that our method achieves promising localisation and object segmentation performance compared to other state-of-the-art methods in the scenario of long-term large occlusion.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种新颖的 RGB-D-惯性动态 SLAM 方法，当大部分摄像机视图长时间被多个动态物体遮挡时，该方法可以实现精确定位。大多数动态 SLAM 方法要么在动态对象占视觉输入的一小部分时将其作为异常值删除，要么在摄像机跟踪之前使用语义分割来检测动态对象。因此，在没有先验信息的情况下，导致大遮挡的动态物体很难检测到。当大的遮挡持续很长一段时间时，来自静态背景的剩余视觉信息也不足以支持定位。为了克服这些问题，我们的框架提出了一种强大的视觉惯性捆绑调整，它可以同时跟踪相机，估计动态对象的集群密集分割，并通过结合密集和稀疏特征来维护静态稀疏图。实验结果表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在长期大遮挡的情况下实现了有希望的定位和对象分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的RGB-D惯性动态SLAM方法，能够在长时间大范围遮挡的室内动态环境中实现精确的定位。
AI.motivation: 现有动态SLAM方法在处理长时间大范围遮挡时存在局限性，要么依赖先验信息检测动态物体，要么无法利用静态背景信息维持定位。
AI.method: 框架通过鲁棒的视觉惯性联合优化，同时跟踪相机、估计动态物体聚类级密集分割，并结合稠密与稀疏特征维护静态稀疏地图。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在长时间大范围遮挡场景下，定位与物体分割性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合视觉惯性数据与动态分割，该方法有效解决了长时间大遮挡下的SLAM难题。

authors_text: Shaina Raza,Syed Raza Bashir
title: Leveraging Foundation Models for Clinical Text Analysis
title_zh: 利用基础模型进行临床文本分析
abstract: Infectious diseases are a significant public health concern globally, and extracting relevant information from scientific literature can facilitate the development of effective prevention and treatment strategies. However, the large amount of clinical data available presents a challenge for information extraction. To address this challenge, this study proposes a natural language processing (NLP) framework that uses a pre-trained transformer model fine-tuned on task-specific data to extract key information related to infectious diseases from free-text clinical data. The proposed framework includes three components: a data layer for preparing datasets from clinical texts, a foundation model layer for entity extraction, and an assessment layer for performance analysis. The results of the evaluation indicate that the proposed method outperforms standard methods, and leveraging prior knowledge through the pre-trained transformer model makes it useful for investigating other infectious diseases in the future.
summary: Infectious diseases are a significant public health concern globally, and extracting relevant information from scientific literature can facilitate the development of effective prevention and treatment strategies. However, the large amount of clinical data available presents a challenge for information extraction. To address this challenge, this study proposes a natural language processing (NLP) framework that uses a pre-trained transformer model fine-tuned on task-specific data to extract key information related to infectious diseases from free-text clinical data. The proposed framework includes three components: a data layer for preparing datasets from clinical texts, a foundation model layer for entity extraction, and an assessment layer for performance analysis. The results of the evaluation indicate that the proposed method outperforms standard methods, and leveraging prior knowledge through the pre-trained transformer model makes it useful for investigating other infectious diseases in the future.
abstract_zh: 传染病是全球重要的公共卫生问题，从科学文献中提取相关信息可以促进有效预防和治疗策略的制定。然而，大量可用的临床数据给信息提取带来了挑战。为了应对这一挑战，本研究提出了一种自然语言处理（NLP）框架，该框架使用针对特定任务数据进行微调的预训练变压器模型，从自由文本临床数据中提取与传染病相关的关键信息。所提出的框架包括三个组件：用于从临床文本准备数据集的数据层、用于实体提取的基础模型层以及用于性能分析的评估层。评估结果表明，所提出的方法优于标准方法，并且通过预训练的变压器模型利用先验知识使其可用于将来调查其他传染病。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于预训练Transformer模型的NLP框架，用于从临床文本中提取传染病相关关键信息。
AI.motivation: 传染病是全球公共卫生重点问题，但临床文本数据量大且信息提取困难，需更高效的方法支持防控策略制定。
AI.method: 构建包含数据准备层、预训练模型实体提取层和性能评估层的三阶段框架，通过微调Transformer模型实现信息抽取。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于传统方法，且预训练模型的知识迁移能力可拓展至其他传染病研究。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了临床文本分析效率，为传染病研究提供了可复用的AI解决方案。

authors_text: Songheng Zhang,Dong Ma,Yong Wang
title: Don't Peek at My Chart: Privacy-preserving Visualization for Mobile Devices
title_zh: 不要偷看我的图表：移动设备的隐私保护可视化
abstract: Data visualizations have been widely used on mobile devices like smartphones for various tasks (e.g., visualizing personal health and financial data), making it convenient for people to view such data anytime and anywhere. However, others nearby can also easily peek at the visualizations, resulting in personal data disclosure. In this paper, we propose a perception-driven approach to transform mobile data visualizations into privacy-preserving ones. Specifically, based on human visual perception, we develop a masking scheme to adjust the spatial frequency and luminance contrast of colored visualizations. The resulting visualization retains its original information in close proximity but reduces the visibility when viewed from a certain distance or further away. We conducted two user studies to inform the design of our approach (N=16) and systematically evaluate its performance (N=18), respectively. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in terms of privacy preservation for mobile data visualizations.
summary: Data visualizations have been widely used on mobile devices like smartphones for various tasks (e.g., visualizing personal health and financial data), making it convenient for people to view such data anytime and anywhere. However, others nearby can also easily peek at the visualizations, resulting in personal data disclosure. In this paper, we propose a perception-driven approach to transform mobile data visualizations into privacy-preserving ones. Specifically, based on human visual perception, we develop a masking scheme to adjust the spatial frequency and luminance contrast of colored visualizations. The resulting visualization retains its original information in close proximity but reduces the visibility when viewed from a certain distance or further away. We conducted two user studies to inform the design of our approach (N=16) and systematically evaluate its performance (N=18), respectively. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in terms of privacy preservation for mobile data visualizations.
abstract_zh: 数据可视化已广泛应用于智能手机等移动设备上的各种任务（例如可视化个人健康和财务数据），使人们可以方便地随时随地查看这些数据。然而，附近的其他人也可以轻松地偷看可视化内容，从而导致个人数据泄露。在本文中，我们提出了一种感知驱动的方法，将移动数据可视化转变为隐私保护可视化。具体来说，基于人类视觉感知，我们开发了一种掩蔽方案来调整彩色可视化的空间频率和亮度对比度。生成的可视化结果保留了近距离的原始信息，但从一定距离或更远的地方查看时会降低可见性。我们进行了两项用户研究，分别为我们的方法的设计提供信息 (N=16) 并系统地评估其性能 (N=18)。结果证明了我们的方法在移动数据可视化隐私保护方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人类视觉感知的隐私保护可视化方法，通过调整颜色可视化中的空间频率和亮度对比度，使近距离观看时信息清晰，远距离观看时信息模糊，从而防止他人窥视移动设备上的数据。
AI.motivation: 移动设备上的数据可视化（如健康、财务数据）虽方便用户随时查看，但他人可能通过窥视屏幕获取敏感信息，存在隐私泄露风险。
AI.method: 基于人类视觉感知特性，设计一种遮蔽方案，通过调整可视化内容的空间频率和亮度对比度，实现近距离可读、远距离不可见的效果，并通过两轮用户研究（共34人）验证设计有效性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在保持用户近距离正常查看的同时，显著降低了远距离窥视时的数据可读性，有效实现了隐私保护目标。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的感知驱动方法为移动设备数据可视化提供了有效的隐私保护方案，在实用性和安全性之间取得了平衡。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人类视觉感知的隐私保护可视化方法，通过调整颜色可视化中的空间频率和亮度对比度，使近距离观看时信息清晰，远距离观看时信息模糊，从而防止他人窥视移动设备上的数据。
ai_content.motivation: 移动设备上的数据可视化（如健康、财务数据）虽方便用户随时查看，但他人可能通过窥视屏幕获取敏感信息，存在隐私泄露风险。
ai_content.method: 基于人类视觉感知特性，设计一种遮蔽方案，通过调整可视化内容的空间频率和亮度对比度，实现近距离可读、远距离不可见的效果，并通过两轮用户研究（共34人）验证设计有效性。
ai_content.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在保持用户近距离正常查看的同时，显著降低了远距离窥视时的数据可读性，有效实现了隐私保护目标。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文提出的感知驱动方法为移动设备数据可视化提供了有效的隐私保护方案，在实用性和安全性之间取得了平衡。

search_text: Don't Peek at My Chart: Privacy-preserving Visualization for Mobile Devices 不要偷看我的图表：移动设备的隐私保护可视化 Data visualizations have been widely used on mobile devices like smartphones for various tasks (e.g., visualizing personal health and financial data), making it convenient for people to view such data anytime and anywhere. However, others nearby can also easily peek at the visualizations, resulting in personal data disclosure. In this paper, we propose a perception-driven approach to transform mobile data visualizations into privacy-preserving ones. Specifically, based on human visual perception, we develop a masking scheme to adjust the spatial frequency and luminance contrast of colored visualizations. The resulting visualization retains its original information in close proximity but reduces the visibility when viewed from a certain distance or further away. We conducted two user studies to inform the design of our approach (N=16) and systematically evaluate its performance (N=18), respectively. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in terms of privacy preservation for mobile data visualizations. 数据可视化已广泛应用于智能手机等移动设备上的各种任务（例如可视化个人健康和财务数据），使人们可以方便地随时随地查看这些数据。然而，附近的其他人也可以轻松地偷看可视化内容，从而导致个人数据泄露。在本文中，我们提出了一种感知驱动的方法，将移动数据可视化转变为隐私保护可视化。具体来说，基于人类视觉感知，我们开发了一种掩蔽方案来调整彩色可视化的空间频率和亮度对比度。生成的可视化结果保留了近距离的原始信息，但从一定距离或更远的地方查看时会降低可见性。我们进行了两项用户研究，分别为我们的方法的设计提供信息 (N=16) 并系统地评估其性能 (N=18)。结果证明了我们的方法在移动数据可视化隐私保护方面的有效性。 本文提出一种基于人类视觉感知的隐私保护可视化方法，通过调整颜色可视化中的空间频率和亮度对比度，使近距离观看时信息清晰，远距离观看时信息模糊，从而防止他人窥视移动设备上的数据。 Songheng Zhang,Dong Ma,Yong Wang cs.HC,cs.CR

authors_text: Serhad Sarica,Jianxi Luo
title: The Innovation Paradox: Concept Space Expansion with Diminishing Originality and the Promise of Creative AI
title_zh: 创新悖论：概念空间扩张与原创性递减以及创意人工智能的前景
abstract: Innovation, typically spurred by reusing, recombining, and synthesizing existing concepts, is expected to result in an exponential growth of the concept space over time. However, our statistical analysis of TechNet, which is a comprehensive technology semantic network encompassing over four million concepts derived from patent texts, reveals a linear rather than exponential expansion of the overall technological concept space. Moreover, there is a notable decline in the originality of newly created concepts. These trends can be attributed to the constraints of human cognitive abilities to innovate beyond an ever-growing space of prior art, among other factors. Integrating creative artificial intelligence (CAI) into the innovation process holds the potential to overcome these limitations and alter the observed trends in the future.
summary: Innovation, typically spurred by reusing, recombining, and synthesizing existing concepts, is expected to result in an exponential growth of the concept space over time. However, our statistical analysis of TechNet, which is a comprehensive technology semantic network encompassing over four million concepts derived from patent texts, reveals a linear rather than exponential expansion of the overall technological concept space. Moreover, there is a notable decline in the originality of newly created concepts. These trends can be attributed to the constraints of human cognitive abilities to innovate beyond an ever-growing space of prior art, among other factors. Integrating creative artificial intelligence (CAI) into the innovation process holds the potential to overcome these limitations and alter the observed trends in the future.
abstract_zh: 创新通常是通过重用、重组和综合现有概念来推动的，预计将导致概念空间随着时间的推移呈指数增长。然而，我们对 TechNet（一个综合技术语义网络，包含超过 400 万个源自专利文本的概念）的统计分析揭示了整个技术概念空间的线性而非指数扩展。此外，新概念的原创性明显下降。除其他因素外，这些趋势可归因于人类认知能力的限制，无法超越现有技术不断增长的空间进行创新。将创意人工智能 (CAI) 融入创新过程有可能克服这些限制并改变未来观察到的趋势。

AI.tldr: 分析创新过程中概念空间扩展的线性趋势及原创性下降问题，并探讨创造性AI的潜力。
AI.motivation: 探讨为何实际创新呈现线性增长而非预期的指数增长，并寻找突破人类认知限制的方法。
AI.method: 基于TechNet技术语义网络（包含四百万概念）进行统计分析，研究概念空间扩展模式及原创性变化趋势。
AI.result: 发现技术概念空间呈线性扩展而非指数增长，且新概念原创性随时间下降，主要受限于人类认知能力。
AI.conclusion: 认为引入创造性AI可克服人类认知限制，可能改变当前创新趋势。

authors_text: Avi Schwarzschild,Max Cembalest,Karthik Rao,Keegan Hines,John Dickerson
title: Reckoning with the Disagreement Problem: Explanation Consensus as a Training Objective
title_zh: 解决分歧问题：以解释共识作为培训目标
abstract: As neural networks increasingly make critical decisions in high-stakes settings, monitoring and explaining their behavior in an understandable and trustworthy manner is a necessity. One commonly used type of explainer is post hoc feature attribution, a family of methods for giving each feature in an input a score corresponding to its influence on a model's output. A major limitation of this family of explainers in practice is that they can disagree on which features are more important than others. Our contribution in this paper is a method of training models with this disagreement problem in mind. We do this by introducing a Post hoc Explainer Agreement Regularization (PEAR) loss term alongside the standard term corresponding to accuracy, an additional term that measures the difference in feature attribution between a pair of explainers. We observe on three datasets that we can train a model with this loss term to improve explanation consensus on unseen data, and see improved consensus between explainers other than those used in the loss term. We examine the trade-off between improved consensus and model performance. And finally, we study the influence our method has on feature attribution explanations.
summary: As neural networks increasingly make critical decisions in high-stakes settings, monitoring and explaining their behavior in an understandable and trustworthy manner is a necessity. One commonly used type of explainer is post hoc feature attribution, a family of methods for giving each feature in an input a score corresponding to its influence on a model's output. A major limitation of this family of explainers in practice is that they can disagree on which features are more important than others. Our contribution in this paper is a method of training models with this disagreement problem in mind. We do this by introducing a Post hoc Explainer Agreement Regularization (PEAR) loss term alongside the standard term corresponding to accuracy, an additional term that measures the difference in feature attribution between a pair of explainers. We observe on three datasets that we can train a model with this loss term to improve explanation consensus on unseen data, and see improved consensus between explainers other than those used in the loss term. We examine the trade-off between improved consensus and model performance. And finally, we study the influence our method has on feature attribution explanations.
abstract_zh: 随着神经网络越来越多地在高风险环境中做出关键决策，以可理解且值得信赖的方式监控和解释其行为是必要的。一种常用的解释器类型是事后特征归因，这是一系列方法，用于为输入中的每个特征提供与其对模型输出的影响相对应的分数。在实践中，这一系列解释者的一个主要限制是，他们可能会在哪些特征比其他特征更重要方面存在分歧。我们在本文中的贡献是一种考虑到这种分歧问题的训练模型的方法。我们通过引入事后解释器协议正则化（PEAR）损失项以及与准确性相对应的标准项来实现这一点，这是一个衡量一对解释器之间特征归因差异的附加项。我们在三个数据集上观察到，我们可以使用该损失项训练模型，以提高对未见数据的解释共识，并看到除损失项中使用的解释者之外的解释者之间的共识有所改善。我们研究了改进共识和模型性能之间的权衡。最后，我们研究我们的方法对特征归因解释的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种训练方法，通过引入事后解释器一致性正则化损失项，解决神经网络特征归因解释器之间的分歧问题。
AI.motivation: 现有事后特征归因方法在解释模型决策时存在解释器间不一致的缺陷，影响模型可信度与可解释性。
AI.method: 在标准准确率损失基础上，新增衡量成对解释器特征归因差异的PEAR损失项进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在三个数据集实验中，该方法提升了模型在未见数据上的解释一致性，且对非训练解释器也产生正迁移效果，同时分析了一致性与模型性能的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: PEAR方法有效缓解解释器分歧问题，但需注意一致性增强可能带来的轻微性能损失，为可解释AI提供了新的训练范式。

authors_text: Fangrui Lv,Jian Liang,Shuang Li,Jinming Zhang,Di Liu
title: Improving Generalization with Domain Convex Game
title_zh: 通过域凸博弈提高泛化能力
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) tends to alleviate the poor generalization capability of deep neural networks by learning model with multiple source domains. A classical solution to DG is domain augmentation, the common belief of which is that diversifying source domains will be conducive to the out-of-distribution generalization. However, these claims are understood intuitively, rather than mathematically. Our explorations empirically reveal that the correlation between model generalization and the diversity of domains may be not strictly positive, which limits the effectiveness of domain augmentation. This work therefore aim to guarantee and further enhance the validity of this strand. To this end, we propose a new perspective on DG that recasts it as a convex game between domains. We first encourage each diversified domain to enhance model generalization by elaborately designing a regularization term based on supermodularity. Meanwhile, a sample filter is constructed to eliminate low-quality samples, thereby avoiding the impact of potentially harmful information. Our framework presents a new avenue for the formal analysis of DG, heuristic analysis and extensive experiments demonstrate the rationality and effectiveness.

abstract_zh: 域泛化（DG）倾向于通过学习具有多个源域的模型来缓解深度神经网络泛化能力较差的问题。 DG 的一个经典解决方案是域增强，人们普遍认为源域多样化将有利于分布外泛化。然而，这些主张是通过直觉而不是数学来理解的。我们的探索经验表明，模型泛化与领域多样性之间的相关性可能并不严格为正，这限制了领域增强的有效性。因此，这项工作旨在保证并进一步增强该链的有效性。为此，我们提出了一种关于 DG 的新视角，将其重新塑造为域之间的凸博弈。我们首先鼓励每个多元化领域通过精心设计基于超模性的正则化项来增强模型泛化能力。同时构建样本过滤器，剔除低质量样本，从而避免潜在有害信息的影响。我们的框架为 DG 的形式分析提供了新的途径，启发式分析和广泛的实验证明了其合理性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过构建领域凸博弈框架，解决领域泛化中领域多样性与模型泛化能力关系不明确的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统领域增强方法依赖领域多样性提升泛化能力，但实证发现二者相关性可能不严格正相关，需新方法保障有效性。
AI.method: 将领域泛化建模为凸博弈，设计基于超模性的正则化项促进领域协同，并引入样本过滤器剔除低质量数据。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验验证表明框架提升了模型泛化能力，为DG提供了新的形式化分析路径。
AI.conclusion: 凸博弈框架有效解决了领域多样性与泛化能力的关联问题，为领域泛化研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Torsten Schlett,Christian Rathgeb,Juan Tapia,Christoph Busch
title: Considerations on the Evaluation of Biometric Quality Assessment Algorithms
title_zh: 生物特征质量评估算法评价的思考
abstract: Quality assessment algorithms can be used to estimate the utility of a biometric sample for the purpose of biometric recognition. "Error versus Discard Characteristic" (EDC) plots, and "partial Area Under Curve" (pAUC) values of curves therein, are generally used by researchers to evaluate the predictive performance of such quality assessment algorithms. An EDC curve depends on an error type such as the "False Non Match Rate" (FNMR), a quality assessment algorithm, a biometric recognition system, a set of comparisons each corresponding to a biometric sample pair, and a comparison score threshold corresponding to a starting error. To compute an EDC curve, comparisons are progressively discarded based on the associated samples' lowest quality scores, and the error is computed for the remaining comparisons. Additionally, a discard fraction limit or range must be selected to compute pAUC values, which can then be used to quantitatively rank quality assessment algorithms. This paper discusses and analyses various details for this kind of quality assessment algorithm evaluation, including general EDC properties, interpretability improvements for pAUC values based on a hard lower error limit and a soft upper error limit, the use of relative instead of discrete rankings, stepwise vs. linear curve interpolation, and normalisation of quality scores to a [0, 100] integer range. We also analyse the stability of quantitative quality assessment algorithm rankings based on pAUC values across varying pAUC discard fraction limits and starting errors, concluding that higher pAUC discard fraction limits should be preferred. The analyses are conducted both with synthetic data and with real face image and fingerprint data, with a focus on general modality-independent conclusions for EDC evaluations. Various EDC alternatives are discussed as well.

"Error versus Discard Characteristic" (EDC) plots, and "partial Area Under Curve" (pAUC) values of curves therein, are generally used by researchers to evaluate the predictive performance of such quality assessment algorithms. An EDC curve depends on an error type such as the "False Non Match Rate" (FNMR), a quality assessment algorithm, a biometric recognition system, a set of comparisons each corresponding to a biometric sample pair, and a comparison score threshold corresponding to a starting error. To compute an EDC curve, comparisons are progressively discarded based on the associated samples' lowest quality scores, and the error is computed for the remaining comparisons. Additionally, a discard fraction limit or range must be selected to compute pAUC values, which can then be used to quantitatively rank quality assessment algorithms. This paper discusses and analyses various details for this kind of quality assessment algorithm evaluation, including general EDC properties, interpretability improvements for pAUC values based on a hard lower error limit and a soft upper error limit, the use of relative instead of discrete rankings, stepwise vs. linear curve interpolation, and normalisation of quality scores to a [0, 100] integer range. We also analyse the stability of quantitative quality assessment algorithm rankings based on pAUC values across varying pAUC discard fraction limits and starting errors, concluding that higher pAUC discard fraction limits should be preferred. The analyses are conducted both with synthetic data and with real face image and fingerprint data, with a focus on general modality-independent conclusions for EDC evaluations. Various EDC alternatives are discussed as well.
abstract_zh: 质量评估算法可用于估计生物特征样本对于生物特征识别的效用。研究人员通常使用“误差与丢弃特性”(EDC) 图和其中曲线的“部分曲线下面积”(pAUC) 值来评估此类质量评估算法的预测性能。 EDC曲线取决于错误类型，例如“错误不匹配率”(FNMR)、质量评估算法、生物特征识别系统、各自对应于生物特征样本对的一组比较以及对应于起始错误的比较分数阈值。为了计算 EDC 曲线，根据相关样本的最低质量分数逐步放弃比较，并计算剩余比较的误差。此外，必须选择丢弃分数限制或范围来计算 pAUC 值，然后可以使用该值对质量评估算法进行定量排名。本文讨论并分析了此类质量评估算法评估的各种细节，包括一般 EDC 属性、基于硬误差下限和软误差上限的 pAUC 值的可解释性改进、使用相对排名而不是离散排名、逐步与线性曲线插值以及将质量分数标准化为 [0, 100] 整数范围。我们还分析了基于不同 pAUC 丢弃分数限制和起始误差的 pAUC 值的定量质量评估算法排名的稳定性，得出的结论是应首选较高的 pAUC 丢弃分数限制。这些分析使用合成数据以及真实人脸图像和指纹数据进行，重点是 EDC 评估的一般独立于模态的结论。还讨论了各种 EDC 替代品。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了生物特征质量评估算法的评估方法，重点分析EDC曲线和pAUC值的计算与优化。
AI.motivation: 现有质量评估算法缺乏统一的评估标准，需通过EDC和pAUC等指标量化算法性能并改进可解释性。
AI.method: 通过合成数据与真实人脸、指纹数据，分析EDC曲线特性、pAUC计算参数（如丢弃分数范围、误差限制）及排名稳定性。
AI.result: 较高pAUC丢弃分数限能提升排名稳定性，相对排名优于离散排名，标准化质量分数至[0,100]范围更有效。
AI.conclusion: 推荐采用较高丢弃分数限以优化评估，且结论适用于多种生物特征模态，为算法比较提供通用框架。

authors_text: Ege Özsoy,Tobias Czempiel,Felix Holm,Chantal Pellegrini,Nassir Navab
title: LABRAD-OR: Lightweight Memory Scene Graphs for Accurate Bimodal Reasoning in Dynamic Operating Rooms
title_zh: LABRAD-OR：用于动态手术室中精确双峰推理的轻量级内存场景图
abstract: Modern surgeries are performed in complex and dynamic settings, including ever-changing interactions between medical staff, patients, and equipment. The holistic modeling of the operating room (OR) is, therefore, a challenging but essential task, with the potential to optimize the performance of surgical teams and aid in developing new surgical technologies to improve patient outcomes. The holistic representation of surgical scenes as semantic scene graphs (SGG), where entities are represented as nodes and relations between them as edges, is a promising direction for fine-grained semantic OR understanding. We propose, for the first time, the use of temporal information for more accurate and consistent holistic OR modeling. Specifically, we introduce memory scene graphs, where the scene graphs of previous time steps act as the temporal representation guiding the current prediction. We design an end-to-end architecture that intelligently fuses the temporal information of our lightweight memory scene graphs with the visual information from point clouds and images. We evaluate our method on the 4D-OR dataset and demonstrate that integrating temporality leads to more accurate and consistent results achieving an +5% increase and a new SOTA of 0.88 in macro F1. This work opens the path for representing the entire surgery history with memory scene graphs and improves the holistic understanding in the OR. Introducing scene graphs as memory representations can offer a valuable tool for many temporal understanding tasks.
summary: Modern surgeries are performed in complex and dynamic settings, including ever-changing interactions between medical staff, patients, and equipment. The holistic modeling of the operating room (OR) is, therefore, a challenging but essential task, with the potential to optimize the performance of surgical teams and aid in developing new surgical technologies to improve patient outcomes. The holistic representation of surgical scenes as semantic scene graphs (SGG), where entities are represented as nodes and relations between them as edges, is a promising direction for fine-grained semantic OR understanding. We propose, for the first time, the use of temporal information for more accurate and consistent holistic OR modeling. Specifically, we introduce memory scene graphs, where the scene graphs of previous time steps act as the temporal representation guiding the current prediction. We evaluate our method on the 4D-OR dataset and demonstrate that integrating temporality leads to more accurate and consistent results achieving an +5% increase and a new SOTA of 0.88 in macro F1. This work opens the path for representing the entire surgery history with memory scene graphs and improves the holistic understanding in the OR. Introducing scene graphs as memory representations can offer a valuable tool for many temporal understanding tasks.
abstract_zh: 现代手术是在复杂和动态的环境中进行的，包括医务人员、患者和设备之间不断变化的相互作用。因此，手术室 (OR) 的整体建模是一项具有挑战性但又必不可少的任务，它有可能优化手术团队的绩效，并有助于开发新的手术技术以改善患者的治疗效果。将手术场景整体表示为语义场景图（SGG），其中实体表示为节点，实体之间的关系表示为边，这是细粒度语义 OR 理解的一个有前途的方向。我们首次建议使用时间信息来进行更准确和一致的整体 OR 建模。具体来说，我们引入了内存场景图，其中先前时间步骤的场景图充当指导当前预测的时间表示。我们设计了一种端到端架构，可以智能地将轻量级内存场景图的时间信息与来自点云和图像的视觉信息融合在一起。我们在 4D-OR 数据集上评估我们的方法，并证明整合时间性可以带来更准确和一致的结果，在宏 F1 中实现 +5% 的增长和 0.88 的新 SOTA。这项工作开辟了用记忆场景图表示整个手术历史的道路，并提高了手术室的整体理解。引入场景图作为内存表示可以为许多时间理解任务提供有价值的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LABRAD-OR方法，通过轻量级记忆场景图整合时序信息与多模态视觉数据，实现动态手术室环境的精准语义建模。
AI.motivation: 手术室环境动态复杂，传统方法难以捕捉时序变化与多模态交互，导致场景理解不准确，影响手术团队协作与技术开发。
AI.method: 设计记忆场景图结构，利用历史时序场景图引导当前预测，并融合点云与图像的视觉信息，构建端到端时序-视觉联合模型。
AI.result: 在4D-OR数据集上实现宏观F1分数0.88（提升5%），达到当时最优性能，验证了时序建模对场景理解的提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 记忆场景图框架为手术室全历史建模提供新思路，其时序-多模态融合方法可拓展至其他动态场景理解任务。

search_text: LABRAD-OR: Lightweight Memory Scene Graphs for Accurate Bimodal Reasoning in Dynamic Operating Rooms LABRAD-OR：用于动态手术室中精确双峰推理的轻量级内存场景图 Modern surgeries are performed in complex and dynamic settings, including ever-changing interactions between medical staff, patients, and equipment. The holistic modeling of the operating room (OR) is, therefore, a challenging but essential task, with the potential to optimize the performance of surgical teams and aid in developing new surgical technologies to improve patient outcomes. The holistic representation of surgical scenes as semantic scene graphs (SGG), where entities are represented as nodes and relations between them as edges, is a promising direction for fine-grained semantic OR understanding. We propose, for the first time, the use of temporal information for more accurate and consistent holistic OR modeling. Specifically, we introduce memory scene graphs, where the scene graphs of previous time steps act as the temporal representation guiding the current prediction. We design an end-to-end architecture that intelligently fuses the temporal information of our lightweight memory scene graphs with the visual information from point clouds and images. We evaluate our method on the 4D-OR dataset and demonstrate that integrating temporality leads to more accurate and consistent results achieving an +5% increase and a new SOTA of 0.88 in macro F1. This work opens the path for representing the entire surgery history with memory scene graphs and improves the holistic understanding in the OR. Introducing scene graphs as memory representations can offer a valuable tool for many temporal understanding tasks. 现代手术是在复杂和动态的环境中进行的，包括医务人员、患者和设备之间不断变化的相互作用。因此，手术室 (OR) 的整体建模是一项具有挑战性但又必不可少的任务，它有可能优化手术团队的绩效，并有助于开发新的手术技术以改善患者的治疗效果。将手术场景整体表示为语义场景图（SGG），其中实体表示为节点，实体之间的关系表示为边，这是细粒度语义 OR 理解的一个有前途的方向。我们首次建议使用时间信息来进行更准确和一致的整体 OR 建模。具体来说，我们引入了内存场景图，其中先前时间步骤的场景图充当指导当前预测的时间表示。我们设计了一种端到端架构，可以智能地将轻量级内存场景图的时间信息与来自点云和图像的视觉信息融合在一起。我们在 4D-OR 数据集上评估我们的方法，并证明整合时间性可以带来更准确和一致的结果，在宏 F1 中实现 +5% 的增长和 0.88 的新 SOTA。这项工作开辟了用记忆场景图表示整个手术历史的道路，并提高了手术室的整体理解。引入场景图作为内存表示可以为许多时间理解任务提供有价值的工具。 本文提出LABRAD-OR方法，通过轻量级记忆场景图整合时序信息与多模态视觉数据，实现动态手术室环境的精准语义建模。 Ege Özsoy,Tobias Czempiel,Felix Holm,Chantal Pellegrini,Nassir Navab cs.CV

authors_text: Guofeng Mei,Hao Tang,Xiaoshui Huang,Weijie Wang,Juan Liu,Jian Zhang,Luc Van Gool,Qiang Wu
title: Unsupervised Deep Probabilistic Approach for Partial Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: 用于部分点云配准的无监督深度概率方法
abstract: Deep point cloud registration methods face challenges to partial overlaps and rely on labeled data. To address these issues, we propose UDPReg, an unsupervised deep probabilistic registration framework for point clouds with partial overlaps. Specifically, we first adopt a network to learn posterior probability distributions of Gaussian mixture models (GMMs) from point clouds. To handle partial point cloud registration, we apply the Sinkhorn algorithm to predict the distribution-level correspondences under the constraint of the mixing weights of GMMs. To enable unsupervised learning, we design three distribution consistency-based losses: self-consistency, cross-consistency, and local contrastive. The self-consistency loss is formulated by encouraging GMMs in Euclidean and feature spaces to share identical posterior distributions. The cross-consistency loss derives from the fact that the points of two partially overlapping point clouds belonging to the same clusters share the cluster centroids. The cross-consistency loss allows the network to flexibly learn a transformation-invariant posterior distribution of two aligned point clouds. The local contrastive loss facilitates the network to extract discriminative local features. Our UDPReg achieves competitive performance on the 3DMatch/3DLoMatch and ModelNet/ModelLoNet benchmarks.
summary: Deep point cloud registration methods face challenges to partial overlaps and rely on labeled data. To address these issues, we propose UDPReg, an unsupervised deep probabilistic registration framework for point clouds with partial overlaps. Specifically, we first adopt a network to learn posterior probability distributions of Gaussian mixture models (GMMs) from point clouds. To handle partial point cloud registration, we apply the Sinkhorn algorithm to predict the distribution-level correspondences under the constraint of the mixing weights of GMMs. To enable unsupervised learning, we design three distribution consistency-based losses: self-consistency, cross-consistency, and local contrastive. The self-consistency loss is formulated by encouraging GMMs in Euclidean and feature spaces to share identical posterior distributions. The cross-consistency loss derives from the fact that the points of two partially overlapping point clouds belonging to the same clusters share the cluster centroids. The cross-consistency loss allows the network to flexibly learn a transformation-invariant posterior distribution of two aligned point clouds. The local contrastive loss facilitates the network to extract discriminative local features. Our UDPReg achieves competitive performance on the 3DMatch/3DLoMatch and ModelNet/ModelLoNet benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 深度点云配准方法面临部分重叠的挑战并依赖于标记数据。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 UDPReg，这是一种用于部分重叠点云的无监督深度概率配准框架。具体来说，我们首先采用网络从点云学习高斯混合模型（GMM）的后验概率分布。为了处理部分点云配准，我们应用 Sinkhorn 算法来预测 GMM 混合权重约束下的分布级别对应关系。为了实现无监督学习，我们设计了三种基于分布一致性的损失：自一致性、交叉一致性和局部对比。自一致性损失是通过鼓励欧几里得和特征空间中的 GMM 共享相同的后验分布来制定的。交叉一致性损失源自属于同一簇的两个部分重叠的点云的点共享簇质心的事实。交叉一致性损失允许网络灵活地学习两个对齐点云的变换不变后验分布。局部对比损失有助于网络提取有区别的局部特征。我们的 UDPReg 在 3DMatch/3DLoMatch 和 ModelNet/ModelLoNet 基准测试中实现了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督的深度概率框架UDPReg，用于解决点云部分重叠情况下的注册问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度点云注册方法在处理部分重叠数据时存在挑战，且依赖标注数据。为解决这一问题，本文旨在开发一种无需标注数据的无监督方法，以提升部分重叠点云的注册性能。
AI.method: 采用网络学习高斯混合模型（GMM）的后验概率分布，结合Sinkhorn算法预测分布级对应关系，并设计自一致性损失、交叉一致性损失和局部对比损失，以实现无监督学习。
AI.result: UDPReg在3DMatch/3DLoMatch和ModelNet/ModelLoNet基准测试中表现出具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的UDPReg通过概率建模与无监督损失设计，有效解决了部分重叠点云注册问题，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Unsupervised Deep Probabilistic Approach for Partial Point Cloud Registration 用于部分点云配准的无监督深度概率方法 Deep point cloud registration methods face challenges to partial overlaps and rely on labeled data. To address these issues, we propose UDPReg, an unsupervised deep probabilistic registration framework for point clouds with partial overlaps. Specifically, we first adopt a network to learn posterior probability distributions of Gaussian mixture models (GMMs) from point clouds. To handle partial point cloud registration, we apply the Sinkhorn algorithm to predict the distribution-level correspondences under the constraint of the mixing weights of GMMs. To enable unsupervised learning, we design three distribution consistency-based losses: self-consistency, cross-consistency, and local contrastive. The self-consistency loss is formulated by encouraging GMMs in Euclidean and feature spaces to share identical posterior distributions. The cross-consistency loss derives from the fact that the points of two partially overlapping point clouds belonging to the same clusters share the cluster centroids. The cross-consistency loss allows the network to flexibly learn a transformation-invariant posterior distribution of two aligned point clouds. The local contrastive loss facilitates the network to extract discriminative local features. Our UDPReg achieves competitive performance on the 3DMatch/3DLoMatch and ModelNet/ModelLoNet benchmarks. 深度点云配准方法面临部分重叠的挑战并依赖于标记数据。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 UDPReg，这是一种用于部分重叠点云的无监督深度概率配准框架。具体来说，我们首先采用网络从点云学习高斯混合模型（GMM）的后验概率分布。为了处理部分点云配准，我们应用 Sinkhorn 算法来预测 GMM 混合权重约束下的分布级别对应关系。为了实现无监督学习，我们设计了三种基于分布一致性的损失：自一致性、交叉一致性和局部对比。自一致性损失是通过鼓励欧几里得和特征空间中的 GMM 共享相同的后验分布来制定的。交叉一致性损失源自属于同一簇的两个部分重叠的点云的点共享簇质心的事实。交叉一致性损失允许网络灵活地学习两个对齐点云的变换不变后验分布。局部对比损失有助于网络提取有区别的局部特征。我们的 UDPReg 在 3DMatch/3DLoMatch 和 ModelNet/ModelLoNet 基准测试中实现了具有竞争力的性能。 本文提出了一种无监督的深度概率框架UDPReg，用于解决点云部分重叠情况下的注册问题。 Guofeng Mei,Hao Tang,Xiaoshui Huang,Weijie Wang,Juan Liu,Jian Zhang,Luc Van Gool,Qiang Wu cs.CV,cs.AI,math.PR

authors_text: Hantao Yao,Rui Zhang,Changsheng Xu
title: Visual-Language Prompt Tuning with Knowledge-guided Context Optimization
title_zh: 通过知识引导的上下文优化进行视觉语言提示调整
abstract: Prompt tuning is an effective way to adapt the pre-trained visual-language model (VLM) to the downstream task using task-related textual tokens. Representative CoOp-based work combines the learnable textual tokens with the class tokens to obtain specific textual knowledge. However, the specific textual knowledge is the worse generalization to the unseen classes because it forgets the essential general textual knowledge having a strong generalization ability. To tackle this issue, we introduce a novel Knowledge-guided Context Optimization (KgCoOp) to enhance the generalization ability of the learnable prompt for unseen classes. The key insight of KgCoOp is that forgetting about essential knowledge can be alleviated by reducing the discrepancy between the learnable prompt and the hand-crafted prompt. Especially, KgCoOp minimizes the discrepancy between the textual embeddings generated by learned prompts and the hand-crafted prompts. Finally, adding the KgCoOp upon the contrastive loss can make a discriminative prompt for both seen and unseen tasks. Extensive evaluation of several benchmarks demonstrates that the proposed Knowledge-guided Context Optimization is an efficient method for prompt tuning, \emph{i.e.,} achieves better performance with less training time.
summary: Prompt tuning is an effective way to adapt the pre-trained visual-language model (VLM) to the downstream task using task-related textual tokens. Representative CoOp-based work combines the learnable textual tokens with the class tokens to obtain specific textual knowledge. However, the specific textual knowledge is the worse generalization to the unseen classes because it forgets the essential general textual knowledge having a strong generalization ability. To tackle this issue, we introduce a novel Knowledge-guided Context Optimization (KgCoOp) to enhance the generalization ability of the learnable prompt for unseen classes. The key insight of KgCoOp is that forgetting about essential knowledge can be alleviated by reducing the discrepancy between the learnable prompt and the hand-crafted prompt. Especially, KgCoOp minimizes the discrepancy between the textual embeddings generated by learned prompts and the hand-crafted prompts. Finally, adding the KgCoOp upon the contrastive loss can make a discriminative prompt for both seen and unseen tasks. Extensive evaluation of several benchmarks demonstrates that the proposed Knowledge-guided Context Optimization is an efficient method for prompt tuning, \emph{i.e.,} achieves better performance with less training time.
abstract_zh: 提示调整是使用与任务相关的文本标记使预训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）适应下游任务的有效方法。基于 CoOp 的代表性工作将可学习的文本标记与类标记相结合，以获得特定的文本知识。然而，特定的文本知识对于未见过的类的泛化能力较差，因为它忘记了具有很强泛化能力的本质的一般文本知识。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的知识引导上下文优化（KgCoOp）来增强可学习提示对未见过的类的泛化能力。 KgCoOp 的关键见解是，可以通过减少可学习提示和手工制作提示之间的差异来减轻对基本知识的遗忘。特别是，KgCoOp 最大限度地减少了学习提示生成的文本嵌入与手工制作的提示之间的差异。最后，在对比损失上添加 KgCoOp 可以对已见和未见的任务做出区分提示。对多个基准的广泛评估表明，所提出的知识引导上下文优化是一种有效的提示调整方法，\emph{即}以更少的训练时间实现了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识引导的上下文优化方法（KgCoOp），通过减少可学习提示与手工提示的差异，提升视觉-语言模型在未见类别的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如CoOp）过度依赖特定文本知识，导致忽略通用知识，从而在未见类别上泛化能力不足。
AI.method: KgCoOp通过最小化学习提示与手工提示的文本嵌入差异，并结合对比损失优化提示，增强模型对已见和未见任务的区分能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，KgCoOp以更少训练时间取得优于现有方法的性能表现。
