search_text: Visual-Language Prompt Tuning with Knowledge-guided Context Optimization 通过知识引导的上下文优化进行视觉语言提示调整 Prompt tuning is an effective way to adapt the pre-trained visual-language model (VLM) to the downstream task using task-related textual tokens. Representative CoOp-based work combines the learnable textual tokens with the class tokens to obtain specific textual knowledge. However, the specific textual knowledge is the worse generalization to the unseen classes because it forgets the essential general textual knowledge having a strong generalization ability. To tackle this issue, we introduce a novel Knowledge-guided Context Optimization (KgCoOp) to enhance the generalization ability of the learnable prompt for unseen classes. The key insight of KgCoOp is that forgetting about essential knowledge can be alleviated by reducing the discrepancy between the learnable prompt and the hand-crafted prompt. Especially, KgCoOp minimizes the discrepancy between the textual embeddings generated by learned prompts and the hand-crafted prompts. Finally, adding the KgCoOp upon the contrastive loss can make a discriminative prompt for both seen and unseen tasks. Extensive evaluation of several benchmarks demonstrates that the proposed Knowledge-guided Context Optimization is an efficient method for prompt tuning, \emph{i.e.,} achieves better performance with less training time. 提示调整是使用与任务相关的文本标记使预训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）适应下游任务的有效方法。基于 CoOp 的代表性工作将可学习的文本标记与类标记相结合，以获得特定的文本知识。然而，特定的文本知识对于未见过的类的泛化能力较差，因为它忘记了具有很强泛化能力的本质的一般文本知识。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的知识引导上下文优化（KgCoOp）来增强可学习提示对未见过的类的泛化能力。 KgCoOp 的关键见解是，可以通过减少可学习提示和手工制作提示之间的差异来减轻对基本知识的遗忘。特别是，KgCoOp 最大限度地减少了学习提示生成的文本嵌入与手工制作的提示之间的差异。最后，在对比损失上添加 KgCoOp 可以对已见和未见的任务做出区分提示。对多个基准的广泛评估表明，所提出的知识引导上下文优化是一种有效的提示调整方法，\emph{即}以更少的训练时间实现了更好的性能。 本文提出一种基于知识引导的上下文优化方法（KgCoOp），通过减少可学习提示与手工提示的差异，提升视觉-语言模型在未见类别的泛化能力。 Hantao Yao,Rui Zhang,Changsheng Xu cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Giovanna K. Conrado,Amir K. Goharshady,Harshit J. Motwani,Sergei Novozhilov
title: Combinatorial Parameterized Algorithms for Chemical Descriptors based on Molecular Graph Sparsity
title_zh: 基于分子图稀疏性的化学描述符组合参数化算法
abstract: We present efficient combinatorial parameterized algorithms for several classical graph-based counting problems in computational chemistry, including (i) Kekule structures, (ii) the Hosoya index, (iii) the Merrifield-Simmons index, and (iv) Graph entropy based on matchings and independent sets. All these problems were known to be #P-complete. Building on the intuition that molecular graphs are often sparse and tree-like, we provide fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) algorithms using treewidth as our parameter. We also provide extensive experimental results over the entire PubChem database of chemical compounds, containing more than 113 million real-world molecules. In our experiments, we observe that the molecules are indeed sparse and tree-like, with more than 99.9% of them having a treewidth of at most 5. This justifies our choice of parameter. Our experiments also illustrate considerable improvements over the previous approaches. Based on these results, we argue that parameterized algorithms, especially based on treewidth, should be adopted as the default approach for problems in computational chemistry that are defined over molecular graphs.
summary: We present efficient combinatorial parameterized algorithms for several classical graph-based counting problems in computational chemistry, including (i) Kekule structures, (ii) the Hosoya index, (iii) the Merrifield-Simmons index, and (iv) Graph entropy based on matchings and independent sets. All these problems were known to be #P-complete. Building on the intuition that molecular graphs are often sparse and tree-like, we provide fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) algorithms using treewidth as our parameter. We also provide extensive experimental results over the entire PubChem database of chemical compounds, containing more than 113 million real-world molecules. In our experiments, we observe that the molecules are indeed sparse and tree-like, with more than 99.9% of them having a treewidth of at most 5. This justifies our choice of parameter. Our experiments also illustrate considerable improvements over the previous approaches. Based on these results, we argue that parameterized algorithms, especially based on treewidth, should be adopted as the default approach for problems in computational chemistry that are defined over molecular graphs.
abstract_zh: 我们为计算化学中的几个经典的基于图的计数问题提出了有效的组合参数化算法，包括（i）Kekule 结构，（ii）Hosoya 指数，（iii）Merrifield-Simmons 指数，以及（iv）基于匹配和独立集的图熵。所有这些问题都被认为是#P-完整的。基于分子图通常是稀疏和树状的直觉，我们提供使用树宽作为参数的固定参数易处理（FPT）算法。我们还提供整个 PubChem 化合物数据库的广泛实验结果，其中包含超过 1.13 亿个真实分子。在我们的实验中，我们观察到分子确实是稀疏的、树状的，其中超过 99.9% 的分子树宽最多为 5。这证明了我们选择参数的合理性。我们的实验还表明比以前的方法有相当大的改进。基于这些结果，我们认为参数化算法，特别是基于树宽的算法，应该被采用作为通过分子图定义的计算化学问题的默认方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于分子图稀疏性的组合参数化算法，解决计算化学中的#P完全问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以高效解决计算化学中的图计数问题，而分子图通常具有稀疏性和树状结构，适合参数化算法。
AI.method: 采用树宽作为参数设计固定参数可解（FPT）算法，并在PubChem数据库进行大规模实验验证。
AI.result: 实验显示99.9%分子树宽≤5，新算法效率显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 参数化算法（尤其基于树宽）应作为分子图问题的默认求解方法。

authors_text: Alex Keilmann,Michael Godehardt,Ali Moghiseh,Claudia Redenbach,Katja Schladitz
title: Improved Anisotropic Gaussian Filters
title_zh: 改进的各向异性高斯滤波器
abstract: Elongated anisotropic Gaussian filters are used for the orientation estimation of fibers. In cases where computed tomography images are noisy, roughly resolved, and of low contrast, they are the method of choice even if being efficient only in virtual 2D slices. However, minor inaccuracies in the anisotropic Gaussian filters can carry over to the orientation estimation. Therefore, this paper proposes a modified algorithm for 2D anisotropic Gaussian filters and shows that this improves their precision. Applied to synthetic images of fiber bundles, it is more accurate and robust to noise. Finally, the effectiveness of the approach is shown by applying it to real-world images of sheet molding compounds.
summary: Elongated anisotropic Gaussian filters are used for the orientation estimation of fibers. In cases where computed tomography images are noisy, roughly resolved, and of low contrast, they are the method of choice even if being efficient only in virtual 2D slices. However, minor inaccuracies in the anisotropic Gaussian filters can carry over to the orientation estimation. Therefore, this paper proposes a modified algorithm for 2D anisotropic Gaussian filters and shows that this improves their precision. Applied to synthetic images of fiber bundles, it is more accurate and robust to noise. Finally, the effectiveness of the approach is shown by applying it to real-world images of sheet molding compounds.
abstract_zh: 细长各向异性高斯滤波器用于纤维的方向估计。在计算机断层扫描图像有噪声、分辨率粗略且对比度低的情况下，它们是首选方法，即使仅在虚拟 2D 切片中有效。然而，各向异性高斯滤波器中的微小误差可能会影响方向估计。因此，本文提出了一种二维各向异性高斯滤波器的改进算法，并表明这提高了其精度。应用于纤维束的合成图像，它更加准确且对噪声具有鲁棒性。最后，通过将其应用于片状模塑料的真实图像，显示了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的各向异性高斯滤波器算法，以提升纤维方向估计的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有各向异性高斯滤波器在噪声大、低对比度的CT图像中存在方向估计误差，需改进算法提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计改进的2D各向异性高斯滤波器算法，优化滤波过程以减少误差。
AI.result: 在合成纤维束图像和实际片状模塑料图像中，新方法展现更高精度与更强抗噪能力。
AI.conclusion: 改进算法有效提升方向估计性能，适用于实际工业图像处理场景。

authors_text: Chong Bao,Yinda Zhang,Bangbang Yang,Tianxing Fan,Zesong Yang,Hujun Bao,Guofeng Zhang,Zhaopeng Cui
title: SINE: Semantic-driven Image-based NeRF Editing with Prior-guided Editing Field
title_zh: SINE：具有先验引导编辑场的语义驱动的基于图像的 NeRF 编辑
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project Page: https://zju3dv.github.io/sine/
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project Page: https://zju3dv.github.io/sine/
abstract: Despite the great success in 2D editing using user-friendly tools, such as Photoshop, semantic strokes, or even text prompts, similar capabilities in 3D areas are still limited, either relying on 3D modeling skills or allowing editing within only a few categories. In this paper, we present a novel semantic-driven NeRF editing approach, which enables users to edit a neural radiance field with a single image, and faithfully delivers edited novel views with high fidelity and multi-view consistency. To achieve this goal, we propose a prior-guided editing field to encode fine-grained geometric and texture editing in 3D space, and develop a series of techniques to aid the editing process, including cyclic constraints with a proxy mesh to facilitate geometric supervision, a color compositing mechanism to stabilize semantic-driven texture editing, and a feature-cluster-based regularization to preserve the irrelevant content unchanged. Extensive experiments and editing examples on both real-world and synthetic data demonstrate that our method achieves photo-realistic 3D editing using only a single edited image, pushing the bound of semantic-driven editing in 3D real-world scenes. Our project webpage: https://zju3dv.github.io/sine/.
summary: Despite the great success in 2D editing using user-friendly tools, such as Photoshop, semantic strokes, or even text prompts, similar capabilities in 3D areas are still limited, either relying on 3D modeling skills or allowing editing within only a few categories. In this paper, we present a novel semantic-driven NeRF editing approach, which enables users to edit a neural radiance field with a single image, and faithfully delivers edited novel views with high fidelity and multi-view consistency. To achieve this goal, we propose a prior-guided editing field to encode fine-grained geometric and texture editing in 3D space, and develop a series of techniques to aid the editing process, including cyclic constraints with a proxy mesh to facilitate geometric supervision, a color compositing mechanism to stabilize semantic-driven texture editing, and a feature-cluster-based regularization to preserve the irrelevant content unchanged. Extensive experiments and editing examples on both real-world and synthetic data demonstrate that our method achieves photo-realistic 3D editing using only a single edited image, pushing the bound of semantic-driven editing in 3D real-world scenes. Our project webpage: https://zju3dv.github.io/sine/.
abstract_zh: 尽管使用 Photoshop、语义笔画甚至文本提示等用户友好工具在 2D 编辑方面取得了巨大成功，但 3D 领域的类似功能仍然有限，要么依赖 3D 建模技能，要么只允许在少数类别内进行编辑。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的语义驱动的 NeRF 编辑方法，该方法使用户能够使用单个图像编辑神经辐射场，并忠实地提供高保真度和多视图一致性的编辑后的新颖视图。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一个先验引导的编辑领域来编码3D空间中的细粒度几何和纹理编辑，并开发了一系列技术来辅助编辑过程，包括使用代理网格的循环约束以促进几何监督、稳定语义驱动的纹理编辑的颜色合成机制以及基于特征簇的正则化以保持不相关内容不变。对现实世界和合成数据的大量实验和编辑示例表明，我们的方法仅使用单个编辑图像即可实现照片级真实感 3D 编辑，从而突破了 3D 现实世界场景中语义驱动编辑的界限。我们的项目网页：https://zju3dv.github.io/sine/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义的单图像驱动NeRF编辑方法SINE，实现高保真多视角一致的3D场景编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有3D编辑工具依赖专业建模技能或仅支持有限类别，缺乏类似Photoshop等2D工具的用户友好性与编辑灵活性。
AI.method: 设计先验引导编辑场编码几何纹理信息，结合代理网格循环约束、颜色合成机制和特征聚类正则化技术，实现单图像驱动的语义编辑。
AI.result: 在真实与合成数据集上验证了方法有效性，仅需单张编辑图像即可生成具有照片级真实感的多视角一致3D编辑结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统语义驱动编辑在3D场景中的局限，为用户友好型3D内容创作提供了新范式。

search_text: SINE: Semantic-driven Image-based NeRF Editing with Prior-guided Editing Field SINE：具有先验引导编辑场的语义驱动的基于图像的 NeRF 编辑 Despite the great success in 2D editing using user-friendly tools, such as Photoshop, semantic strokes, or even text prompts, similar capabilities in 3D areas are still limited, either relying on 3D modeling skills or allowing editing within only a few categories. In this paper, we present a novel semantic-driven NeRF editing approach, which enables users to edit a neural radiance field with a single image, and faithfully delivers edited novel views with high fidelity and multi-view consistency. To achieve this goal, we propose a prior-guided editing field to encode fine-grained geometric and texture editing in 3D space, and develop a series of techniques to aid the editing process, including cyclic constraints with a proxy mesh to facilitate geometric supervision, a color compositing mechanism to stabilize semantic-driven texture editing, and a feature-cluster-based regularization to preserve the irrelevant content unchanged. Extensive experiments and editing examples on both real-world and synthetic data demonstrate that our method achieves photo-realistic 3D editing using only a single edited image, pushing the bound of semantic-driven editing in 3D real-world scenes. Our project webpage: https://zju3dv.github.io/sine/. 尽管使用 Photoshop、语义笔画甚至文本提示等用户友好工具在 2D 编辑方面取得了巨大成功，但 3D 领域的类似功能仍然有限，要么依赖 3D 建模技能，要么只允许在少数类别内进行编辑。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的语义驱动的 NeRF 编辑方法，该方法使用户能够使用单个图像编辑神经辐射场，并忠实地提供高保真度和多视图一致性的编辑后的新颖视图。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一个先验引导的编辑领域来编码3D空间中的细粒度几何和纹理编辑，并开发了一系列技术来辅助编辑过程，包括使用代理网格的循环约束以促进几何监督、稳定语义驱动的纹理编辑的颜色合成机制以及基于特征簇的正则化以保持不相关内容不变。对现实世界和合成数据的大量实验和编辑示例表明，我们的方法仅使用单个编辑图像即可实现照片级真实感 3D 编辑，从而突破了 3D 现实世界场景中语义驱动编辑的界限。我们的项目网页：https://zju3dv.github.io/sine/。 本文提出了一种基于语义的单图像驱动NeRF编辑方法SINE，实现高保真多视角一致的3D场景编辑。 Chong Bao,Yinda Zhang,Bangbang Yang,Tianxing Fan,Zesong Yang,Hujun Bao,Guofeng Zhang,Zhaopeng Cui cs.CV

authors_text: Jiacheng Wei,Hao Wang,Jiashi Feng,Guosheng Lin,Kim-Hui Yap
title: TAPS3D: Text-Guided 3D Textured Shape Generation from Pseudo Supervision
title_zh: TAPS3D：通过伪监督生成文本引导的 3D 纹理形状
abstract: In this paper, we investigate an open research task of generating controllable 3D textured shapes from the given textual descriptions. Previous works either require ground truth caption labeling or extensive optimization time. To resolve these issues, we present a novel framework, TAPS3D, to train a text-guided 3D shape generator with pseudo captions. Specifically, based on rendered 2D images, we retrieve relevant words from the CLIP vocabulary and construct pseudo captions using templates. Our constructed captions provide high-level semantic supervision for generated 3D shapes. Further, in order to produce fine-grained textures and increase geometry diversity, we propose to adopt low-level image regularization to enable fake-rendered images to align with the real ones. During the inference phase, our proposed model can generate 3D textured shapes from the given text without any additional optimization. We conduct extensive experiments to analyze each of our proposed components and show the efficacy of our framework in generating high-fidelity 3D textured and text-relevant shapes.
summary: In this paper, we investigate an open research task of generating controllable 3D textured shapes from the given textual descriptions. Previous works either require ground truth caption labeling or extensive optimization time. To resolve these issues, we present a novel framework, TAPS3D, to train a text-guided 3D shape generator with pseudo captions. Specifically, based on rendered 2D images, we retrieve relevant words from the CLIP vocabulary and construct pseudo captions using templates. Our constructed captions provide high-level semantic supervision for generated 3D shapes. Further, in order to produce fine-grained textures and increase geometry diversity, we propose to adopt low-level image regularization to enable fake-rendered images to align with the real ones. During the inference phase, our proposed model can generate 3D textured shapes from the given text without any additional optimization. We conduct extensive experiments to analyze each of our proposed components and show the efficacy of our framework in generating high-fidelity 3D textured and text-relevant shapes.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了一项开放研究任务，即根据给定的文本描述生成可控的 3D 纹理形状。以前的作品要么需要真实的标题标签，要么需要大量的优化时间。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个新颖的框架 TAPS3D，用于训练带有伪字幕的文本引导 3D 形状生成器。具体来说，基于渲染的 2D 图像，我们从 CLIP 词汇表中检索相关单词，并使用模板构建伪字幕。我们构建的标题为生成的 3D 形状提供高级语义监督。此外，为了产生细粒度的纹理并增加几何多样性，我们建议采用低级图像正则化以使假渲染图像与真实图像对齐。在推理阶段，我们提出的模型可以根据给定文本生成 3D 纹理形状，而无需任何额外的优化。我们进行了大量的实验来分析我们提出的每个组件，并展示我们的框架在生成高保真 3D 纹理和文本相关形状方面的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAPS3D框架，通过伪监督实现文本引导的高质量3D带纹理形状生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖真实文本标注或需要大量优化时间，难以高效生成符合文本描述的3D模型。
AI.method: 基于渲染图像生成伪字幕作为语义监督，结合低级图像正则化提升纹理细节与几何多样性。
AI.result: 实验验证了伪字幕构建与图像正则化模块的有效性，生成的3D模型在保真度与文本相关性上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: TAPS3D框架无需额外优化即可生成高质量3D形状，为文本到3D生成任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dichucheng Li,Mingjin Che,Wenwu Meng,Yulun Wu,Yi Yu,Fan Xia,Wei Li
title: Frame-Level Multi-Label Playing Technique Detection Using Multi-Scale Network and Self-Attention Mechanism
title_zh: 使用多尺度网络和自注意力机制的帧级多标签播放技术检测
abstract: Instrument playing technique (IPT) is a key element of musical presentation. However, most of the existing works for IPT detection only concern monophonic music signals, yet little has been done to detect IPTs in polyphonic instrumental solo pieces with overlapping IPTs or mixed IPTs. In this paper, we formulate it as a frame-level multi-label classification problem and apply it to Guzheng, a Chinese plucked string instrument. We create a new dataset, Guzheng\_Tech99, containing Guzheng recordings and onset, offset, pitch, IPT annotations of each note. Because different IPTs vary a lot in their lengths, we propose a new method to solve this problem using multi-scale network and self-attention. The multi-scale network extracts features from different scales, and the self-attention mechanism applied to the feature maps at the coarsest scale further enhances the long-range feature extraction. Our approach outperforms existing works by a large margin, indicating its effectiveness in IPT detection.
summary: Instrument playing technique (IPT) is a key element of musical presentation. However, most of the existing works for IPT detection only concern monophonic music signals, yet little has been done to detect IPTs in polyphonic instrumental solo pieces with overlapping IPTs or mixed IPTs. In this paper, we formulate it as a frame-level multi-label classification problem and apply it to Guzheng, a Chinese plucked string instrument. We create a new dataset, Guzheng\_Tech99, containing Guzheng recordings and onset, offset, pitch, IPT annotations of each note. Because different IPTs vary a lot in their lengths, we propose a new method to solve this problem using multi-scale network and self-attention. The multi-scale network extracts features from different scales, and the self-attention mechanism applied to the feature maps at the coarsest scale further enhances the long-range feature extraction. Our approach outperforms existing works by a large margin, indicating its effectiveness in IPT detection.
abstract_zh: 乐器演奏技术（IPT）是音乐表现的关键要素。然而，大多数现有的IPT检测工作仅涉及单声道音乐信号，而很少有人在检测具有重叠IPT或混合IPT的复调器乐独奏作品中的IPT方面开展工作。在本文中，我们将其表述为框架级多标签分类问题，并将其应用于中国弹拨乐器古筝。我们创建一个新的数据集 Guzheng\_Tech99，其中包含古筝录音以及每个音符的开始、偏移、音高、IPT 注释。由于不同的IPT的长度差异很大，我们提出了一种使用多尺度网络和自注意力来解决这个问题的新方法。多尺度网络从不同尺度提取特征，并且应用于最粗尺度特征图的自注意力机制进一步增强了长程特征提取。我们的方法大大优于现有的工作，表明其在 IPT 检测方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度网络和自注意力机制的帧级多标签古筝演奏技法检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单音音乐信号的演奏技法检测，缺乏对多音轨古筝独奏中重叠或混合技法的有效检测方法。
AI.method: 构建多尺度网络提取多尺度特征，并在最粗尺度特征图上应用自注意力机制增强长距离特征提取能力。
AI.result: 在自建的Guzheng_Tech99数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度网络结合自注意力机制能有效解决多音轨演奏技法检测问题，所建数据集具有重要研究价值。

search_text: Frame-Level Multi-Label Playing Technique Detection Using Multi-Scale Network and Self-Attention Mechanism 使用多尺度网络和自注意力机制的帧级多标签播放技术检测 Instrument playing technique (IPT) is a key element of musical presentation. However, most of the existing works for IPT detection only concern monophonic music signals, yet little has been done to detect IPTs in polyphonic instrumental solo pieces with overlapping IPTs or mixed IPTs. In this paper, we formulate it as a frame-level multi-label classification problem and apply it to Guzheng, a Chinese plucked string instrument. We create a new dataset, Guzheng\_Tech99, containing Guzheng recordings and onset, offset, pitch, IPT annotations of each note. Because different IPTs vary a lot in their lengths, we propose a new method to solve this problem using multi-scale network and self-attention. The multi-scale network extracts features from different scales, and the self-attention mechanism applied to the feature maps at the coarsest scale further enhances the long-range feature extraction. Our approach outperforms existing works by a large margin, indicating its effectiveness in IPT detection. 乐器演奏技术（IPT）是音乐表现的关键要素。然而，大多数现有的IPT检测工作仅涉及单声道音乐信号，而很少有人在检测具有重叠IPT或混合IPT的复调器乐独奏作品中的IPT方面开展工作。在本文中，我们将其表述为框架级多标签分类问题，并将其应用于中国弹拨乐器古筝。我们创建一个新的数据集 Guzheng\_Tech99，其中包含古筝录音以及每个音符的开始、偏移、音高、IPT 注释。由于不同的IPT的长度差异很大，我们提出了一种使用多尺度网络和自注意力来解决这个问题的新方法。多尺度网络从不同尺度提取特征，并且应用于最粗尺度特征图的自注意力机制进一步增强了长程特征提取。我们的方法大大优于现有的工作，表明其在 IPT 检测方面的有效性。 本文提出一种基于多尺度网络和自注意力机制的帧级多标签古筝演奏技法检测方法。 Dichucheng Li,Mingjin Che,Wenwu Meng,Yulun Wu,Yi Yu,Fan Xia,Wei Li cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Zikui Cai,Zhongpai Gao,Benjamin Planche,Meng Zheng,Terrence Chen,M. Salman Asif,Ziyan Wu
title: Disguise without Disruption: Utility-Preserving Face De-Identification
title_zh: 不间断伪装：保留实用性的人脸去识别
comment: Accepted at AAAI 2024. Paper + supplementary material
comments: Accepted at AAAI 2024. Paper + supplementary material
abstract: With the rise of cameras and smart sensors, humanity generates an exponential amount of data. This valuable information, including underrepresented cases like AI in medical settings, can fuel new deep-learning tools. However, data scientists must prioritize ensuring privacy for individuals in these untapped datasets, especially for images or videos with faces, which are prime targets for identification methods. Proposed solutions to de-identify such images often compromise non-identifying facial attributes relevant to downstream tasks. In this paper, we introduce Disguise, a novel algorithm that seamlessly de-identifies facial images while ensuring the usability of the modified data. Unlike previous approaches, our solution is firmly grounded in the domains of differential privacy and ensemble-learning research. Our method involves extracting and substituting depicted identities with synthetic ones, generated using variational mechanisms to maximize obfuscation and non-invertibility. Additionally, we leverage supervision from a mixture-of-experts to disentangle and preserve other utility attributes. We extensively evaluate our method using multiple datasets, demonstrating a higher de-identification rate and superior consistency compared to prior approaches in various downstream tasks.
summary: With the rise of cameras and smart sensors, humanity generates an exponential amount of data. This valuable information, including underrepresented cases like AI in medical settings, can fuel new deep-learning tools. However, data scientists must prioritize ensuring privacy for individuals in these untapped datasets, especially for images or videos with faces, which are prime targets for identification methods. Proposed solutions to de-identify such images often compromise non-identifying facial attributes relevant to downstream tasks. In this paper, we introduce Disguise, a novel algorithm that seamlessly de-identifies facial images while ensuring the usability of the modified data. Unlike previous approaches, our solution is firmly grounded in the domains of differential privacy and ensemble-learning research. Our method involves extracting and substituting depicted identities with synthetic ones, generated using variational mechanisms to maximize obfuscation and non-invertibility. Additionally, we leverage supervision from a mixture-of-experts to disentangle and preserve other utility attributes. We extensively evaluate our method using multiple datasets, demonstrating a higher de-identification rate and superior consistency compared to prior approaches in various downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 随着相机和智能传感器的兴起，人类产生了指数级的数据量。这些有价值的信息，包括医疗环境中人工智能等代表性不足的案例，可以推动新的深度学习工具的发展。然而，数据科学家必须优先考虑确保这些未开发数据集中个人的隐私，尤其是带有面部的图像或视频，这是识别方法的主要目标。所提出的去识别此类图像的解决方案通常会损害与下游任务相关的非识别面部属性。在本文中，我们介绍了 Disguise，这是一种新颖的算法，可以无缝地去识别面部图像，同时确保修改后的数据的可用性。与以前的方法不同，我们的解决方案牢固地扎根于差分隐私和集成学习研究领域。我们的方法涉及提取描述的身份并用合成的身份替换，这些身份是使用变分机制生成的，以最大限度地提高混淆性和不可逆性。此外，我们利用多位专家的监督来理清并保留其他效用属性。我们使用多个数据集广泛评估我们的方法，与各种下游任务中的先前方法相比，展示了更高的去识别率和卓越的一致性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在保持数据可用性的前提下，有效进行面部去标识化的算法Disguise。
AI.motivation: 现有面部去标识化方法常损害非识别属性，影响下游任务效果，需平衡隐私保护与数据效用。
AI.method: 结合差分隐私与集成学习，通过合成身份替换真实身份，并利用专家混合模型保留其他面部属性。
AI.result: 在多数据集评估中，相较现有方法实现更高去标识化率与更优任务一致性。
AI.conclusion: Disguise算法有效兼顾隐私保护与数据实用性，为敏感面部数据处理提供新方案。

authors_text: V. M. Moskvitin,N. Semenova
title: Noise impact on recurrent neural network with linear activation function
title_zh: 噪声对具有线性激活函数的循环神经网络的影响
abstract: In recent years, more and more researchers in the field of neural networks are interested in creating hardware implementations where neurons and the connection between them are realized physically. The physical implementation of ANN fundamentally changes the features of noise influence. In the case hardware ANNs, there are many internal sources of noise with different properties. The purpose of this paper is to study the peculiarities of internal noise propagation in recurrent ANN on the example of echo state network (ESN), to reveal ways to suppress such noises and to justify the stability of networks to some types of noises. In this paper we analyse ESN in presence of uncorrelated additive and multiplicative white Gaussian noise. Here we consider the case when artificial neurons have linear activation function with different slope coefficients. Starting from studying only one noisy neuron we complicate the problem by considering how the input signal and the memory property affect the accumulation of noise in ESN. In addition, we consider the influence of the main types of coupling matrices on the accumulation of noise. So, as such matrices, we take a uniform matrix and a diagonal-like matrices with different coefficients called "blurring" coefficient. We have found that the general view of variance and signal-to-noise ratio of ESN output signal is similar to only one neuron. The noise is less accumulated in ESN with diagonal reservoir connection matrix with large "blurring" coefficient. Especially it concerns uncorrelated multiplicative noise.
summary: In recent years, more and more researchers in the field of neural networks are interested in creating hardware implementations where neurons and the connection between them are realized physically. The physical implementation of ANN fundamentally changes the features of noise influence. In the case hardware ANNs, there are many internal sources of noise with different properties. The purpose of this paper is to study the peculiarities of internal noise propagation in recurrent ANN on the example of echo state network (ESN), to reveal ways to suppress such noises and to justify the stability of networks to some types of noises. In this paper we analyse ESN in presence of uncorrelated additive and multiplicative white Gaussian noise. Here we consider the case when artificial neurons have linear activation function with different slope coefficients. Starting from studying only one noisy neuron we complicate the problem by considering how the input signal and the memory property affect the accumulation of noise in ESN. In addition, we consider the influence of the main types of coupling matrices on the accumulation of noise. So, as such matrices, we take a uniform matrix and a diagonal-like matrices with different coefficients called "blurring" coefficient. We have found that the general view of variance and signal-to-noise ratio of ESN output signal is similar to only one neuron. The noise is less accumulated in ESN with diagonal reservoir connection matrix with large "blurring" coefficient. Especially it concerns uncorrelated multiplicative noise.
abstract_zh: 近年来，神经网络领域越来越多的研究人员对创建硬件实现感兴趣，其中神经元及其之间的连接在物理上得以实现。 ANN的物理实现从根本上改变了噪声影响的特征。在硬件人工神经网络中，存在许多具有不同属性的内部噪声源。本文的目的是以回声状态网络（ESN）为例，研究循环人工神经网络中内部噪声传播的特性，揭示抑制此类噪声的方法，并证明网络对某些类型噪声的稳定性。在本文中，我们分析了存在不相关加性和乘性高斯白噪声的 ESN。这里我们考虑人工神经元具有不同斜率系数的线性激活函数的情况。从仅研究一个噪声神经元开始，我们考虑输入信号和记忆属性如何影响 ESN 中噪声的积累，从而使问题变得复杂。此外，我们还考虑了主要类型的耦合矩阵对噪声积累的影响。因此，对于这样的矩阵，我们采用一个均匀矩阵和一个具有不同系数（称为“模糊”系数）的类对角矩阵。我们发现ESN输出信号的方差和信噪比的总体观点与仅一个神经元相似。具有较大“模糊”系数的对角线储层连接矩阵的ESN中噪声积累较少。特别是它涉及不相关的乘性噪声。

AI.tldr: 研究回声状态网络（ESN）中内部噪声传播特性，分析噪声抑制方法及网络稳定性。
AI.motivation: 硬件实现的神经网络存在多种内部噪声源，需理解噪声对网络性能的影响并寻找抑制方法。
AI.method: 通过分析带线性激活函数的ESN，在存在加性与乘性白噪声条件下，研究单个噪声神经元扩展至整体网络的影响，结合不同耦合矩阵（均匀矩阵与模糊系数矩阵）分析噪声累积规律。
AI.result: ESN输出信号的方差与信噪比表现与单神经元类似，模糊系数较大的对角耦合矩阵能有效抑制乘性噪声累积。
AI.conclusion: 采用高模糊系数的对角耦合矩阵可提升ESN对乘性噪声的鲁棒性，为硬件实现提供噪声抑制设计依据。

authors_text: Weijie Tu,Weijian Deng,Tom Gedeon,Liang Zheng
title: A Bag-of-Prototypes Representation for Dataset-Level Applications
title_zh: 数据集级应用程序的原型袋表示
abstract: This work investigates dataset vectorization for two dataset-level tasks: assessing training set suitability and test set difficulty. The former measures how suitable a training set is for a target domain, while the latter studies how challenging a test set is for a learned model. Central to the two tasks is measuring the underlying relationship between datasets. This needs a desirable dataset vectorization scheme, which should preserve as much discriminative dataset information as possible so that the distance between the resulting dataset vectors can reflect dataset-to-dataset similarity. To this end, we propose a bag-of-prototypes (BoP) dataset representation that extends the image-level bag consisting of patch descriptors to dataset-level bag consisting of semantic prototypes. Specifically, we develop a codebook consisting of K prototypes clustered from a reference dataset. Given a dataset to be encoded, we quantize each of its image features to a certain prototype in the codebook and obtain a K-dimensional histogram. Without assuming access to dataset labels, the BoP representation provides a rich characterization of the dataset semantic distribution. Furthermore, BoP representations cooperate well with Jensen-Shannon divergence for measuring dataset-to-dataset similarity. Although very simple, BoP consistently shows its advantage over existing representations on a series of benchmarks for two dataset-level tasks.
summary: This work investigates dataset vectorization for two dataset-level tasks: assessing training set suitability and test set difficulty. The former measures how suitable a training set is for a target domain, while the latter studies how challenging a test set is for a learned model. Central to the two tasks is measuring the underlying relationship between datasets. This needs a desirable dataset vectorization scheme, which should preserve as much discriminative dataset information as possible so that the distance between the resulting dataset vectors can reflect dataset-to-dataset similarity. To this end, we propose a bag-of-prototypes (BoP) dataset representation that extends the image-level bag consisting of patch descriptors to dataset-level bag consisting of semantic prototypes. Specifically, we develop a codebook consisting of K prototypes clustered from a reference dataset. Given a dataset to be encoded, we quantize each of its image features to a certain prototype in the codebook and obtain a K-dimensional histogram. Without assuming access to dataset labels, the BoP representation provides a rich characterization of the dataset semantic distribution. Furthermore, BoP representations cooperate well with Jensen-Shannon divergence for measuring dataset-to-dataset similarity. Although very simple, BoP consistently shows its advantage over existing representations on a series of benchmarks for two dataset-level tasks.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了两个数据集级任务的数据集向量化：评估训练集适用性和测试集难度。前者衡量训练集对目标领域的适合程度，而后者研究测试集对学习模型的挑战性。这两项任务的核心是测量数据集之间的潜在关系。这需要一个理想的数据集向量化方案，该方案应保留尽可能多的判别性数据集信息，以便所得数据集向量之间的距离可以反映数据集到数据集的相似性。为此，我们提出了一种原型包（BoP）数据集表示，它将由补丁描述符组成的图像级包扩展到由语义原型组成的数据集级包。具体来说，我们开发了一个由从参考数据集中聚集的 K 个原型组成的密码本。给定一个要编码的数据集，我们将其每个图像特征量化为码本中的某个原型，并获得 K 维直方图。在不假设访问数据集标签的情况下，BoP 表示提供了数据集语义分布的丰富特征。此外，BoP 表示与 Jensen-Shannon 散度很好地配合来测量数据集到数据集的相似性。尽管非常简单，但 BoP 在两个数据集级任务的一系列基准测试中始终显示出其相对于现有表示的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BoP的原型袋表示方法，用于数据集层面的两个任务：评估训练集适用性和测试集难度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效捕捉数据集间的语义关系，需设计一种能保留判别信息的向量化方案以衡量数据集相似度。
AI.method: 构建包含K个语义原型的代码本，通过量化目标数据集图像特征生成K维直方图，结合Jensen-Shannon散度计算数据集相似性。
AI.result: BoP在多个基准测试中持续优于现有方法，无需标签即可有效表征数据集语义分布。
AI.conclusion: BoP是一种简单高效的无监督数据集表示方法，适用于数据集层面的相似性分析任务。

search_text: A Bag-of-Prototypes Representation for Dataset-Level Applications 数据集级应用程序的原型袋表示 This work investigates dataset vectorization for two dataset-level tasks: assessing training set suitability and test set difficulty. The former measures how suitable a training set is for a target domain, while the latter studies how challenging a test set is for a learned model. Central to the two tasks is measuring the underlying relationship between datasets. This needs a desirable dataset vectorization scheme, which should preserve as much discriminative dataset information as possible so that the distance between the resulting dataset vectors can reflect dataset-to-dataset similarity. To this end, we propose a bag-of-prototypes (BoP) dataset representation that extends the image-level bag consisting of patch descriptors to dataset-level bag consisting of semantic prototypes. Specifically, we develop a codebook consisting of K prototypes clustered from a reference dataset. Given a dataset to be encoded, we quantize each of its image features to a certain prototype in the codebook and obtain a K-dimensional histogram. Without assuming access to dataset labels, the BoP representation provides a rich characterization of the dataset semantic distribution. Furthermore, BoP representations cooperate well with Jensen-Shannon divergence for measuring dataset-to-dataset similarity. Although very simple, BoP consistently shows its advantage over existing representations on a series of benchmarks for two dataset-level tasks. 这项工作研究了两个数据集级任务的数据集向量化：评估训练集适用性和测试集难度。前者衡量训练集对目标领域的适合程度，而后者研究测试集对学习模型的挑战性。这两项任务的核心是测量数据集之间的潜在关系。这需要一个理想的数据集向量化方案，该方案应保留尽可能多的判别性数据集信息，以便所得数据集向量之间的距离可以反映数据集到数据集的相似性。为此，我们提出了一种原型包（BoP）数据集表示，它将由补丁描述符组成的图像级包扩展到由语义原型组成的数据集级包。具体来说，我们开发了一个由从参考数据集中聚集的 K 个原型组成的密码本。给定一个要编码的数据集，我们将其每个图像特征量化为码本中的某个原型，并获得 K 维直方图。在不假设访问数据集标签的情况下，BoP 表示提供了数据集语义分布的丰富特征。此外，BoP 表示与 Jensen-Shannon 散度很好地配合来测量数据集到数据集的相似性。尽管非常简单，但 BoP 在两个数据集级任务的一系列基准测试中始终显示出其相对于现有表示的优势。 本文提出一种名为BoP的原型袋表示方法，用于数据集层面的两个任务：评估训练集适用性和测试集难度。 Weijie Tu,Weijian Deng,Tom Gedeon,Liang Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Thomas Stegmüller,Tim Lebailly,Behzad Bozorgtabar,Tinne Tuytelaars,Jean-Philippe Thiran
title: CrOC: Cross-View Online Clustering for Dense Visual Representation Learning
title_zh: CrOC：用于密集视觉表示学习的跨视图在线聚类
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2023, * denotes equal contribution
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2023, * denotes equal contribution
abstract: Learning dense visual representations without labels is an arduous task and more so from scene-centric data. We propose to tackle this challenging problem by proposing a Cross-view consistency objective with an Online Clustering mechanism (CrOC) to discover and segment the semantics of the views. In the absence of hand-crafted priors, the resulting method is more generalizable and does not require a cumbersome pre-processing step. More importantly, the clustering algorithm conjointly operates on the features of both views, thereby elegantly bypassing the issue of content not represented in both views and the ambiguous matching of objects from one crop to the other. We demonstrate excellent performance on linear and unsupervised segmentation transfer tasks on various datasets and similarly for video object segmentation. Our code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/stegmuel/CrOC.
summary: Learning dense visual representations without labels is an arduous task and more so from scene-centric data. We propose to tackle this challenging problem by proposing a Cross-view consistency objective with an Online Clustering mechanism (CrOC) to discover and segment the semantics of the views. In the absence of hand-crafted priors, the resulting method is more generalizable and does not require a cumbersome pre-processing step. More importantly, the clustering algorithm conjointly operates on the features of both views, thereby elegantly bypassing the issue of content not represented in both views and the ambiguous matching of objects from one crop to the other. We demonstrate excellent performance on linear and unsupervised segmentation transfer tasks on various datasets and similarly for video object segmentation. Our code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/stegmuel/CrOC.
abstract_zh: 在没有标签的情况下学习密集的视觉表示是一项艰巨的任务，尤其是从以场景为中心的数据中学习。我们建议通过提出跨视图一致性目标和在线聚类机制（CrOC）来解决这个具有挑战性的问题，以发现和分割视图的语义。在没有手工设计先验的情况下，所得方法更具通用性，并且不需要繁琐的预处理步骤。更重要的是，聚类算法联合操作两个视图的特征，从而优雅地绕过了两个视图中未表示的内容以及从一种作物到另一种作物的对象模糊匹配的问题。我们在各种数据集上的线性和无监督分割传输任务以及类似的视频对象分割上展示了出色的性能。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/stegmuel/CrOC 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 提出CrOC方法，通过跨视角在线聚类实现无监督密集视觉表示学习，解决场景数据的语义分割问题。
AI.motivation: 无监督学习密集视觉表示面临场景数据语义分割挑战，传统方法依赖手工先验和预处理，限制泛化能力，且跨视角匹配存在内容缺失和模糊问题。
AI.method: CrOC方法结合跨视角一致性目标与在线聚类，联合处理双视角特征，无需预处理和手工先验，解决内容缺失与匹配模糊问题。
AI.result: 在多个数据集的线性及无监督分割任务和视频对象分割中表现优异，代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: CrOC在无监督场景下有效提升密集视觉表示学习，增强模型泛化能力，适用于多任务场景。

We propose to tackle this challenging problem by proposing a Cross-view consistency objective with an Online Clustering mechanism (CrOC) to discover and segment the semantics of the views. In the absence of hand-crafted priors, the resulting method is more generalizable and does not require a cumbersome pre-processing step. More importantly, the clustering algorithm conjointly operates on the features of both views, thereby elegantly bypassing the issue of content not represented in both views and the ambiguous matching of objects from one crop to the other. We demonstrate excellent performance on linear and unsupervised segmentation transfer tasks on various datasets and similarly for video object segmentation. Our code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/stegmuel/CrOC. 在没有标签的情况下学习密集的视觉表示是一项艰巨的任务，尤其是从以场景为中心的数据中学习。我们建议通过提出跨视图一致性目标和在线聚类机制（CrOC）来解决这个具有挑战性的问题，以发现和分割视图的语义。在没有手工设计先验的情况下，所得方法更具通用性，并且不需要繁琐的预处理步骤。更重要的是，聚类算法联合操作两个视图的特征，从而优雅地绕过了两个视图中未表示的内容以及从一种作物到另一种作物的对象模糊匹配的问题。我们在各种数据集上的线性和无监督分割传输任务以及类似的视频对象分割上展示了出色的性能。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/stegmuel/CrOC 上公开获取。 提出CrOC方法，通过跨视角在线聚类实现无监督密集视觉表示学习，解决场景数据的语义分割问题。 Thomas Stegmüller,Tim Lebailly,Behzad Bozorgtabar,Tinne Tuytelaars,Jean-Philippe Thiran cs.CV

authors_text: Kai Liu,Hailiang Xiong,Gangqiang Yang,Zhengfeng Du,Yewen Cao,Danyal Shah
title: Pyramid Multi-branch Fusion DCNN with Multi-Head Self-Attention for Mandarin Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于普通话语音识别的具有多头自注意力的金字塔多分支融合 DCNN
abstract: As one of the major branches of automatic speech recognition, attention-based models greatly improves the feature representation ability of the model. In particular, the multi-head mechanism is employed in the attention, hoping to learn speech features of more aspects in different attention subspaces. For speech recognition of complex languages, on the one hand, a small head size will lead to an obvious shortage of learnable aspects. On the other hand, we need to reduce the dimension of each subspace to keep the size of the overall feature space unchanged when we increase the number of heads, which will significantly weaken the ability to represent the feature of each subspace. Therefore, this paper explores how to use a small attention subspace to represent complete speech features while ensuring many heads. In this work we propose a novel neural network architecture, namely, pyramid multi-branch fusion DCNN with multi-head self-attention. The proposed architecture is inspired by Dilated Convolution Neural Networks (DCNN), it uses multiple branches with DCNN to extract the feature of the input speech under different receptive fields. To reduce the number of parameters, every two branches are merged until all the branches are merged into one. Thus, its shape is like a pyramid rotated 90 degrees. We demonstrate that on Aishell-1, a widely used Mandarin speech dataset, our model achieves a character error rate (CER) of 6.45% on the test sets.
summary: As one of the major branches of automatic speech recognition, attention-based models greatly improves the feature representation ability of the model. In particular, the multi-head mechanism is employed in the attention, hoping to learn speech features of more aspects in different attention subspaces. For speech recognition of complex languages, on the one hand, a small head size will lead to an obvious shortage of learnable aspects. On the other hand, we need to reduce the dimension of each subspace to keep the size of the overall feature space unchanged when we increase the number of heads, which will significantly weaken the ability to represent the feature of each subspace. Therefore, this paper explores how to use a small attention subspace to represent complete speech features while ensuring many heads. In this work we propose a novel neural network architecture, namely, pyramid multi-branch fusion DCNN with multi-head self-attention. The proposed architecture is inspired by Dilated Convolution Neural Networks (DCNN), it uses multiple branches with DCNN to extract the feature of the input speech under different receptive fields. To reduce the number of parameters, every two branches are merged until all the branches are merged into one. Thus, its shape is like a pyramid rotated 90 degrees. We demonstrate that on Aishell-1, a widely used Mandarin speech dataset, our model achieves a character error rate (CER) of 6.45% on the test sets.
abstract_zh: 作为自动语音识别的主要分支之一，基于注意力的模型极大地提高了模型的特征表示能力。特别是在注意力方面采用了多头机制，希望能够在不同的注意力子空间中学习到更多方面的语音特征。对于复杂语言的语音识别，一方面，较小的头部尺寸会导致可学习方面的明显不足。另一方面，当我们增加头的数量时，我们需要减少每个子空间的维数以保持整体特征空间的大小不变，这会显着削弱每个子空间表示特征的能力。因此，本文探讨如何在保证多个头的情况下，利用较小的注意力子空间来表示完整的语音特征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经网络架构，即具有多头自注意力的金字塔多分支融合 DCNN。所提出的架构受到扩张卷积神经网络（DCNN）的启发，它使用 DCNN 的多个分支来提取不同感受野下输入语音的特征。为了减少参数数量，每两个分支进行合并，直到所有分支合并为一个。因此，它的形状就像一个旋转90度的金字塔。我们证明，在广泛使用的普通话语音数据集 Aishell-1 上，我们的模型在测试集上实现了 6.45% 的字符错误率 (CER)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多分支融合和多头自注意力机制的金字塔结构深度卷积神经网络（DCNN），用于提升普通话语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多头注意力机制在语音识别中存在头尺寸过小导致特征学习不足，或增加头数时子空间维度压缩导致特征表达能力下降的问题，需在有限参数下实现更全面的特征学习。
AI.method: 设计金字塔多分支融合DCNN架构，通过多分支DCNN在不同感受野提取特征，采用多头自注意力机制增强特征表示，并通过逐层合并分支减少参数量，形成类似旋转金字塔的网络结构。
AI.result: 在Aishell-1数据集上实现6.45%的字符错误率（CER），优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提架构有效平衡了参数规模与特征表达能力，在普通话语音识别任务中取得显著性能提升。

search_text: Pyramid Multi-branch Fusion DCNN with Multi-Head Self-Attention for Mandarin Speech Recognition 用于普通话语音识别的具有多头自注意力的金字塔多分支融合 DCNN As one of the major branches of automatic speech recognition, attention-based models greatly improves the feature representation ability of the model. In particular, the multi-head mechanism is employed in the attention, hoping to learn speech features of more aspects in different attention subspaces. For speech recognition of complex languages, on the one hand, a small head size will lead to an obvious shortage of learnable aspects. On the other hand, we need to reduce the dimension of each subspace to keep the size of the overall feature space unchanged when we increase the number of heads, which will significantly weaken the ability to represent the feature of each subspace. Therefore, this paper explores how to use a small attention subspace to represent complete speech features while ensuring many heads. In this work we propose a novel neural network architecture, namely, pyramid multi-branch fusion DCNN with multi-head self-attention. The proposed architecture is inspired by Dilated Convolution Neural Networks (DCNN), it uses multiple branches with DCNN to extract the feature of the input speech under different receptive fields. To reduce the number of parameters, every two branches are merged until all the branches are merged into one. Thus, its shape is like a pyramid rotated 90 degrees. We demonstrate that on Aishell-1, a widely used Mandarin speech dataset, our model achieves a character error rate (CER) of 6.45% on the test sets. 作为自动语音识别的主要分支之一，基于注意力的模型极大地提高了模型的特征表示能力。特别是在注意力方面采用了多头机制，希望能够在不同的注意力子空间中学习到更多方面的语音特征。对于复杂语言的语音识别，一方面，较小的头部尺寸会导致可学习方面的明显不足。另一方面，当我们增加头的数量时，我们需要减少每个子空间的维数以保持整体特征空间的大小不变，这会显着削弱每个子空间表示特征的能力。因此，本文探讨如何在保证多个头的情况下，利用较小的注意力子空间来表示完整的语音特征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经网络架构，即具有多头自注意力的金字塔多分支融合 DCNN。所提出的架构受到扩张卷积神经网络（DCNN）的启发，它使用 DCNN 的多个分支来提取不同感受野下输入语音的特征。为了减少参数数量，每两个分支进行合并，直到所有分支合并为一个。因此，它的形状就像一个旋转90度的金字塔。我们证明，在广泛使用的普通话语音数据集 Aishell-1 上，我们的模型在测试集上实现了 6.45% 的字符错误率 (CER)。 本文提出一种结合多分支融合和多头自注意力机制的金字塔结构深度卷积神经网络（DCNN），用于提升普通话语音识别性能。 Kai Liu,Hailiang Xiong,Gangqiang Yang,Zhengfeng Du,Yewen Cao,Danyal Shah eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Maximilian Ulmer,Maximilian Durner,Martin Sundermeyer,Manuel Stoiber,Rudolph Triebel
title: 6D Object Pose Estimation from Approximate 3D Models for Orbital Robotics
title_zh: 根据轨道机器人的近似 3D 模型进行 6D 物体姿态估计
comment: Proceedings of IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: Proceedings of IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: We present a novel technique to estimate the 6D pose of objects from single images where the 3D geometry of the object is only given approximately and not as a precise 3D model. To achieve this, we employ a dense 2D-to-3D correspondence predictor that regresses 3D model coordinates for every pixel. In addition to the 3D coordinates, our model also estimates the pixel-wise coordinate error to discard correspondences that are likely wrong. This allows us to generate multiple 6D pose hypotheses of the object, which we then refine iteratively using a highly efficient region-based approach. We also introduce a novel pixel-wise posterior formulation by which we can estimate the probability for each hypothesis and select the most likely one. As we show in experiments, our approach is capable of dealing with extreme visual conditions including overexposure, high contrast, or low signal-to-noise ratio. This makes it a powerful technique for the particularly challenging task of estimating the pose of tumbling satellites for in-orbit robotic applications. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the SPEED+ dataset and has won the SPEC2021 post-mortem competition.
summary: We present a novel technique to estimate the 6D pose of objects from single images where the 3D geometry of the object is only given approximately and not as a precise 3D model. To achieve this, we employ a dense 2D-to-3D correspondence predictor that regresses 3D model coordinates for every pixel. In addition to the 3D coordinates, our model also estimates the pixel-wise coordinate error to discard correspondences that are likely wrong. This allows us to generate multiple 6D pose hypotheses of the object, which we then refine iteratively using a highly efficient region-based approach. We also introduce a novel pixel-wise posterior formulation by which we can estimate the probability for each hypothesis and select the most likely one. As we show in experiments, our approach is capable of dealing with extreme visual conditions including overexposure, high contrast, or low signal-to-noise ratio. This makes it a powerful technique for the particularly challenging task of estimating the pose of tumbling satellites for in-orbit robotic applications. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the SPEED+ dataset and has won the SPEC2021 post-mortem competition.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新技术，可以从单个图像中估计物体的 6D 姿态，其中物体的 3D 几何形状仅近似给出，而不是作为精确的 3D 模型。为了实现这一目标，我们采用密集的 2D 到 3D 对应预测器来回归每个像素的 3D 模型坐标。除了 3D 坐标之外，我们的模型还估计像素级坐标误差，以丢弃可能错误的对应关系。这使我们能够生成对象的多个 6D 姿态假设，然后使用高效的基于区域的方法对其进行迭代细化。我们还引入了一种新颖的像素级后验公式，通过它我们可以估计每个假设的概率并选择最有可能的一个。正如我们在实验中所示，我们的方法能够处理极端的视觉条件，包括过度曝光、高对比度或低信噪比。这使得它成为一种强大的技术，可以用于在轨机器人应用中估计翻滚卫星姿态这一特别具有挑战性的任务。我们的方法在 SPEED+ 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并赢得了 SPEC2021 事后竞赛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单张图像中估计物体6D姿态的新方法，适用于仅有近似3D模型的场景，特别针对轨道机器人任务中的翻转卫星姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖精确3D模型，但在轨道机器人应用中，目标物体（如卫星）的3D模型往往不精确且存在极端视觉条件（如过曝、低信噪比），需开发鲁棒的6D姿态估计技术。
AI.method: 采用密集2D-3D对应预测器回归每个像素的3D坐标，并估计像素级误差以剔除错误对应；生成多组6D姿态假设并通过区域优化迭代细化；引入像素级后验概率公式选择最优假设。
AI.result: 在SPEED+数据集上达到SOTA性能，成功应用于SPEC2021竞赛并获奖，验证了方法在极端视觉条件下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需精确3D模型即可鲁棒估计6D姿态，为轨道机器人中复杂场景下的卫星捕获等任务提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Qifan Yu,Juncheng Li,Yu Wu,Siliang Tang,Wei Ji,Yueting Zhuang
title: Visually-Prompted Language Model for Fine-Grained Scene Graph Generation in an Open World
title_zh: 用于开放世界中细粒度场景图生成的视觉提示语言模型
abstract: Scene Graph Generation (SGG) aims to extract <subject, predicate, object> relationships in images for vision understanding. Although recent works have made steady progress on SGG, they still suffer long-tail distribution issues that tail-predicates are more costly to train and hard to distinguish due to a small amount of annotated data compared to frequent predicates. Existing re-balancing strategies try to handle it via prior rules but are still confined to pre-defined conditions, which are not scalable for various models and datasets. In this paper, we propose a Cross-modal prediCate boosting (CaCao) framework, where a visually-prompted language model is learned to generate diverse fine-grained predicates in a low-resource way. The proposed CaCao can be applied in a plug-and-play fashion and automatically strengthen existing SGG to tackle the long-tailed problem. Based on that, we further introduce a novel Entangled cross-modal prompt approach for open-world predicate scene graph generation (Epic), where models can generalize to unseen predicates in a zero-shot manner. Comprehensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that CaCao consistently boosts the performance of multiple scene graph generation models in a model-agnostic way. Moreover, our Epic achieves competitive performance on open-world predicate prediction. The data and code for this paper are publicly available.
summary: Scene Graph Generation (SGG) aims to extract <subject, predicate, object> relationships in images for vision understanding. Although recent works have made steady progress on SGG, they still suffer long-tail distribution issues that tail-predicates are more costly to train and hard to distinguish due to a small amount of annotated data compared to frequent predicates. Existing re-balancing strategies try to handle it via prior rules but are still confined to pre-defined conditions, which are not scalable for various models and datasets. In this paper, we propose a Cross-modal prediCate boosting (CaCao) framework, where a visually-prompted language model is learned to generate diverse fine-grained predicates in a low-resource way. The proposed CaCao can be applied in a plug-and-play fashion and automatically strengthen existing SGG to tackle the long-tailed problem. Based on that, we further introduce a novel Entangled cross-modal prompt approach for open-world predicate scene graph generation (Epic), where models can generalize to unseen predicates in a zero-shot manner. Comprehensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that CaCao consistently boosts the performance of multiple scene graph generation models in a model-agnostic way. Moreover, our Epic achieves competitive performance on open-world predicate prediction. The data and code for this paper are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成（SGG）旨在提取图像中的<主语、谓语、宾语>关系以进行视觉理解。尽管最近的工作在 SGG 上取得了稳步进展，但它们仍然面临着长尾分布问题，即与频繁谓词相比，由于带注释的数据量较少，尾谓词的训练成本更高且难以区分。现有的重新平衡策略试图通过先前的规则来处理它，但仍然局限于预定义的条件，这些条件对于各种模型和数据集来说是不可扩展的。在本文中，我们提出了一种跨模态谓词增强（CaCao）框架，其中学习视觉提示的语言模型以低资源方式生成各种细粒度谓词。所提出的 CaCao 可以以即插即用的方式应用，并自动增强现有的 SGG 以解决长尾问题。在此基础上，我们进一步引入了一种新颖的纠缠跨模态提示方法，用于开放世界谓词场景图生成（Epic），其中模型可以以零样本的方式泛化到不可见的谓词。对三个基准数据集的综合实验表明，CaCao 以与模型无关的方式持续提高了多个场景图生成模型的性能。此外，我们的 Epic 在开放世界谓词预测方面取得了有竞争力的表现。本文的数据和代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉提示的语言模型框架，用于解决开放世界中细粒度场景图生成的长尾分布问题。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成方法在处理长尾谓词时因标注数据不足而效果不佳，且依赖预定义规则的再平衡策略缺乏可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出CaCao框架，通过视觉提示的语言模型以低资源方式生成多样谓词，并引入Epic方法实现开放世界零样本预测的纠缠跨模态提示机制。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，CaCao显著提升多种场景图生成模型性能，Epic在开放世界谓词预测中表现优异，数据与代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文为长尾场景图生成提供了可扩展解决方案，并通过跨模态提示实现了开放世界的零样本泛化能力，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Visually-Prompted Language Model for Fine-Grained Scene Graph Generation in an Open World 用于开放世界中细粒度场景图生成的视觉提示语言模型 Scene Graph Generation (SGG) aims to extract <subject, predicate, object> relationships in images for vision understanding. Although recent works have made steady progress on SGG, they still suffer long-tail distribution issues that tail-predicates are more costly to train and hard to distinguish due to a small amount of annotated data compared to frequent predicates. Existing re-balancing strategies try to handle it via prior rules but are still confined to pre-defined conditions, which are not scalable for various models and datasets. In this paper, we propose a Cross-modal prediCate boosting (CaCao) framework, where a visually-prompted language model is learned to generate diverse fine-grained predicates in a low-resource way. The proposed CaCao can be applied in a plug-and-play fashion and automatically strengthen existing SGG to tackle the long-tailed problem. Based on that, we further introduce a novel Entangled cross-modal prompt approach for open-world predicate scene graph generation (Epic), where models can generalize to unseen predicates in a zero-shot manner. Comprehensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that CaCao consistently boosts the performance of multiple scene graph generation models in a model-agnostic way. Moreover, our Epic achieves competitive performance on open-world predicate prediction. The data and code for this paper are publicly available. 场景图生成（SGG）旨在提取图像中的<主语、谓语、宾语>关系以进行视觉理解。尽管最近的工作在 SGG 上取得了稳步进展，但它们仍然面临着长尾分布问题，即与频繁谓词相比，由于带注释的数据量较少，尾谓词的训练成本更高且难以区分。现有的重新平衡策略试图通过先前的规则来处理它，但仍然局限于预定义的条件，这些条件对于各种模型和数据集来说是不可扩展的。在本文中，我们提出了一种跨模态谓词增强（CaCao）框架，其中学习视觉提示的语言模型以低资源方式生成各种细粒度谓词。所提出的 CaCao 可以以即插即用的方式应用，并自动增强现有的 SGG 以解决长尾问题。在此基础上，我们进一步引入了一种新颖的纠缠跨模态提示方法，用于开放世界谓词场景图生成（Epic），其中模型可以以零样本的方式泛化到不可见的谓词。对三个基准数据集的综合实验表明，CaCao 以与模型无关的方式持续提高了多个场景图生成模型的性能。此外，我们的 Epic 在开放世界谓词预测方面取得了有竞争力的表现。本文的数据和代码是公开的。 本文提出一种基于视觉提示的语言模型框架，用于解决开放世界中细粒度场景图生成的长尾分布问题。 Qifan Yu,Juncheng Li,Yu Wu,Siliang Tang,Wei Ji,Yueting Zhuang cs.CV

authors_text: Zicheng Zhang,Yinglu Liu,Congying Han,Yingwei Pan,Tiande Guo,Ting Yao
title: Transforming Radiance Field with Lipschitz Network for Photorealistic 3D Scene Stylization
title_zh: 使用 Lipschitz 网络转换辐射场以实现逼真的 3D 场景风格化
abstract: Recent advances in 3D scene representation and novel view synthesis have witnessed the rise of Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs). Nevertheless, it is not trivial to exploit NeRF for the photorealistic 3D scene stylization task, which aims to generate visually consistent and photorealistic stylized scenes from novel views. Simply coupling NeRF with photorealistic style transfer (PST) will result in cross-view inconsistency and degradation of stylized view syntheses. Through a thorough analysis, we demonstrate that this non-trivial task can be simplified in a new light: When transforming the appearance representation of a pre-trained NeRF with Lipschitz mapping, the consistency and photorealism across source views will be seamlessly encoded into the syntheses. That motivates us to build a concise and flexible learning framework namely LipRF, which upgrades arbitrary 2D PST methods with Lipschitz mapping tailored for the 3D scene. Technically, LipRF first pre-trains a radiance field to reconstruct the 3D scene, and then emulates the style on each view by 2D PST as the prior to learn a Lipschitz network to stylize the pre-trained appearance. In view of that Lipschitz condition highly impacts the expressivity of the neural network, we devise an adaptive regularization to balance the reconstruction and stylization. A gradual gradient aggregation strategy is further introduced to optimize LipRF in a cost-efficient manner. We conduct extensive experiments to show the high quality and robust performance of LipRF on both photorealistic 3D stylization and object appearance editing.
summary: Recent advances in 3D scene representation and novel view synthesis have witnessed the rise of Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs). Nevertheless, it is not trivial to exploit NeRF for the photorealistic 3D scene stylization task, which aims to generate visually consistent and photorealistic stylized scenes from novel views. Simply coupling NeRF with photorealistic style transfer (PST) will result in cross-view inconsistency and degradation of stylized view syntheses. Through a thorough analysis, we demonstrate that this non-trivial task can be simplified in a new light: When transforming the appearance representation of a pre-trained NeRF with Lipschitz mapping, the consistency and photorealism across source views will be seamlessly encoded into the syntheses. That motivates us to build a concise and flexible learning framework namely LipRF, which upgrades arbitrary 2D PST methods with Lipschitz mapping tailored for the 3D scene. Technically, LipRF first pre-trains a radiance field to reconstruct the 3D scene, and then emulates the style on each view by 2D PST as the prior to learn a Lipschitz network to stylize the pre-trained appearance. In view of that Lipschitz condition highly impacts the expressivity of the neural network, we devise an adaptive regularization to balance the reconstruction and stylization. A gradual gradient aggregation strategy is further introduced to optimize LipRF in a cost-efficient manner. We conduct extensive experiments to show the high quality and robust performance of LipRF on both photorealistic 3D stylization and object appearance editing.
abstract_zh: 3D 场景表示和新颖视图合成的最新进展见证了神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的兴起。尽管如此，利用 NeRF 进行真实感 3D 场景风格化任务并非易事，该任务旨在从新颖的视图中生成视觉一致且真实感的风格化场景。简单地将 NeRF 与真实感风格迁移 (PST) 耦合将导致跨视图不一致和风格化视图合成的退化。通过彻底的分析，我们证明了这个不平凡的任务可以从新的角度进行简化：当使用 Lipschitz 映射转换预先训练的 NeRF 的外观表示时，源视图之间的一致性和真实感将被无缝编码到合成中。这促使我们构建一个简洁灵活的学习框架，即 LipRF，它使用针对 3D 场景定制的 Lipschitz 映射来升级任意 2D PST 方法。从技术上讲，LipRF 首先预训练辐射场来重建 3D 场景，然后通过 2D PST 模拟每个视图的风格，作为学习 Lipschitz 网络以风格化预训练外观的先验。鉴于 Lipschitz 条件高度影响神经网络的表达能力，我们设计了一种自适应正则化来平衡重建和风格化。进一步引入渐进梯度聚合策略，以经济高效的方式优化 LipRF。我们进行了大量的实验，以展示 LipRF 在真实感 3D 风格化和对象外观编辑方面的高质量和强大性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Lipschitz网络的神经辐射场（NeRF）方法LipRF，用于实现高质量的3D场景风格化。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF与风格迁移结合时易出现跨视角不一致和合成质量下降问题，通过Lipschitz映射可保持风格化后场景的视觉一致性。
AI.method: 预训练NeRF重建3D场景，利用2D风格迁移生成视角先验，设计Lipschitz网络进行外观风格化，并引入自适应正则化与渐进梯度聚合策略优化训练。
AI.result: 实验表明LipRF在3D场景风格化和物体外观编辑任务中均取得高质量且鲁棒的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: LipRF通过Lipschitz约束与优化策略有效解决了NeRF风格化中的视角一致性难题，为3D场景风格化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Rahul Nellikkath,Spyros Chatzivasileiadis
title: Enriching Neural Network Training Dataset to Improve Worst-Case Performance Guarantees
title_zh: 丰富神经网络训练数据集以提高最坏情况下的性能保证
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2212.10930
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2212.10930
abstract: Machine learning algorithms, especially Neural Networks (NNs), are a valuable tool used to approximate non-linear relationships, like the AC-Optimal Power Flow (AC-OPF), with considerable accuracy -- and achieving a speedup of several orders of magnitude when deployed for use. Often in power systems literature, the NNs are trained with a fixed dataset generated prior to the training process. In this paper, we show that adapting the NN training dataset during training can improve the NN performance and substantially reduce its worst-case violations. This paper proposes an algorithm that identifies and enriches the training dataset with critical datapoints that reduce the worst-case violations and deliver a neural network with improved worst-case performance guarantees. We demonstrate the performance of our algorithm in four test power systems, ranging from 39-buses to 162-buses.
summary: Machine learning algorithms, especially Neural Networks (NNs), are a valuable tool used to approximate non-linear relationships, like the AC-Optimal Power Flow (AC-OPF), with considerable accuracy -- and achieving a speedup of several orders of magnitude when deployed for use. Often in power systems literature, the NNs are trained with a fixed dataset generated prior to the training process. In this paper, we show that adapting the NN training dataset during training can improve the NN performance and substantially reduce its worst-case violations. This paper proposes an algorithm that identifies and enriches the training dataset with critical datapoints that reduce the worst-case violations and deliver a neural network with improved worst-case performance guarantees. We demonstrate the performance of our algorithm in four test power systems, ranging from 39-buses to 162-buses.
abstract_zh: 机器学习算法，尤其是神经网络 (NN)，是一种有价值的工具，用于近似非线性关系，例如交流最优潮流 (AC-OPF)，具有相当高的精度，并且在部署使用时可实现几个数量级的加速。在电力系统文献中，神经网络通常使用训练过程之前生成的固定数据集进行训练。在本文中，我们表明在训练期间调整神经网络训练数据集可以提高神经网络的性能并大大减少其最坏情况的违规。本文提出了一种算法，通过关键数据点识别和丰富训练数据集，减少最坏情况违规，并提供具有改进的最坏情况性能保证的神经网络。我们在四个测试电力系统（从 39 总线到 162 总线）中展示了我们的算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在训练过程中动态调整神经网络训练数据集的算法，以提升其最坏情况下的性能保证。
AI.motivation: 传统固定数据集训练的神经网络在应对电力系统等关键应用中的极端情况时可能存在性能不足，需通过动态调整数据集以增强最坏情况下的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出一种动态数据集丰富算法，在训练过程中识别并添加关键数据点，以减少神经网络在最坏情况下的预测误差。
AI.result: 在39节点至162节点的四个电力系统测试中，该算法有效减少了神经网络的最坏情况违规，提升了性能保证。
AI.conclusion: 动态调整训练数据集可显著提升神经网络在电力系统等关键应用中的最坏情况性能，为安全关键场景提供了新的训练方法。

In this paper, we show that adapting the NN training dataset during training can improve the NN performance and substantially reduce its worst-case violations. This paper proposes an algorithm that identifies and enriches the training dataset with critical datapoints that reduce the worst-case violations and deliver a neural network with improved worst-case performance guarantees. We demonstrate the performance of our algorithm in four test power systems, ranging from 39-buses to 162-buses. 机器学习算法，尤其是神经网络 (NN)，是一种有价值的工具，用于近似非线性关系，例如交流最优潮流 (AC-OPF)，具有相当高的精度，并且在部署使用时可实现几个数量级的加速。在电力系统文献中，神经网络通常使用训练过程之前生成的固定数据集进行训练。在本文中，我们表明在训练期间调整神经网络训练数据集可以提高神经网络的性能并大大减少其最坏情况的违规。本文提出了一种算法，通过关键数据点识别和丰富训练数据集，减少最坏情况违规，并提供具有改进的最坏情况性能保证的神经网络。我们在四个测试电力系统（从 39 总线到 162 总线）中展示了我们的算法的性能。 本文提出一种在训练过程中动态调整神经网络训练数据集的算法，以提升其最坏情况下的性能保证。 Rahul Nellikkath,Spyros Chatzivasileiadis cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY,stat.ML

authors_text: Johanna P. Müller,Matthew Baugh,Jeremy Tan,Mischa Dombrowski,Bernhard Kainz
title: Confidence-Aware and Self-Supervised Image Anomaly Localisation
title_zh: 置信感知和自我监督的图像异常定位
abstract: Universal anomaly detection still remains a challenging problem in machine learning and medical image analysis. It is possible to learn an expected distribution from a single class of normative samples, e.g., through epistemic uncertainty estimates, auto-encoding models, or from synthetic anomalies in a self-supervised way. The performance of self-supervised anomaly detection approaches is still inferior compared to methods that use examples from known unknown classes to shape the decision boundary. However, outlier exposure methods often do not identify unknown unknowns. Here we discuss an improved self-supervised single-class training strategy that supports the approximation of probabilistic inference with loosen feature locality constraints. We show that up-scaling of gradients with histogram-equalised images is beneficial for recently proposed self-supervision tasks. Our method is integrated into several out-of-distribution (OOD) detection models and we show evidence that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art on various benchmark datasets.
summary: Universal anomaly detection still remains a challenging problem in machine learning and medical image analysis. It is possible to learn an expected distribution from a single class of normative samples, e.g., through epistemic uncertainty estimates, auto-encoding models, or from synthetic anomalies in a self-supervised way. The performance of self-supervised anomaly detection approaches is still inferior compared to methods that use examples from known unknown classes to shape the decision boundary. However, outlier exposure methods often do not identify unknown unknowns. Here we discuss an improved self-supervised single-class training strategy that supports the approximation of probabilistic inference with loosen feature locality constraints. We show that up-scaling of gradients with histogram-equalised images is beneficial for recently proposed self-supervision tasks. Our method is integrated into several out-of-distribution (OOD) detection models and we show evidence that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art on various benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 通用异常检测仍然是机器学习和医学图像分析中的一个具有挑战性的问题。可以从一类规范样本中学习预期分布，例如通过认知不确定性估计、自动编码模型或以自我监督的方式从合成异常中学习。与使用已知未知类的示例来塑造决策边界的方法相比，自监督异常检测方法的性能仍然较差。然而，离群值暴露方法通常不能识别未知的未知数。在这里，我们讨论一种改进的自监督单类训练策略，该策略支持具有宽松的特征局部性约束的概率推理的近似。我们表明，使用直方图均衡图像放大梯度对于最近提出的自我监督任务是有益的。我们的方法被集成到几个分布外（OOD）检测模型中，并且我们的证据表明我们的方法在各种基准数据集上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的自监督单类训练策略，用于图像异常定位，通过放松特征局部性约束和梯度上scaling技术提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督异常检测方法在处理未知未知异常时表现不足，且难以匹配使用已知未知类的监督方法效果，需改进单类训练策略以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 结合概率推断与放松特征局部性约束，利用直方图均衡化图像进行梯度上scaling，并将方法集成到多种分布外检测模型中。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证，该方法优于现有最先进算法，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化自监督学习中的梯度处理与特征约束，本文方法显著提升了图像异常定位的准确率，为单类异常检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zixuan Ding,Ao Wang,Hui Chen,Qiang Zhang,Pengzhang Liu,Yongjun Bao,Weipeng Yan,Jungong Han
title: Exploring Structured Semantic Prior for Multi Label Recognition with Incomplete Labels
title_zh: 探索用于不完整标签的多标签识别的结构化语义先验
comment: ef:IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023
comments: ef:IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023
abstract: Multi-label recognition (MLR) with incomplete labels is very challenging. Recent works strive to explore the image-to-label correspondence in the vision-language model, \ie, CLIP, to compensate for insufficient annotations. In spite of promising performance, they generally overlook the valuable prior about the label-to-label correspondence. In this paper, we advocate remedying the deficiency of label supervision for the MLR with incomplete labels by deriving a structured semantic prior about the label-to-label correspondence via a semantic prior prompter. We then present a novel Semantic Correspondence Prompt Network (SCPNet), which can thoroughly explore the structured semantic prior. A Prior-Enhanced Self-Supervised Learning method is further introduced to enhance the use of the prior. Comprehensive experiments and analyses on several widely used benchmark datasets show that our method significantly outperforms existing methods on all datasets, well demonstrating the effectiveness and the superiority of our method. Our code will be available at https://github.com/jameslahm/SCPNet.
summary: Multi-label recognition (MLR) with incomplete labels is very challenging. Recent works strive to explore the image-to-label correspondence in the vision-language model, \ie, CLIP, to compensate for insufficient annotations. In spite of promising performance, they generally overlook the valuable prior about the label-to-label correspondence. In this paper, we advocate remedying the deficiency of label supervision for the MLR with incomplete labels by deriving a structured semantic prior about the label-to-label correspondence via a semantic prior prompter. We then present a novel Semantic Correspondence Prompt Network (SCPNet), which can thoroughly explore the structured semantic prior. A Prior-Enhanced Self-Supervised Learning method is further introduced to enhance the use of the prior. Comprehensive experiments and analyses on several widely used benchmark datasets show that our method significantly outperforms existing methods on all datasets, well demonstrating the effectiveness and the superiority of our method. Our code will be available at https://github.com/jameslahm/SCPNet.
abstract_zh: 标签不完整的多标签识别（MLR）非常具有挑战性。最近的工作致力于探索视觉语言模型（即 CLIP）中图像到标签的对应关系，以弥补注释的不足。尽管性能很有希望，但他们通常忽略了关于标签到标签对应关系的有价值的先验。在本文中，我们主张通过语义先验提示器导出关于标签到标签对应关系的结构化语义先验，以弥补标签不完整的 MLR 的标签监督缺陷。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的语义对应提示网络（SCPNet），它可以彻底探索结构化语义先验。进一步引入先验增强自监督学习方法来增强先验的使用。对几个广泛使用的基准数据集的综合实验和分析表明，我们的方法在所有数据集上都显着优于现有方法，很好地证明了我们方法的有效性和优越性。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/jameslahm/SCPNet 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过引入结构化语义先验解决多标签识别（MLR）中标签不完整的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）弥补标注不足，但忽视了标签间的语义关联，导致监督信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 提出语义对应提示网络（SCPNet）及先验增强自监督学习方法，通过语义先验提示器建模标签间关系并强化先验利用。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了该方法的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化语义先验能有效提升不完整标签场景下的多标签识别性能，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Shaobo Lin,Kun Wang,Xingyu Zeng,Rui Zhao
title: Explore the Power of Synthetic Data on Few-shot Object Detection
title_zh: 探索合成数据在少样本目标检测中的威力
comment: ef:CVPR2023 Workshop on Generative Models for Computer Vision
comments: ef:CVPR2023 Workshop on Generative Models for Computer Vision
abstract: Few-shot object detection (FSOD) aims to expand an object detector for novel categories given only a few instances for training. The few training samples restrict the performance of FSOD model. Recent text-to-image generation models have shown promising results in generating high-quality images. How applicable these synthetic images are for FSOD tasks remains under-explored. This work extensively studies how synthetic images generated from state-of-the-art text-to-image generators benefit FSOD tasks. We focus on two perspectives: (1) How to use synthetic data for FSOD? (2) How to find representative samples from the large-scale synthetic dataset? We design a copy-paste-based pipeline for using synthetic data. Specifically, saliency object detection is applied to the original generated image, and the minimum enclosing box is used for cropping the main object based on the saliency map. After that, the cropped object is randomly pasted on the image, which comes from the base dataset. We also study the influence of the input text of text-to-image generator and the number of synthetic images used. To construct a representative synthetic training dataset, we maximize the diversity of the selected images via a sample-based and cluster-based method. However, the severe problem of high false positives (FP) ratio of novel categories in FSOD can not be solved by using synthetic data. We propose integrating CLIP, a zero-shot recognition model, into the FSOD pipeline, which can filter 90% of FP by defining a threshold for the similarity score between the detected object and the text of the predicted category. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO validate the effectiveness of our method, in which performance gain is up to 21.9% compared to the few-shot baseline.

(2) How to find representative samples from the large-scale synthetic dataset? We design a copy-paste-based pipeline for using synthetic data. Specifically, saliency object detection is applied to the original generated image, and the minimum enclosing box is used for cropping the main object based on the saliency map. After that, the cropped object is randomly pasted on the image, which comes from the base dataset. We also study the influence of the input text of text-to-image generator and the number of synthetic images used. To construct a representative synthetic training dataset, we maximize the diversity of the selected images via a sample-based and cluster-based method. We propose integrating CLIP, a zero-shot recognition model, into the FSOD pipeline, which can filter 90% of FP by defining a threshold for the similarity score between the detected object and the text of the predicted category. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO validate the effectiveness of our method, in which performance gain is up to 21.9% compared to the few-shot baseline.
abstract_zh: 少样本目标检测（FSOD）旨在仅在少数训练实例的情况下扩展新类别的目标检测器。训练样本较少限制了 FSOD 模型的性能。最近的文本到图像生成模型在生成高质量图像方面显示出了有希望的结果。这些合成图像如何适用于 FSOD 任务仍有待探索。这项工作广泛研究了由最先进的文本到图像生成器生成的合成图像如何有利于 FSOD 任务。我们关注两个角度：（1）如何使用合成数据进行 FSOD？ （2）如何从大规模综合数据集中找到代表性样本？我们设计了一个基于复制粘贴的管道来使用合成数据。具体来说，将显着性对象检测应用于原始生成的图像，并根据显着性图使用最小包围盒来裁剪主要对象。之后，裁剪后的对象被随机粘贴到来自基础数据集的图像上。我们还研究了文本到图像生成器的输入文本和使用的合成图像数量的影响。为了构建具有代表性的综合训练数据集，我们通过基于样本和基于聚类的方法最大化所选图像的多样性。然而，FSOD 中新类别误报率高的严重问题无法通过使用合成数据来解决。我们建议将 CLIP（一种零样本识别模型）集成到 FSOD 管道中，通过定义检测到的对象与预测类别的文本之间的相似度分数的阈值，可以过滤 90% 的 FP。 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 上的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性，与少数样本基线相比，性能增益高达 21.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了合成数据在少样本目标检测中的应用，提出了一种结合文本到图像生成模型和CLIP模型的方法以提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 少样本目标检测因训练样本不足而性能受限，而现有研究尚未充分探索高质量合成图像对FSOD任务的适用性。
AI.method: 设计基于复制粘贴的合成数据使用流程，通过显著性检测裁剪主物体并粘贴到基础数据集图像中；结合CLIP模型通过相似度阈值过滤90%的假阳性检测结果。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上，相比少样本基线方法性能提升最高达21.9%。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据能有效增强FSOD性能，但需结合CLIP模型解决新型类别的高假阳性问题，实验验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Explore the Power of Synthetic Data on Few-shot Object Detection 探索合成数据在少样本目标检测中的威力 Few-shot object detection (FSOD) aims to expand an object detector for novel categories given only a few instances for training. The few training samples restrict the performance of FSOD model. Recent text-to-image generation models have shown promising results in generating high-quality images. How applicable these synthetic images are for FSOD tasks remains under-explored. This work extensively studies how synthetic images generated from state-of-the-art text-to-image generators benefit FSOD tasks. We focus on two perspectives: (1) How to use synthetic data for FSOD? (2) How to find representative samples from the large-scale synthetic dataset? We design a copy-paste-based pipeline for using synthetic data. Specifically, saliency object detection is applied to the original generated image, and the minimum enclosing box is used for cropping the main object based on the saliency map. After that, the cropped object is randomly pasted on the image, which comes from the base dataset. We also study the influence of the input text of text-to-image generator and the number of synthetic images used. To construct a representative synthetic training dataset, we maximize the diversity of the selected images via a sample-based and cluster-based method. However, the severe problem of high false positives (FP) ratio of novel categories in FSOD can not be solved by using synthetic data. We propose integrating CLIP, a zero-shot recognition model, into the FSOD pipeline, which can filter 90% of FP by defining a threshold for the similarity score between the detected object and the text of the predicted category. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO validate the effectiveness of our method, in which performance gain is up to 21.9% compared to the few-shot baseline. 少样本目标检测（FSOD）旨在仅在少数训练实例的情况下扩展新类别的目标检测器。训练样本较少限制了 FSOD 模型的性能。最近的文本到图像生成模型在生成高质量图像方面显示出了有希望的结果。这些合成图像如何适用于 FSOD 任务仍有待探索。这项工作广泛研究了由最先进的文本到图像生成器生成的合成图像如何有利于 FSOD 任务。我们关注两个角度：（1）如何使用合成数据进行 FSOD？ （2）如何从大规模综合数据集中找到代表性样本？我们设计了一个基于复制粘贴的管道来使用合成数据。具体来说，将显着性对象检测应用于原始生成的图像，并根据显着性图使用最小包围盒来裁剪主要对象。之后，裁剪后的对象被随机粘贴到来自基础数据集的图像上。我们还研究了文本到图像生成器的输入文本和使用的合成图像数量的影响。为了构建具有代表性的综合训练数据集，我们通过基于样本和基于聚类的方法最大化所选图像的多样性。然而，FSOD 中新类别误报率高的严重问题无法通过使用合成数据来解决。我们建议将 CLIP（一种零样本识别模型）集成到 FSOD 管道中，通过定义检测到的对象与预测类别的文本之间的相似度分数的阈值，可以过滤 90% 的 FP。 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 上的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性，与少数样本基线相比，性能增益高达 21.9%。 本文探讨了合成数据在少样本目标检测中的应用，提出了一种结合文本到图像生成模型和CLIP模型的方法以提升检测性能。 Shaobo Lin,Kun Wang,Xingyu Zeng,Rui Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Huan Ma,Changqing Zhang,Yatao Bian,Lemao Liu,Zhirui Zhang,Peilin Zhao,Shu Zhang,Huazhu Fu,Qinghua Hu,Bingzhe Wu
title: Fairness-guided Few-shot Prompting for Large Language Models
title_zh: 大型语言模型的公平引导的小样本提示
abstract: Large language models have demonstrated surprising ability to perform in-context learning, i.e., these models can be directly applied to solve numerous downstream tasks by conditioning on a prompt constructed by a few input-output examples. However, prior research has shown that in-context learning can suffer from high instability due to variations in training examples, example order, and prompt formats. Therefore, the construction of an appropriate prompt is essential for improving the performance of in-context learning. In this paper, we revisit this problem from the view of predictive bias. Specifically, we introduce a metric to evaluate the predictive bias of a fixed prompt against labels or a given attributes. Then we empirically show that prompts with higher bias always lead to unsatisfactory predictive quality. Based on this observation, we propose a novel search strategy based on the greedy search to identify the near-optimal prompt for improving the performance of in-context learning. We perform comprehensive experiments with state-of-the-art mainstream models such as GPT-3 on various downstream tasks. Our results indicate that our method can enhance the model's in-context learning performance in an effective and interpretable manner.
summary: Large language models have demonstrated surprising ability to perform in-context learning, i.e., these models can be directly applied to solve numerous downstream tasks by conditioning on a prompt constructed by a few input-output examples. However, prior research has shown that in-context learning can suffer from high instability due to variations in training examples, example order, and prompt formats. Therefore, the construction of an appropriate prompt is essential for improving the performance of in-context learning. In this paper, we revisit this problem from the view of predictive bias. Specifically, we introduce a metric to evaluate the predictive bias of a fixed prompt against labels or a given attributes. Then we empirically show that prompts with higher bias always lead to unsatisfactory predictive quality. Based on this observation, we propose a novel search strategy based on the greedy search to identify the near-optimal prompt for improving the performance of in-context learning. We perform comprehensive experiments with state-of-the-art mainstream models such as GPT-3 on various downstream tasks. Our results indicate that our method can enhance the model's in-context learning performance in an effective and interpretable manner.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型已经表现出令人惊讶的执行上下文学习的能力，即，这些模型可以通过以几个输入输出示例构建的提示为条件，直接应用于解决许多下游任务。然而，先前的研究表明，由于训练示例、示例顺序和提示格式的变化，上下文学习可能会遭受高度不稳定的影响。因此，构建适当的提示对于提高情境学习的绩效至关重要。在本文中，我们从预测偏差的角度重新审视这个问题。具体来说，我们引入了一个指标来评估固定提示相对于标签或给定属性的预测偏差。然后我们凭经验表明，具有较高偏差的提示总是会导致预测质量不令人满意。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种基于贪婪搜索的新颖搜索策略，以识别近乎最佳的提示，以提高上下文学习的性能。我们使用 GPT-3 等最先进的主流模型在各种下游任务上进行全面的实验。我们的结果表明，我们的方法可以以有效且可解释的方式增强模型的上下文学习性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于公平性指导的少样本提示方法，通过减少预测偏差提升大语言模型的上下文学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本提示方法在预测偏差控制方面存在不足，导致模型性能不稳定且难以解释。
AI.method: 引入预测偏差评估指标，结合贪婪搜索策略寻找近似最优提示，降低模型预测偏差。
AI.result: 在GPT-3等主流模型上验证，该方法有效提升上下文学习效果且具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过控制预测偏差优化提示构造，可系统性提升大语言模型的少样本学习能力。
