authors_text: Hassan Mohamed Muhi-Aldeen,Maha Ammar Mustafa,Asma A. Abdulrahman,Jabbar Abed Eleiwy,Fouad S. Tahir,Yurii Khlaponin
title: Improvement of Color Image Analysis Using a New Hybrid Face Recognition Algorithm based on Discrete Wavelets and Chebyshev Polynomials
title_zh: 使用基于离散小波和切比雪夫多项式的新型混合人脸识别算法改进彩色图像分析
abstract: This work is unique in the use of discrete wavelets that were built from or derived from Chebyshev polynomials of the second and third kind, filter the Discrete Second Chebyshev Wavelets Transform (DSCWT), and derive two effective filters. The Filter Discrete Third Chebyshev Wavelets Transform (FDTCWT) is used in the process of analyzing color images and removing noise and impurities that accompany the image, as well as because of the large amount of data that makes up the image as it is taken. These data are massive, making it difficult to deal with each other during transmission. However to address this issue, the image compression technique is used, with the image not losing information due to the readings that were obtained, and the results were satisfactory. Mean Square Error (MSE), Peak Signal Noise Ratio (PSNR), Bit Per Pixel (BPP), and Compression Ratio (CR) Coronavirus is the initial treatment, while the processing stage is done with network training for Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) with Discrete Second Chebeshev Wavelets Convolutional Neural Network (DSCWCNN) and Discrete Third Chebeshev Wavelets Convolutional Neural Network (DTCWCNN) to create an efficient algorithm for face recognition, and the best results were achieved in accuracy and in the least amount of time. Two samples of color images that were made or implemented were used. The proposed theory was obtained with fast and good results; the results are evident shown in the tables below.

abstract_zh: 这项工作的独特之处在于使用从第二类和第三类切比雪夫多项式构建或派生的离散小波，对离散第二切比雪夫小波变换（DSCWT）进行滤波，并导出两个有效滤波器。滤波器离散第三切比雪夫小波变换 (FDTCWT) 用于分析彩色图像并去除图像中伴随的噪声和杂质的过程中，以及由于拍摄图像时构成图像的大量数据。这些数据量巨大，传输过程中相互处理困难。但为了解决这个问题，采用了图像压缩技术，图像不会因为读取的读数而丢失信息，效果令人满意。均方误差 (MSE)、峰值信噪比 (PSNR)、每像素位数 (BPP) 和压缩比 (CR) 冠状病毒是初始治疗，而处理阶段则通过使用离散第二切别雪夫小波卷积神经网络 (DSCWCNN) 和离散第三切别雪夫小波卷积神经网络 (DTCWCNN) 进行卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的网络训练来完成，以创建高效的人脸识别算法，并获得最佳结果并在最短的时间内准确地实现了这一目标。使用了制作或实施的两个彩色图像样本。所提出的理论得到了快速且良好的结果；结果如下表所示。

AI.motivation: 针对彩色图像数据量大、噪声干扰多的问题，旨在通过高效压缩和降噪技术提升图像处理效率及人脸识别准确性。
AI.method: 利用二阶和三阶切比雪夫小波构建离散小波变换（DSCWT/FDTCWT），结合卷积神经网络（CNN）训练DSCWCNN和DTCWCNN模型，实现图像压缩与人脸识别。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，该算法在压缩比（CR）、峰值信噪比（PSNR）等指标表现优异，且人脸识别准确率高、处理时间短。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合算法有效解决了图像噪声和大数据量问题，为高效人脸识别提供了新方法。

authors_text: Alexander Krawczyk,Alexander Gepperth
title: Adiabatic replay for continual learning
title_zh: 绝热重播以实现持续学习
abstract: Conventional replay-based approaches to continual learning (CL) require, for each learning phase with new data, the replay of samples representing all of the previously learned knowledge in order to avoid catastrophic forgetting. Since the amount of learned knowledge grows over time in CL problems, generative replay spends an increasing amount of time just re-learning what is already known. In this proof-of-concept study, we propose a replay-based CL strategy that we term adiabatic replay (AR), which derives its efficiency from the (reasonable) assumption that each new learning phase is adiabatic, i.e., represents only a small addition to existing knowledge. Each new learning phase triggers a sampling process that selectively replays, from the body of existing knowledge, just such samples that are similar to the new data, in contrast to replaying all of it. Complete replay is not required since AR represents the data distribution by GMMs, which are capable of selectively updating their internal representation only where data statistics have changed. As long as additions are adiabatic, the amount of to-be-replayed samples need not to depend on the amount of previously acquired knowledge at all. We verify experimentally that AR is superior to state-of-the-art deep generative replay using VAEs.
summary: Conventional replay-based approaches to continual learning (CL) require, for each learning phase with new data, the replay of samples representing all of the previously learned knowledge in order to avoid catastrophic forgetting. Since the amount of learned knowledge grows over time in CL problems, generative replay spends an increasing amount of time just re-learning what is already known. In this proof-of-concept study, we propose a replay-based CL strategy that we term adiabatic replay (AR), which derives its efficiency from the (reasonable) assumption that each new learning phase is adiabatic, i.e., represents only a small addition to existing knowledge. Each new learning phase triggers a sampling process that selectively replays, from the body of existing knowledge, just such samples that are similar to the new data, in contrast to replaying all of it. Complete replay is not required since AR represents the data distribution by GMMs, which are capable of selectively updating their internal representation only where data statistics have changed. As long as additions are adiabatic, the amount of to-be-replayed samples need not to depend on the amount of previously acquired knowledge at all. We verify experimentally that AR is superior to state-of-the-art deep generative replay using VAEs.
abstract_zh: 传统的基于重放的持续学习（CL）方法需要在每个使用新数据的学习阶段重放代表所有先前学到的知识的样本，以避免灾难性遗忘。由于在 CL 问题中学到的知识量随着时间的推移而增长，生成重放会花费越来越多的时间来重新学习已知的内容。在这项概念验证研究中，我们提出了一种基于重放的 CL 策略，我们称之为绝热重放（AR），它的效率源自（合理的）假设，即每个新的学习阶段都是绝热的，即仅代表对现有知识的一小部分补充。每个新的学习阶段都会触发一个采样过程，该过程会从现有知识体系中选择性地重放与新数据相似的样本，而不是重放所有数据。不需要完全重放，因为 AR 代表 GMM 的数据分布，GMM 能够仅在数据统计发生变化时有选择地更新其内部表示。只要添加是绝热的，待重放样本的数量就根本不需要依赖于先前获得的知识的数量。我们通过实验验证 AR 优于使用 VAE 的最先进的深度生成重放。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为绝热回放（AR）的持续学习方法，通过仅回放与新数据相似的样本，提高学习效率。
AI.motivation: 传统回放方法在持续学习中需重复学习所有历史知识，导致效率低下，而绝热回放假设新知识增量较小，从而减少冗余回放。
AI.method: 利用高斯混合模型（GMM）表示数据分布，仅选择性回放与新数据相似的样本，避免全面回放。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，AR在效率上优于基于变分自编码器（VAE）的最新生成回放方法。
AI.conclusion: 绝热回放通过局部更新和选择性回放，在持续学习任务中实现了更高的效率和效果。

authors_text: Petra Heck,Gerard Schouten
title: Defining Quality Requirements for a Trustworthy AI Wildflower Monitoring Platform
title_zh: 定义值得信赖的人工智能野花监测平台的质量要求
comment: Preprint - Paper accepted for CAIN23 - 2nd international conference on AI Engineering
comments: Preprint - Paper accepted for CAIN23 - 2nd international conference on AI Engineering
abstract: For an AI solution to evolve from a trained machine learning model into a production-ready AI system, many more things need to be considered than just the performance of the machine learning model. A production-ready AI system needs to be trustworthy, i.e. of high quality. But how to determine this in practice? For traditional software, ISO25000 and its predecessors have since long time been used to define and measure quality characteristics. Recently, quality models for AI systems, based on ISO25000, have been introduced. This paper applies one such quality model to a real-life case study: a deep learning platform for monitoring wildflowers. The paper presents three realistic scenarios sketching what it means to respectively use, extend and incrementally improve the deep learning platform for wildflower identification and counting. Next, it is shown how the quality model can be used as a structured dictionary to define quality requirements for data, model and software. Future work remains to extend the quality model with metrics, tools and best practices to aid AI engineering practitioners in implementing trustworthy AI systems.
summary: For an AI solution to evolve from a trained machine learning model into a production-ready AI system, many more things need to be considered than just the performance of the machine learning model. A production-ready AI system needs to be trustworthy, i.e. of high quality. But how to determine this in practice? For traditional software, ISO25000 and its predecessors have since long time been used to define and measure quality characteristics. Recently, quality models for AI systems, based on ISO25000, have been introduced. This paper applies one such quality model to a real-life case study: a deep learning platform for monitoring wildflowers. The paper presents three realistic scenarios sketching what it means to respectively use, extend and incrementally improve the deep learning platform for wildflower identification and counting. Next, it is shown how the quality model can be used as a structured dictionary to define quality requirements for data, model and software. Future work remains to extend the quality model with metrics, tools and best practices to aid AI engineering practitioners in implementing trustworthy AI systems.
abstract_zh: 为了使人工智能解决方案从训练有素的机器学习模型演变成可投入生产的人工智能系统，需要考虑的不仅仅是机器学习模型的性能。生产就绪的人工智能系统需要值得信赖，即高质量。但实际中如何确定呢？对于传统软件来说，ISO25000 及其前身长期以来一直被用来定义和衡量质量特性。最近，引入了基于 ISO25000 的人工智能系统质量模型。本文将这样的质量模型应用于现实案例研究：用于监测野花的深度学习平台。本文提出了三个现实场景，概述了分别使用、扩展和逐步改进用于野花识别和计数的深度学习平台的含义。接下来，展示了如何将质量模型用作结构化字典来定义数据、模型和软件的质量要求。未来的工作仍然是通过指标、工具和最佳实践来扩展质量模型，以帮助人工智能工程从业者实施值得信赖的人工智能系统。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过应用基于ISO25000的质量模型，为可信AI野花监测平台定义质量需求，并探讨其在实际场景中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统软件质量模型如ISO25000难以直接适用于AI系统，需针对AI特性进行调整以确保其可信度和生产就绪性。
AI.method: 采用基于ISO25000的AI质量模型，结合三个实际场景（使用、扩展、改进野花监测平台），结构化地定义数据、模型和软件的质量需求。
AI.result: 展示了质量模型在定义数据、模型及软件质量需求中的应用，但尚未完善指标、工具和最佳实践。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步扩展质量模型，集成度量标准与工具，以支持可信AI系统的工程实践。

search_text: Defining Quality Requirements for a Trustworthy AI Wildflower Monitoring Platform 定义值得信赖的人工智能野花监测平台的质量要求 For an AI solution to evolve from a trained machine learning model into a production-ready AI system, many more things need to be considered than just the performance of the machine learning model. A production-ready AI system needs to be trustworthy, i.e. of high quality. But how to determine this in practice? For traditional software, ISO25000 and its predecessors have since long time been used to define and measure quality characteristics. Recently, quality models for AI systems, based on ISO25000, have been introduced. This paper applies one such quality model to a real-life case study: a deep learning platform for monitoring wildflowers. The paper presents three realistic scenarios sketching what it means to respectively use, extend and incrementally improve the deep learning platform for wildflower identification and counting. Next, it is shown how the quality model can be used as a structured dictionary to define quality requirements for data, model and software. Future work remains to extend the quality model with metrics, tools and best practices to aid AI engineering practitioners in implementing trustworthy AI systems. 为了使人工智能解决方案从训练有素的机器学习模型演变成可投入生产的人工智能系统，需要考虑的不仅仅是机器学习模型的性能。生产就绪的人工智能系统需要值得信赖，即高质量。但实际中如何确定呢？对于传统软件来说，ISO25000 及其前身长期以来一直被用来定义和衡量质量特性。最近，引入了基于 ISO25000 的人工智能系统质量模型。本文将这样的质量模型应用于现实案例研究：用于监测野花的深度学习平台。本文提出了三个现实场景，概述了分别使用、扩展和逐步改进用于野花识别和计数的深度学习平台的含义。接下来，展示了如何将质量模型用作结构化字典来定义数据、模型和软件的质量要求。未来的工作仍然是通过指标、工具和最佳实践来扩展质量模型，以帮助人工智能工程从业者实施值得信赖的人工智能系统。 本文旨在通过应用基于ISO25000的质量模型，为可信AI野花监测平台定义质量需求，并探讨其在实际场景中的应用。 Petra Heck,Gerard Schouten cs.AI,cs.SE

authors_text: Tomas Vojir,Jan Sochman,Rahaf Aljundi,Jiri Matas
title: Calibrated Out-of-Distribution Detection with a Generic Representation
title_zh: 使用通用表示法进行校准的分布外检测
comment: 10 pages, accepted to Workshop on Uncertainty Quantification for Computer Vision, ICCV 2023
comments: 10 pages, accepted to Workshop on Uncertainty Quantification for Computer Vision, ICCV 2023
abstract: Out-of-distribution detection is a common issue in deploying vision models in practice and solving it is an essential building block in safety critical applications. Most of the existing OOD detection solutions focus on improving the OOD robustness of a classification model trained exclusively on in-distribution (ID) data. In this work, we take a different approach and propose to leverage generic pre-trained representation. We propose a novel OOD method, called GROOD, that formulates the OOD detection as a Neyman-Pearson task with well calibrated scores and which achieves excellent performance, predicated by the use of a good generic representation. Only a trivial training process is required for adapting GROOD to a particular problem. The method is simple, general, efficient, calibrated and with only a few hyper-parameters. The method achieves state-of-the-art performance on a number of OOD benchmarks, reaching near perfect performance on several of them. The source code is available at https://github.com/vojirt/GROOD.
summary: Out-of-distribution detection is a common issue in deploying vision models in practice and solving it is an essential building block in safety critical applications. Most of the existing OOD detection solutions focus on improving the OOD robustness of a classification model trained exclusively on in-distribution (ID) data. In this work, we take a different approach and propose to leverage generic pre-trained representation. We propose a novel OOD method, called GROOD, that formulates the OOD detection as a Neyman-Pearson task with well calibrated scores and which achieves excellent performance, predicated by the use of a good generic representation. Only a trivial training process is required for adapting GROOD to a particular problem. The method is simple, general, efficient, calibrated and with only a few hyper-parameters. The method achieves state-of-the-art performance on a number of OOD benchmarks, reaching near perfect performance on several of them. The source code is available at https://github.com/vojirt/GROOD.
abstract_zh: 分布外检测是在实践中部署视觉模型时的一个常见问题，解决它是安全关键应用中的一个重要构建块。大多数现有的 OOD 检测解决方案都专注于提高专门针对分布内 (ID) 数据训练的分类模型的 OOD 鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们采取了不同的方法并建议利用通用的预训练表示。我们提出了一种新颖的 OOD 方法，称为 GROOD，它将 OOD 检测制定为具有良好校准分数的 Neyman-Pearson 任务，并通过使用良好的通用表示来实现出色的性能。只需简单的培训过程即可使 GROOD 适应特定问题。该方法简单、通用、高效、经过校准且超参数少。该方法在许多 OOD 基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，其中一些基准测试达到了近乎完美的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/vojirt/GROOD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于通用预训练表示的校准分布外检测方法GROOD，通过Neyman-Pearson框架实现高效OOD检测。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法过度依赖特定任务的ID数据训练，缺乏对通用表示的利用，难以兼顾检测性能与校准能力。
AI.method: 构建GROOD框架，将OOD检测建模为Neyman-Pearson假设检验问题，利用预训练模型的通用表示生成校准得分，仅需微调少量参数即可适配新任务。
AI.result: 在多个OOD基准测试中达到SOTA性能，部分数据集接近完美检测精度，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通用预训练表示结合统计检验框架能有效提升OOD检测的校准性与泛化能力，提供简单高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhiwen Zuo,Lei Zhao,Ailin Li,Zhizhong Wang,Zhanjie Zhang,Jiafu Chen,Wei Xing,Dongming Lu
title: Generative Image Inpainting with Segmentation Confusion Adversarial Training and Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 具有分割混淆的生成图像修复对抗训练和对比学习
abstract: This paper presents a new adversarial training framework for image inpainting with segmentation confusion adversarial training (SCAT) and contrastive learning. SCAT plays an adversarial game between an inpainting generator and a segmentation network, which provides pixel-level local training signals and can adapt to images with free-form holes. By combining SCAT with standard global adversarial training, the new adversarial training framework exhibits the following three advantages simultaneously: (1) the global consistency of the repaired image, (2) the local fine texture details of the repaired image, and (3) the flexibility of handling images with free-form holes. Moreover, we propose the textural and semantic contrastive learning losses to stabilize and improve our inpainting model's training by exploiting the feature representation space of the discriminator, in which the inpainting images are pulled closer to the ground truth images but pushed farther from the corrupted images. The proposed contrastive losses better guide the repaired images to move from the corrupted image data points to the real image data points in the feature representation space, resulting in more realistic completed images. We conduct extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets, demonstrating our model's effectiveness and superiority both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: This paper presents a new adversarial training framework for image inpainting with segmentation confusion adversarial training (SCAT) and contrastive learning. SCAT plays an adversarial game between an inpainting generator and a segmentation network, which provides pixel-level local training signals and can adapt to images with free-form holes. By combining SCAT with standard global adversarial training, the new adversarial training framework exhibits the following three advantages simultaneously: (1) the global consistency of the repaired image, (2) the local fine texture details of the repaired image, and (3) the flexibility of handling images with free-form holes. Moreover, we propose the textural and semantic contrastive learning losses to stabilize and improve our inpainting model's training by exploiting the feature representation space of the discriminator, in which the inpainting images are pulled closer to the ground truth images but pushed farther from the corrupted images. The proposed contrastive losses better guide the repaired images to move from the corrupted image data points to the real image data points in the feature representation space, resulting in more realistic completed images. We conduct extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets, demonstrating our model's effectiveness and superiority both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的图像修复对抗训练框架，包括分割混淆对抗训练（SCAT）和对比学习。 SCAT 在修复生成器和分割网络之间进行对抗性游戏，提供像素级局部训练信号，并且可以适应具有自由形状孔的图像。通过将SCAT与标准的全局对抗训练相结合，新的对抗训练框架同时表现出以下三个优点：（1）修复图像的全局一致性，（2）修复图像的局部精细纹理细节，以及（3）处理具有自由形状孔的图像的灵活性。此外，我们提出了纹理和语义对比学习损失，通过利用鉴别器的特征表示空间来稳定和改进我们的修复模型的训练，其中修复图像被拉近地面真实图像，但远离损坏的图像。所提出的对比损失更好地引导修复的图像从损坏的图像数据点移动到特征表示空间中的真实图像数据点，从而产生更真实的完整图像。我们对两个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验，从定性和定量上证明了我们模型的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合分割混淆对抗训练（SCAT）和对比学习的新框架，用于生成图像修复任务。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复方法难以同时保证全局一致性、局部细节真实性和对任意形状缺失区域的适应性，需通过对抗训练与对比学习提升修复效果。
AI.method: 设计SCAT框架让修复生成器与分割网络进行对抗，结合全局对抗训练；引入纹理与语义对比损失，利用判别器特征空间拉近修复图像与真实图像的距离，推远与损坏图像的距离。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法，修复图像更真实且细节更丰富。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过SCAT与对比学习的结合，有效平衡了全局结构、局部纹理和复杂缺失区域的处理能力，显著提升了图像修复质量。

Moreover, we propose the textural and semantic contrastive learning losses to stabilize and improve our inpainting model's training by exploiting the feature representation space of the discriminator, in which the inpainting images are pulled closer to the ground truth images but pushed farther from the corrupted images. The proposed contrastive losses better guide the repaired images to move from the corrupted image data points to the real image data points in the feature representation space, resulting in more realistic completed images. We conduct extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets, demonstrating our model's effectiveness and superiority both qualitatively and quantitatively. 本文提出了一种新的图像修复对抗训练框架，包括分割混淆对抗训练（SCAT）和对比学习。 SCAT 在修复生成器和分割网络之间进行对抗性游戏，提供像素级局部训练信号，并且可以适应具有自由形状孔的图像。通过将SCAT与标准的全局对抗训练相结合，新的对抗训练框架同时表现出以下三个优点：（1）修复图像的全局一致性，（2）修复图像的局部精细纹理细节，以及（3）处理具有自由形状孔的图像的灵活性。此外，我们提出了纹理和语义对比学习损失，通过利用鉴别器的特征表示空间来稳定和改进我们的修复模型的训练，其中修复图像被拉近地面真实图像，但远离损坏的图像。所提出的对比损失更好地引导修复的图像从损坏的图像数据点移动到特征表示空间中的真实图像数据点，从而产生更真实的完整图像。我们对两个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验，从定性和定量上证明了我们模型的有效性和优越性。 本文提出一种结合分割混淆对抗训练（SCAT）和对比学习的新框架，用于生成图像修复任务。 Zhiwen Zuo,Lei Zhao,Ailin Li,Zhizhong Wang,Zhanjie Zhang,Jiafu Chen,Wei Xing,Dongming Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Haoyu Chen,Jinjin Gu,Yihao Liu,Salma Abdel Magid,Chao Dong,Qiong Wang,Hanspeter Pfister,Lei Zhu
title: Masked Image Training for Generalizable Deep Image Denoising
title_zh: 用于可泛化深度图像去噪的蒙版图像训练
abstract: When capturing and storing images, devices inevitably introduce noise. Reducing this noise is a critical task called image denoising. Deep learning has become the de facto method for image denoising, especially with the emergence of Transformer-based models that have achieved notable state-of-the-art results on various image tasks. However, deep learning-based methods often suffer from a lack of generalization ability. For example, deep models trained on Gaussian noise may perform poorly when tested on other noise distributions. To address this issue, we present a novel approach to enhance the generalization performance of denoising networks, known as masked training. Our method involves masking random pixels of the input image and reconstructing the missing information during training. We also mask out the features in the self-attention layers to avoid the impact of training-testing inconsistency. Our approach exhibits better generalization ability than other deep learning models and is directly applicable to real-world scenarios. Additionally, our interpretability analysis demonstrates the superiority of our method.
summary: When capturing and storing images, devices inevitably introduce noise. Reducing this noise is a critical task called image denoising. Deep learning has become the de facto method for image denoising, especially with the emergence of Transformer-based models that have achieved notable state-of-the-art results on various image tasks. However, deep learning-based methods often suffer from a lack of generalization ability. For example, deep models trained on Gaussian noise may perform poorly when tested on other noise distributions. To address this issue, we present a novel approach to enhance the generalization performance of denoising networks, known as masked training. Our method involves masking random pixels of the input image and reconstructing the missing information during training. We also mask out the features in the self-attention layers to avoid the impact of training-testing inconsistency. Our approach exhibits better generalization ability than other deep learning models and is directly applicable to real-world scenarios. Additionally, our interpretability analysis demonstrates the superiority of our method.
abstract_zh: 在捕获和存储图像时，设备不可避免地会引入噪声。减少这种噪声是一项称为图像去噪的关键任务。深度学习已经成为图像去噪的事实上的方法，特别是随着基于 Transformer 的模型的出现，这些模型在各种图像任务上取得了显着的最先进的结果。然而，基于深度学习的方法往往缺乏泛化能力。例如，在高斯噪声上训练的深度模型在其他噪声分布上进行测试时可能表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种增强去噪网络泛化性能的新方法，称为掩蔽训练。我们的方法涉及屏蔽输入图像的随机像素并在训练期间重建丢失的信息。我们还屏蔽了自注意力层中的特征，以避免训练测试不一致的影响。我们的方法比其他深度学习模型表现出更好的泛化能力，并且可以直接应用于现实场景。此外，我们的可解释性分析证明了我们方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过掩码训练提升深度图像去噪模型泛化能力的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习去噪模型在不同噪声分布下泛化能力不足，例如高斯噪声训练的模型在其他噪声类型下表现较差。
AI.method: 在训练时随机掩码输入图像像素并重建缺失信息，同时掩码自注意力层特征以避免训练-测试不一致性影响。
AI.result: 该方法在泛化能力上优于其他深度学习模型，可直接应用于实际场景，可解释性分析也验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: 掩码训练策略有效提升了去噪网络的泛化性能，为实际应用提供了可靠解决方案。

search_text: Masked Image Training for Generalizable Deep Image Denoising 用于可泛化深度图像去噪的蒙版图像训练 When capturing and storing images, devices inevitably introduce noise. Reducing this noise is a critical task called image denoising. Deep learning has become the de facto method for image denoising, especially with the emergence of Transformer-based models that have achieved notable state-of-the-art results on various image tasks. However, deep learning-based methods often suffer from a lack of generalization ability. For example, deep models trained on Gaussian noise may perform poorly when tested on other noise distributions. To address this issue, we present a novel approach to enhance the generalization performance of denoising networks, known as masked training. Our method involves masking random pixels of the input image and reconstructing the missing information during training. We also mask out the features in the self-attention layers to avoid the impact of training-testing inconsistency. Our approach exhibits better generalization ability than other deep learning models and is directly applicable to real-world scenarios. Additionally, our interpretability analysis demonstrates the superiority of our method. 在捕获和存储图像时，设备不可避免地会引入噪声。减少这种噪声是一项称为图像去噪的关键任务。深度学习已经成为图像去噪的事实上的方法，特别是随着基于 Transformer 的模型的出现，这些模型在各种图像任务上取得了显着的最先进的结果。然而，基于深度学习的方法往往缺乏泛化能力。例如，在高斯噪声上训练的深度模型在其他噪声分布上进行测试时可能表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种增强去噪网络泛化性能的新方法，称为掩蔽训练。我们的方法涉及屏蔽输入图像的随机像素并在训练期间重建丢失的信息。我们还屏蔽了自注意力层中的特征，以避免训练测试不一致的影响。我们的方法比其他深度学习模型表现出更好的泛化能力，并且可以直接应用于现实场景。此外，我们的可解释性分析证明了我们方法的优越性。 本文提出了一种通过掩码训练提升深度图像去噪模型泛化能力的新方法。 Haoyu Chen,Jinjin Gu,Yihao Liu,Salma Abdel Magid,Chao Dong,Qiong Wang,Hanspeter Pfister,Lei Zhu cs.CV

authors_text: Yuxuan Duan,Xuhong Zhang,Chuer Yu,Zonghui Wang,Shouling Ji,Wenzhi Chen
title: Watch Out for the Confusing Faces: Detecting Face Swapping with the Probability Distribution of Face Identification Models
title_zh: 留意令人困惑的面孔：利用人脸识别模型的概率分布检测人脸交换
abstract: Recently, face swapping has been developing rapidly and achieved a surprising reality, raising concerns about fake content. As a countermeasure, various detection approaches have been proposed and achieved promising performance. However, most existing detectors struggle to maintain performance on unseen face swapping methods and low-quality images. Apart from the generalization problem, current detection approaches have been shown vulnerable to evasion attacks crafted by detection-aware manipulators. Lack of robustness under adversary scenarios leaves threats for applying face swapping detection in real world. In this paper, we propose a novel face swapping detection approach based on face identification probability distributions, coined as IdP_FSD, to improve the generalization and robustness. IdP_FSD is specially designed for detecting swapped faces whose identities belong to a finite set, which is meaningful in real-world applications. Compared with previous general detection methods, we make use of the available real faces with concerned identities and require no fake samples for training. IdP_FSD exploits face swapping's common nature that the identity of swapped face combines that of two faces involved in swapping. We reflect this nature with the confusion of a face identification model and measure the confusion with the maximum value of the output probability distribution. What's more, to defend our detector under adversary scenarios, an attention-based finetuning scheme is proposed for the face identification models used in IdP_FSD. Extensive experiments show that the proposed IdP_FSD not only achieves high detection performance on different benchmark datasets and image qualities but also raises the bar for manipulators to evade the detection.
summary: Recently, face swapping has been developing rapidly and achieved a surprising reality, raising concerns about fake content. As a countermeasure, various detection approaches have been proposed and achieved promising performance. However, most existing detectors struggle to maintain performance on unseen face swapping methods and low-quality images. Apart from the generalization problem, current detection approaches have been shown vulnerable to evasion attacks crafted by detection-aware manipulators. Lack of robustness under adversary scenarios leaves threats for applying face swapping detection in real world. In this paper, we propose a novel face swapping detection approach based on face identification probability distributions, coined as IdP_FSD, to improve the generalization and robustness. IdP_FSD is specially designed for detecting swapped faces whose identities belong to a finite set, which is meaningful in real-world applications. Compared with previous general detection methods, we make use of the available real faces with concerned identities and require no fake samples for training. IdP_FSD exploits face swapping's common nature that the identity of swapped face combines that of two faces involved in swapping. We reflect this nature with the confusion of a face identification model and measure the confusion with the maximum value of the output probability distribution. What's more, to defend our detector under adversary scenarios, an attention-based finetuning scheme is proposed for the face identification models used in IdP_FSD. Extensive experiments show that the proposed IdP_FSD not only achieves high detection performance on different benchmark datasets and image qualities but also raises the bar for manipulators to evade the detection.
abstract_zh: 最近，换脸技术发展迅速，并取得了令人惊讶的现实，引发了人们对虚假内容的担忧。作为对策，人们提出了各种检测方法并取得了可喜的性能。然而，大多数现有的检测器都难以维持看不见的面部交换方法和低质量图像的性能。除了泛化问题之外，当前的检测方法还很容易受到检测感知操纵者精心设计的逃避攻击。在敌对场景下缺乏鲁棒性给在现实世界中应用面部交换检测带来了威胁。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于人脸识别概率分布的新型人脸交换检测方法，称为 IdP_FSD，以提高泛化性和鲁棒性。 IdP_FSD 专门用于检测身份属于有限集的交换面孔，这在实际应用中很有意义。与以前的一般检测方法相比，我们利用具有相关身份的可用真实面孔，并且不需要假样本进行训练。 IdP_FSD 利用了面部交换的共同性质，即交换面部的身份结合了参与交换的两个面部的身份。我们用人脸识别模型的混淆度来反映这种性质，并用输出概率分布的最大值来衡量混淆度。此外，为了在敌对场景下保护我们的检测器，针对 IdP_FSD 中使用的人脸识别模型提出了一种基于注意力的微调方案。大量实验表明，所提出的 IdP_FSD 不仅在不同的基准数据集和图像质量上实现了较高的检测性能，而且还提高了操纵者逃避检测的门槛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人脸身份识别模型概率分布的新型人脸交换检测方法IdP_FSD，以提升检测的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法在面对未知交换技术、低质量图像及对抗攻击时表现不佳，缺乏实际应用中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用人脸身份识别模型的输出概率分布最大值衡量交换人脸的身份混淆程度，并引入注意力机制微调模型以增强对抗鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和图像质量下均取得高检测性能，显著提升了攻击者绕过检测的难度。
AI.conclusion: IdP_FSD通过身份概率分布特性有效检测人脸交换，为实际应用提供了更安全可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Quanzhou Li,Jingbo Wang,Chen Change Loy,Bo Dai
title: Task-Oriented Human-Object Interactions Generation with Implicit Neural Representations
title_zh: 具有隐式神经表示的面向任务的人机交互生成
abstract: Digital human motion synthesis is a vibrant research field with applications in movies, AR/VR, and video games. Whereas methods were proposed to generate natural and realistic human motions, most only focus on modeling humans and largely ignore object movements. Generating task-oriented human-object interaction motions in simulation is challenging. For different intents of using the objects, humans conduct various motions, which requires the human first to approach the objects and then make them move consistently with the human instead of staying still. Also, to deploy in downstream applications, the synthesized motions are desired to be flexible in length, providing options to personalize the predicted motions for various purposes. To this end, we propose TOHO: Task-Oriented Human-Object Interactions Generation with Implicit Neural Representations, which generates full human-object interaction motions to conduct specific tasks, given only the task type, the object, and a starting human status. TOHO generates human-object motions in three steps: 1) it first estimates the keyframe poses of conducting a task given the task type and object information; 2) then, it infills the keyframes and generates continuous motions; 3) finally, it applies a compact closed-form object motion estimation to generate the object motion. Our method generates continuous motions that are parameterized only by the temporal coordinate, which allows for upsampling or downsampling of the sequence to arbitrary frames and adjusting the motion speeds by designing the temporal coordinate vector. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, both qualitatively and quantitatively. This work takes a step further toward general human-scene interaction simulation.
summary: Digital human motion synthesis is a vibrant research field with applications in movies, AR/VR, and video games. Whereas methods were proposed to generate natural and realistic human motions, most only focus on modeling humans and largely ignore object movements. Generating task-oriented human-object interaction motions in simulation is challenging. For different intents of using the objects, humans conduct various motions, which requires the human first to approach the objects and then make them move consistently with the human instead of staying still. Also, to deploy in downstream applications, the synthesized motions are desired to be flexible in length, providing options to personalize the predicted motions for various purposes. To this end, we propose TOHO: Task-Oriented Human-Object Interactions Generation with Implicit Neural Representations, which generates full human-object interaction motions to conduct specific tasks, given only the task type, the object, and a starting human status. TOHO generates human-object motions in three steps: 1) it first estimates the keyframe poses of conducting a task given the task type and object information; 2) then, it infills the keyframes and generates continuous motions; 3) finally, it applies a compact closed-form object motion estimation to generate the object motion. Our method generates continuous motions that are parameterized only by the temporal coordinate, which allows for upsampling or downsampling of the sequence to arbitrary frames and adjusting the motion speeds by designing the temporal coordinate vector. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, both qualitatively and quantitatively. This work takes a step further toward general human-scene interaction simulation.
abstract_zh: 数字人体运动合成是一个充满活力的研究领域，在电影、AR/VR 和视频游戏中都有应用。尽管提出了生成自然且真实的人体运动的方法，但大多数方法仅专注于对人体进行建模而很大程度上忽略了物体运动。在模拟中生成面向任务的人机交互运动具有挑战性。为了不同的使用物体的意图，人类会进行不同的运动，这需要人类首先接近物体，然后使物体与人类一致地移动，而不是保持静止。此外，为了在下游应用中部署，合成的运动需要在长度上灵活，从而为各种目的提供个性化预测运动的选项。为此，我们提出了 TOHO：具有隐式神经表示的面向任务的人与物体交互生成，它生成完整的人与物体交互动作来执行特定任务，仅给出任务类型、物体和起始人类状态。 TOHO 通过三个步骤生成人-物体运动：1）首先根据给定的任务类型和物体信息估计执行任务的关键帧姿势； 2）然后，填充关键帧并生成连续运动； 3）最后，它应用紧凑的封闭形式对象运动估计来生成对象运动。我们的方法生成仅由时间坐标参数化的连续运动，这允许将序列上采样或下采样到任意帧，并通过设计时间坐标向量来调整运动速度。我们从定性和定量两个方面证明了我们方法的有效性。这项工作朝着通用的人景交互模拟又向前迈进了一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式神经表示的任务导向人类-物体交互运动生成方法，能够根据任务类型、物体和初始人体状态生成完整的交互运动。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多关注人体运动建模而忽视物体运动，难以生成符合任务目标的动态人类-物体交互运动，且缺乏对运动长度和速度的灵活控制。
AI.method: TOHO方法分三步生成运动：1）根据任务类型和物体信息估计关键帧姿态；2）填充关键帧生成连续运动；3）通过紧凑闭式公式估计物体运动。运动参数仅由时间坐标参数化，支持任意帧率的上/下采样。
AI.result: 方法在定性和定量实验中均表现出有效性，生成的交互运动符合任务需求且具有可调整的时长和速度。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为通用的人类-场景交互模拟提供了新思路，推动了数字人类运动合成技术的发展。

authors_text: Jing Zhao,Heliang Zheng,Chaoyue Wang,Long Lan,Wenjing Yang
title: MagicFusion: Boosting Text-to-Image Generation Performance by Fusing Diffusion Models
title_zh: MagicFusion：通过融合扩散模型提高文本到图像的生成性能
abstract: The advent of open-source AI communities has produced a cornucopia of powerful text-guided diffusion models that are trained on various datasets. While few explorations have been conducted on ensembling such models to combine their strengths. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective method called Saliency-aware Noise Blending (SNB) that can empower the fused text-guided diffusion models to achieve more controllable generation. Specifically, we experimentally find that the responses of classifier-free guidance are highly related to the saliency of generated images. Thus we propose to trust different models in their areas of expertise by blending the predicted noises of two diffusion models in a saliency-aware manner. SNB is training-free and can be completed within a DDIM sampling process. Additionally, it can automatically align the semantics of two noise spaces without requiring additional annotations such as masks. Extensive experiments show the impressive effectiveness of SNB in various applications. Project page is available at https://magicfusion.github.io/.
summary: The advent of open-source AI communities has produced a cornucopia of powerful text-guided diffusion models that are trained on various datasets. While few explorations have been conducted on ensembling such models to combine their strengths. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective method called Saliency-aware Noise Blending (SNB) that can empower the fused text-guided diffusion models to achieve more controllable generation. Specifically, we experimentally find that the responses of classifier-free guidance are highly related to the saliency of generated images. Thus we propose to trust different models in their areas of expertise by blending the predicted noises of two diffusion models in a saliency-aware manner. SNB is training-free and can be completed within a DDIM sampling process. Additionally, it can automatically align the semantics of two noise spaces without requiring additional annotations such as masks. Extensive experiments show the impressive effectiveness of SNB in various applications. Project page is available at https://magicfusion.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 开源人工智能社区的出现产生了大量强大的文本引导扩散模型，这些模型在各种数据集上进行了训练。虽然很少有人对集成这些模型以结合它们的优势进行探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为显着性感知噪声混合（SNB），它可以使融合的文本引导扩散模型实现更可控的生成。具体来说，我们通过实验发现无分类器指导的响应与生成图像的显着性高度相关。因此，我们建议通过以显着性感知的方式混合两个扩散模型的预测噪声来信任其专业领域的不同模型。 SNB 无需培训，可以在 DDIM 采样过程中完成。此外，它可以自动对齐两个噪声空间的语义，而不需要额外的注释（例如掩码）。大量实验表明 SNB 在各种应用中具有令人印象深刻的有效性。项目页面位于 https://magicfusion.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Saliency-aware Noise Blending (SNB)的方法，通过融合不同文本引导的扩散模型来提升文本到图像生成的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管开源社区已产生大量文本引导的扩散模型，但现有研究较少探索通过集成这些模型以结合其优势。现有方法难以在无需额外标注的情况下自动对齐噪声空间并实现可控生成。
AI.method: 提出SNB方法，在DDIM采样过程中通过显著性感知的噪声融合策略，利用无分类器引导的响应与图像显著性的关联性，自动融合两个扩散模型的预测噪声，无需额外训练或标注。
AI.result: 实验表明SNB在多种应用场景中均能显著提升生成效果，包括图像质量、语义对齐和可控性，且无需额外计算资源。
AI.conclusion: SNB通过简单有效的噪声融合策略，实现了跨扩散模型的优势互补，在保持高效性的同时提升了文本到图像生成的性能。

authors_text: Kilian Zepf,Selma Wanna,Marco Miani,Juston Moore,Jes Frellsen,Søren Hauberg,Frederik Warburg,Aasa Feragen
title: Laplacian Segmentation Networks Improve Epistemic Uncertainty Quantification
title_zh: 拉普拉斯分割网络改善认知不确定性量化
comment: Published in the Conference Proceedings of the 27th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI)
comments: Published in the Conference Proceedings of the 27th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI)
abstract: Image segmentation relies heavily on neural networks which are known to be overconfident, especially when making predictions on out-of-distribution (OOD) images. This is a common scenario in the medical domain due to variations in equipment, acquisition sites, or image corruptions. This work addresses the challenge of OOD detection by proposing Laplacian Segmentation Networks (LSN): methods which jointly model epistemic (model) and aleatoric (data) uncertainty for OOD detection. In doing so, we propose the first Laplace approximation of the weight posterior that scales to large neural networks with skip connections that have high-dimensional outputs. We demonstrate on three datasets that the LSN-modeled parameter distributions, in combination with suitable uncertainty measures, gives superior OOD detection.
summary: Image segmentation relies heavily on neural networks which are known to be overconfident, especially when making predictions on out-of-distribution (OOD) images. This is a common scenario in the medical domain due to variations in equipment, acquisition sites, or image corruptions. This work addresses the challenge of OOD detection by proposing Laplacian Segmentation Networks (LSN): methods which jointly model epistemic (model) and aleatoric (data) uncertainty for OOD detection. In doing so, we propose the first Laplace approximation of the weight posterior that scales to large neural networks with skip connections that have high-dimensional outputs. We demonstrate on three datasets that the LSN-modeled parameter distributions, in combination with suitable uncertainty measures, gives superior OOD detection.
abstract_zh: 图像分割严重依赖于过度自信的神经网络，尤其是在对分布外 (OOD) 图像进行预测时。由于设备、采集地点或图像损坏的变化，这是医疗领域的常见情况。这项工作通过提出拉普拉斯分割网络（LSN）来解决 OOD 检测的挑战：联合建模 OOD 检测的认知（模型）和任意（数据）不确定性的方法。在此过程中，我们提出了权重后验的第一个拉普拉斯近似，该近似可扩展到具有高维输出的跳跃连接的大型神经网络。我们在三个数据集上证明，LSN 建模的参数分布与适当的不确定性度量相结合，可以提供出色的 OOD 检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Laplacian分割网络（LSN），通过联合建模认识不确定性和偶然不确定性，提升图像分割模型在分布外数据上的不确定性量化能力，从而改善OOD检测效果。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中因设备差异、采集环境变化或图像损坏等因素，模型在分布外数据上易出现过度自信问题，现有方法难以有效区分正常与异常输入。
AI.method: 设计Laplacian分割网络，首次将拉普拉斯近似应用于具有跳跃连接的大型神经网络，通过建模权重后验分布实现对认识不确定性的量化，并结合数据不确定性进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在三个医学图像数据集上验证，LSN结合不确定性度量的参数分布显著优于现有方法，在分布外检测任务中表现出更优的鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: LSN通过有效建模双重不确定性，为医学图像分割中的分布外检测提供了新思路，证明了拉普拉斯近似在大规模分割网络中的可行性。

search_text: Laplacian Segmentation Networks Improve Epistemic Uncertainty Quantification 拉普拉斯分割网络改善认知不确定性量化 Image segmentation relies heavily on neural networks which are known to be overconfident, especially when making predictions on out-of-distribution (OOD) images. This is a common scenario in the medical domain due to variations in equipment, acquisition sites, or image corruptions. This work addresses the challenge of OOD detection by proposing Laplacian Segmentation Networks (LSN): methods which jointly model epistemic (model) and aleatoric (data) uncertainty for OOD detection. In doing so, we propose the first Laplace approximation of the weight posterior that scales to large neural networks with skip connections that have high-dimensional outputs. We demonstrate on three datasets that the LSN-modeled parameter distributions, in combination with suitable uncertainty measures, gives superior OOD detection. 图像分割严重依赖于过度自信的神经网络，尤其是在对分布外 (OOD) 图像进行预测时。由于设备、采集地点或图像损坏的变化，这是医疗领域的常见情况。这项工作通过提出拉普拉斯分割网络（LSN）来解决 OOD 检测的挑战：联合建模 OOD 检测的认知（模型）和任意（数据）不确定性的方法。在此过程中，我们提出了权重后验的第一个拉普拉斯近似，该近似可扩展到具有高维输出的跳跃连接的大型神经网络。我们在三个数据集上证明，LSN 建模的参数分布与适当的不确定性度量相结合，可以提供出色的 OOD 检测。 本文提出Laplacian分割网络（LSN），通过联合建模认识不确定性和偶然不确定性，提升图像分割模型在分布外数据上的不确定性量化能力，从而改善OOD检测效果。 Kilian Zepf,Selma Wanna,Marco Miani,Juston Moore,Jes Frellsen,Søren Hauberg,Frederik Warburg,Aasa Feragen cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yi Lin,Zhongchen Zhao,Zhengjie ZHU,Lisheng Wang,Kwang-Ting Cheng,Hao Chen
title: Exploring Visual Prompts for Whole Slide Image Classification with Multiple Instance Learning
title_zh: 通过多实例学习探索整个幻灯片图像分类的视觉提示
abstract: Multiple instance learning (MIL) has emerged as a popular method for classifying histopathology whole slide images (WSIs). However, existing approaches typically rely on pre-trained models from large natural image datasets, such as ImageNet, to generate instance features, which can be sub-optimal due to the significant differences between natural images and histopathology images that lead to a domain shift. In this paper, we present a novel, simple yet effective method for learning domain-specific knowledge transformation from pre-trained models to histopathology images. Our approach entails using a prompt component to assist the pre-trained model in discerning differences between the pre-trained dataset and the target histopathology dataset, resulting in improved performance of MIL models. We validate our method on two publicly available datasets, Camelyon16 and TCGA-NSCLC. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the significant performance improvement of our method for different MIL models and backbones. Upon publication of this paper, we will release the source code for our method.
summary: Multiple instance learning (MIL) has emerged as a popular method for classifying histopathology whole slide images (WSIs). However, existing approaches typically rely on pre-trained models from large natural image datasets, such as ImageNet, to generate instance features, which can be sub-optimal due to the significant differences between natural images and histopathology images that lead to a domain shift. In this paper, we present a novel, simple yet effective method for learning domain-specific knowledge transformation from pre-trained models to histopathology images. Our approach entails using a prompt component to assist the pre-trained model in discerning differences between the pre-trained dataset and the target histopathology dataset, resulting in improved performance of MIL models. We validate our method on two publicly available datasets, Camelyon16 and TCGA-NSCLC. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the significant performance improvement of our method for different MIL models and backbones. Upon publication of this paper, we will release the source code for our method.
abstract_zh: 多实例学习 (MIL) 已成为组织病理学全切片图像 (WSI) 分类的流行方法。然而，现有方法通常依赖于大型自然图像数据集（例如 ImageNet）的预训练模型来生成实例特征，由于自然图像和组织病理学图像之间存在显着差异，导致域转移，这可能不是最佳的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖、简单而有效的方法，用于学习从预训练模型到组织病理学图像的特定领域知识转换。我们的方法需要使用提示组件来协助预训练模型辨别预训练数据集和目标组织病理学数据集之间的差异，从而提高 MIL 模型的性能。我们在两个公开可用的数据集 Camelyon16 和 TCGA-NSCLC 上验证了我们的方法。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法对于不同的 MIL 模型和主干网的性能有了显着的提高。本文发表后，我们将发布我们方法的源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉提示的多实例学习方法，用于改进全切片图像分类中的领域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖ImageNet等自然图像预训练模型生成特征，但因病理图像与自然图像存在领域差异，导致性能不佳。
AI.method: 通过引入视觉提示组件，引导预训练模型学习病理图像与原训练数据集的差异，实现领域知识迁移。
AI.result: 在Camelyon16和TCGA-NSCLC数据集上验证，该方法显著提升了不同MIL模型和主干网络的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 视觉提示有效缓解了领域差异问题，为病理图像分类提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Yuiko Sakuma,Masato Ishii,Takuya Narihira
title: DetOFA: Efficient Training of Once-for-All Networks for Object Detection Using Path Filter
title_zh: DetOFA：使用路径过滤器对一次性目标检测网络进行高效训练
abstract: We address the challenge of training a large supernet for the object detection task, using a relatively small amount of training data. Specifically, we propose an efficient supernet-based neural architecture search (NAS) method that uses search space pruning. The search space defined by the supernet is pruned by removing candidate models that are predicted to perform poorly. To effectively remove the candidates over a wide range of resource constraints, we particularly design a performance predictor for supernet, called path filter, which is conditioned by resource constraints and can accurately predict the relative performance of the models that satisfy similar resource constraints. Hence, supernet training is more focused on the best-performing candidates. Our path filter handles prediction for paths with different resource budgets. Compared to once-for-all, our proposed method reduces the computational cost of the optimal network architecture by 30% and 63%, while yielding better accuracy-floating point operations Pareto front (0.85 and 0.45 points of improvement on average precision for Pascal VOC and COCO, respectively).
summary: We address the challenge of training a large supernet for the object detection task, using a relatively small amount of training data. Specifically, we propose an efficient supernet-based neural architecture search (NAS) method that uses search space pruning. The search space defined by the supernet is pruned by removing candidate models that are predicted to perform poorly. To effectively remove the candidates over a wide range of resource constraints, we particularly design a performance predictor for supernet, called path filter, which is conditioned by resource constraints and can accurately predict the relative performance of the models that satisfy similar resource constraints. Hence, supernet training is more focused on the best-performing candidates. Our path filter handles prediction for paths with different resource budgets. Compared to once-for-all, our proposed method reduces the computational cost of the optimal network architecture by 30% and 63%, while yielding better accuracy-floating point operations Pareto front (0.85 and 0.45 points of improvement on average precision for Pascal VOC and COCO, respectively).
abstract_zh: 我们使用相对少量的训练数据解决了为目标检测任务训练大型超级网络的挑战。具体来说，我们提出了一种使用搜索空间修剪的高效的基于超网的神经架构搜索（NAS）方法。通过删除预测表现不佳的候选模型来修剪超级网定义的搜索空间。为了有效地去除广泛的资源约束下的候选者，我们特别设计了一个超网的性能预测器，称为路径过滤器，它以资源约束为条件，可以准确地预测满足相似资源约束的模型的相对性能。因此，超级网培训更关注表现最好的候选人。我们的路径过滤器处理具有不同资源预算的路径的预测。与一次性相比，我们提出的方法将最优网络架构的计算成本降低了 30% 和 63%，同时产生了更好的浮点运算 Pareto 前沿精度（Pascal VOC 和 COCO 的平均精度分别提高了 0.85 和 0.45 个点）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DetOFA方法，通过路径过滤器高效训练一次性全部网络（Once-for-All Networks）用于目标检测任务。
AI.motivation: 传统超网络训练计算成本高且数据需求大，尤其在资源受限场景下难以高效搜索最优模型架构。
AI.method: 设计基于资源约束的路径过滤器（Path Filter），通过预测模型性能剪枝搜索空间，聚焦训练高性能候选模型。
AI.result: 相比Once-for-All方法，在Pascal VOC和COCO数据集上分别提升平均精度0.85和0.45点，计算成本降低30%-63%。
AI.conclusion: 路径过滤器有效平衡了资源约束与模型性能，为高效目标检测网络架构搜索提供了新思路。

Specifically, we propose an efficient supernet-based neural architecture search (NAS) method that uses search space pruning. The search space defined by the supernet is pruned by removing candidate models that are predicted to perform poorly. To effectively remove the candidates over a wide range of resource constraints, we particularly design a performance predictor for supernet, called path filter, which is conditioned by resource constraints and can accurately predict the relative performance of the models that satisfy similar resource constraints. Hence, supernet training is more focused on the best-performing candidates. Our path filter handles prediction for paths with different resource budgets. Compared to once-for-all, our proposed method reduces the computational cost of the optimal network architecture by 30% and 63%, while yielding better accuracy-floating point operations Pareto front (0.85 and 0.45 points of improvement on average precision for Pascal VOC and COCO, respectively). 我们使用相对少量的训练数据解决了为目标检测任务训练大型超级网络的挑战。具体来说，我们提出了一种使用搜索空间修剪的高效的基于超网的神经架构搜索（NAS）方法。通过删除预测表现不佳的候选模型来修剪超级网定义的搜索空间。为了有效地去除广泛的资源约束下的候选者，我们特别设计了一个超网的性能预测器，称为路径过滤器，它以资源约束为条件，可以准确地预测满足相似资源约束的模型的相对性能。因此，超级网培训更关注表现最好的候选人。我们的路径过滤器处理具有不同资源预算的路径的预测。与一次性相比，我们提出的方法将最优网络架构的计算成本降低了 30% 和 63%，同时产生了更好的浮点运算 Pareto 前沿精度（Pascal VOC 和 COCO 的平均精度分别提高了 0.85 和 0.45 个点）。 本文提出DetOFA方法，通过路径过滤器高效训练一次性全部网络（Once-for-All Networks）用于目标检测任务。 Yuiko Sakuma,Masato Ishii,Takuya Narihira cs.CV

authors_text: Ching Pui Wan,Tung Li,Jason Min Wang
title: RLOR: A Flexible Framework of Deep Reinforcement Learning for Operation Research
title_zh: RLOR：运筹学深度强化学习的灵活框架
abstract: Reinforcement learning has been applied in operation research and has shown promise in solving large combinatorial optimization problems. However, existing works focus on developing neural network architectures for certain problems. These works lack the flexibility to incorporate recent advances in reinforcement learning, as well as the flexibility of customizing model architectures for operation research problems. In this work, we analyze the end-to-end autoregressive models for vehicle routing problems and show that these models can benefit from the recent advances in reinforcement learning with a careful re-implementation of the model architecture. In particular, we re-implemented the Attention Model and trained it with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) in CleanRL, showing at least 8 times speed up in training time. We hereby introduce RLOR, a flexible framework for Deep Reinforcement Learning for Operation Research. We believe that a flexible framework is key to developing deep reinforcement learning models for operation research problems. The code of our work is publicly available at https://github.com/cpwan/RLOR.
summary: Reinforcement learning has been applied in operation research and has shown promise in solving large combinatorial optimization problems. However, existing works focus on developing neural network architectures for certain problems. These works lack the flexibility to incorporate recent advances in reinforcement learning, as well as the flexibility of customizing model architectures for operation research problems. In this work, we analyze the end-to-end autoregressive models for vehicle routing problems and show that these models can benefit from the recent advances in reinforcement learning with a careful re-implementation of the model architecture. In particular, we re-implemented the Attention Model and trained it with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) in CleanRL, showing at least 8 times speed up in training time. We hereby introduce RLOR, a flexible framework for Deep Reinforcement Learning for Operation Research. We believe that a flexible framework is key to developing deep reinforcement learning models for operation research problems. The code of our work is publicly available at https://github.com/cpwan/RLOR.
abstract_zh: 强化学习已应用于运筹学，并在解决大型组合优化问题方面显示出前景。然而，现有的工作侧重于开发针对某些问题的神经网络架构。这些工作缺乏结合强化学习最新进展的灵活性，以及​​为运筹学问题定制模型架构的灵活性。在这项工作中，我们分析了车辆路径问题的端到端自回归模型，并表明这些模型可以通过仔细重新实现模型架构来受益于强化学习的最新进展。特别是，我们重新实现了注意力模型，并在 CleanRL 中使用近端策略优化 (PPO) 对其进行训练，结果显示训练时间至少加快了 8 倍。我们在此介绍 RLOR，一种用于运筹学深度强化学习的灵活框架。我们认为，灵活的框架是开发运筹学问题的深度强化学习模型的关键。我们的工作代码可在 https://github.com/cpwan/RLOR 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RLOR框架，通过结合深度强化学习与运筹学，解决大规模组合优化问题并提升模型灵活性与训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法在运筹学问题中缺乏灵活性，难以整合最新算法进展和定制化模型架构。
AI.method: 重新实现Attention Model并采用Proximal Policy Optimization（PPO）算法进行训练，通过CleanRL框架优化模型架构。
AI.result: 训练时间提升至少8倍，代码开源并验证了框架在运筹学问题中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 灵活框架是深度强化学习解决运筹学问题的关键，RLOR为后续研究提供了可扩展的基础平台。

authors_text: Elif Ceren Gok Yildirim,Murat Onur Yildirim,Mert Kilickaya,Joaquin Vanschoren
title: AdaCL:Adaptive Continual Learning
title_zh: AdaCL：适应性持续学习
abstract: Class-Incremental Learning aims to update a deep classifier to learn new categories while maintaining or improving its accuracy on previously observed classes. Common methods to prevent forgetting previously learned classes include regularizing the neural network updates and storing exemplars in memory, which come with hyperparameters such as the learning rate, regularization strength, or the number of exemplars. However, these hyperparameters are usually only tuned at the start and then kept fixed throughout the learning sessions, ignoring the fact that newly encountered tasks may have varying levels of novelty or difficulty. This study investigates the necessity of hyperparameter `adaptivity' in Class-Incremental Learning: the ability to dynamically adjust hyperparameters such as the learning rate, regularization strength, and memory size according to the properties of the new task at hand. We propose AdaCL, a Bayesian Optimization-based approach to automatically and efficiently determine the optimal values for those parameters with each learning task. We show that adapting hyperpararmeters on each new task leads to improvement in accuracy, forgetting and memory. Code is available at https://github.com/ElifCerenGokYildirim/AdaCL.
summary: Class-Incremental Learning aims to update a deep classifier to learn new categories while maintaining or improving its accuracy on previously observed classes. Common methods to prevent forgetting previously learned classes include regularizing the neural network updates and storing exemplars in memory, which come with hyperparameters such as the learning rate, regularization strength, or the number of exemplars. However, these hyperparameters are usually only tuned at the start and then kept fixed throughout the learning sessions, ignoring the fact that newly encountered tasks may have varying levels of novelty or difficulty. This study investigates the necessity of hyperparameter `adaptivity' in Class-Incremental Learning: the ability to dynamically adjust hyperparameters such as the learning rate, regularization strength, and memory size according to the properties of the new task at hand. We propose AdaCL, a Bayesian Optimization-based approach to automatically and efficiently determine the optimal values for those parameters with each learning task. We show that adapting hyperpararmeters on each new task leads to improvement in accuracy, forgetting and memory. Code is available at https://github.com/ElifCerenGokYildirim/AdaCL.
abstract_zh: 类增量学习旨在更新深度分类器以学习新类别，同时保持或提高其对先前观察到的类的准确性。防止忘记先前学习的类的常见方法包括规范神经网络更新并将样本存储在内存中，这些样本带有超参数，例如学习率、正则化强度或样本数量。然而，这些超参数通常只在开始时进行调整，然后在整个学习过程中保持固定，忽略了新遇到的任务可能具有不同程度的新颖性或难度的事实。本研究研究了类增量学习中超参数“适应性”的必要性：根据手头新任务的属性动态调整超参数（例如学习率、正则化强度和内存大小）的能力。我们提出了 AdaCL，一种基于贝叶斯优化的方法，可以自动有效地确定每个学习任务的这些参数的最佳值。我们证明，在每个新任务上调整超参数可以提高准确性、遗忘和记忆力。代码可在 https://github.com/ElifCerenGokYildirim/AdaCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaCL方法，通过自适应调整超参数优化类别增量学习中的遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法固定超参数无法适应新任务变化，导致模型在应对不同新颖性或难度任务时表现不佳。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯优化框架，动态调整学习率、正则化强度和内存大小等超参数以适配新任务特性。
AI.result: 实验表明自适应超参数调整显著提升了准确率，同时减少了遗忘和内存消耗。
AI.conclusion: 动态超参数优化能有效增强持续学习性能，AdaCL为类别增量学习提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Cheng-Shang Chang
title: A Simple Explanation for the Phase Transition in Large Language Models with List Decoding
title_zh: 具有列表解码的大型语言模型中相变的简单解释
abstract: Various recent experimental results show that large language models (LLM) exhibit emergent abilities that are not present in small models. System performance is greatly improved after passing a certain critical threshold of scale. In this letter, we provide a simple explanation for such a phase transition phenomenon. For this, we model an LLM as a sequence-to-sequence random function. Instead of using instant generation at each step, we use a list decoder that keeps a list of candidate sequences at each step and defers the generation of the output sequence at the end. We show that there is a critical threshold such that the expected number of erroneous candidate sequences remains bounded when an LLM is below the threshold, and it grows exponentially when an LLM is above the threshold. Such a threshold is related to the basic reproduction number in a contagious disease.
summary: Various recent experimental results show that large language models (LLM) exhibit emergent abilities that are not present in small models. System performance is greatly improved after passing a certain critical threshold of scale. In this letter, we provide a simple explanation for such a phase transition phenomenon. For this, we model an LLM as a sequence-to-sequence random function. Instead of using instant generation at each step, we use a list decoder that keeps a list of candidate sequences at each step and defers the generation of the output sequence at the end. We show that there is a critical threshold such that the expected number of erroneous candidate sequences remains bounded when an LLM is below the threshold, and it grows exponentially when an LLM is above the threshold. Such a threshold is related to the basic reproduction number in a contagious disease.
abstract_zh: 最近的各种实验结果表明，大型语言模型（LLM）表现出小型模型所不具备的新兴能力。通过一定的临界规模阈值后，系统性能将大大提高。在这封信中，我们对这种相变现象提供了简单的解释。为此，我们将 LLM 建模为序列到序列的随机函数。我们不是在每个步骤中使用即时生成，而是使用一个列表解码器，该解码器在每个步骤中保留候选序列列表，并推迟最后输出序列的生成。我们表明存在一个临界阈值，当 LLM 低于阈值时，错误候选序列的预期数量保持有限，而当 LLM 高于阈值时，错误候选序列的预期数量呈指数增长。该阈值与传染病的基本繁殖数有关。

AI.tldr: 本文通过列表解码方法解释大语言模型中的相变现象。
AI.motivation: 近期实验表明大语言模型在达到一定规模阈值后会涌现出小模型不具备的能力，但其机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 将LLM建模为序列到序列的随机函数，采用列表解码器在每一步保留候选序列列表，最终统一生成输出序列。
AI.result: 发现存在临界阈值：当模型规模低于阈值时错误候选序列数量有限，超过阈值后呈指数级增长。
AI.conclusion: 该临界阈值与传染病基本再生数相关，为LLM的相变现象提供了简单解释框架。

motivation: 近期实验表明大语言模型在达到一定规模阈值后会涌现出小模型不具备的能力，但其机制尚不明确。
method: 将LLM建模为序列到序列的随机函数，采用列表解码器在每一步保留候选序列列表，最终统一生成输出序列。
result: 发现存在临界阈值：当模型规模低于阈值时错误候选序列数量有限，超过阈值后呈指数级增长。
conclusion: 该临界阈值与传染病基本再生数相关，为LLM的相变现象提供了简单解释框架。
search_text: A Simple Explanation for the Phase Transition in Large Language Models with List Decoding 具有列表解码的大型语言模型中相变的简单解释 Various recent experimental results show that large language models (LLM) exhibit emergent abilities that are not present in small models. System performance is greatly improved after passing a certain critical threshold of scale. In this letter, we provide a simple explanation for such a phase transition phenomenon. For this, we model an LLM as a sequence-to-sequence random function. Instead of using instant generation at each step, we use a list decoder that keeps a list of candidate sequences at each step and defers the generation of the output sequence at the end. We show that there is a critical threshold such that the expected number of erroneous candidate sequences remains bounded when an LLM is below the threshold, and it grows exponentially when an LLM is above the threshold. Such a threshold is related to the basic reproduction number in a contagious disease. 最近的各种实验结果表明，大型语言模型（LLM）表现出小型模型所不具备的新兴能力。通过一定的临界规模阈值后，系统性能将大大提高。在这封信中，我们对这种相变现象提供了简单的解释。为此，我们将 LLM 建模为序列到序列的随机函数。我们不是在每个步骤中使用即时生成，而是使用一个列表解码器，该解码器在每个步骤中保留候选序列列表，并推迟最后输出序列的生成。我们表明存在一个临界阈值，当 LLM 低于阈值时，错误候选序列的预期数量保持有限，而当 LLM 高于阈值时，错误候选序列的预期数量呈指数增长。该阈值与传染病的基本繁殖数有关。 本文通过列表解码方法解释大语言模型中的相变现象。 Cheng-Shang Chang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IT,stat.ML

authors_text: Yi Lin,Xiao Fang,Dong Zhang,Kwang-Ting Cheng,Hao Chen
title: Boosting Convolution with Efficient MLP-Permutation for Volumetric Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 通过有效的 MLP 排列增强卷积，实现体积医学图像分割
abstract: Recently, the advent of vision Transformer (ViT) has brought substantial advancements in 3D dataset benchmarks, particularly in 3D volumetric medical image segmentation (Vol-MedSeg). Concurrently, multi-layer perceptron (MLP) network has regained popularity among researchers due to their comparable results to ViT, albeit with the exclusion of the resource-intensive self-attention module. In this work, we propose a novel permutable hybrid network for Vol-MedSeg, named PHNet, which capitalizes on the strengths of both convolution neural networks (CNNs) and MLP. PHNet addresses the intrinsic isotropy problem of 3D volumetric data by employing a combination of 2D and 3D CNNs to extract local features. Besides, we propose an efficient multi-layer permute perceptron (MLPP) module that captures long-range dependence while preserving positional information. This is achieved through an axis decomposition operation that permutes the input tensor along different axes, thereby enabling the separate encoding of the positional information. Furthermore, MLPP tackles the resolution sensitivity issue of MLP in Vol-MedSeg with a token segmentation operation, which divides the feature into smaller tokens and processes them individually. Extensive experimental results validate that PHNet outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with lower computational costs on the widely-used yet challenging COVID-19-20 and Synapse benchmarks. The ablation study also demonstrates the effectiveness of PHNet in harnessing the strengths of both CNNs and MLP. The code is available on Github: \href{https://github.com/xiaofang007/PHNet}{https://github.com/xiaofang007/PHNet}.
summary: Recently, the advent of vision Transformer (ViT) has brought substantial advancements in 3D dataset benchmarks, particularly in 3D volumetric medical image segmentation (Vol-MedSeg). Concurrently, multi-layer perceptron (MLP) network has regained popularity among researchers due to their comparable results to ViT, albeit with the exclusion of the resource-intensive self-attention module. In this work, we propose a novel permutable hybrid network for Vol-MedSeg, named PHNet, which capitalizes on the strengths of both convolution neural networks (CNNs) and MLP. PHNet addresses the intrinsic isotropy problem of 3D volumetric data by employing a combination of 2D and 3D CNNs to extract local features. Besides, we propose an efficient multi-layer permute perceptron (MLPP) module that captures long-range dependence while preserving positional information. This is achieved through an axis decomposition operation that permutes the input tensor along different axes, thereby enabling the separate encoding of the positional information. Furthermore, MLPP tackles the resolution sensitivity issue of MLP in Vol-MedSeg with a token segmentation operation, which divides the feature into smaller tokens and processes them individually. Extensive experimental results validate that PHNet outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with lower computational costs on the widely-used yet challenging COVID-19-20 and Synapse benchmarks. The ablation study also demonstrates the effectiveness of PHNet in harnessing the strengths of both CNNs and MLP. The code is available on Github: \href{https://github.com/xiaofang007/PHNet}{https://github.com/xiaofang007/PHNet}.
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉 Transformer (ViT) 的出现给 3D 数据集基准带来了实质性的进步，特别是在 3D 体积医学图像分割 (Vol-MedSeg) 方面。与此同时，多层感知器（MLP）网络由于其与 ViT 相当的结果而重新受到研究人员的欢迎，尽管它排除了资源密集型的自注意力模块。在这项工作中，我们为 Vol-MedSeg 提出了一种新颖的可置换混合网络，名为 PHNet，它利用了卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和 MLP 的优点。 PHNet 通过结合使用 2D 和 3D CNN 来提取局部特征，解决了 3D 体数据固有的各向同性问题。此外，我们提出了一种高效的多层置换感知器（MLPP）模块，可以捕获远程依赖性，同时保留位置信息。这是通过轴分解操作实现的，轴分解操作沿不同轴排列输入张量，从而实现位置信息的单独编码。此外，MLPP 通过令牌分割操作解决了 Vol-MedSeg 中 MLP 的分辨率敏感性问题，该操作将特征划分为较小的令牌并单独处理它们。大量实验结果证明，在广泛使用但具有挑战性的 COVID-19-20 和 Synapse 基准上，PHNet 的性能优于最先进的方法，且计算成本更低。消融研究还证明了 PHNet 在利用 CNN 和 MLP 优势方面的有效性。该代码可以在 Github 上找到：\href{https://github.com/xiaofang007/PHNet}{https://github.com/xiaofang007/PHNet}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PHNet的新型可置换混合网络，用于3D体积医学图像分割任务，结合了卷积神经网络和多层感知机的优势。
AI.motivation: 由于ViT在3D医学图像分割中表现出色，但计算成本较高，而MLP虽性能相近但存在分辨率敏感性问题，因此需要一种更高效且性能优越的模型。
AI.method: PHNet通过结合2D和3D卷积网络提取局部特征，并引入高效多层置换感知机（MLPP）模块，通过轴分解操作和分块处理解决位置信息保持和分辨率敏感性问题。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PHNet在COVID-19-20和Synapse基准测试中优于现有方法，且计算成本更低，消融实验验证了CNN和MLP结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PHNet通过结合CNN与MLP的优势，有效解决了3D医学图像分割中的位置信息保持和分辨率敏感性问题，具有较高的性能和效率。

authors_text: Jeongun Ryu,Aaron Valero Puche,JaeWoong Shin,Seonwook Park,Biagio Brattoli,Jinhee Lee,Wonkyung Jung,Soo Ick Cho,Kyunghyun Paeng,Chan-Young Ock,Donggeun Yoo,Sérgio Pereira
title: OCELOT: Overlapped Cell on Tissue Dataset for Histopathology
title_zh: OCELOT：用于组织病理学的组织数据集上的重叠细胞
abstract: Cell detection is a fundamental task in computational pathology that can be used for extracting high-level medical information from whole-slide images. For accurate cell detection, pathologists often zoom out to understand the tissue-level structures and zoom in to classify cells based on their morphology and the surrounding context. However, there is a lack of efforts to reflect such behaviors by pathologists in the cell detection models, mainly due to the lack of datasets containing both cell and tissue annotations with overlapping regions. To overcome this limitation, we propose and publicly release OCELOT, a dataset purposely dedicated to the study of cell-tissue relationships for cell detection in histopathology. OCELOT provides overlapping cell and tissue annotations on images acquired from multiple organs. Within this setting, we also propose multi-task learning approaches that benefit from learning both cell and tissue tasks simultaneously. When compared against a model trained only for the cell detection task, our proposed approaches improve cell detection performance on 3 datasets: proposed OCELOT, public TIGER, and internal CARP datasets. On the OCELOT test set in particular, we show up to 6.79 improvement in F1-score. We believe the contributions of this paper, including the release of the OCELOT dataset at https://lunit-io.github.io/research/publications/ocelot are a crucial starting point toward the important research direction of incorporating cell-tissue relationships in computation pathology.

For accurate cell detection, pathologists often zoom out to understand the tissue-level structures and zoom in to classify cells based on their morphology and the surrounding context. However, there is a lack of efforts to reflect such behaviors by pathologists in the cell detection models, mainly due to the lack of datasets containing both cell and tissue annotations with overlapping regions. To overcome this limitation, we propose and publicly release OCELOT, a dataset purposely dedicated to the study of cell-tissue relationships for cell detection in histopathology. OCELOT provides overlapping cell and tissue annotations on images acquired from multiple organs. Within this setting, we also propose multi-task learning approaches that benefit from learning both cell and tissue tasks simultaneously. When compared against a model trained only for the cell detection task, our proposed approaches improve cell detection performance on 3 datasets: proposed OCELOT, public TIGER, and internal CARP datasets. On the OCELOT test set in particular, we show up to 6.79 improvement in F1-score. We believe the contributions of this paper, including the release of the OCELOT dataset at https://lunit-io.github.io/research/publications/ocelot are a crucial starting point toward the important research direction of incorporating cell-tissue relationships in computation pathology.
abstract_zh: 细胞检测是计算病理学中的一项基本任务，可用于从全幻灯片图像中提取高级医学信息。为了准确地检测细胞，病理学家经常缩小以了解组织级结构，并放大以根据细胞的形态和周围环境对细胞进行分类。然而，病理学家在细胞检测模型中缺乏反映此类行为的努力，这主要是由于缺乏包含具有重叠区域的细胞和组织注释的数据集。为了克服这一限制，我们提出并公开发布 OCELOT，这是一个专门用于研究组织病理学中细胞检测的细胞组织关系的数据集。 OCELOT 对从多个器官获取的图像提供重叠的细胞和组织注释。在此背景下，我们还提出了多任务学习方法，该方法可以从同时学习细胞和组织任务中受益。与仅针对细胞检测任务训练的模型相比，我们提出的方法提高了 3 个数据集上的细胞检测性能：提出的 OCELOT、公共 TIGER 和内部 CARP 数据集。特别是在 OCELOT 测试集上，我们的 F1 分数提高了 6.79。我们相信本文的贡献，包括在 https://lunit-io.github.io/research/publications/ocelot 上发布 OCELOT 数据集，是迈向将细胞组织关系纳入计算病理学这一重要研究方向的关键起点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OCELOT数据集，用于研究组织病理学中细胞与组织关系的细胞检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有细胞检测模型未充分反映病理学家通过观察组织结构与细胞形态进行判断的行为，缺乏包含细胞和组织重叠注释的数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含多器官图像的OCELOT数据集，并设计多任务学习方法同时学习细胞与组织检测任务。
AI.result: 在OCELOT、TIGER和CARP三个数据集上，相比仅检测细胞的模型，F1分数最高提升6.79。
AI.conclusion: OCELOT数据集的发布为计算病理学中整合细胞-组织关系的研究提供了重要基础。

When compared against a model trained only for the cell detection task, our proposed approaches improve cell detection performance on 3 datasets: proposed OCELOT, public TIGER, and internal CARP datasets. We believe the contributions of this paper, including the release of the OCELOT dataset at https://lunit-io.github.io/research/publications/ocelot are a crucial starting point toward the important research direction of incorporating cell-tissue relationships in computation pathology. 细胞检测是计算病理学中的一项基本任务，可用于从全幻灯片图像中提取高级医学信息。为了准确地检测细胞，病理学家经常缩小以了解组织级结构，并放大以根据细胞的形态和周围环境对细胞进行分类。然而，病理学家在细胞检测模型中缺乏反映此类行为的努力，这主要是由于缺乏包含具有重叠区域的细胞和组织注释的数据集。为了克服这一限制，我们提出并公开发布 OCELOT，这是一个专门用于研究组织病理学中细胞检测的细胞组织关系的数据集。 OCELOT 对从多个器官获取的图像提供重叠的细胞和组织注释。在此背景下，我们还提出了多任务学习方法，该方法可以从同时学习细胞和组织任务中受益。与仅针对细胞检测任务训练的模型相比，我们提出的方法提高了 3 个数据集上的细胞检测性能：提出的 OCELOT、公共 TIGER 和内部 CARP 数据集。特别是在 OCELOT 测试集上，我们的 F1 分数提高了 6.79。我们相信本文的贡献，包括在 https://lunit-io.github.io/research/publications/ocelot 上发布 OCELOT 数据集，是迈向将细胞组织关系纳入计算病理学这一重要研究方向的关键起点。 本文提出OCELOT数据集，用于研究组织病理学中细胞与组织关系的细胞检测任务。 Jeongun Ryu,Aaron Valero Puche,JaeWoong Shin,Seonwook Park,Biagio Brattoli,Jinhee Lee,Wonkyung Jung,Soo Ick Cho,Kyunghyun Paeng,Chan-Young Ock,Donggeun Yoo,Sérgio Pereira eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiang Gu,Yucheng Yang,Wei Zeng,Jian Sun,Zongben Xu
title: Keypoint-Guided Optimal Transport
title_zh: 关键点引导的最优传输
abstract: Existing Optimal Transport (OT) methods mainly derive the optimal transport plan/matching under the criterion of transport cost/distance minimization, which may cause incorrect matching in some cases. In many applications, annotating a few matched keypoints across domains is reasonable or even effortless in annotation burden. It is valuable to investigate how to leverage the annotated keypoints to guide the correct matching in OT. In this paper, we propose a novel KeyPoint-Guided model by ReLation preservation (KPG-RL) that searches for the optimal matching (i.e., transport plan) guided by the keypoints in OT. To impose the keypoints in OT, first, we propose a mask-based constraint of the transport plan that preserves the matching of keypoint pairs. Second, we propose to preserve the relation of each data point to the keypoints to guide the matching. The proposed KPG-RL model can be solved by Sinkhorn's algorithm and is applicable even when distributions are supported in different spaces. We further utilize the relation preservation constraint in the Kantorovich Problem and Gromov-Wasserstein model to impose the guidance of keypoints in them. Meanwhile, the proposed KPG-RL model is extended to the partial OT setting. Moreover, we deduce the dual formulation of the KPG-RL model, which is solved using deep learning techniques. Based on the learned transport plan from dual KPG-RL, we propose a novel manifold barycentric projection to transport source data to the target domain. As applications, we apply the proposed KPG-RL model to the heterogeneous domain adaptation and image-to-image translation. Experiments verified the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
summary: Existing Optimal Transport (OT) methods mainly derive the optimal transport plan/matching under the criterion of transport cost/distance minimization, which may cause incorrect matching in some cases. In many applications, annotating a few matched keypoints across domains is reasonable or even effortless in annotation burden. It is valuable to investigate how to leverage the annotated keypoints to guide the correct matching in OT. In this paper, we propose a novel KeyPoint-Guided model by ReLation preservation (KPG-RL) that searches for the optimal matching (i.e., transport plan) guided by the keypoints in OT. To impose the keypoints in OT, first, we propose a mask-based constraint of the transport plan that preserves the matching of keypoint pairs. Second, we propose to preserve the relation of each data point to the keypoints to guide the matching. The proposed KPG-RL model can be solved by Sinkhorn's algorithm and is applicable even when distributions are supported in different spaces. We further utilize the relation preservation constraint in the Kantorovich Problem and Gromov-Wasserstein model to impose the guidance of keypoints in them. Meanwhile, the proposed KPG-RL model is extended to the partial OT setting. Moreover, we deduce the dual formulation of the KPG-RL model, which is solved using deep learning techniques. Based on the learned transport plan from dual KPG-RL, we propose a novel manifold barycentric projection to transport source data to the target domain. As applications, we apply the proposed KPG-RL model to the heterogeneous domain adaptation and image-to-image translation. Experiments verified the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 现有的最优传输（OT）方法主要在传输成本/距离最小化的准则下推导最优传输计划/匹配，这在某些情况下可能会导致错误匹配。在许多应用程序中，跨域注释一些匹配的关键点是合理的，甚至在注释负担方面毫不费力。研究如何利用注释的关键点来指导 OT 中的正确匹配是很有价值的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于关系保存的关键点引导模型（KPG-RL），该模型搜索由 OT 中的关键点引导的最佳匹配（即传输计划）。为了在 OT 中施加关键点，首先，我们提出了基于掩码的传输计划约束，以保留关键点对的匹配。其次，我们建议保留每个数据点与关键点的关系以指导匹配。所提出的 KPG-RL 模型可以通过 Sinkhorn 算法求解，并且即使在不同空间支持分布的情况下也适用。我们进一步利用 Kantorovich 问题和 Gromov-Wasserstein 模型中的关系保留约束来强加关键点的指导。同时，将所提出的 KPG-RL 模型扩展到部分 OT 设置。此外，我们推导了 KPG-RL 模型的对偶公式，该模型是使用深度学习技术解决的。基于从双 KPG-RL 学习到的传输计划，我们提出了一种新颖的流形重心投影，将源数据传输到目标域。作为应用，我们将提出的 KPG-RL 模型应用于异构域适应和图像到图像的转换。实验验证了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关键点引导的最优传输模型（KPG-RL），以改进传统最优传输方法在某些情况下的不准确匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的最优传输方法可能在某些情况下导致错误匹配，而标注关键点在许多应用中是合理且容易完成的，因此有必要研究如何利用这些关键点来指导最优传输的匹配。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于关键点引导的模型（KPG-RL），通过掩码约束和关系保持约束来引导最优传输计划的匹配，并利用Sinkhorn算法求解该模型，同时扩展到部分OT设置和Kantorovich问题及Gromov-Wasserstein模型中。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提出方法在异构域适应和图像到图像翻译任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: KPG-RL模型通过关键点引导有效改进了最优传输的匹配效果，适用于不同空间支持的分布，并在多个应用任务中表现出色。

authors_text: Bo Zhang,Zuheng Ming,Wei Feng,Yaqian Liu,Liang He,Kaixing Zhao
title: MMFormer: Multimodal Transformer Using Multiscale Self-Attention for Remote Sensing Image Classification
title_zh: MMFormer：使用多尺度自注意力进行遥感图像分类的多模态变压器
abstract: To benefit the complementary information between heterogeneous data, we introduce a new Multimodal Transformer (MMFormer) for Remote Sensing (RS) image classification using Hyperspectral Image (HSI) accompanied by another source of data such as Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR). Compared with traditional Vision Transformer (ViT) lacking inductive biases of convolutions, we first introduce convolutional layers to our MMFormer to tokenize patches from multimodal data of HSI and LiDAR. Then we propose a Multi-scale Multi-head Self-Attention (MSMHSA) module to address the problem of compatibility which often limits to fuse HSI with high spectral resolution and LiDAR with relatively low spatial resolution. The proposed MSMHSA module can incorporate HSI to LiDAR data in a coarse-to-fine manner enabling us to learn a fine-grained representation. Extensive experiments on widely used benchmarks (e.g., Trento and MUUFL) demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our proposed MMFormer for RS image classification.
summary: To benefit the complementary information between heterogeneous data, we introduce a new Multimodal Transformer (MMFormer) for Remote Sensing (RS) image classification using Hyperspectral Image (HSI) accompanied by another source of data such as Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR). Compared with traditional Vision Transformer (ViT) lacking inductive biases of convolutions, we first introduce convolutional layers to our MMFormer to tokenize patches from multimodal data of HSI and LiDAR. Then we propose a Multi-scale Multi-head Self-Attention (MSMHSA) module to address the problem of compatibility which often limits to fuse HSI with high spectral resolution and LiDAR with relatively low spatial resolution. The proposed MSMHSA module can incorporate HSI to LiDAR data in a coarse-to-fine manner enabling us to learn a fine-grained representation. Extensive experiments on widely used benchmarks (e.g., Trento and MUUFL) demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our proposed MMFormer for RS image classification.
abstract_zh: 为了促进异构数据之间的互补信息，我们引入了一种新的多模态变换器（MMFormer），用于使用高光谱图像（HSI）以及光检测和测距（LiDAR）等另一个数据源进行遥感（RS）图像分类。与缺乏卷积归纳偏差的传统 Vision Transformer (ViT) 相比，我们首先将卷积层引入到 MMFormer 中，以对 HSI 和 LiDAR 多模态数据中的补丁进行标记化。然后，我们提出了一种多尺度多头自注意力（MSMHSA）模块来解决兼容性问题，该问题通常限制融合具有高光谱分辨率的 HSI 和具有相对较低空间分辨率的 LiDAR。所提出的 MSMHSA 模块可以以从粗到细的方式将 HSI 合并到 LiDAR 数据中，使我们能够学习细粒度的表示。对广泛使用的基准（例如 Trento 和 MUUFL）进行的大量实验证明了我们提出的 MMFormer 用于 RS 图像分类的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MMFormer，一种结合多模态数据（高光谱图像和LiDAR）的多尺度自注意力机制，用于遥感图像分类。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer缺乏卷积归纳偏置，难以有效融合高光谱图像（高光谱分辨率）与LiDAR（低空间分辨率）等异构数据的互补信息。
AI.method: 引入卷积层对多模态数据分块，设计多尺度多头自注意力（MSMHSA）模块，通过粗到细的融合策略学习细粒度表示。
AI.result: 在Trento和MUUFL等基准数据集上实验表明，MMFormer在遥感图像分类任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MMFormer通过多模态融合与多尺度注意力机制，有效解决了异构数据兼容性问题，提升了遥感图像分类性能。

authors_text: Yun Liu,Xuefeng Yan,Zhilei Chen,Zhiqi Li,Zeyong Wei,Mingqiang Wei
title: PointGame: Geometrically and Adaptively Masked Auto-Encoder on Point Clouds
title_zh: PointGame：点云上的几何自适应屏蔽自动编码器
abstract: Self-supervised learning is attracting large attention in point cloud understanding. However, exploring discriminative and transferable features still remains challenging due to their nature of irregularity and sparsity. We propose a geometrically and adaptively masked auto-encoder for self-supervised learning on point clouds, termed \textit{PointGame}. PointGame contains two core components: GATE and EAT. GATE stands for the geometrical and adaptive token embedding module; it not only absorbs the conventional wisdom of geometric descriptors that captures the surface shape effectively, but also exploits adaptive saliency to focus on the salient part of a point cloud. EAT stands for the external attention-based Transformer encoder with linear computational complexity, which increases the efficiency of the whole pipeline. Unlike cutting-edge unsupervised learning models, PointGame leverages geometric descriptors to perceive surface shapes and adaptively mines discriminative features from training data. PointGame showcases clear advantages over its competitors on various downstream tasks under both global and local fine-tuning strategies. The code and pre-trained models will be publicly available.
summary: Self-supervised learning is attracting large attention in point cloud understanding. However, exploring discriminative and transferable features still remains challenging due to their nature of irregularity and sparsity. We propose a geometrically and adaptively masked auto-encoder for self-supervised learning on point clouds, termed \textit{PointGame}. PointGame contains two core components: GATE and EAT. GATE stands for the geometrical and adaptive token embedding module; it not only absorbs the conventional wisdom of geometric descriptors that captures the surface shape effectively, but also exploits adaptive saliency to focus on the salient part of a point cloud. EAT stands for the external attention-based Transformer encoder with linear computational complexity, which increases the efficiency of the whole pipeline. Unlike cutting-edge unsupervised learning models, PointGame leverages geometric descriptors to perceive surface shapes and adaptively mines discriminative features from training data. PointGame showcases clear advantages over its competitors on various downstream tasks under both global and local fine-tuning strategies. The code and pre-trained models will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习在点云理解领域引起了广泛关注。然而，由于其不规则性和稀疏性的性质，探索区分性和可转移特征仍然具有挑战性。我们提出了一种用于点云自监督学习的几何自适应掩码自动编码器，称为 \textit{PointGame}。 PointGame包含两个核心组件：GATE和EAT。 GATE代表几何和自适应令牌嵌入模块；它不仅吸收了有效捕获表面形状的几何描述符的传统智慧，而且还利用自适应显着性来关注点云的显着部分。 EAT 代表基于外部注意力的 Transformer 编码器，具有线性计算复杂度，提高了整个管道的效率。与尖端的无监督学习模型不同，PointGame 利用几何描述符来感知表面形状，并从训练数据中自适应地挖掘判别特征。 PointGame 在全球和本地微调策略下的各种下游任务上都比竞争对手展示了明显的优势。代码和预训练模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointGame，一种结合几何和自适应掩码的自动编码器，用于点云的自监督学习以提取区分性特征。
AI.motivation: 点云数据的不规则性和稀疏性使得提取具有区分性和可迁移性的特征极具挑战性，现有自监督方法存在不足。
AI.method: PointGame包含两个核心模块：GATE（几何自适应嵌入）和EAT（线性复杂度外部注意力Transformer）。GATE融合几何描述符与自适应显著性，EAT通过外部注意力机制提升计算效率。
AI.result: PointGame在多种下游任务中，无论是全局还是局部微调策略，均优于现有竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: 几何感知与自适应特征挖掘的结合有效提升了点云表征能力，代码和预训练模型将公开以促进研究。
