authors_text: Hyukhun Koh,Haesung Pyun,Nakyeong Yang,Kyomin Jung
title: Multi-View Zero-Shot Open Intent Induction from Dialogues: Multi Domain Batch and Proxy Gradient Transfer
title_zh: 从对话中归纳多视图零样本开放意图：多域批量和代理梯度传输
abstract: In Task Oriented Dialogue (TOD) system, detecting and inducing new intents are two main challenges to apply the system in the real world. In this paper, we suggest the semantic multi-view model to resolve these two challenges: (1) SBERT for General Embedding (GE), (2) Multi Domain Batch (MDB) for dialogue domain knowledge, and (3) Proxy Gradient Transfer (PGT) for cluster-specialized semantic. MDB feeds diverse dialogue datasets to the model at once to tackle the multi-domain problem by learning the multiple domain knowledge. We introduce a novel method PGT, which employs the Siamese network to fine-tune the model with a clustering method directly.Our model can learn how to cluster dialogue utterances by using PGT. Experimental results demonstrate that our multi-view model with MDB and PGT significantly improves the Open Intent Induction performance compared to baseline systems.
summary: In Task Oriented Dialogue (TOD) system, detecting and inducing new intents are two main challenges to apply the system in the real world. In this paper, we suggest the semantic multi-view model to resolve these two challenges: (1) SBERT for General Embedding (GE), (2) Multi Domain Batch (MDB) for dialogue domain knowledge, and (3) Proxy Gradient Transfer (PGT) for cluster-specialized semantic. MDB feeds diverse dialogue datasets to the model at once to tackle the multi-domain problem by learning the multiple domain knowledge. We introduce a novel method PGT, which employs the Siamese network to fine-tune the model with a clustering method directly.Our model can learn how to cluster dialogue utterances by using PGT. Experimental results demonstrate that our multi-view model with MDB and PGT significantly improves the Open Intent Induction performance compared to baseline systems.
abstract_zh: 在面向任务的对话（TOD）系统中，检测和诱导新意图是将该系统应用于现实世界的两个主要挑战。在本文中，我们建议使用语义多视图模型来解决这两个挑战：（1）用于通用嵌入（GE）的SBERT，（2）用于对话领域知识的多域批处理（MDB），以及（3）用于集群专用语义的代理梯度转移（PGT）。 MDB 将不同的对话数据集同时提供给模型，通过学习多领域知识来解决多领域问题。我们引入了一种新颖的方法PGT，它利用Siamese网络直接用聚类方法对模型进行微调。我们的模型可以学习如何使用PGT对对话话语进行聚类。实验结果表明，与基线系统相比，我们使用 MDB 和 PGT 的多视图模型显着提高了开放意图归纳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角模型，通过结合多领域批量处理和代理梯度迁移方法，解决任务导向对话系统中开放意图诱导的挑战。
AI.motivation: 任务导向对话系统在实际应用中面临新意图检测和诱导的双重挑战，尤其在跨领域场景下需提升模型的泛化能力与语义理解精度。
AI.method: 提出语义多视角模型，包含：(1) SBERT通用嵌入模块，(2) 多领域批量（MDB）学习跨领域知识，(3) 代理梯度迁移（PGT）通过孪生网络与聚类方法实现语义聚类优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合MDB与PGT的多视角模型在开放意图诱导任务中显著优于基线系统，跨领域性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 多视角框架通过整合领域知识与语义聚类方法，有效提升了开放意图诱导的准确性和跨领域适应性。

In this paper, we suggest the semantic multi-view model to resolve these two challenges: (1) SBERT for General Embedding (GE), (2) Multi Domain Batch (MDB) for dialogue domain knowledge, and (3) Proxy Gradient Transfer (PGT) for cluster-specialized semantic. MDB feeds diverse dialogue datasets to the model at once to tackle the multi-domain problem by learning the multiple domain knowledge. We introduce a novel method PGT, which employs the Siamese network to fine-tune the model with a clustering method directly.Our model can learn how to cluster dialogue utterances by using PGT. authors_text: Yaomin Huang,Ning Liu,Zhengping Che,Zhiyuan Xu,Chaomin Shen,Yaxin Peng,Guixu Zhang,Xinmei Liu,Feifei Feng,Jian Tang
title: CP$^3$: Channel Pruning Plug-in for Point-based Networks
title_zh: CP$^3$：基于点的网络的通道修剪插件
comment: Yaomin Huang and Ning Liu are with equal contributions. This paper has been accepted by CVPR 2023
comments: Yaomin Huang and Ning Liu are with equal contributions. This paper has been accepted by CVPR 2023
abstract: Channel pruning can effectively reduce both computational cost and memory footprint of the original network while keeping a comparable accuracy performance. Though great success has been achieved in channel pruning for 2D image-based convolutional networks (CNNs), existing works seldom extend the channel pruning methods to 3D point-based neural networks (PNNs). Directly implementing the 2D CNN channel pruning methods to PNNs undermine the performance of PNNs because of the different representations of 2D images and 3D point clouds as well as the network architecture disparity. In this paper, we proposed CP$^3$, which is a Channel Pruning Plug-in for Point-based network. CP$^3$ is elaborately designed to leverage the characteristics of point clouds and PNNs in order to enable 2D channel pruning methods for PNNs. Specifically, it presents a coordinate-enhanced channel importance metric to reflect the correlation between dimensional information and individual channel features, and it recycles the discarded points in PNN's sampling process and reconsiders their potentially-exclusive information to enhance the robustness of channel pruning. Experiments on various PNN architectures show that CP$^3$ constantly improves state-of-the-art 2D CNN pruning approaches on different point cloud tasks. For instance, our compressed PointNeXt-S on ScanObjectNN achieves an accuracy of 88.52% with a pruning rate of 57.8%, outperforming the baseline pruning methods with an accuracy gain of 1.94%.
summary: Channel pruning can effectively reduce both computational cost and memory footprint of the original network while keeping a comparable accuracy performance. Though great success has been achieved in channel pruning for 2D image-based convolutional networks (CNNs), existing works seldom extend the channel pruning methods to 3D point-based neural networks (PNNs). Directly implementing the 2D CNN channel pruning methods to PNNs undermine the performance of PNNs because of the different representations of 2D images and 3D point clouds as well as the network architecture disparity. In this paper, we proposed CP$^3$, which is a Channel Pruning Plug-in for Point-based network. CP$^3$ is elaborately designed to leverage the characteristics of point clouds and PNNs in order to enable 2D channel pruning methods for PNNs. Specifically, it presents a coordinate-enhanced channel importance metric to reflect the correlation between dimensional information and individual channel features, and it recycles the discarded points in PNN's sampling process and reconsiders their potentially-exclusive information to enhance the robustness of channel pruning. Experiments on various PNN architectures show that CP$^3$ constantly improves state-of-the-art 2D CNN pruning approaches on different point cloud tasks. For instance, our compressed PointNeXt-S on ScanObjectNN achieves an accuracy of 88.52% with a pruning rate of 57.8%, outperforming the baseline pruning methods with an accuracy gain of 1.94%.
abstract_zh: 通道剪枝可以有效降低原始网络的计算成本和内存占用，同时保持可比的精度性能。尽管基于 2D 图像的卷积网络（CNN）的通道剪枝已经取得了巨大的成功，但现有的工作很少将通道剪枝方法扩展到 3D 基于点的神经网络（PNN）。由于 2D 图像和 3D 点云的不同表示以及网络架构的差异，直接在 PNN 上实现 2D CNN 通道修剪方法会降低 PNN 的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 CP$^3$，这是一个基于点的网络的通道修剪插件。 CP$^3$ 经过精心设计，利用点云和 PNN 的特性，实现 PNN 的 2D 通道修剪方法。具体来说，它提出了一种坐标增强的通道重要性度量来反映维度信息和各个通道特征之间的相关性，并回收PNN采样过程中丢弃的点并重新考虑它们的潜在排他信息以增强通道剪枝的鲁棒性。对各种 PNN 架构的实验表明，CP$^3$ 在不同点云任务上不断改进最先进的 2D CNN 剪枝方法。例如，我们在 ScanObjectNN 上压缩的 PointNeXt-S 的准确率达到 88.52%，剪枝率为 57.8%，优于基线剪枝方法，准确度增益为 1.94%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CP$^3$，一种针对点云神经网络（PNN）的通道剪枝插件，旨在解决现有2D CNN通道剪枝方法难以直接应用于PNN的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管2D CNN的通道剪枝已取得显著成果，但现有方法因点云与图像表示差异及网络架构不同，难以有效适配PNN，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 设计坐标增强的通道重要性度量指标，捕捉点云维度信息与通道特征的关联；通过回收采样过程中被丢弃的点，挖掘其潜在信息以增强剪枝鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多种PNN架构实验中，CP$^3$显著优于现有2D剪枝方法。例如，压缩后的PointNeXt-S在ScanObjectNN任务中以57.8%剪枝率实现88.52%准确率，较基线提升1.94%。
AI.conclusion: CP$^3$通过针对性设计有效将2D通道剪枝技术迁移至PNN，兼顾效率与精度，为点云任务模型压缩提供了新思路。

search_text: CP$^3$: Channel Pruning Plug-in for Point-based Networks CP$^3$：基于点的网络的通道修剪插件 Channel pruning can effectively reduce both computational cost and memory footprint of the original network while keeping a comparable accuracy performance. Though great success has been achieved in channel pruning for 2D image-based convolutional networks (CNNs), existing works seldom extend the channel pruning methods to 3D point-based neural networks (PNNs). Directly implementing the 2D CNN channel pruning methods to PNNs undermine the performance of PNNs because of the different representations of 2D images and 3D point clouds as well as the network architecture disparity. In this paper, we proposed CP$^3$, which is a Channel Pruning Plug-in for Point-based network. CP$^3$ is elaborately designed to leverage the characteristics of point clouds and PNNs in order to enable 2D channel pruning methods for PNNs. Specifically, it presents a coordinate-enhanced channel importance metric to reflect the correlation between dimensional information and individual channel features, and it recycles the discarded points in PNN's sampling process and reconsiders their potentially-exclusive information to enhance the robustness of channel pruning. Experiments on various PNN architectures show that CP$^3$ constantly improves state-of-the-art 2D CNN pruning approaches on different point cloud tasks. For instance, our compressed PointNeXt-S on ScanObjectNN achieves an accuracy of 88.52% with a pruning rate of 57.8%, outperforming the baseline pruning methods with an accuracy gain of 1.94%. 通道剪枝可以有效降低原始网络的计算成本和内存占用，同时保持可比的精度性能。尽管基于 2D 图像的卷积网络（CNN）的通道剪枝已经取得了巨大的成功，但现有的工作很少将通道剪枝方法扩展到 3D 基于点的神经网络（PNN）。由于 2D 图像和 3D 点云的不同表示以及网络架构的差异，直接在 PNN 上实现 2D CNN 通道修剪方法会降低 PNN 的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 CP$^3$，这是一个基于点的网络的通道修剪插件。 CP$^3$ 经过精心设计，利用点云和 PNN 的特性，实现 PNN 的 2D 通道修剪方法。具体来说，它提出了一种坐标增强的通道重要性度量来反映维度信息和各个通道特征之间的相关性，并回收PNN采样过程中丢弃的点并重新考虑它们的潜在排他信息以增强通道剪枝的鲁棒性。对各种 PNN 架构的实验表明，CP$^3$ 在不同点云任务上不断改进最先进的 2D CNN 剪枝方法。例如，我们在 ScanObjectNN 上压缩的 PointNeXt-S 的准确率达到 88.52%，剪枝率为 57.8%，优于基线剪枝方法，准确度增益为 1.94%。 本文提出CP$^3$，一种针对点云神经网络（PNN）的通道剪枝插件，旨在解决现有2D CNN通道剪枝方法难以直接应用于PNN的问题。 Yaomin Huang,Ning Liu,Zhengping Che,Zhiyuan Xu,Chaomin Shen,Yaxin Peng,Guixu Zhang,Xinmei Liu,Feifei Feng,Jian Tang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhibo Yang,Rujiao Long,Pengfei Wang,Sibo Song,Humen Zhong,Wenqing Cheng,Xiang Bai,Cong Yao
title: Modeling Entities as Semantic Points for Visual Information Extraction in the Wild
title_zh: 将实体建模为野外视觉信息提取的语义点
abstract: Recently, Visual Information Extraction (VIE) has been becoming increasingly important in both the academia and industry, due to the wide range of real-world applications. Previously, numerous works have been proposed to tackle this problem. However, the benchmarks used to assess these methods are relatively plain, i.e., scenarios with real-world complexity are not fully represented in these benchmarks. As the first contribution of this work, we curate and release a new dataset for VIE, in which the document images are much more challenging in that they are taken from real applications, and difficulties such as blur, partial occlusion, and printing shift are quite common. All these factors may lead to failures in information extraction. Therefore, as the second contribution, we explore an alternative approach to precisely and robustly extract key information from document images under such tough conditions. Specifically, in contrast to previous methods, which usually either incorporate visual information into a multi-modal architecture or train text spotting and information extraction in an end-to-end fashion, we explicitly model entities as semantic points, i.e., center points of entities are enriched with semantic information describing the attributes and relationships of different entities, which could largely benefit entity labeling and linking. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks in this field as well as the proposed dataset demonstrate that the proposed method can achieve significantly enhanced performance on entity labeling and linking, compared with previous state-of-the-art models. Dataset is available at https://www.modelscope.cn/datasets/damo/SIBR/summary.
summary: Recently, Visual Information Extraction (VIE) has been becoming increasingly important in both the academia and industry, due to the wide range of real-world applications. Previously, numerous works have been proposed to tackle this problem. However, the benchmarks used to assess these methods are relatively plain, i.e., scenarios with real-world complexity are not fully represented in these benchmarks. As the first contribution of this work, we curate and release a new dataset for VIE, in which the document images are much more challenging in that they are taken from real applications, and difficulties such as blur, partial occlusion, and printing shift are quite common. All these factors may lead to failures in information extraction. Therefore, as the second contribution, we explore an alternative approach to precisely and robustly extract key information from document images under such tough conditions. Specifically, in contrast to previous methods, which usually either incorporate visual information into a multi-modal architecture or train text spotting and information extraction in an end-to-end fashion, we explicitly model entities as semantic points, i.e., center points of entities are enriched with semantic information describing the attributes and relationships of different entities, which could largely benefit entity labeling and linking. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks in this field as well as the proposed dataset demonstrate that the proposed method can achieve significantly enhanced performance on entity labeling and linking, compared with previous state-of-the-art models. Dataset is available at https://www.modelscope.cn/datasets/damo/SIBR/summary.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于广泛的实际应用，视觉信息提取（VIE）在学术界和工业界变得越来越重要。此前，已经提出了许多工作来解决这个问题。然而，用于评估这些方法的基准相对简单，即这些基准并未完全体现现实世界复杂性的场景。作为这项工作的第一个贡献，我们策划并发布了一个新的 VIE 数据集，其中文档图像更具挑战性，因为它们取自真实应用程序，并且诸如模糊、部分遮挡和打印移位等困难非常常见。所有这些因素都可能导致信息提取失败。因此，作为第二个贡献，我们探索了一种替代方法，可以在如此恶劣的条件下从文档图像中精确、稳健地提取关键信息。具体来说，与以前的方法（通常将视觉信息合并到多模态架构中或以端到端的方式训练文本识别和信息提取）相比，我们将实体明确建模为语义点，即实体的中心点通过描述不同实体的属性和关系的语义信息来丰富，这在很大程度上有利于实体标记和链接。该领域标准基准以及所提出的数据集的大量实验表明，与之前最先进的模型相比，所提出的方法可以在实体标记和链接方面实现显着增强的性能。数据集可在 https://www.modelscope.cn/datasets/damo/SIBR/summary 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将实体建模为语义点的方法，以提高复杂真实场景下的视觉信息提取（VIE）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VIE基准数据集过于简单，无法反映真实场景中的复杂性（如模糊、遮挡等），导致信息提取方法在实际应用中表现不足。
AI.method: 通过显式建模实体为包含属性及关系语义信息的语义点，替代传统多模态架构或端到端训练方法，增强实体标注与链接的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在标准基准和新构建的数据集上，实体标注与链接性能显著优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了复杂场景下的VIE准确性，新数据集为未来研究提供了更具挑战性的测试平台。

Previously, numerous works have been proposed to tackle this problem. All these factors may lead to failures in information extraction. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks in this field as well as the proposed dataset demonstrate that the proposed method can achieve significantly enhanced performance on entity labeling and linking, compared with previous state-of-the-art models. authors_text: Heng Cai,Shumeng Li,Lei Qi,Qian Yu,Yinghuan Shi,Yang Gao
title: Orthogonal Annotation Benefits Barely-supervised Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 正交注释有利于几乎无人监督的医学图像分割
abstract: Recent trends in semi-supervised learning have significantly boosted the performance of 3D semi-supervised medical image segmentation. Compared with 2D images, 3D medical volumes involve information from different directions, e.g., transverse, sagittal, and coronal planes, so as to naturally provide complementary views. These complementary views and the intrinsic similarity among adjacent 3D slices inspire us to develop a novel annotation way and its corresponding semi-supervised model for effective segmentation. Specifically, we firstly propose the orthogonal annotation by only labeling two orthogonal slices in a labeled volume, which significantly relieves the burden of annotation. Then, we perform registration to obtain the initial pseudo labels for sparsely labeled volumes. Subsequently, by introducing unlabeled volumes, we propose a dual-network paradigm named Dense-Sparse Co-training (DeSCO) that exploits dense pseudo labels in early stage and sparse labels in later stage and meanwhile forces consistent output of two networks. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets validated our effectiveness in performance and efficiency in annotation. For example, with only 10 annotated slices, our method reaches a Dice up to 86.93% on KiTS19 dataset.
summary: Recent trends in semi-supervised learning have significantly boosted the performance of 3D semi-supervised medical image segmentation. Compared with 2D images, 3D medical volumes involve information from different directions, e.g., transverse, sagittal, and coronal planes, so as to naturally provide complementary views. These complementary views and the intrinsic similarity among adjacent 3D slices inspire us to develop a novel annotation way and its corresponding semi-supervised model for effective segmentation. Specifically, we firstly propose the orthogonal annotation by only labeling two orthogonal slices in a labeled volume, which significantly relieves the burden of annotation. Then, we perform registration to obtain the initial pseudo labels for sparsely labeled volumes. Subsequently, by introducing unlabeled volumes, we propose a dual-network paradigm named Dense-Sparse Co-training (DeSCO) that exploits dense pseudo labels in early stage and sparse labels in later stage and meanwhile forces consistent output of two networks. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets validated our effectiveness in performance and efficiency in annotation. For example, with only 10 annotated slices, our method reaches a Dice up to 86.93% on KiTS19 dataset.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习的最新趋势显着提高了 3D 半监督医学图像分割的性能。与2D图像相比，3D医学体积涉及来自不同方向的信息，例如横向、矢状面和冠状面，从而自然地提供互补的视图。这些互补的视图和相邻 3D 切片之间的内在相似性启发我们开发一种新颖的注释方式及其相应的半监督模型，以进行有效的分割。具体来说，我们首先提出了正交注释，仅在标记体积中标记两个正交切片，这显着减轻了注释的负担。然后，我们执行配准以获得稀疏标记卷的初始伪标签。随后，通过引入未标记的卷，我们提出了一种名为密集稀疏协同训练（DeSCO）的双网络范式，该范式利用早期的密集伪标签和后期的稀疏标签，同时强制两个网络的输出一致。三个基准数据集的实验结果验证了我们在性能和注释效率方面的有效性。例如，仅使用 10 个带注释的切片，我们的方法在 KiTS19 数据集上的 Dice 高达 86.93%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于正交标注的弱监督医学图像分割方法，通过减少标注负担提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 3D医学影像包含多方向信息，传统标注方式工作量大，需探索更高效的标注策略以利用数据内在相似性。
AI.method: 提出正交标注策略（仅标注两个正交切片），结合配准生成伪标签，并设计双网络框架DeSCO实现密集伪标签与稀疏标签的协同训练。
AI.result: 在KiTS19等三个数据集上验证有效，仅用10个标注切片即可达到86.93%的Dice系数。
AI.conclusion: 正交标注结合双网络框架显著提升了弱监督医学影像分割的效率与性能。

search_text: Orthogonal Annotation Benefits Barely-supervised Medical Image Segmentation 正交注释有利于几乎无人监督的医学图像分割 Recent trends in semi-supervised learning have significantly boosted the performance of 3D semi-supervised medical image segmentation. Compared with 2D images, 3D medical volumes involve information from different directions, e.g., transverse, sagittal, and coronal planes, so as to naturally provide complementary views. These complementary views and the intrinsic similarity among adjacent 3D slices inspire us to develop a novel annotation way and its corresponding semi-supervised model for effective segmentation. Specifically, we firstly propose the orthogonal annotation by only labeling two orthogonal slices in a labeled volume, which significantly relieves the burden of annotation. Then, we perform registration to obtain the initial pseudo labels for sparsely labeled volumes. Subsequently, by introducing unlabeled volumes, we propose a dual-network paradigm named Dense-Sparse Co-training (DeSCO) that exploits dense pseudo labels in early stage and sparse labels in later stage and meanwhile forces consistent output of two networks. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets validated our effectiveness in performance and efficiency in annotation. For example, with only 10 annotated slices, our method reaches a Dice up to 86.93% on KiTS19 dataset. 半监督学习的最新趋势显着提高了 3D 半监督医学图像分割的性能。与2D图像相比，3D医学体积涉及来自不同方向的信息，例如横向、矢状面和冠状面，从而自然地提供互补的视图。这些互补的视图和相邻 3D 切片之间的内在相似性启发我们开发一种新颖的注释方式及其相应的半监督模型，以进行有效的分割。具体来说，我们首先提出了正交注释，仅在标记体积中标记两个正交切片，这显着减轻了注释的负担。然后，我们执行配准以获得稀疏标记卷的初始伪标签。随后，通过引入未标记的卷，我们提出了一种名为密集稀疏协同训练（DeSCO）的双网络范式，该范式利用早期的密集伪标签和后期的稀疏标签，同时强制两个网络的输出一致。三个基准数据集的实验结果验证了我们在性能和注释效率方面的有效性。例如，仅使用 10 个带注释的切片，我们的方法在 KiTS19 数据集上的 Dice 高达 86.93%。 本文提出了一种基于正交标注的弱监督医学图像分割方法，通过减少标注负担提升分割性能。 Heng Cai,Shumeng Li,Lei Qi,Qian Yu,Yinghuan Shi,Yang Gao cs.CV

authors_text: Mengyao Lyu,Jundong Zhou,Hui Chen,Yijie Huang,Dongdong Yu,Yaqian Li,Yandong Guo,Yuchen Guo,Liuyu Xiang,Guiguang Ding
title: Box-Level Active Detection
title_zh: 盒级主动检测
abstract: Active learning selects informative samples for annotation within budget, which has proven efficient recently on object detection. However, the widely used active detection benchmarks conduct image-level evaluation, which is unrealistic in human workload estimation and biased towards crowded images. Furthermore, existing methods still perform image-level annotation, but equally scoring all targets within the same image incurs waste of budget and redundant labels. Having revealed above problems and limitations, we introduce a box-level active detection framework that controls a box-based budget per cycle, prioritizes informative targets and avoids redundancy for fair comparison and efficient application. Under the proposed box-level setting, we devise a novel pipeline, namely Complementary Pseudo Active Strategy (ComPAS). It exploits both human annotations and the model intelligence in a complementary fashion: an efficient input-end committee queries labels for informative objects only; meantime well-learned targets are identified by the model and compensated with pseudo-labels. ComPAS consistently outperforms 10 competitors under 4 settings in a unified codebase. With supervision from labeled data only, it achieves 100% supervised performance of VOC0712 with merely 19% box annotations. On the COCO dataset, it yields up to 4.3% mAP improvement over the second-best method. ComPAS also supports training with the unlabeled pool, where it surpasses 90% COCO supervised performance with 85% label reduction. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/lyumengyao/blad.
summary: Active learning selects informative samples for annotation within budget, which has proven efficient recently on object detection. However, the widely used active detection benchmarks conduct image-level evaluation, which is unrealistic in human workload estimation and biased towards crowded images. Furthermore, existing methods still perform image-level annotation, but equally scoring all targets within the same image incurs waste of budget and redundant labels. Having revealed above problems and limitations, we introduce a box-level active detection framework that controls a box-based budget per cycle, prioritizes informative targets and avoids redundancy for fair comparison and efficient application. Under the proposed box-level setting, we devise a novel pipeline, namely Complementary Pseudo Active Strategy (ComPAS). It exploits both human annotations and the model intelligence in a complementary fashion: an efficient input-end committee queries labels for informative objects only; meantime well-learned targets are identified by the model and compensated with pseudo-labels. ComPAS consistently outperforms 10 competitors under 4 settings in a unified codebase. With supervision from labeled data only, it achieves 100% supervised performance of VOC0712 with merely 19% box annotations. On the COCO dataset, it yields up to 4.3% mAP improvement over the second-best method. ComPAS also supports training with the unlabeled pool, where it surpasses 90% COCO supervised performance with 85% label reduction. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/lyumengyao/blad.
abstract_zh: 主动学习在预算范围内选择信息丰富的样本进行注释，最近已被证明在对象检测方面非常有效。然而，广泛使用的主动检测基准进行图像级评估，这在人类工作量估计方面不切实际，并且偏向于拥挤的图像。此外，现有方法仍然执行图像级注释，但对同一图像内的所有目标进行同等评分会导致预算浪费和冗余标签。在揭示了上述问题和局限性之后，我们引入了一种盒级主动检测框架，该框架控制每个周期基于盒的预算，优先考虑信息丰富的目标并避免冗余，以实现公平比较和高效应用。在提议的盒子级设置下，我们设计了一种新颖的管道，即互补伪主动策略（ComPAS）。它以互补的方式利用人类注释和模型智能：高效的输入端委员会仅查询信息对象的标签；同时，模型会识别经过充分学习的目标，并用伪标签进行补偿。 ComPAS 在统一代码库的 4 种设置下始终优于 10 个竞争对手。仅通过标记数据进行监督，仅用 19% 的框注释即可实现 VOC0712 的 100% 监督性能。在 COCO 数据集上，与第二好的方法相比，它的 mAP 提高了 4.3%。 ComPAS 还支持使用未标记池进行训练，其超过 90% 的 COCO 监督性能，并且标签减少了 85%。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/lyumengyao/blad 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于框级别的主动检测框架，旨在提高目标检测任务中样本标注的效率和公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有的主动检测方法多采用图像级别的评估方式，这在标注预算和冗余标签方面存在不足，无法准确反映实际标注工作量，且容易偏向于密集图像。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个名为Complementary Pseudo Active Strategy (ComPAS) 的新方法，该方法结合了人类标注和模型智能，通过输入端委员会查询信息性对象的标签，同时利用模型识别出学习良好的目标并进行伪标签补偿。
AI.result: ComPAS在4种设置下一致优于10个竞争方法，在VOC0712数据集上仅使用19%的框标注即可达到100%监督性能，在COCO数据集上比第二好的方法提升了4.3%的mAP，且在无标签池训练中减少了85%的标签使用。
AI.conclusion: ComPAS是一种高效的主动检测框架，能够显著提高标注效率并减少冗余，适用于多种目标检测任务。

authors_text: Zhuo Huang,Miaoxi Zhu,Xiaobo Xia,Li Shen,Jun Yu,Chen Gong,Bo Han,Bo Du,Tongliang Liu
title: Robust Generalization against Photon-Limited Corruptions via Worst-Case Sharpness Minimization
title_zh: 通过最坏情况锐度最小化对抗光子受限损坏的鲁棒泛化
abstract: Robust generalization aims to tackle the most challenging data distributions which are rare in the training set and contain severe noises, i.e., photon-limited corruptions. Common solutions such as distributionally robust optimization (DRO) focus on the worst-case empirical risk to ensure low training error on the uncommon noisy distributions. However, due to the over-parameterized model being optimized on scarce worst-case data, DRO fails to produce a smooth loss landscape, thus struggling on generalizing well to the test set. Therefore, instead of focusing on the worst-case risk minimization, we propose SharpDRO by penalizing the sharpness of the worst-case distribution, which measures the loss changes around the neighbor of learning parameters. Through worst-case sharpness minimization, the proposed method successfully produces a flat loss curve on the corrupted distributions, thus achieving robust generalization. Moreover, by considering whether the distribution annotation is available, we apply SharpDRO to two problem settings and design a worst-case selection process for robust generalization. Theoretically, we show that SharpDRO has a great convergence guarantee. Experimentally, we simulate photon-limited corruptions using CIFAR10/100 and ImageNet30 datasets and show that SharpDRO exhibits a strong generalization ability against severe corruptions and exceeds well-known baseline methods with large performance gains.
summary: Robust generalization aims to tackle the most challenging data distributions which are rare in the training set and contain severe noises, i.e., photon-limited corruptions. Common solutions such as distributionally robust optimization (DRO) focus on the worst-case empirical risk to ensure low training error on the uncommon noisy distributions. However, due to the over-parameterized model being optimized on scarce worst-case data, DRO fails to produce a smooth loss landscape, thus struggling on generalizing well to the test set. Therefore, instead of focusing on the worst-case risk minimization, we propose SharpDRO by penalizing the sharpness of the worst-case distribution, which measures the loss changes around the neighbor of learning parameters. Through worst-case sharpness minimization, the proposed method successfully produces a flat loss curve on the corrupted distributions, thus achieving robust generalization. Moreover, by considering whether the distribution annotation is available, we apply SharpDRO to two problem settings and design a worst-case selection process for robust generalization. Theoretically, we show that SharpDRO has a great convergence guarantee. Experimentally, we simulate photon-limited corruptions using CIFAR10/100 and ImageNet30 datasets and show that SharpDRO exhibits a strong generalization ability against severe corruptions and exceeds well-known baseline methods with large performance gains.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒泛化旨在解决最具挑战性的数据分布，这些数据分布在训练集中很少见并且包含严重的噪声，即光子限制损坏。分布鲁棒优化 (DRO) 等常见解决方案侧重于最坏情况的经验风险，以确保不常见的噪声分布上的训练误差较低。然而，由于过度参数化模型是针对稀缺的最坏情况数据进行优化的，DRO 无法产生平滑的损失景观，因此难以很好地推广到测试集。因此，我们不是关注最坏情况风险最小化，而是通过惩罚最坏情况分布的锐度来提出 SharpDRO，它衡量学习参数邻居周围的损失变化。通过最坏情况锐度最小化，所提出的方法成功地在损坏的分布上产生平坦的损失曲线，从而实现鲁棒的泛化。此外，通过考虑分布注释是否可用，我们将 SharpDRO 应用于两个问题设置，并设计一个最坏情况选择过程以实现鲁棒泛化。理论上，我们表明SharpDRO具有很好的收敛保证。实验上，我们使用 CIFAR10/100 和 ImageNet30 数据集模拟光子限制损坏，并表明 SharpDRO 对严重损坏表现出强大的泛化能力，并超越了众所周知的基线方法，具有巨大的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SharpDRO方法，通过最小化最坏情况下的损失曲率来提升模型在光子受限噪声数据下的鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有分布鲁棒优化（DRO）方法虽关注最坏情况风险，但因过度参数化模型在稀缺数据上训练导致损失曲率尖锐，难以泛化到测试集。
AI.method: 设计SharpDRO方法，通过惩罚最坏情况分布的曲率（损失变化率）来生成平滑损失曲线，并针对有无分布标注设计两种问题设置及最坏情况选择过程。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/100和ImageNet30数据集的光子受限噪声模拟中，SharpDRO显著优于基线方法，且具有强收敛性保证。
AI.conclusion: 通过最坏情况曲率最小化，SharpDRO有效提升了模型对严重噪声的鲁棒性，为分布鲁棒优化提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.result: 在CIFAR10/100和ImageNet30数据集的光子受限噪声模拟中，SharpDRO显著优于基线方法，且具有强收敛性保证。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过最坏情况曲率最小化，SharpDRO有效提升了模型对严重噪声的鲁棒性，为分布鲁棒优化提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出SharpDRO方法，通过最小化最坏情况下的损失曲率来提升模型在光子受限噪声数据下的鲁棒泛化能力。
motivation: 现有分布鲁棒优化（DRO）方法虽关注最坏情况风险，但因过度参数化模型在稀缺数据上训练导致损失曲率尖锐，难以泛化到测试集。
method: 设计SharpDRO方法，通过惩罚最坏情况分布的曲率（损失变化率）来生成平滑损失曲线，并针对有无分布标注设计两种问题设置及最坏情况选择过程。
result: 在CIFAR10/100和ImageNet30数据集的光子受限噪声模拟中，SharpDRO显著优于基线方法，且具有强收敛性保证。
conclusion: 通过最坏情况曲率最小化，SharpDRO有效提升了模型对严重噪声的鲁棒性，为分布鲁棒优化提供了新思路。
search_text: Robust Generalization against Photon-Limited Corruptions via Worst-Case Sharpness Minimization 通过最坏情况锐度最小化对抗光子受限损坏的鲁棒泛化 Robust generalization aims to tackle the most challenging data distributions which are rare in the training set and contain severe noises, i.e., photon-limited corruptions. Common solutions such as distributionally robust optimization (DRO) focus on the worst-case empirical risk to ensure low training error on the uncommon noisy distributions. However, due to the over-parameterized model being optimized on scarce worst-case data, DRO fails to produce a smooth loss landscape, thus struggling on generalizing well to the test set. Therefore, instead of focusing on the worst-case risk minimization, we propose SharpDRO by penalizing the sharpness of the worst-case distribution, which measures the loss changes around the neighbor of learning parameters. Through worst-case sharpness minimization, the proposed method successfully produces a flat loss curve on the corrupted distributions, thus achieving robust generalization. Moreover, by considering whether the distribution annotation is available, we apply SharpDRO to two problem settings and design a worst-case selection process for robust generalization. Theoretically, we show that SharpDRO has a great convergence guarantee. Experimentally, we simulate photon-limited corruptions using CIFAR10/100 and ImageNet30 datasets and show that SharpDRO exhibits a strong generalization ability against severe corruptions and exceeds well-known baseline methods with large performance gains. 鲁棒泛化旨在解决最具挑战性的数据分布，这些数据分布在训练集中很少见并且包含严重的噪声，即光子限制损坏。分布鲁棒优化 (DRO) 等常见解决方案侧重于最坏情况的经验风险，以确保不常见的噪声分布上的训练误差较低。然而，由于过度参数化模型是针对稀缺的最坏情况数据进行优化的，DRO 无法产生平滑的损失景观，因此难以很好地推广到测试集。因此，我们不是关注最坏情况风险最小化，而是通过惩罚最坏情况分布的锐度来提出 SharpDRO，它衡量学习参数邻居周围的损失变化。通过最坏情况锐度最小化，所提出的方法成功地在损坏的分布上产生平坦的损失曲线，从而实现鲁棒的泛化。此外，通过考虑分布注释是否可用，我们将 SharpDRO 应用于两个问题设置，并设计一个最坏情况选择过程以实现鲁棒泛化。理论上，我们表明SharpDRO具有很好的收敛保证。实验上，我们使用 CIFAR10/100 和 ImageNet30 数据集模拟光子限制损坏，并表明 SharpDRO 对严重损坏表现出强大的泛化能力，并超越了众所周知的基线方法，具有巨大的性能提升。 本文提出SharpDRO方法，通过最小化最坏情况下的损失曲率来提升模型在光子受限噪声数据下的鲁棒泛化能力。 Zhuo Huang,Miaoxi Zhu,Xiaobo Xia,Li Shen,Jun Yu,Chen Gong,Bo Han,Bo Du,Tongliang Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Xiang He,Yang Li,Dongcheng Zhao,Qingqun Kong,Yi Zeng
title: MSAT: Biologically Inspired Multi-Stage Adaptive Threshold for Conversion of Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: MSAT：用于尖峰神经网络转换的受生物学启发的多阶段自适应阈值
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) can do inference with low power consumption due to their spike sparsity. ANN-SNN conversion is an efficient way to achieve deep SNNs by converting well-trained Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). However, the existing methods commonly use constant threshold for conversion, which prevents neurons from rapidly delivering spikes to deeper layers and causes high time delay. In addition, the same response for different inputs may result in information loss during the information transmission. Inspired by the biological model mechanism, we propose a multi-stage adaptive threshold (MSAT). Specifically, for each neuron, the dynamic threshold varies with firing history and input properties and is positively correlated with the average membrane potential and negatively correlated with the rate of depolarization. The self-adaptation to membrane potential and input allows a timely adjustment of the threshold to fire spike faster and transmit more information. Moreover, we analyze the Spikes of Inactivated Neurons error which is pervasive in early time steps and propose spike confidence accordingly as a measurement of confidence about the neurons that correctly deliver spikes. We use such spike confidence in early time steps to determine whether to elicit spike to alleviate this error. Combined with the proposed method, we examine the performance on non-trivial datasets CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet. We also conduct sentiment classification and speech recognition experiments on the IDBM and Google speech commands datasets respectively. Experiments show near-lossless and lower latency ANN-SNN conversion. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time to build a biologically inspired multi-stage adaptive threshold for converted SNN, with comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods while improving energy efficiency.

ANN-SNN conversion is an efficient way to achieve deep SNNs by converting well-trained Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). However, the existing methods commonly use constant threshold for conversion, which prevents neurons from rapidly delivering spikes to deeper layers and causes high time delay. In addition, the same response for different inputs may result in information loss during the information transmission. Specifically, for each neuron, the dynamic threshold varies with firing history and input properties and is positively correlated with the average membrane potential and negatively correlated with the rate of depolarization. The self-adaptation to membrane potential and input allows a timely adjustment of the threshold to fire spike faster and transmit more information. Moreover, we analyze the Spikes of Inactivated Neurons error which is pervasive in early time steps and propose spike confidence accordingly as a measurement of confidence about the neurons that correctly deliver spikes. We use such spike confidence in early time steps to determine whether to elicit spike to alleviate this error. Combined with the proposed method, we examine the performance on non-trivial datasets CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet. We also conduct sentiment classification and speech recognition experiments on the IDBM and Google speech commands datasets respectively. Experiments show near-lossless and lower latency ANN-SNN conversion. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time to build a biologically inspired multi-stage adaptive threshold for converted SNN, with comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods while improving energy efficiency.
abstract_zh: 由于尖峰稀疏性，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 可以以低功耗进行推理。 ANN-SNN 转换是通过转换训练有素的人工神经网络 (ANN) 来实现深度 SNN 的有效方法。然而，现有方法通常使用恒定阈值进行转换，这会阻止神经元快速将尖峰传递到更深层并导致较高的时间延迟。另外，对不同输入的相同响应可能会导致信息传输过程中的信息丢失。受生物模型机制的启发，我们提出了多阶段自适应阈值（MSAT）。具体来说，对于每个神经元，动态阈值随着放电历史和输入特性而变化，并且与平均膜电位正相关，与去极化速率负相关。对膜电位和输入的自适应可以及时调整阈值，以更快地激发尖峰并传输更多信息。此外，我们分析了早期时间步骤中普遍存在的失活神经元尖峰误差，并相应地提出尖峰置信度作为对正确传递尖峰的神经元的置信度的测量。我们在早期时间步骤中使用这种峰值置信度来确定是否引发峰值以减轻此错误。结合所提出的方法，我们检查了非平凡数据集 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上的性能。我们还分别在 IDBM 和 Google 语音命令数据集上进行了情感分类和语音识别实验。实验表明 ANN-SNN 转换接近无损且延迟较低。据我们所知，这是第一次为转换后的 SNN 构建受生物学启发的多级自适应阈值，其性能与最先进的方法相当，同时提高了能源效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受生物启发的多阶段自适应阈值（MSAT）方法，用于改进人工神经网络（ANN）到脉冲神经网络（SNN）的转换效率。
AI.motivation: 现有ANN-SNN转换方法采用固定阈值，导致神经元无法快速传递脉冲至深层网络，造成高时间延迟和信息丢失，需通过生物机制改进阈值动态调整策略。
AI.method: 设计多阶段自适应阈值（MSAT），使神经元阈值根据膜电位平均值和去极化速率动态变化，并引入早期脉冲置信度机制以减少未激活神经元的脉冲错误。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet等数据集上实现接近无损且低延迟的转换，在情感分类和语音识别任务中展现可比性能与更高能效。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出生物启发的多阶段自适应阈值方法，解决了ANN-SNN转换中的延迟与信息丢失问题，在保持性能的同时提升能效。

authors_text: Owen Kevin Appadoo,Hugo Rositi,Sylvie Valarier,Marie-Claire Ombret,Émilie Gadéa,Christine Barret-Grimault,Christophe Lohou
title: Implementation of communication media around a mixed reality experience with HoloLens headset, as part of a digitalization of a nutrition workshop
title_zh: 作为营养研讨会数字化的一部分，利用 HoloLens 耳机实现混合现实体验的通信媒体
abstract: The release of Microsoft's HoloLens headset addresses new types of issues that would have been difficult to design without such a hardware. This semi-transparent visor headset allows the user who wears it to view the projection of 3D virtual objects placed in its real environment. The user can also interact with these 3D objects, which can interact with each other. The framework of this new technology is called mixed reality. We had the opportunity to numerically transform a conventional human nutrition workshop for patients waiting for bariatric surgery by developing a software called HOLO_NUTRI using the HoloLens headset. Unlike our experience of user and conventional programmer specialized in the development of interactive 3D graphics applications, we realized that such a mixed reality experience required specific programming concepts quite different from those of conventional software or those of virtual reality applications, but above all required a thorough reflection about communication for users. In this article, we propose to explain our design of communication (graphic supports, tutorials of use of material, explanatory videos), a step which was crucial for the good progress of our project. The software was used by thirty patients from Le Puy-en-Velay Hospital during 10 sessions of one hour and a half during which patients had to take in hand the headset and software HOLO_NUTRI. We also proposed a series of questions to patients to have an assessment of both the adequacy and the importance of this communication approach for such experience. As the mixed reality technology is very recent but the number of applications based on it significantly increases, the reflection on the implementation of the elements of communication described in this article (videos, exercise of learning for the use of the headset, communication leaflet, etc.) can help developers of such applications.
summary: The release of Microsoft's HoloLens headset addresses new types of issues that would have been difficult to design without such a hardware. This semi-transparent visor headset allows the user who wears it to view the projection of 3D virtual objects placed in its real environment. The user can also interact with these 3D objects, which can interact with each other. The framework of this new technology is called mixed reality. We had the opportunity to numerically transform a conventional human nutrition workshop for patients waiting for bariatric surgery by developing a software called HOLO_NUTRI using the HoloLens headset. Unlike our experience of user and conventional programmer specialized in the development of interactive 3D graphics applications, we realized that such a mixed reality experience required specific programming concepts quite different from those of conventional software or those of virtual reality applications, but above all required a thorough reflection about communication for users. In this article, we propose to explain our design of communication (graphic supports, tutorials of use of material, explanatory videos), a step which was crucial for the good progress of our project. The software was used by thirty patients from Le Puy-en-Velay Hospital during 10 sessions of one hour and a half during which patients had to take in hand the headset and software HOLO_NUTRI. We also proposed a series of questions to patients to have an assessment of both the adequacy and the importance of this communication approach for such experience. As the mixed reality technology is very recent but the number of applications based on it significantly increases, the reflection on the implementation of the elements of communication described in this article (videos, exercise of learning for the use of the headset, communication leaflet, etc.) can help developers of such applications.
abstract_zh: 微软 HoloLens 耳机的发布解决了如果没有这种硬件就很难设计的新型问题。这款半透明面罩耳机允许佩戴它的用户查看放置在其真实环境中的 3D 虚拟物体的投影。用户还可以与这些 3D 对象进行交互，这些对象可以相互交互。这项新技术的框架称为混合现实。我们有机会通过使用 HoloLens 耳机开发一款名为 HOLO_NUTRI 的软件，对等待减肥手术的患者的传统人类营养研讨会进行数字化改造。与我们专门开发交互式 3D 图形应用程序的用户和传统程序员的经验不同，我们意识到这种混合现实体验需要与传统软件或虚拟现实应用程序完全不同的特定编程概念，但最重要的是需要对用户沟通进行彻底的反思。在本文中，我们建议解释我们的沟通设计（图形支持、材料使用教程、解释视频），这一步对于我们项目的良好进展至关重要。 Le Puy-en-Velay 医院的 30 名患者在 10 次为期一个半小时的疗程中使用了该软件，在此期间患者必须手持耳机和软件 HOLO_NUTRI。我们还向患者提出了一系列问题，以评估这种沟通方法对于此类体验的充分性和重要性。由于混合现实技术是最近才出现的，但基于它的应用程序数量显着增加，对本文中描述的通信要素（视频、耳机使用学习练习、通信传单等）的实施的反思可以帮助此类应用程序的开发人员。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了使用HoloLens头显开发混合现实软件HOLO_NUTRI，用于数字化营养工作坊，并重点探讨了用户沟通设计的实现。
AI.motivation: 传统营养工作坊存在互动性不足的问题，而混合现实技术能提供沉浸式体验，但需解决用户沟通与交互设计的特殊需求。
AI.method: 开发HOLO_NUTRI软件并设计配套沟通材料（视觉辅助、使用教程、视频等），在医院对30名患者进行10次实验，通过问卷评估沟通效果。
AI.result: 沟通方案有效支持了用户操作，患者反馈显示其对混合现实体验的适应性良好，验证了沟通设计在混合现实应用中的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 混合现实应用需特别关注用户沟通设计，本文提出的沟通框架可为同类技术开发提供参考。

search_text: Implementation of communication media around a mixed reality experience with HoloLens headset, as part of a digitalization of a nutrition workshop 作为营养研讨会数字化的一部分，利用 HoloLens 耳机实现混合现实体验的通信媒体 The release of Microsoft's HoloLens headset addresses new types of issues that would have been difficult to design without such a hardware. This semi-transparent visor headset allows the user who wears it to view the projection of 3D virtual objects placed in its real environment. The user can also interact with these 3D objects, which can interact with each other. The framework of this new technology is called mixed reality. We had the opportunity to numerically transform a conventional human nutrition workshop for patients waiting for bariatric surgery by developing a software called HOLO_NUTRI using the HoloLens headset. Unlike our experience of user and conventional programmer specialized in the development of interactive 3D graphics applications, we realized that such a mixed reality experience required specific programming concepts quite different from those of conventional software or those of virtual reality applications, but above all required a thorough reflection about communication for users. In this article, we propose to explain our design of communication (graphic supports, tutorials of use of material, explanatory videos), a step which was crucial for the good progress of our project. The software was used by thirty patients from Le Puy-en-Velay Hospital during 10 sessions of one hour and a half during which patients had to take in hand the headset and software HOLO_NUTRI. We also proposed a series of questions to patients to have an assessment of both the adequacy and the importance of this communication approach for such experience. As the mixed reality technology is very recent but the number of applications based on it significantly increases, the reflection on the implementation of the elements of communication described in this article (videos, exercise of learning for the use of the headset, communication leaflet, etc.) can help developers of such applications. 微软 HoloLens 耳机的发布解决了如果没有这种硬件就很难设计的新型问题。这款半透明面罩耳机允许佩戴它的用户查看放置在其真实环境中的 3D 虚拟物体的投影。用户还可以与这些 3D 对象进行交互，这些对象可以相互交互。这项新技术的框架称为混合现实。我们有机会通过使用 HoloLens 耳机开发一款名为 HOLO_NUTRI 的软件，对等待减肥手术的患者的传统人类营养研讨会进行数字化改造。与我们专门开发交互式 3D 图形应用程序的用户和传统程序员的经验不同，我们意识到这种混合现实体验需要与传统软件或虚拟现实应用程序完全不同的特定编程概念，但最重要的是需要对用户沟通进行彻底的反思。在本文中，我们建议解释我们的沟通设计（图形支持、材料使用教程、解释视频），这一步对于我们项目的良好进展至关重要。 Le Puy-en-Velay 医院的 30 名患者在 10 次为期一个半小时的疗程中使用了该软件，在此期间患者必须手持耳机和软件 HOLO_NUTRI。我们还向患者提出了一系列问题，以评估这种沟通方法对于此类体验的充分性和重要性。由于混合现实技术是最近才出现的，但基于它的应用程序数量显着增加，对本文中描述的通信要素（视频、耳机使用学习练习、通信传单等）的实施的反思可以帮助此类应用程序的开发人员。 本文介绍了使用HoloLens头显开发混合现实软件HOLO_NUTRI，用于数字化营养工作坊，并重点探讨了用户沟通设计的实现。 Owen Kevin Appadoo,Hugo Rositi,Sylvie Valarier,Marie-Claire Ombret,Émilie Gadéa,Christine Barret-Grimault,Christophe Lohou cs.HC,cs.MM

authors_text: Xiang He,Dongcheng Zhao,Yang Li,Guobin Shen,Qingqun Kong,Yi Zeng
title: An Efficient Knowledge Transfer Strategy for Spiking Neural Networks from Static to Event Domain
title_zh: 尖峰神经网络从静态到事件域的有效知识转移策略
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2024 (Oral). Code is available at https://github.com/Brain-Cog-Lab/Transfer-for-DVS
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2024 (Oral). Code is available at https://github.com/Brain-Cog-Lab/Transfer-for-DVS
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are rich in spatio-temporal dynamics and are suitable for processing event-based neuromorphic data. However, event-based datasets are usually less annotated than static datasets. This small data scale makes SNNs prone to overfitting and limits their performance. In order to improve the generalization ability of SNNs on event-based datasets, we use static images to assist SNN training on event data. In this paper, we first discuss the domain mismatch problem encountered when directly transferring networks trained on static datasets to event data. We argue that the inconsistency of feature distributions becomes a major factor hindering the effective transfer of knowledge from static images to event data. To address this problem, we propose solutions in terms of two aspects: feature distribution and training strategy. Firstly, we propose a knowledge transfer loss, which consists of domain alignment loss and spatio-temporal regularization. The domain alignment loss learns domain-invariant spatial features by reducing the marginal distribution distance between the static image and the event data. Spatio-temporal regularization provides dynamically learnable coefficients for domain alignment loss by using the output features of the event data at each time step as a regularization term. In addition, we propose a sliding training strategy, which gradually replaces static image inputs probabilistically with event data, resulting in a smoother and more stable training for the network. We validate our method on neuromorphic datasets, including N-Caltech101, CEP-DVS, and N-Omniglot. The experimental results show that our proposed method achieves better performance on all datasets compared to the current state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/Brain-Cog-Lab/Transfer-for-DVS.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are rich in spatio-temporal dynamics and are suitable for processing event-based neuromorphic data. However, event-based datasets are usually less annotated than static datasets. This small data scale makes SNNs prone to overfitting and limits their performance. In order to improve the generalization ability of SNNs on event-based datasets, we use static images to assist SNN training on event data. In this paper, we first discuss the domain mismatch problem encountered when directly transferring networks trained on static datasets to event data. We argue that the inconsistency of feature distributions becomes a major factor hindering the effective transfer of knowledge from static images to event data. To address this problem, we propose solutions in terms of two aspects: feature distribution and training strategy. Firstly, we propose a knowledge transfer loss, which consists of domain alignment loss and spatio-temporal regularization. The domain alignment loss learns domain-invariant spatial features by reducing the marginal distribution distance between the static image and the event data. Spatio-temporal regularization provides dynamically learnable coefficients for domain alignment loss by using the output features of the event data at each time step as a regularization term. In addition, we propose a sliding training strategy, which gradually replaces static image inputs probabilistically with event data, resulting in a smoother and more stable training for the network. We validate our method on neuromorphic datasets, including N-Caltech101, CEP-DVS, and N-Omniglot. The experimental results show that our proposed method achieves better performance on all datasets compared to the current state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/Brain-Cog-Lab/Transfer-for-DVS.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）具有丰富的时空动力学特征，适合处理基于事件的神经形态数据。然而，基于事件的数据集通常比静态数据集注释更少。如此小的数据规模使得 SNN 容易过度拟合并限制其性能。为了提高SNN在基于事件的数据集上的泛化能力，我们使用静态图像来辅助SNN对事件数据的训练。在本文中，我们首先讨论将静态数据集训练的网络直接转移到事件数据时遇到的域不匹配问题。我们认为，特征分布的不一致成为阻碍知识从静态图像到事件数据有效迁移的主要因素。针对这个问题，我们从特征分布和训练策略两个方面提出了解决方案。首先，我们提出了知识转移损失，它由域对齐损失和时空正则化组成。域对齐损失通过减少静态图像和事件数据之间的边缘分布距离来学习域不变的空间特征。时空正则化通过使用每个时间步的事件数据的输出特征作为正则化项，为域对齐损失提供动态可学习系数。此外，我们提出了一种滑动训练策略，逐渐用事件数据概率地取代静态图像输入，从而使网络训练更平滑、更稳定。我们在神经形态数据集（包括 N-Caltech101、CEP-DVS 和 N-Omniglot）上验证了我们的方法。实验结果表明，与当前最先进的方法相比，我们提出的方法在所有数据集上都取得了更好的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/Brain-Cog-Lab/Transfer-for-DVS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的从静态域到事件域的知识迁移策略，以提升脉冲神经网络（SNN）在事件数据上的性能。
AI.motivation: 事件数据标注不足导致SNN易过拟合，直接迁移静态域模型至事件域时存在特征分布不一致的领域差异问题，限制了知识迁移效果。
AI.method: 设计包含领域对齐损失和时空正则化的知识迁移损失函数，并提出渐进式滑动训练策略，通过动态调整静态图像与事件数据输入比例实现稳定训练。
AI.result: 在N-Caltech101、CEP-DVS等数据集上均优于现有最先进方法，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征分布对齐与渐进式训练策略，有效缓解了静态域到事件域的知识迁移难题，提升了SNN在事件数据上的泛化能力。

authors_text: Xiaoshi Wu,Feng Zhu,Rui Zhao,Hongsheng Li
title: CORA: Adapting CLIP for Open-Vocabulary Detection with Region Prompting and Anchor Pre-Matching
title_zh: CORA：使用区域提示和锚点预匹配调整 CLIP 进行开放词汇检测
abstract: Open-vocabulary detection (OVD) is an object detection task aiming at detecting objects from novel categories beyond the base categories on which the detector is trained. Recent OVD methods rely on large-scale visual-language pre-trained models, such as CLIP, for recognizing novel objects. We identify the two core obstacles that need to be tackled when incorporating these models into detector training: (1) the distribution mismatch that happens when applying a VL-model trained on whole images to region recognition tasks; (2) the difficulty of localizing objects of unseen classes. To overcome these obstacles, we propose CORA, a DETR-style framework that adapts CLIP for Open-vocabulary detection by Region prompting and Anchor pre-matching. Region prompting mitigates the whole-to-region distribution gap by prompting the region features of the CLIP-based region classifier. Anchor pre-matching helps learning generalizable object localization by a class-aware matching mechanism. We evaluate CORA on the COCO OVD benchmark, where we achieve 41.7 AP50 on novel classes, which outperforms the previous SOTA by 2.4 AP50 even without resorting to extra training data. When extra training data is available, we train CORA$^+$ on both ground-truth base-category annotations and additional pseudo bounding box labels computed by CORA. CORA$^+$ achieves 43.1 AP50 on the COCO OVD benchmark and 28.1 box APr on the LVIS OVD benchmark.
summary: Open-vocabulary detection (OVD) is an object detection task aiming at detecting objects from novel categories beyond the base categories on which the detector is trained. Recent OVD methods rely on large-scale visual-language pre-trained models, such as CLIP, for recognizing novel objects. We identify the two core obstacles that need to be tackled when incorporating these models into detector training: (1) the distribution mismatch that happens when applying a VL-model trained on whole images to region recognition tasks; (2) the difficulty of localizing objects of unseen classes. To overcome these obstacles, we propose CORA, a DETR-style framework that adapts CLIP for Open-vocabulary detection by Region prompting and Anchor pre-matching. Region prompting mitigates the whole-to-region distribution gap by prompting the region features of the CLIP-based region classifier. Anchor pre-matching helps learning generalizable object localization by a class-aware matching mechanism. We evaluate CORA on the COCO OVD benchmark, where we achieve 41.7 AP50 on novel classes, which outperforms the previous SOTA by 2.4 AP50 even without resorting to extra training data. When extra training data is available, we train CORA$^+$ on both ground-truth base-category annotations and additional pseudo bounding box labels computed by CORA. CORA$^+$ achieves 43.1 AP50 on the COCO OVD benchmark and 28.1 box APr on the LVIS OVD benchmark.
abstract_zh: 开放词汇检测（OVD）是一种对象检测任务，旨在从训练检测器的基本类别之外的新类别中检测对象。最近的 OVD 方法依赖于大规模视觉语言预训练模型（例如 CLIP）来识别新物体。我们确定了将这些模型纳入检测器训练时需要解决的两个核心障碍：（1）将在整个图像上训练的 VL 模型应用于区域识别任务时发生的分布不匹配； (2) 定位未见过类的对象的困难。为了克服这些障碍，我们提出了 CORA，一种 DETR 风格的框架，它采用 CLIP 通过区域提示和锚点预匹配进行开放词汇检测。区域提示通过提示基于 CLIP 的区域分类器的区域特征来减轻整体到区域的分布差距。锚点预匹配有助于通过类感知匹配机制学习可泛化的对象定位。我们在 COCO OVD 基准上评估 CORA，在新类别上取得了 41.7 AP50，即使不借助额外的训练数据，其性能也比之前的 SOTA 高出 2.4 AP50。当额外的训练数据可用时，我们在真实基本类别注释和 CORA 计算的附加伪边界框标签上训练 CORA$^+$。 CORA$^+$ 在 COCO OVD 基准上达到 43.1 AP50，在 LVIS OVD 基准上达到 28.1 box APr。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORA方法，通过区域提示和锚点预匹配技术，将CLIP模型适配于开放词汇检测任务，解决分布不匹配和未见类别定位难题。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇检测方法在应用图像级预训练模型（如CLIP）时面临区域特征分布不匹配及未见类别定位困难两大核心问题，限制了检测性能。
AI.method: 设计DETR框架的CORA方法，包含区域提示（缓解图像到区域特征分布差异）和锚点预匹配（通过类感知机制提升定位泛化能力）两个关键模块，并提出CORA+版本利用伪标签进一步优化。
AI.result: 在COCO OVD基准上，CORA在无额外数据时达到41.7 AP50（超SOTA 2.4 AP50），使用额外数据后提升至43.1 AP50；在LVIS OVD基准上取得28.1 box APr。
AI.conclusion: CORA通过针对性解决分布差异与定位问题，显著提升了开放词汇检测性能，验证了区域提示与锚点预匹配方法的有效性。

search_text: CORA: Adapting CLIP for Open-Vocabulary Detection with Region Prompting and Anchor Pre-Matching CORA：使用区域提示和锚点预匹配调整 CLIP 进行开放词汇检测 Open-vocabulary detection (OVD) is an object detection task aiming at detecting objects from novel categories beyond the base categories on which the detector is trained. Recent OVD methods rely on large-scale visual-language pre-trained models, such as CLIP, for recognizing novel objects. We identify the two core obstacles that need to be tackled when incorporating these models into detector training: (1) the distribution mismatch that happens when applying a VL-model trained on whole images to region recognition tasks; (2) the difficulty of localizing objects of unseen classes. To overcome these obstacles, we propose CORA, a DETR-style framework that adapts CLIP for Open-vocabulary detection by Region prompting and Anchor pre-matching. Region prompting mitigates the whole-to-region distribution gap by prompting the region features of the CLIP-based region classifier. Anchor pre-matching helps learning generalizable object localization by a class-aware matching mechanism. We evaluate CORA on the COCO OVD benchmark, where we achieve 41.7 AP50 on novel classes, which outperforms the previous SOTA by 2.4 AP50 even without resorting to extra training data. When extra training data is available, we train CORA$^+$ on both ground-truth base-category annotations and additional pseudo bounding box labels computed by CORA. CORA$^+$ achieves 43.1 AP50 on the COCO OVD benchmark and 28.1 box APr on the LVIS OVD benchmark. 开放词汇检测（OVD）是一种对象检测任务，旨在从训练检测器的基本类别之外的新类别中检测对象。最近的 OVD 方法依赖于大规模视觉语言预训练模型（例如 CLIP）来识别新物体。我们确定了将这些模型纳入检测器训练时需要解决的两个核心障碍：（1）将在整个图像上训练的 VL 模型应用于区域识别任务时发生的分布不匹配； (2) 定位未见过类的对象的困难。为了克服这些障碍，我们提出了 CORA，一种 DETR 风格的框架，它采用 CLIP 通过区域提示和锚点预匹配进行开放词汇检测。区域提示通过提示基于 CLIP 的区域分类器的区域特征来减轻整体到区域的分布差距。锚点预匹配有助于通过类感知匹配机制学习可泛化的对象定位。我们在 COCO OVD 基准上评估 CORA，在新类别上取得了 41.7 AP50，即使不借助额外的训练数据，其性能也比之前的 SOTA 高出 2.4 AP50。当额外的训练数据可用时，我们在真实基本类别注释和 CORA 计算的附加伪边界框标签上训练 CORA$^+$。 CORA$^+$ 在 COCO OVD 基准上达到 43.1 AP50，在 LVIS OVD 基准上达到 28.1 box APr。 本文提出CORA方法，通过区域提示和锚点预匹配技术，将CLIP模型适配于开放词汇检测任务，解决分布不匹配和未见类别定位难题。 Xiaoshi Wu,Feng Zhu,Rui Zhao,Hongsheng Li cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Haoyu Tang,Zhaoyi Liu,Chang Zeng,Xinfeng Li
title: Beyond Universal Transformer: block reusing with adaptor in Transformer for automatic speech recognition
title_zh: 超越通用 Transformer：在 Transformer 中通过适配器进行块重用以实现自动语音识别
abstract: Transformer-based models have recently made significant achievements in the application of end-to-end (E2E) automatic speech recognition (ASR). It is possible to deploy the E2E ASR system on smart devices with the help of Transformer-based models. While these models still have the disadvantage of requiring a large number of model parameters. To overcome the drawback of universal Transformer models for the application of ASR on edge devices, we propose a solution that can reuse the block in Transformer models for the occasion of the small footprint ASR system, which meets the objective of accommodating resource limitations without compromising recognition accuracy. Specifically, we design a novel block-reusing strategy for speech Transformer (BRST) to enhance the effectiveness of parameters and propose an adapter module (ADM) that can produce a compact and adaptable model with only a few additional trainable parameters accompanying each reusing block. We conducted an experiment with the proposed method on the public AISHELL-1 corpus, and the results show that the proposed approach achieves the character error rate (CER) of 9.3%/6.63% with only 7.6M/8.3M parameters without and with the ADM, respectively. In addition, we also make a deeper analysis to show the effect of ADM in the general block-reusing method.
summary: Transformer-based models have recently made significant achievements in the application of end-to-end (E2E) automatic speech recognition (ASR). It is possible to deploy the E2E ASR system on smart devices with the help of Transformer-based models. While these models still have the disadvantage of requiring a large number of model parameters. To overcome the drawback of universal Transformer models for the application of ASR on edge devices, we propose a solution that can reuse the block in Transformer models for the occasion of the small footprint ASR system, which meets the objective of accommodating resource limitations without compromising recognition accuracy. Specifically, we design a novel block-reusing strategy for speech Transformer (BRST) to enhance the effectiveness of parameters and propose an adapter module (ADM) that can produce a compact and adaptable model with only a few additional trainable parameters accompanying each reusing block. We conducted an experiment with the proposed method on the public AISHELL-1 corpus, and the results show that the proposed approach achieves the character error rate (CER) of 9.3%/6.63% with only 7.6M/8.3M parameters without and with the ADM, respectively. In addition, we also make a deeper analysis to show the effect of ADM in the general block-reusing method.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的模型最近在端到端（E2E）自动语音识别（ASR）的应用中取得了重大成就。借助基于 Transformer 的模型，可以在智能设备上部署端到端 ASR 系统。但这些模型仍然存在需要大量模型参数的缺点。为了克服通用 Transformer 模型在边缘设备上应用 ASR 的缺点，我们提出了一种解决方案，可以在小占用 ASR 系统的场合重用 Transformer 模型中的块，从而满足在不影响识别精度的情况下适应资源限制的目标。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的语音转换器（BRST）块重用策略来增强参数的有效性，并提出了一种适配器模块（ADM），它可以生成一个紧凑且适应性强的模型，每个重用块只需要几个额外的可训练参数。我们在公共 AISHELL-1 语料库上对所提出的方法进行了实验，结果表明，在不使用 ADM 的情况下，所提出的方法仅用 7.6M/8.3M 的参数分别实现了 9.3%/6.63% 的字符错误率（CER）。此外，我们还进行了更深入的分析来展示ADM在通用块重用方法中的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的块重用与适配器模块的轻量级语音识别模型，以解决端到端自动语音识别（ASR）在边缘设备上的参数冗余问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型参数量大，难以部署于资源受限的边缘设备，而通用Transformer在ASR任务中存在效率与精度的平衡难题。
AI.method: 设计块重用策略（BRST）实现Transformer层间参数共享，并引入适配器模块（ADM）通过少量可训练参数增强模型适应性。
AI.result: 在AISHELL-1数据集上，无ADM时7.6M参数达到9.3%字符错误率（CER），加入ADM后8.3M参数降至6.63% CER。
AI.conclusion: 块重用与适配器模块的结合有效降低了模型参数量，在保持识别精度的同时满足边缘设备的轻量化需求。

search_text: Beyond Universal Transformer: block reusing with adaptor in Transformer for automatic speech recognition 超越通用 Transformer：在 Transformer 中通过适配器进行块重用以实现自动语音识别 Transformer-based models have recently made significant achievements in the application of end-to-end (E2E) automatic speech recognition (ASR). It is possible to deploy the E2E ASR system on smart devices with the help of Transformer-based models. While these models still have the disadvantage of requiring a large number of model parameters. To overcome the drawback of universal Transformer models for the application of ASR on edge devices, we propose a solution that can reuse the block in Transformer models for the occasion of the small footprint ASR system, which meets the objective of accommodating resource limitations without compromising recognition accuracy. Specifically, we design a novel block-reusing strategy for speech Transformer (BRST) to enhance the effectiveness of parameters and propose an adapter module (ADM) that can produce a compact and adaptable model with only a few additional trainable parameters accompanying each reusing block. We conducted an experiment with the proposed method on the public AISHELL-1 corpus, and the results show that the proposed approach achieves the character error rate (CER) of 9.3%/6.63% with only 7.6M/8.3M parameters without and with the ADM, respectively. In addition, we also make a deeper analysis to show the effect of ADM in the general block-reusing method. 基于 Transformer 的模型最近在端到端（E2E）自动语音识别（ASR）的应用中取得了重大成就。借助基于 Transformer 的模型，可以在智能设备上部署端到端 ASR 系统。但这些模型仍然存在需要大量模型参数的缺点。为了克服通用 Transformer 模型在边缘设备上应用 ASR 的缺点，我们提出了一种解决方案，可以在小占用 ASR 系统的场合重用 Transformer 模型中的块，从而满足在不影响识别精度的情况下适应资源限制的目标。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的语音转换器（BRST）块重用策略来增强参数的有效性，并提出了一种适配器模块（ADM），它可以生成一个紧凑且适应性强的模型，每个重用块只需要几个额外的可训练参数。我们在公共 AISHELL-1 语料库上对所提出的方法进行了实验，结果表明，在不使用 ADM 的情况下，所提出的方法仅用 7.6M/8.3M 的参数分别实现了 9.3%/6.63% 的字符错误率（CER）。此外，我们还进行了更深入的分析来展示ADM在通用块重用方法中的效果。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的块重用与适配器模块的轻量级语音识别模型，以解决端到端自动语音识别（ASR）在边缘设备上的参数冗余问题。 Haoyu Tang,Zhaoyi Liu,Chang Zeng,Xinfeng Li cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Sizhe An,Hongyi Xu,Yichun Shi,Guoxian Song,Umit Ogras,Linjie Luo
title: PanoHead: Geometry-Aware 3D Full-Head Synthesis in 360$^{\circ}$
title_zh: PanoHead：360 度几何感知 3D 全头合成$^{\circ}$
abstract: Synthesis and reconstruction of 3D human head has gained increasing interests in computer vision and computer graphics recently. Existing state-of-the-art 3D generative adversarial networks (GANs) for 3D human head synthesis are either limited to near-frontal views or hard to preserve 3D consistency in large view angles. We propose PanoHead, the first 3D-aware generative model that enables high-quality view-consistent image synthesis of full heads in $360^\circ$ with diverse appearance and detailed geometry using only in-the-wild unstructured images for training. At its core, we lift up the representation power of recent 3D GANs and bridge the data alignment gap when training from in-the-wild images with widely distributed views. Specifically, we propose a novel two-stage self-adaptive image alignment for robust 3D GAN training. We further introduce a tri-grid neural volume representation that effectively addresses front-face and back-head feature entanglement rooted in the widely-adopted tri-plane formulation. Our method instills prior knowledge of 2D image segmentation in adversarial learning of 3D neural scene structures, enabling compositable head synthesis in diverse backgrounds. Benefiting from these designs, our method significantly outperforms previous 3D GANs, generating high-quality 3D heads with accurate geometry and diverse appearances, even with long wavy and afro hairstyles, renderable from arbitrary poses. Furthermore, we show that our system can reconstruct full 3D heads from single input images for personalized realistic 3D avatars.
summary: Synthesis and reconstruction of 3D human head has gained increasing interests in computer vision and computer graphics recently. Existing state-of-the-art 3D generative adversarial networks (GANs) for 3D human head synthesis are either limited to near-frontal views or hard to preserve 3D consistency in large view angles. We propose PanoHead, the first 3D-aware generative model that enables high-quality view-consistent image synthesis of full heads in $360^\circ$ with diverse appearance and detailed geometry using only in-the-wild unstructured images for training. At its core, we lift up the representation power of recent 3D GANs and bridge the data alignment gap when training from in-the-wild images with widely distributed views. Specifically, we propose a novel two-stage self-adaptive image alignment for robust 3D GAN training. We further introduce a tri-grid neural volume representation that effectively addresses front-face and back-head feature entanglement rooted in the widely-adopted tri-plane formulation. Our method instills prior knowledge of 2D image segmentation in adversarial learning of 3D neural scene structures, enabling compositable head synthesis in diverse backgrounds. Benefiting from these designs, our method significantly outperforms previous 3D GANs, generating high-quality 3D heads with accurate geometry and diverse appearances, even with long wavy and afro hairstyles, renderable from arbitrary poses. Furthermore, we show that our system can reconstruct full 3D heads from single input images for personalized realistic 3D avatars.
abstract_zh: 近年来，3D 人体头部的合成和重建在计算机视觉和计算机图形学领域引起了越来越多的兴趣。现有最先进的用于 3D 人体头部合成的 3D 生成对抗网络 (GAN) 要么仅限于近正面视图，要么难以在大视角下保持 3D 一致性。我们提出了 PanoHead，这是第一个 3D 感知生成模型，能够仅使用野外非结构化图像进行训练，以 360 美元的价格合成具有不同外观和详细几何形状的高质量视图一致的全头图像。其核心是，我们提升了最新 3D GAN 的表示能力，并在从具有广泛分布视图的野外图像进行训练时弥合了数据对齐差距。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段自适应图像对齐，用于稳健的 3D GAN 训练。我们进一步引入了一种三网格神经体积表示，它有效地解决了广泛采用的三平面公式中的正面和背面特征纠缠。我们的方法将 2D 图像分割的先验知识灌输到 3D 神经场景结构的对抗性学习中，从而实现不同背景下的可合成头部合成。受益于这些设计，我们的方法显着优于以前的 3D GAN，生成具有精确几何形状和多样化外观的高质量 3D 头部，即使是长波浪和非洲发型，也可以从任意姿势渲染。此外，我们还表明，我们的系统可以从单个输入图像重建完整的 3D 头部，以实现个性化的逼真 3D 化身。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PanoHead，一种基于几何感知的3D全景人头合成方法，能够从任意视角生成高质量且视图一致的360°全头模型。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成对抗网络（GAN）在合成3D人头时受限于近正面视角或难以保持大视角下的3D一致性，且难以利用无结构的真实图像进行训练。
AI.method: 提出两阶段自适应图像对齐方法以增强3D GAN训练鲁棒性，并引入三网格神经体素表示解决三平面结构的前后特征纠缠问题，结合2D图像分割先验知识实现背景可组合的合成。
AI.result: 在复杂发型（如卷发、阿弗罗发型）和多样背景中生成几何精确且视图一致的高质量3D人头，可从单张图像重建个性化3D虚拟角色。
AI.conclusion: PanoHead是首个实现360°视图一致且几何精确的3D全头生成与重建的模型，推动了真实感3D人头生成技术的发展。

search_text: PanoHead: Geometry-Aware 3D Full-Head Synthesis in 360$^{\circ}$ PanoHead：360 度几何感知 3D 全头合成$^{\circ}$ Synthesis and reconstruction of 3D human head has gained increasing interests in computer vision and computer graphics recently. Existing state-of-the-art 3D generative adversarial networks (GANs) for 3D human head synthesis are either limited to near-frontal views or hard to preserve 3D consistency in large view angles. We propose PanoHead, the first 3D-aware generative model that enables high-quality view-consistent image synthesis of full heads in $360^\circ$ with diverse appearance and detailed geometry using only in-the-wild unstructured images for training. At its core, we lift up the representation power of recent 3D GANs and bridge the data alignment gap when training from in-the-wild images with widely distributed views. Specifically, we propose a novel two-stage self-adaptive image alignment for robust 3D GAN training. We further introduce a tri-grid neural volume representation that effectively addresses front-face and back-head feature entanglement rooted in the widely-adopted tri-plane formulation. Our method instills prior knowledge of 2D image segmentation in adversarial learning of 3D neural scene structures, enabling compositable head synthesis in diverse backgrounds. Benefiting from these designs, our method significantly outperforms previous 3D GANs, generating high-quality 3D heads with accurate geometry and diverse appearances, even with long wavy and afro hairstyles, renderable from arbitrary poses. Furthermore, we show that our system can reconstruct full 3D heads from single input images for personalized realistic 3D avatars. 近年来，3D 人体头部的合成和重建在计算机视觉和计算机图形学领域引起了越来越多的兴趣。现有最先进的用于 3D 人体头部合成的 3D 生成对抗网络 (GAN) 要么仅限于近正面视图，要么难以在大视角下保持 3D 一致性。我们提出了 PanoHead，这是第一个 3D 感知生成模型，能够仅使用野外非结构化图像进行训练，以 360 美元的价格合成具有不同外观和详细几何形状的高质量视图一致的全头图像。其核心是，我们提升了最新 3D GAN 的表示能力，并在从具有广泛分布视图的野外图像进行训练时弥合了数据对齐差距。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段自适应图像对齐，用于稳健的 3D GAN 训练。我们进一步引入了一种三网格神经体积表示，它有效地解决了广泛采用的三平面公式中的正面和背面特征纠缠。我们的方法将 2D 图像分割的先验知识灌输到 3D 神经场景结构的对抗性学习中，从而实现不同背景下的可合成头部合成。受益于这些设计，我们的方法显着优于以前的 3D GAN，生成具有精确几何形状和多样化外观的高质量 3D 头部，即使是长波浪和非洲发型，也可以从任意姿势渲染。此外，我们还表明，我们的系统可以从单个输入图像重建完整的 3D 头部，以实现个性化的逼真 3D 化身。 本文提出PanoHead，一种基于几何感知的3D全景人头合成方法，能够从任意视角生成高质量且视图一致的360°全头模型。 Sizhe An,Hongyi Xu,Yichun Shi,Guoxian Song,Umit Ogras,Linjie Luo cs.CV

authors_text: Du Chen,Jie Liang,Xindong Zhang,Ming Liu,Hui Zeng,Lei Zhang
title: Human Guided Ground-truth Generation for Realistic Image Super-resolution
title_zh: 人类引导的真实图像超分辨率生成
comment: 10 pages. Already accpted by 2023 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
comments: 10 pages. Already accpted by 2023 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
abstract: How to generate the ground-truth (GT) image is a critical issue for training realistic image super-resolution (Real-ISR) models. Existing methods mostly take a set of high-resolution (HR) images as GTs and apply various degradations to simulate their low-resolution (LR) counterparts. Though great progress has been achieved, such an LR-HR pair generation scheme has several limitations. First, the perceptual quality of HR images may not be high enough, limiting the quality of Real-ISR outputs. Second, existing schemes do not consider much human perception in GT generation, and the trained models tend to produce over-smoothed results or unpleasant artifacts. With the above considerations, we propose a human guided GT generation scheme. We first elaborately train multiple image enhancement models to improve the perceptual quality of HR images, and enable one LR image having multiple HR counterparts. Human subjects are then involved to annotate the high quality regions among the enhanced HR images as GTs, and label the regions with unpleasant artifacts as negative samples. A human guided GT image dataset with both positive and negative samples is then constructed, and a loss function is proposed to train the Real-ISR models. Experiments show that the Real-ISR models trained on our dataset can produce perceptually more realistic results with less artifacts. Dataset and codes can be found at https://github.com/ChrisDud0257/HGGT
summary: How to generate the ground-truth (GT) image is a critical issue for training realistic image super-resolution (Real-ISR) models. Existing methods mostly take a set of high-resolution (HR) images as GTs and apply various degradations to simulate their low-resolution (LR) counterparts. Though great progress has been achieved, such an LR-HR pair generation scheme has several limitations. First, the perceptual quality of HR images may not be high enough, limiting the quality of Real-ISR outputs. Second, existing schemes do not consider much human perception in GT generation, and the trained models tend to produce over-smoothed results or unpleasant artifacts. With the above considerations, we propose a human guided GT generation scheme. We first elaborately train multiple image enhancement models to improve the perceptual quality of HR images, and enable one LR image having multiple HR counterparts. Human subjects are then involved to annotate the high quality regions among the enhanced HR images as GTs, and label the regions with unpleasant artifacts as negative samples. A human guided GT image dataset with both positive and negative samples is then constructed, and a loss function is proposed to train the Real-ISR models. Experiments show that the Real-ISR models trained on our dataset can produce perceptually more realistic results with less artifacts. Dataset and codes can be found at https://github.com/ChrisDud0257/HGGT
abstract_zh: 如何生成真实图像（GT）是训练真实图像超分辨率（Real-ISR）模型的关键问题。现有方法大多采用一组高分辨率（HR）图像作为 GT，并应用各种降级来模拟其低分辨率（LR）对应图像。尽管已经取得了很大进展，但这种 LR-HR 对生成方案仍存在一些局限性。首先，HR 图像的感知质量可能不够高，限制了 Real-ISR 输出的质量。其次，现有方案在 GT 生成中没有考虑太多人类感知，并且训练后的模型往往会产生过度平滑的结果或令人不快的伪影。出于上述考虑，我们提出了人类引导的GT生成方案。我们首先精心训练多个图像增强模型来提高 HR 图像的感知质量，并使一张 LR 图像具有多个 HR 对应图像。然后，人类受试者将增强的 HR 图像中的高质量区域注释为 GT，并将具有令人不快的伪影的区域标记为负样本。然后构建具有正样本和负样本的人工引导 GT 图像数据集，并提出损失函数来训练 Real-ISR 模型。实验表明，在我们的数据集上训练的 Real-ISR 模型可以产生感知上更真实的结果，并且伪影更少。数据集和代码可以在https://github.com/ChrisDud0257/HGGT找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种由人类指导的地面真实图像生成方法，用于提升真实图像超分辨率模型的训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的高分辨率图像感知质量不足，且未充分考虑人类感知，导致模型输出过度平滑或出现不愉快的伪影。
AI.method: 训练多个人工智能增强模型提升HR图像质量，通过人类标注高质量区域作为正样本及标注伪影区域作为负样本，构建包含正负样本的数据集，并设计损失函数训练模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用该数据集训练的模型能生成更真实且伪影更少的超分辨率图像。
AI.conclusion: 人类指导的地面真实图像生成方法能有效提升真实图像超分辨率模型的感知质量与细节还原能力。

Existing methods mostly take a set of high-resolution (HR) images as GTs and apply various degradations to simulate their low-resolution (LR) counterparts. Though great progress has been achieved, such an LR-HR pair generation scheme has several limitations. First, the perceptual quality of HR images may not be high enough, limiting the quality of Real-ISR outputs. Second, existing schemes do not consider much human perception in GT generation, and the trained models tend to produce over-smoothed results or unpleasant artifacts. With the above considerations, we propose a human guided GT generation scheme. We first elaborately train multiple image enhancement models to improve the perceptual quality of HR images, and enable one LR image having multiple HR counterparts. Human subjects are then involved to annotate the high quality regions among the enhanced HR images as GTs, and label the regions with unpleasant artifacts as negative samples. A human guided GT image dataset with both positive and negative samples is then constructed, and a loss function is proposed to train the Real-ISR models. Experiments show that the Real-ISR models trained on our dataset can produce perceptually more realistic results with less artifacts. authors_text: Wuyang Luo,Su Yang,Xinjian Zhang,Weishan Zhang
title: SIEDOB: Semantic Image Editing by Disentangling Object and Background
title_zh: SIEDOB：通过解开对象和背景进行语义图像编辑
abstract: Semantic image editing provides users with a flexible tool to modify a given image guided by a corresponding segmentation map. In this task, the features of the foreground objects and the backgrounds are quite different. However, all previous methods handle backgrounds and objects as a whole using a monolithic model. Consequently, they remain limited in processing content-rich images and suffer from generating unrealistic objects and texture-inconsistent backgrounds. To address this issue, we propose a novel paradigm, \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{I}mage \textbf{E}diting by \textbf{D}isentangling \textbf{O}bject and \textbf{B}ackground (\textbf{SIEDOB}), the core idea of which is to explicitly leverages several heterogeneous subnetworks for objects and backgrounds. First, SIEDOB disassembles the edited input into background regions and instance-level objects. Then, we feed them into the dedicated generators. Finally, all synthesized parts are embedded in their original locations and utilize a fusion network to obtain a harmonized result. Moreover, to produce high-quality edited images, we propose some innovative designs, including Semantic-Aware Self-Propagation Module, Boundary-Anchored Patch Discriminator, and Style-Diversity Object Generator, and integrate them into SIEDOB. We conduct extensive experiments on Cityscapes and ADE20K-Room datasets and exhibit that our method remarkably outperforms the baselines, especially in synthesizing realistic and diverse objects and texture-consistent backgrounds.
summary: Semantic image editing provides users with a flexible tool to modify a given image guided by a corresponding segmentation map. In this task, the features of the foreground objects and the backgrounds are quite different. However, all previous methods handle backgrounds and objects as a whole using a monolithic model. Consequently, they remain limited in processing content-rich images and suffer from generating unrealistic objects and texture-inconsistent backgrounds. To address this issue, we propose a novel paradigm, \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{I}mage \textbf{E}diting by \textbf{D}isentangling \textbf{O}bject and \textbf{B}ackground (\textbf{SIEDOB}), the core idea of which is to explicitly leverages several heterogeneous subnetworks for objects and backgrounds. First, SIEDOB disassembles the edited input into background regions and instance-level objects. Then, we feed them into the dedicated generators. Finally, all synthesized parts are embedded in their original locations and utilize a fusion network to obtain a harmonized result. Moreover, to produce high-quality edited images, we propose some innovative designs, including Semantic-Aware Self-Propagation Module, Boundary-Anchored Patch Discriminator, and Style-Diversity Object Generator, and integrate them into SIEDOB. We conduct extensive experiments on Cityscapes and ADE20K-Room datasets and exhibit that our method remarkably outperforms the baselines, especially in synthesizing realistic and diverse objects and texture-consistent backgrounds.
abstract_zh: 语义图像编辑为用户提供了一种灵活的工具，可以在相应的分割图的指导下修改给定的图像。在这个任务中，前景物体和背景的特征有很大不同。然而，以前的所有方法都使用整体模型将背景和对象作为一个整体来处理。因此，它们在处理内容丰富的图像方面仍然受到限制，并且会产生不切实际的对象和纹理不一致的背景。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的范式，即 \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{I}mage \textbf{E}diting by \textbf{D}isentangling \textbf{O}bject 和 \textbf{B}background (\textbf{SIEDOB})，其核心思想是明确利用对象和背景的多个异构子网络。首先，SIEDOB 将编辑后的输入分解为背景区域和实例级对象。然后，我们将它们输入专用发电机中。最后，所有合成部件都嵌入到其原始位置，并利用融合网络获得协调的结果。此外，为了产生高质量的编辑图像，我们提出了一些创新设计，包括语义感知自传播模块、边界锚定补丁鉴别器和风格多样性对象生成器，并将它们集成到SIEDOB中。我们对 Cityscapes 和 ADE20K-Room 数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明我们的方法明显优于基线，特别是在合成真实且多样化的对象和纹理一致的背景方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的语义图像编辑方法SIEDOB，通过分离对象和背景来提升编辑效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理内容丰富的图像时，难以生成真实且纹理一致的对象和背景，因此需要一种新的方法来分别处理对象和背景。
AI.method: SIEDOB通过分离输入图像中的背景区域和实例级对象，并分别送入专用生成器，最后利用融合网络生成和谐的结果。还引入了语义感知自传播模块、边界锚定补丁判别器和风格多样性对象生成器。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和ADE20K-Room数据集上进行了大量实验，结果表明该方法在生成真实且多样化的对象和纹理一致的背景方面显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SIEDOB通过分离对象和背景并使用专用生成器，有效提升了语义图像编辑的质量和多样性。
