search_text: SIEDOB: Semantic Image Editing by Disentangling Object and Background SIEDOB：通过解开对象和背景进行语义图像编辑 Semantic image editing provides users with a flexible tool to modify a given image guided by a corresponding segmentation map. In this task, the features of the foreground objects and the backgrounds are quite different. However, all previous methods handle backgrounds and objects as a whole using a monolithic model. Consequently, they remain limited in processing content-rich images and suffer from generating unrealistic objects and texture-inconsistent backgrounds. To address this issue, we propose a novel paradigm, \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{I}mage \textbf{E}diting by \textbf{D}isentangling \textbf{O}bject and \textbf{B}ackground (\textbf{SIEDOB}), the core idea of which is to explicitly leverages several heterogeneous subnetworks for objects and backgrounds. First, SIEDOB disassembles the edited input into background regions and instance-level objects. Then, we feed them into the dedicated generators. Finally, all synthesized parts are embedded in their original locations and utilize a fusion network to obtain a harmonized result. Moreover, to produce high-quality edited images, we propose some innovative designs, including Semantic-Aware Self-Propagation Module, Boundary-Anchored Patch Discriminator, and Style-Diversity Object Generator, and integrate them into SIEDOB. We conduct extensive experiments on Cityscapes and ADE20K-Room datasets and exhibit that our method remarkably outperforms the baselines, especially in synthesizing realistic and diverse objects and texture-consistent backgrounds. 语义图像编辑为用户提供了一种灵活的工具，可以在相应的分割图的指导下修改给定的图像。在这个任务中，前景物体和背景的特征有很大不同。然而，以前的所有方法都使用整体模型将背景和对象作为一个整体来处理。因此，它们在处理内容丰富的图像方面仍然受到限制，并且会产生不切实际的对象和纹理不一致的背景。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的范式，即 \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{I}mage \textbf{E}diting by \textbf{D}isentangling \textbf{O}bject 和 \textbf{B}background (\textbf{SIEDOB})，其核心思想是明确利用对象和背景的多个异构子网络。首先，SIEDOB 将编辑后的输入分解为背景区域和实例级对象。然后，我们将它们输入专用发电机中。最后，所有合成部件都嵌入到其原始位置，并利用融合网络获得协调的结果。此外，为了产生高质量的编辑图像，我们提出了一些创新设计，包括语义感知自传播模块、边界锚定补丁鉴别器和风格多样性对象生成器，并将它们集成到SIEDOB中。我们对 Cityscapes 和 ADE20K-Room 数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明我们的方法明显优于基线，特别是在合成真实且多样化的对象和纹理一致的背景方面。 本文提出了一种新的语义图像编辑方法SIEDOB，通过分离对象和背景来提升编辑效果。 Wuyang Luo,Su Yang,Xinjian Zhang,Weishan Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Zixiao Wang,Yunheng Shen,Wenqian Zhao,Yang Bai,Guojin Chen,Farzan Farnia,Bei Yu
title: DiffPattern: Layout Pattern Generation via Discrete Diffusion
title_zh: DiffPattern：通过离散扩散生成布局模式
abstract: Deep generative models dominate the existing literature in layout pattern generation. However, leaving the guarantee of legality to an inexplicable neural network could be problematic in several applications. In this paper, we propose \tool{DiffPattern} to generate reliable layout patterns. \tool{DiffPattern} introduces a novel diverse topology generation method via a discrete diffusion model with compute-efficiently lossless layout pattern representation. Then a white-box pattern assessment is utilized to generate legal patterns given desired design rules. Our experiments on several benchmark settings show that \tool{DiffPattern} significantly outperforms existing baselines and is capable of synthesizing reliable layout patterns.
summary: Deep generative models dominate the existing literature in layout pattern generation. However, leaving the guarantee of legality to an inexplicable neural network could be problematic in several applications. In this paper, we propose \tool{DiffPattern} to generate reliable layout patterns. \tool{DiffPattern} introduces a novel diverse topology generation method via a discrete diffusion model with compute-efficiently lossless layout pattern representation. Then a white-box pattern assessment is utilized to generate legal patterns given desired design rules. Our experiments on several benchmark settings show that \tool{DiffPattern} significantly outperforms existing baselines and is capable of synthesizing reliable layout patterns.
abstract_zh: 深度生成模型在布局模式生成的现有文献中占主导地位。然而，将合法性的保证留给难以解释的神经网络在一些应用中可能会出现问题。在本文中，我们提出 \tool{DiffPattern} 来生成可靠的布局模式。 \tool{DiffPattern} 通过具有计算高效无损布局模式表示的离散扩散模型引入了一种新颖的多样化拓扑生成方法。然后，根据所需的设计规则，利用白盒模式评估来生成合法模式。我们对多个基准设置的实验表明 \tool{DiffPattern} 显着优于现有基线，并且能够合成可靠的布局模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffPattern，一种基于离散扩散模型的布局模式生成方法，旨在生成符合设计规则的可靠布局。
AI.motivation: 现有深度生成模型生成的布局模式依赖不可解释的神经网络，无法保证合法性，可能在实际应用中存在风险。
AI.method: 通过离散扩散模型实现高效无损布局表示，并结合白盒模式评估方法，根据设计规则生成合法布局模式。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，DiffPattern显著优于现有基线方法，能够合成可靠的布局模式。
AI.conclusion: DiffPattern通过离散扩散与白盒评估结合，有效解决了布局模式生成中的合法性问题，为实际应用提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Subtain Malik,Muhammad Tariq Saeed,Marya Jabeen Zia,Shahzad Rasool,Liaquat Ali Khan,Mian Ilyas Ahmed
title: Reimagining Application User Interface (UI) Design using Deep Learning Methods: Challenges and Opportunities
title_zh: 使用深度学习方法重新构想应用程序用户界面 (UI) 设计：挑战和机遇
comment: A review paper on studies of UI design techniques and deep learning
comments: A review paper on studies of UI design techniques and deep learning
abstract: In this paper, we present a review of the recent work in deep learning methods for user interface design. The survey encompasses well known deep learning techniques (deep neural networks, convolutional neural networks, recurrent neural networks, autoencoders, and generative adversarial networks) and datasets widely used to design user interface applications. We highlight important problems and emerging research frontiers in this field. We believe that the use of deep learning for user interface design automation tasks could be one of the high potential fields for the advancement of the software development industry.
summary: In this paper, we present a review of the recent work in deep learning methods for user interface design. The survey encompasses well known deep learning techniques (deep neural networks, convolutional neural networks, recurrent neural networks, autoencoders, and generative adversarial networks) and datasets widely used to design user interface applications. We highlight important problems and emerging research frontiers in this field. We believe that the use of deep learning for user interface design automation tasks could be one of the high potential fields for the advancement of the software development industry.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们回顾了用户界面设计深度学习方法的最新工作。该调查涵盖了众所周知的深度学习技术（深度神经网络、卷积神经网络、循环神经网络、自动编码器和生成对抗网络）和广泛用于设计用户界面应用程序的数据集。我们强调该领域的重要问题和新兴研究前沿。我们相信，将深度学习用于用户界面设计自动化任务可能是软件开发行业进步的高潜力领域之一。

AI.tldr: 综述深度学习方法在用户界面设计中的应用，探讨其挑战与机遇
AI.motivation: 推动软件开发行业进步，通过深度学习实现UI设计自动化
AI.method: 通过文献综述，分析多种深度学习技术（如CNN、GAN等）及常用数据集在UI设计中的应用
AI.result: 总结了深度学习在UI设计中的关键问题和新兴研究方向
AI.conclusion: 深度学习有望成为UI设计自动化的重要工具，推动软件开发行业发展

authors_text: Shengyang Sun,Xiaojin Gong
title: Hierarchical Semantic Contrast for Scene-aware Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于场景感知视频异常检测的分层语义对比
abstract: Increasing scene-awareness is a key challenge in video anomaly detection (VAD). In this work, we propose a hierarchical semantic contrast (HSC) method to learn a scene-aware VAD model from normal videos. We first incorporate foreground object and background scene features with high-level semantics by taking advantage of pre-trained video parsing models. Then, building upon the autoencoder-based reconstruction framework, we introduce both scene-level and object-level contrastive learning to enforce the encoded latent features to be compact within the same semantic classes while being separable across different classes. This hierarchical semantic contrast strategy helps to deal with the diversity of normal patterns and also increases their discrimination ability. Moreover, for the sake of tackling rare normal activities, we design a skeleton-based motion augmentation to increase samples and refine the model further. Extensive experiments on three public datasets and scene-dependent mixture datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Increasing scene-awareness is a key challenge in video anomaly detection (VAD). In this work, we propose a hierarchical semantic contrast (HSC) method to learn a scene-aware VAD model from normal videos. We first incorporate foreground object and background scene features with high-level semantics by taking advantage of pre-trained video parsing models. Then, building upon the autoencoder-based reconstruction framework, we introduce both scene-level and object-level contrastive learning to enforce the encoded latent features to be compact within the same semantic classes while being separable across different classes. This hierarchical semantic contrast strategy helps to deal with the diversity of normal patterns and also increases their discrimination ability. Moreover, for the sake of tackling rare normal activities, we design a skeleton-based motion augmentation to increase samples and refine the model further. Extensive experiments on three public datasets and scene-dependent mixture datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 增强场景感知是视频异常检测 (VAD) 的一个关键挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种分层语义对比（HSC）方法来从普通视频中学习场景感知的 VAD 模型。我们首先利用预先训练的视频解析模型将前景对象和背景场景特征与高级语义结合起来。然后，在基于自动编码器的重建框架的基础上，我们引入了场景级和对象级对比学习，以强制编码的潜在特征在相同语义类中紧凑，同时在不同类之间可分离。这种分层语义对比策略有助于处理正常模式的多样性，也提高了它们的辨别能力。此外，为了解决罕见的正常活动，我们设计了一种基于骨架的运动增强来增加样本并进一步细化模型。对三个公共数据集和场景相关混合数据集的广泛实验验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层语义对比方法（HSC），通过结合前景物体与背景场景的高层语义特征，提升视频异常检测的场景感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频异常检测方法难以有效捕捉场景多样性及罕见正常行为，需通过增强模型对场景语义的理解来提升检测性能。
AI.method: 利用预训练视频解析模型提取前景与背景特征，基于自编码框架引入场景级和物体级对比学习，并设计骨骼运动增强技术以扩充罕见正常行为样本。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集及场景依赖混合数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性，显著优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 分层语义对比策略有效提升了模型对正常模式多样性的适应性及异常行为的判别能力，为场景感知视频异常检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Hierarchical Semantic Contrast for Scene-aware Video Anomaly Detection 用于场景感知视频异常检测的分层语义对比 Increasing scene-awareness is a key challenge in video anomaly detection (VAD). In this work, we propose a hierarchical semantic contrast (HSC) method to learn a scene-aware VAD model from normal videos. We first incorporate foreground object and background scene features with high-level semantics by taking advantage of pre-trained video parsing models. Then, building upon the autoencoder-based reconstruction framework, we introduce both scene-level and object-level contrastive learning to enforce the encoded latent features to be compact within the same semantic classes while being separable across different classes. This hierarchical semantic contrast strategy helps to deal with the diversity of normal patterns and also increases their discrimination ability. Moreover, for the sake of tackling rare normal activities, we design a skeleton-based motion augmentation to increase samples and refine the model further. Extensive experiments on three public datasets and scene-dependent mixture datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed method. 增强场景感知是视频异常检测 (VAD) 的一个关键挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种分层语义对比（HSC）方法来从普通视频中学习场景感知的 VAD 模型。我们首先利用预先训练的视频解析模型将前景对象和背景场景特征与高级语义结合起来。然后，在基于自动编码器的重建框架的基础上，我们引入了场景级和对象级对比学习，以强制编码的潜在特征在相同语义类中紧凑，同时在不同类之间可分离。这种分层语义对比策略有助于处理正常模式的多样性，也提高了它们的辨别能力。此外，为了解决罕见的正常活动，我们设计了一种基于骨架的运动增强来增加样本并进一步细化模型。对三个公共数据集和场景相关混合数据集的广泛实验验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种分层语义对比方法（HSC），通过结合前景物体与背景场景的高层语义特征，提升视频异常检测的场景感知能力。 Shengyang Sun,Xiaojin Gong cs.CV

authors_text: Baifeng Shi,Trevor Darrell,Xin Wang
title: Top-Down Visual Attention from Analysis by Synthesis
title_zh: 综合分析的自上而下的视觉注意力
abstract: Current attention algorithms (e.g., self-attention) are stimulus-driven and highlight all the salient objects in an image. However, intelligent agents like humans often guide their attention based on the high-level task at hand, focusing only on task-related objects. This ability of task-guided top-down attention provides task-adaptive representation and helps the model generalize to various tasks. In this paper, we consider top-down attention from a classic Analysis-by-Synthesis (AbS) perspective of vision. Prior work indicates a functional equivalence between visual attention and sparse reconstruction; we show that an AbS visual system that optimizes a similar sparse reconstruction objective modulated by a goal-directed top-down signal naturally simulates top-down attention. We further propose Analysis-by-Synthesis Vision Transformer (AbSViT), which is a top-down modulated ViT model that variationally approximates AbS, and achieves controllable top-down attention. For real-world applications, AbSViT consistently improves over baselines on Vision-Language tasks such as VQA and zero-shot retrieval where language guides the top-down attention. AbSViT can also serve as a general backbone, improving performance on classification, semantic segmentation, and model robustness.
summary: Current attention algorithms (e.g., self-attention) are stimulus-driven and highlight all the salient objects in an image. However, intelligent agents like humans often guide their attention based on the high-level task at hand, focusing only on task-related objects. This ability of task-guided top-down attention provides task-adaptive representation and helps the model generalize to various tasks. In this paper, we consider top-down attention from a classic Analysis-by-Synthesis (AbS) perspective of vision. Prior work indicates a functional equivalence between visual attention and sparse reconstruction; we show that an AbS visual system that optimizes a similar sparse reconstruction objective modulated by a goal-directed top-down signal naturally simulates top-down attention. We further propose Analysis-by-Synthesis Vision Transformer (AbSViT), which is a top-down modulated ViT model that variationally approximates AbS, and achieves controllable top-down attention. For real-world applications, AbSViT consistently improves over baselines on Vision-Language tasks such as VQA and zero-shot retrieval where language guides the top-down attention. AbSViT can also serve as a general backbone, improving performance on classification, semantic segmentation, and model robustness.
abstract_zh: 当前的注意力算法（例如自注意力）是刺激驱动的，并突出显示图像中的所有显着对象。然而，像人类这样的智能代理通常会根据手头的高级任务来引导他们的注意力，只关注与任务相关的对象。这种任务引导的自上而下注意力的能力提供了任务自适应表示，并帮助模型泛化到各种任务。在本文中，我们从经典的综合分析（AbS）视觉角度考虑自上而下的注意力。先前的工作表明视觉注意力和稀疏重建之间在功能上是等价的；我们展示了一个 AbS 视觉系统，它优化了由目标导向的自上而下信号调制的类似稀疏重建目标，自然地模拟了自上而下的注意力。我们进一步提出综合分析视觉变换器（AbSViT），它是一种自上而下的调制 ViT 模型，可以变分逼近 AbS，并实现可控的自上而下的注意力。对于现实世界的应用程序，AbSViT 持续改进视觉语言任务的基线，例如 VQA 和零样本检索，其中语言引导自上而下的注意力。 AbSViT 还可以作为通用主干，提高分类、语义分割和模型鲁棒性的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分析与合成（AbS）视角的自上而下视觉注意力机制，通过构建Analysis-by-Synthesis Vision Transformer（AbSViT）模型实现任务引导的注意力控制。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力算法（如自注意力）仅关注图像中的显著物体，缺乏人类智能体根据任务目标引导注意力的能力，导致模型难以适应复杂任务需求。
AI.method: 从视觉分析与合成理论出发，将稀疏重建目标与任务驱动的自上而下信号结合，提出变分近似AbS的AbSViT模型，通过Transformer架构实现可控的自上而下注意力机制。
AI.result: 在视觉-语言任务（如VQA、零样本检索）及分类、语义分割等任务中均优于基线模型，显著提升模型鲁棒性与任务适应性。
AI.conclusion: AbSViT通过模拟人类任务引导的注意力机制，为视觉模型提供了更灵活的表示学习方式，在多任务场景中展现出广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Han-Cheol Cho,Won Young Jhoo,Wooyoung Kang,Byungseok Roh
title: Open-Vocabulary Object Detection using Pseudo Caption Labels
title_zh: 使用伪标题标签的开放词汇对象检测
abstract: Recent open-vocabulary detection methods aim to detect novel objects by distilling knowledge from vision-language models (VLMs) trained on a vast amount of image-text pairs. To improve the effectiveness of these methods, researchers have utilized datasets with a large vocabulary that contains a large number of object classes, under the assumption that such data will enable models to extract comprehensive knowledge on the relationships between various objects and better generalize to unseen object classes. In this study, we argue that more fine-grained labels are necessary to extract richer knowledge about novel objects, including object attributes and relationships, in addition to their names. To address this challenge, we propose a simple and effective method named Pseudo Caption Labeling (PCL), which utilizes an image captioning model to generate captions that describe object instances from diverse perspectives. The resulting pseudo caption labels offer dense samples for knowledge distillation. On the LVIS benchmark, our best model trained on the de-duplicated VisualGenome dataset achieves an AP of 34.5 and an APr of 30.6, comparable to the state-of-the-art performance. PCL's simplicity and flexibility are other notable features, as it is a straightforward pre-processing technique that can be used with any image captioning model without imposing any restrictions on model architecture or training process.
summary: Recent open-vocabulary detection methods aim to detect novel objects by distilling knowledge from vision-language models (VLMs) trained on a vast amount of image-text pairs. To improve the effectiveness of these methods, researchers have utilized datasets with a large vocabulary that contains a large number of object classes, under the assumption that such data will enable models to extract comprehensive knowledge on the relationships between various objects and better generalize to unseen object classes. In this study, we argue that more fine-grained labels are necessary to extract richer knowledge about novel objects, including object attributes and relationships, in addition to their names. To address this challenge, we propose a simple and effective method named Pseudo Caption Labeling (PCL), which utilizes an image captioning model to generate captions that describe object instances from diverse perspectives. The resulting pseudo caption labels offer dense samples for knowledge distillation. On the LVIS benchmark, our best model trained on the de-duplicated VisualGenome dataset achieves an AP of 34.5 and an APr of 30.6, comparable to the state-of-the-art performance. PCL's simplicity and flexibility are other notable features, as it is a straightforward pre-processing technique that can be used with any image captioning model without imposing any restrictions on model architecture or training process.
abstract_zh: 最近的开放词汇检测方法旨在通过从经过大量图像文本对训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）中提取知识来检测新物体。为了提高这些方法的有效性，研究人员利用了包含大量对象类别的大词汇量数据集，假设这些数据将使模型能够提取有关各种对象之间关系的全面知识，并更好地推广到未见过的对象类别。在本研究中，我们认为需要更细粒度的标签来提取有关新对象的更丰富的知识，除了名称之外，还包括对象属性和关系。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种简单有效的方法，称为伪标题标签（PCL），它利用图像标题模型来生成从不同角度描述对象实例的标题。由此产生的伪标题标签为知识蒸馏提供了密集的样本。在 LVIS 基准上，我们在去重 VisualGenome 数据集上训练的最佳模型达到了 34.5 的 AP 和 30.6 的 APr，与最先进的性能相当。 PCL 的简单性和灵活性是其他显着特征，因为它是一种简单的预处理技术，可以与任何图像字幕模型一起使用，而不会对模型架构或训练过程施加任何限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为伪字幕标签（PCL）的方法，通过生成多视角的物体实例描述，提升开放词汇物体检测的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇检测方法依赖大规模词汇数据，但缺乏对物体属性及关系的细粒度标签，限制了模型对新类别物体的泛化能力。
AI.method: 利用图像字幕模型生成物体实例的多视角描述作为伪字幕标签，通过知识蒸馏提取更丰富的物体信息，该方法无需修改模型结构或训练流程。
AI.result: 在LVIS基准测试中，基于去重后的VisualGenome数据集训练的最佳模型达到34.5的AP和30.6的APr，性能与最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: PCL方法凭借其简单性和灵活性，为开放词汇检测提供了有效的预处理方案，且兼容任意图像字幕模型。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为伪字幕标签（PCL）的方法，通过生成多视角的物体实例描述，提升开放词汇物体检测的效果。
ai_content.motivation: 现有开放词汇检测方法依赖大规模词汇数据，但缺乏对物体属性及关系的细粒度标签，限制了模型对新类别物体的泛化能力。
ai_content.method: 利用图像字幕模型生成物体实例的多视角描述作为伪字幕标签，通过知识蒸馏提取更丰富的物体信息，该方法无需修改模型结构或训练流程。
ai_content.result: 在LVIS基准测试中，基于去重后的VisualGenome数据集训练的最佳模型达到34.5的AP和30.6的APr，性能与最先进方法相当。
ai_content.conclusion: PCL方法凭借其简单性和灵活性，为开放词汇检测提供了有效的预处理方案，且兼容任意图像字幕模型。

method: 利用图像字幕模型生成物体实例的多视角描述作为伪字幕标签，通过知识蒸馏提取更丰富的物体信息，该方法无需修改模型结构或训练流程。
result: 在LVIS基准测试中，基于去重后的VisualGenome数据集训练的最佳模型达到34.5的AP和30.6的APr，性能与最先进方法相当。
conclusion: PCL方法凭借其简单性和灵活性，为开放词汇检测提供了有效的预处理方案，且兼容任意图像字幕模型。
search_text: Open-Vocabulary Object Detection using Pseudo Caption Labels 使用伪标题标签的开放词汇对象检测 Recent open-vocabulary detection methods aim to detect novel objects by distilling knowledge from vision-language models (VLMs) trained on a vast amount of image-text pairs. To improve the effectiveness of these methods, researchers have utilized datasets with a large vocabulary that contains a large number of object classes, under the assumption that such data will enable models to extract comprehensive knowledge on the relationships between various objects and better generalize to unseen object classes. In this study, we argue that more fine-grained labels are necessary to extract richer knowledge about novel objects, including object attributes and relationships, in addition to their names. To address this challenge, we propose a simple and effective method named Pseudo Caption Labeling (PCL), which utilizes an image captioning model to generate captions that describe object instances from diverse perspectives. The resulting pseudo caption labels offer dense samples for knowledge distillation. On the LVIS benchmark, our best model trained on the de-duplicated VisualGenome dataset achieves an AP of 34.5 and an APr of 30.6, comparable to the state-of-the-art performance. PCL's simplicity and flexibility are other notable features, as it is a straightforward pre-processing technique that can be used with any image captioning model without imposing any restrictions on model architecture or training process. 最近的开放词汇检测方法旨在通过从经过大量图像文本对训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）中提取知识来检测新物体。为了提高这些方法的有效性，研究人员利用了包含大量对象类别的大词汇量数据集，假设这些数据将使模型能够提取有关各种对象之间关系的全面知识，并更好地推广到未见过的对象类别。在本研究中，我们认为需要更细粒度的标签来提取有关新对象的更丰富的知识，除了名称之外，还包括对象属性和关系。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种简单有效的方法，称为伪标题标签（PCL），它利用图像标题模型来生成从不同角度描述对象实例的标题。由此产生的伪标题标签为知识蒸馏提供了密集的样本。在 LVIS 基准上，我们在去重 VisualGenome 数据集上训练的最佳模型达到了 34.5 的 AP 和 30.6 的 APr，与最先进的性能相当。 PCL 的简单性和灵活性是其他显着特征，因为它是一种简单的预处理技术，可以与任何图像字幕模型一起使用，而不会对模型架构或训练过程施加任何限制。 本文提出了一种名为伪字幕标签（PCL）的方法，通过生成多视角的物体实例描述，提升开放词汇物体检测的效果。 Han-Cheol Cho,Won Young Jhoo,Wooyoung Kang,Byungseok Roh cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Md Sadman Sakib Rahman,Xilin Yang,Jingxi Li,Bijie Bai,Aydogan Ozcan
title: Universal Linear Intensity Transformations Using Spatially-Incoherent Diffractive Processors
title_zh: 使用空间非相干衍射处理器的通用线性强度变换
abstract: Under spatially-coherent light, a diffractive optical network composed of structured surfaces can be designed to perform any arbitrary complex-valued linear transformation between its input and output fields-of-view (FOVs) if the total number (N) of optimizable phase-only diffractive features is greater than or equal to ~2 Ni x No, where Ni and No refer to the number of useful pixels at the input and the output FOVs, respectively. Here we report the design of a spatially-incoherent diffractive optical processor that can approximate any arbitrary linear transformation in time-averaged intensity between its input and output FOVs. Under spatially-incoherent monochromatic light, the spatially-varying intensity point spread functon(H) of a diffractive network, corresponding to a given, arbitrarily-selected linear intensity transformation, can be written as H(m,n;m',n')=|h(m,n;m',n')|^2, where h is the spatially-coherent point-spread function of the same diffractive network, and (m,n) and (m',n') define the coordinates of the output and input FOVs, respectively. Using deep learning, supervised through examples of input-output profiles, we numerically demonstrate that a spatially-incoherent diffractive network can be trained to all-optically perform any arbitrary linear intensity transformation between its input and output if N is greater than or equal to ~2 Ni x No. These results constitute the first demonstration of universal linear intensity transformations performed on an input FOV under spatially-incoherent illumination and will be useful for designing all-optical visual processors that can work with incoherent, natural light.
summary: Under spatially-coherent light, a diffractive optical network composed of structured surfaces can be designed to perform any arbitrary complex-valued linear transformation between its input and output fields-of-view (FOVs) if the total number (N) of optimizable phase-only diffractive features is greater than or equal to ~2 Ni x No, where Ni and No refer to the number of useful pixels at the input and the output FOVs, respectively. Here we report the design of a spatially-incoherent diffractive optical processor that can approximate any arbitrary linear transformation in time-averaged intensity between its input and output FOVs. Under spatially-incoherent monochromatic light, the spatially-varying intensity point spread functon(H) of a diffractive network, corresponding to a given, arbitrarily-selected linear intensity transformation, can be written as H(m,n;m',n')=|h(m,n;m',n')|^2, where h is the spatially-coherent point-spread function of the same diffractive network, and (m,n) and (m',n') define the coordinates of the output and input FOVs, respectively. Using deep learning, supervised through examples of input-output profiles, we numerically demonstrate that a spatially-incoherent diffractive network can be trained to all-optically perform any arbitrary linear intensity transformation between its input and output if N is greater than or equal to ~2 Ni x No. These results constitute the first demonstration of universal linear intensity transformations performed on an input FOV under spatially-incoherent illumination and will be useful for designing all-optical visual processors that can work with incoherent, natural light.
abstract_zh: 在空间相干光下，如果可优化纯相位衍射特征的总数 (N) 大于或等于 ~2 Ni x No，则由结构化表面组成的衍射光学网络可以设计为在其输入和输出视场 (FOV) 之间执行任意复值线性变换，其中 Ni 和 No 分别指输入和输出 FOV 处的有用像素数。在这里，我们报告了一种空间非相干衍射光学处理器的设计，该处理器可以近似输入和输出视场之间时间平均强度的任意线性变换。在空间非相干单色光下，衍射网络的空间变化强度点扩散函数（H），对应于给定的、任意选择的线性强度变换，可以写为 H(m,n;m',n')=|h(m,n;m',n')|^2，其中 h 是同一衍射网络的空间相干点扩散函数，(m,n) 和(m',n') 分别定义输出和输入 FOV 的坐标。使用深度学习，通过输入输出配置文件的示例进行监督，我们以数值方式证明，如果 N 大于或等于 ~2 Ni x No，则可以训练空间非相干衍射网络以在其输入和输出之间全光学地执行任何任意线性强度变换。这些结果构成了在空间非相干照明下对输入 FOV 执行通用线性强度变换的首次演示，并将有助于设计可与非相干自然光一起工作的全光学视觉处理器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间非相干光的衍射光学处理器，能够通过深度学习实现任意线性强度变换。
AI.motivation: 传统相干光衍射网络需满足特定相位特征数量才能实现复杂变换，但实际应用中自然光多为非相干光，需突破相干光限制以拓展应用。
AI.method: 通过深度学习监督训练，利用输入输出强度分布样本，设计空间非相干光下衍射网络的点扩散函数模型，证明当可调相位特征数N≥2Ni×No时可实现任意线性变换。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了空间非相干衍射网络在满足N≥2Ni×No条件下可近似任意线性强度变换，这是首次在非相干光下实现此类通用变换。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为基于自然光的全光视觉处理器设计提供了理论基础，推动了非相干光环境下光学计算的发展。

authors_text: Yu-Neng Chuang,Ruixiang Tang,Xiaoqian Jiang,Xia Hu
title: SPeC: A Soft Prompt-Based Calibration on Performance Variability of Large Language Model in Clinical Notes Summarization
title_zh: SPeC：基于软提示的临床笔记摘要大语言模型性能变异性校准
abstract: Electronic health records (EHRs) store an extensive array of patient information, encompassing medical histories, diagnoses, treatments, and test outcomes. These records are crucial for enabling healthcare providers to make well-informed decisions regarding patient care. Summarizing clinical notes further assists healthcare professionals in pinpointing potential health risks and making better-informed decisions. This process contributes to reducing errors and enhancing patient outcomes by ensuring providers have access to the most pertinent and current patient data. Recent research has shown that incorporating prompts with large language models (LLMs) substantially boosts the efficacy of summarization tasks. However, we show that this approach also leads to increased output variance, resulting in notably divergent outputs even when prompts share similar meanings. To tackle this challenge, we introduce a model-agnostic Soft Prompt-Based Calibration (SPeC) pipeline that employs soft prompts to diminish variance while preserving the advantages of prompt-based summarization. Experimental findings on multiple clinical note tasks and LLMs indicate that our method not only bolsters performance but also effectively curbs variance for various LLMs, providing a more uniform and dependable solution for summarizing vital medical information.
summary: Electronic health records (EHRs) store an extensive array of patient information, encompassing medical histories, diagnoses, treatments, and test outcomes. These records are crucial for enabling healthcare providers to make well-informed decisions regarding patient care. Summarizing clinical notes further assists healthcare professionals in pinpointing potential health risks and making better-informed decisions. This process contributes to reducing errors and enhancing patient outcomes by ensuring providers have access to the most pertinent and current patient data. Recent research has shown that incorporating prompts with large language models (LLMs) substantially boosts the efficacy of summarization tasks. However, we show that this approach also leads to increased output variance, resulting in notably divergent outputs even when prompts share similar meanings. To tackle this challenge, we introduce a model-agnostic Soft Prompt-Based Calibration (SPeC) pipeline that employs soft prompts to diminish variance while preserving the advantages of prompt-based summarization. Experimental findings on multiple clinical note tasks and LLMs indicate that our method not only bolsters performance but also effectively curbs variance for various LLMs, providing a more uniform and dependable solution for summarizing vital medical information.
abstract_zh: 电子健康记录 (EHR) 存储大量患者信息，包括病史、诊断、治疗和测试结果。这些记录对于使医疗保健提供者能够就患者护理做出明智的决策至关重要。总结临床记录进一步帮助医疗保健专业人员查明潜在的健康风险并做出更明智的决策。通过确保提供者能够访问最相关和最新的患者数据，该过程有助于减少错误并提高患者治疗效果。最近的研究表明，将提示与大型语言模型 (LLM) 相结合可以大大提高摘要任务的效率。然而，我们表明这种方法也会导致输出方差增加，即使提示具有相似的含义，也会导致明显不同的输出。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一种与模型无关的基于软提示的校准（SPeC）管道，该管道采用软提示来减少方差，同时保留基于提示的摘要的优势。多个临床记录任务和法学硕士的实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅提高了性能，而且还有效地抑制了各种法学硕士的方差，为总结重要的医疗信息提供了更统一、更可靠的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于软提示的校准方法SPeC，用于减少大语言模型在临床笔记摘要任务中的输出差异，同时保持提示方法的优势。
AI.motivation: 尽管提示方法能提升临床笔记摘要效果，但相似含义的提示会导致输出差异显著，影响医疗决策的可靠性。
AI.method: 设计了一种模型无关的软提示校准流程SPeC，通过优化软提示机制降低输出方差，同时保留提示方法的性能优势。
AI.result: 实验表明SPeC在多个临床任务和LLM模型上均有效提升了性能并显著降低输出差异，提供了更统一的医疗信息摘要方案。
AI.conclusion: SPeC通过软提示校准平衡了大语言模型在临床摘要中的性能与一致性，为医疗场景提供了更可靠的解决方案。

search_text: SPeC: A Soft Prompt-Based Calibration on Performance Variability of Large Language Model in Clinical Notes Summarization SPeC：基于软提示的临床笔记摘要大语言模型性能变异性校准 Electronic health records (EHRs) store an extensive array of patient information, encompassing medical histories, diagnoses, treatments, and test outcomes. These records are crucial for enabling healthcare providers to make well-informed decisions regarding patient care. Summarizing clinical notes further assists healthcare professionals in pinpointing potential health risks and making better-informed decisions. This process contributes to reducing errors and enhancing patient outcomes by ensuring providers have access to the most pertinent and current patient data. Recent research has shown that incorporating prompts with large language models (LLMs) substantially boosts the efficacy of summarization tasks. However, we show that this approach also leads to increased output variance, resulting in notably divergent outputs even when prompts share similar meanings. To tackle this challenge, we introduce a model-agnostic Soft Prompt-Based Calibration (SPeC) pipeline that employs soft prompts to diminish variance while preserving the advantages of prompt-based summarization. Experimental findings on multiple clinical note tasks and LLMs indicate that our method not only bolsters performance but also effectively curbs variance for various LLMs, providing a more uniform and dependable solution for summarizing vital medical information. 电子健康记录 (EHR) 存储大量患者信息，包括病史、诊断、治疗和测试结果。这些记录对于使医疗保健提供者能够就患者护理做出明智的决策至关重要。总结临床记录进一步帮助医疗保健专业人员查明潜在的健康风险并做出更明智的决策。通过确保提供者能够访问最相关和最新的患者数据，该过程有助于减少错误并提高患者治疗效果。最近的研究表明，将提示与大型语言模型 (LLM) 相结合可以大大提高摘要任务的效率。然而，我们表明这种方法也会导致输出方差增加，即使提示具有相似的含义，也会导致明显不同的输出。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一种与模型无关的基于软提示的校准（SPeC）管道，该管道采用软提示来减少方差，同时保留基于提示的摘要的优势。多个临床记录任务和法学硕士的实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅提高了性能，而且还有效地抑制了各种法学硕士的方差，为总结重要的医疗信息提供了更统一、更可靠的解决方案。 本文提出了一种基于软提示的校准方法SPeC，用于减少大语言模型在临床笔记摘要任务中的输出差异，同时保持提示方法的优势。 Yu-Neng Chuang,Ruixiang Tang,Xiaoqian Jiang,Xia Hu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Alaleh Ahmadianshalchi,Syrine Belakaria,Janardhan Rao Doppa
title: Preference-Aware Constrained Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: 偏好感知约束多目标贝叶斯优化
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.06980
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.06980
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of constrained multi-objective optimization over black-box objective functions with practitioner-specified preferences over the objectives when a large fraction of the input space is infeasible (i.e., violates constraints). This problem arises in many engineering design problems including analog circuits and electric power system design. Our overall goal is to approximate the optimal Pareto set over the small fraction of feasible input designs. The key challenges include the huge size of the design space, multiple objectives and large number of constraints, and the small fraction of feasible input designs which can be identified only after performing expensive simulations. We propose a novel and efficient preference-aware constrained multi-objective Bayesian optimization approach referred to as PAC-MOO to address these challenges. The key idea is to learn surrogate models for both output objectives and constraints, and select the candidate input for evaluation in each iteration that maximizes the information gained about the optimal constrained Pareto front while factoring in the preferences over objectives. Our experiments on two real-world analog circuit design optimization problems demonstrate the efficacy of PAC-MOO over prior methods.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of constrained multi-objective optimization over black-box objective functions with practitioner-specified preferences over the objectives when a large fraction of the input space is infeasible (i.e., violates constraints). This problem arises in many engineering design problems including analog circuits and electric power system design. Our overall goal is to approximate the optimal Pareto set over the small fraction of feasible input designs. The key challenges include the huge size of the design space, multiple objectives and large number of constraints, and the small fraction of feasible input designs which can be identified only after performing expensive simulations. We propose a novel and efficient preference-aware constrained multi-objective Bayesian optimization approach referred to as PAC-MOO to address these challenges. The key idea is to learn surrogate models for both output objectives and constraints, and select the candidate input for evaluation in each iteration that maximizes the information gained about the optimal constrained Pareto front while factoring in the preferences over objectives. Our experiments on two real-world analog circuit design optimization problems demonstrate the efficacy of PAC-MOO over prior methods.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了当大部分输入空间不可行（即违反约束）时，黑盒目标函数的约束多目标优化问题，其中实践者对目标指定了偏好。这个问题出现在许多工程设计问题中，包括模拟电路和电力系统设计。我们的总体目标是在一小部分可行的输入设计上逼近最优帕累托集。主要挑战包括设计空间的巨大规模、多个目标和大量约束，以及只有在执行昂贵的模拟后才能识别的一小部分可行的输入设计。我们提出了一种新颖且有效的偏好感知约束多目标贝叶斯优化方法（称为 PAC-MOO）来应对这些挑战。关键思想是学习输出目标和约束的代理模型，并在每次迭代中选择用于评估的候选输入，以最大化获得的有关最优约束帕累托前沿的信息，同时考虑对目标的偏好。我们对两个现实世界模拟电路设计优化问题的实验证明了 PAC-MOO 相对于现有方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决在存在大量约束和目标偏好情况下，如何高效找到可行输入的帕累托最优集的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理大规模设计空间、多目标及大量约束下的优化问题，且可行解比例小导致仿真成本高，亟需更高效的优化方法。
AI.method: 提出PAC-MOO方法，通过构建目标与约束的代理模型，结合目标偏好，在每次迭代中选择能最大化信息增益的候选输入，以高效逼近可行解的帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PAC-MOO在两个实际模拟电路设计问题上优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: PAC-MOO有效应对了多目标、高约束及小规模可行解的优化挑战，为复杂工程设计提供了高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Meng Wang,Lianyu Wang,Xinxing Xu,Ke Zou,Yiming Qian,Rick Siow Mong Goh,Yong Liu,Huazhu Fu
title: Federated Uncertainty-Aware Aggregation for Fundus Diabetic Retinopathy Staging
title_zh: 用于眼底糖尿病视网膜病变分期的联合不确定性聚合
abstract: Deep learning models have shown promising performance in the field of diabetic retinopathy (DR) staging. However, collaboratively training a DR staging model across multiple institutions remains a challenge due to non-iid data, client reliability, and confidence evaluation of the prediction. To address these issues, we propose a novel federated uncertainty-aware aggregation paradigm (FedUAA), which considers the reliability of each client and produces a confidence estimation for the DR staging. In our FedUAA, an aggregated encoder is shared by all clients for learning a global representation of fundus images, while a novel temperature-warmed uncertainty head (TWEU) is utilized for each client for local personalized staging criteria. Our TWEU employs an evidential deep layer to produce the uncertainty score with the DR staging results for client reliability evaluation. Furthermore, we developed a novel uncertainty-aware weighting module (UAW) to dynamically adjust the weights of model aggregation based on the uncertainty score distribution of each client. In our experiments, we collect five publicly available datasets from different institutions to conduct a dataset for federated DR staging to satisfy the real non-iid condition. The experimental results demonstrate that our FedUAA achieves better DR staging performance with higher reliability compared to other federated learning methods. Our proposed FedUAA paradigm effectively addresses the challenges of collaboratively training DR staging models across multiple institutions, and provides a robust and reliable solution for the deployment of DR diagnosis models in real-world clinical scenarios.
summary: Deep learning models have shown promising performance in the field of diabetic retinopathy (DR) staging. However, collaboratively training a DR staging model across multiple institutions remains a challenge due to non-iid data, client reliability, and confidence evaluation of the prediction. To address these issues, we propose a novel federated uncertainty-aware aggregation paradigm (FedUAA), which considers the reliability of each client and produces a confidence estimation for the DR staging. In our FedUAA, an aggregated encoder is shared by all clients for learning a global representation of fundus images, while a novel temperature-warmed uncertainty head (TWEU) is utilized for each client for local personalized staging criteria. Our TWEU employs an evidential deep layer to produce the uncertainty score with the DR staging results for client reliability evaluation. Furthermore, we developed a novel uncertainty-aware weighting module (UAW) to dynamically adjust the weights of model aggregation based on the uncertainty score distribution of each client. In our experiments, we collect five publicly available datasets from different institutions to conduct a dataset for federated DR staging to satisfy the real non-iid condition. The experimental results demonstrate that our FedUAA achieves better DR staging performance with higher reliability compared to other federated learning methods. Our proposed FedUAA paradigm effectively addresses the challenges of collaboratively training DR staging models across multiple institutions, and provides a robust and reliable solution for the deployment of DR diagnosis models in real-world clinical scenarios.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型在糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分期领域表现出了良好的前景。然而，由于非独立同分布数据、客户可靠性和预测的置信度评估，跨多个机构协作训练 DR 分期模型仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的联合不确定性感知聚合范例（FedUAA），它考虑每个客户端的可靠性并为 DR 分期生成置信度估计。在我们的 FedUAA 中，所有客户共享聚合编码器，用于学习眼底图像的全局表示，同时为每个客户使用新颖的温度加热不确定性头 (TWEU)，以实现本地个性化分期标准。我们的 TWEU 采用证据深层来根据 DR 分期结果生成不确定性分数，以进行客户可靠性评估。此外，我们开发了一种新颖的不确定性感知加权模块（UAW），可以根据每个客户端的不确定性得分分布动态调整模型聚合的权重。在我们的实验中，我们收集了来自不同机构的五个公开数据集，以进行联邦灾难恢复分期的数据集，以满足真实的非独立同分布条件。实验结果表明，与其他联邦学习方法相比，我们的 FedUAA 实现了更好的 DR 分期性能和更高的可靠性。我们提出的 FedUAA 范例有效地解决了跨多个机构协作训练 DR 分期模型的挑战，并为在现实临床场景中部署 DR 诊断模型提供了强大而可靠的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联邦不确定性感知聚合方法（FedUAA），用于解决多机构协作训练糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分级模型时的数据非独立同分布、客户端可靠性和预测置信度评估问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在跨机构协作训练DR分级模型时面临非独立同分布数据、客户端可靠性差异及预测置信度评估不足等挑战，需开发更可靠且适应实际临床场景的解决方案。
AI.method: FedUAA包含共享的聚合编码器学习全局图像表示，以及每个客户端的温度预热不确定性头（TWEU）生成局部个性化分级标准。TWEU通过证据深度层生成不确定性评分，结合不确定性感知加权模块（UAW）动态调整模型聚合权重。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上的实验表明，FedUAA在DR分级性能和可靠性上优于其他联邦学习方法，有效应对了非独立同分布数据和客户端可靠性差异的挑战。
AI.conclusion: FedUAA通过不确定性感知机制显著提升了跨机构协作训练DR诊断模型的鲁棒性和可靠性，为实际临床部署提供了可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种联邦不确定性感知聚合方法（FedUAA），用于解决多机构协作训练糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分级模型时的数据非独立同分布、客户端可靠性和预测置信度评估问题。
motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在跨机构协作训练DR分级模型时面临非独立同分布数据、客户端可靠性差异及预测置信度评估不足等挑战，需开发更可靠且适应实际临床场景的解决方案。
method: FedUAA包含共享的聚合编码器学习全局图像表示，以及每个客户端的温度预热不确定性头（TWEU）生成局部个性化分级标准。TWEU通过证据深度层生成不确定性评分，结合不确定性感知加权模块（UAW）动态调整模型聚合权重。
result: 在五个公开数据集上的实验表明，FedUAA在DR分级性能和可靠性上优于其他联邦学习方法，有效应对了非独立同分布数据和客户端可靠性差异的挑战。
conclusion: FedUAA通过不确定性感知机制显著提升了跨机构协作训练DR诊断模型的鲁棒性和可靠性，为实际临床部署提供了可行方案。
search_text: Federated Uncertainty-Aware Aggregation for Fundus Diabetic Retinopathy Staging 用于眼底糖尿病视网膜病变分期的联合不确定性聚合 Deep learning models have shown promising performance in the field of diabetic retinopathy (DR) staging. However, collaboratively training a DR staging model across multiple institutions remains a challenge due to non-iid data, client reliability, and confidence evaluation of the prediction. To address these issues, we propose a novel federated uncertainty-aware aggregation paradigm (FedUAA), which considers the reliability of each client and produces a confidence estimation for the DR staging. In our FedUAA, an aggregated encoder is shared by all clients for learning a global representation of fundus images, while a novel temperature-warmed uncertainty head (TWEU) is utilized for each client for local personalized staging criteria. Our TWEU employs an evidential deep layer to produce the uncertainty score with the DR staging results for client reliability evaluation. Furthermore, we developed a novel uncertainty-aware weighting module (UAW) to dynamically adjust the weights of model aggregation based on the uncertainty score distribution of each client. In our experiments, we collect five publicly available datasets from different institutions to conduct a dataset for federated DR staging to satisfy the real non-iid condition. The experimental results demonstrate that our FedUAA achieves better DR staging performance with higher reliability compared to other federated learning methods. Our proposed FedUAA paradigm effectively addresses the challenges of collaboratively training DR staging models across multiple institutions, and provides a robust and reliable solution for the deployment of DR diagnosis models in real-world clinical scenarios. 深度学习模型在糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分期领域表现出了良好的前景。然而，由于非独立同分布数据、客户可靠性和预测的置信度评估，跨多个机构协作训练 DR 分期模型仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的联合不确定性感知聚合范例（FedUAA），它考虑每个客户端的可靠性并为 DR 分期生成置信度估计。在我们的 FedUAA 中，所有客户共享聚合编码器，用于学习眼底图像的全局表示，同时为每个客户使用新颖的温度加热不确定性头 (TWEU)，以实现本地个性化分期标准。我们的 TWEU 采用证据深层来根据 DR 分期结果生成不确定性分数，以进行客户可靠性评估。此外，我们开发了一种新颖的不确定性感知加权模块（UAW），可以根据每个客户端的不确定性得分分布动态调整模型聚合的权重。在我们的实验中，我们收集了来自不同机构的五个公开数据集，以进行联邦灾难恢复分期的数据集，以满足真实的非独立同分布条件。实验结果表明，与其他联邦学习方法相比，我们的 FedUAA 实现了更好的 DR 分期性能和更高的可靠性。我们提出的 FedUAA 范例有效地解决了跨多个机构协作训练 DR 分期模型的挑战，并为在现实临床场景中部署 DR 诊断模型提供了强大而可靠的解决方案。 本文提出一种联邦不确定性感知聚合方法（FedUAA），用于解决多机构协作训练糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分级模型时的数据非独立同分布、客户端可靠性和预测置信度评估问题。 Meng Wang,Lianyu Wang,Xinxing Xu,Ke Zou,Yiming Qian,Rick Siow Mong Goh,Yong Liu,Huazhu Fu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Fengjiao Zou,Hsien-Wen Deng,Tsing-Un Iunn,Jennifer Harper Ogle,Weimin Jin
title: V2V-based Collision-avoidance Decision Strategy for Autonomous Vehicles Interacting with Fully Occluded Pedestrians at Midblock on Multilane Roadways
title_zh: 基于 V2V 的自动驾驶车辆与多车道道路中段完全遮挡行人交互的防撞决策策略
abstract: Pedestrian occlusion is challenging for autonomous vehicles (AVs) at midblock locations on multilane roadways because an AV cannot detect crossing pedestrians that are fully occluded by downstream vehicles in adjacent lanes. This paper tests the capability of vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) communication between an AV and its downstream vehicles to share midblock pedestrian crossings information. The researchers developed a V2V-based collision-avoidance decision strategy and compared it to a base scenario (i.e., decision strategy without the utilization of V2V). Simulation results showed that for the base scenario, the near-zero time-to-collision (TTC) indicated no time for the AV to take appropriate action and resulted in dramatic braking followed by collisions. But the V2V-based collision-avoidance decision strategy allowed for a proportional braking approach to increase the TTC allowing the pedestrian to cross safely. To conclude, the V2V-based collision-avoidance decision strategy has higher safety benefits for an AV interacting with fully occluded pedestrians at midblock locations on multilane roadways.
summary: Pedestrian occlusion is challenging for autonomous vehicles (AVs) at midblock locations on multilane roadways because an AV cannot detect crossing pedestrians that are fully occluded by downstream vehicles in adjacent lanes. This paper tests the capability of vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) communication between an AV and its downstream vehicles to share midblock pedestrian crossings information. The researchers developed a V2V-based collision-avoidance decision strategy and compared it to a base scenario (i.e., decision strategy without the utilization of V2V). Simulation results showed that for the base scenario, the near-zero time-to-collision (TTC) indicated no time for the AV to take appropriate action and resulted in dramatic braking followed by collisions. But the V2V-based collision-avoidance decision strategy allowed for a proportional braking approach to increase the TTC allowing the pedestrian to cross safely. To conclude, the V2V-based collision-avoidance decision strategy has higher safety benefits for an AV interacting with fully occluded pedestrians at midblock locations on multilane roadways.
abstract_zh: 行人遮挡对于多车道道路中路段位置的自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 来说是一个挑战，因为自动驾驶汽车无法检测到被相邻车道下游车辆完全遮挡的过路行人。本文测试了自动驾驶汽车与其下游车辆之间的车对车 (V2V) 通信能力，以共享街区中的人行横道信息。研究人员开发了一种基于 V2V 的防撞决策策略，并将其与基本场景（即不使用 V2V 的决策策略）进行比较。仿真结果表明，对于基本场景，接近零的碰撞时间 (TTC) 表明自动驾驶汽车没有时间采取适当的行动，并导致剧烈制动，然后发生碰撞。但基于 V2V 的防撞决策策略允许采用比例制动方法来增加 TTC，从而使行人安全过马路。总而言之，基于 V2V 的防撞决策策略对于自动驾驶汽车在多车道道路的中间街区位置与完全遮挡的行人互动具有更高的安全效益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于车对车通信（V2V）的避撞决策策略，用于自动驾驶车辆在多车道道路上与完全被遮挡的行人交互时的避撞问题。
AI.motivation: 在多车道道路上，自动驾驶车辆难以检测到被下游车辆完全遮挡的行人，这给避撞决策带来了挑战。因此，需要一种有效的解决方案来提高安全性。
AI.method: 研究人员开发了一种基于V2V通信的避撞决策策略，并与没有使用V2V通信的基础场景进行了比较，通过仿真验证了该策略的有效性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，在基础场景下，车辆几乎无法避免碰撞，而在基于V2V的策略下，车辆能够通过比例制动增加碰撞时间，从而确保行人安全通过。
AI.conclusion: 基于V2V的避撞决策策略在多车道道路上与完全遮挡的行人交互时具有更高的安全效益。

authors_text: Cheng Guo,Leidong Fan,Ziyu Xue,and Xiuhua Jiang
title: Learning a Practical SDR-to-HDRTV Up-conversion using New Dataset and Degradation Models
title_zh: 使用新数据集和退化模型学习实用的 SDR 到 HDRTV 上转换
abstract: In media industry, the demand of SDR-to-HDRTV up-conversion arises when users possess HDR-WCG (high dynamic range-wide color gamut) TVs while most off-the-shelf footage is still in SDR (standard dynamic range). The research community has started tackling this low-level vision task by learning-based approaches. When applied to real SDR, yet, current methods tend to produce dim and desaturated result, making nearly no improvement on viewing experience. Different from other network-oriented methods, we attribute such deficiency to training set (HDR-SDR pair). Consequently, we propose new HDRTV dataset (dubbed HDRTV4K) and new HDR-to-SDR degradation models. Then, it's used to train a luminance-segmented network (LSN) consisting of a global mapping trunk, and two Transformer branches on bright and dark luminance range. We also update assessment criteria by tailored metrics and subjective experiment. Finally, ablation studies are conducted to prove the effectiveness. Our work is available at: https://github.com/AndreGuo/HDRTVDM.
summary: In media industry, the demand of SDR-to-HDRTV up-conversion arises when users possess HDR-WCG (high dynamic range-wide color gamut) TVs while most off-the-shelf footage is still in SDR (standard dynamic range). The research community has started tackling this low-level vision task by learning-based approaches. When applied to real SDR, yet, current methods tend to produce dim and desaturated result, making nearly no improvement on viewing experience. Different from other network-oriented methods, we attribute such deficiency to training set (HDR-SDR pair). Consequently, we propose new HDRTV dataset (dubbed HDRTV4K) and new HDR-to-SDR degradation models. Then, it's used to train a luminance-segmented network (LSN) consisting of a global mapping trunk, and two Transformer branches on bright and dark luminance range. We also update assessment criteria by tailored metrics and subjective experiment. Finally, ablation studies are conducted to prove the effectiveness. Our work is available at: https://github.com/AndreGuo/HDRTVDM.
abstract_zh: 在媒体行业，当用户拥有 HDR-WCG（高动态范围广色域）电视，而大多数现成的素材仍为 SDR（标准动态范围）时，就会出现 SDR 到 HDRTV 上转换的需求。研究界已经开始通过基于学习的方法来解决这一低级视觉任务。然而，当应用于真实的 SDR 时，当前的方法往往会产生暗淡和去饱和的结果，几乎没有改善观看体验。与其他面向网络的方法不同，我们将这种缺陷归因于训练集（HDR-SDR 对）。因此，我们提出了新的 HDRTV 数据集（称为 HDRTV4K）和新的 HDR 到 SDR 退化模型。然后，它用于训练亮度分段网络 (LSN)，该网络由全局映射主干和亮暗亮度范围上的两个 Transformer 分支组成。我们还通过定制指标和主观实验来更新评估标准。最后，进行消融研究以证明其有效性。我们的工作可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/AndreGuo/HDRTVDM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于新数据集和退化模型的SDR到HDRTV上转换方法，通过改进训练数据和网络结构提升视觉效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法在真实SDR内容上转换时效果不佳，产生暗淡且饱和度低的结果，主要归因于训练数据（HDR-SDR对）的不足。
AI.method: 构建新HDRTV4K数据集及HDR到SDR退化模型，设计亮度分割网络（LSN），包含全局映射主干和明暗亮度范围的Transformer分支，并更新评估指标与主观实验。
AI.result: 消融实验证明方法有效性，客观指标和主观实验均显示转换效果显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进训练数据与网络结构，本文方法有效解决了SDR到HDRTV上转换的视觉质量缺陷。

search_text: Learning a Practical SDR-to-HDRTV Up-conversion using New Dataset and Degradation Models 使用新数据集和退化模型学习实用的 SDR 到 HDRTV 上转换 In media industry, the demand of SDR-to-HDRTV up-conversion arises when users possess HDR-WCG (high dynamic range-wide color gamut) TVs while most off-the-shelf footage is still in SDR (standard dynamic range). The research community has started tackling this low-level vision task by learning-based approaches. When applied to real SDR, yet, current methods tend to produce dim and desaturated result, making nearly no improvement on viewing experience. Different from other network-oriented methods, we attribute such deficiency to training set (HDR-SDR pair). Consequently, we propose new HDRTV dataset (dubbed HDRTV4K) and new HDR-to-SDR degradation models. Then, it's used to train a luminance-segmented network (LSN) consisting of a global mapping trunk, and two Transformer branches on bright and dark luminance range. We also update assessment criteria by tailored metrics and subjective experiment. Finally, ablation studies are conducted to prove the effectiveness. Our work is available at: https://github.com/AndreGuo/HDRTVDM. 在媒体行业，当用户拥有 HDR-WCG（高动态范围广色域）电视，而大多数现成的素材仍为 SDR（标准动态范围）时，就会出现 SDR 到 HDRTV 上转换的需求。研究界已经开始通过基于学习的方法来解决这一低级视觉任务。然而，当应用于真实的 SDR 时，当前的方法往往会产生暗淡和去饱和的结果，几乎没有改善观看体验。与其他面向网络的方法不同，我们将这种缺陷归因于训练集（HDR-SDR 对）。因此，我们提出了新的 HDRTV 数据集（称为 HDRTV4K）和新的 HDR 到 SDR 退化模型。然后，它用于训练亮度分段网络 (LSN)，该网络由全局映射主干和亮暗亮度范围上的两个 Transformer 分支组成。我们还通过定制指标和主观实验来更新评估标准。最后，进行消融研究以证明其有效性。我们的工作可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/AndreGuo/HDRTVDM。 本文提出一种基于新数据集和退化模型的SDR到HDRTV上转换方法，通过改进训练数据和网络结构提升视觉效果。 Cheng Guo,Leidong Fan,Ziyu Xue,and Xiuhua Jiang cs.MM,cs.CV

authors_text: Shoichi Koyama,Keisuke Kimura,Natsuki Ueno
title: Weighted Pressure and Mode Matching for Sound Field Reproduction: Theoretical and Experimental Comparisons
title_zh: 声场再现的加权压力和模式匹配：理论与实验比较
comment: Accepted to Journal of Audio Engineering Society, Special Issue on Spatial Audio
comments: Accepted to Journal of Audio Engineering Society, Special Issue on Spatial Audio
abstract: Two sound field reproduction methods, weighted pressure matching and weighted mode matching, are theoretically and experimentally compared. The weighted pressure and mode matching are a generalization of conventional pressure and mode matching, respectively. Both methods are derived by introducing a weighting matrix in the pressure and mode matching. The weighting matrix in the weighted pressure matching is defined on the basis of the kernel interpolation of the sound field from pressure at a discrete set of control points. In the weighted mode matching, the weighting matrix is defined by a regional integration of spherical wavefunctions. It is theoretically shown that the weighted pressure matching is a special case of the weighted mode matching by infinite-dimensional harmonic analysis for estimating expansion coefficients from pressure observations. The difference between the two methods are discussed through experiments.
summary: Two sound field reproduction methods, weighted pressure matching and weighted mode matching, are theoretically and experimentally compared. The weighted pressure and mode matching are a generalization of conventional pressure and mode matching, respectively. Both methods are derived by introducing a weighting matrix in the pressure and mode matching. The weighting matrix in the weighted pressure matching is defined on the basis of the kernel interpolation of the sound field from pressure at a discrete set of control points. In the weighted mode matching, the weighting matrix is defined by a regional integration of spherical wavefunctions. It is theoretically shown that the weighted pressure matching is a special case of the weighted mode matching by infinite-dimensional harmonic analysis for estimating expansion coefficients from pressure observations. The difference between the two methods are discussed through experiments.
abstract_zh: 对加权压力匹配和加权模式匹配两种声场再现方法进行了理论和实验比较。加权压力和模式匹配分别是传统压力和模式匹配的推广。这两种方法都是通过在压力和模式匹配中引入加权矩阵而导出的。加权压力匹配中的加权矩阵是根据一组离散控制点处的压力对声场进行核插值来定义的。在加权模式匹配中，加权矩阵由球面波函数的区域积分定义。理论上表明，加权压力匹配是通过无限维调和分析进行加权模式匹配的特例，用于根据压力观测值估计膨胀系数。通过实验讨论了两种方法的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了两种声场再现方法：加权压力匹配和加权模式匹配。
AI.motivation: 为了改进传统声场再现方法，本文提出了一种基于加权矩阵的改进方法，并对其进行理论与实验比较。
AI.method: 通过引入加权矩阵，分别对传统压力匹配和模式匹配方法进行推广。加权压力匹配基于声场的核插值，加权模式匹配基于球面波函数的区域积分。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，加权压力匹配是加权模式匹配在无限维谐波分析下的特例。实验讨论了两种方法的差异。
AI.conclusion: 加权模式匹配是一种更通用的方法，而加权压力匹配是其特例，两种方法在实际应用中各有优劣。

authors_text: Hamid Ghaderi,Brandon Foreman,Amin Nayebi,Sindhu Tipirneni,Chandan K. Reddy,Vignesh Subbian
title: Identifying TBI Physiological States by Clustering Multivariate Clinical Time-Series Data
title_zh: 通过聚类多变量临床时间序列数据来识别 TBI 生理状态
abstract: Determining clinically relevant physiological states from multivariate time series data with missing values is essential for providing appropriate treatment for acute conditions such as Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI), respiratory failure, and heart failure. Utilizing non-temporal clustering or data imputation and aggregation techniques may lead to loss of valuable information and biased analyses. In our study, we apply the SLAC-Time algorithm, an innovative self-supervision-based approach that maintains data integrity by avoiding imputation or aggregation, offering a more useful representation of acute patient states. By using SLAC-Time to cluster data in a large research dataset, we identified three distinct TBI physiological states and their specific feature profiles. We employed various clustering evaluation metrics and incorporated input from a clinical domain expert to validate and interpret the identified physiological states. Further, we discovered how specific clinical events and interventions can influence patient states and state transitions.
summary: Determining clinically relevant physiological states from multivariate time series data with missing values is essential for providing appropriate treatment for acute conditions such as Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI), respiratory failure, and heart failure. Utilizing non-temporal clustering or data imputation and aggregation techniques may lead to loss of valuable information and biased analyses. In our study, we apply the SLAC-Time algorithm, an innovative self-supervision-based approach that maintains data integrity by avoiding imputation or aggregation, offering a more useful representation of acute patient states. By using SLAC-Time to cluster data in a large research dataset, we identified three distinct TBI physiological states and their specific feature profiles. We employed various clustering evaluation metrics and incorporated input from a clinical domain expert to validate and interpret the identified physiological states. Further, we discovered how specific clinical events and interventions can influence patient states and state transitions.
abstract_zh: 从具有缺失值的多变量时间序列数据中确定临床相关的生理状态对于为创伤性脑损伤 (TBI)、呼吸衰竭和心力衰竭等急性疾病提供适当的治疗至关重要。使用非时间聚类或数据插补和聚合技术可能会导致有价值信息的丢失和分析的偏差。在我们的研究中，我们应用了 SLAC-Time 算法，这是一种基于自我监督的创新方法，通过避免插补或聚合来保持数据完整性，从而提供更有用的急性患者状态表示。通过使用 SLAC-Time 对大型研究数据集中的数据进行聚类，我们确定了三种不同的 TBI 生理状态及其具体特征概况。我们采用了各种聚类评估指标，并结合了临床领域专家的输入来验证和解释所识别的生理状态。此外，我们发现特定的临床事件和干预措施如何影响患者状态和状态转变。

AI.tldr: 通过聚类多变量临床时间序列数据识别创伤性脑损伤（TBI）的生理状态。
AI.motivation: 传统方法如非时间聚类或数据填补可能导致信息丢失和分析偏差，需开发更有效的方法处理缺失值以准确识别TBI患者的生理状态。
AI.method: 采用SLAC-Time算法，一种无需填补或聚合数据的自监督方法，直接对多变量时间序列进行聚类分析。
AI.result: 在大型数据集中识别出三种TBI生理状态及其特征谱，并通过临床专家验证；发现临床事件和干预对患者状态及转换的影响。
AI.conclusion: SLAC-Time算法能有效保留时间序列数据完整性，准确识别TBI生理状态，为个性化治疗提供依据。

authors_text: Ruofan Liang,Huiting Chen,Chunlin Li,Fan Chen,Selvakumar Panneer,Nandita Vijaykumar
title: ENVIDR: Implicit Differentiable Renderer with Neural Environment Lighting
title_zh: ENVIDR：具有神经环境照明的隐式可微渲染器
abstract: Recent advances in neural rendering have shown great potential for reconstructing scenes from multiview images. However, accurately representing objects with glossy surfaces remains a challenge for existing methods. In this work, we introduce ENVIDR, a rendering and modeling framework for high-quality rendering and reconstruction of surfaces with challenging specular reflections. To achieve this, we first propose a novel neural renderer with decomposed rendering components to learn the interaction between surface and environment lighting. This renderer is trained using existing physically based renderers and is decoupled from actual scene representations. We then propose an SDF-based neural surface model that leverages this learned neural renderer to represent general scenes. Our model additionally synthesizes indirect illuminations caused by inter-reflections from shiny surfaces by marching surface-reflected rays. We demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-art methods on challenging shiny scenes, providing high-quality rendering of specular reflections while also enabling material editing and scene relighting.
summary: Recent advances in neural rendering have shown great potential for reconstructing scenes from multiview images. However, accurately representing objects with glossy surfaces remains a challenge for existing methods. In this work, we introduce ENVIDR, a rendering and modeling framework for high-quality rendering and reconstruction of surfaces with challenging specular reflections. To achieve this, we first propose a novel neural renderer with decomposed rendering components to learn the interaction between surface and environment lighting. This renderer is trained using existing physically based renderers and is decoupled from actual scene representations. We then propose an SDF-based neural surface model that leverages this learned neural renderer to represent general scenes. Our model additionally synthesizes indirect illuminations caused by inter-reflections from shiny surfaces by marching surface-reflected rays. We demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-art methods on challenging shiny scenes, providing high-quality rendering of specular reflections while also enabling material editing and scene relighting.
abstract_zh: 神经渲染的最新进展显示出从多视图图像重建场景的巨大潜力。然而，准确地表示具有光泽表面的物体仍然是现有方法的一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 ENVIDR，这是一种渲染和建模框架，用于对具有挑战性镜面反射的表面进行高质量渲染和重建。为了实现这一目标，我们首先提出了一种新颖的神经渲染器，具有分解的渲染组件，以学习表面和环境照明之间的交互。该渲染器使用现有的基于物理的渲染器进行训练，并与实际场景表示解耦。然后，我们提出了一种基于 SDF 的神经表面模型，利用这种学习的神经渲染器来表示一般场景。我们的模型还通过行进表面反射光线来合成由闪亮表面的相互反射引起的间接照明。我们证明，我们的方法在具有挑战性的闪亮场景上优于最先进的方法，提供高质量的镜面反射渲染，同时还支持材质编辑和场景重新照明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ENVIDR框架，用于高质量渲染和重建具有挑战性镜面反射的表面场景。
AI.motivation: 现有神经渲染方法在处理光泽表面时存在准确性不足的问题，难以有效建模镜面反射和间接光照。
AI.method: 设计分解式神经渲染器学习表面与环境光的交互，并结合SDF神经表面模型与光线追踪技术合成间接光照。
AI.result: 在复杂镜面场景测试中优于现有方法，实现高质量镜面反射渲染并支持材质编辑和场景重照明。
AI.conclusion: ENVIDR通过解耦渲染组件和物理渲染器，有效解决了光泽表面重建难题，拓展了神经渲染的应用场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ENVIDR框架，用于高质量渲染和重建具有挑战性镜面反射的表面场景。
ai_content.motivation: 现有神经渲染方法在处理光泽表面时存在准确性不足的问题，难以有效建模镜面反射和间接光照。

ai_content.conclusion: ENVIDR通过解耦渲染组件和物理渲染器，有效解决了光泽表面重建难题，拓展了神经渲染的应用场景。

search_text: ENVIDR: Implicit Differentiable Renderer with Neural Environment Lighting ENVIDR：具有神经环境照明的隐式可微渲染器 Recent advances in neural rendering have shown great potential for reconstructing scenes from multiview images. However, accurately representing objects with glossy surfaces remains a challenge for existing methods. In this work, we introduce ENVIDR, a rendering and modeling framework for high-quality rendering and reconstruction of surfaces with challenging specular reflections. To achieve this, we first propose a novel neural renderer with decomposed rendering components to learn the interaction between surface and environment lighting. This renderer is trained using existing physically based renderers and is decoupled from actual scene representations. We then propose an SDF-based neural surface model that leverages this learned neural renderer to represent general scenes. Our model additionally synthesizes indirect illuminations caused by inter-reflections from shiny surfaces by marching surface-reflected rays. We demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-art methods on challenging shiny scenes, providing high-quality rendering of specular reflections while also enabling material editing and scene relighting. 神经渲染的最新进展显示出从多视图图像重建场景的巨大潜力。然而，准确地表示具有光泽表面的物体仍然是现有方法的一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 ENVIDR，这是一种渲染和建模框架，用于对具有挑战性镜面反射的表面进行高质量渲染和重建。为了实现这一目标，我们首先提出了一种新颖的神经渲染器，具有分解的渲染组件，以学习表面和环境照明之间的交互。该渲染器使用现有的基于物理的渲染器进行训练，并与实际场景表示解耦。然后，我们提出了一种基于 SDF 的神经表面模型，利用这种学习的神经渲染器来表示一般场景。我们的模型还通过行进表面反射光线来合成由闪亮表面的相互反射引起的间接照明。我们证明，我们的方法在具有挑战性的闪亮场景上优于最先进的方法，提供高质量的镜面反射渲染，同时还支持材质编辑和场景重新照明。 本文提出ENVIDR框架，用于高质量渲染和重建具有挑战性镜面反射的表面场景。 Ruofan Liang,Huiting Chen,Chunlin Li,Fan Chen,Selvakumar Panneer,Nandita Vijaykumar cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG
